papers.title: Can Early Intervention Reduce Future Child Maltreatment?
papers.authors: Anna Aizer, Emilia Brito Rebolledo
papers.abstract: Children with a disability are 3.5 times more likely to be maltreated. Federal Early Intervention (EI) serves 426,000 children 0-3 with a disability, 3.7% of the entire population under three. EI’s objective is to support families in caring for their children’s special needs. Compared to children evaluated but ineligible for EI, children receiving EI in the first year of life are 3.3 percentage points less likely to be maltreated later in life, a decline of 45%, with smaller effects for those receiving services later. Targeting at-risk children, intervening early, and engaging with families in a cooperative manner effectively reduces future maltreatment.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I18, I28, J12, J13, J14
papers.zh_title: 早期干预能否减少未来的儿童虐待？
papers.zh_abstract: 残疾儿童遭受虐待的可能性是其他儿童的3.5倍。联邦早期干预项目为42.6万名0-3岁的残疾儿童提供服务，占三岁以下总人口的3.7%。早期干预的目标是支持家庭照顾孩子的特殊需求。与经过评估但不符合早期干预条件的儿童相比，在生命第一年接受早期干预的儿童未来遭受虐待的可能性低3.3个百分点，降幅达45%，而较晚接受服务的儿童效果较小。针对高危儿童、及早干预并以合作方式与家庭互动，能有效减少未来的虐待行为。

papers.title: Corporate Resiliency and the Choice Between Financial and Operational Hedging
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Heitor Almeida, Yakov Amihud, Ping Liu
papers.abstract: We investigate how firms manage financial default risk (on debt) and operational default risk (on delivery obligations). Financially constrained firms reduce operational hedging through inventory and supply chain in favor of cash holdings. Our model predicts that firms’ markup increases with financial default risk as they cut operational hedging costs. Empirical analysis confirms this prediction and shows that the markup-credit risk relationship strengthens during adverse aggregate shocks, particularly for firms exposed to lending disruptions. Market power alone cannot explain this relationship, which reflects firms’ strategic adjustments in operational hedging practices.
papers.zh_title: 企业韧性与金融对冲与运营对冲之间的选择
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了企业如何管理财务违约风险（针对债务）和运营违约风险（针对交付义务）。财务受限的企业会减少通过库存和供应链进行的运营对冲，转而增加现金持有。我们的模型预测，随着企业削减运营对冲成本，其加价率会随着财务违约风险的增加而上升。实证分析证实了这一预测，并表明在不利的总冲击期间，加价率与信用风险之间的关系会加强，特别是对于那些面临贷款中断风险的企业。仅凭市场力量无法解释这种关系，它反映了企业在运营对冲实践中的战略调整。

papers.title: The Comovement of Voter Preferences: Insights from U.S. Presidential Election Prediction Markets Beyond Polls
papers.authors: Mikhail Chernov, Vadim Elenev, Dongho Song
papers.abstract: We propose a novel time-series econometric framework to forecast U.S. Presidential election outcomes in real time by combining polling data, economic fundamentals, and political prediction market prices. Our model estimates the joint dynamics of voter preferences across states. Applying our approach to the 2024 Presidential Election, we find a two-factor structure driving the vast majority of the variation in voter preferences. We identify electorally similar state clusters without relying on historical data or demographic models of voter behavior. Our simulations quantify the correlations between state-level election outcomes. Failing to take the correlations into account can bias the forecasted win probability for a given candidate by more than 10 percentage points. We find Pennsylvania to be the most pivotal state in the 2024 election. Our results provide insights for election observers, candidates, and traders.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, PE, POL；JEL：C32, C53, D72, P0
papers.zh_title: 选民偏好的共同变动：来自超越民调的美国总统选举预测市场的洞见
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新颖的时间序列计量经济学框架，通过结合民调数据、经济基本面和政治预测市场价格，实时预测美国总统选举结果。我们的模型估计了各州选民偏好的联合动态。将我们的方法应用于2024年总统选举，我们发现一个双因子结构驱动了选民偏好的绝大部分变化。我们在不依赖历史数据或选民行为人口统计模型的情况下，识别出选举上相似的州集群。我们的模拟量化了州级选举结果之间的相关性。忽视这些相关性可能会使给定候选人的预测获胜概率偏差超过10个百分点。我们发现宾夕法尼亚州是2024年选举中最关键的州。我们的结果为选举观察者、候选人和交易者提供了洞见。

papers.title: Calling All Parents: Leveraging Behavioral Insights to Boost Early Childhood Outcomes in the Developing World
papers.authors: Juanita Bloomfield, Ana I. Balsa, Alejandro Cid, Philip Oreopoulos
papers.abstract: Early childhood in developing countries faces a greater prevalence of risk factors and limited resources, underscoring the need for effective, scalable support models. We develop and experimentally evaluate a multi-component approach to enhance family well-being over-the-phone. The program combines scalable outreaches including calls by a teleoperator, messages, a chatbot, and an AI tool. Targeted at highly vulnerable families with children aged 0 to 3 in Uruguay, the intervention promotes positive parenting practices at home, fosters language development, and provides personalized assistance to help families access government benefits. The intervention was implemented with 1,360 families eligible for support from the government agency Uruguay Crece Contigo over an eight-month period. We find that the program increases weekly frequency of parental engagement in stimulating activities and reduces parental stress. Treated families gain enhanced access to social benefits, including cash transfers and employment support programs.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS；JEL：I20, J24, O15
papers.zh_title: 呼唤所有家长：利用行为洞见促进发展中国家的儿童早期发展成果
papers.zh_abstract: 发展中国家的儿童早期面临更高的风险因素和有限的资源，这凸显了对有效、可扩展的支持模式的需求。我们开发并通过实验评估了一种通过电话提升家庭福祉的多组件方法。该项目结合了可扩展的外联活动，包括电话操作员的通话、短信、聊天机器人和人工智能工具。该干预措施针对乌拉圭有0至3岁儿童的高度脆弱家庭，旨在促进家中的积极养育实践、培养语言发展，并提供个性化帮助以协助家庭获取政府福利。该干预措施在八个月期间对符合政府机构Uruguay Crece Contigo支持条件的1,360个家庭实施。我们发现，该项目增加了父母每周参与激励活动的频率，并减少了父母的压力。接受干预的家庭获得了更好的社会福利获取渠道，包括现金转移和就业支持项目。

papers.title: Distance to Degrees: How College Proximity Shapes Students’ Enrollment Choices and Attainment Across Race-Ethnicity and Socioeconomic Status
papers.authors: Riley K. Acton, Kalena Cortes, Lois Miller, Camila Morales
papers.abstract: Leveraging rich data on the universe of Texas high school graduates, we estimate how the relationship between geographic access to public two- and four-year postsecondary institutions and postsecondary outcomes varies across race-ethnicity and socioeconomic status. We find that students are sensitive to the distance they must travel to access public colleges and universities, but there are heterogeneous effects across students – particularly with regard to distance to public two-year colleges (i.e., community colleges). White, Asian, and higher-income students who live in a community college desert (i.e., at least 30 minutes driving time from the nearest public two-year college) substitute towards four-year colleges and are more likely to complete bachelor’s degrees. Meanwhile, Black, Hispanic, and lower-income students respond to living in a community college desert by forgoing college enrollment altogether, reducing the likelihood that they earn associate’s and reducing the likelihood that they ultimately transfer to four-year colleges and earn bachelor’s degrees. These relationships persist up to eight years following high school graduation, resulting in substantial long-term gaps in overall degree attainment by race-ethnicity and income in areas with limited postsecondary access.
papers.zh_title: 距离学位的距离：大学邻近性如何影响不同种族-民族和社会经济地位学生的入学选择与学业成就
papers.zh_abstract: 利用德克萨斯州所有高中毕业生的丰富数据，我们估算了地理上接近公立两年制和四年制高等教育机构与高等教育成果之间的关系如何因种族-民族和社会经济地位而异。我们发现学生对就读公立学院和大学所需通勤的距离很敏感，但不同学生之间存在异质性效应——特别是关于与公立两年制学院（即社区学院）的距离。白人、亚裔和高收入学生如果居住在社区学院荒漠（即距离最近的公立两年制学院至少30分钟车程），会转向四年制大学，并且更有可能完成学士学位。与此同时，黑人、西班牙裔和低收入学生面对居住在社区学院荒漠的反应是完全放弃大学入学，这降低了他们获得副学士学位的可能性，并最终降低了他们转入四年制大学并获得学士学位的可能性。这些关系在高中毕业后的八年内持续存在，导致在高等教育机会有限的地区，不同种族-民族和收入群体在总体学位获得方面存在显著的长期差距。

papers.title: Limited Risk Transfer Between Investors: A New Benchmark for Macro-Finance Models
papers.authors: Xavier Gabaix, Ralph S. J. Koijen, Federico Mainardi, Sangmin Simon Oh, Motohiro Yogo
papers.abstract: We define risk transfer as the percent change in the market risk exposure for a group of investors over a given period. We estimate risk transfer using novel data on U.S. investors' portfolio holdings, flows, and returns at the security level with comprehensive coverage across asset classes and broad coverage across the wealth distribution (including 400 billionaires). Our key finding is that risk transfer is small with a mean absolute value of 0.65% per quarter. Leading macro-finance models with heterogeneous investors predict risk transfer that exceeds our estimate by a factor greater than ten because investors react too much to the time-varying equity premium. Thus, the small risk transfer is a new moment to evaluate macro-finance models. We develop a model with inelastic demand, calibrated to the standard asset pricing moments on realized and expected stock returns, that explains the observed risk transfer. The model is adaptable to other macro-finance applications with heterogeneous households.
papers.zh_title: 投资者之间的有限风险转移：宏观金融模型的新基准
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将风险转移定义为在给定时期内，一组投资者的市场风险敞口的百分比变化。我们使用关于美国投资者在证券层面的投资组合持有、资金流和回报的新数据来估计风险转移，这些数据全面覆盖了资产类别，并广泛覆盖了财富分布（包括400位亿万富翁）。我们的关键发现是风险转移很小，其平均绝对值为每季度0.65%。领先的包含异质性投资者的宏观金融模型预测的风险转移超过我们估计的十倍以上，因为投资者对时变股权溢价的反应过度。因此，小的风险转移是评估宏观金融模型的一个新矩。我们开发了一个具有无弹性需求的模型，该模型根据已实现和预期股票回报的标准资产定价矩进行校准，解释了观察到的风险转移。该模型可适用于其他包含异质性家庭的宏观金融应用。

papers.title: Strategic Commitments to Decarbonize: The Role of Large Firms, Common Ownership, and Governments
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Robert F. Engle III, Olivier Wang
papers.abstract: We study how government policies and corporate commitments to decarbonize interact under two externalities: environmental damages and green innovation spillovers. Unconstrained carbon taxes and innovation subsidies could achieve first-best outcomes, but when government policies face constraints, commitments by large firms and institutional investors can serve as profit-driven coordination devices that spur green innovation and technology adoption, and thereby reduce overall transition costs. Firm commitments also enhance government policy credibility by lowering the need for high future carbon taxes. Our empirical evidence confirms that firm size and green common ownership drive Net Zero commitments and decarbonization investments.
papers.zh_title: 脱碳的战略承诺：大企业、共同所有权和政府的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了政府政策与企业脱碳承诺如何在两种外部性（环境损害和绿色创新溢出）下相互作用。无约束的碳税和创新补贴可以实现最优结果，但当政府政策面临约束时，大企业和机构投资者的承诺可以作为利润驱动的协调机制，刺激绿色创新和技术采用，从而降低整体转型成本。企业承诺还通过降低未来高碳税的需求来增强政府政策的可信度。我们的实证证据证实，企业规模和绿色共同所有权推动了净零承诺和脱碳投资。

papers.title: Are Big Cities Important for Economic Growth?
papers.authors: Matthew Turner, David N. Weil
papers.abstract: Cities are often described as engines of economic growth. We assess this statement quantitatively. We focus on two mechanisms: a static agglomeration effect that makes production in bigger cities more efficient, and a dynamic effect whereby urban scale impacts the productivity of invention, which in turn determines the speed of technological progress for the country as a whole. Using estimates of these effects from the literature and MSA-level patent and population data since 1900, we ask how much lower US output would be in 2010 if city size had been limited to one million or one hundred thousand starting in 1900. These effects are small. If city sizes had been limited to one million people since 1900, output in 2010 would have been only 8% lower than its observed value.
papers.zh_title: 大城市对经济增长重要吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 城市常被描述为经济增长的引擎。我们对此说法进行了定量评估。我们关注两种机制：一种静态集聚效应，使大城市的生产更高效；以及一种动态效应，即城市规模影响发明的生产率，进而决定整个国家的技术进步速度。利用文献中对这些效应的估计以及自1900年以来的MSA级专利和人口数据，我们探究如果自1900年起城市规模被限制在一百万或十万人，2010年美国产出会低多少。这些效应很小。如果自1900年起城市规模被限制在一百万人，2010年的产出仅比观测值低8%。

papers.title: Time Consistent Infrastructure Investments: Optimal Flood Protection Policies in Spatial Equilibrium
papers.authors: Amine Ouazad, Matthew E. Kahn
papers.abstract: Place-based investments can have unintended general equilibrium effects and face challenges of time inconsistency. This paper simulates the granular impact of alternative spatial and temporal designs of such investments, using Quantitative Spatial Models where the strategy of the policymaker is endogenized, with time-consistent policy analysis or policies with commitment. It can apply to sunk, fixed costs investments in transportation infrastructure, levees, and other location-based investments. Applying this framework to the 1936 Flood Control Act, the largest investment in flood control infrastructure in US history protecting 5% of land, the study examines the general equilibrium effects of levee investments on housing prices, population density, and racial demographics over eight decades. Protected neighborhoods initially had lower property values, higher minority shares, and greater flood risk, but experienced sustained property appreciation and changes in population density. Structural analysis reveals that optimal levee designs prioritize high-density areas, reduce price capitalization, and minimize urban sprawl. Policymakers who cannot commit to long-term plans tend to overbuild and maintain larger systems compared to those with time-consistent strategies.
papers.zh_title: 时间一致的基础设施投资：空间均衡中的最优防洪政策
papers.zh_abstract: 基于地点的投资可能产生意想不到的一般均衡效应，并面临时间不一致性的挑战。本文模拟了此类投资在不同空间和时间设计下的精细影响，使用了定量空间模型，其中政策制定者的策略被内生化，并采用时间一致的政策分析或承诺政策。这适用于交通基础设施、堤坝和其他基于地点的投资的沉没固定成本投资。将该框架应用于1936年《防洪法》（美国历史上最大的防洪基础设施投资，保护了5%的土地），研究考察了堤坝投资对房价、人口密度和种族人口统计在八十年间的一般均衡效应。受保护的社区最初房产价值较低、少数族裔比例较高、洪水风险较大，但经历了持续的房产增值和人口密度变化。结构分析表明，最优堤坝设计优先考虑高密度区域，减少价格资本化，并最小化城市蔓延。无法承诺长期计划的政策制定者倾向于过度建设并维护更大的系统，而采用时间一致策略的政策制定者则不然。

papers.title: New Keynesian Economics through the Extensive Margin
papers.authors: Saki Bigio, Akira Ishide
papers.abstract: This paper reformulates the New Keynesian model to incorporate output adjustments through the extensive margin. Shifting from adjustments through the intensive to the extensive employment margin, the model introduces predetermined output, altering key properties of the New Keynesian framework. First, the Taylor principle is inverted: stability is achieved when nominal rates respond less than one-for-one with inflation. Second, the model significantly alters the output responses to changes in monetary policy. We argue that this represents a challenge and an opportunity for the literature. Sticky information allows the model to correct the sign of impulse responses.
papers.zh_title: 通过广延边际的新凯恩斯经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 本文重新构建了新凯恩斯模型，将产出调整纳入广延边际。从通过集约就业边际调整转向广延边际调整，该模型引入了预定的产出，改变了新凯恩斯框架的关键性质。首先，泰勒原理被反转：当名义利率对通胀的反应小于一对一的比例时，稳定性得以实现。其次，该模型显著改变了产出对货币政策变化的反应。我们认为这对现有文献既是一个挑战，也是一个机遇。粘性信息使得该模型能够纠正脉冲响应的符号。

papers.title: HANK's Response to Aggregate Uncertainty in an Estimated Business Cycle Model
papers.authors: Cosmin L. Ilut, Ralph Luetticke, Martin Schneider
papers.abstract: This paper studies a HANK model with agents who respond to both idiosyncratic and aggregate uncertainty. Since aggregate uncertainty is modeled as ambiguity, it affects the steady state and linearized dynamics, allowing for fast computation and estimation. The interaction of aggregate uncertainty shocks and portfolio frictions generates a high capital premium as well as most cyclical comovement in macroeconomic aggregates. Heterogeneity in portfolios is crucial: when it is shut down, the model fails to explain investment dynamics and the capital premium disappears. Cautious price and wage setting by firms in anticipation of aggregate uncertainty shapes employment and inflation dynamics.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：C11, D31, D81, E32, E63
papers.zh_title: 估计的商业周期模型中HANK对总不确定性的反应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一个包含对个体和总不确定性都做出反应的代理人的HANK模型。由于总不确定性被建模为模糊性，它会影响稳态和线性化动态，从而允许快速计算和估计。总不确定性冲击与投资组合摩擦的相互作用产生了高资本溢价以及宏观经济总量中的大部分周期性联动。投资组合的异质性至关重要：当它被关闭时，模型无法解释投资动态，资本溢价也消失了。企业因预期到总不确定性而采取的谨慎定价和工资设定行为塑造了就业和通胀动态。

papers.title: Intergenerational Mobility over Two Centuries
papers.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Leah Platt Boustan, Tamar Matiashvili
papers.abstract: This paper provides an overview of recent empirical and methodological advances in the study of historical intergenerational mobility trends, with a focus on key measurement challenges. These advances are made possible by the recent digitization of historical censuses and new methods of historical record-linking, which have enabled researchers to create large historical samples of parent-child links. We identify three main findings. First, absolute mobility increased in the decades leading up to 1940 but has since declined, both in the US and other industrial countries. Second, recent studies on relative mobility question the classic narrative that the US has transitioned from a “land of opportunity” in the 19th century to a less mobile society today, suggesting that mobility was not as high in the past. However, estimates of relative mobility are sensitive to choices regarding sample selection and measurement. Third, we explore mechanisms underlying shifts in intergenerational mobility over time, including geographic mobility, wealth shocks, educational attainment, locational effects, and the transmission of parent-specific human capital. We conclude by suggesting avenues for future research.
papers.zh_title: 两个世纪以来的代际流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文概述了历史代际流动性趋势研究的最新实证和方法进展，重点关注关键的测量挑战。这些进展得益于近期历史人口普查的数字化和新的历史记录链接方法，使研究人员能够创建大规模的亲子关系历史样本。我们确定了三个主要发现。首先，在美国和其他工业国家，1940年之前的几十年里绝对流动性有所上升，但此后有所下降。其次，近期关于相对流动性的研究质疑了美国从19世纪的“机遇之地”转变为当今流动性较低社会的经典叙事，表明过去的流动性并没有那么高。然而，相对流动性的估计对样本选择和测量的选择很敏感。第三，我们探讨了代际流动性随时间变化的机制，包括地理流动性、财富冲击、教育成就、区位效应以及父母特定人力资本的传递。最后，我们提出了未来研究的方向。

papers.title: Immigrant Age at Arrival and the Intergenerational Transmission of Ethnic Identification among Mexican Americans
papers.authors: Brian Duncan, Stephen J. Trejo
papers.abstract: Many U.S.-born descendants of Mexican immigrants do not identify as Mexican or Hispanic in response to the Hispanic origin question asked in the Census and other government surveys. Analyzing microdata from the 2000 U.S. Census and the 2001-2019 American Community Surveys, we show that the age at arrival of Mexican immigrants exerts an important influence on ethnic identification not only for these immigrants but also for their U.S.-born children. Among Mexican immigrants who arrived as children, the rate of “ethnic attrition”—i.e., not self-identifying as Mexican or Hispanic—is higher for those who migrated at a younger age. Moreover, the children of these immigrants exhibit a similar pattern: greater ethnic attrition among children whose parents moved to the United States at a younger age. We unpack the relative importance of several key mechanisms—parental English proficiency, parental education, family structure, intermarriage, and geographic location—through which the age at arrival of immigrant parents influences the ethnic identification of their children. Intermarriage turns out to be the primary mechanism: Mexican immigrants who arrived at a very young age are more likely to marry non-Hispanics, and the rate of ethnic attrition is dramatically higher among children with mixed ethnic backgrounds.
papers.zh_title: 移民抵达年龄与墨西哥裔美国人族群认同的代际传递
papers.zh_abstract: 许多墨西哥移民的美国出生后代在回答人口普查及其他政府调查中的西班牙裔来源问题时，并不认同自己为墨西哥裔或西班牙裔。通过分析2000年美国人口普查及2001-2019年美国社区调查的微观数据，我们表明墨西哥移民的抵达年龄不仅对这些移民自身的族群认同产生重要影响，也对其美国出生的子女产生影响。在童年时期抵达美国的墨西哥移民中，那些迁移时年龄更小的人，“族群流失”（即不自我认同为墨西哥裔或西班牙裔）的比例更高。此外，这些移民的子女也呈现出类似模式：父母移居美国时年龄更小的子女，其族群流失率更高。我们解析了移民父母的抵达年龄影响其子女族群认同的几个关键机制——父母英语熟练程度、父母教育水平、家庭结构、族际通婚以及地理位置——的相对重要性。结果发现，族际通婚是主要机制：在非常年幼时抵达美国的墨西哥移民更有可能与非西班牙裔结婚，而具有混合族裔背景的子女中，族群流失率显著更高。

papers.title: Are People Fleeing States with Abortion Bans?
papers.authors: Daniel L. Dench, Kelly Lifchez, Jason M. Lindo, Jancy Ling Liu
papers.abstract: We investigate whether reproductive rights affect migration. We use a synthetic difference-in-differences design that leverages variation from the 2022 Dobbs decision, which allowed states to ban abortion, and population flows based on change-of-address data from the United States Postal Service. The results indicate that bans increase net migration outflows, with effect sizes growing throughout the year after the decision. The effects are more prominent for single-person households than family households, which may reflect larger effects on younger adults. We also find suggestive evidence of impacts for states hostile towards abortion in ways other than having total bans.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I0, J0, K0, R0
papers.zh_title: 人们正在逃离禁止堕胎的州吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们调查了生育权是否影响迁移。我们使用合成双重差分设计，利用了2022年多布斯判决（该判决允许各州禁止堕胎）带来的变化，以及基于美国邮政服务地址变更数据的人口流动。结果表明，禁令增加了净迁出，效应规模在判决后的一年中持续增长。对单人家庭的影响比家庭户更显著，这可能反映了对年轻成年人更大的影响。我们还发现了对以其他方式（而非完全禁令）敌视堕胎的州存在影响的暗示性证据。

papers.title: The Impact of Counterfeit Victims in the Victim Marketplace
papers.authors: Mingyuan Ban, Yi Qian, Qiang Gong, Karl Aquino
papers.abstract: Just and efficient allocations of charity have attracted much academic and media attention. The sources of inefficiency and unjust are important to understand yet understudied. Our study aims to fill this void by directly modelling the victims’ market in a collective reputation framework. By analyzing three types of individuals who signal their victim status with different personalities and incentives, we derive the honest, dishonest and unfunded equilibria as well as the mixed equilibrium where both types of these equilibria could coexist. Our analyses of the social welfare under each equilibrium shed light on key parameters that could potentially serve as policy instruments for improving social welfare. We also reveal that the mechanisms analogous to bank run and lemons market could take place in the victims’ market as much as in other markets. In particular, when charity resources are scarce, more strategic signallers could rush to emit false victim signals and drive the market to the dishonest equilibrium with lower social welfare. The need for screening signallers could drive up the psychological costs of authentic victims to the extent that they voluntarily drop out of the market and suffer alone, resulting in misplaced charity funds and severe deadweight losses. When there is psychological utility associated with cheating for the hedonic signallers, the social welfare is even worse off.
papers.zh_title: 受害者市场中虚假受害者的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 慈善的公正和高效分配吸引了大量学术和媒体关注。低效和不公的根源很重要，但研究不足。我们的研究旨在通过直接在集体声誉框架中对受害者市场进行建模来填补这一空白。通过分析三种类型的个体（他们以不同的个性和激励信号表明其受害者身份），我们推导出诚实均衡、不诚实均衡、无资金均衡以及这些均衡类型可能共存的混合均衡。我们对每种均衡下社会福利的分析，揭示了可能作为改善社会福利政策工具的关键参数。我们还揭示了类似于银行挤兑和柠檬市场的机制可能像在其他市场一样发生在受害者市场中。特别是，当慈善资源稀缺时，更多策略性信号者可能急于发出虚假的受害者信号，并将市场推向社会福利较低的不诚实均衡。筛选信号者的需求可能将真实受害者的心理成本推高到他们自愿退出市场并独自承受痛苦的程度，导致慈善资金错置和严重的无谓损失。当享乐型信号者因欺骗而获得心理效用时，社会福利甚至更糟。

papers.title: E-Cigarette Taxation and Queer Youth
papers.authors: Anthony Chuo, Chad D. Cotti, Charles J. Courtemanche, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Erik T. Nesson, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: Electronic nicotine delivery systems (ENDS) use among lesbian, gay, bisexual, and questioning (LGBQ) teenagers is over 30 percent higher than among their heterosexual counterparts. Yet little is known about how recent efforts to curb nicotine vaping through ENDS taxes impact sexual minorities. This study explores this question using data from the 2015-2023 State Youth Behavior Surveys and a generalized difference-in-differences identification strategy. We find that a one-dollar (in 2023$) per mL of e-liquid increase in ENDS taxes reduces the likelihood of any prior-month ENDS use among heterosexual teens by about three percentage points and habitual vaping (as measured by frequent and everyday use) by about one percentage point. In sharp contrast, we find no evidence that ENDS taxes reduce any of the vaping measures for queer youths. The differences in the effects between heterosexual and LGBQ youth are statistically significant in most specifications. We also find that ENDS minimum legal sales ages affect heterosexual but not LGBQ teens, while flavor bans influence heterosexual teens more quickly. The relatively weak effects of ENDS policies on queer youth appear to be driven by those who suffer from persistent sadness, bullying, or suicidal ideation. Overall, our results are consistent with LGBQ youths exhibiting dependence on e-cigarettes to cope with unique stress-related psychological challenges.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：I0, I12, I14
papers.zh_title: 电子烟税收与性少数青少年
papers.zh_abstract: 女同性恋、男同性恋、双性恋和质疑性取向（LGBQ）青少年使用电子尼古丁传送系统（ENDS）的比例比其异性恋同龄人高出30%以上。然而，关于近期通过ENDS税收遏制尼古丁电子烟的努力如何影响性少数群体的研究甚少。本研究利用2015-2023年州青少年行为调查数据以及广义双重差分识别策略探讨了这一问题。我们发现，每毫升烟油增加1美元（按2023年美元计）的ENDS税，会使异性恋青少年过去一个月内使用ENDS的可能性降低约三个百分点，并使习惯性电子烟使用（以频繁和日常使用衡量）降低约一个百分点。与此形成鲜明对比的是，我们没有发现证据表明ENDS税能减少性少数青少年的任何电子烟使用指标。在大多数设定中，异性恋与LGBQ青少年之间的效应差异具有统计显著性。我们还发现，ENDS最低法定销售年龄影响异性恋青少年，但不影响LGBQ青少年，而风味禁令对异性恋青少年的影响更为迅速。ENDS政策对性少数青少年相对较弱的效果似乎是由那些遭受持续悲伤、欺凌或自杀意念的青少年所驱动。总体而言，我们的结果与LGBQ青少年依赖电子烟来应对与压力相关的独特心理挑战这一观点一致。

papers.title: Fisher-Schultz Lecture: Linear Estimation of Structural and Causal Effects for Nonseparable Panel Data
papers.authors: Victor Chernozhukov, Ben Deaner, Ying Gao, Jerry A. Hausman, Whitney Newey
papers.abstract: This paper develops linear estimators for structural and causal parameters in nonparametric,nonseparable models using panel data. These models incorporate unobserved, time-varying, individual heterogeneity, which may be correlated with the regressors. Estimation is based on an approximation of the nonseparable model by a linear sieve specification with individual specific parameters. Effects of interest are estimated by a bias corrected average of individual ridge regressions. We demonstrate how this approach can be applied to estimate causal effects, counterfactual consumer welfare, and averages of individual taxable income elasticities. We show that the proposed estimator has an empirical Bayes interpretation and possesses a number of other useful properties. We formulate Large-T asymptotics that can accommodate discrete regressors and which bypass partial identification in this case. We employ the methods to estimate average equivalent variation and deadweight loss for potential price increases using data on grocery purchases.
papers.zh_title: Fisher-Schultz讲座：不可分面板数据中结构效应与因果效应的线性估计
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用面板数据，为非参数、不可分模型中的结构参数和因果参数开发了线性估计量。这些模型包含了未观测到的、时变的个体异质性，该异质性可能与回归变量相关。估计基于对不可分模型进行带有个体特定参数的线性筛子规格的近似。感兴趣的效果通过偏差校正后的个体岭回归平均值来估计。我们展示了如何将这种方法应用于估计因果效应、反事实消费者福利以及个体应税收入弹性的平均值。我们证明了所提出的估计量具有经验贝叶斯解释，并拥有许多其他有用性质。我们构建了能够容纳离散回归变量的大T渐近理论，并在这种情况下绕过了部分识别问题。我们利用杂货购买数据，应用这些方法来估计潜在价格上涨的平均等价变化和无谓损失。

papers.title: CEO-Firm Matches and Productivity in 42 Countries
papers.authors: Amanda Dahlstrand, Dávid László, Helena Schweiger, Oriana Bandiera, Andrea Prat, Raffaella Sadun
papers.abstract: Firms are key to economic development, and CEOs are key to firm productivity. Are firms in countries at varying stages of development led by the right CEOs, and if not, why? We develop a parsimonious measure of CEO time use that allows us to differentiate CEOs into “leaders” and “managers” in a survey of 4,800 manufacturing firms across 42 countries, with income per capita ranging from USD 4,000 to 45,000. We find that poorer countries have fewer leaders and relate this to training opportunities. Even when suitable leaders are available, they often do not lead the firms that would benefit the most, resulting in mismatches that can cause up to a 20% loss in productivity for the mismatched firms. The findings imply that policies that address the causes of mismatch could significantly enhance growth without additional resources.
papers.zh_title: CEO与企业的匹配及42个国家的生产率
papers.zh_abstract: 企业是经济发展的关键，而CEO是企业生产率的关键。处于不同发展阶段国家的企业是否由合适的CEO领导？如果不是，原因何在？我们开发了一种简洁的CEO时间利用衡量方法，使我们能够在对42个国家（人均收入从4000美元到45000美元不等）的4800家制造企业进行的调查中，将CEO区分为“领导者”和“管理者”。我们发现，较贫穷国家的领导者较少，并将此与培训机会联系起来。即使合适的领导者存在，他们也常常不领导那些最能从中受益的企业，导致错配，这可能会使错配企业的生产率损失高达20%。研究结果表明，解决错配原因的政策可以在不增加额外资源的情况下显著促进增长。

papers.title: Technological Disruption in the Labor Market
papers.authors: David J. Deming, Christopher Ong, Lawrence H. Summers
papers.abstract: This paper explores past episodes of technological disruption in the US labor market, with the goal of learning lessons about the likely future impact of artificial intelligence (AI). We measure changes in the structure of the US labor market going back over a century. We find, perhaps surprisingly, that the pace of change has slowed over time. The years spanning 1990 to 2017 were less disruptive than any prior period we measure, going back to 1880. This comparative decline is not because the job market is stable today but rather because past changes were so profound. General-purpose technologies (GPTs) like steam power and electricity dramatically disrupted the twentieth-century labor market, but the changes took place over decades. We argue that AI could be a GPT on the scale of prior disruptive innovations, which means it is likely too early to assess its full impacts. Nonetheless, we present four indications that the pace of labor market change has accelerated recently, possibly due to technological change. First, the labor market is no longer polarizing— employment in low- and middle-paid occupations has declined, while highly paid employment has grown. Second, employment growth has stalled in low-paid service jobs. Third, the share of employment in STEM jobs has increased by more than 50 percent since 2010, fueled by growth in software and computer-related occupations. Fourth, retail sales employment has declined by 25 percent in the last decade, likely because of technological improvements in online retail. The post-pandemic labor market is changing very rapidly, and a key question is whether this faster pace of change will persist into the future.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场的技术颠覆
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了美国劳动力市场过去的技术颠覆事件，旨在汲取关于人工智能（AI）未来可能影响的教训。我们衡量了美国劳动力市场结构一个多世纪以来的变化。我们或许惊讶地发现，变化的速度随着时间的推移而放缓。1990年至2017年这段时间，其颠覆性低于我们测量的自1880年以来的任何先前时期。这种相对下降并非因为今天的就业市场稳定，而是因为过去的变化如此深刻。像蒸汽动力和电力这样的通用目的技术（GPTs）极大地颠覆了20世纪的劳动力市场，但这些变化历时数十年。我们认为，AI可能是一种与先前颠覆性创新规模相当的GPT，这意味着现在评估其全部影响可能还为时过早。尽管如此，我们提出了四个迹象，表明劳动力市场变化的速度最近有所加快，这可能是由于技术变革。第一，劳动力市场不再极化——低薪和中等薪职业的就业下降，而高薪就业增长。第二，低薪服务工作的就业增长停滞。第三，自2010年以来，STEM职业的就业份额增长了50%以上，这得益于软件和计算机相关职业的增长。第四，零售销售就业在过去十年中下降了25%，这可能是由于在线零售的技术改进。疫情后的劳动力市场正在非常迅速地变化，一个关键问题是这种更快的变化速度是否会持续到未来。

papers.title: Community Targeting at Scale
papers.authors: Sudarno Sumarto, Elan Satriawan, Benjamin A. Olken, Abhijit Banerjee, Achmad Tohari, Vivi Alatas, Rema Hanna
papers.abstract: Community-based targeting, in which communities allocate social assistance using local information about who is poor, in experimental settings leads to nuanced allocations that reflect local concepts of poverty. What happens when it is scaled up, by either by making the stakes high, or by replicating the process nationwide? We study this by examining community targeting in both a high-stakes experiment, in which villages determined who would receive the Indonesian conditional cash transfer program – worth almost USD 1,000 over 6 years – and in a nationwide scaleup, whereby Indonesia used community-based meetings to allocate COVID-transfers to over 8 million households. We find that both the experimental scale-up and the massive national scale-up had broadly similar performance to the original experimental study. We find strongly progressive targeting as measured by baseline household consumption, though – as in the pilot – not quite as strong as if they had used a fully up-to-date proxy means test. In both scale-ups, we also find that the villages gave additional weight to locally-valued characteristics beyond pure consumption, such as widowhood, recent illness, and food expenditure shares, again echoing the findings from pilots. The results suggest that community targeting can perform well at scale, as predicted by the experimental study.
papers.zh_title: 大规模社区精准帮扶
papers.zh_abstract: 社区精准帮扶，即社区利用关于谁是穷人的本地信息来分配社会援助，在实验环境中会产生反映当地贫困概念的细致入微的分配结果。当它被大规模推广时，无论是通过提高风险，还是在全国范围内复制这一过程，会发生什么？我们通过研究社区精准帮扶在一个高风险实验（村庄决定谁将获得印度尼西亚有条件现金转移计划——六年内价值近1000美元）以及一个全国性推广（印度尼西亚利用社区会议向超过800万户家庭分配新冠转移支付）中的情况来探讨这一问题。我们发现，实验性推广和大规模全国性推广的表现与最初的实验研究大致相似。我们发现，以基线家庭消费衡量，精准帮扶具有很强的累进性，尽管——正如试点项目一样——其效果不如使用完全最新的代理经济状况调查那么强。在两次推广中，我们还发现，村庄除了纯粹消费之外，还额外重视本地重视的特征，如丧偶、近期疾病和食品支出份额，这再次印证了试点的发现。结果表明，正如实验研究所预测的那样，社区精准帮扶可以在大规模推广中表现良好。

papers.title: Technology Sophistication Across Establishments
papers.authors: Diego A. Comin, Xavier Cirera, Marcio Cruz
papers.abstract: This paper examines technology sophistication in establishments. To comprehensively measure technology sophistication, we create a grid that covers key business functions and the technologies used to conduct them. Analyzing data from over 21,000 establishments in 15 countries, we find that the most widely used technology is usually not the most sophisticated available in the business function. There is significant variation in technology sophistication across and within countries, explaining 31% of productivity dispersion and over half of the agricultural productivity gap. The sophistication of widely used technologies is more relevant for productivity than the most advanced technologies. More sophisticated technologies are appropriate for both developed and developing countries.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EFG, IO, PR；JEL：O1, O3, O4
papers.zh_title: 机构间的技术成熟度
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了各机构的技术成熟度。为了全面衡量技术成熟度，我们创建了一个涵盖关键业务功能及其所用技术的网格。通过分析来自15个国家超过21,000家机构的数据，我们发现，最广泛使用的技术通常并非该业务功能中可用的最成熟技术。不同国家内部和国家之间的技术成熟度存在显著差异，这解释了31%的生产率离散度以及超过一半的农业生产力差距。对于生产率而言，广泛使用的技术的成熟度比最先进的技术更为重要。更成熟的技术对发达国家和发展中国家都适用。

papers.title: Voluntary Accreditation and Healthcare Quality: Evidence from a Randomized Controlled Trial in U.S. Jails
papers.authors: Marcella Alsan, Crystal Yang
papers.abstract: We study whether voluntary accreditation improves healthcare quality in U.S. jails, where publicly financed care is often delivered by private contractors and overseen by elected sheriffs with limited medical expertise. We conduct the first randomized controlled trial of healthcare accreditation in the United States, randomizing the offer of accreditation to 46 jails. Assignment improves compliance with quality standards, particularly in training and patient care, without increasing capital or labor inputs, and substantially reduces 12-month mortality. Descriptively, mortality reductions are concentrated in jails with the largest quality improvements. Evidence suggests effects operate through improved coordination, screening, and oversight.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LE, PE；JEL：I1, I14, I18, I3, K10, K14
papers.zh_title: 自愿认证与医疗质量：来自美国监狱随机对照试验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了自愿认证是否能提高美国监狱的医疗质量，在这些监狱中，公共资助的医疗服务通常由私人承包商提供，并由缺乏医学专业知识的民选警长监督。我们进行了美国首次关于医疗认证的随机对照试验，随机向46所监狱提供认证机会。该干预措施提高了对质量标准的遵守程度，特别是在培训和患者护理方面，且未增加资本或劳动力投入，并显著降低了12个月死亡率。描述性分析显示，死亡率的降低集中在质量改善最大的监狱。证据表明，其作用机制是通过改善协调、筛查和监督来实现的。

papers.title: The Mental Health of the Young in Ex-Soviet States
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: We report on the wellbeing of the young in 31 Ex-Soviet Republics located in Eastern Europe and Central Asia. We find no evidence of the decline in the mental health of the young relative to older people which characterizes Western Europe and English-speaking advanced economies. The mental health of the young in ex-Soviet republics is stable relative to older people across various surveys including the Gallup World Poll, the Eurobarometers, the World Values Surveys and the European Social Survey, as well as in surveys from the European Bank of Reconstruction and Development and UNICEF. However, there are two exceptions. A 2023 Flash Eurobarometer Mental Health survey conducted by the European Commission shows unhappiness declines in age in every EU member country including 11 in Eastern Europe. A similar finding emerges in our analysis of the web-based Global Minds surveys of 2020-2024 in 9 former Soviet republics. Youngster ages 18-24 in these surveys are especially unhappy. Furthermore, in keeping with research on children aged 15-16 in the PISA surveys in other countries, we find life satisfaction of these school children in ex-Soviet Republics declined over the period 2015-2022 and that, among this group, time spent on digital devices was associated with lower happiness.
papers.zh_title: 前苏联国家年轻人的心理健康
papers.zh_abstract: 我们报告了位于东欧和中亚的31个前苏联共和国年轻人的福祉状况。我们没有发现这些国家年轻人相对于年长者的心理健康状况出现下降的证据，而这种下降是西欧和英语发达国家的特征。在盖洛普世界民意调查、欧洲晴雨表、世界价值观调查和欧洲社会调查，以及欧洲复兴开发银行和联合国儿童基金会的调查中，前苏联共和国年轻人的心理健康相对于年长者保持稳定。然而，有两个例外。欧盟委员会2023年进行的一项Flash Eurobarometer心理健康调查显示，在每个欧盟成员国（包括11个东欧国家）中，不幸福感随年龄增长而下降。在我们对2020-2024年9个前苏联共和国基于网络的Global Minds调查的分析中也出现了类似发现。这些调查中18-24岁的年轻人尤其不快乐。此外，与其他国家PISA调查中对15-16岁儿童的研究一致，我们发现前苏联共和国这些学龄儿童的生活满意度在2015-2022年间有所下降，并且在这一群体中，花在数字设备上的时间与较低的幸福感相关。

papers.title: The Gilded Age and Beyond: The Persistence of Elite Wealth in American History
papers.authors: Priti Kalsi, Zachary Ward
papers.abstract: Is the top tail of wealth a set of fixed individuals or is there substantial turnover? We estimate upper-tail wealth dynamics during the Gilded Age and beyond, a time of rapid wealth accumulation and concentration in the late 19th and early 20th centuries. Using various wealth proxies and data tracking tens of millions of individuals, we find that most extremely wealthy individuals drop out of the top tail within their lifetimes. Yet, elite wealth still matters. We find a non-linear association between grandparental wealth and being in the top 1%, such that having a rich grandparent exponentially increases the likelihood of reaching the top 1%. Still, over 90% of the grandchildren of top 1% wealth grandfathers did not achieve that level.
papers.zh_title: 镀金时代及以后：美国历史上精英财富的持续性
papers.zh_abstract: 财富顶层是一群固定不变的个人，还是存在大量更替？我们估算了镀金时代及以后（19世纪末20世纪初财富快速积累和集中的时期）的顶层财富动态。利用各种财富代理变量以及追踪数千万个体的数据，我们发现，大多数极其富有的个体在其有生之年会跌出顶层。然而，精英财富仍然重要。我们发现祖辈财富与进入前1%之间存在非线性关联，拥有富有的祖父母会指数级地增加达到前1%的可能性。尽管如此，超过90%的顶层1%财富祖父的孙辈并未达到这一水平。

papers.title: Changes in Marital Sorting: Theory and Evidence from the US
papers.authors: Pierre-André Chiappori, Monica Costa Dias, Costas Meghir, Hanzhe Zhang
papers.abstract: Positive assortative matching refers to the tendency of individuals with similar characteristics to form partnerships. Measuring the extent to which assortative matching differs between two economies is challenging when the marginal distributions of the characteristic along which sorting takes place (e.g., education) change for either or both sexes. We show how the use of different measures can generate different conclusions. We provide axiomatic characterization for measures such as the odds ratio, normalized trace, and likelihood ratio, and provide a structural economic interpretation of the odds ratio. We then use our approach to consider how marital sorting by education changed between the 1950s and the 1970s cohort, for which both educational attainment and returns in the labor market changed substantially.
papers.zh_title: 婚姻匹配模式的变化：来自美国的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 正向选择匹配指的是具有相似特征的个体结成伴侣的趋势。当匹配所依据的特征（例如教育）的边际分布在两性中任一或两者都发生变化时，衡量两个经济体之间匹配程度差异是具有挑战性的。我们展示了使用不同衡量标准如何可能得出不同的结论。我们为优势比、归一化迹和似然比等衡量标准提供了公理化特征，并对优势比给出了结构性经济解释。然后，我们运用我们的方法，考察了1950年代和1970年代出生队列之间教育婚姻匹配的变化，在这两个时期，教育程度和劳动力市场回报都发生了显著变化。

papers.title: The Political Economy of Geoeconomic Power
papers.authors: Christopher Clayton, Matteo Maggiori, Jesse Schreger
papers.abstract: Great powers are increasingly using their economic and financial strength for geopolitical aims. This rise of "geoeconomics" has the potential to reshape the international trade and financial system. This paper examines the role of domestic political economy forces in determining a government's ability to project geoeconomic power abroad. We also discuss the role that persuading or coercing foreign governments plays in projecting geoeconomic power around the world.
papers.zh_title: 地缘经济权力的政治经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 大国越来越多地利用其经济和金融实力来实现地缘政治目标。这种“地缘经济学”的兴起有可能重塑国际贸易和金融体系。本文考察了国内政治经济力量在决定政府向国外投射地缘经济权力能力方面的作用。我们还讨论了说服或胁迫外国政府在向全球投射地缘经济权力中所扮演的角色。

papers.title: The Cost of Species Protection: The Land Market Impacts of the Endangered Species Act
papers.authors: Eyal G. Frank, Maximilian Auffhammer, David McLaughlin, Elisheba Spiller, David L. Sunding
papers.abstract: Protecting species’ habitats is the main policy tool employed across the globe to reduce biodiversity losses. These protections are hypothesized to conflict with private landowners’ interests. We study the economic consequences of the most extensive and controversial piece of such environmental legislation in US history—the Endangered Species Act (ESA) of 1973. We assemble the most comprehensive data on species conservation efforts, land transactions, and building permits to date. By comparing parcels with identical histories of protections we show that, on average, the ESA shifts transactions from inside to outside of the protected area and leads to a slight appreciation in residential and vacant land values outside of critical habitats. We also show that the federal regulator determines borders for areas with the most stringent protections to avoid large effects on land values, only where it is explicitly allowed to take economic criteria into account. These average findings mask significant heterogeneity at the species and location level, which we document. Furthermore, we find no evidence of the ESA affecting building activity as measured by construction permits. Overall, even taking into account species-level heterogeneity, the number of possibly negatively affected parcels is extremely small. This suggests that the capitalization of the economic impacts of the ESA through the land market channel are likely minor, despite potential delays to development through permitting, for which we provide suggestive evidence. Our findings do not rule out economically significant impacts in a few highly constrained land markets with ESA protections amplified by local regulatory action.
papers.zh_title: 物种保护的成本：《濒危物种法案》对土地市场的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 保护物种栖息地是全球范围内用于减少生物多样性损失的主要政策工具。这些保护措施被认为与私人土地所有者的利益相冲突。我们研究了美国历史上此类环境立法中范围最广、争议最大的一项——《1973年濒危物种法案》（ESA）的经济后果。我们汇编了迄今为止最全面的物种保护工作、土地交易和建筑许可证数据。通过比较具有相同保护历史的宗地，我们发现，平均而言，ESA将交易从保护区内转移到保护区外，并导致关键栖息地以外的住宅和空地价值略有升值。我们还表明，联邦监管机构在确定最严格保护区域的边界时，会避免对土地价值产生重大影响，但仅限于明确允许其考虑经济标准的情况。这些平均结果掩盖了我们所记录的物种和地点层面的显著异质性。此外，我们没有发现ESA影响以建筑许可证衡量的建筑活动的证据。总体而言，即使考虑到物种层面的异质性，可能受到负面影响的宗地数量也极少。这表明，尽管通过许可程序可能导致开发延迟（我们为此提供了初步证据），但ESA通过土地市场渠道产生的经济影响资本化可能很小。我们的发现并不排除在少数高度受限的土地市场中，ESA保护措施因地方监管行动而放大，从而产生重大经济影响的可能性。

papers.title: Artificial Intelligence Asset Pricing Models
papers.authors: Bryan T. Kelly, Boris Kuznetsov, Semyon Malamud, Teng Andrea Xu
papers.abstract: The core statistical technology in artificial intelligence is the large-scale transformer network. We propose a new asset pricing model that implants a transformer in the stochastic discount factor. This structure leverages conditional pricing information via cross-asset information sharing and nonlinearity. We also develop a linear transformer that serves as a simplified surrogate from which we derive an intuitive decomposition of the transformer’s asset pricing mechanisms. We find large reductions in pricing errors from our artificial intelligence pricing model (AIPM) relative to previous machine learning models and dissect the sources of these gains.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能资产定价模型
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能的核心统计技术是大规模Transformer网络。我们提出了一种新的资产定价模型，该模型在随机贴现因子中植入了一个Transformer。这种结构通过跨资产信息共享和非线性来利用条件定价信息。我们还开发了一个线性Transformer，作为一个简化的替代模型，并从中推导出Transformer资产定价机制的直观分解。我们发现，与之前的机器学习模型相比，我们的人工智能定价模型（AIPM）在定价误差方面有大幅减少，并剖析了这些收益的来源。

papers.title: Prediction with Differential Covariate Classification: Illustrated by Racial/Ethnic Classification in Medical Risk Assessment
papers.authors: Charles F. Manski, John Mullahy, Atheendar Venkataramani
papers.abstract: A common practice in evidence-based decision-making uses estimates of conditional probabilities P(y|x) obtained from research studies to predict outcomes y on the basis of observed covariates x. Given this information, decisions are then based on the predicted outcomes. Researchers commonly assume that the predictors used in the generation of the evidence are the same as those used in applying the evidence: i.e., the meaning of x in the two circumstances is the same. This may not be the case in real-world settings. Across a wide-range of settings, ranging from clinical practice to education policy, demographic attributes (e.g., age, race, ethnicity) are often classified differently in research studies than in decision settings. This paper studies identification in such settings. We propose a formal framework for prediction with what we term differential covariate classification (DCC). Using this framework, we analyze partial identification of probabilistic predictions and assess how various assumptions influence the identification regions. We apply the findings to a range of settings, focusing mainly on differential classification of individuals' race and ethnicity in clinical medicine. We find that bounds on P(y|x) can be wide, and the information needed to narrow them available only in special cases. These findings highlight an important problem in using evidence in decision making, a problem that has not yet been fully appreciated in debates on classification in public policy and medicine.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EH, LS, TWP；JEL：C1, I1, J1
papers.zh_title: 存在差异协变量分类的预测：以医学风险评估中的种族/民族分类为例
papers.zh_abstract: 基于证据的决策中的一个常见做法是使用从研究中获得的条件概率P(y|x)的估计值，根据观察到的协变量x来预测结果y。基于这些信息，决策则依据预测结果做出。研究人员通常假设用于生成证据的预测变量与用于应用证据的预测变量相同：即，在这两种情况下x的含义是相同的。在现实世界中，情况可能并非如此。在从临床实践到教育政策的广泛环境中，人口统计属性（例如，年龄、种族、民族）在研究中的分类方式通常与在决策环境中的分类方式不同。本文研究了在这种环境下的识别问题。我们提出了一个形式化的框架，用于处理我们称之为差异协变量分类（DCC）的预测。利用这个框架，我们分析了概率预测的部分识别，并评估了各种假设如何影响识别区域。我们将这些发现应用于一系列环境，主要关注临床医学中个体种族和民族的差异分类。我们发现P(y|x)的界限可能很宽，而缩小这些界限所需的信息仅在特殊情况下可用。这些发现突显了在决策中使用证据时的一个重要问题，这个问题在公共政策和医学分类的辩论中尚未得到充分认识。

papers.title: Accounting for Individual-Specific Heterogeneity in Intergenerational Income Mobility
papers.authors: Yoosoon Chang, Steven N. Durlauf, Bo Hu, Joon Park
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a fully nonparametric model to investigate the dynamics of intergenerational income mobility for discrete outcomes. In our model, an individual’s income class probabilities depend on parental income in a manner that accommodates nonlinearities and interactions among various individual and parental characteristics, including race, education, and parental age at childbearing. Consequently, we offer a generalization of Markov chain mobility models. We employ kernel techniques from machine learning and further regularization for estimating this highly flexible model. Utilizing data from the Panel Study of Income Dynamics (PSID), we find that race and parental education interact with parental income in children’s economic prospects in ways that can create bottlenecks in mobility.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：C10, C50, D30, I24
papers.zh_title: 代际收入流动性中个体特定异质性的核算
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个完全非参数模型来研究离散结果下代际收入流动性的动态。在我们的模型中，个体的收入阶层概率取决于父母的收入，其方式能够容纳各种个体和父母特征（包括种族、教育和父母生育年龄）之间的非线性和交互作用。因此，我们提供了马尔可夫链流动性模型的推广。我们采用机器学习中的核技术，并进一步进行正则化来估计这个高度灵活的模型。利用收入动态面板研究（PSID）的数据，我们发现，种族和父母教育会与父母收入相互作用，影响子女的经济前景，这种方式可能会在流动性中造成瓶颈。

papers.title: The Effects of Digital Surveillance and Managerial Clarity on Performance
papers.authors: Namrata Kala, Elizabeth Lyons
papers.abstract: How managers frame the adoption of organizational practices may impact the returns to such practices, but managerial justification is often correlated with the use of particular practices or other dimensions of managerial quality. Using a randomized control trial, we study how the causal impacts of a frequently used monitoring management practice for remote work employers–digital worker surveillance–varies by randomly allocated justification for its use. In an online labor market, we divide workers into low and high-productivity performers, and randomize both whether surveillance is used and whether its use is justified based on the workers’ baseline productivity. We find that digital surveillance does not have significant effects on worker performance on average, but that not explaining the presence or elimination of digital surveillance based on worker performance significantly reduces worker output. Our results demonstrate a nuanced relationship between monitoring and worker performance that depends on how monitoring is rationalized to workers.
papers.zh_title: 数字监控与管理清晰度对绩效的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 管理者如何阐述组织实践的采纳方式可能会影响此类实践的回报，但管理层的理由往往与特定实践的使用或管理质量的其他维度相关。通过一项随机对照试验，我们研究了一种远程工作雇主常用的监控管理实践——数字员工监控——的因果影响如何因随机分配的监控使用理由而变化。在一个在线劳动力市场中，我们将工人分为低生产率和高生产率表现者，并随机分配是否使用监控，以及是否根据工人的基线生产率来证明监控使用的合理性。我们发现，数字监控平均而言对工人绩效没有显著影响，但不根据工人绩效来解释监控的存在或取消会显著降低工人的产出。我们的结果展示了监控与工人绩效之间一种微妙的、取决于如何向工人合理化监控的关系。

papers.title: Entrepreneurship and the Gig Economy: Evidence from U.S. Tax Returns
papers.authors: Matthew R. Denes, Spyridon Lagaras, Margarita Tsoutsoura
papers.abstract: Platform intermediation of goods and services has considerably transformed the U.S. economy. We use administrative data on U.S. tax returns to study the role of the gig economy on entrepreneurship. We find that gig workers are more likely to become entrepreneurs, particularly those who are lower income, younger, and benefit from flexibility. We track all newly created firms and show that gig workers start firms in similar industries as their gig experience, which are less likely to survive and demonstrate higher performance. Overall, our findings suggest on-the-job learning promotes entrepreneurial entry and shifts the types of firms started by entrepreneurs.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：G30, J21, J22, J24, L26
papers.zh_title: 创业与零工经济：来自美国纳税申报表的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 商品和服务的平台中介已显著改变了美国经济。我们利用美国纳税申报表的行政数据来研究零工经济对创业的作用。我们发现，零工工人更有可能成为企业家，尤其是那些收入较低、较年轻且受益于灵活性的群体。我们追踪所有新成立的企业，并显示零工工人创办的企业与其零工经历所在的行业相似，这些企业存活率较低但表现出更高的绩效。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，在职学习促进了创业进入，并改变了企业家创办企业的类型。

papers.title: Daughters as Safety Net? Family Responses to Parental Employment Shocks: Evidence from Alcohol Prohibition
papers.authors: Anna Aizer, Gabrielle Grafton, Santiago Pérez
papers.abstract: We study the impact of Federal alcohol Prohibition in 1919 on workers in the alcohol industry and their families using newly linked census records that allow us to follow spouses, sons and daughters. Immediately after Prohibition, men previously working in alcohol-related industries were less likely to be in the labor force, and when working, employed in lower skilled occupations. By 1940, 21 years after Prohibition, workers were still more likely to be in unskilled occupations, but they were more likely to be employed, consistent with delayed retirement. In the short run, sons are largely unaffected but in the long run, they complete slightly more schooling and earn more. Interestingly, daughters were more likely to remain at home, delay marriage and be employed, even 20 years later. These effects are driven by daughters living at home in 1920. Daughters, not sons, appear to have acted as the family's safety net in this period before public provision of relief.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, LS, PE；JEL：J13, J20, J62, N32, N62
papers.zh_title: 女儿作为安全网？家庭对父母就业冲击的反应：来自禁酒令的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用新关联的人口普查记录，追踪配偶、儿子和女儿，研究了1919年联邦禁酒令对酒精行业工人及其家庭的影响。禁酒令实施后，先前在酒精相关行业工作的男性立即更可能退出劳动力市场，即使在工作时，也从事技能要求较低的职业。到禁酒令实施21年后的1940年，这些工人仍更可能从事非技能职业，但他们更可能被雇佣，这与延迟退休一致。短期内，儿子基本不受影响，但长期来看，他们完成了略多的教育并赚取了更多收入。有趣的是，女儿更可能留在家中、推迟结婚并就业，这种影响甚至在20年后依然存在。这些效应是由1920年居住在家中的女儿驱动的。在这个公共救济尚未提供的时期，女儿而非儿子，似乎充当了家庭的安全网。

papers.title: Externalities and the Taxation of Top Earners
papers.authors: Henrik Kleven
papers.abstract: This paper characterizes the optimal taxation of top earners in a world with externalities. It takes a reduced-form approach that spans a broad class of models where top earners create externalities on the economy. The model allows for a flexible relationship between top earnings and the distribution of earnings capacities in the population, including positive externalities (such as innovation) and negative externalities (such as rent-extraction). The model allows for simple optimal tax formulas that clarify the role of different externality patterns. In general, externalities that run from top earners to bottom earners have much stronger tax implications than externalities within the top group. The results are expressed in terms of estimable sufficient statistics and linked to recent evidence on the externalities of top entrepreneurs. A calibration to the US economy suggests that the optimal top tax rate, while lower than the Mirrleesian optimum, remains higher than the current top tax rate.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE, POL；JEL：H21, H23, H24, H31
papers.zh_title: 外部性与高收入者的税收
papers.zh_abstract: 本文描述了存在外部性的世界中高收入者的最优税收特征。它采用了一种简约形式的方法，涵盖了高收入者对经济产生外部性的广泛模型类别。该模型允许高收入与人口中收入能力分布之间存在灵活的关系，包括正外部性（如创新）和负外部性（如寻租）。该模型得出了简单的最优税收公式，阐明了不同外部性模式的作用。一般而言，从高收入者流向低收入者的外部性比高收入群体内部的外部性具有更强的税收含义。结果以可估计的充分统计量表示，并与近期关于顶级企业家外部性的证据相关联。对美国经济的校准表明，最优最高税率虽然低于米尔利斯最优水平，但仍高于当前的最高税率。

papers.title: Large Language Models: An Applied Econometric Framework
papers.authors: Jens Ludwig, Sendhil Mullainathan, Ashesh Rambachan
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) enable researchers to analyze text at unprecedented scale and minimal cost. Researchers can now revisit old questions and tackle novel ones with rich data. We provide an econometric framework for realizing this potential in two empirical uses. For prediction problems – forecasting outcomes from text – valid conclusions require “no training leakage” between the LLM’s training data and the researcher’s sample, which can be enforced through careful model choice and research design. For estimation problems – automating the measurement of economic concepts for downstream analysis – valid downstream inference requires combining LLM outputs with a small validation sample to deliver consistent and precise estimates. Absent a validation sample, researchers cannot assess possible errors in LLM outputs, and consequently seemingly innocuous choices (which model, which prompt) can produce dramatically different parameter estimates. When used appropriately, LLMs are powerful tools that can expand the frontier of empirical economics.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, CH, DAE, DEV, ED, EEE, EFG, EH, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR, TWP；JEL：C01, C45
papers.zh_title: 大型语言模型：一个应用计量经济学框架
papers.zh_abstract: 大型语言模型使研究人员能够以前所未有的规模和最低的成本分析文本。研究人员现在可以重新审视旧问题，并利用丰富的数据处理新问题。我们提供了一个计量经济学框架，以在两种实证应用中实现这一潜力。对于预测问题——从文本预测结果——有效的结论要求LLM的训练数据与研究人员的样本之间“无训练泄漏”，这可以通过谨慎的模型选择和研究设计来强制执行。对于估计问题——自动化测量经济概念以供下游分析——有效的下游推断需要将LLM输出与一个小型验证样本相结合，以提供一致且精确的估计。如果没有验证样本，研究人员无法评估LLM输出中可能的错误，因此看似无害的选择（哪个模型、哪个提示）可能会产生截然不同的参数估计。当使用得当时，LLM是能够扩展实证经济学前沿的强大工具。

papers.title: The Economy, the Ghost in Your Gene, and the Escape from Premature Mortality
papers.authors: Dora Costa, Lars Olov Bygren, Benedikt Graf, Martin Karlsson, Joseph Price
papers.abstract: Explanations for the West's escape from premature mortality have focused on chronic malnutrition or income and on public health or state capacity. We argue that by ignoring the multigenerational effects of variance in ancestors' harvests, we are underestimating the contribution of modern economic growth to the escape from early death at older ages. Using a newly constructed multigenerational dataset for Sweden, we show that grandsons' longevity was strongly linked to spatial shocks in paternal grandfathers' yearly harvest variability when agricultural productivity was low and market integration was limited. We reason that an epigenetic mechanism is the most plausible explanation for our findings. We posit that the removal of trade barriers, improvements in transportation, and agricultural innovation reduced harvest variability. We contend that for older Swedish men (but not women) born 1830-1909 this reduction was as important as decreasing contemporaneous infectious disease rates and more important than eliminating exposure to poor harvests in-utero.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DAE, DEV；JEL：I15, J11, N33
papers.zh_title: 经济、基因中的幽灵与逃离过早死亡
papers.zh_abstract: 关于西方世界逃离过早死亡的解释，一直聚焦于慢性营养不良或收入，以及公共卫生或国家能力。我们认为，由于忽视了祖先收成变异性的多代影响，我们低估了现代经济增长对逃离老年早期死亡的贡献。利用瑞典新构建的多代数据集，我们显示，在农业生产力低下且市场一体化有限的时期，孙辈的寿命与父系祖父年度收成变异性的空间冲击密切相关。我们推断，表观遗传机制是我们发现的最合理解释。我们假设，贸易壁垒的消除、交通的改善和农业创新减少了收成变异性。我们认为，对于1830-1909年出生的瑞典老年男性（而非女性）而言，这种减少与同时期传染病发病率的下降同等重要，并且比消除子宫内不良收成暴露更为重要。

papers.title: Charging Uncertainty: Real-Time Charging Data and Electric Vehicle Adoption
papers.authors: Omar Isaac Asensio, Elaine Buckberg, Cassandra Cole, Luke Heeney, Christopher R. Knittel, James H. Stock
papers.abstract: Charging infrastructure is critical to electric vehicle (EV) adoption, but for chargers to be most useful, EV drivers need to know in real time where they are and whether they are working and available. We investigate the availability of real-time data from DC fast chargers on six major US Interstates and model the impacts of expanding access to real-time data to all DC fast chargers near highways. On average, between March and August 2024, 32.9% of DC fast charging stations adjacent to those six Interstates provided their real-time status on PlugShare, a major charge-finding app, with gaps of up to 1,308 miles without real-time data. Further, we survey potential car buyers and EV owners and find low credibility of currently-available real-time data. We incorporate this data into a two-sided model of consumer vehicle choice and charging station build-out adapted from Cole et al. (2023). If universal real-time data is accompanied by improved charger uptime and driver confidence in the accuracy of the real-time data, we predict that the EV share of new vehicle sales would grow by 8.0 percentage points in 2030, expanding the EV fleet by 13.2%, and reducing 2030 carbon emissions by 22.5 mmt, versus baseline projections for 2030.
papers.zh_title: 充电不确定性：实时充电数据与电动汽车普及
papers.zh_abstract: 充电基础设施对电动汽车的普及至关重要，但要使充电器发挥最大效用，电动汽车驾驶员需要实时了解充电器的位置、是否工作以及是否可用。我们调查了美国六条主要州际公路上直流快充桩实时数据的可用性，并模拟了将实时数据访问扩展到高速公路附近所有直流快充桩的影响。平均而言，在2024年3月至8月期间，这六条州际公路沿线32.9%的直流快充站通过主要找桩应用PlugShare提供了其实时状态，其间存在长达1308英里的无实时数据空白。此外，我们调查了潜在购车者和电动汽车车主，发现他们对当前可用实时数据的信任度较低。我们将这些数据纳入一个改编自Cole等人（2023）的消费者车辆选择和充电站建设的双边模型中。如果通用实时数据伴随着充电桩运行时间的改善以及驾驶员对实时数据准确性的信心提升，我们预测，与2030年的基线预测相比，到2030年电动汽车在新车销售中的份额将增长8.0个百分点，电动汽车车队规模将扩大13.2%，并减少2250万吨的碳排放。

papers.title: What is the General Welfare? Welfare Economic Perspectives on Prosperity and Equity
papers.authors: Charles F. Manski
papers.abstract: Researchers do not know what the framers of the United States Constitution intended when they wrote of the general Welfare. Nevertheless, economists can conjecture by specifying social welfare functions that aim to express the preferences of the population. Economists have often simplified utilitarian analysis of public policy by assuming that individuals have homogeneous, consequentialist, and self-centered preferences. In reality, individuals may hold heterogeneous private and social preferences. To enhance policy analysis, I argue that economists should specify social welfare functions that express the richness and variety of actual personal preferences over social states. The possibilities are vast. I focus on preferences for population prosperity and equity. There has been much controversy regarding interpretation of equity, a term that public discourse has used in vague and conflicting ways. Specifying social welfare functions that formally express different interpretations of equity may not eliminate disagreements, but it should clarify concepts of equity and reduce the inconsistencies that afflict verbal communication.
papers.zh_title: 何为一般福利？关于繁荣与公平的福利经济学视角
papers.zh_abstract: 研究者们并不知道美国宪法制定者在撰写“一般福利”一词时的意图。尽管如此，经济学家可以通过设定旨在表达人口偏好的社会福利函数来进行推测。经济学家常常通过假设个体具有同质、后果论且以自我为中心的偏好来简化公共政策的功利主义分析。现实中，个体可能持有异质性的私人偏好和社会偏好。为了加强政策分析，我认为经济学家应该设定能够表达个人对社会状态实际偏好的丰富性和多样性的社会福利函数。可能性是巨大的。我重点关注对人口繁荣和公平的偏好。关于公平的解释一直存在诸多争议，公共话语中对该术语的使用模糊且相互矛盾。设定能够正式表达公平不同解释的社会福利函数可能无法消除分歧，但应能澄清公平的概念，并减少困扰口头沟通的不一致性。

papers.title: The Growth Dividend and Excess Interest
papers.authors: Danny Yagan
papers.abstract: Standard deficit accounting neglects the growth dividend: the amount by which annual GDP growth shrinks the debt-GDP ratio. America's growth dividend has more than doubled since the Great Recession because the debt ratio has more than doubled, leading to headline deficits that far exceed changes in the debt ratio. Each year's change in the debt ratio can be decomposed into three components: the primary deficit (non-interest spending minus tax revenue), interest payments, and the growth dividend. The sum of the latter two is excess interest: the impact of past debt on the debt ratio, roughly equal to last year's debt ratio times the excess interest rate (r-g)/(1+g) where r is the average nominal interest rate on federal debt and g is the nominal GDP growth rate. Excess interest remains slightly negative in CBO's baseline ten-year projection. Hence, current debt is sustainable in the CBO baseline despite high interest payments, and primary deficits entirely drive the unsustainable projected debt ratio path and provide a good guide for how the debt ratio is projected to change. However, America's higher debt ratio implies higher vulnerability to the risk that the excess interest rate turns persistently positive.
papers.zh_title: 增长红利与超额利息
papers.zh_abstract: 标准赤字核算忽略了增长红利：即年度GDP增长使债务-GDP比率缩小的数额。自大衰退以来，美国的增长红利增加了一倍多，因为债务比率增加了一倍多，导致名义赤字远超债务比率的变化。每年债务比率的变化可以分解为三个部分：基本赤字（非利息支出减去税收收入）、利息支付和增长红利。后两者之和为超额利息：即过去债务对债务比率的影响，大致等于去年的债务比率乘以超额利率 (r-g)/(1+g)，其中r是联邦债务的平均名义利率，g是名义GDP增长率。在CBO的十年基线预测中，超额利息仍略为负值。因此，在CBO基线预测中，尽管利息支付很高，但当前债务是可持续的，基本赤字完全驱动了预测中不可持续的债务比率路径，并为债务比率预计如何变化提供了良好指引。然而，美国更高的债务比率意味着对超额利率持续转为正值的风险具有更高的脆弱性。

papers.title: Robust Fiscal Stabilization
papers.authors: Alan J. Auerbach, Danny Yagan
papers.abstract: Any fiscal path is sustainable if future fiscal policy responds sufficiently to high deficits. Previous work found that Congress reduced the deficit during 1984-2003 when projected deficits rose. We find that this year-to-year feedback has disappeared: Congress on average during 2004-2024 did not respond to the projected deficit. We quantify how strong fiscal feedback needs to be going forward in order to keep the debt-GDP ratio below 250% in one hundred years, taking as given the debt sensitivity of interest rates implicit in official projections. Without fiscal risk, the government can succeed either by modestly and gradually reducing the deficit or by suddenly and permanently reducing the deficit once this century by 1.5% of GDP. When considering large transitory deficit shocks like the COVID-19 pandemic and persistent interest rate shocks, keeping the debt ratio below 250% with 95% probability requires stronger gradual feedback — 0.5%-1.1% of GDP average deficit reduction in the next decade — though less strong than actually observed during 1984-2003. Successful sudden feedback requires being able to undertake 1.5%-of-GDP deficit reductions twice in thirteen-year periods, suggesting that a “wait-and-see” approach to successful deficit reduction sometimes allows little waiting.
papers.zh_title: 稳健的财政稳定
papers.zh_abstract: 如果未来的财政政策对高赤字做出充分反应，任何财政路径都是可持续的。先前的研究发现，在1984-2003年间，当预计赤字上升时，国会会减少赤字。我们发现这种逐年反馈已经消失：在2004-2024年间，国会平均而言并未对预计赤字做出反应。我们量化了未来需要多强的财政反馈，才能在一百年内将债务-GDP比率保持在250%以下，同时假设官方预测中隐含的利率对债务的敏感性。在没有财政风险的情况下，政府可以通过适度逐步减少赤字，或者在本世纪内突然且永久性地将赤字减少GDP的1.5%来取得成功。当考虑像COVID-19大流行这样的大型暂时性赤字冲击和持续性利率冲击时，以95%的概率将债务比率保持在250%以下需要更强的渐进反馈——未来十年平均赤字削减GDP的0.5%-1.1%——尽管强度低于1984-2003年间实际观察到的水平。成功的突发反馈要求能够在十三年期内进行两次相当于GDP 1.5%的赤字削减，这表明成功的赤字削减“观望”方法有时几乎不允许等待。

papers.title: American Life Histories
papers.authors: David Lagakos, Stelios Michalopoulos, Hans-Joachim Voth
papers.abstract: What does it take to live a meaningful life? We exploit a unique corpus of over 1,400 life narratives of older Americans collected by a team of writers during the 1930s. We combine detailed human readings with large language models (LLMs) to extract systematic information on critical junctures, sources of meaning, and overall life satisfaction. Under specific conditions, LLMs can provide responses to complex questions that are indistinguishable from those of human readers, effectively passing a version of the Turing Test. We find that sources of life meaning are more varied than previous research suggested, underlining the importance of work and community contributions in addition to family and close relationships (emphasized by earlier work). The narratives also highlight gendered disparities, with women disproportionately citing adverse family events, such as the loss of a parent, underscoring their role as keepers of the kin. Our research expands our understanding of human flourishing during a transformative period in American history and establishes a robust and scalable framework for exploring subjective well-being across diverse historical and cultural contexts.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DAE, DEV, EFG, POL；JEL：I31, N0, O10, P00, Z10
papers.zh_title: 美国人生故事
papers.zh_abstract: 过上有意义的生活需要什么？我们利用了一个独特的语料库，其中包含1930年代一个作家团队收集的1400多份美国老年人的生活叙事。我们结合详细的人工阅读和大型语言模型（LLMs），来提取关于关键转折点、意义来源和整体生活满意度的系统信息。在特定条件下，LLMs能够对复杂问题提供与人类读者无法区分的回答，有效地通过了图灵测试的一个版本。我们发现，生活意义的来源比先前研究暗示的更加多样化，这突显了工作和社区贡献的重要性，而不仅仅是家庭和亲密关系（早期研究强调的）。这些叙事还突出了性别差异，女性不成比例地提及不利的家庭事件，例如失去父母，这强调了她们作为亲属守护者的角色。我们的研究扩展了我们对美国历史上一个变革时期人类繁荣的理解，并建立了一个稳健且可扩展的框架，用于探索不同历史和文化背景下的主观幸福感。

papers.title: Racial Inequality in the Labor Market
papers.authors: Patrick Bayer, Kerwin Kofi Charles, Ellora Derenoncourt
papers.abstract: In this chapter, we introduce a new framework for studying the evolution of racial inequality in the labor market. The framework encompasses two broad forces – distributional and positional – that affect labor market gaps by racial and ethnic identity over time. We provide long-run results on the evolution of Black-White earnings gaps, including new results for Black and White women, and we review the evidence on historical factors affecting racial gaps. We then provide new results on racial gaps among other groups in the U.S. and discuss the evidence on racial gaps outside the U.S. We then discuss the role of prejudice-based discrimination in driving racial gaps, particularly in the post-civil-rights era, a period when such discrimination has been thought to play a declining role in racial inequality. We describe forces that can amplify existing discrimination, such as monopsony and workers’ perceptions of prejudice in the economy, and we discuss recent literature directly measuring discrimination through expanded audit studies and quasi-experimental variation. We conclude with a discussion of existing and new frontiers on race in the labor market, including stratification, reformulations of prejudice, and understanding the way race has shaped purportedly race-neutral institutions throughout the economy.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场中的种族不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 在本章中，我们引入了一个新的框架来研究劳动力市场中种族不平等的演变。该框架涵盖了两种广泛的驱动力——分布性和位置性——它们随着时间的推移影响着按种族和民族身份划分的劳动力市场差距。我们提供了关于黑人与白人收入差距演变的长期结果，包括关于黑人和白人女性的新结果，并回顾了影响种族差距的历史因素的证据。然后，我们提供了关于美国其他群体间种族差距的新结果，并讨论了美国以外种族差距的证据。接着，我们讨论了基于偏见的歧视在驱动种族差距中的作用，特别是在后民权时代，这一时期此类歧视被认为在种族不平等中扮演着日益减弱的角色。我们描述了可能放大现有歧视的力量，例如买方独家垄断和工人对经济中偏见的感知，并讨论了通过扩展的审计研究和准实验变异直接衡量歧视的最新文献。最后，我们讨论了劳动力市场中关于种族的现有和新前沿，包括分层、偏见的重新表述，以及理解种族如何塑造整个经济中表面上种族中立的制度。

papers.title: Welfare Effects of Buyer and Seller Power
papers.authors: Mert Demirer, Michael Rubens
papers.abstract: We provide a theoretical characterization of the welfare effects of buyer and seller power in vertical relations and introduce an empirical approach for quantifying the contributions of each to the welfare losses from market power. Our model accommodates both monopsony distortions from buyer power and double-marginalization distortions from seller power. Rather than imposing one of these vertical distortions by assumption, we let them be determined by a ’conduct selection’ criterion that is based on model primitives. We show that the relative elasticity of upstream supply and downstream demand is the key determinant of whether buyer or seller power creates a market power distortion. Applying our framework to coal procurement by power plants in Texas, we attribute 74.9% of the distortion to monopoly power of coal mines, with the remainder attributed to the monopsony power of power plants.
papers.zh_title: 买方势力与卖方势力的福利效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了垂直关系中买方和卖方势力福利效应的理论刻画，并引入了一种量化各自对市场势力福利损失贡献的实证方法。我们的模型同时包含了买方势力带来的买方垄断扭曲和卖方势力带来的双重加价扭曲。我们不是通过假设来强加这些垂直扭曲中的某一个，而是让它们由一个基于模型原始参数的“行为选择”标准来决定。我们表明，上游供给和下游需求的相对弹性是决定买方势力还是卖方势力产生市场势力扭曲的关键因素。将我们的框架应用于德克萨斯州发电厂的煤炭采购，我们将74.9%的扭曲归因于煤矿的垄断势力，其余部分归因于发电厂的买方垄断势力。

papers.title: The Role of Digital Platforms in Shaping Tech Venture Innovation
papers.authors: Ginger Zhe Jin, Mario Leccese, Liad Wagman
papers.abstract: This chapter examines the multifaceted interactions between top digital platforms and technology ventures across capital, labor, innovation, and product markets. Exploring how venture investments, talent flows, strategic alliances, and competitive behaviors can shape the innovation ecosystem, the chapter highlights both the complementary and competitive dynamics between large incumbents and smaller entrants, and the benefits and potential inefficiencies that may arise from them, as demonstrated by the empirical and theoretical literatures. Throughout, the chapter identifies key areas for research that can support a rigorous evaluation of policy proposals concerning evolving market structures in the digital economy.
papers.zh_title: 数字平台在塑造科技创业创新中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 本章考察了顶级数字平台与科技创业公司在资本、劳动力、创新和产品市场中的多方面互动。通过探讨风险投资、人才流动、战略联盟和竞争行为如何塑造创新生态系统，本章强调了大型在位企业与小型新进入者之间的互补与竞争动态，以及实证和理论文献所展示的由此可能产生的收益和潜在低效率。贯穿全文，本章指出了关键的研究领域，这些领域可以支持对有关数字经济中不断演变的市场结构的政策提案进行严格评估。

papers.title: Mean Reversion in Randomized Controlled Trials: Implications for Program Targeting and Heterogeneous Treatment Effects
papers.authors: Marcella Alsan, John Cawley, Joseph J. Doyle Jr., Nicholas Skelley
papers.abstract: Eligibility criteria for interventions can induce an Ashenfelter Dip, and subsequent mean-reversion may result in improvement over time even absent the intervention. We investigate these dynamics for a food-as-medicine program to treat diabetes, where eligibility required elevated hemoglobin A1c (HbA1c). Both treatment and control groups experienced significant improvements in HbA1c, resulting in an estimated null effect. When we predict improvement using baseline characteristics, we find that subjects unlikely to improve on their own appear to benefit from the program. Our findings have implications for program targeting and estimating heterogeneous treatment effects.
papers.zh_title: 随机对照试验中的均值回归：对项目瞄准和异质性处理效应的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 干预措施的资格标准可能引发阿申费尔特低谷，随后的均值回归可能导致即使没有干预，随着时间的推移也会出现改善。我们研究了这些动态在一个治疗糖尿病的“食物即药物”项目中的表现，该项目要求糖化血红蛋白（HbA1c）升高才有资格参与。治疗组和对照组的HbA1c都有显著改善，导致估计的效应为零。当我们使用基线特征预测改善时，我们发现那些不太可能自行改善的受试者似乎从该项目中受益。我们的发现对项目瞄准和估计异质性处理效应具有启示意义。

papers.title: Valuing Solar Subsidies
papers.authors: Bryan Bollinger, Kenneth Gillingham, A. Justin Kirkpatrick
papers.abstract: Individuals trade present for future consumption across a range of economic behaviors, and this tradeoff may differ across socioeconomic groups. To assess these tradeoffs, we estimate a dynamic model of residential solar adoption and system sizing in California using household-level data on solar irradiance, electricity consumption, and electricity rates that offer plausibly exogenous variation in the future benefits from adopting relative to upfront costs. We find implicit discount rates of 15.3%, 13.8%, and 10.0% for low-, medium-, and high-wealth households. Counterfactual simulations demonstrate opportunities to reduce the regressivity of solar adoption, increase policy cost-effectiveness, and improve welfare for low-wealth households.
papers.zh_title: 评估太阳能补贴的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 个体在一系列经济行为中权衡现在与未来的消费，而这种权衡可能因社会经济群体而异。为了评估这些权衡，我们利用加州家庭层面的太阳能辐照度、电力消耗和电价数据，估计了一个关于住宅太阳能采用和系统规模的动态模型，这些数据提供了关于采用相对于前期成本的未来收益的看似外生变化。我们发现低财富、中等财富和高财富家庭的隐含贴现率分别为15.3%、13.8%和10.0%。反事实模拟表明，存在减少太阳能采用累退性、提高政策成本效益以及改善低财富家庭福利的机会。

papers.title: Modernizing Access to Credit for Younger Entrepreneurs: From FICO to Cash Flow
papers.authors: Christopher M. Hair, Sabrina T. Howell, Mark J. Johnson, Siena Matsumoto
papers.abstract: This paper studies financial constraints over the entrepreneur’s lifecycle in the context of small business lending. Underwriting relies on personal credit scores, which are backward-looking and favor long histories. In causal analysis, we show that younger entrepreneurs’ loan applications have higher approval rates when the lender incorporates recent cash flows from business checking accounts. The result does not reflect lender risk-taking and is concentrated among lower-FICO applicants and the youngest entrepreneurs. Personal credit scores are both noisier and mechanically biased downward for younger entrepreneurs. Cash flow data provide an independent signal that reclassifies these entrepreneurs as less likely to default.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CF, PR；JEL：G21, G23, G32, J14, J16
papers.zh_title: 为年轻创业者现代化信贷准入：从FICO到现金流
papers.zh_abstract: 年轻创业者因依赖个人信用评分来承保小企业贷款的普遍做法而处于不利地位。在利用申请人内部分配给多个贷款机构的因果分析中，我们表明，当贷款机构纳入来自企业支票账户的近期现金流时，年轻企业主获得贷款批准的概率更高。我们提出了一种新方法——比较结果的尾部分析（TACO）——以非参数方式评估谁从替代模型中受益。该方法对于评估机器学习模型尤其有用。我们表明，将现金流数据纳入违约预测模型会不成比例地惠及年轻创业者。

papers.title: We Are Not in a Gaussian World Anymore: Implications for the Composition of Official Foreign Assets
papers.authors: José Andrée Camarena, Juan Pablo Medina, Daniel Riera-Crichton, Carlos A. Vegh, Guillermo Vuletin
papers.abstract: In the aftermath of the 1997-98 Asian crises, many emerging markets self-insured by accumulating international reserves (i.e., non-contingent assets) in excess of what many models predicted, while relying relatively little on state-contingent assets. This apparent over-reliance on self-insurance has been viewed as a puzzle in search of an explanation. A related, and still outstanding, puzzle is why the benefits of financial liberalization appear to be quite small and, yet, financial globalization has been unprecedented in recent decades. We show that these two puzzles can be solved by incorporating rare macroeconomic disasters in income risk. To this effect, we first fit a fat-tailed distribution to long output time series for 156 countries. We then develop a theoretical framework to quantify (i) the increase in welfare gains of financial integration and (ii) how the composition of official reserves (non-contingent and contingent) responds to bigger shocks. Our results show that fat tails lead to a sharp increase in both the gains of financial integration and self-insurance for standard values of the coefficient of risk aversion.
papers.zh_title: 我们不再处于高斯世界：对官方外汇资产构成的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 在1997-98年亚洲危机之后，许多新兴市场通过积累超出许多模型预测的国际储备（即非或有资产）进行自我保险，而对或有资产的依赖相对较少。这种对自我保险的明显过度依赖被视为一个有待解释的谜题。另一个相关且仍未解决的谜题是，为什么金融自由化的收益似乎相当小，然而近几十年来金融全球化却前所未有。我们表明，通过将收入风险中的罕见宏观经济灾难纳入考虑，可以解决这两个谜题。为此，我们首先为156个国家的长期产出时间序列拟合了一个厚尾分布。然后，我们开发了一个理论框架来量化（i）金融一体化福利收益的增加，以及（ii）官方储备（非或有和或有）的构成如何应对更大的冲击。我们的结果表明，对于标准风险厌恶系数值，厚尾导致金融一体化和自我保险的收益都急剧增加。

papers.title: A Different World: Enduring Effects of School Desegregation on Ideology and Attitudes
papers.authors: Ethan Kaplan, Jorg L. Spenkuch, Cody Tuttle
papers.abstract: In 1975, a federal court ordered the desegregation of public schools in Jefferson County, KY. In order to approximately equalize the share of minorities across schools, students were assigned to a busing schedule that depended on the first letter of their last name. We use the resulting quasi-random variation to estimate the long-run impact of attending an inner-city school on political participation and preferences among whites. Drawing on administrative voter registration records and an original survey, we find that being bused to an inner-city school significantly increases support for the Democratic Party and its candidates more than forty years later. Consistent with the idea that exposure to an inner-city environment causes a permanent change in ideological outlook, we also find evidence that bused individuals are much less likely to believe in a “just world” (i.e., that success is earned rather than attributable to luck) and, more tentatively, that they become more supportive of some forms of redistribution. Taken together, our findings imply that witnessing economic deprivation can durably sensitize individuals to issues of inequality and fairness.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D72, H75, I21, I28, J15, N32
papers.zh_title: 一个不同的世界：学校废除种族隔离对意识形态和态度的持久影响
papers.zh_abstract: 1975年，联邦法院下令废除肯塔基州杰斐逊县公立学校的种族隔离。为了大致平衡各校的少数族裔比例，学生被分配到一个取决于其姓氏首字母的校车接送计划。我们利用由此产生的准随机变异来估计就读市中心学校对白人政治参与和偏好的长期影响。根据行政选民登记记录和一项原始调查，我们发现，被校车送往市中心学校显著增加了四十多年后对民主党及其候选人的支持。与接触市中心环境会导致意识形态观永久改变的观点一致，我们还发现证据表明，被校车接送的人不太可能相信“公正世界”（即成功是靠努力而非运气获得的），并且（更初步地）他们变得更加支持某些形式的再分配。总的来说，我们的发现意味着目睹经济贫困可以持久地使个人对不平等和公平问题敏感化。

papers.title: Does Unilateral Decarbonization Pay For Itself?
papers.authors: Adrien Bilal, Diego R. Känzig
papers.abstract: This paper shows that unilateral decarbonization pays for itself in large economies. We estimate economic damages from global temperature shocks and combine them with a climate-economy model to construct Domestic Costs of Carbon: $226 per ton for the United States and $216 per ton for the European Union. When compared to marginal abatement costs, these values imply over 80% unilateral decarbonization for both economies, an order of magnitude larger than under conventional damages estimated based on local temperature.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, IFM；JEL：E01, E23, F18, O44, Q54, Q56
papers.zh_title: 单边脱碳能否收回成本？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文表明，在大型经济体中，单边脱碳可以收回成本。我们估算了全球温度冲击造成的经济损失，并将其与一个气候-经济模型相结合，构建了国内碳成本：美国为每吨226美元，欧盟为每吨216美元。与边际减排成本相比，这些数值意味着两个经济体均可实现超过80%的单边脱碳，其规模比基于当地温度估算的传统损失所隐含的规模大一个数量级。

papers.title: AI-Powered (Finance) Scholarship
papers.authors: Robert Novy-Marx, Mihail Z. Velikov
papers.abstract: This paper describes a process for automatically generating academic finance papers using large language models (LLMs). It demonstrates the process’ efficacy by producing hundreds of complete papers on stock return predictability, a topic particularly well-suited for our illustration. We first mine over 30,000 potential stock return predictor signals from accounting data, and apply the Novy-Marx and Velikov (2024) “Assaying Anomalies” protocol to generate standardized “template reports” for 96 signals that pass the protocol’s rigorous criteria. Each report details a signal’s performance predicting stock returns using a wide array of tests and benchmarks it to more than 200 other known anomalies. Finally, we use state-of-the-art LLMs to generate three distinct complete versions of academic papers for each signal. The different versions include creative names for the signals, contain custom introductions providing different theoretical justifications for the observed predictability patterns, and incorporate citations to existing (and, on occasion, imagined) literature supporting their respective claims. This experiment illustrates AI’s potential for enhancing financial research efficiency, but also serves as a cautionary tale, illustrating how it can be abused to industrialize HARKing (Hypothesizing After Results are Known).
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：A12, C12, C18, C45, G11, G12
papers.zh_title: 人工智能驱动的（金融）学术研究
papers.zh_abstract: 本文描述了一种使用大型语言模型自动生成金融学术论文的流程。通过生成数百篇关于股票收益可预测性的完整论文（这一主题特别适合我们的演示），我们展示了该流程的有效性。我们首先从会计数据中挖掘出超过30,000个潜在的股票收益预测信号，并应用Novy-Marx和Velikov（2024）的“异常检测”协议，为通过该协议严格标准的96个信号生成标准化的“模板报告”。每份报告都详细说明了信号在使用一系列测试预测股票收益方面的表现，并将其与超过200个其他已知异常现象进行基准比较。最后，我们使用最先进的大型语言模型为每个信号生成三个不同的完整论文版本。不同的版本包括为信号起的创意名称，包含提供对观察到的可预测性模式不同理论解释的定制引言，并引用支持其各自主张的现有（有时是虚构的）文献。这个实验展示了人工智能在提高金融研究效率方面的潜力，但也作为一个警示故事，说明了它如何被滥用来工业化地实施“事后假设”（HARKing）。

papers.title: Enclaves and Assimilation in the Age of Mass Migration: Evidence from Ethnic Catholic Churches
papers.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Leah Platt Boustan, Osea Giuntella
papers.abstract: Immigrant enclaves offer valuable ethnic amenities but may delay assimilation. We study enclave formation in the Age of Mass Migration by using the centralized location decisions for “ethnic” Catholic churches.
