papers.zh_abstract: 1991年7月，印度开始拆除其长期存在且高度限制性的进口管制体制，转向更开放的经济。政策制定者是如何能够取代一个根深蒂固且背后有强大既得利益集团的体系的？政策变革的标准原因——国内生产者利益压力、政治权力转移或国际金融机构的附加条件——无法解释贸易政策转变为何发生。相反，具有改革意识的技术官僚说服政治领导人，摒弃了应对国际收支压力的标准做法（通过进口管制避免货币贬值），并接受了一种新方法（汇率调整和减少进口限制）。本文探讨了该国戏剧性政策转型背后的经济和政治背景。印度的经验凸显了汇率政策与贸易政策之间的关键联系。

papers.title: Wealth Tax Enforcement in Sweden: Filing Requirements and Pre-Populated Returns
papers.authors: Emmanuel Saez, David G. Seim
papers.abstract: This paper shows that two features of wealth tax administration in Sweden—(1) filing requirements and (2) pre-populated returns—have a large impact on compliance even in an environment with highly-developed third-party reporting through information returns. Up to 1993, all taxpayers had to fill in wealth information when filing the (joint) income and wealth tax return. In 1994-1996, only those with net wealth above the exemption threshold (approximately the top 10%) needed to fill in wealth information. This leads to a very large reduction of about half of the number of taxpayers slightly above the wealth tax exemption threshold, and a reduction of about 20% in the total number of wealth taxpayers above the threshold. Starting in 1997, Sweden began pre-populating wealth information on tax returns for taxpayers with third-party-reported net wealth above the exemption threshold. Symmetrically, this immediately doubles the number of taxpayers slightly above the threshold and increases the number of all wealth taxpayers by almost 20%. The introduction of information returns for financial wealth in 1986 had a comparatively small impact on wealth reporting.
papers.zh_title: 瑞典的财富税执行：申报要求与预填申报表
papers.zh_abstract: 本文表明，瑞典财富税管理的两个特征——（1）申报要求和（2）预填申报表——即使在通过信息申报表进行高度发达的第三方报告的环境中，也对合规性产生了巨大影响。直到1993年，所有纳税人在提交（联合）所得税和财富税申报表时都必须填写财富信息。在1994-1996年，只有净资产超过免税门槛（大约前10%）的纳税人才需要填写财富信息。这导致略高于财富税免税门槛的纳税人数量大幅减少约一半，并且高于门槛的财富纳税人总数减少了约20%。从1997年开始，瑞典开始为那些第三方报告的净资产高于免税门槛的纳税人预填财富税申报表中的财富信息。对称地，这立即将略高于门槛的纳税人数量翻了一番，并将所有财富纳税人的数量增加了近20%。相比之下，1986年引入金融财富信息申报表对财富报告的影响相对较小。

papers.title: Do Place-Based Industrial Interventions Help "Left-Behind" Workers? Lessons from WWII and Beyond
papers.authors: Andrew Garin
papers.abstract: Place-based industrial interventions—policies that promote production and investment in specific regions—are often proposed with the intent of improving economic conditions for residents, particularly "left-behind" workers in distressed local labor markets. This chapter discusses the theoretical rationale for the use of industrial interventions to achieve distributional goals and evidence about their effectiveness to that end. I use government-funded plant construction during World War II (WWII) in the United States as a focal case study, which I then compare and contrast to other industrial interventions studied in the literature. While government plant construction during WWII drove an expansion of high-wage semi-skilled jobs open to local residents, which in turn fueled an increase in upward mobility among local residents, the evidence from more recent interventions suggests that modern plant sitings often fail to yield similar benefits to local workers. The implementation details of industrial interventions matter crucially for their incidence on local workers. Interventions that generate opportunities for up-skilling and occupational advancement accessible to target populations appear to be most likely to generate meaningful distributional benefits. I argue that while core production goals during WWII happened to inherently align with the promotion of upward mobility, such alignment is not guaranteed in general and may be the exception rather than the rule in modern contexts.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, LS, PE；JEL：H54, J31, J62, N61, O25, R11, R53
papers.zh_title: 基于地点的产业干预能帮助“被遗忘”的工人吗？二战及之后的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 基于地点的产业干预——促进特定地区生产和投资的政策——通常旨在改善居民的经济状况，特别是处于困境地方劳动力市场中的“被遗忘”工人。本章讨论了利用产业干预实现分配目标的理论依据，以及关于其有效性的证据。我以二战期间美国政府资助的工厂建设作为重点案例研究，然后将其与文献中研究的其他产业干预措施进行比较和对比。虽然二战期间的政府工厂建设推动了面向当地居民的高薪半熟练工作岗位的扩张，进而促进了当地居民向上流动性的提升，但来自近期干预措施的证据表明，现代的工厂选址往往未能为当地工人带来类似的益处。产业干预的实施细节对其对当地工人的影响至关重要。能够为目标人群创造技能提升和职业发展机会的干预措施，最有可能产生有意义的分配效益。我认为，虽然二战期间的核心生产目标恰好与促进向上流动性内在一致，但这种一致性在一般情况下并不能得到保证，并且在现代背景下可能是例外而非规则。

papers.title: Ancient Epics in the Television Age: Religious Identity and the Rise of Hindu Nationalism in India
papers.authors: Dean Yang, Alessandro Saia, Akhila Kovvuri, Resuf Ahmed, Paul Brimble
papers.abstract: How does strengthened religious identity affect society and politics? We study the impact of “Ramayan,” the massively popular televised version of the Hindu epic. We conduct difference-in-difference analyses, measuring Ramayan exposure with TV signal strength in Indian localities at the time of airing in 1987. Localities with higher Ramayan exposure saw persistently strengthened Hindu religious identity, measured by newborn names and dietary practices; short-run increases in Hindu-Muslim communal violence; and longer-run increases in electoral success for the Hindu nationalist Bharatiya Janata Party. Increased presence of Hindu religious schools is a likely mechanism behind long-run persistence of effects.
papers.zh_title: 电视时代的古代史诗：宗教认同与印度教民族主义在印度的兴起
papers.zh_abstract: 强化的宗教认同如何影响社会和政治？我们研究了“罗摩衍那”的影响，这是一部广受欢迎的印度史诗电视剧。我们采用双重差分分析，利用1987年播出时印度各地的电视信号强度来衡量对“罗摩衍那”的接触程度。接触“罗摩衍那”程度较高的地区，其印度教宗教认同（以新生儿姓名和饮食习惯衡量）持续增强；印度教-穆斯林社区暴力事件在短期内增加；以及印度教民族主义政党印度人民党在长期内选举成功率上升。印度教宗教学校的存在增加是效应长期持续的一个可能机制。

papers.title: The Long and Short of Financial Development
papers.authors: Douglas W. Diamond, Yunzhi Hu, Raghuram Rajan
papers.abstract: By improving the pledgeability of returns to financiers, financial development enhances a producer’s ability to raise capital to fund long term complex investments. Consequently, it should increase output and welfare. However, a general equilibrium analysis suggests this is not always so. We consider an economy where producers and consuming/financing households are distinct agents, where producers lack sufficient capital, and where households care about both pledgeable returns and liquidity. In this economy, the greater pledgeability of long-term project earnings can reduce long term production and overall welfare, even though it makes financing more accessible. Our results have implications for why economies face impediments to financial development and overall growth, especially when producer capital is scarce.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IFM, POL；JEL：G1, G3, O10, O16, O4, O43
papers.zh_title: 金融发展的长期与短期
papers.zh_abstract: 通过提高对金融家回报的可质押性，金融发展增强了生产者筹集资本以资助长期复杂投资的能力。因此，它应该增加产出和福利。然而，一般均衡分析表明情况并非总是如此。我们考虑一个经济，其中生产者和消费/融资家庭是不同的主体，生产者缺乏足够的资本，而家庭既关心可质押回报也关心流动性。在这个经济中，长期项目收益更高的可质押性会减少长期生产和整体福利，尽管它使融资更容易获得。我们的结果对于解释为什么经济体在金融发展和整体增长方面面临障碍具有启示意义，尤其是在生产者资本稀缺的情况下。

papers.title: Declining Youth Well-being in 167 UN Countries. Does Survey Mode, or Question Matter?
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower
papers.abstract: I find evidence from 167/193 UN member countries that the young have lower levels of well-being than older age groups, using self-reported data collected on the internet from the Global Minds internet-based surveys of 2020-2024 using their MHQ measure. We found that the evidence on the mental health of the young was different when self-reported, internet-based responses were used compared with those obtained via an interviewer, either face-to-face or via the telephone. Our analysis of the United States using 14 surveys taken using all three methods always found the young had the lowest well-being of any age group. The evidence for relatively low youth well-being on we collected using four major European surveys was stronger in internet-based surveys and when negative affect variables rather than life satisfaction and happiness were used. The young were significantly more lonely and more unhappy than all other age group, in 26/27 EU member countries in the internet-based EU Loneliness Survey of 2022. We also examined the Global Flourishing survey of 2022-2024 across 22 countries that used both telephone and web-based surveys and the results showed rising well-being in age, in the internet surveys and declining well-being in age in the telephone surveys. Mode of survey and question used matters. The young are experiencing a mental health crisis globally picked up especially in self-reports. This is new.
papers.zh_title: 167个联合国成员国青年福祉的下降：调查模式或问题是否重要？
papers.zh_abstract: 我利用2020-2024年全球思维互联网调查（Global Minds internet-based surveys）中通过MHQ测量指标收集的自我报告数据，从193个联合国成员国中的167个国家发现证据表明，年轻人的福祉水平低于老年群体。我们发现，当使用自我报告的互联网回复与通过面对面或电话访谈员获得的数据相比时，关于年轻人心理健康的证据有所不同。我们使用所有三种方法进行的14项调查对美国进行的分析始终发现，年轻人是所有年龄组中福祉最低的。我们在四项主要欧洲调查中收集到的关于青年福祉相对较低的证据，在基于互联网的调查中以及在使用负面情感变量而非生活满意度和幸福感时更为强烈。在2022年基于互联网的欧盟孤独感调查中，27个欧盟成员国中有26个国家的年轻人比所有其他年龄组显著更孤独、更不快乐。我们还考察了2022-2024年覆盖22个国家的全球繁荣调查（Global Flourishing survey），该调查同时使用了电话和网络调查，结果显示，在互联网调查中福祉随年龄增长而上升，而在电话调查中福祉随年龄增长而下降。调查模式和所用问题很重要。年轻人正在经历一场全球性的心理健康危机，这一点尤其在自我报告中显现出来。这是新的发现。

papers.title: The Targeting of Place-Based Policies: The New Markets Tax Credit Versus Opportunity Zones
papers.authors: Kevin Corinth, David Coyne, Naomi E. Feldman, Craig Johnson
papers.abstract: For a place-based policy to succeed, it must target the right areas—typically those with lower economic development and resident well-being. The U.S. has two major place-based tax policies: the New Markets Tax Credit (NMTC), where government approved entities select investments, and Opportunity Zones (OZs), where private investors choose projects. Despite underlying design differences, both target census tracts with relatively high poverty rates, low median income and weak labor markets. However, OZs tend to attract more investment in areas with higher pre-existing private investment, often located in prosperous counties and high-growth regions. Census tracts lacking investment from either program generally have less private investment, lower home value growth, and lower population growth, suggesting that additional policies may be needed to reach areas less primed for investment.
papers.zh_title: 基于地点的政策的靶向性：新市场税收抵免与机会区
papers.zh_abstract: 要使基于地点的政策取得成功，它必须瞄准正确的区域——通常是那些经济发展和居民福祉较低的区域。美国有两项主要的基于地点的税收政策：新市场税收抵免（NMTC），由政府批准的实体选择投资；以及机会区（OZs），由私人投资者选择项目。尽管底层设计存在差异，两者都瞄准了贫困率相对较高、收入中位数较低且劳动力市场疲软的人口普查区。然而，机会区往往在已有较高私人投资的地区吸引更多投资，这些地区通常位于繁荣的县和高增长区域。缺乏任一计划投资的人口普查区通常私人投资较少、房屋价值增长较低且人口增长较低，这表明可能需要额外的政策来覆盖那些投资条件较差的区域。

papers.title: Climate Transition Risks and the Energy Sector
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Stefano Giglio, Stefano Pastore, Johannes Stroebel, Zhenhao Tan, Tiffany Yong
papers.abstract: We build a general equilibrium model to study how climate transition risks affect energy prices and the valuations of different firms in the energy sector. We consider two types of fossil fuel firms: incumbents that have developed oil reserves they can extract today or tomorrow, and new entrants that must invest in exploration and drilling today to have reserves to potentially extract tomorrow. There are also renewable energy firms that produce emission-free energy but cannot currently serve non-electrifiable sectors of the economy. We analyze three sources of climate transition risk: (i) changes in the probability of a technological breakthrough that allows renewable energy firms to serve all economic sectors; (ii) changes in expected future taxes on carbon emissions; and (iii) restrictions on today's development of additional fossil fuel production capacity. We show that different transition risks—and, importantly, uncertainty about their realizations—have distinct effects on firms' decisions, on their valuations, and on equilibrium energy prices. We provide empirical support for the heterogeneous effects of different transition risks on energy prices and stock returns of firms in different energy sub-sectors.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE, EFG, PE, PR；JEL：G0, Q0
papers.zh_title: 气候转型风险与能源部门
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个一般均衡模型，研究气候转型风险如何影响能源价格以及能源部门不同企业的估值。我们考虑两类化石燃料企业：拥有已开发石油储量、可在今天或明天开采的在位企业，以及必须投资于今天的勘探和钻探以拥有可能在明天开采的储量的新进入者。还有可再生能源企业，它们生产无排放能源，但目前无法服务于经济中不可电气化的部门。我们分析了气候转型风险的三个来源：(i) 允许可再生能源企业服务于所有经济部门的技术突破概率的变化；(ii) 预期未来碳排放税的变化；以及 (iii) 对今天开发额外化石燃料生产能力的限制。我们表明，不同的转型风险——以及重要的是，关于其实现的不确定性——对企业决策、企业估值和均衡能源价格具有不同的影响。我们为不同转型风险对能源价格和不同能源子行业企业股票收益的异质性影响提供了实证支持。

papers.title: Geographic Resolution in Environmental Policy: EPA’s Shift from Regions to Counties Under the Clean Air Act
papers.authors: Maureen L. Cropper, Mengjia Hu, Yongjoon Park, Nicholas Z. Muller
papers.abstract: Prior to 1978 EPA regulated nonattainment with the Clean Air Act using Air Quality Control Regions (AQCRs), switching to counties in 1978. This paper investigates the implications of this change for ambient pollution and manufacturing employment. We find that EPA’s official AQCR nonattainment designation for total suspended particulate matter (TSP) in 1972 had no causal effect on ambient TSP. Nor do we detect robust causal evidence that being in nonattainment in the AQCR regime affected employment in pollution intensive manufacturing industries. In contrast, using an imputed definition of 1972 nonattainment based on county level monitor readings, we find evidence that nonattainment decreased ambient TSP and manufacturing employment. After 1978, when EPA officially adopted county level nonattainment designations, both ambient TSP and manufacturing employment in pollution intensive industries declined. We discuss the implications of these findings for EPA’s decision regarding the geographic level at which to regulate air pollution.
papers.zh_title: 环境政策中的地理分辨率：清洁空气法案下EPA从区域到县的转变
papers.zh_abstract: 在1978年之前，EPA使用空气质量控制区域（AQCRs）来监管《清洁空气法案》的不达标情况，并于1978年转为使用县。本文研究了这一变化对周围环境污染和制造业就业的影响。我们发现，EPA在1972年对总悬浮颗粒物（TSP）的官方AQCR不达标认定对周围环境TSP没有因果效应。我们也没有检测到稳健的因果证据表明，在AQCR制度下处于不达标状态影响了污染密集型制造业的就业。相比之下，使用基于县级监测仪读数的1972年不达标推算定义，我们发现不达标降低了周围环境TSP和制造业就业的证据。1978年之后，当EPA正式采用县级不达标认定时，周围环境TSP和污染密集型行业的制造业就业均有所下降。我们讨论了这些发现对EPA关于监管空气污染的地理层级决策的启示。

papers.title: Moral Hazard and the Sustainability of Income-Driven Repayment Plans
papers.authors: Chao Fu, Xiaomeng Li, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: Income-Driven Repayment (IDR) plans tie student loan repayment to income and forgive unpaid debt after a certain number of years of repayment. We investigate how these features affect one’s career choices through a survey where the same student is asked to select job profiles under various repayment plans. Consistent with our Ben- Porath style model, the survey results reveal that IDR is a double-edged sword. On the one hand, 36% of students underinvest in their human capital under the standard repayment plan relative to their would-be choices in a debt-free scenario; an IDR resembling the Saving on a Valuable Education (SAVE) plan reduces this fraction to 20%. On the other hand, IDRs induce moral hazard: under a SAVE-like plan, 22% of students choose job profiles with lower initial wages and higher wage growth than their choices in a debt-free scenario, leaving part of their debt forgiven. A back-of-the-envelope calculation indicates that this type of moral hazard alone would render SAVE-like plans unviable were they carried out by private lenders; however, government-run IDRs are sustainable due to the government’s ability to collect lifetime income taxes.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：H0, I20, I22, I23, J01, J24
papers.zh_title: 道德风险与收入驱动型还款计划的可持续性
papers.zh_abstract: 收入驱动型还款（IDR）计划将学生贷款还款与收入挂钩，并在还款一定年限后免除未偿还债务。我们通过一项调查来研究这些特征如何影响个人的职业选择，在该调查中，同一名学生被要求在各种还款计划下选择工作档案。与我们基于Ben-Porath风格的模型一致，调查结果显示IDR是一把双刃剑。一方面，在标准还款计划下，36%的学生相对于他们在无债务情景下的选择，对其人力资本投资不足；一个类似于“节省宝贵教育”（SAVE）计划的IDR将此比例降至20%。另一方面，IDR会诱发道德风险：在类似SAVE的计划下，22%的学生选择了初始工资较低但工资增长较快的工作档案，而非他们在无债务情景下的选择，从而使其部分债务被免除。一项粗略计算表明，仅此类道德风险就足以使类似SAVE的计划在由私人贷款机构执行时不可行；然而，政府运营的IDR是可持续的，因为政府有能力征收终身所得税。

papers.title: Sources of Market Power in Web Search: Evidence from a Field Experiment
papers.authors: Hunt Allcott, Juan Camilo Castillo, Matthew Gentzkow, Leon Musolff, Tobias Salz
papers.abstract: We study the forces behind Google’s large web-search market share. We develop a demand model with switching costs, quality beliefs, and inattention, and estimate it using a field experiment. We find that (i) requiring active choice barely increases Bing’s market share; (ii) Google users paid to try Bing update positively about its quality and many prefer to continue using it; (iii) many Google users defaulted into Bing do not switch back, consistent with inattention. Counterfactuals suggest that eliminating demand frictions doubles Bing’s market share. Successful remedies expose users to alternative search engines, while data sharing mandates have small effects.
papers.zh_title: 网络搜索中市场力量的来源：来自实地实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了谷歌在网络搜索中占据巨大市场份额背后的力量。我们构建了一个包含转换成本、质量信念和注意力不足的需求模型，并通过一项实地实验对其进行估计。我们发现：(i) 要求主动选择几乎不会增加必应的市场份额；(ii) 付费试用必应的谷歌用户会正向更新对其质量的看法，并且许多人更愿意继续使用它；(iii) 许多默认使用必应的谷歌用户不会切换回谷歌，这与注意力不足一致。反事实分析表明，消除需求摩擦会使必应的市场份额翻倍。成功的补救措施让用户接触到替代搜索引擎，而数据共享授权的影响很小。

papers.title: Environmental Migration and Race during the Great American Drought, 1935-1940
papers.authors: Christopher Sichko, Ariell Zimran, Aparna Howlader
papers.abstract: We study racial differences in internal migration responses to one of the most severe climatic shocks in US history—the drought of the 1930s. Using data from the 1940 census on 65 million adults, we find that individuals exposed to more severe drought between 1935 and 1940 were more likely to make an inter-county move and that this responsiveness was greater for black individuals than white individuals. This racial difference was particularly pronounced among the rural population. Black individuals' migration premium came despite their systematic disadvantage in the economy of the 1930s and evidence along dimensions other than race that disadvantage limited individuals' ability to adapt to the drought through migration. Federal relief spending under the Agricultural Adjustment Act (AAA) magnified this racial difference, reducing the migration response to drought for white individuals and increasing it for black individuals. These results help to better understand how the reaction of different groups aggregate to determine the magnitude and composition of migration responses to natural disasters, as well as the roles of migration and government policy in disadvantaged groups' responses to natural disasters.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EEE, LS；JEL：D63, J15, N32, N52, O13, O15, Q12, R11, R23
papers.zh_title: 大干旱期间的环境移民与种族差异，1935-1940
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国历史上最严重的气候冲击之一——1930年代的干旱——对国内移民反应的种族差异。利用1940年人口普查中6500万成年人的数据，我们发现，在1935年至1940年间暴露于更严重干旱的个体更有可能进行跨县迁移，并且这种反应在黑人群体中比在白人群体中更为强烈。这种种族差异在农村人口中尤为显著。尽管黑人群体的迁移溢价是在1930年代经济中系统性处于劣势的背景下出现的，并且有证据表明，在种族以外的维度上，劣势限制了个体通过迁移适应干旱的能力，但这一现象仍然存在。根据《农业调整法》（AAA）提供的联邦救济支出放大了这种种族差异，减少了白人群体的干旱迁移反应，同时增加了黑人群体的迁移反应。这些结果有助于更好地理解不同群体的反应如何汇聚起来，决定对自然灾害迁移反应的规模和构成，以及迁移和政府政策在弱势群体应对自然灾害中的作用。

papers.title: Housing Subsidies for Refugees: Experimental Evidence on Life Outcomes and Social Integration in Jordan
papers.authors: Abdulrazzak Tamim, Emma C. Smith, Bailey Palmer, Edward Miguel, Samuel Leone, Sandra V. Rozo, Sarah Stillman
papers.abstract: Refugees require assistance for basic needs like housing but local host communities may feel excluded from that assistance, potentially affecting community relations. This study experimentally evaluates the effect of a housing assistance program for Syrian refugees in Jordan on both the recipients and their neighbors. The program offered full rental subsidies and landlord incentives for housing improvements, but saw only moderate uptake, in part due to landlord reluctance. The program improved short-run housing quality and lowered housing expenditures, but did not yield sustained economic benefits, partly due to redistribution of aid. The program unexpectedly led to a deterioration in child socio-emotional well-being, and also strained relations between Jordanian neighbors and refugees. In all, housing subsidies had limited measurable benefits for refugee well-being while worsening social cohesion, highlighting the possible need for alternative forms of aid.
papers.zh_title: 难民住房补贴：关于约旦生活结果与社会融合的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 难民需要住房等基本需求的援助，但当地东道社区可能会感到被排除在这种援助之外，这可能会影响社区关系。本研究通过实验评估了约旦境内叙利亚难民住房援助计划对受助者及其邻居的影响。该计划提供全额租金补贴和房东改善住房的激励措施，但由于房东的抵触等原因，参与率仅为中等水平。该计划改善了短期住房质量并降低了住房支出，但并未带来持续的经济效益，部分原因是援助的再分配。该计划意外地导致儿童社会情感福祉恶化，并加剧了约旦邻居与难民之间的紧张关系。总体而言，住房补贴对难民福祉的有限可衡量收益是以社会凝聚力恶化为代价的，这凸显了可能需要替代形式的援助。

papers.title: The Evolution of Unobserved Skill Returns in the U.S.: A New Approach Using Panel Data
papers.authors: Lance Lochner, Youngmin Park, Youngki Shin
papers.abstract: Economists disagree about the factors driving the substantial increase in residual wage inequality in the US over the past few decades. To identify changes in the returns to unobserved skills, we make a novel assumption about the dynamics of skills rather than about the stability of skill distributions across cohorts, as is standard. We show that our assumption is supported by data on test score dynamics for older workers in the HRS. Using survey data from the PSID and administrative data from the IRS and SSA, we estimate that the returns to unobserved skills declined substantially in the late-1980s and 1990s despite an increase in residual inequality. Accounting for firm-specific pay differences yields similar results. Extending our framework to consider occupational differences in returns to skill and multiple unobserved skills, we further show that skill returns display similar patterns for workers employed in each of cognitive, routine, and social occupations. Finally, our results suggest that increasing skill dispersion, driven by rising skill volatility, explains most of the growth in residual wage inequality since the 1980s.
papers.zh_title: 美国不可观测技能回报的演变：一种使用面板数据的新方法
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学家们对于过去几十年美国残差工资不平等大幅增加的驱动因素存在分歧。为了识别不可观测技能回报的变化，我们做出一个关于技能动态的新假设，而非像标准做法那样假设技能分布在代际间保持稳定。我们证明，我们的假设得到了HRS中老年工人考试成绩动态数据的支持。利用PSID的调查数据以及IRS和SSA的行政数据，我们估计，尽管残差不平等加剧，但不可观测技能的回报在1980年代末和1990年代大幅下降。考虑企业特定的薪酬差异会得到类似的结果。将我们的框架扩展到考虑技能回报的职业差异和多种不可观测技能，我们进一步表明，在认知型、常规型和社交型职业中就业的工人，其技能回报呈现出相似的模式。最后，我们的结果表明，由技能波动性上升驱动的技能离散度增加，解释了自1980年代以来残差工资不平等增长的大部分原因。

papers.title: Financial Looting and Controls on Resident Outflows
papers.authors: Bo Li, Alessandro Rebucci, Hui Tong
papers.abstract: This paper develops a theory of preemptive controls on capital outflows by residents as a second-best tool to mitigate boom-bust cycles in domestic asset markets and prevent wealth transfers from uninformed traders to pump-and-dump speculators, or financial “looters,” as in Akerlof and Romer (1993). The model implies that when domestic financial regulation is imperfectly designed or enforced, controls on residents' outflows reduce retail investor manipulation (which we call looting), stabilize asset prices, and diminish capital flight. The paper also provides compelling evidence that supports the main implications of the model when applied to housing markets, which is particularly relevant to institutions in developing countries. We find that deposit outflows to haven countries increase before busts in house prices, and countries with stricter controls on resident outflows experience significantly more contained deposit outflows to such destinations. The empirical analysis reveals a similar pattern for new incorporations in haven countries based on data from the Panama Papers.
papers.zh_title: 金融掠夺与居民资本外流管制
papers.zh_abstract: 本文发展了一个理论，将预防性居民资本外流管制视为一种次优工具，用以缓解国内资产市场的繁荣-萧条周期，并防止财富从不知情的交易者转移到“拉高出货”的投机者或金融“掠夺者”手中，如Akerlof和Romer (1993)所述。该模型意味着，当国内金融监管设计或执行不完善时，对居民资本外流的管制会减少散户投资者的操纵（我们称之为掠夺），稳定资产价格，并减少资本外逃。本文还提供了令人信服的证据，支持该模型在应用于住房市场时的主要含义，这对发展中国家的制度尤为重要。我们发现，在房价暴跌之前，流向避风港国家的存款外流会增加，而对居民资本外流管制更严格的国家，流向此类目的地的存款外流会受到显著抑制。基于巴拿马文件数据的实证分析显示，在避风港国家的新注册公司也呈现出类似模式。

papers.title: Does the Gender Wage Gap Actually Reflect Taste Discrimination Against Women?
papers.authors: Molly Maloney, David Neumark
papers.abstract: One explanation of the gender wage gap is taste discrimination, as in Becker (1957). Using U.S. data, we test for taste discrimination by constructing a novel measure of misogyny using Google Trends data on searches that include derogatory terms for women. We find—surprisingly, in our view—that misogyny is an economically meaningful and statistically significant predictor of the wage gap. We also test more explicit implications of taste discrimination. The data are inconsistent with the Becker taste discrimination model, based on the tests used in Charles and Guryan (2008). But the data are consistent with the effects of taste discrimination against women in search models (Black, 1995), in which discrimination on the part of even a small group of misogynists can result in a wage gap.
papers.zh_title: 性别工资差距是否真的反映了针对女性的品味歧视？
papers.zh_abstract: 性别工资差距的一种解释是品味歧视，如Becker (1957)所述。利用美国数据，我们通过构建一种新颖的厌女症衡量指标来检验品味歧视，该指标使用了包含针对女性贬义词汇的搜索词的Google Trends数据。我们发现——在我们看来令人惊讶的是——厌女症是工资差距的一个在经济意义上显著且在统计上显著的预测因子。我们还检验了品味歧视更明确的含义。基于Charles和Guryan (2008)使用的检验，数据与Becker的品味歧视模型不一致。但数据与搜索模型中针对女性的品味歧视效应一致（Black, 1995），在该模型中，即使是少数厌女者的歧视也可能导致工资差距。

papers.title: Quick-Fixing: Near-Rationality in Consumption and Savings Behavior
papers.authors: Peter Andre, Joel P. Flynn, Georgios Nikolakoudis, Karthik Sastry
papers.abstract: When changing consumption-savings plans is costly, people may rely on quick-fixes: simple rules that avoid these costs. We field a novel survey to elicit the distribution of households’ consumption policy functions out of income shocks. Almost 70% of households follow one of four quick-fixes: they fully consume or save small shocks, but abruptly adjust their behavior for large shocks, and thereafter behave similarly. In a calibrated incomplete-markets model, quick-fixing is near-rational: the average opportunity cost of quick-fixing is only $16 per quarter. Yet, this empirically realistic deviation from benchmark models significantly alters aggregate consumption responses to income shocks.
papers.zh_title: 快速修补：消费与储蓄行为中的近理性
papers.zh_abstract: 当改变消费-储蓄计划成本高昂时，人们可能依赖快速修补：即避免这些成本的简单规则。我们进行了一项新颖的调查，以揭示家庭应对收入冲击的消费政策函数的分布。近70%的家庭遵循四种快速修补规则之一：他们完全消费或储蓄小额冲击，但对于大额冲击会突然调整其行为，此后行为相似。在一个校准的不完全市场模型中，快速修补是近理性的：快速修补的平均机会成本每季度仅为16美元。然而，这种与基准模型经验上相符的偏离显著改变了总体消费对收入冲击的反应。

papers.title: Market Competition and Shock Propagation: Implications for Margins and Distress
papers.authors: Winston Wei Dou, Shane A. Johnson, Wei Wu
papers.abstract: Using local natural disasters as a quasi-experimental setting, we show that adverse shocks lead both directly affected firms and their unaffected competitors to reduce profit margins by approximately 0.8 percentage points. These reductions stem from intensified market competition, driven by mechanisms including predatory pricing, inventory liquidation, and weakened tacit collusion. As unaffected competitors cut margins nearly one-for-one in response, their financial distress rises significantly, though not directly shocked. Spillover effects are concentrated in tradable industries and those with high entry barriers, large inventories, greater price flexibility, or tight financial constraints, revealing a novel channel for shock propagation across the economy.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IO；JEL：G32, G33, L11
papers.zh_title: 市场竞争与冲击传导：对利润率和困境的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 利用局部自然灾害作为准实验环境，我们表明不利冲击导致直接受影响的企业及其未受影响的竞争对手都将利润率降低约0.8个百分点。这些降低源于加剧的市场竞争，其驱动机制包括掠夺性定价、库存清算和弱化的默契合谋。由于未受影响的竞争对手几乎一对一地削减利润率，它们的财务困境显著上升，尽管并未直接受到冲击。溢出效应集中在可贸易行业以及那些具有高进入壁垒、高库存、更大价格灵活性或紧张财务约束的行业，揭示了冲击在整个经济中传导的一个新渠道。

papers.title: Student Loan Forgiveness
papers.authors: Michael Dinerstein, Samuel Earnest, Dmitri K. Koustas, Constantine Yannelis
papers.abstract: Student loan forgiveness has been proposed as a means to alleviate soaring student loan burdens. This paper uses administrative credit bureau data to study the distributional, consumption, borrowing, and employment effects of the largest event of student loan forgiveness in history. Beginning in March 2021, the United States federal government ordered $132 billion in student loans cancelled, or 7.8% of the total $1.7 trillion in outstanding student debt. We estimate that forgiven borrowers’ predicted monthly earnings were $115 higher than borrowers who did not receive forgiveness and $193 more than the general population. We find that student loan forgiveness led to increases in mortgage, auto, and credit card debt by 9 cents for every dollar forgiven. Borrowers’ monthly earnings and employment fell, at increasing rates for each month post forgiveness. The implied Marginal Propensities for Consumption (MPC) and Earnings (MPE) are 0.27 and -0.49, respectively.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：G51, I22, I28, J29
papers.zh_title: 学生贷款减免
papers.zh_abstract: 学生贷款减免已被提议作为减轻飙升的学生贷款负担的一种手段。本文利用行政信用局数据，研究历史上最大规模学生贷款减免事件的分配效应、消费效应、借贷效应和就业效应。从2021年3月开始，美国联邦政府下令取消1320亿美元的学生贷款，占未偿学生债务总额1.7万亿美元的7.8%。我们估计，获得减免的借款人的预测月收入比未获得减免的借款人高115美元，比一般人群高193美元。我们发现，学生贷款减免导致每减免1美元，抵押贷款、汽车贷款和信用卡债务增加9美分。借款人的月收入和就业率下降，且减免后每个月下降速度递增。隐含的边际消费倾向（MPC）和边际收入倾向（MPE）分别为0.27和-0.49。

papers.title: Sex-Based Wage Gaps in Nursing
papers.authors: Pablo Estrada, Sara Markowitz, Alexia Witthaus
papers.abstract: Males comprise a small fraction of the nurse labor force, yet across the distribution of wages, male nurses earn more than females. In this paper, we use nurse survey data to decompose the sex-based wage gap and to explore why male nurses earn a premium in a female-dominated profession. We consider the role of traditional factors such as human capital and family structure, along with explanations that are more specific to nursing. Results indicate that overtime pay is a significant factor, particularly among hospital workers, but otherwise, after accounting for an extensive set of job-related characteristics, the wage gap persists.
papers.zh_title: 护理行业的性别工资差距
papers.zh_abstract: 男性在护理劳动力中占比很小，然而在整个工资分布中，男性护士的收入高于女性。在本文中，我们利用护士调查数据来分解基于性别的工资差距，并探讨为何在一个女性主导的职业中男性护士能获得溢价。我们考虑了传统因素的作用，如人力资本和家庭结构，以及更特定于护理行业的解释。结果表明，加班费是一个重要因素，尤其是在医院工作者中，但除此之外，在考虑了广泛的工作相关特征后，工资差距依然存在。

papers.title: Vanguard: Black Veterans and Civil Rights after World War I
papers.authors: Desmond Ang, Sahil Chinoy
papers.abstract: Nearly 400,000 Black men were drafted into the National Army during World War I, where they toiled in segregated units and received little formal training. Leveraging novel variation from the WWI draft lottery and millions of digitized military and NAACP records, we document the pioneering role these men would play in the early civil rights movement. Relative to observably similar individuals from the same draft board, Black men randomly inducted into the Army were significantly more likely to join the nascent NAACP and to become prominent community leaders in the New Negro era. We find little evidence that these effects are explained by migration or improved socioeconomic status. Rather, corroborating historical accounts about the catalyzing influence of institutional racism in the military, we show that increased civic activism was driven by soldiers who experienced the most discriminatory treatment while serving their country.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, POL；JEL：J15, J78, N0, N4, P0, Z1
papers.zh_title: 先锋：第一次世界大战后的黑人退伍军人与民权运动
papers.zh_abstract: 第一次世界大战期间，近40万黑人男性被征召加入国民军，他们在种族隔离的部队中劳作，几乎没有接受过正规训练。利用一战征兵抽签带来的新颖变异以及数百万份数字化军事记录和全国有色人种协进会（NAACP）记录，我们记录了这些男性在早期民权运动中所发挥的开创性作用。与来自同一征兵委员会、在可观测特征上相似的个体相比，被随机征召入伍的黑人男性更有可能加入当时尚处于萌芽阶段的NAACP，并在新黑人时代成为杰出的社区领袖。我们几乎没有发现证据表明这些影响是由迁移或社会经济地位的改善所解释的。相反，与关于军队中制度性种族主义的催化作用的历史叙述相一致，我们表明，公民参与度的提高是由那些在为国家服务时遭受最歧视性待遇的士兵所驱动的。

papers.title: Reconciling Macroeconomics and Finance for the U.S. Corporate Sector: 1929 to Present
papers.authors: Andrew Atkeson, Jonathan Heathcote, Fabrizio Perri
papers.abstract: We examine how to quantitatively reconcile the high volatility of market valuations of U.S. corporations with the relative stability of macroeconomic quantities since 1929. Macroeconomic and financial variables are measured in a consistent fashion using the Integrated Macroeconomic Accounts (IMA) of the United States. We first use a finance- style valuation model that builds on Campbell and Shiller (1987) to interpret fluctuations in the market value of U.S. corporations from 1929 to 2023, using these IMA data. We find that fluctuations in expected cash flows to firm owners have been the dominant driver of those fluctuations in value; fluctuations in expected rates of return have played a smaller role. We then develop a stochastic growth model, extended to incorporate factorless income, which we use to decompose corporate cash flows and associated valuations into income and value due to physical capital and factorless income. Finally, we ask whether expected returns to investing in capital in our macroeconomic model are consistent with the series for expected returns estimated from our finance-style valuation model. We find that they are. In this sense, we reconcile volatile market valuations and stable capital output ratios.
papers.zh_title: 调和美国企业部门的宏观经济学与金融学：1929年至今
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了如何从数量上调和自1929年以来美国公司市场估值的高波动性与宏观经济总量的相对稳定性。我们使用美国的综合宏观经济账户（IMA）以一致的方式衡量宏观经济和金融变量。我们首先采用一种基于Campbell和Shiller（1987）的金融风格估值模型，利用这些IMA数据来解释1929年至2023年美国公司市场价值的波动。我们发现，对企业所有者预期现金流的波动是这些价值波动的主要驱动因素；预期回报率的波动作用较小。然后，我们开发了一个随机增长模型，并扩展以纳入无要素收入，我们使用该模型将公司现金流及相关估值分解为来自物质资本和无要素收入的收入与价值。最后，我们询问，在我们的宏观经济模型中，投资于资本的预期回报是否与我们从金融风格估值模型中估计出的预期回报序列一致。我们发现它们是一致的。在这个意义上，我们调和了波动的市场估值与稳定的资本产出比率。

papers.title: Local GDP Estimates Around the World
papers.authors: Esteban Rossi-Hansberg, Jialing Zhang
papers.abstract: We use high-resolution spatial data to build a novel global annual gridded GDP dataset at 1°, 0.5°, and 0.25° resolutions from 2012 onward. Our random forest model trained on local and national GDP achieves an R² above 0.92 for GDP levels and above 0.62 for annual changes in regions left out of the training sample. By incorporating diverse indicators beyond population and nighttime lights, our estimates offer more precise subnational GDP measurements for analyzing economic shocks, local policies, and regional disparities. We evaluate the precision of our estimates with a sample case of COVID-19’s impact on local GDP in China.
papers.zh_title: 全球地方GDP估算
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用高分辨率空间数据，构建了一个新颖的全球年度网格化GDP数据集，分辨率分别为1°、0.5°和0.25°，时间跨度从2012年至今。我们的随机森林模型在本地和国家GDP数据上训练，对于GDP水平，在训练样本中未包含的地区，R²超过0.92；对于年度变化，R²超过0.62。通过纳入除人口和夜间灯光之外的多样化指标，我们的估算为分析经济冲击、地方政策和区域差异提供了更精确的次国家级GDP测量。我们以COVID-19对中国地方GDP影响的样本案例来评估我们估算的精确性。

papers.title: The Therapeutic Consequences of the War: World War II and the 20th-Century Expansion of Biomedicine
papers.authors: Daniel P. Gross, Bhaven N. Sampat
papers.abstract: During World War II, the U.S. Committee on Medical Research (CMR) undertook an integrated, cross-sectoral effort to develop medical science and technology for war, representing the U.S. government's first substantial investment in medical research. Although it had mixed results during the war, using data on all CMR research contracts we show that it laid a foundation for the postwar takeoff of the U.S. biomedical innovation system. New and emerging research areas it supported experienced rapid growth in postwar science. It also fueled new postwar drug development, influenced medical practice, and shaped extramural research funding at the National Institutes of Health. These changes were accompanied by growing interdependence between science and technology and between firms, universities, and the federal government, reflecting biomedicine's increasingly systemic character. The evidence points to the long-run effects coordinated, integrative research policy can have in spurring the development of innovation systems and shifting technology sectors into a high-investment, high-growth development path.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EH, PE, PR；JEL：H51, H56, N42, N72, O31, O32, O33, O38
papers.zh_title: 战争的疗愈后果：第二次世界大战与20世纪生物医学的扩张
papers.zh_abstract: 在第二次世界大战期间，美国医学研究委员会（CMR）进行了一项综合性的、跨部门的努力，为战争开发医学科学技术，这代表了美国政府首次对医学研究进行实质性投资。尽管在战争期间结果喜忧参半，但利用所有CMR研究合同的数据，我们表明它为战后美国生物医学创新体系的腾飞奠定了基础。它所支持的新兴研究领域在战后科学中经历了快速增长。它还推动了战后新药开发，影响了医疗实践，并塑造了美国国立卫生研究院（NIH）的院外研究资助。这些变化伴随着科学与技术之间、以及企业、大学和联邦政府之间日益增长的相互依存关系，反映了生物医学日益系统化的特征。证据表明，协调一致的综合性研究政策在刺激创新体系发展和推动技术部门进入高投资、高增长的发展路径方面可以产生长期效应。

papers.title: The Experimentalist Looks Within: Toward an Understanding of Within-Subject Experimental Designs
papers.authors: John A. List
papers.abstract: The traditional approach in experimental economics is to use a between-subject design: the analyst places each unit in treatment or control simultaneously and recovers treatment effects via differencing conditional expectations. Within-subject designs represent a significant departure from this method, as the same unit is observed in both treatment and control conditions sequentially. While many might consider the choice straightforward (always opt for a between-subject design), given the distinct benefits of within-subject designs, I argue that researchers should meticulously weigh the advantages and disadvantages of each design type. In doing so, I propose a categorization for within-subject designs based on the plausibility of recovering an internally valid estimate. In one instance, which I denote as stealth designs, the analyst should unequivocally choose a within-subject design rather than a between-subject design.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, LS, PE；JEL：C9, C90, C91, C92, C93, C99
papers.zh_title: 实验主义者向内看：理解被试内实验设计
papers.zh_abstract: 实验经济学的传统方法是使用被试间设计：分析者同时将每个单位置于处理组或对照组，并通过条件期望之差来恢复处理效应。被试内设计与此方法有显著不同，因为同一个单位被依次观察到处于处理和控制两种状态。尽管许多人可能认为选择是直截了当的（总是选择被试间设计），但考虑到被试内设计的独特优势，我认为研究人员应该仔细权衡每种设计类型的优缺点。在此过程中，我基于恢复内部有效估计的合理性，提出了一种对被试内设计的分类。在一种我称之为“隐蔽设计”的情况下，分析者应该明确选择被试内设计而非被试间设计。

papers.title: ESG Is The Most Polarizing Nonwage Amenity: Evidence from a Field Experiment in Brazil
papers.authors: Emanuele Colonnelli, Timothy McQuade, Gabriel Ramos, Thomas Rauter, Olivia Xiong
papers.abstract: We examine job-seekers' heterogeneous preferences for nonwage amenities, with a focus on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) practices, using an incentivized field experiment in Brazil. Our findings reveal that ESG is the most polarizing nonwage amenity across multiple sociodemographic groups, with the strongest preferences observed among highly educated, white, and politically liberal individuals (Colonnelli et al., 2025). While women report a stronger preference for work-from-home policies, all other nonwage amenities exhibit minimal variation across sociodemographic groups. Our findings highlight the critical role of corporate values in shaping economic outcomes within an increasingly polarized society.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：G0, J0, P0
papers.zh_title: ESG是最具两极分化效应的非工资福利：来自巴西田野实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用在巴西进行的一项激励性田野实验，考察了求职者对非工资福利的异质性偏好，重点关注环境、社会和治理（ESG）实践。我们的研究结果显示，在多个社会人口群体中，ESG是最具两极分化效应的非工资福利，在受过高等教育、白人和政治自由派个体中观察到的偏好最强（Colonnelli等人，2025）。虽然女性报告对居家办公政策有更强的偏好，但所有其他非工资福利在不同社会人口群体间表现出最小的差异。我们的研究结果突显了企业价值观在日益两极分化的社会中塑造经济结果的关键作用。

papers.title: A Test of Dominant Currency Hypothesis: Evidence From a Non-USD-non-Euro Country
papers.authors: Yushi Yoshida, Takatoshi Ito, Junko Shimizu, Kiyotaka Sato, Taiyo Yoshimi, Uraku Yoshimoto
papers.abstract: We examine the determinants and the dynamics of the exchange rate pass-through of the Japanese exporters, utilizing the official Customs declaration data. We first estimated the invoicing currency exchange rate pass-through and found that export prices invoiced in producer currency are the most rigid. Among local currency or vehicle currency use, US dollar invoicing is relatively more rigid than non-US dollar invoicing. The destination exchange rate pass-through estimates for local currency invoicing are between 35 and 40 percent, whereas those for Japanese yen or US dollar invoicing are close to complete. In addition, we find these discrepancies are even more accentuated in the longer run by analyzing the dynamics of the exchange rate pass-through.
papers.zh_title: 主导货币假说的检验：来自非美元非欧元国家的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用官方海关申报数据，考察了日本出口商汇率传递的决定因素和动态变化。我们首先估算了计价货币的汇率传递，发现以生产者货币计价的出口价格最为刚性。在本地货币或媒介货币的使用中，美元计价的刚性相对高于非美元计价。对于本地货币计价，目的地汇率传递的估计值在35%到40%之间，而对于日元或美元计价，则接近于完全传递。此外，通过分析汇率传递的动态变化，我们发现这些差异在长期内更加显著。

papers.title: Spatial Economics for Low- and Middle-Income Countries
papers.authors: Gharad T. Bryan, Kyra Frye, Melanie Morten
papers.abstract: Research at the intersection of development and spatial economics is increasingly important to address pressing issues in rapidly-urbanizing cities in low- and middle- income countries. This handbook chapter presents the canonical spatial model and then explores it through the lens of development economics, pointing out the "on-the-ground" facts of missing markets, frictions, and context-specific parameters that are often absent in applications of the model. We then discuss what the existing literature and the spatial model tell us about the optimal allocation of labor across space. We close by highlighting exciting possibilities for future work that integrates the spatial model with the reality of low- and middle-income countries.
papers.zh_title: 低收入和中等收入国家的空间经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 发展经济学与空间经济学交叉领域的研究对于解决低收入和中等收入国家快速城市化城市中的紧迫问题日益重要。本手册章节首先介绍了经典的空间模型，然后通过发展经济学的视角对其进行探讨，指出了模型应用中常常缺失的“实地”事实，如市场缺失、摩擦和特定情境的参数。接着，我们讨论了现有文献和空间模型关于劳动力在空间上的最优配置告诉了我们什么。最后，我们强调了未来将空间模型与低收入和中等收入国家现实相结合的研究令人兴奋的可能性。

papers.title: Rigidities in Transportation and Supply Chain Disruptions
papers.authors: Giulia Brancaccio, Myrto Kalouptsidi, Theodore Papageorgiou
papers.abstract: In this paper we provide a simple and intuitive story for supply chain disruptions driven by the rigidities in the transportation sector. Focusing on maritime shipping, we argue that the frequent macroeconomic shocks that shape demand for transportation, meet a highly inelastic supply curve for transportation services. The steepness is driven by equilibrium bottlenecks in ships (transportation agents) and ports (transportation infrastructure). This leads to highly volatile shipping prices and port congestion, affecting importers and exporters worldwide. We discuss how both global trade and inflation react to these costs, so that disruptions pass through to the entire economy.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ITI；JEL：E30, F0, L0, L90, L91, R4
papers.zh_title: 运输业的刚性与供应链中断
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们提供了一个由运输业刚性驱动的供应链中断的简单直观解释。聚焦于海运，我们认为，频繁塑造运输需求的宏观经济冲击，遭遇了高度缺乏弹性的运输服务供给曲线。这种陡峭性是由船舶（运输主体）和港口（运输基础设施）的均衡瓶颈所驱动的。这导致了高度波动的航运价格和港口拥堵，影响了全球的进口商和出口商。我们讨论了全球贸易和通胀如何对这些成本做出反应，从而使中断传导至整个经济。

papers.title: AI and Women's Employment in Europe
papers.authors: Stefania Albanesi, António Dias da Silva, Juan F. Jimeno, Ana Lamo, Alena Wabitsch
papers.abstract: We examine the link between the diffusion of artificial intelligence (AI) enabled technologies and changes in the female employment share in 16 European countries over the period 2011-2019. Using data for occupations at the 3-digit level, we find that on average female employment shares increased in occupations more exposed to AI. Countries with high initial female labor force participation and higher initial female relative education show a stronger positive association. While there exists heterogeneity across countries, almost all show a positive relation between changes in female employment shares within occupations and exposure to AI-enabled automation.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能与欧洲的女性就业
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2011-2019年期间，16个欧洲国家中人工智能（AI）赋能技术的扩散与女性就业份额变化之间的联系。使用三位数职业层面的数据，我们发现，平均而言，在更易受AI影响的职业中，女性就业份额有所增加。初始女性劳动力参与率较高且初始女性相对教育水平较高的国家，显示出更强的正相关关系。尽管各国之间存在异质性，但几乎所有国家都显示出，职业内部女性就业份额的变化与AI赋能自动化的暴露程度之间存在正相关关系。

papers.title: Moral Hazard among the Employed: Evidence from Regression Discontinuity
papers.authors: Jonas Jessen, Robin Jessen, Andrew C. Johnston, Ewa Gałecka-Burdziak
papers.abstract: We exploit policy discontinuities in Poland's unemployment insurance to examine the causal effect of changes to both benefit durations and levels. Using a regression discontinuity approach, we uncover three findings: (1) Higher benefit levels distort employment more than benefit extensions. (2) Benefit durations and levels interact: Longer durations substantially increase the distortionary effect of more generous payments. (3) Higher payments increase the transition of employed workers into unemployment. We develop a model of optimal unemployment insurance that accounts for moral hazard among both employed and unemployed workers. Notably, for level increases, distortionary costs are larger among the employed than unemployed.
papers.zh_title: 就业者中的道德风险：来自断点回归的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用波兰失业保险中的政策不连续性，来检验福利期限和福利水平变化的因果效应。使用断点回归方法，我们发现了三个结果：（1）更高的福利水平比延长福利期限对就业的扭曲更大。（2）福利期限和福利水平存在交互作用：更长的期限显著增加了更慷慨支付带来的扭曲效应。（3）更高的支付增加了就业工人向失业的转变。我们构建了一个最优失业保险模型，该模型考虑了就业者和失业者中的道德风险。值得注意的是，对于福利水平的增加，就业者中的扭曲成本大于失业者。

papers.title: Does Loan Securitization Expose Borrowers to Non-Bank Investor Shocks?—Evidence from Insurers
papers.authors: Abhishek Bhardwaj, Shan Ge, Saptarshi Mukherjee
papers.abstract: CLOs fund 65% of syndicated loans, theoretically insulating borrowers from bank and idiosyncratic investor shocks. However, concentrated capital and sticky relationships expose firms to idiosyncratic shocks to insurers, the largest CLO investors. We find that: 1) insurers experiencing favorable cash flows invest more in CLOs, especially with familiar managers; 2) CLO managers exposed to these cash flows launch more deals; 3) using an instrumental–variable approach, affected firms take out more loans at lower spreads, increase employment, and expand operations; 4) effects are stronger for private than public firms. These findings reveal significant frictions in the loan securitization market.
papers.zh_title: 贷款证券化是否使借款人暴露于非银行投资者冲击？——来自保险公司的证据
papers.zh_abstract: CLO（贷款抵押债券）为65%的银团贷款提供资金，理论上使借款人免受银行和特定投资者冲击的影响。然而，集中的资本和粘性关系使企业暴露于CLO最大投资者——保险公司——的特定冲击。我们发现：1）现金流状况良好的保险公司更多地投资于CLO，尤其是与熟悉的经理人合作；2）受这些现金流影响的CLO经理人发起了更多交易；3）使用工具变量方法，受影响的企业以更低的利差获得更多贷款，增加了就业并扩大了运营；4）对私营企业的影响强于上市公司。这些发现揭示了贷款证券化市场中显著的摩擦。

papers.title: Childbirth and Firm Performance: Evidence from Norwegian Entrepreneurs
papers.authors: John Bonney, Luigi Pistaferri, Alessandra Voena
papers.abstract: Using multiple administrative data sources from Norway, we examine how firm performance changes after entrepreneurs become parents. Female-owned businesses experience a substantial decline in profits, steadily decreasing to 30% below baseline ten years post-childbirth. In contrast, male-owned businesses show no decline, often growing in revenues and costs after childbirth. The profit decline for female-owned firms is most pronounced among highly capable entrepreneurs, women who are majority owners, and those with working spouses. Entrepreneurial effort is key to performance, and our findings suggest that time demands from childbirth and childcare are a significant determinant of the decline in firm profits.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PR；JEL：J13, J16, L25, L26
papers.zh_title: 生育与公司绩效：来自挪威企业家的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用挪威的多个行政数据来源，我们研究了企业家成为父母后公司绩效的变化。女性拥有的企业在利润上经历了显著下降，在生育后十年内稳步降至基线以下30%。相比之下，男性拥有的企业没有显示出下降，在生育后收入和成本通常有所增长。女性拥有企业的利润下降在能力最强的企业家、女性多数股东以及配偶有工作的女性中最为显著。企业家努力是绩效的关键，我们的发现表明，生育和育儿带来的时间需求是公司利润下降的一个重要决定因素。

papers.title: The Hidden Toll of Airborne Lead: Infant Mortality Impacts of Industrial Lead Pollution
papers.authors: Karen Clay, Edson R. Severnini, Xiao Wang
papers.abstract: This paper uses U.S. Toxic Release Inventory data on industrial air lead emissions to provide IV estimates of the effects of air lead concentration on infant mortality. The causal effect of lead on infant mortality is identified by annual variation in air fugitive lead emissions interacted with wind speed near reporting plants, which together determine local ambient lead concentration. Unlike stack emissions, which occur routinely and may prompt avoidance behavior, fugitive emissions are intermittent and influenced by both historical and current factors, such as wind speed variation, making them difficult to avoid. The paper has two main findings. First, higher air lead concentration causes higher infant mortality in the first month and in the first year, suggesting that both in utero and environmental exposures matter. Second, higher lead concentration increases deaths from low birthweight, sudden unexplained infant death (SUID), and respiratory and nervous system causes, which is consistent with findings from animal studies, even when accounting for behavioral responses. Back of the envelope calculations indicate that declines in industrial air lead emissions prevented more than 300 infant deaths per year, generating benefots of at least $3.5 billion annually in 2023 dollars.
papers.zh_title: 空气中铅的隐性代价：工业铅污染对婴儿死亡率的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用美国有毒物质释放清单中关于工业空气铅排放的数据，提供了空气铅浓度对婴儿死亡率影响的工具变量估计。铅对婴儿死亡率的因果效应是通过报告工厂附近年度空气无组织铅排放量与风速的交互作用来识别的，这两者共同决定了当地的环境铅浓度。与常规排放（可能引发规避行为）不同，无组织排放是间歇性的，并受历史和当前因素（如风速变化）的影响，因此难以规避。本文有两个主要发现。首先，较高的空气铅浓度会导致第一个月和第一年内更高的婴儿死亡率，这表明宫内暴露和环境暴露都很重要。其次，较高的铅浓度会增加因低出生体重、婴儿猝死综合征（SUID）以及呼吸和神经系统原因导致的死亡，这与动物研究的发现一致，即使在考虑了行为反应后也是如此。粗略计算表明，工业空气铅排放的减少每年防止了超过300例婴儿死亡，按2023年美元计算，每年产生至少35亿美元的收益。

papers.title: Did the Modern Mortgage Set the Stage for the U.S. Baby Boom?
papers.authors: Lisa J. Dettling, Melissa Schettini Kearney
papers.abstract: This paper proposes that the adoption of the modern U.S. mortgage (i.e., low down payment, long-term, and fixed-rate)—led by the Federal Housing Administration (FHA) and Veteran’s Administration (VA) loan insurance programs—set the stage for the mid-twentieth century U.S. baby boom by dramatically raising rates of home ownership for young families. Using newly digitized data on FHA- and VA- backed loan issuance and births by state-year, and a novel instrumental variables strategy that isolates supply-side variation in loan issuance, we find that the FHA and VA mortgage insurance programs led to 3 million additional births from 1935-1957, roughly 10 percent of the excess births in the baby boom. Aggregate effects mask differences by group—we find no effects of FHA/VA lending on births for Nonwhite women, consistent with well-documented racial discrimination in these lending programs. Our results highlight the importance of access to home ownership for fertility decisions.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, LS, ME, PE；JEL：G21, H31, J13, N32, R38
papers.zh_title: 现代抵押贷款是否为美国婴儿潮奠定了基础？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出，现代美国抵押贷款（即低首付、长期、固定利率）的采用——由联邦住房管理局（FHA）和退伍军人管理局（VA）贷款保险计划引领——通过显著提高年轻家庭的住房拥有率，为20世纪中叶的美国婴儿潮奠定了基础。利用新近数字化的按州-年份划分的FHA和VA支持贷款发放及出生数据，以及一种新颖的、隔离贷款发放供给侧变异的工具变量策略，我们发现，FHA和VA抵押贷款保险计划在1935年至1957年间导致了300万额外出生，约占婴儿潮期间超额出生人数的10%。总体效应掩盖了群体间的差异——我们发现FHA/VA贷款对非白人女性的出生没有影响，这与这些贷款计划中记录在案的种族歧视现象一致。我们的结果强调了获得住房所有权对生育决策的重要性。

papers.title: Why Workers Stay: Pay, Beliefs, and Attachment
papers.authors: Sydnee Caldwell, Ingrid Haegele, Jörg Heining
papers.abstract: Workers often remain with their employer even when outside firms offer higher pay. This may reflect information frictions or preferences. We use a large-scale survey of full-time German workers, linked to Social Security records, to elicit pay expectations and preferences over specific outside firms. Workers believe outside pay varies across firms and direct their search toward higher-paying employers. Expected pay premia are highly correlated with administrative pay measures observed and with workers’ amenity valuations. Yet most workers would not switch firms—even for substantial raises at named destination firms. Implied switching costs range from 7 to 18% of annual pay. Attachment varies across firms and is not explained by amenities or switching costs, suggesting residual firm-specific factors shape mobility.
papers.zh_title: 工人为何留下：薪酬、信念与依附
papers.zh_abstract: 即使外部公司提供更高的薪酬，工人也常常留在原雇主处。这可能反映了信息摩擦或偏好。我们使用一项针对德国全职员工的大规模调查（与社保记录相关联），来获取薪酬预期和对特定外部公司的偏好。工人认为外部薪酬因公司而异，并将求职方向对准薪酬更高的雇主。预期的薪酬溢价与观察到的行政薪酬指标以及工人的便利设施估值高度相关。然而，大多数工人不会更换公司——即使在指定的目标公司获得大幅加薪的情况下。隐含的转换成本范围为年度薪酬的7%至18%。依附程度因公司而异，且无法用便利设施或转换成本来解释，这表明剩余的公司特定因素塑造了流动性。

papers.title: Income Equality in The Nordic Countries: Myths, Facts, and Lessons
papers.authors: Magne Mogstad, Kjell G. Salvanes, Gaute Torsvik
papers.abstract: Policymakers, public commentators, and researchers often cite the Nordic countries as examples of a social and economic model that successfully combines low income inequality with prosperity and growth. This article aims to critically assess this claim by integrating theoretical perspectives and empirical evidence to illustrate how the Nordic model functions and why these countries experience low inequality. Our analysis suggests that income equality in the Nordics is primarily driven by a significant compression of hourly wages, reducing the returns to labor market skills and education. This appears to be achieved through a wage bargaining system characterized by strong coordination both within and across industries. This finding contrasts with other commonly cited explanations for Nordic income equality, such as redistribution through the tax-transfer system, public spending on goods that complement employment, and public policies aimed at equalizing skills and human capital distribution. We consider the potential lessons for other economies that seek to reduce income equality. We conclude by discussing several underexplored or unresolved questions and issues.
papers.zh_title: 北欧国家的收入平等：神话、事实与启示
papers.zh_abstract: 政策制定者、公共评论员和研究人员经常将北欧国家视为成功将低收入不平等与繁荣增长相结合的社会经济模式的典范。本文旨在通过整合理论视角与实证证据来批判性地评估这一论断，以阐明北欧模式如何运作以及这些国家为何经历低不平等。我们的分析表明，北欧的收入平等主要由小时工资的显著压缩驱动，这降低了劳动力市场技能和教育的回报。这似乎是通过一种以行业内部和跨行业高度协调为特征的工资谈判体系实现的。这一发现与其他常见的对北欧收入平等的解释形成对比，例如通过税收转移体系进行的再分配、旨在补充就业的公共支出，以及旨在均衡技能和人力资本分布的公共政策。我们考虑了其他寻求减少收入不平等的经济体可以汲取的潜在教训。最后，我们讨论了若干尚未充分探索或未解决的问题与议题。

papers.title: Spatial Dynamics
papers.authors: Klaus Desmet, Fernando Parro
papers.abstract: We examine the recent literature that studies the spatial distribution of economic activity across both space and time. We discuss the methodological advances enabling the incorporation of dynamic forces of economic activity—such as endogenous innovation, forward-looking location choices, capital and asset accumulation, idea diffusion, and stochastic fundamentals—into frameworks with many heterogeneous locations and a rich economic geography. These frameworks remain tractable for quantitative evaluations. We also discuss the wide range of empirical questions explored in recent work through the lens of these frameworks, including the global and local economic impacts of climate change, the dynamic effects of trade and migration policy, labor market adjustments to import competition, the spatial consequences of structural change, the dynamic effects of place-based policies, and the long-run spatial effects of large-scale infrastructure projects.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EFG, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：F10, F16, F22, O11, O18, O33, R11, R12, R23
papers.zh_title: 空间动态
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了近期研究经济活动的空间分布在跨空间与跨时间维度上的文献。我们讨论了方法论上的进展，这些进展使得将经济活动的动态力量——如内生创新、前瞻性的区位选择、资本与资产积累、思想扩散以及随机基本面——纳入具有许多异质性区位和丰富经济地理的框架成为可能。这些框架在定量评估中仍然保持可处理性。我们还讨论了近期研究通过这些框架所探索的广泛实证问题，包括气候变化的全球和局部经济影响、贸易和移民政策的动态效应、劳动力市场对进口竞争的调整、结构变化的空间后果、地方性政策的动态效应，以及大型基础设施项目的长期空间影响。

papers.title: Institutions, Technology and Prosperity
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu
papers.abstract: This paper reviews the main motivations and arguments of my work on comparative development, colonialism and institutional change, which was often carried out jointly with James Robinson and Simon Johnson. I then provide a simple framework to organize these ideas and connect them with my research on innovation and technology. The framework is centered around a utility-technology possibilities frontier, which delineates the possible distributions of resources in a society both for given technology and working via different technological choices. It highlights how various types of institutions, market structures, norms and ideologies influence moves along the frontier and shifts of the frontier, and it provides a simple formalization of the social forces that lead to institutional persistence and those that can trigger institutional change. The framework also enables us to conceptualize how, during periods of disruption, existing—and sometimes quite small—differences can have amplified effects on prosperity and institutional trajectories. In this way, it suggests some parallels between different disruptive periods, including the onset of European colonialism, the spread (or lack thereof) of industrial technologies in the 19th century, and decisions related to the use, adoption and development of AI today.
papers.zh_title: 制度、技术与繁荣
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了我在比较发展、殖民主义和制度变迁方面工作的主要动机和论点，这些工作通常是与詹姆斯·罗宾逊和西蒙·约翰逊合作完成的。然后，我提供了一个简单的框架来组织这些思想，并将其与我在创新和技术方面的研究联系起来。该框架围绕一个效用-技术可能性前沿展开，该前沿描绘了在给定技术条件下以及通过不同的技术选择，社会中资源可能的分配方式。它强调了各种类型的制度、市场结构、规范和意识形态如何影响沿前沿的移动和前沿的移动，并提供了一个关于导致制度持续存在的社会力量以及那些可能触发制度变迁的社会力量的简单形式化表述。该框架还使我们能够概念化，在动荡时期，现有的——有时是相当微小的——差异如何对繁荣和制度轨迹产生放大效应。通过这种方式，它暗示了不同动荡时期之间的一些相似之处，包括欧洲殖民主义的开始、19世纪工业技术的传播（或缺乏传播），以及今天与人工智能的使用、采用和发展相关的决策。

papers.title: A Neoclassical Model of the World Financial Cycle
papers.authors: Yan Bai, Patrick J. Kehoe, Pierlauro Lopez, Fabrizio Perri
papers.abstract: Emerging markets face large and persistent fluctuations in sovereign spreads. To what extent are these fluctuations driven by local shocks versus financial conditions in advanced economies? To answer this question, we develop a neoclassical business cycle model of a world economy with an advanced country, the North, and many emerging market economies, the South. Northern households invest in domestic stocks, domestic defaultable bonds, and international sovereign debt. Over the 2008-2016 period, the global cycle phase, the North accounts for 68% of Southern spreads’ fluctuations. Over the whole 1994-2024 period, however, Northern shocks account for less than 20% of these fluctuations.
papers.zh_title: 世界金融周期的新古典模型
papers.zh_abstract: 新兴市场面临巨大且持续的主权利差波动。这些波动在多大程度上是由本地冲击驱动，而非由发达经济体的金融状况驱动？为了回答这个问题，我们构建了一个世界经济的新古典商业周期模型，该世界包含一个发达国家（北方）和许多新兴市场经济体（南方）。北方家庭投资于国内股票、国内可违约债券以及国际主权债务。在2008年至2016年期间，即全球周期阶段，北方解释了南方利差波动的68%。然而，在整个1994年至2024年期间，北方冲击仅解释了这些波动的不到20%。

papers.title: Do Inflation Expectations Become More Anchored During a Disinflation Episode? Evidence for Euro Area Firms
papers.authors: Ursel Baumann, Annalisa Ferrando, Dimitris Georgarakos, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Timo Reinelt
papers.abstract: Does a successful disinflation contribute to the anchoring of inflation expectations? We provide novel survey evidence on the dynamics of euro area firms’ inflation expectations during the disinflation episode since 2022. We show that firms’ short term inflation expectations declined steadily towards the inflation target as the disinflation progressed. However, we also document a thick tail in longer-term inflation expectations, substantial disagreement about the inflation outlook, and an increased sensitivity of longer-term inflation expectations to short-term inflation expectations. These findings suggest that it may take more time to bring inflation expectations fully in line with central bank objectives.
papers.zh_title: 在通货紧缩期间通胀预期会变得更加锚定吗？来自欧元区企业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 成功的通货紧缩是否有助于通胀预期的锚定？我们提供了关于自2022年以来通货紧缩期间欧元区企业通胀预期动态的新调查证据。我们表明，随着通货紧缩的推进，企业的短期通胀预期稳步下降，趋向通胀目标。然而，我们也记录了长期通胀预期中存在厚尾分布、对通胀前景存在显著分歧，以及长期通胀预期对短期通胀预期的敏感性增加。这些发现表明，可能需要更多时间才能使通胀预期完全符合央行的目标。

papers.title: Does Peer Review Penalize Scientific Risk Taking? Evidence from NIH Grant Renewals
papers.authors: Pierre Azoulay, Wesley H. Greenblatt
papers.abstract: Scientific projects that carry a high degree of risk may be more likely to lead to breakthroughs yet also face challenges in winning the support necessary to be carried out. We analyze the determinants of renewal for more than 100,000 R01 grants from the National Institutes of Health between 1980 and 2015. We use four distinct proxies to measure risk taking: extreme tail outcomes, disruptiveness, pivoting from an investigator’s prior work, and standing out from the crowd in one’s field. After carefully controlling for investigator, grant, and institution characteristics, we measure the association between risk taking and grant renewal. Across each of these measures, we find that risky grants are renewed at markedly lower rates than less risky ones. We also provide evidence that the magnitude of the risk penalty is magnified for more novel areas of research and novice investigators, consistent with the academic community’s perception that current scientific institutions do not motivate exploratory research adequately.
papers.zh_title: 同行评审会惩罚科学冒险吗？来自NIH资助续期的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 具有高风险的科学项目可能更有可能带来突破，但也面临在获得开展所需支持方面的挑战。我们分析了1980年至2015年间美国国立卫生研究院超过10万个R01资助续期的决定因素。我们使用四个不同的代理指标来衡量冒险行为：极端尾部结果、颠覆性、偏离研究者先前工作的转向，以及在自身领域中脱颖而出。在仔细控制了研究者、资助和机构特征后，我们衡量了冒险行为与资助续期之间的关联。在这些指标中的每一个上，我们发现高风险资助的续期率明显低于低风险资助。我们还提供证据表明，风险惩罚的幅度对于更新颖的研究领域和新手研究者来说更大，这与学术界认为当前科学机构未能充分激励探索性研究的看法一致。

papers.title: Guaranteed Employment in Rural India: Intra-Household Labor and Resource Allocation Consequences
papers.authors: Jorge Luis García
papers.abstract: I investigate the intra-household labor and resource allocation consequences of an employment guarantee targeting rural households in India. The guarantee insures household earnings, replacing women as added workers and shutting down a motive for saving. Despite sizable program-job take-up, the guarantee decreases participation in other working activities, and, thus, the labor force participation of married women and total time worked by their husbands. The guarantee accounts for up to 30% of a recent countrywide decrease in rural female labor force participation. Though it increases household consumption, the guarantee reduces the command of household earnings by women, and, thereby, their well-being.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, LS；JEL：I31, I32, J12, J13, O12, O15
papers.zh_title: 印度农村的就业保障：家庭内部劳动力和资源配置后果
papers.zh_abstract: 我调查了针对印度农村家庭的就业保障对家庭内部劳动力和资源配置的后果。该保障为家庭收入提供了保险，取代了作为附加劳动者的女性，并消除了储蓄的动机。尽管项目工作参与率可观，但该保障减少了其他工作活动的参与，从而降低了已婚女性的劳动参与率及其丈夫的总工作时间。该保障解释了近期全国范围内农村女性劳动参与率下降的30%。尽管它增加了家庭消费，但该保障减少了女性对家庭收入的支配权，从而降低了她们的福祉。

papers.title: Optimal Spatial Policies
papers.authors: Pablo D. Fajgelbaum, Cecile Gaubert
papers.abstract: We summarize recent methods to study optimal spatial policies. We center the discussion on policies that implement the optimal distribution of population in the presence of spatial spillovers, spatial transfers to optimally tackle redistribution between rich and poor regions, and optimal transportation investments.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI, LS, PE；JEL：H21, H23, R12, R13
papers.zh_title: 最优空间政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们总结了研究最优空间政策的近期方法。我们将讨论集中在以下政策上：在存在空间溢出效应的情况下实施最优人口分布的政策、为在富裕和贫困地区之间最优地解决再分配问题的空间转移支付，以及最优交通投资。

papers.title: The Effect of Application Fees on Entry into Patenting
papers.authors: Gaétan de Rassenfosse, Adam B. Jaffe
papers.abstract: Ensuring broad access to the patent system is crucial for fostering innovation and promoting economic growth. To support this goal, the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office offers reduced fees for small and micro entities. This paper investigates whether fee rates affect the filing of applications by small and micro entities. Exploiting recent fee reforms, the study evaluates the relationship between fee changes and the number of new entrants, controlling for potential confounding factors such as legislative changes. The findings suggest that fee reductions alone are insufficient to significantly increase participation in the patent system among small and micro entities.
papers.zh_title: 申请费对专利进入的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 确保专利制度的广泛可及性对于促进创新和推动经济增长至关重要。为支持这一目标，美国专利商标局为小型和微型实体提供减费优惠。本文研究了费率是否影响小型和微型实体的申请提交。利用近期的费用改革，本研究评估了费用变化与新进入者数量之间的关系，并控制了诸如立法变化等潜在混淆因素。研究结果表明，仅靠减费不足以显著提高小型和微型实体对专利制度的参与度。

papers.title: Hot and Crowded: Temperature, Healthcare Utilization and Patient Outcomes
papers.authors: Sandra Aguilar-Gomez, Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Matthew J. Neidell
papers.abstract: Extreme heat raises emergency demand and may increase mortality through hospital congestion when shocks hit many people at once. Using administrative records from Mexico’s largest public health system, we separate direct heat effects from congestion spillovers. Days with maximum temperature above 34°C increase ED visits by 6.9 percent and hospitalizations by 4.2 percent, with sicker ED patients discharged home more often. In-hospital deaths rise for already-admitted patients, suggesting important spillover effects, and deaths disproportionately increase outside hospitals. These results identify health-system capacity as an important margin of adaptation to extreme heat.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：I15, I18, Q54
papers.zh_title: 炎热与拥挤：温度、医疗保健利用与患者结局
papers.zh_abstract: 极端高温会增加急诊需求，并且当冲击同时影响许多人时，可能通过医院拥堵增加死亡率。利用墨西哥最大公共卫生系统的行政记录，我们将直接热效应与拥堵溢出效应区分开来。最高温度超过34°C的日子会使急诊就诊次数增加6.9%，住院人数增加4.2%，且病情更重的急诊患者更常被送回家。已入院患者的院内死亡人数增加，表明存在重要的溢出效应，而院外死亡人数则不成比例地增加。这些结果确定了卫生系统能力是适应极端高温的一个重要方面。

papers.title: Declining Life Satisfaction and Happiness Among Young Adults in Six English-speaking Countries
papers.authors: Jean Twenge, David G. Blanchflower
papers.abstract: We report eleven studies that show declines in life satisfaction and happiness among young adults in the last decade or so, with less uniform trends among older adults. We found consistent evidence for this for the U.S. in the recent sweeps of several micro data sets including the Behavioral Risk Factor Survey, the General Social Survey, and the American National Election Survey. In the U. S. life satisfaction rises with age. This is broadly confirmed in several other datasets including four from the European Commission across five other English-speaking countries: Australia, Canada, Ireland New Zealand and the UK. Declining wellbeing of the young was also found in the World Values Survey, the Global Flourishing Study and Global Minds. There is broad evidence across all of these English-speaking countries that happiness and life satisfaction since 2020 rise with age. In several of these surveys we also find that ill-being declines in age. The U-shape in wellbeing by age that used to exist in these countries is now gone, replaced by a crisis in wellbeing among the young.
papers.zh_title: 六个英语国家年轻人生活满意度和幸福感的下降
papers.zh_abstract: 我们报告了十一项研究，这些研究表明在过去十年左右，年轻人的生活满意度和幸福感有所下降，而老年人的趋势则不那么一致。我们在美国近期的几轮微观数据集中发现了这一点的持续证据，包括行为风险因素监测系统、综合社会调查和美国全国选举研究。在美国，生活满意度随年龄增长而上升。这在其他几个数据集中也得到了广泛证实，包括来自欧盟委员会的四个数据集，涵盖其他五个英语国家：澳大利亚、加拿大、爱尔兰、新西兰和英国。在世界价值观调查、全球繁荣研究和全球心智调查中也发现了年轻人幸福感的下降。有广泛证据表明，在所有英语国家中，自2020年以来，幸福感和生活满意度随年龄增长而上升。在其中几项调查中，我们还发现不良状态随年龄增长而下降。这些国家过去存在的幸福感随年龄的U型分布现已消失，取而代之的是年轻人中的幸福感危机。

papers.title: High-Speed Rail and China's Electric Vehicle Adoption Miracle
papers.authors: Hanming Fang, Ming Li, Long Wang, Zoe Yang
papers.abstract: Using China's expansion of the high-speed rail system (HSR) as a quasi-natural experiment, we analyze the comprehensive vehicle registration data from 2010 to 2023 to estimate the causal impact of HSR connectivity on the adoption of electric vehicles (EVs). Implementing several identification strategies, including staggered difference-in-differences (DID), Callaway and Sant'Anna (CS) DID, and two instrumental-variable approaches, we consistently find that, by alleviating range anxiety, the expansion of HSR can account for up to one third of the increase in EV market share and EV sales in China during our sample period, with effects particularly pronounced in cities served by faster HSR lines. The results remain robust when controlling for local industrial policies, charging infrastructure growth, supply-side factors, and economic development. We also find that HSR connectivity amplifies the effectiveness of charging infrastructure and consumer purchase subsidies in promoting EV adoption.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, PE；JEL：L52, L53, O18, Q55, R41
papers.zh_title: 高铁与中国电动汽车普及奇迹
papers.zh_abstract: 利用中国高铁系统的扩张作为准自然实验，我们分析了2010年至2023年的综合车辆登记数据，以估计高铁连通性对电动汽车普及的因果影响。通过实施多种识别策略，包括交错双重差分法、Callaway和Sant'Anna双重差分法以及两种工具变量方法，我们一致发现，通过缓解里程焦虑，高铁的扩张可以解释样本期间中国电动汽车市场份额和电动汽车销量增长的三分之一，其影响在高铁线路速度更快的城市尤为显著。在控制地方产业政策、充电基础设施增长、供给侧因素和经济发展后，结果依然稳健。我们还发现，高铁连通性增强了充电基础设施和消费者购买补贴在促进电动汽车普及方面的有效性。

papers.title: Monetary Policy Under Okun’s Hypothesis
papers.authors: Felipe Alves, Giovanni L. Violante
papers.abstract: The current monetary policy framework of the Fed intends to be more ’inclusive’ by running the economy hot for longer during expansions. The logic of this strategy rests on Okun’s (1973) hypothesis that sustaining a ‘high-pressure economy’ persistently improves labor market outcomes of low-wage workers. To evaluate this conjecture, we develop a Heterogeneous Agent New Keynesian framework with a three-state frictional model of the labor market where low-skilled workers are more exposed to the business cycle and recessions have a long-lasting effect on their labor force participation and earnings, in line with the evidence. Under a canonical Inflation Targeting rule, the ZLB generates a deflationary bias and severely amplifies the persistent scars of recessions at the bottom of the wage distribution. The Lower-for-Longer strategy is an effective antidote to the ZLB-driven hysteresis and leads to notable earnings gains for low-wage workers and a reduction to overall earnings inequality. If pursued aggressively, however, the policy reverts the inflation bias from negative to positive. Since policymakers might prioritize differently inflation relative to inclusion, we conclude by quantifying the inflation-inclusion trade-off implied by various monetary policy rules.
papers.zh_title: 奥肯定律下的货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 美联储当前的货币政策框架旨在更具“包容性”，即在经济扩张期间让经济更长时间地保持过热。这一策略的逻辑基于奥肯（1973）的假设，即维持“高压经济”能够持续改善低工资工人的劳动力市场结果。为了评估这一猜想，我们构建了一个异质性代理人新凯恩斯框架，其中包含一个三状态摩擦性劳动力市场模型，在该模型中，低技能工人更容易受到商业周期的影响，且衰退对其劳动力参与率和收入有长期影响，这与证据一致。在标准的通胀目标制规则下，零利率下限会产生通缩偏差，并严重放大工资分布底层的持久衰退伤痕。“更长时间维持低利率”策略是零利率下限驱动滞后的有效解药，并导致低工资工人的收入显著增加，整体收入不平等程度降低。然而，如果该政策执行得过于激进，则会将通胀偏差从负值转为正值。由于政策制定者对通胀和包容性的优先顺序可能不同，我们最后通过量化各种货币政策规则所隐含的通胀-包容性权衡来得出结论。

papers.title: Economic Shocks and Healthcare Capital Investments
papers.authors: Michael R. Richards, Maggie Shi, Christopher M. Whaley
papers.abstract: Information technology (IT) can enhance firms’ long-run performance but is also a risky investment, with high fixed costs and uncertain returns. Whether market events influence this tradeoff has received limited attention. We leverage the healthcare context to empirically examine hospitals’ IT investments following economic downturns and public insurance expansions––i.e., large industry shocks in opposite directions. We find novel and symmetrical responses. Recessions restrain investments while expansion policy indirectly stimulates them. Importantly, the IT margin is more elastic than other spending responses to market fluctuations. Supplementary analyses suggest that hospitals’ finances and perceptions of uncertainty drive these capital investment adjustments.
papers.meta: Programs：EH；JEL：H42, I1, I11, I13, I18, L21, L23, L24
papers.zh_title: 经济冲击与医疗保健资本投资
papers.zh_abstract: 信息技术可以提升企业的长期绩效，但也是一种高风险投资，具有高固定成本和不确定的回报。市场事件是否会影响这种权衡，此前受到的关注有限。我们利用医疗保健背景，实证研究了医院在经济衰退和公共保险扩张（即方向相反的重大行业冲击）后的信息技术投资。我们发现了新颖且对称的反应。经济衰退抑制了投资，而扩张政策则间接刺激了投资。重要的是，信息技术这一边际比其他支出对市场波动的反应更具弹性。补充分析表明，医院的财务状况和对不确定性的感知驱动了这些资本投资的调整。

papers.title: Charting the Uncharted: The (Un)Intended Consequences of Oil Sanctions and Dark Shipping
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Yiliang Li, Le Xu, Francesco Zanetti
papers.abstract: We examine the rise of dark shipping – oil tankers disabling AIS transceivers to evade detection – amid Western sanctions on Iran, Syria, North Korea, Venezuela, and Russia. Using a machine learning-based ship clustering model, we track dark-shipped crude oil trade flows worldwide and detect unauthorized ship-to-ship transfers. From 2017 to 2023, dark ships transported an estimated 7.8 million metric tons of crude oil monthly – 43% of global seaborne crude exports – with China absorbing 15%. These sanctioned flows offset recorded declines in global oil exports but create distinct economic shifts. The U.S., a net oil exporter, faces lower oil prices but benefits from cheaper Chinese imports, driving deflationary growth. The EU, a net importer, contends with rising energy costs yet gains from Chinese demand, fueling inflationary expansion. China, leveraging discounted oil, boosts industrial output, propagating global economic shocks. Our findings expose dark shipping’s central role in reshaping oil markets and macroeconomic dynamics.
papers.zh_title: 绘制未知领域：石油制裁与黑暗航运的（非）预期后果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在西方对伊朗、叙利亚、朝鲜、委内瑞拉和俄罗斯实施制裁的背景下，黑暗航运（即油轮关闭自动识别系统收发器以逃避检测）的兴起。利用基于机器学习的船舶聚类模型，我们追踪了全球范围内通过黑暗航运运输的原油贸易流，并检测了未经授权的船对船转运。从2017年到2023年，黑暗船舶每月运输估计780万公吨原油——占全球海运原油出口的43%——其中中国吸收了15%。这些受制裁的流动抵消了全球石油出口记录在案的下降，但造成了独特的经济转变。作为净石油出口国的美国面临较低的油价，但受益于更便宜的中国进口，推动了通缩型增长。作为净进口国的欧盟面临能源成本上升，但得益于中国需求，助长了通胀型扩张。中国利用折扣石油提高了工业产出，向全球传播了经济冲击。我们的发现揭示了黑暗航运在重塑石油市场和宏观经济动态中的核心作用。

papers.title: Policy Interventions and China’s Stock Market in the Early Stages of the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Steven J. Davis, Dingqian Liu, Xuguang Simon Sheng, Yan Wang
papers.abstract: China’s stock market greatly outperformed other national markets during the first several months of the COVID-19 pandemic, and it did so even before it became evident that early containment efforts would flounder in the United States and many other countries. As to why, one view holds that aggressive monetary and credit easing propped up Chinese equity values. To assess this view, we consider several interventions that eased monetary and credit conditions in the first six months of 2020. Our analysis finds clear evidence that these interventions raised implied stock market volatility but little evidence that they influenced stock price levels. We also consider policy actions that restricted short selling, limited stock sales, and boosted stock purchases. These efforts to raise net equity demand were small in scale and highly time-limited, as we discuss, suggesting that any direct effects on stock prices were also modest. Neither our study nor other work known to us provides a ready explanation for the extraordinary performance of China’s stock market in the first half of 2020. This performance is even more striking in hindsight, given later developments in China’s economy and stock market.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E52, E58, E65, G12, G18
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情初期政策干预与中国股市
papers.zh_abstract: 在新冠疫情最初几个月，中国股市的表现远超其他国家的市场，而且这种表现甚至在美国和许多其他国家的早期遏制努力明显失败之前就已出现。至于原因，一种观点认为，积极的货币和信贷宽松政策支撑了中国股票价值。为了评估这一观点，我们考虑了2020年前六个月放松货币和信贷条件的几项干预措施。我们的分析发现明确证据表明这些干预措施提高了隐含股票市场波动率，但几乎没有证据表明它们影响了股票价格水平。我们还考虑了限制卖空、限制股票出售和促进股票购买的政策行动。正如我们所讨论的，这些提高净股票需求的努力规模较小且高度有时间限制，表明对股票价格的任何直接影响也是温和的。我们的研究或我们所知的其他研究都没有为2020年上半年中国股市的非凡表现提供一个现成的解释。鉴于后来中国经济和股市的发展，这种表现事后看来更加引人注目。

papers.title: The Welfare Benefits of Pay-As-You-Go Financing
papers.authors: Paul Gertler, Brett Green, Renping Li, David Sraer
papers.abstract: Pay-as-you-go (PAYGo) financing is a novel contract that has recently become a popular form of credit, especially in low- and middle-income countries (LMICs). PAYGo financing relies on lockout technology that enables the lender to remotely disable the flow benefits of collateral when the borrower misses payments. This paper quantifies the welfare implications of PAYGo financing. We develop a dynamic structural model of consumers and estimate the model using a multi-arm, large scale pricing experiment conducted by a fintech lender that offers PAYGo financing for smartphones. We find that the welfare gains from access to PAYGo financing are equivalent to a 3.4% increase in income while remaining highly profitable for the lender. The welfare gains are larger for low-risk consumers and consumers in the middle of the income distribution. Under reasonable assumptions, PAYGo financing outperforms traditional secured loans for all but the riskiest consumers. We explore contract design and identify variations of the PAYGo contract that further improve welfare.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, IO, PR；JEL：D14, D86, G21, G23
papers.zh_title: 现收现付融资的福利收益
papers.zh_abstract: 现收现付（PAYGo）融资是一种新型合同，最近已成为一种流行的信贷形式，尤其是在低收入和中等收入国家（LMICs）。PAYGo 融资依赖于锁定技术，当借款人错过付款时，贷款人可以远程禁用抵押品的流动收益。本文量化了 PAYGo 融资的福利影响。我们构建了一个消费者动态结构模型，并使用一家为智能手机提供 PAYGo 融资的金融科技贷款机构进行的一项多臂大规模定价实验的数据来估计该模型。我们发现，获得 PAYGo 融资带来的福利收益相当于收入增加 3.4%，同时贷款机构仍能保持高盈利。对于低风险消费者和处于收入分配中段的消费者，福利收益更大。在合理假设下，除了风险最高的消费者外，PAYGo 融资的表现优于传统的担保贷款。我们探讨了合同设计，并确定了能够进一步改善福利的 PAYGo 合同变体。

papers.title: Venture Capital Start-up Selection
papers.authors: Young Soo Jang, Steven N. Kaplan
papers.abstract: We study venture capital (VC) selection using the deal flow and investment decisions for more than 8,000 sourced deals from one early-stage VC in detail. The (unconditional) likelihood that a sourced start-up raises at least $1 million in VC funding from some VC firm is roughly 30%. The deals the VC scored and invested in perform better than the deals the VC scored and did not invest which perform better than the deals the VC did not score, suggesting that the VC has selection ability. At the same time, the selection is noisy as only 32% (13%) of the invested firms have raised more than $10 ($25) million in VC funding. The VC evaluated the deals it scored on team, market, product and exit characteristics. Team is most successful at explaining VC funding of at least $1 million, but does not explain larger financings or success. Market and product have more explanatory power for VC funding of more than $10, $25 and $50 million as well as longer term outcomes. Consistent with other recent work, this is consistent with VCs overweighting team in their initial investment decision.
papers.zh_title: 风险投资的初创企业筛选
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一家早期风险投资机构超过 8,000 个来源交易的交易流和投资决策，详细研究了风险投资（VC）的筛选过程。一个来源初创企业从某家风险投资机构获得至少 100 万美元风险投资的（无条件）概率约为 30%。该风险投资机构评分并投资的交易，其表现优于其评分但未投资的交易，而后者又优于该机构未评分的交易，这表明该风险投资机构具有筛选能力。同时，筛选过程存在噪音，因为只有 32%（13%）的投资企业获得了超过 1000 万美元（2500 万美元）的风险投资。该风险投资机构根据团队、市场、产品和退出特征对其评分的交易进行评估。团队特征在解释至少 100 万美元的风险投资方面最为成功，但不能解释更大规模的融资或成功。市场和产品特征对于解释超过 1000 万、2500 万和 5000 万美元的风险投资以及长期结果具有更强的解释力。与其他近期研究一致，这与风险投资机构在初始投资决策中过度看重团队特征的观点相符。

papers.title: The Price of Faith: Economic Costs and Religious Adaptation in Sub-Saharan Africa
papers.authors: Eduardo Montero, Dean Yang, Triana Yentzen
papers.abstract: How do economic costs affect religious choices, and how do religious institutions adapt to economic realities? We study the Seventh-day Adventist (SDA) church in Sub-Saharan Africa, which prohibits production of tobacco, coffee, and tea, creating opportunity costs for potential members in areas suitable for these crops. We construct a measure of SDA membership opportunity cost that varies over time and space based on local crop suitability and export prices. Using church administrative data and member surveys, we find that increased opportunity costs lead to lower membership growth and lower satisfaction with the church among existing members. Higher opportunity costs also cause establishment of new SDA educational and health institutions; church members to perceive less messaging about “healthy living” religious tenets; and higher church member consumption of prohibited goods. These findings provide new insights into the microeconomics of cultural change, as mediated by religious institutions. Religious organizations can show striking flexibility in balancing tradition and adaptation when faced with economic pressures.
papers.zh_title: 信仰的代价：撒哈拉以南非洲的经济成本与宗教适应
papers.zh_abstract: 经济成本如何影响宗教选择，宗教机构又如何适应经济现实？我们研究了撒哈拉以南非洲的基督复临安息日会（SDA），该教会禁止生产烟草、咖啡和茶叶，这为适合种植这些作物的地区的潜在成员带来了机会成本。我们构建了一个 SDA 成员机会成本的衡量指标，该指标根据当地作物适宜性和出口价格随时间与空间变化。利用教会行政数据和成员调查，我们发现机会成本的增加导致成员增长放缓，以及现有成员对教会的满意度降低。更高的机会成本还会导致建立新的 SDA 教育和医疗机构；教会成员感知到关于“健康生活”宗教教义的宣传减少；以及教会成员对违禁品的消费增加。这些发现为以宗教机构为中介的文化变迁的微观经济学提供了新的见解。面对经济压力时，宗教组织在平衡传统与适应方面可以表现出惊人的灵活性。

papers.title: Firm Trade Exposure, Labor Market Competition, and the Worker Incidence of Trade Shocks
papers.authors: Jeronimo Carballo, Richard K. Mansfield
