papers.abstract: This paper examines how the composition of firm exposure and competition among imperfectly substitutable workers mediate the earnings, welfare, and unemployment incidence of changes in the international trade environment. We merge LEHD job match records with firm-level import and export records from the LFTTD and use them to estimate a large-scale assignment model of the entire U.S. labor market. The model flexibly accommodates frictions from switching regions, industries, trade engagement status, and even particular employers. We construct firm-level estimates of the employment impact of China's WTO entry using exogenous tariff gap variation via four different channels, import and export competition and import and export access, and combine them with the model to evaluate the shock's worker-level incidence. \nOur results show that the firm composition of shock exposure does matter for medium-run worker-level earnings incidence, with workers at the highly exposed multinational manufacturing firms experiencing the largest shock-induced earnings losses. However, labor market competition causes the shock's impact to spread to seemingly unaffected sectors and trickle down the skill ladder, so that entry-level non-traded service workers and initially unemployed job-seekers account for a large share of earnings losses and particularly unemployment increases.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI, LS；JEL：F15, F16, F6, J23, J6, J62
papers.zh_title: 企业贸易暴露、劳动力市场竞争与贸易冲击的工人影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了企业暴露的构成以及不完全可替代工人之间的竞争如何调节国际贸易环境变化对收入、福利和失业的影响。我们将 LEHD 工作匹配记录与来自 LFTTD 的企业层面进出口记录合并，并用它们来估计一个覆盖整个美国劳动力市场的大规模分配模型。该模型灵活地容纳了来自转换地区、行业、贸易参与状态甚至特定雇主的摩擦。我们利用外生的关税差距变化，通过四种不同渠道——进口竞争、出口竞争、进口准入和出口准入——构建了企业层面关于中国加入 WTO 对就业影响的估计，并将其与模型结合以评估该冲击对工人层面的影响。 我们的结果表明，冲击暴露的企业构成确实对中期工人层面的收入影响很重要，在高度暴露的跨国制造企业工作的工人经历了最大的冲击导致的收入损失。然而，劳动力市场竞争导致冲击的影响蔓延到看似未受影响的部门，并沿着技能阶梯向下渗透，因此入门级的非贸易服务工人和最初失业的求职者占了收入损失和特别是失业增加的很大一部分。

papers.title: Cross-Gender Social Ties Around the World
papers.authors: Michael Bailey, Drew M. Johnston, Theresa Kuchler, Ayush Kumar, Johannes Stroebel
papers.abstract: We introduce, analyze, and describe subnational data on cross-gender friendships for nearly 200 countries and territories, using data from 1.38 trillion ties between 1.8 billion Facebook users. Homophily by gender exists nearly everywhere, with individuals' strongest ties exhibiting less homophily than their peripheral connections. Across countries, cross-gender friendship rates align with existing measures of gender disparities. Within countries, cross-gender friending rates correlate with support for gender equality. In the US, cross-gender friendships are rarer in areas with a larger White share of the population, higher incomes, and more per-capita religious congregations.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, DEV, ED, EH, LS, PE, POL；JEL：H0, R0
papers.zh_title: 全球范围内的跨性别社会关系
papers.zh_abstract: 我们介绍、分析并描述了近 200 个国家和地区的跨性别友谊的次国家级数据，使用了来自 18 亿 Facebook 用户之间 1.38 万亿条关系的数据。性别同质性几乎无处不在，个体最强的关系表现出的同质性低于其外围联系。在国家之间，跨性别友谊率与现有的性别差距衡量指标相一致。在国家内部，跨性别交友率与对性别平等的支持度相关。在美国，跨性别友谊在白人人口比例较大、收入较高以及人均宗教会众较多的地区更为罕见。

papers.title: The Minimum Wage, Turnover, and the Shape of the Wage Distribution
papers.authors: Pierre R. Brochu, David A. Green, Thomas Lemieux, James H. Townsend
papers.abstract: This paper proposes an empirical approach to decompose the distributional effects of minimum wages into effects for workers moving out of employment, workers moving into employment, and workers continuing in employment. We estimate the effects of the minimum wage on the hazard rate for wages, which provides a convenient way of re-scaling the wage distribution to control for possible employment effects. We find that minimum wage increases do not result in an abnormal concentration of Job Leavers below the new minimum wage, which is inconsistent with employment effects predicted by a neoclassical model. We also find that, for Job Stayers, the spike and spillover effects of the minimum wage are simply shifted right to the new minimum wage. Our findings are consistent with a model where entry wages are set according to a job ladder, and where firms anchor their internal wage structure on the minimum wage due to fairness or internal incentives issues.
papers.zh_title: 最低工资、人员流动与工资分布形态
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种实证方法，将最低工资的分配效应分解为对退出就业的工人、进入就业的工人以及继续就业的工人的影响。我们估计了最低工资对工资风险率的影响，这提供了一种方便的方法来重新调整工资分布，以控制可能的就业效应。我们发现，最低工资的提高并未导致低于新最低工资的离职者异常集中，这与新古典模型预测的就业效应不一致。我们还发现，对于留任者而言，最低工资的峰值和溢出效应只是简单地右移至新的最低工资。我们的发现与一个模型一致，在该模型中，入职工资是根据工作阶梯设定的，并且由于公平或内部激励问题，企业将其内部工资结构锚定在最低工资上。

papers.title: Micro and Macro Cost-Price Dynamics in Normal Times and During Inflation Surges
papers.authors: Luca Gagliardone, Mark Gertler, Simone Lenzu, Joris Tielens
papers.abstract: We develop a unified approach to studying cost-price dynamics in the cross-section of firms in order to jointly explain the time series of aggregate inflation and the frequency of price changes, both during normal times and inflation surges. A key novelty is the use of microdata on firms’ prices and production costs to construct an empirical measure of price gaps—the deviation between a firm’s listed and optimal price. Conditional on the path of aggregate cost shocks extracted from the data, a state-dependent pricing model with strategic complementarities accounts well for both the linear cost-price dynamics of the pre-pandemic period and the nonlinear increase in inflation and frequency of price adjustment that followed.
papers.zh_title: 正常时期与通胀飙升期间的微观和宏观成本-价格动态
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种统一的方法来研究企业横截面上的成本-价格动态，以共同解释总体通胀率和价格调整频率的时间序列，无论是在正常时期还是通胀飙升期间。一个关键的新颖之处在于，我们利用企业价格和生产成本的微观数据来构建一个价格缺口的实证衡量指标——即企业标价与最优价格之间的偏差。以从数据中提取的总体成本冲击路径为条件，一个具有战略互补性的状态依赖定价模型很好地解释了疫情前时期的线性成本-价格动态，以及随后出现的通胀率和价格调整频率的非线性增长。

papers.title: Trading in Twilight: Sleep, Mental Alertness, and Stock Market Trading
papers.authors: Hee Seo Han, David Hirshleifer, Jinfei Sheng, Zheng Sun
papers.abstract: We test whether mental alertness, as proxied by sleep disruption, impairs investor trading performance. Using four complementary approaches, we document that retail investors who experience a later sunset time on average earn lower abnormal returns on their trades. These approaches include panel regression with household fixed effects, RDD based on time zone borders, comparison of different seasons and latitudes, and daylight saving changes. Further tests suggest that the sleep disruption effect derives from impaired investor attention.
papers.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：D03, D91, G11, G12, G4, G40, G41, G5, G50
papers.zh_title: 在暮色中交易：睡眠、精神警觉性与股票市场交易
papers.zh_abstract: 我们检验了精神警觉性（以睡眠中断为代理变量）是否会损害投资者的交易表现。通过四种互补的方法，我们记录了经历较晚日落时间的散户投资者在其交易中平均获得较低的超额收益。这些方法包括包含家庭固定效应的面板回归、基于时区边界的断点回归设计、不同季节和纬度的比较，以及夏令时变化。进一步的检验表明，睡眠中断的影响源于投资者注意力的受损。

papers.title: How Costly Are Business Cycle Volatility and Inflation? A Vox Populi Approach
papers.authors: Dimitris Georgarakos, Kwang Hwan Kim, Olivier Coibion, Myungkyu Shim, Myunghwan Andrew Lee, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Geoff Kenny, Seowoo Han, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: Using repeated surveys of households across thirteen countries, we study how much individuals would be willing to pay to eliminate business cycles. These direct estimates are much higher than traditional measures following Lucas (2003): on average, households would be prepared to sacrifice ≈6% of their lifetime consumption to eliminate business cycle fluctuations. A similar result holds for inflation: to bring inflation to their desired rate, individuals would be willing to sacrifice ≈5% of their consumption. Willingness to pay to eliminate business cycles and inflation is generally higher for those whose consumption is more pro-cyclical, those who are more uncertain about the economic outlook, and those who live in countries with greater historical volatility.
papers.zh_title: 经济周期波动与通胀的代价有多高？一种“民意”方法
papers.zh_abstract: 利用对十三个国家家庭的重复调查，我们研究了个体愿意为消除经济周期支付多少。这些直接估计值远高于 Lucas (2003) 之后的传统衡量指标：平均而言，家庭愿意牺牲其一生消费的约 6% 来消除经济周期波动。通胀也得出了类似的结果：为了将通胀降至其期望水平，个体愿意牺牲其约 5% 的消费。对于那些消费更具顺周期性、对经济前景更不确定以及生活在历史波动性更大国家的人来说，为消除经济周期和通胀而支付的意愿通常更高。

papers.title: The Mental Health of the Young in Asia and the Middle East: The Importance of Self-Reports
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: We examine the age profile of subjective wellbeing and illbeing in nine Asian countries (Bangladesh, Hong Kong, India, Indonesia, Japan, Pakistan, Philippines, Singapore, Sri Lanka) and seven Middle Eastern countries (Iraq, Israel, Jordan, Turkey, Saudi Arabia, the UAE and Yemen). We find the relationship between age and reported wellbeing differs according to the way the survey is conducted. In the Gallup World Poll, where the data are collected by interviewers face-to-face or by telephone (computer-aided telephone interviews, or CATI) the young are the happiest and the results are the same across the two survey modes. We find the same result in CATI surveys in the Global Flourishing Survey (GFS) of 2022-2024 in 7 Asian and Middle Eastern (AME) countries. However, when the GFS survey is conducted on the web (computer-aided web interview, or CAWI) wellbeing is u-shaped in age, and is highest among the oldest respondents. If we turn to negative affect measures (loneliness, anxiety, depression, worry) these rise with age using CATI but fall with age using CAWI. We look for survey mode switching in the age coefficient across 40 outcomes. In general, the switch is confined to subjective wellbeing and illbeing metrics. Switching does not occur when respondents are asked about their physical health, bodily pain, unemployment status, drinking and smoking, or personality-related questions. It appears that the mode effect is largely confined to how individuals rate their subjective wellbeing and illbeing. The results are suggestive of social desirability response bias which leads young people to under-report socially undesirable affective states to interviewers.
papers.zh_title: 亚洲和中东地区年轻人的心理健康：自我报告的重要性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了九个亚洲国家（孟加拉国、香港、印度、印度尼西亚、日本、巴基斯坦、菲律宾、新加坡、斯里兰卡）和七个中东国家（伊拉克、以色列、约旦、土耳其、沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋和也门）主观幸福感和不幸福感的年龄分布。我们发现，年龄与报告幸福感之间的关系因调查实施方式而异。在盖洛普世界民意调查中，数据通过访员面对面或电话（计算机辅助电话访谈，CATI）收集，年轻人最幸福，且两种调查模式的结果相同。我们在 2022-2024 年对 7 个亚洲和中东国家进行的全球繁荣调查（GFS）的 CATI 调查中发现了相同的结果。然而，当 GFS 调查通过网络（计算机辅助网络访谈，CAWI）进行时，幸福感呈 U 型年龄分布，且在年龄最大的受访者中最高。如果我们转向负面情感指标（孤独、焦虑、抑郁、担忧），这些指标在使用 CATI 时随年龄增长而上升，但在使用 CAWI 时随年龄增长而下降。我们考察了 40 个结果中年龄系数的调查模式转换。总体而言，这种转换仅限于主观幸福感和不幸福感指标。当受访者被问及他们的身体健康、身体疼痛、失业状况、饮酒和吸烟或与性格相关的问题时，不会发生转换。看来，模式效应主要局限于个体如何评价其主观幸福感和不幸福感。这些结果暗示了社会期望反应偏差，导致年轻人向访员少报社会不期望的情感状态。

papers.title: Misspecification-Robust Shrinkage and Selection for VAR Forecasts and IRFs
papers.authors: Oriol González-Casasús, Frank Schorfheide
papers.abstract: VARs are often estimated with Bayesian techniques to cope with model dimensionality. The posterior means define a class of shrinkage estimators, indexed by hyperparameters that determine the relative weight on maximum likelihood estimates and prior means. In a Bayesian setting, it is natural to choose these hyperparameters by maximizing the marginal data density. However, this is undesirable if the VAR is misspecified. In this paper, we derive asymptotically unbiased estimates of the multi-step forecasting risk and the impulse response estimation risk to determine hyperparameters in settings where the VAR is (potentially) misspecified. The proposed criteria can be used to jointly select the optimal shrinkage hyperparameter, VAR lag length, and to choose among different types of multi-step-ahead predictors; or among IRF estimates based on VARs and local projections. The selection approach is illustrated in a Monte Carlo study and an empirical application.
papers.zh_title: 针对 VAR 预测和脉冲响应函数的误设稳健收缩与选择
papers.zh_abstract: VAR 模型通常使用贝叶斯技术进行估计以应对模型维度。后验均值定义了一类收缩估计量，由决定最大似然估计和先验均值相对权重的超参数索引。在贝叶斯设定中，通过最大化边际数据密度来选择这些超参数是自然的。然而，如果 VAR 模型是误设的，这并不可取。在本文中，我们推导了多步预测风险和脉冲响应估计风险的渐近无偏估计，以在 VAR 模型（可能）误设的设定中确定超参数。所提出的准则可用于联合选择最优收缩超参数、VAR 滞后长度，以及在不同类型的多步预测器之间进行选择；或在基于 VAR 和局部投影的 IRF 估计之间进行选择。该选择方法通过蒙特卡洛研究和实证应用进行了说明。

papers.title: Understanding the Role of Genetic Heterogeneity in Smoking Interventions: Experimental Evidence from the Lung Health Study
papers.authors: Shubhashrita Basu, Jason Fletcher, Qiongshi Lu, Jiacheng Miao, Lauren L. Schmitz
papers.abstract: We examine whether genome-wide summary measures of genetic risk known as polygenic indices (PGIs) provide new insights into the efficacy of the Lung Health Study (LHS)–a large, randomized controlled trial (RCT) that evaluated the effect of a smoking cessation intervention program on cessation maintenance and lung function. Results indicate that the intervention was less successful for participants with higher PGIs for smoking initiation and intensity. Given the increasing availability and affordability of genomic data, we argue that in the context of RCTs, PGIs can further our understanding of heterogeneous treatment effects and the mechanisms that may be driving them.
papers.zh_title: 理解吸烟干预中遗传异质性的作用：来自肺健康研究的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了被称为多基因指数（PGIs）的全基因组遗传风险汇总指标是否为理解肺健康研究（LHS）的效果提供了新见解。LHS 是一项大型随机对照试验（RCT），评估了戒烟干预项目对戒烟维持和肺功能的影响。结果表明，对于吸烟起始和强度 PGI 较高的参与者，干预效果较差。鉴于基因组数据的可用性和可负担性日益增加，我们认为在 RCT 的背景下，PGIs 可以加深我们对异质性处理效应及其可能驱动机制的理解。

papers.title: Bank Debt, Mutual Fund Equity, and Swing Pricing in Liquidity Provision
papers.authors: Yiming Ma, Kairong Xiao, Yao Zeng
papers.abstract: Liquidity provision is often attributed to debt-issuing intermediaries like banks. We develop a unified theoretical framework and empirically show that mutual funds issuing demandable equity also provide an economically significant amount of liquidity by insuring against idiosyncratic liquidity shocks. Quantitatively, bond funds provide 12.5% of the liquidity that banks provide per dollar. Our model further shows that when equity values incorporate the liquidation cost from redemptions, as in swing pricing, liquidity provision is not necessarily reduced. This is because swing pricing may increase funds' capacity for holding illiquid assets without inducing panic runs.
papers.zh_title: 银行债务、共同基金股权与流动性供给中的摆动定价
papers.zh_abstract: 流动性供给通常归因于像银行这样发行债务的中介机构。我们发展了一个统一的理论框架，并通过实证表明，发行活期股权的共同基金也通过为异质性流动性冲击提供保险，提供了经济意义上显著的流动性。从数量上看，每美元债券基金提供的流动性是银行提供的 12.5%。我们的模型进一步表明，当股权价值包含赎回的清算成本时（如摆动定价），流动性供给不一定减少。这是因为摆动定价可能提高基金持有非流动性资产的能力，而不会引发恐慌性赎回。

papers.title: If We Build It, We Will Come: Institution Development in Academia and the Evolution of Career Choices by Top Talent During Japan’s Industrialization
papers.authors: Takuya Hiraiwa, Serguey Braguinsky, Rajshree Agarwal
papers.abstract: Modern economies rely on academia as a critical complement to industry in generating new knowledge, and training future scientific and engineering talent that fuels endogenous growth. Academia’s ability to perform this role, however, depends on recruiting and retaining talented faculty who often have lucrative alternative options in industry. Complementing existing literature focusing on factors in mature scientific labor markets, we study how this was addressed endogenously during Japan’s industrialization as academic and industrial institutions were still being formed. Combining historical analysis with a dynamic occupational choice model, we utilize unique data on the census of university-educated engineers from the first forty cohorts following the establishment of higher technical education in Japan. The historical analysis shows that incumbent faculty reshaped academic governance, redefined professional purpose towards research, and created research institutes as new organizational forms. Using causal evidence from the Institute of Aeronautics and structural estimation of career choices, we find that these institutional changes increased the non-pecuniary attractiveness of academic careers, allowing universities to keep attracting a disproportionate share of top talent despite a widening pay gap with industry. The findings demonstrate how non-pecuniary incentives emerge through institution building and how this reshapes organizational responses across academia, industry and state.
papers.zh_title: 如果我们建设它，我们就会来：日本工业化过程中学术界的制度发展与顶尖人才职业选择的演变
papers.zh_abstract: 现代经济依赖学术界作为产业界的关键补充，以产生新知识，并培养推动内生增长所需的未来科学和工程人才。然而，学术界履行这一角色的能力取决于招募和留住有才华的教师，而这些教师通常在产业界拥有利润丰厚的替代选择。作为对关注成熟科学劳动力市场因素的现有文献的补充，我们研究了在日本工业化过程中，当学术和产业机构仍在形成时，这一问题是如何内生地解决的。结合历史分析与动态职业选择模型，我们利用了日本高等技术教育建立后前四十个队列中受过大学教育的工程师普查的独特数据。历史分析表明，在职教师重塑了学术治理，将职业目标重新定义为研究，并创建了研究所作为新的组织形式。利用来自航空研究所的因果证据和职业选择的结构性估计，我们发现这些制度变化增加了学术职业的非金钱吸引力，使得大学能够持续吸引不成比例的顶尖人才，尽管与产业界的薪酬差距在扩大。研究结果展示了非金钱激励如何通过制度建设产生，以及这如何重塑学术界、产业界和国家层面的组织响应。

papers.title: An Alpha in Affordable Housing?
papers.authors: Sven Damen, Matthijs Korevaar, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
papers.abstract: Residential properties with the lowest rent levels provide the highest investment returns to their owners. Using detailed rent, cost, and price data from the United States, Belgium, and The Netherlands, we show that this phenomenon holds across housing markets and time. If anything, low-rent units hedge business cycle risk. We also find no evidence for differential regulatory risk exposure. We document segmentation of investors, with large corporate landlords shying away from the low-tier segment possibly for reputational reasons. Financial constraints prevent renters from purchasing their property and medium-sized landlords from scaling up, sustaining excess risk-adjusted returns. Low-income tenants ultimately pay the price for this segmentation in the form of a high rent burden.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：G1, G23, G5, R20, R31
papers.zh_title: 经济适用房中的阿尔法？
papers.zh_abstract: 租金水平最低的住宅物业为其所有者提供了最高的投资回报。利用来自美国、比利时和荷兰的详细租金、成本和价格数据，我们表明这一现象在不同住房市场和时期均成立。低租金单元甚至对冲了经济周期风险。我们也没有发现差异化监管风险敞口的证据。我们记录了投资者的分割，大型企业房东可能出于声誉原因回避低端市场。财务约束阻止了租户购买其房产以及中型房东扩大规模，从而维持了超额的风险调整后回报。低收入租户最终以高租金负担的形式为这种分割付出了代价。

papers.title: The Labor Market Impact of Digital Technologies
papers.authors: Sangmin Aum, Yongseok Shin
papers.abstract: We investigate the impact of digital technology on employment patterns in Korea, where firms have rapidly adopted digital technologies such as artificial intelligence (AI), big data, and the internet of things (IoT). By exploiting regional variations in technology exposure, we find significant negative effects on high-skill and female workers, particularly those in non-IT (information technology) services. This contrasts with previous technological disruptions, such as the IT revolution and robotization, which primarily affected low-skill male workers in manufacturing. In IT services, although high-skill employment declined, vacancy postings for high-skill workers increased, implying a shift in labor demand toward newer skill sets. These findings highlight both the labor displacement and the new opportunities generated by digital transformation.
papers.zh_title: 数字技术对劳动力市场的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了数字技术对韩国就业模式的影响，在韩国，企业迅速采用了人工智能（AI）、大数据和物联网（IoT）等数字技术。通过利用技术暴露的区域差异，我们发现对高技能和女性工人，特别是那些在非IT（信息技术）服务行业的工人，产生了显著的负面影响。这与之前的技术颠覆（如IT革命和机器人化）形成对比，后者主要影响制造业中的低技能男性工人。在IT服务行业，尽管高技能就业下降，但针对高技能工人的职位发布却增加了，这意味着劳动力需求正在向更新的技能组合转变。这些发现突显了数字转型带来的劳动力替代和新的机遇。

papers.title: Dodging Day Zero: Drought, Adaptation, and Inequality in Cape Town
papers.authors: Alexander C. Abajian, Cassandra Cole, Kelsey Jack, Kyle C. Meng, Martine Visser
papers.abstract: A near-catastrophic drought in Cape Town, South Africa illustrates three general implications of climate change for publicly-provided utility services. First, to reduce aggregate water demand, the public utility increased prices, leading to large demand reductions by richer households. Prior to the drought they use twice the public piped water of poorer households. At the peak of the drought, they use less. Second, some of the differential demand reduction comes from richer households substituting away from public water toward privately financed groundwater. This private adaptation both lowers the public utility's total revenue and shifts costs onto poorer households, consequences that persist after the drought abates. Third, policy interventions mitigate some of the fiscal and distributional impacts of private adaptation. These findings highlight how climate adaptation, in the context of publicly provided goods and services, can create pecuniary and environmental externalities with equity consequences.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, PE；JEL：H42, O13, Q25, Q54
papers.zh_title: 躲避“归零日”：开普敦的干旱、适应与不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 南非开普敦一场近乎灾难性的干旱，说明了气候变化对公共事业服务的三个普遍影响。首先，为减少总用水需求，公共事业单位提高了水价，导致较富裕家庭大幅减少用水。在干旱之前，他们使用的公共管道水量是较贫困家庭的两倍。在干旱高峰期，他们的用水量反而更少。其次，部分差异化的需求减少源于富裕家庭从使用公共供水转向使用私人资助的地下水。这种私人适应行为既降低了公共事业单位的总收入，又将成本转嫁给了较贫困家庭，这些后果在干旱缓解后依然持续存在。第三，政策干预减轻了私人适应行为的部分财政和分配影响。这些发现凸显了在公共物品和服务的背景下，气候适应如何可能产生具有公平后果的金钱和环境外部性。

papers.title: Labor Market Monopsony: Fundamentals and Frontiers
papers.authors: Patrick M. Kline
papers.abstract: This chapter reviews the theory of monopsonistic wage setting, its empirical implications, and some puzzles the framework has struggled to explain. We begin by examining the fundamentals of monopsonistic wage determination. The core of the theory is a mapping from the distribution of worker outside options to wages. We study non-parametric shape restrictions that ensure this mapping is unique. Building on these results, we introduce a menu of tractable parametrizations of labor supply to the firm, some of which are shown to emerge naturally from equilibrium search models. Next, we review why wage markdowns do not necessarily signal inefficiency and discuss some criteria for assessing misallocation in a monopsony model with search frictions. Turning to the model’s empirical implications, we examine how the magnitude of productivity-wage passthrough depends on the super-elasticity of labor supply to the firm and establish that compensating differentials for firm amenities depend on the curvature of the outside option distribution. We show that firm-specific shifts in either productivity or amenities can be used as instruments to identify labor supply elasticities and review strategies for estimating non-constant elasticities. We then consider extensions of the basic model involving third-degree wage discrimination and examine their ability to rationalize patterns of worker-firm sorting. Monopsony models traditionally assume that firms commit to posted wages. Relaxing this assumption, we develop a connection between the first-order conditions of the monopsony model and models of bargaining with incomplete information. These models explain why bilateral inefficiencies may persist in the presence of negotiation, yield predictions about the response of within-firm wage dispersion to productivity shocks, and suggest reasons why some productivity shifters may not constitute excludable instruments. Next, we endogenize productivity by allowing for efficiency wages, non-constant returns to scale, and price-cost markups. Empirical monopsony estimates often suggest that firms enjoy implausibly large profit margins. We argue that allowing for non-constant labor supply elasticities and firm adjustment costs can potentially resolve this difficulty. Finally, we review why the strong passthrough of minimum wages to product prices presents a challenging puzzle for standard monopsony models and discuss potential reconciliations to this puzzle involving firm heterogeneity, quality upgrading, and lumpy price adjustment.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场买方垄断：基础与前沿
papers.zh_abstract: 本章回顾了买方垄断工资决定理论、其经验含义以及该框架难以解释的一些谜题。我们首先考察买方垄断工资决定的基础。该理论的核心是从工人外部选择分布到工资的映射。我们研究了确保这种映射唯一性的非参数形状约束。在这些结果的基础上，我们引入了一系列易于处理的、关于企业劳动力供给的参数化方法，其中一些方法被证明会自然地从均衡搜寻模型中产生。接下来，我们回顾了为什么工资折扣并不一定意味着无效率，并讨论了在具有搜寻摩擦的买方垄断模型中评估资源错配的一些标准。转向模型的经验含义，我们考察了生产率-工资传导的幅度如何取决于企业劳动力供给的超弹性，并确定了企业便利设施的补偿性差异取决于外部选择分布的曲率。我们表明，生产率或便利设施的企业特定变化可以用作识别劳动力供给弹性的工具，并回顾了估计非常数弹性的策略。然后，我们考虑了涉及三级价格歧视的基本模型的扩展，并考察了它们合理化工人-企业分类模式的能力。买方垄断模型传统上假设企业承诺公布工资。放宽这一假设，我们建立了买方垄断模型的一阶条件与不完全信息谈判模型之间的联系。这些模型解释了为什么在谈判存在的情况下双边无效率可能持续存在，产生了关于企业内部工资分散度对生产率冲击反应的预测，并指出了为什么某些生产率变动因素可能不构成可排除工具的原因。接下来，我们通过允许效率工资、非恒定规模报酬和价格成本加成来内生化生产率。经验性的买方垄断估计通常表明企业享有高得令人难以置信的利润率。我们认为，允许非恒定的劳动力供给弹性和企业调整成本可能解决这一难题。最后，我们回顾了为什么最低工资对产品价格的强传导对标准买方垄断模型构成了一个具有挑战性的谜题，并讨论了涉及企业异质性、质量升级和价格调整粘性的潜在解决方案。

papers.title: A Cognitive Theory of Reasoning and Choice
papers.authors: Pedro Bordalo, Nicola Gennaioli, Giacomo Lanzani, Andrei Shleifer
papers.abstract: We present a theory of decisions in which attention to the features of choice options is determined by the decision maker's categorization of the current choice problem in a set of problems she solved in the past. Categorization depends on goal-relevant as well as contextual problem-level features. The model yields systematic heterogeneity in attention and choice in a given problem based on different past experiences, rigidity of choices when categorization does not change despite new data, and discontinuous shifts when changes in bottom-up salient features cause re-categorization. The model unifies major puzzles and framing effects in riskless, statistical, and lottery choice based on heterogenous and unstable mental representations.
papers.zh_title: 推理与选择的认知理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个决策理论，其中对选择选项特征的关注由决策者将当前选择问题归类到她过去解决过的一组问题中的方式决定。分类取决于与目标相关的以及情境性的问题层面特征。该模型基于不同的过往经验，在给定问题中产生了注意力和选择的系统性异质性；当分类在新数据面前不改变时，选择具有刚性；当自下而上的显著特征变化导致重新分类时，则产生不连续的转变。该模型基于异质且不稳定的心理表征，统一了无风险选择、统计选择和彩票选择中的主要谜题和框架效应。

papers.title: The Effect of US COVID-19 Excess Mortality on Social Security Outlays
papers.authors: Hanke Heun-Johnson, Darius Lakdawalla, Julian Reif, Bryan Tysinger
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has resulted in significant direct and indirect excess mortality among the US population, impacting the future outlays of the US Social Security Administration (SSA) Old Age, Survivors, and Disability Insurance (OASDI) program. This study aimed to estimate the net effects of pandemic-induced excess deaths on OASDI liabilities, utilizing dynamic microsimulation models, and examined how these effects vary across different socioeconomic and racial-ethnic groups. Data on excess deaths were obtained from the CDC and processed to account for seasonal variations and demographic disparities. The simulation incorporated demographic and health status variables to project OASDI retirement and disability benefits, and survivors’ benefits for spouses and children, for respondents with highest COVID mortality risk. The pandemic resulted in approximately 1.4 million excess deaths among individuals aged 25 and older between 2020 and 2023. These premature deaths mostly reduced future retirement benefits, which increased the Social Security fund by $219 billion. Future disability benefit payments were reduced by $6 billion. However, these gains were partly offset by reductions in future payroll tax flows ($44 billion) and increased payments to surviving spouses and children ($25 billion), resulting in a net impact of $156 billion. Non-Hispanic Black and Hispanic decedents left behind more underage children per capita, yet payments to their surviving family members were lower compared to non-Hispanic White decedents, across all educational levels. Excess mortality during the COVID-19 pandemic has complex implications for the OASDI program. While there is an estimated net positive financial impact due to reduced future retirement benefits, this effect is mitigated by decreased payroll tax contributions and increased survivors’ benefits. The differential impact by race and ethnicity highlights existing inequalities and underscores the importance of considering demographic disparities in future projections of Social Security liabilities. These findings provide critical insights for informing SSA trust fund projections and policy decisions.
papers.zh_title: 美国COVID-19超额死亡率对社会安全支出的影响
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行导致美国人口出现显著的直接和间接超额死亡，影响了美国社会安全局（SSA）的老年、遗属和残疾保险（OASDI）项目的未来支出。本研究旨在利用动态微观模拟模型，估计大流行导致的超额死亡对OASDI负债的净影响，并考察这些影响在不同社会经济和种族-民族群体间的差异。超额死亡数据来自CDC，并经过处理以考虑季节性变化和人口统计差异。模拟纳入了人口统计和健康状况变量，以预测COVID-19死亡风险最高受访者的OASDI退休和残疾福利，以及配偶和子女的遗属福利。大流行导致2020年至2023年间25岁及以上个体中约140万例超额死亡。这些过早死亡大多减少了未来的退休福利，使社会安全基金增加了2190亿美元。未来的残疾福利支付减少了60亿美元。然而，这些收益部分被未来工资税流的减少（440亿美元）和对幸存配偶及子女支付的增加（250亿美元）所抵消，净影响为1560亿美元。非西班牙裔黑人和西班牙裔逝者留下的未成年子女数量人均更多，但与其幸存家庭成员获得的支付相比，在所有教育水平上均低于非西班牙裔白人逝者。COVID-19大流行期间的超额死亡对OASDI项目具有复杂的影响。虽然由于未来退休福利的减少，估计会产生正的净财务影响，但这种影响被工资税贡献的减少和遗属福利的增加所削弱。按种族和民族划分的差异化影响凸显了现有的不平等，并强调了在未来的社会安全负债预测中考虑人口统计差异的重要性。这些发现为告知SSA信托基金预测和政策决策提供了关键见解。

papers.title: Making the Invisible Visible: The Impact of Revealing Indoor Air Pollution on Behavior and Welfare
papers.authors: Robert D. Metcalfe, Sefi Roth
papers.abstract: Exposure to ambient air pollution has been shown to be detrimental to human health and productivity, and has motivated many policies to reduce such pollution. However, given that humans spend 90% of their time indoors, it is important to understand the degree of exposure to Indoor Air Pollution (IAP), and, if high, ways to reduce it. We design and implement a field experiment in London that monitors households’ IAP and then randomly reveals their IAP in real-time. At baseline, we find that IAP is worse than ambient air pollution when residents are at home and that for 38% of the time, IAP is above World Health Organization standards. Additionally, we observe a large household income-IAP gradient, larger than the income-ambient pollution gradient, highlighting large income disparities in IAP exposure. During our field experiment, we find that the randomized revelation reduces IAP by 17% (1.9 μg/m³) overall and 34% (5 μg/m³) during occupancy time. We show that the mechanism is households using more natural ventilation as a result of the feedback (i.e., opening up doors and windows). Finally, in terms of welfare, we find that: (i) households have a willingness to pay of £4.8 ($6) for every 1 μg/m ³ reduction in indoor PM2.5; (ii) households have a higher willingness to pay for mitigation than for full information; (iii) households have a price elasticity of IAP monitor demand around -0.75; and (iv) a £1 subsidy for an IAP monitor or an air purifier has an infinite marginal value of public funds, i.e., a Pareto improvement.
papers.zh_title: 让无形变有形：揭示室内空气污染对行为和福利的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 暴露于环境空气污染已被证明对人类健康和生产效率有害，并促使许多政策减少此类污染。然而，鉴于人类90%的时间在室内度过，了解室内空气污染的暴露程度，以及如果程度高，如何减少它，就显得至关重要。我们设计并实施了一项在伦敦的实地实验，监测住户的室内空气污染，然后随机向住户实时揭示其室内空气污染水平。在基线期，我们发现当居民在家时，室内空气污染比环境空气污染更严重，并且38%的时间里室内空气污染高于世界卫生组织标准。此外，我们观察到较大的家庭收入-室内空气污染梯度，大于收入-环境空气污染梯度，突显了室内空气污染暴露方面的巨大收入差距。在我们的实地实验中，我们发现随机揭示使室内空气污染总体降低了17%（1.9 μg/m³），在有人时段降低了34%（5 μg/m³）。我们表明其机制是住户因反馈而更多地使用自然通风（即打开门窗）。最后，在福利方面，我们发现：(i) 家庭愿意为室内PM2.5每降低1 μg/m³支付4.8英镑（6美元）；(ii) 家庭对缓解措施的支付意愿高于对完整信息的支付意愿；(iii) 家庭对室内空气污染监测仪的需求价格弹性约为-0.75；(iv) 对室内空气污染监测仪或空气净化器提供1英镑补贴的公共资金边际价值为无穷大，即帕累托改进。

papers.title: Artificial Intelligence and the Labor Market
papers.authors: Menaka Hampole, Dimitris Papanikolaou, Lawrence D.W. Schmidt, Bryan Seegmiller
papers.abstract: We use advances in natural language processing to construct new measures of workers’ task-level exposure to artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning from 2010 to 2023, capturing variation across firms, occupations, and time. Tasks with higher AI exposure subsequently experience reduced labor demand. To interpret these patterns, we develop a model that separates direct substitution from indirect reallocative effects of labor-saving technologies. Two variables summarize the impact of AI on within-firm labor demand: the mean exposure of an occupation’s tasks, which depresses demand, and the concentration of exposure in a few tasks, which offsets losses by enabling workers to reallocate effort. Using an instrument based on historical university hiring networks, we find causal evidence consistent with these predictions. Despite strong substitution at the task level, overall employment effects are modest, as reduced demand in exposed occupations is offset by productivity-driven increases in labor demand at AI-adopting firms.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E20, J01, J24, O3, O33
papers.zh_title: 人工智能与劳动力市场
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用自然语言处理的进展，构建了2010年至2023年间工人任务层面暴露于人工智能和机器学习的新度量，捕捉了企业、职业和时间上的变化。人工智能暴露度较高的任务随后经历了劳动力需求减少。为了解释这些模式，我们开发了一个模型，将劳动节约型技术的直接替代效应与间接重新分配效应区分开来。两个变量概括了人工智能对企业内劳动力需求的影响：一个职业任务的平均暴露度（抑制需求）和暴露集中在少数任务上的程度（通过使工人能够重新分配努力来抵消损失）。利用基于历史大学招聘网络的工具变量，我们发现了与这些预测一致的因果证据。尽管在任务层面存在强烈的替代效应，但总体就业影响是适度的，因为暴露职业的需求减少被采用人工智能的企业中生产率驱动的劳动力需求增长所抵消。

papers.title: Measuring Work from Home
papers.authors: Shelby R. Buckman, Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis
papers.abstract: Headline estimates for the extent of work from home (WFH) differ widely across U.S. surveys. The differences shrink greatly when we harmonize with respect to the WFH concept, target population, and question design. As of 2025, our preferred estimates say that WFH accounts for a quarter of paid workdays among Americans aged 20-64. The WFH rate is seven percentage points higher for workers with children under eight in the household and about two percentage points higher for women than men. Desired WFH rates exceed actual rates in every major demographic group – more so for women, workers with young children, and less educated workers.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LS, PE, PR；JEL：D12, E24, J14, J21, J22
papers.zh_title: 衡量居家办公
papers.zh_abstract: 关于居家办公（WFH）程度的总体估计在美国各调查中差异很大。当我们在居家办公概念、目标人群和问题设计方面进行统一协调后，这些差异大幅缩小。截至2025年，我们的首选估计表明，在20-64岁的美国人中，居家办公占其带薪工作日的四分之一。对于家中有八岁以下子女的劳动者，其居家办公率高出七个百分点；女性的居家办公率比男性高出约两个百分点。在每个主要人口群体中，期望的居家办公率都高于实际比率——在女性、有年幼子女的劳动者以及受教育程度较低的劳动者中，这种差距更为明显。

papers.title: Knightian Uncertainty and Bayesian Entrepreneurship
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: This paper examines the relationship between Knightian uncertainty and Bayesian approaches to entrepreneurship. Using Bewley's formal model of uncertainty and incomplete preferences, it demonstrates that key predictions from Bayesian entrepreneurship remain robust when accounting for Knightian uncertainty, particularly regarding experimentation, venture financing, and strategic choice. The analysis shows that while Knightian uncertainty creates a more challenging decision environment, it maintains consistency with the three pillars of Bayesian entrepreneurship: heterogeneous beliefs, stronger entrepreneurial priors, and Bayesian updating. The paper also explores connections to effectuation theory, finding that formal uncertainty models can bridge different entrepreneurial methodologies.
papers.zh_title: 奈特不确定性与贝叶斯创业
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了奈特不确定性与贝叶斯创业方法之间的关系。利用Bewley关于不确定性和不完全偏好的形式化模型，本文证明了贝叶斯创业的关键预测在考虑奈特不确定性时仍然稳健，尤其是在实验、风险融资和战略选择方面。分析表明，虽然奈特不确定性创造了一个更具挑战性的决策环境，但它与贝叶斯创业的三个支柱保持一致：异质性信念、更强的创业先验以及贝叶斯更新。本文还探讨了与效果逻辑理论的联系，发现形式化的不确定性模型可以桥接不同的创业方法论。

papers.title: Long-Run Consequences of Sanctions on Russia
papers.authors: David Baqaee, Hannes Malmberg
papers.abstract: This paper examines the long-run economic consequences of Western sanctions on Russia. Using a new framework for balanced growth path analysis, we find that the long-run declines in consumption are significantly larger when capital stocks are allowed to adjust --- 1.4 times larger for Russia and 2.2 times larger for Eastern Europe. This is contrary to the common intuition that long-run effects should be milder due to greater adjustment opportunities. In our model, Russian long-run consumption falls by 8.5%, Eastern European consumption by 2%, and Western countries' consumption by 0.3% in response to sanctions. The model also reveals important distributional effects: as capital adjusts, Russian real wages fall more than rental prices in the long run. These findings show that accounting for capital adjustment is quantitatively important when analyzing trade sanctions.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：E0, F0, F1, F5, F51
papers.zh_title: 对俄制裁的长期后果
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了西方对俄罗斯制裁的长期经济后果。使用一个用于平衡增长路径分析的新框架，我们发现，当允许资本存量进行调整时，消费的长期下降幅度要大得多——俄罗斯为1.4倍，东欧为2.2倍。这与通常的直觉相反，即由于更大的调整机会，长期影响应该更温和。在我们的模型中，作为对制裁的回应，俄罗斯的长期消费下降8.5%，东欧消费下降2%，西方国家消费下降0.3%。该模型还揭示了重要的分配效应：随着资本的调整，俄罗斯的实际工资长期下降幅度超过租赁价格。这些发现表明，在分析贸易制裁时，考虑资本调整在数量上是重要的。

papers.title: Firstborn Daughters and Family Structure in Sub-Saharan Africa
papers.authors: Garance Genicot, Maria Hernandez-de-Benito
papers.abstract: Does the absence of missing baby girls in sub-Saharan Africa imply a lack of son preference in the region? This paper uncovers systematic gendered effects on family structure and fertility in sub-Saharan Africa. Using data from Demographic and Health Surveys, we show that having a firstborn daughter, rather than a son, significantly influences women’s family dynamics. Women with a female firstborn experience higher long-term marriage rates but are less likely to marry the child’s father when the birth occurs prior to formal union. They also face higher divorce rates and greater likelihood of entering polygamous unions. Despite these marital transitions, they tend to have more children. Our analysis further reveals that having a firstborn daughter is associated with poorer living standards and adverse health outcomes for mothers. To examine the mechanisms driving these patterns, we employ a geographic regression discontinuity design along ancestral ethnic borders separating matrilineal and patrilineal traditions. This approach highlights patrilineality as a key driver, shaping both marriage dynamics and fertility.
papers.zh_title: 撒哈拉以南非洲的头胎女儿与家庭结构
papers.zh_abstract: 撒哈拉以南非洲地区没有缺失女婴的现象是否意味着该地区不存在男孩偏好？本文揭示了撒哈拉以南非洲地区家庭结构和生育率中系统性的性别效应。利用人口与健康调查的数据，我们表明，与头胎是儿子相比，头胎是女儿会显著影响女性的家庭动态。头胎是女儿的女性长期结婚率更高，但如果生育发生在正式结合之前，她们与孩子父亲结婚的可能性更低。她们还面临更高的离婚率和更大的可能性进入一夫多妻制婚姻。尽管经历了这些婚姻转变，她们往往生育更多孩子。我们的分析进一步揭示，头胎是女儿与母亲较差的生活水平和不利的健康结果相关。为了检验驱动这些模式的机制，我们沿着分隔母系和父系传统的祖先族群边界，采用地理断点回归设计。这种方法凸显了父系制是一个关键驱动因素，它同时塑造了婚姻动态和生育率。

papers.title: Long-Run Comparative Statics
papers.authors: David Baqaee, Hannes Malmberg
papers.abstract: What are the long-run effects of permanent changes to productivities, taxes, and other economic parameters, accounting for changes in the capital stock? We show that balanced growth paths of dynamic open economies can be represented as equilibria of equivalent static economies, in which capital services are intermediate inputs subject to wedges that capture deviations from the Golden Rule of savings. Hence, tools developed for distorted static economies can be used to characterize long-run comparative statics. The long-run impact of any shock on consumption has two components. First, a mechanical technological impact captured by a cost-based Domar weight, which we show far exceeds the sales share for investment industries and their suppliers. Second, there is a resource reallocation effect, which increases consumption if it raises capital intensity, with the magnitude determined by how much the reallocation lowers the aggregate labor share. These reallocations can be quantitatively significant: tariffs, for example, generate long-run consumption losses that far exceed their static GDP impact, by reallocating resources away from capital formation. The magnitude of losses from tariffs depends primarily on the economy’s internal elasticities – such as the elasticity of substitution between capital and labor and the elasticity of household asset demand to interest rates – rather than on the trade elasticities that are central in static models.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：E0, E01, E1, E10, E16, E2, E20, F0, F10, F11, F3, F30, F4, F40, O10, O11, O41
papers.zh_title: 长期比较静态分析
papers.zh_abstract: 在考虑资本存量变化的情况下，生产率、税收和其他经济参数的永久性变化的长期影响是什么？我们表明，动态开放经济的平衡增长路径可以表示为等价静态经济的均衡，其中资本服务是中间投入品，并受到反映储蓄黄金律偏离的楔子影响。因此，为扭曲的静态经济开发的工具可用于刻画长期比较静态。任何冲击对消费的长期影响有两个组成部分。首先，是由基于成本的Domar权重所捕捉的机械性技术影响，我们表明该权重远远超过投资行业及其供应商的销售份额。其次，存在资源重新配置效应，如果它提高了资本密集度，则会增加消费，其大小取决于重新配置在多大程度上降低了总劳动份额。这些重新配置在数量上可能很重要：例如，关税通过将资源从资本形成中重新配置出去，产生的长期消费损失远远超过其静态GDP影响。关税损失的规模主要取决于经济体的内部弹性——例如资本与劳动之间的替代弹性以及家庭资产需求对利率的弹性——而不是静态模型中核心的贸易弹性。

papers.title: Do Temporary Cash Transfers Stimulate the Macroeconomy? Evidence from Four Case Studies
papers.authors: Valerie A. Ramey
papers.abstract: This paper re-evaluates the effectiveness of temporary transfers in stimulating the macroeconomy using evidence from four case studies. The rebirth of Keynesian stabilization policy has lingering costs in terms of higher debt paths, so it is important to assess the benefits of these policies. In each case study, I analyze whether the behavior of the aggregate data is consistent with the transfers providing an effective stimulus. Two of the case studies are reviews of evidence from my recent work on the 2001 and 2008 U.S. tax rebates. The other two case studies are new analyses of temporary transfers in Singapore and Australia. In all four instances, the evidence suggests that temporary cash transfers to households likely provided little or no stimulus to the macroeconomy.
papers.zh_title: 临时现金转移支付能否刺激宏观经济？来自四个案例研究的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用四个案例研究的证据，重新评估了临时转移支付在刺激宏观经济方面的有效性。凯恩斯主义稳定政策的复兴带来了更高的债务路径等持续成本，因此评估这些政策的收益非常重要。在每个案例研究中，我分析了总体数据的行为是否与转移支付提供了有效刺激相一致。其中两个案例研究是对我近期关于2001年和2008年美国税收返还工作的证据回顾。另外两个案例研究是对新加坡和澳大利亚临时转移支付的新分析。在所有四个案例中，证据表明，向家庭提供的临时现金转移支付可能对宏观经济几乎没有或根本没有提供刺激。

papers.title: The Social and Statistical Construction of Race
papers.authors: Anjali Adukia, Richard Hornbeck, Daniel Keniston, Benjamin Lualdi
papers.abstract: We examine the social construction of race in the United States, from Reconstruction to the modern day, and show how this affects statistical differences across and within racial categories. During the Reconstruction era, people with the same light brown skin tones, recorded by the Freedman’s Bank (1865-1874), were more likely racialized as White or Mulatto in the 1870 Census if they were wealthier or literate. Racial assignment of descendants remained fluid through the 1940 Census. In modern data, self-reported race also varies with income and college completion among people with light brown skin tones. This endogenous racial assignment increases cross-race wealth gaps, which we show can be adjusted using sub-samples with data on skin tone or ancestry. Endogenous race also induces selection when controlling for race that, for example, attenuates the relationship between wealth and skin tone.\n
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：J15, N31, Z13
papers.zh_title: 种族的社会建构与统计建构
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了美国从重建时期至今种族的社会建构，并展示了这如何影响种族类别内部和之间的统计差异。在重建时期，根据自由民储蓄银行（1865-1874年）的记录，具有相同浅棕色肤色的人，如果更富有或更有文化，在1870年人口普查中更有可能被归类为白人或混血儿。其后代的种族归属直到1940年人口普查仍具有流动性。在现代数据中，在浅棕色肤色人群中，自我报告的种族也随收入和大学完成情况而变化。这种内生的种族归属增加了跨种族的财富差距，我们表明可以使用具有肤色或血统数据的子样本进行调整。当控制种族时，内生种族也会引起选择偏差，例如，这会削弱财富与肤色之间的关系。

papers.title: Wage Fixing
papers.authors: Axel Gottfries, Gregor Jarosch
papers.abstract: We model and analyze employer cartels that fix wages by committing to a wage ceiling. The setting is a frictional labor market with large employers that compete for workers via posted wages. Wage fixing reduces competition both inside and outside the cartel, leading to market-wide wage depression. Competition from outside employers disciplines the cartel and hence governs its wage impact and profitability. Consequently, wage-fixing schemes are more likely to emerge and remain stable when the labor market has slack, concentration is high, the span of control is small, product demand is elastic, and firms also collude in the product market. We describe a simple sufficient statistic to gauge the harm caused by a wage-fixing cartel.
papers.zh_title: 工资固定
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对通过承诺设定工资上限来固定工资的雇主卡特尔进行建模和分析。该设定是一个存在摩擦的劳动力市场，其中有大型雇主通过公布的工资来竞争工人。工资固定减少了卡特尔内部和外部的竞争，导致市场范围内的工资压低。来自外部雇主的竞争约束了卡特尔，从而决定了其工资影响和盈利能力。因此，当劳动力市场存在松弛、集中度高、控制范围小、产品需求有弹性且企业也在产品市场合谋时，工资固定方案更有可能出现并保持稳定。我们描述了一个简单的充分统计量来衡量工资固定卡特尔造成的损害。

papers.title: Inappropriate Technology: Evidence from Global Agriculture
papers.authors: Jacob Moscona, Karthik A. Sastry
papers.abstract: An influential explanation for global productivity differences is that frontier technologies are adapted to the high-income countries that develop them and "inappropriate" elsewhere. We study this hypothesis in agriculture using data on novel plant varieties, patents, output, and the global range of crop pests and pathogens. Innovation focuses on the environmental conditions of technology leaders, and ecological mismatch with these markets reduces technology transfer and production. Combined with a model, our estimates imply that inappropriate technology explains 15-20% of cross-country agricultural productivity differences and re-shapes the potential consequences of innovation policy, the rise of new technology leaders, and environmental change.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, PR；JEL：O3, O33, O4, O44, Q16, Q56, Q57
papers.zh_title: 不适宜技术：来自全球农业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 一个关于全球生产率差异的有影响力的解释是，前沿技术适应了开发它们的高收入国家，而在其他地方则“不适宜”。我们利用关于新型植物品种、专利、产出以及全球作物病虫害范围的数据，在农业领域研究了这一假说。创新聚焦于技术领先国家的环境条件，而与这些市场的生态错配会减少技术转移和生产。结合一个模型，我们的估计表明，不适宜技术解释了跨国农业生产率差异的15-20%，并重塑了创新政策、新技术领先者的崛起以及环境变化的潜在后果。

papers.title: Measuring the Average Period of Production
papers.authors: Pol Antràs, Vitalii Tubdenov
papers.abstract: The importance of time in production was emphasized by Classical economists and was at the core of the Austrian capital theory proposed by Böhm-Bawerk and further elaborated by Wicksell, Hicks, Dorfman, and many others. A central concept in this literature is the existence of an ‘average period of production’ which governs the demand for circulating capital associated with a production process. Building on Böhm-Bawerk (1889), we propose a measure of the average period of production as a (weighted) average temporal distance between the time at which a firm employs its inputs and the time at which these inputs deliver finished goods that are sold to consumers. We show that, under stationarity conditions, this measure corresponds to the ratio of a firm’s stock of inventories to the cost of the goods it sells in a given period. Using data from publicly traded companies worldwide, we compute and validate this measure for various industries and countries, and show that, consistent with theory, this measure is lower, the higher the cost of capital faced by firms is.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, ITI, PR；JEL：D2, E14, E22, F14, G31, L60
papers.zh_title: 衡量平均生产周期
papers.zh_abstract: 时间在生产中的重要性被古典经济学家所强调，并且是Böhm-Bawerk提出、后经Wicksell、Hicks、Dorfman等人进一步阐述的奥地利资本理论的核心。该文献中的一个核心概念是存在一个“平均生产周期”，它支配着与生产过程相关的流动资本需求。基于Böhm-Bawerk (1889)，我们提出了一种衡量平均生产周期的方法，将其定义为（加权）平均时间距离，即企业投入其要素的时间与这些要素交付给消费者的成品时间之间的平均时间距离。我们证明，在稳态条件下，该衡量指标对应于企业给定时期内的存货存量与其销售商品成本之比。利用全球上市公司的数据，我们计算并验证了不同行业和国家的这一指标，并表明，与理论一致，企业面临的资本成本越高，该指标越低。

papers.title: The Benefits from Bundling Demand in K-12 Broadband Procurement
papers.authors: Gaurab Aryal, Charles Murry, Pallavi Pal, Arnab Palit
papers.abstract: We study a new market design for K-12 school broadband procurement that switched from school-specific bidding to a system that bundled schools into groups. Using an event study approach, we estimate the program reduced internet prices by 37% per Mbps per month while increasing bandwidth by 500%. These benefits occurred by mitigating exposure risk in broadband procurement – the risk that providers win too few contracts to cover fixed infrastructure costs. Using a bounds approach, we show robustness of our estimates and document that participants saved at least as much as their federal subsidies and experienced substantial welfare gains.
papers.zh_title: K-12宽带采购中捆绑需求的收益
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一种新的K-12学校宽带采购市场设计，该设计从学校特定投标转变为将学校捆绑成组的系统。使用事件研究方法，我们估计该计划使每Mbps每月的互联网价格降低了37%，同时带宽增加了500%。这些收益是通过减轻宽带采购中的暴露风险——即供应商赢得太少合同而无法覆盖固定基础设施成本的风险——来实现的。使用边界方法，我们展示了估计结果的稳健性，并记录了参与者至少节省了相当于其联邦补贴的金额，并经历了显著的福利改善。

papers.title: A Family Affair: The Effects of College on Parent and Student Finances
papers.authors: Palaash Bhargava, Sandra E. Black, Jeffrey T. Denning, Robert W. Fairlie, Oded Gurantz
papers.abstract: Paying for college is often a family affair, with both parents and students contributing. We study the effects of college on family finances using administrative data on the universe of federal aid applicants in California linked to credit records. We provide the first comprehensive analysis of how both students and their parents use debt with college attendance and how prices affect those decisions. We start by using an event-study framework to explore how parents’ use of debt and credit outcomes change after their child first submits a federal aid application for college enrollment. While total debt does not change, higher-income parents shift balances from other debt to educational loans. We find that lower-income parents take out more education loans, experience less delinquency on non-educational debt, and see their credit scores rise. We then use discontinuities in eligibility for generous financial aid to test how an exogenous change in the price of college affects parental debt and financial health. We find that parents finance increases in the price of college through educational loans as well as home equity loans. Higher prices increase parental delinquency on debt. The findings highlight an important channel by which college and its rising cost may spill over into the broader financial health of families and economy.
papers.zh_title: 家庭事务：大学对父母和学生财务的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 支付大学费用通常是一个家庭事务，父母和学生都会做出贡献。我们利用与信用记录相关联的加州联邦援助申请者的行政数据，研究大学对家庭财务的影响。我们首次全面分析了学生及其父母如何因上大学而使用债务，以及价格如何影响这些决策。我们首先使用事件研究框架，探讨在孩子首次提交联邦援助申请以注册大学后，父母的债务使用和信用结果如何变化。虽然总债务没有变化，但高收入父母将余额从其他债务转移到教育贷款。我们发现，低收入父母借入更多教育贷款，非教育债务的违约率降低，信用评分上升。然后，我们利用获得慷慨财政援助资格的不连续性，来检验大学价格的外生变化如何影响父母的债务和财务健康。我们发现，父母通过教育贷款以及房屋净值贷款来为大学价格上涨提供资金。更高的价格增加了父母的债务违约率。这些发现突显了一个重要渠道，通过该渠道，大学及其不断上涨的成本可能会溢出到家庭和整个经济的更广泛财务健康中。

papers.title: Misperceptions of Nonlinear Budget Sets: Evidence from Administrative Tax Data
papers.authors: Alexander M. Gelber, Damon Jones, Ithai Lurie, Daniel W. Sacks
papers.abstract: Budget set kinks are much studied in economics, including in the context of “bunching” estimators that assume individuals react to the true marginal tax rate. We document that individuals disproportionately “left-bunch” below kinks in the context of the Social Security Earnings Test. We show that the left bunching in this case cannot be explained through standard, rational reactions to the incentives and instead find that a model of tax bracket misperception, where individuals mistake a kink in their budget set for a notch, provides a much better fit to the data. In the context of the Earnings Test, this misperception provides an explanation for why literature has found large earnings responses despite the fact that the Earnings Test typically creates weak incentives for rational agents to adjust earnings. More generally, if individuals perceive kinks as notches, then elasticities estimated from bunching at kinks where this misperception may be at play may be significantly over-estimated.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PE；JEL：H20, H24, H55, J14, J22, J26
papers.zh_title: 对非线性预算集的误解：来自行政税收数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 预算集拐点在经济学中被广泛研究，包括在“聚集”估计量的背景下，该估计量假设个体对真实边际税率做出反应。我们记录了在社会安全收入测试的背景下，个体不成比例地在拐点下方“左侧聚集”。我们表明，在这种情况下，左侧聚集无法通过标准的、对激励的理性反应来解释，相反，我们发现一个税收等级误解模型——即个体将预算集中的拐点误认为是一个缺口——能更好地拟合数据。在收入测试的背景下，这种误解解释了为什么文献发现了巨大的收入反应，尽管收入测试通常为理性代理人调整收入创造了微弱的激励。更一般地说，如果个体将拐点视为缺口，那么从可能存在这种误解的拐点聚集处估计出的弹性可能会被显著高估。

papers.title: AI and the Extended Workday: Productivity, Contracting Efficiency, and Distribution of Rents
papers.authors: Wei Jiang, Junyoung Park, Rachel (Jiqiu) Xiao, Shen Zhang
papers.abstract: This study investigates how occupational AI exposure impacts employment at the intensive margin, i.e., the length of workdays and the allocation of time between work and leisure. Drawing on individual-level time diary data from 2004–2023, we find that higher AI exposure—whether stemming from the ChatGPT shock or broader AI evolution—is associated with longer work hours and reduced leisure time, primarily due to AI complementing human labor rather than replacing it. This effect is particularly pronounced in contexts where AI significantly enhances marginal productivity and monitoring efficiency. It is further amplified in competitive labor and product markets, where workers have limited bargaining power to retain the benefits of productivity gains, which are often captured by consumers or firms instead. The findings question the expectation that technological advancements alleviate human labor burdens, revealing instead a paradox where such progresses compromise work-life balance.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能与延长的工作日：生产率、契约效率与租金分配
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究调查了职业层面的人工智能暴露如何影响就业的集约边际，即工作日的长度以及工作与休闲之间的时间分配。利用2004年至2023年个体层面的时间日志数据，我们发现，更高的人工智能暴露——无论是源于ChatGPT冲击还是更广泛的人工智能演进——与更长的工作时间和更少的休闲时间相关，这主要是由于人工智能补充而非替代了人类劳动。这种效应在人工智能显著提升边际生产率和监控效率的情境中尤为突出。在竞争激烈的劳动力和产品市场中，这种效应被进一步放大，因为在这些市场中，工人议价能力有限，无法保留生产率提升带来的收益，这些收益往往被消费者或企业所获取。这些发现质疑了技术进步能减轻人类劳动负担的预期，反而揭示了一个悖论：这种进步损害了工作与生活的平衡。

papers.title: Dirty Business: Transition Risk of Factor Portfolios
papers.authors: Ravi Jagannathan, Iwan Meier, Valeri Sokolovski
papers.abstract: Between 2016 and 2023, the top 10% of carbon-emission-intensive firms (heavy emitters) accounted for over 90% of all Scope 1 emissions from U.S. public companies. We observe that about 35% of the market capitalization of ‘Value’ portfolios, compared to 5% of ‘Growth’ portfolios, regardless of how Value and Growth are defined, was comprised of heavy emitters. When we split the Big Value portfolio into heavy- and light-emitter stocks, we find that these two portfolios had similar realized (raw and risk-adjusted) returns and expected returns, as measured by Implied Cost of Capital, suggesting limited incremental compensation for transition risk. We also find that Big Growth low-emitter stocks consistently had lower expected returns than Big Value low-emitter stocks, with the spread widening in recent years, despite similar emission levels. This indicates that factors beyond climate concerns are necessary to fully explain the superior performance of Growth stocks relative to Value stocks over the past decade.
papers.zh_title: 肮脏的业务：因子投资组合的转型风险
papers.zh_abstract: 在2016年至2023年间，碳排放强度最高的前10%公司（重排放者）占美国上市公司所有范围一排放量的90%以上。我们观察到，无论价值和成长如何定义，约35%的“价值”投资组合市值由重排放者构成，而“成长”投资组合的这一比例仅为5%。当我们将大盘价值投资组合拆分为重排放和轻排放股票时，我们发现这两个投资组合具有相似的已实现（原始和风险调整后）收益率以及以隐含资本成本衡量的预期收益率，这表明对转型风险的增量补偿有限。我们还发现，尽管排放水平相似，大盘成长低排放股票的预期收益率始终低于大盘价值低排放股票，且这一差距在近年有所扩大。这表明，要完全解释过去十年成长股相对于价值股的优异表现，需要考虑气候担忧之外的因素。

papers.title: The Impact of the Out-of-Pocket Housing Expense Inflation on Household Alcohol and Tobacco Purchases
papers.authors: Virat Agrawal, Richard K. Green, Neeraj Sood, Christopher M. Whaley
papers.abstract: Housing expense inflation has historically averaged an annual growth rate of 3.0 percent. However, starting in early 2021 housing expense inflation surged, peaking at 8.2 percent by March 2023. Substance use also increased concurrently. This study investigates the impact of rising housing expenses on household purchases of alcohol and tobacco. The relationship is ambiguous: higher housing costs could reduce spending on these items due to constrained disposable income or increase them as a coping mechanism for financial stress. To identify the effects of housing expense inflation we utilize exogenous variation in county-level housing regulations and exposure to housing expense inflation, which affects renters and homeowners differently as homeowners with fixed-rate mortgages are less impacted. In particular, we employ a difference-in-difference-in-difference (DDD) approach, comparing changes in alcohol and tobacco purchases between renters and homeowners, before and after the housing expense surge, across counties with varying housing regulation levels. Our findings reveal that a 1-unit increase in our housing regulation index—equivalent to moving from the 10th to the 90th percentile—correlates with an additional $28.70 (about 15.6 percent) monthly increase in out-of-pocket housing expenses per household member for renters relative to homeowners between 2019 and 2022. This increase is also associated with a 26 to 38 percent rise in financial difficulties among renters compared to homeowners. Furthermore, the same regulatory increase corresponds to a 15.2 percent rise in monthly beer purchases per member among renters relative to homeowners in 2022 compared to 2019, driven largely by low-cost beer. However, we find no significant effect on monthly household purchases of liquor, wine, or cigarettes.
papers.meta: Programs：EH；JEL：D1, G5, I1, I12, I3, R28
papers.zh_title: 自付住房支出通胀对家庭酒精和烟草购买的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 住房支出通胀的历史平均年增长率为3.0%。然而，从2021年初开始，住房支出通胀飙升，到2023年3月达到8.2%的峰值。同时，物质使用也有所增加。本研究调查了住房支出上升对家庭酒精和烟草购买的影响。这种关系是不明确的：更高的住房成本可能因可支配收入受限而减少在这些项目上的支出，也可能作为应对财务压力的一种机制而增加支出。为了识别住房支出通胀的影响，我们利用了县级住房监管程度和住房支出通胀暴露度的外生变化，这对租房者和房主的影响不同，因为拥有固定利率抵押贷款的房主受到的影响较小。具体而言，我们采用了三重差分法，比较了在住房支出激增前后，不同住房监管水平县中租房者和房主之间酒精和烟草购买的变化。我们的研究结果显示，在2019年至2022年间，我们的住房监管指数每增加1个单位——相当于从第10百分位移动到第90百分位——与租房者相对于房主每户成员每月自付住房支出额外增加28.70美元（约15.6%）相关。这一增长还与租房者相对于房主财务困难程度增加26%至38%相关。此外，同样的监管增加对应于2022年相较于2019年，租房者相对于房主每月人均啤酒购买量增加15.2%，这主要由低价啤酒驱动。然而，我们发现对每月家庭购买的烈酒、葡萄酒或香烟没有显著影响。

papers.title: It Takes a Village Election: Turnover and Performance in Local Bureaucracies
papers.authors: Samuel Bazzi, Masyhur Hilmy, Benjamin Marx, Mahvish Shaukat, Andreas Stegmann
papers.abstract: In many countries, local governments struggle with inefficiency and inaction, often perpetuated by entrenched elites. This paper examines how leadership changes affect local bureaucratic performance. Combining personnel and citizen surveys with a regression discontinuity design in a large sample of Indonesian villages, we show that electoral turnover revitalizes local bureaucracies and improves the flow of information about citizen preferences. Bureaucrats serving new leaders interact more with citizens and are less connected to past or present village officials, resulting in a more responsive village government that better incorporates citizens’ demands in policy-making. This improves local service provision, as measured in both administrative data and citizen surveys. Overall, our findings suggest that leadership turnover can mitigate elite capture and improve governance in local administrations.
papers.zh_title: 需要一场乡村选举：地方官僚机构的更替与绩效
papers.zh_abstract: 在许多国家，地方政府面临效率低下和行动迟缓的问题，这通常由根深蒂固的精英阶层所延续。本文研究了领导层变动如何影响地方官僚机构的绩效。结合人员与公民调查，并在印度尼西亚大量村庄样本中采用断点回归设计，我们表明选举更替能够重振地方官僚机构，并改善关于公民偏好的信息流动。服务于新领导人的官僚与公民互动更多，与过去或现任村庄官员的联系更少，从而形成一个更具回应性的村庄政府，能更好地将公民需求纳入政策制定。这改善了地方服务供给，这一点在行政数据和公民调查中均有体现。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，领导层更替可以减轻精英俘获并改善地方行政的治理水平。

papers.title: Evaluating Transport Improvements in Spatial Equilibrium
papers.authors: Stephen J. Redding
papers.abstract: The recent development of quantitative urban models provides a new set of tools for evaluating transport improvements. Conventional cost-benefit analyses are typically undertaken in partial equilibrium. In contrast, quantitative urban models characterize the spatial distribution of economic activity within cities in general equilibrium. We compare evaluations of a transport improvement using conventional cost-benefit analysis, sufficient statistics approaches based on changes in market access, and model-based counterfactuals. We show that quantitative urban models predict a reorganization of economic activity within cities in response to a transport improvement, which can lead to substantial differences between the predictions of these three approaches for large changes in transport costs.
papers.zh_title: 在空间均衡中评估交通改善
papers.zh_abstract: 定量城市模型的最新发展为评估交通改善提供了一套新工具。传统的成本效益分析通常在局部均衡中进行。相比之下，定量城市模型在一般均衡中刻画了城市内经济活动的空间分布。我们比较了使用传统成本效益分析、基于市场准入变化的充分统计量方法以及基于模型的反事实分析对交通改善的评估。我们表明，定量城市模型预测了城市内经济活动因交通改善而发生的重组，这可能导致在交通成本发生较大变化时，这三种方法的预测结果之间存在显著差异。

papers.title: The Climate Adaptation Feedback
papers.authors: Alexander C. Abajian, Tamma Carleton, Kyle C. Meng, Olivier Deschenes
papers.abstract: Many behavioral responses to climate change are carbon-intensive, raising concerns that adaptation may cause additional warming. The sign and magnitude of this feedback depend on how increased emissions from cooling balance against reduced emissions from heating across space and time. We present an empirical approach that forecasts the effect of future adaptive energy use on global average temperature over the 21st century. We find energy-based adaptation will lower global mean surface temperature in 2099 by 0.12 degrees Celsius (0.07 degrees Celsius) relative to baseline projections under RCP8.5 (RCP4.5) and avoid 1.8 (0.6) trillion USD ($2019) in damages. Energy-based adaptation lowers business-as-usual emissions for 85% of countries, reducing the mitigation required to meet their unilateral Nationally Determined Contributions under the UNFCCC by 20% on average. These findings indicate that while business-as-usual adaptive energy use is unlikely to accelerate warming, it raises important implications for countries’ existing mitigation commitments.
papers.zh_title: 气候适应反馈
papers.zh_abstract: 许多应对气候变化的行为是碳密集型的，这引发了适应行为可能导致额外变暖的担忧。这种反馈的符号和大小取决于因制冷而增加的排放与因供暖而减少的排放如何在空间和时间上达到平衡。我们提出了一种实证方法，预测未来适应性能源使用对21世纪全球平均温度的影响。我们发现，相对于RCP8.5（RCP4.5）下的基线预测，基于能源的适应将使2099年的全球平均地表温度降低0.12摄氏度（0.07摄氏度），并避免1.8（0.6）万亿美元（2019年美元）的损失。基于能源的适应降低了85%国家的常规排放，使这些国家为履行其在《联合国气候变化框架公约》下的单方面国家自主贡献所需的减排量平均减少20%。这些发现表明，虽然常规的适应性能源使用不太可能加速变暖，但它对各国现有的减排承诺产生了重要影响。

papers.title: Returns to Specific Graduate Degrees: Estimates Using Texas Administrative Records
papers.authors: Joseph Altonji, Zhengren Zhu
papers.abstract: We estimate causal effects of 121 graduate degrees on log earnings. The returns average 0.159 but vary widely across fields, with a standard deviation of 0.176. Experience profiles of the returns also vary and are particularly steep for medicine. Internal rates of return, which account for program length, tuition, and in-school earnings, are sizable but vary less across fields. Earnings effects are higher for women, lower for part time students, and depend on undergraduate major. Students from lower-paying undergraduate majors benefit more from an MBA or JD. School specific returns are higher for higher ranked JD and MBA programs.
papers.zh_title: 特定研究生学位的回报：基于德克萨斯州行政记录的估计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了121个研究生学位对对数收入的因果效应。平均回报率为0.159，但不同领域差异很大，标准差为0.176。回报的经验曲线也各不相同，医学领域的曲线尤为陡峭。内部收益率（考虑了项目时长、学费和在校期间收入）相当可观，但跨领域的差异较小。收入效应对于女性更高，对于非全日制学生更低，并且取决于本科专业。来自低收入本科专业的学生从MBA或法学博士学位中获益更多。对于排名更高的法学博士和MBA项目，学校特定的回报率也更高。

papers.title: Banks and the State-Dependent Effects of Monetary Policy
papers.authors: Martin S. Eichenbaum, Federico Puglisi, Sergio Rebelo, Mathias Trabandt
papers.abstract: This paper provides empirical evidence that contractionary monetary policy is less powerful in high interest-rate environments. We argue that this state dependence reflects the interaction between bank’s net interest margins (the return on banks’ assets minus the per-dollar cost of their funds), and households’ high marginal propensity to consume out of liquid wealth. We construct a banking model in which social dynamics shape household attentiveness to deposit rates and embed it in a nonlinear heterogeneous-agent New Keynesian model. Estimated versions of the partial and general equilibrium models account well for the observed state dependence in the response of banks’ net interest margins and the response of aggregate economic activity to monetary policy shocks.
papers.zh_title: 银行与货币政策的非对称效应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了经验证据，表明紧缩性货币政策在高利率环境中的效力较弱。我们认为，这种状态依赖性反映了银行的净息差（银行资产回报率减去每美元资金成本）与家庭对流动财富的高边际消费倾向之间的相互作用。我们构建了一个银行模型，其中社会动态塑造了家庭对存款利率的关注程度，并将其嵌入一个非线性的异质性代理人新凯恩斯模型中。部分均衡和一般均衡模型的估计版本很好地解释了观察到的银行净息差响应以及总体经济活动对货币政策冲击响应的状态依赖性。

papers.title: On the Fragility of the Nonlinear Phillips Curve View of Recent Inflation
papers.authors: Paul Beaudry, Chenyu Hou, Franck Portier
papers.abstract: The paper examines whether the US evidence in favour of a nonlinearity in the Phillips curve is robust or fragile. To this end, we use both cross city and aggregate time series data. We are particularly concerned with the possibility that the evidence in favour a nonlinear Phillips curve may is fact be driven by improperly controlling for inflation expectations. Our finding suggest that the evidence in support of a nonlinear Phillips curve is very fragile.
papers.zh_title: 论近期通胀的非线性菲利普斯曲线观点的脆弱性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了支持菲利普斯曲线存在非线性的美国证据是稳健的还是脆弱的。为此，我们同时使用了跨城市数据和总体时间序列数据。我们特别关注这样一种可能性，即支持非线性菲利普斯曲线的证据实际上可能是由对通胀预期的不当控制所驱动的。我们的研究结果表明，支持非线性菲利普斯曲线的证据非常脆弱。

papers.title: Reproductive Technology and the Child Care Sector: How Access to Oral Contraception and Abortion Shaped Workforce Composition and Quality
papers.authors: Chris M. Herbst, Erdal Tekin
papers.abstract: The composition and quality of the child care workforce may be uniquely sensitive to changes in the complementarities between home production and market work. This paper examines whether the expansion of oral contraceptives and abortion access throughout the 1960's and 1970's influenced the composition, quality, and wages of the child care workforce. Leveraging state-by-birth cohort variation in access to these reproductive technologies, we find that they significantly altered the educational profile of child care workers---increasing the proportion of less-educated women in the sector while reducing the share of highly-educated workers. This shift led to a decline in average education levels and wages within the child care workforce. Furthermore, access to the pill and abortion influenced child care employment differently across settings, with center-based providers losing more high-skilled workers to alternatives with better career opportunities, and home-based and private household providers absorbing more low-skilled women, for whom child care may have remained a viable employment destination. Overall, our findings indicate that increased reproductive autonomy, while expanding women's access to higher-skilled and -paying professions, also resulted in a redistribution of skilled labor away from child care, which may have implications for service quality, child development, and parental employment.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH；JEL：I21, I38, J13, J22, J24
papers.zh_title: 生殖技术与儿童保育部门：口服避孕药和堕胎机会如何塑造劳动力构成与质量
papers.zh_abstract: 儿童保育劳动力的构成和质量可能对家庭生产与市场工作之间互补性的变化特别敏感。本文考察了20世纪60年代和70年代口服避孕药和堕胎机会的扩大是否影响了儿童保育劳动力的构成、质量和工资。利用各州-出生队列在获得这些生殖技术方面的差异，我们发现这些技术显著改变了儿童保育工作者的教育背景——增加了该部门中受教育程度较低女性的比例，同时减少了高学历工作者的份额。这种转变导致儿童保育劳动力的平均教育水平和工资下降。此外，获得避孕药和堕胎的机会在不同环境下对儿童保育就业的影响不同：以中心为基础的保育机构因更好的职业机会而流失了更多高技能工人，而以家庭为基础和私人家庭的保育机构则吸收了更多低技能女性，对她们而言，儿童保育可能仍然是一个可行的就业目的地。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，生殖自主权的增强，在扩大女性进入高技能和高薪职业机会的同时，也导致了技能劳动力从儿童保育领域的重新分配，这可能对服务质量、儿童发展和父母就业产生影响。

papers.title: Reassessing Qualitative Self-Assessments and Experimental Validation
papers.authors: Jonathan Chapman, Pietro Ortoleva, Erik Snowberg, Leeat Yariv, Colin Camerer
papers.abstract: Qualitative self-assessments of economic preferences have recently gained popularity, often supported by experimental validation, a method that links them to choices in incentivized elicitations. We illustrate theoretically that experimental validation may fail to produce reliable new measures. Empirically, analyzing data from over 13,000 participants across diverse samples, we document four key findings. First, qualitative self-assessments and traditional incentivized measures exhibit weak correlations, even when accounting for response noise. Second, qualitative self-assessments sometimes correlate more strongly with theoretically distinct incentivized elicitations than those for which they are intended to proxy. Third, relationships between qualitative self-assessments and various attributes---including geographical location, demographics, and behaviors---are unrelated to variation in incentivized elicitations. Fourth, qualitative self-assessments are no simpler for participants than incentivized elicitations: these questions show a common heuristic of extreme or midpoint responses, especially by individuals with lower cognitive ability.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：C90, C91, C93, D90
papers.zh_title: 重新评估定性自我评估与实验验证
papers.zh_abstract: 经济偏好的定性自我评估最近变得流行，通常得到实验验证的支持，这种方法将其与激励性诱导中的选择联系起来。我们从理论上说明，实验验证可能无法产生可靠的新度量。在实证方面，通过分析来自不同样本的超过13,000名参与者的数据，我们记录了四个关键发现。第一，定性自我评估与传统的激励性度量之间表现出弱相关性，即使在考虑响应噪声后也是如此。第二，定性自我评估有时与理论上不同的激励性诱导的相关性，比与它们旨在代理的激励性诱导的相关性更强。第三，定性自我评估与各种属性（包括地理位置、人口统计特征和行为）之间的关系，与激励性诱导的变异无关。第四，定性自我评估对参与者来说并不比激励性诱导更简单：这些问题显示出一种常见的极端或中点响应启发式，尤其是在认知能力较低的个体中。

papers.title: A Comprehensive GIS Database for China's Surface Transport Network with Implications for Transport and Socioeconomics Research
papers.authors: Steven J. Davis, Meijun Qian, Wen Zeng
papers.abstract: We build a granular GIS database that covers China’s national highways, modern motorways, traditional railways, high-speed railways, and waterways at an annual frequency from 1993 to 2020. Overall network length more than tripled after 1993, with half the increase accounted for by modern motorways and high-speed railways. Mean distance from zip-code centroids in China to nearest motorway access point fell from 302 km in 1993 to 15 km in 2020. Average within-county connectivity to the transport network rose sharply. We also show that discrepancies between distance to nearest motorway access point and straight-line distance to motorway routes are often large, and they correlate with calendar time, terrain features, and economic development. This finding raises concerns about the use of straight-line distance when estimating the causal effects of transport improvements. Our GIS database is freely available on an open-access basis, creating an empirical laboratory for new research in multiple directions.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, PE；JEL：L92, N75, O18, R40
papers.zh_title: 中国地面交通网络综合GIS数据库及其对交通与社会科学研究的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个精细的GIS数据库，涵盖了1993年至2020年期间中国国道、现代高速公路、传统铁路、高速铁路和水路的年度数据。1993年后，网络总长度增长了两倍多，其中一半的增长来自现代高速公路和高速铁路。中国邮政编码质心到最近高速公路接入点的平均距离从1993年的302公里下降到2020年的15公里。县域内与交通网络的平均连通性急剧上升。我们还发现，到最近高速公路接入点的距离与到高速公路路线的直线距离之间的差异通常很大，并且这种差异与日历时间、地形特征和经济发展水平相关。这一发现对使用直线距离来估计交通改善的因果效应提出了质疑。我们的GIS数据库以开放获取的方式免费提供，为多个方向的新研究创建了一个实证实验室。

papers.title: Workplace Stratification and Racial Health Disparities
papers.authors: Kurt J. Lavetti, Long Hong, Jonathan A. Holmes, Trevon D. Logan
papers.abstract: To what extent is a worker's relative rank within their workplace a determinant of health status, conditional on income? We provide the first US-based evidence on the relationship between relative workplace rank and health status for the near population of workers in one US state. Using a new linkage of commercial all-payer health insurance data to administrative earnings records for workers in Utah from 2013-2015, we quantify the impact of relative workplace rank on health status, the incidence of specific chronic diseases, and racial health disparities. We show that about 70% of SES-health gradient that is commonly interpreted as an income gradient actually operates through relative rank. For an average worker, moving from the 90th to the 10th percentile of within-firm rank holding fixed income, age, location, and health insurance characteristics is associated with a 16.5% increase in morbidity. The racial segregation of jobs in the US leads minority workers to be overrepresented in lower-ranked jobs within firms, which in turn exacerbates racial health disparities.
papers.zh_title: 工作场所分层与种族健康差异
papers.zh_abstract: 在控制收入的情况下，工人在其工作场所内的相对排名在多大程度上是健康状况的决定因素？我们提供了首个基于美国数据的证据，研究美国一个州近乎全体工人的相对工作场所排名与健康状况之间的关系。利用2013-2015年犹他州工人的商业全付款人健康保险数据与行政收入记录的新链接，我们量化了相对工作场所排名对健康状况、特定慢性病发病率以及种族健康差异的影响。我们表明，通常被解释为收入梯度的社会经济地位-健康梯度中，约有70%实际上是通过相对排名起作用的。对于一个普通工人而言，在固定收入、年龄、地点和健康保险特征的情况下，从公司内部排名的第90百分位移动到第10百分位，与发病率增加16.5%相关。美国工作的种族隔离导致少数族裔工人在公司内较低级别的职位中占比过高，这反过来又加剧了种族健康差异。

papers.title: Place-Based Policies of the European Union: Contrasts and Similarities to the US Experience
papers.authors: Peter R. Berkowitz, Michael Storper, Max Herbertson
papers.abstract: The European place-based policy framework was established in the European Treaties and has a current budget of $60-70 billion per year. This paper identifies key features and directions for its future development with respect to three place-based problems: traditionally lagging regions; contemporary distressed (or left-behind regions), including those facing the structural challenges of the energy transition; the challenge of spreading prosperity faced with the uneven geography of technological clusters and routine technology-based manufacturing. We analyze the place-based features of EU Cohesion Policy, its commonalities and differences with place-based policies in the US. We evaluate policies against a structural backdrop of long-term convergence in the two continents and the contemporary geography of spatial divergence, using both historical perspectives and recent policy evaluation evidence. Key differences are identified in policy programming, implementation, budgeting and time horizons. While there has been evidence of the reduction of disparities and regional reconversion as a result of place-based policies on both continents, there are also serious impediments to effective implementation in both. These limits have to do with how well policy is designed with respect to economic geography fundamentals as well as political economy and organizational problems in policy design, implementation and governance. The paper concludes by drawing some general lessons on the design of place based policies and examines some of the issues that are particularly relevant for Europe.
papers.zh_title: 欧盟的场所导向政策：与美国经验的对比与相似之处
papers.zh_abstract: 欧洲的场所导向政策框架建立在欧洲条约中，当前年度预算为600-700亿美元。本文针对三个场所导向问题，确定了其未来发展的关键特征和方向：传统落后地区；当代困境地区（或“被遗忘的地区”），包括那些面临能源转型结构性挑战的地区；面对技术集群和常规技术制造业地理分布不均的繁荣扩散挑战。我们分析了欧盟凝聚政策的场所导向特征，及其与美国场所导向政策的共性和差异。我们利用历史视角和近期政策评估证据，在两大洲长期趋同的结构性背景和当代空间分异的地理格局下评估政策。在政策规划、实施、预算编制和时间跨度方面发现了关键差异。虽然有证据表明，两大洲的场所导向政策都减少了差距并实现了区域转型，但两地在有效实施方面也存在严重障碍。这些限制与政策设计如何适应经济地理基本原理，以及政策设计、实施和治理中的政治经济学和组织问题有关。本文最后总结了场所导向政策设计的一些一般性经验教训，并考察了与欧洲特别相关的一些问题。

papers.title: Improving Childhood Immunization through Maternal Support: Evidence from a Randomized Intervention in Pakistan
papers.authors: Adeline L. Delavande, Areeba Shahab, Javed Younas, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: We evaluate the effectiveness of randomized interventions aimed at alleviating psychological barriers (maternal stress and difficulty visualizing the future) and addressing information frictions on early childhood immunization uptake in a sample of 2,145 mothers of infants in Pakistan. A phone-delivered intervention providing psychological support and visualization techniques to mothers increases the total number of vaccines received by young children by 0.3, or 7% of the control mean, one year after baseline. The impacts are larger for lower-income households. We also find that the intervention improves maternal knowledge, attitudes, and perceived returns to vaccination, highlighting the role of psychological support in shaping health behaviors. However, supplementing this intervention with vaccination-related information from influencers does not yield additional benefits.
papers.zh_title: 通过母亲支持改善儿童免疫接种：来自巴基斯坦一项随机干预的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了旨在缓解心理障碍（母亲压力和难以设想未来）以及解决信息摩擦的随机干预措施，对巴基斯坦2145名婴儿母亲样本中早期儿童免疫接种率的效果。一项通过电话提供的、为母亲提供心理支持和可视化技巧的干预措施，在基线调查一年后，使幼儿接种的疫苗总数增加了0.3剂，即对照组均值的7%。对低收入家庭的影响更大。我们还发现，该干预措施改善了母亲的知识、态度以及对疫苗接种回报的认知，突显了心理支持在塑造健康行为中的作用。然而，在干预措施中补充来自影响者的疫苗接种相关信息并未带来额外收益。

papers.title: Intergenerational Mobility of Immigrants in 15 Destination Countries
papers.authors: Leah Boustan, Mathias Fjællegaard Jensen, Ran Abramitzky, Elisa Jácome, Alan Manning, Santiago Pérez, Analysia Watley, Adrian Adermon, Jaime Arellano-Bover, Olof Åslund, Marie Connolly, Nathan Deutscher, Anne C. Gielen, Yvonne Giesing, Yajna Govind, Martin Halla, Dominik Hangartner, Yuyan Jiang, Cecilia Karmel, Fanny Landaud, Lindsey Macmillan, Isabel Z. Martínez, Alberto Polo, Panu Poutvaara, Hillel Rapoport, Sara Roman, Kjell G. Salvanes, Shmuel San, Michael Siegenthaler, Louis Sirugue, Javier Soria Espín, Jan Stuhler, Giovanni L. Violante, Dinand Webbink, Andrea Weber, Jonathan Zhang, Angela Zheng, Tom Zohar
papers.abstract: We estimate intergenerational mobility of immigrants and their children in fifteen receiving countries. We document large income gaps for first-generation immigrants that diminish in the second generation. Around half of the second-generation gap can be explained by differences in parental income, with the remainder due to differential rates of absolute mobility. The daughters of immigrants enjoy higher absolute mobility than daughters of locals in most destinations, while immigrant sons primarily enjoy this advantage in countries with long histories of immigration. Cross-country differences in absolute mobility are not driven by parental country-of-origin, but instead by destination labor markets and immigration policy.
papers.zh_title: 15个目的地国家移民的代际流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了移民及其子女在十五个接收国的代际流动性。我们记录了第一代移民存在较大的收入差距，这一差距在第二代中有所缩小。大约一半的第二代差距可以由父母收入的差异来解释，其余部分则归因于绝对流动性的差异率。在大多数目的地，移民女儿比本地人女儿享有更高的绝对流动性，而移民儿子的这一优势主要存在于具有长期移民历史的国家。绝对流动性的跨国差异并非由父母的来源国驱动，而是由目的地劳动力市场和移民政策决定。

papers.title: The Value of Clean Water: Experimental Evidence from Rural India
papers.authors: Fiona Burlig, Amir Jina, Anant Sudarshan
papers.abstract: Over 2 billion people lack clean drinking water. Existing solutions face high costs (piped water) or low demand (point-of-use chlorine). Using a 60,000 household cluster-randomized experiment we test an increasingly popular alternative: decentralized treatment and home delivery of clean water to the rural poor. At low prices, take-up exceeds 90 percent, sustained throughout the experiment. High prices reduce take-up but are privately profitable. Self-reported health measures improve. We experimentally recover revealed-preference measures of valuation. Willingness-to-pay is several times higher than prior indirect estimates; willingness-to-accept is larger and exceeds marginal cost. On a cost-per-disability-adjusted-life-year basis, free water delivery regimes appear highly cost-effective.
papers.zh_title: 清洁用水的价值：来自印度农村的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 超过20亿人缺乏清洁饮用水。现有解决方案要么成本高昂（管道供水），要么需求低迷（家用氯消毒）。我们利用一个涉及60,000户家庭的整群随机实验，测试了一种日益流行的替代方案：分散式处理并将清洁水送到农村贫困家庭。在低价时，接受率超过90%，并在整个实验期间得以维持。高价降低了接受率，但私人盈利。自我报告的健康指标有所改善。我们通过实验获得了基于显示性偏好的估值度量。支付意愿比先前的间接估计高出数倍；接受意愿更高，且超过了边际成本。按每残疾调整生命年成本计算，免费送水制度似乎具有很高的成本效益。

papers.title: Are there too Few Publicly Listed Firms in the US?
papers.authors: Craig Doidge, G. Andrew Karolyi, Kris Shen, René M. Stulz
papers.abstract: Doidge, Karolyi, and Stulz (2017) show that from 1999 to 2012 the US develops a listing gap relative to other countries, meaning that it has abnormally few publicly listed firms. In this paper, we update their evidence to 2023 and find that the listing gap increases, but at a low rate. By 2023, the US has about half as many listed firms per capita as other developed countries. We discuss some of the important questions raised by the existence and increase of the listing gap to which we hope researchers will find answers.
papers.zh_title: 美国公开上市公司是否太少？
papers.zh_abstract: Doidge, Karolyi和Stulz (2017) 表明，从1999年到2012年，美国相对于其他国家出现了上市缺口，这意味着其公开上市公司数量异常少。在本文中，我们将他们的证据更新至2023年，发现上市缺口在扩大，但速度较低。到2023年，美国人均上市公司数量约为其他发达国家的一半。我们讨论了上市缺口的存在和扩大所引发的一些重要问题，希望研究者能找到答案。

papers.title: The Curious Surge of Productivity in U.S. Restaurants
papers.authors: Austan Goolsbee, Chad Syverson, Rebecca Goldgof, Joe Tatarka
papers.abstract: We document that, after remaining almost constant for almost 30 years, real labor productivity at U.S. restaurants surged over 15% during the COVID pandemic. This surge has persisted even as many conditions have returned to pre-pandemic levels. Using mobile phone data tracking visits and spending at more than 100,000 individual limited service restaurants across the country, we explore the potential sources of the surge. It cannot be explained by economies of scale, expanding market power, or a direct result of COVID-sourced demand fluctuations.
