The restaurants’ productivity growth rates are strongly correlated, however, with reductions in the amount of time their customers spend in the establishments, particularly with a rising share of customers spending 10 minutes or less. The frequency of such ‘take-out’ customers rose considerably during COVID, even at fast food restaurants, and never went back down. The magnitude of the restaurant-level relationship between productivity and customer dwell time, if applied to the aggregate decrease in dwell time, can explain almost all of the aggregate productivity increase in our sample.
papers.zh_title: 美国餐饮业生产率的神秘激增
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录到，在保持了近30年几乎不变之后，美国餐饮业的实际劳动生产率在新冠疫情期间激增了超过15%。即使许多条件已恢复到疫情前水平，这一激增仍然持续。利用追踪全国超过10万家有限服务餐厅的访问量和消费额的手机数据，我们探讨了这一激增的潜在来源。它无法用规模经济、市场势力扩张或新冠疫情引发的需求波动的直接结果来解释。然而，餐厅的生产率增长率与其顾客在店内停留时间的减少密切相关，特别是停留时间在10分钟或以下的顾客比例上升。这类“外卖”顾客的频率在疫情期间大幅上升，即使在快餐店也是如此，并且再也没有回落。如果将餐厅层面生产率与顾客停留时间之间关系的幅度应用于总体停留时间的减少，几乎可以解释我们样本中全部的生产率增长。

papers.title: The Unintended Consequences of Rebalancing
papers.authors: Campbell R. Harvey, Michele G. Mazzoleni, Alessandro Melone
papers.abstract: Institutional investors engage in trillions of dollars of regular portfolio rebalancing, often based on calendar schedules or deviations from allocation targets. We document that such rebalancing has a market-wide impact and generates predictable price patterns. When stocks are overweight, funds sell stocks and buy bonds, leading to a decrease in equity returns of 17 basis points over the next day. Our results are robust to controls for momentum, reversals, and macroeconomic information. Importantly, we estimate that current rebalancing practices cost investors about $16 billion annually – or $200 per U.S. household. Moreover, the predictability of these trades enables certain market participants to profit by front-running the orders of large institutional funds. While rebalancing remains a fundamental tool for investors, our findings highlight the costs associated with prevailing strategies and emphasize the need for innovative approaches to mitigate these costs.
papers.zh_title: 再平衡的非预期后果
papers.zh_abstract: 机构投资者进行着数万亿美元的定期投资组合再平衡，通常基于日历时间表或偏离配置目标的情况。我们记录了这种再平衡具有市场范围的影响，并产生了可预测的价格模式。当股票超配时，基金会卖出股票并买入债券，导致次日股票收益率下降17个基点。我们的结果在控制了动量、反转和宏观经济信息后依然稳健。重要的是，我们估计当前的再平衡做法每年给投资者造成约160亿美元的损失——即每个美国家庭200美元。此外，这些交易的可预测性使得某些市场参与者能够通过抢先于大型机构基金的订单而获利。虽然再平衡仍然是投资者的基本工具，但我们的发现突显了现行策略相关的成本，并强调了需要创新方法来减轻这些成本。

papers.title: Labor, Loans and Leisure: The Impact of the Student Loan Payment Pause
papers.authors: Diego A. Briones, Sarah Turner
papers.abstract: Beginning in March 2020 and ultimately continuing to September 2023, most student loan borrowers had their required payments on federal student loans paused. For student loan borrowers with limited access to credit, the payment pause provided additional cash-on-hand that may have allowed them to reduce their work hours. Using survey data capturing individual finances, monthly work characteristics and educational attainment, we find that suspended student debt payments reduced average weekly hours worked by 1.34 (-4%) over a 10-month period with declines concentrated among workers who had not completed a college degree. For borrowers who had completed a college degree or graduate degree, there is no evidence that the payment pause changed employment or hours worked. These findings are consistent with consumer finance data showing that borrower households without a college degree are approximately twice as likely to report liquidity constraints relative to more educated households with federal student debt.
papers.zh_title: 劳动、贷款与休闲：学生贷款还款暂停的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 从2020年3月开始，并最终持续到2023年9月，大多数学生贷款借款人的联邦学生贷款还款被暂停。对于信贷渠道有限的学生贷款借款人而言，还款暂停提供了额外的现金，这可能使他们能够减少工作时间。利用捕捉个人财务状况、月度工作特征和教育程度的调查数据，我们发现，暂停学生债务支付在10个月内使平均每周工作时间减少了1.34小时（-4%），这一下降主要集中在未完成大学学位的工人中。对于已完成大学学位或研究生学位的借款人，没有证据表明还款暂停改变了就业状况或工作时间。这些发现与消费者金融数据一致，该数据显示，与持有联邦学生债务且受教育程度更高的家庭相比，没有大学学位的借款人家庭报告流动性约束的可能性大约是其两倍。

papers.title: Skills, Migration and Urban Amenities over the Life Cycle
papers.authors: David Albouy, R. Jason Faberman
papers.abstract: We examine sorting behavior across metropolitan areas by skill over individuals’ life cycles. We show that high-skill workers disproportionately sort into high-amenity areas, but do so relatively early in life. Workers of all skill levels tend to move towards lower-amenity areas during their thirties and forties. Consequently, individuals’ time use and expenditures on activities related to local amenities are U-shaped over the life cycle. This contrasts with well-documented life-cycle consumption profiles, which have an opposite inverted-U shape. We present evidence that the move towards lower-amenity (and lower-cost) metropolitan areas is driven by changes in the number of household children over the life cycle: individuals, particularly the college educated, tend to move towards lower-amenity areas after having their first child. We develop an equilibrium model of location choice, labor supply, and amenity consumption and introduce life-cycle changes in household composition that affect leisure preferences, consumption choices, and required home production time. Key to the model is a complementarity between leisure time spent going out and local amenities, which we estimate to be large and significant. Ignoring this complementarity and the distinction between types of leisure misses the dampening effect child rearing has on urban agglomeration. Since the value of local amenities is capitalized into housing prices, individuals will tend to move to lower-cost locations to avoid paying for amenities they are not consuming.
papers.zh_title: 生命周期中的技能、迁移与城市便利设施
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了个人生命周期中按技能水平在大都市区域间的分类行为。我们表明，高技能工人不成比例地分类到高便利设施区域，但这是在生命相对早期进行的。所有技能水平的工人在三十多岁和四十多岁时都倾向于迁移到低便利设施区域。因此，个人在与当地便利设施相关的活动上的时间使用和支出在生命周期中呈U形。这与有据可查的生命周期消费曲线形成对比，后者呈相反的倒U形。我们提供的证据表明，向低便利设施（且低成本）大都市区域的迁移是由生命周期中家庭孩子数量的变化驱动的：个人，尤其是受过大学教育的人，在有了第一个孩子后倾向于迁移到低便利设施区域。我们开发了一个关于地点选择、劳动力供给和便利设施消费的均衡模型，并引入了家庭构成的周期性变化，这些变化影响休闲偏好、消费选择和所需的家庭生产时间。该模型的关键在于外出休闲时间与当地便利设施之间的互补性，我们估计这种互补性很大且显著。忽略这种互补性以及不同类型休闲之间的区别，就会忽略养育子女对城市集聚的抑制作用。由于当地便利设施的价值被资本化到房价中，个人倾向于迁移到低成本地点，以避免为他们没有消费的便利设施付费。

papers.title: Banking on Technology: Bank Technology Adoption and Its Effects
papers.authors: Sheila Jiang, Alessandro Rebucci, Gang Zhang
papers.abstract: We develop and estimate a new model of endogenous growth in bank efficiency and firm productivity in which banks adopt technology embedded in capital goods produced by entrepreneurs, and agents choose whether to become workers or capital-good-producing entrepreneurs. In this framework, bank efficiency influences firm productivity by affecting agents' occupational choices, while firm productivity affects bank efficiency through the relative price of capital goods. We find that increasing technology adoption in the banking system to the level in the top half of the distribution in the data accelerates the economy's long-term growth from 2% to 2.17%. We also find that empirical evidence based on U.S. bank, metropolitan, and state-level data is consistent with the critical mechanisms of our model.
papers.zh_title: 押注技术：银行技术采纳及其影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发并估计了一个新的模型，该模型描述了银行效率和公司生产率的内生增长，其中银行采纳嵌入在企业家生产的资本品中的技术，并且代理人选择成为工人还是生产资本品的企业家。在这个框架中，银行效率通过影响代理人的职业选择来影响公司生产率，而公司生产率通过资本品的相对价格影响银行效率。我们发现，将银行系统的技术采纳水平提高到数据分布上半部分的水平，会使经济的长期增长率从2%加速到2.17%。我们还发现，基于美国银行、大都市和州级数据的经验证据与我们模型的关键机制是一致的。

papers.title: The Road Not Taken: How Driving Distance and Appointment Availability Shape the Effects of Abortion Bans
papers.authors: Daniel L. Dench, Caitlin K. Myers, Mayra Pineda-Torres
papers.abstract: We use difference-in-differences research designs to estimate the effects of abortion bans on births at the county level, leveraging data on changes in driving distance to the nearest facility and appointment availability at facilities in the destination city. We find that the effects of abortion bans operate mainly through distance. In counties where the closest abortion facility was 50 miles away pre-Dobbs, a total ban is estimated to increase births by 0.8-1.0% if distance does not change, but by 2.1%-2.2% if distance rises to 300 miles—corresponding to the increase experienced by the average resident of a ban state. We also find that 6-week gestational age limits are nearly as impactful as total bans, underscoring the substantial burden these regulations impose. Limited appointment availability in destination cities modestly amplifies these effects. We do not observe evidence that the effects of bans on fertility have diminished over time, despite expansions in logistical, financial, and telehealth abortion support, underscoring the persistent role that geographic barriers play in abortion access.
papers.zh_title: 未选择的路：驾驶距离与预约可用性如何塑造堕胎禁令的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用双重差分研究设计，利用前往最近设施驾驶距离的变化以及目的地城市设施预约可用性的数据，在县级层面估计堕胎禁令对生育率的影响。我们发现，堕胎禁令的影响主要通过距离发挥作用。在多布斯案判决前，在距离最近堕胎设施50英里的县，如果距离不变，全面禁令预计将使生育率增加0.8-1.0%；但如果距离增加到300英里——相当于禁令州居民平均经历的增加幅度——则生育率将增加2.1%-2.2%。我们还发现，6周胎龄限制几乎与全面禁令一样具有影响力，这凸显了这些规定所带来的沉重负担。目的地城市有限的预约可用性会适度放大这些影响。我们没有观察到禁令对生育率的影响随时间减弱的证据，尽管后勤、财务和远程医疗堕胎支持有所扩大，这凸显了地理障碍在堕胎可及性中持续发挥的作用。

papers.title: Competition and Consumer Discrimination
papers.authors: Maggie E.C. Jones, Trevon D. Logan, David Rosé, Lisa D. Cook
papers.abstract: This paper studies consumer discrimination while taking into consideration the role of competition between firms, providing one of the first large-scale comprehensive analyses of consumer discrimination and market forces. We formally model consumer discrimination, where some majority-group members dislike consuming alongside minorities. In equilibrium, the non-discriminatory-to-discriminatory firm ratio is proportional to the minority-to-majority consumer ratio. Empirically, we examine how local changes in the composition of consumers altered business incentives to discriminate during the decades leading up to the passage of the Civil Rights Act of 1964. Using a nationwide data source of non-discriminatory businesses in three different industries and a research design that leverages two sources of exogenous variation in the ratio of Black-to-White consumers, we find that increases in non-discrimination were concentrated in the least competitive markets, where the threat of defection by White consumers to competing firms was lowest. We assemble new data on over 25,000 prices charged at establishments by discriminatory status and show that non-discriminatory firms charged higher prices than discriminatory firms in the same local market. Consistent with our theoretical model, this finding arises because the effects of greater competition among the more numerous discriminatory firms outweighed the discrimination markup. The results imply that monopoly power blunted the influence of consumer preferences and that Black consumers were harmed through higher prices in the non-discriminatory market.
papers.zh_title: 竞争与消费者歧视
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在研究消费者歧视的同时，考虑了企业间竞争的作用，提供了首批大规模、全面的消费者歧视与市场力量分析之一。我们正式构建了消费者歧视模型，其中一些多数群体成员不喜欢与少数群体成员一起消费。在均衡状态下，非歧视性企业与歧视性企业的比例与少数群体消费者与多数群体消费者的比例成正比。在实证方面，我们考察了在1964年《民权法案》通过前的几十年里，消费者构成的局部变化如何改变了企业的歧视激励。利用涵盖三个不同行业的全国性非歧视性企业数据源，以及利用黑人与白人消费者比例的两个外生变异来源的研究设计，我们发现非歧视性的增加集中在竞争最不激烈的市场，在这些市场中，白人消费者叛逃到竞争对手企业的威胁最低。我们根据歧视状态收集了超过25,000个企业定价的新数据，并表明在同一本地市场中，非歧视性企业的定价高于歧视性企业。与我们的理论模型一致，这一发现的出现是因为数量更多的歧视性企业之间更激烈的竞争效应超过了歧视加价。结果表明，垄断力量削弱了消费者偏好的影响，并且黑人消费者因非歧视性市场中的更高价格而受到损害。

papers.title: Greenhouse Gases Resulting from Grid-Connected Electricity Demand: Three Pillars and Scope Two
papers.authors: Karl Dunkle Werner, Arik Levinson
papers.abstract: Many governments and businesses would like to minimize or eliminate the greenhouse gases that result from their purchases of power from electricity grids. Because electricity flows cannot be traced from purchasers back to specific generators, some regulators and users have proposed an approximation. Purchasers would be credited with using clean power if they contract for electricity generated by particular zero-carbon suppliers to the grid or purchase certificates accompanying that zero-carbon generation, so long as those arrangements meet three conditions, or “pillars”: The associated clean power must be generated (1) nearby, (2) during the same hour, and (3) from newly constructed power plants. Whether or not the three pillars are followed, existing or planned electricity generation meeting all three conditions is expected to account for 10 percent of US power in 2030. We show that the qualifying power would be cleaner than average, but not zero-carbon. Electricity purchases meeting the restrictions will have incremental emissions per megawatt hour 30 to 43 percent below unrestricted average emissions per megawatt hour. The three pillars could have additional climate benefits if demand for clean power exceeds the restricted supply, resulting in less total electricity demand or encouraging construction of new clean electricity capacity.
papers.zh_title: 并网电力需求产生的温室气体：三大支柱与范围二
papers.zh_abstract: 许多政府和企业希望最小化或消除其从电网购电所产生的温室气体。由于电力流无法从购买者追溯到特定发电商，一些监管机构和用户提出了一种近似方法。如果购买者与向电网供电的特定零碳发电商签订合同，或购买伴随该零碳发电的证书，并且这些安排满足三个条件或“支柱”，则购买者将被视为使用了清洁电力。这三个条件是：相关的清洁电力必须（1）在附近，（2）在同一小时内，以及（3）由新建的发电厂产生。无论是否遵循三大支柱，满足所有三个条件的现有或计划中的发电量预计将在2030年占美国电力的10%。我们表明，符合条件的电力将比平均水平更清洁，但并非零碳。满足这些限制条件的电力购买，其每兆瓦时的增量排放量将比不受限制的平均每兆瓦时排放量低30%至43%。如果对清洁电力的需求超过受限供应，导致总电力需求减少或鼓励新建清洁电力产能，那么三大支柱可能会带来额外的气候效益。

papers.title: Financing the Adoption of Clean Technology
papers.authors: Andrea Lanteri, Adriano A. Rampini
papers.abstract: We analyze the adoption of clean technology by heterogeneous firms subject to financing constraints. In the model, capital goods differ in terms of their energy needs and age. In equilibrium, cleaner and newer capital requires more financial resources. Therefore, financial constraints induce an endogenous pattern in clean technology adoption: Financially constrained, smaller firms optimally invest in dirtier and older capital than unconstrained, larger firms. The model is consistent with the empirical patterns of technology adoption we document using data on commercial shipping fleets. We use a calibrated version of our model to simulate the aggregate transition dynamics to cleaner technology.
papers.zh_title: 为清洁技术采用提供融资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了面临融资约束的异质性企业对清洁技术的采用。在模型中，资本品在能源需求和年限方面存在差异。在均衡状态下，更清洁、更新的资本需要更多的金融资源。因此，金融约束在清洁技术采用中引发了一种内生模式：与不受约束的大型企业相比，受金融约束的小型企业最优地投资于更脏、更旧的资本。该模型与我们使用商业船队数据记录的关于技术采用的经验模式一致。我们使用模型的校准版本模拟向清洁技术过渡的总体动态。

papers.title: Equity Prices, Market Power, and Optimal Corporate Tax Policy
papers.authors: Ignacio González, Juan A. Montecino, Joseph E. Stiglitz
papers.abstract: We study the optimal design of corporate tax policy in a textbook life-cycle model featuring two key deviations: (i) firms are imperfectly competitive and (ii) households save by purchasing equity shares in a stock market. In this simple environment, the financial wealth of savers is equal to the sum of the productive capital owned by firms and a component capturing the NPV of unproductive rents – what we term “market power wealth” (MPW). We show that this novel component has non-trivial macroeconomic effects, with important implications for optimal corporate tax policy. In particular, MPW significantly crowds out productive investment and accordingly can rationalize a high corporate tax rate. The optimal corporate tax code in our setting assigns the statutory corporate tax rate to target the financial value of pure profits while incentivizing capital accumulation with a partial expensing of firm investment costs.
papers.zh_title: 股票价格、市场势力与最优公司税政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个教科书式的生命周期模型中公司税政策的最优设计，该模型包含两个关键偏离：(i) 企业是不完全竞争的，(ii) 家庭通过购买股票市场上的股权份额进行储蓄。在这个简单的环境中，储蓄者的金融财富等于企业拥有的生产性资本与一个捕捉非生产性租金净现值的组成部分之和——我们称之为“市场势力财富”（MPW）。我们表明，这个新的组成部分具有非平凡的宏观经济效应，对最优公司税政策有重要影响。特别是，MPW显著挤出了生产性投资，因此可以合理化高公司税率。在我们的设定中，最优公司税法典将法定公司税率用于瞄准纯利润的金融价值，同时通过部分费用化企业投资成本来激励资本积累。

papers.title: From Access to Achievement: The Primary School-Age Impacts of an At-Scale Preschool Construction Program in Highly Deprived Communities
papers.authors: Marina Bassi, Bruno Besbas, Lelys I. Dinarte Diaz, Saravana Ravindran, Ana Reynoso
papers.abstract: Using a randomized control trial, this paper studies an at-scale preschool construction program that serves poor communities in rural Mozambique. We show that the program significantly increased preschool enrollment in treated communities by 73 percentage points, from a small base of 2 percent of children enrolled in preschool in control communities. The program also had significant positive effects on enrollment in and progression through primary school, with an increase of 6 percentage points in enrollment in first grade at age 6, and a 0.16 standard deviation impact on an index of cognitive and social-emotional skills measured at primary school-age. The impacts are concentrated among children of less educated parents, in less poor households, and living closer to the preschools. We also find that enrollment in preschool is an important direct mechanism for primary school success. Finally, the program caused parents in treated communities to invest more time in supporting their primary school-aged children and increased preschool enrollment of younger siblings. Our paper shows that even in a context of extreme vulnerability, a preschool construction program can be implemented in a cost-effective way and significantly improve child development for the founding and future generations.
papers.zh_title: 从入学到成就：一项大规模幼儿园建设项目在高度贫困社区对小学年龄阶段的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用一项随机对照试验，研究了一个服务于莫桑比克农村贫困社区的大规模幼儿园建设项目。我们表明，该计划使受干预社区的幼儿园入学率显著提高了73个百分点，而对照组社区中仅有2%的儿童入学。该计划还对小学入学和升学产生了显著的积极影响，使6岁儿童一年级入学率提高了6个百分点，并对小学年龄阶段测量的认知和社交情感技能指数产生了0.16个标准差的影响。这些影响集中在父母受教育程度较低、家庭贫困程度较轻以及居住地离幼儿园较近的儿童中。我们还发现，幼儿园入学是小学成功的一个重要直接机制。最后，该计划促使受干预社区的父母投入更多时间支持他们上小学的孩子，并增加了弟弟妹妹的幼儿园入学率。我们的论文表明，即使在极端脆弱的背景下，幼儿园建设项目也可以以成本效益高的方式实施，并显著改善创始一代和未来几代人的儿童发展。

papers.title: Malthusian Migrations
papers.authors: Guillaume Blanc, Romain Wacziarg
papers.abstract: For most of human history, until the fertility transition, technological progress translated into larger populations, preventing sustained improvements in living standards. We argue that migration offered an escape valve from these Malthusian dynamics after the European discovery and colonization of the Americas. We document a strong relationship between fertility and migration across countries, regions, individuals, and periods, in a variety of datasets and specifications, and with different identification strategies. During the Age of Mass Migration, persistently high fertility across much of Europe created a large reservoir of surplus labor that could find better opportunities in the New World. These migrations, by relieving demographic pressures, accelerated the transition to modern growth.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, POL；JEL：F22, J13, N33, O11
papers.zh_title: 马尔萨斯式移民
papers.zh_abstract: 在人类历史的大部分时间里，直到生育率转型之前，技术进步转化为更多的人口，阻碍了生活水平的持续提高。我们认为，在欧洲发现并殖民美洲之后，移民为摆脱这些马尔萨斯动态提供了一个出口。我们利用多种数据集、不同设定和识别策略，在国家、地区、个人和时期层面，记录了生育率与移民之间的强相关关系。在大规模移民时代，欧洲大部分地区持续的高生育率创造了一个庞大的剩余劳动力蓄水池，这些人可以在新大陆找到更好的机会。这些移民通过缓解人口压力，加速了向现代增长的转型。

papers.title: ‘Invest!’: Liberty Bonds and Stock Ownership over the Twentieth Century
papers.authors: Gillian Brunet, Eric Hilt, Matthew S. Jaremski
papers.abstract: The Liberty Bond drives of World War I were nation-wide interventions aimed at increasing financial literacy and associating bond ownership with patriotism. Using data from the first year of the Survey of Consumer Finances, 1947, through 1971, we investigate whether exposure to the drives shaped investing behavior over the long run. We find that households residing in counties that had high Liberty Bond participation had greater stock and bond ownership rates in later decades, and held more favorable opinions towards retirement saving and stock investment. These effects are present only among cohorts actually exposed to the bond drives, and not among younger cohorts in the same counties, and are robust to an instrumental variables specification that takes advantage of differences in the way the bond drives were conducted. Our estimates imply that household stock ownership rates would have been about 20% lower in the late 1960s if the bond drives had not been conducted.
papers.zh_title: “投资！”：自由债券与二十世纪的股票所有权
papers.zh_abstract: 第一次世界大战的自由债券运动是全国性的干预措施，旨在提高金融素养并将债券所有权与爱国主义联系起来。利用1947年至1971年消费者金融调查第一年的数据，我们研究了接触这些运动是否长期塑造了投资行为。我们发现，在自由债券参与率高的县，其居民在随后几十年中拥有股票和债券的比例更高，并且对退休储蓄和股票投资持有更积极的看法。这些影响仅存在于实际接触过债券运动的群体中，而不存在于同一县内的较年轻群体中，并且对于利用债券运动实施方式差异的工具变量设定是稳健的。我们的估计表明，如果没有进行债券运动，20世纪60年代末的家庭股票持有率将低约20%。

papers.title: A Model of Global Currency Pricing
papers.authors: Michael B. Devereux, Rui Lu, Kang Shi, Juanyi (Jenny) Xu
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a concept of a global currency and introduces a “global currency pricing” (GCP) specification into a standard N-country open economy macroeconomic model. A global currency is defined as a virtual unit of account that is exclusively used for international trade invoicing and is formed as a basket of individual currencies, similar to the existing SDR. We describe the pattern of exchange rate pass-through and real allocations under a global currency and derive optimal monetary policies under each specification. We show there is a unique welfare optimal composition of a global currency that weights currencies according to their importance in international trade. A striking implication is that under this global currency design, the monetary policy of each country should be concerned solely with domestic shocks. No country should have more than a 50 percent weight in an optimal global currency. The optimal configuration of the global currency applies whether or not there is international policy cooperation. Applying the model to a sample of 20 world countries and currencies, we find that all countries can gain in welfare from a shift out of dollar currency pricing (DCP) to GCP.
papers.zh_title: 全球货币定价模型
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个全球货币的概念，并将“全球货币定价”（GCP）设定引入标准的N国开放经济宏观经济模型。全球货币被定义为一种虚拟的记账单位，专门用于国际贸易计价，并由一篮子单一货币组成，类似于现有的特别提款权（SDR）。我们描述了全球货币下汇率传递和实际分配的模式，并推导出每种设定下的最优货币政策。我们表明，存在一个独特的福利最优的全球货币构成，该构成根据各国货币在国际贸易中的重要性进行加权。一个引人注目的含义是，在这种全球货币设计下，每个国家的货币政策应仅关注国内冲击。在最优全球货币中，任何国家的权重都不应超过50%。无论是否存在国际政策合作，全球货币的最优配置都适用。将该模型应用于20个世界国家和货币的样本，我们发现所有国家都可以从从美元定价（DCP）转向全球货币定价（GCP）中获得福利收益。

papers.title: On the Economic Infeasibility of Personalized Medicine, and a Solution.
papers.authors: Marina Chiara Garassino, Kunle Odunsi, Marciano Siniscalchi, Pietro Veronesi
papers.abstract: Technological advances and genomic sequencing opened the road to personalized medicine: specialized therapies targeted to patients displaying specific molecular alterations. For instance, targeted therapies are now available for 50% of lung cancer patients—with some alterations affecting less than 1% of patients—greatly increasing life expectancy. In an investment model of drug development, we show that current institutions mandating experimentation and approval of individual therapies eventually disincentivize investments in personalized medicine as researchers identify increasingly rare alterations. Recent AI-based technologies, such as AlphaFold3, make personalized medicine viable when regulatory approval regards the process for drug discovery rather than individual therapies.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EH, PR；JEL：I11, I18, O32, O38
papers.zh_title: 论个性化医疗的经济不可行性及解决方案
papers.zh_abstract: 技术进步和基因组测序为个性化医疗开辟了道路：针对表现出特定分子改变的患者进行专门治疗。例如，目前50%的肺癌患者可获得靶向治疗——其中一些改变影响不到1%的患者——这大大延长了预期寿命。在一个药物开发的投资模型中，我们表明，当前要求对个体疗法进行实验和批准的机构，随着研究人员识别出越来越罕见的改变，最终会抑制对个性化医疗的投资。最近的基于人工智能的技术，如AlphaFold3，当监管批准针对的是药物发现过程而非个体疗法时，使得个性化医疗变得可行。

papers.title: Same As it Ever Was: Gender, Race, and Ethnicity Differences in Promotion for Academic Economists
papers.authors: Donna K. Ginther, Shulamit Kahn, Daria Milakhina
papers.abstract: Using data from Academic Analytics 2009-2022 linked to publications and multiple approaches of identifying race, we examine gender and racial/ethnicity differentials in promotion of economists in economics and non-economics departments. Results are mixed. The share of Black economists remains at 3%. Huge gender penalties in promotion to both associate and full not explained by productivity continue in economics departments. There are no gender penalties in promotion to associate for economists in non-economics departments, although some in promotion to full. There are hardly any significant racial penalties in promotion to either rank, although statistical significance is difficult with such small samples.
papers.zh_title: 一如既往：学术经济学家的晋升中的性别、种族与民族差异
papers.zh_abstract: 利用2009-2022年学术分析数据，结合出版物和多种识别种族的方法，我们研究了经济学系和非经济学系中经济学家在晋升方面的性别和种族/民族差异。结果好坏参半。黑人经济学家的比例保持在3%。在经济学系中，晋升为副教授和正教授方面存在巨大的、无法由生产力解释的性别惩罚。在非经济学系中，经济学家晋升为副教授没有性别惩罚，但在晋升为正教授方面存在一些惩罚。在晋升至任一职称方面，几乎不存在显著的种族惩罚，尽管由于样本量如此之小，统计显著性难以实现。

papers.title: An Evaluation of the Alief Independent School District Jumpstart Program: Using a Model to Recover Mechanisms from an RCT
papers.authors: Flavio Cunha, Qinyou Hu, Andrea Salvati, Kenneth Wolpin, Rui Zeng
papers.abstract: This paper evaluates the Jumpstart Program (JSP), a parenting intervention implemented by a school district in the Houston area to enhance school readiness among economically disadvantaged three-year-old children. Unlike many early childhood programs typically tested in controlled research settings, JSP leverages existing school district resources for scalability and practical application. We conducted a three-year randomized controlled trial to measure the program’s impact on child cognitive outcomes, parental engagement, and mechanisms of change. The results indicate improvements in children’s performance on curriculum-aligned assessments and modest gains in general cognitive readiness as measured by the Bracken School Readiness Assessment. Furthermore, treatment group parents demonstrated increased reading frequency with their children, underscoring enhanced parental involvement as a crucial mechanism behind the program’s success. We employed a structural model to analyze both the direct effects of JSP and its indirect effects through changes in the marginal productivity of investments or preferences via habit formation. Our analysis concludes that 75% of the program’s impact is attributed to direct effects, while 25% is mediated through changes in habit formation in parental investments. Our research underscores the potential of scalable, real-world interventions to bridge socio-economic gaps in early childhood development and inform the design of effective educational policies.
papers.zh_title: 对Alief独立学区Jumpstart项目的评估：使用模型从随机对照试验中恢复机制
papers.zh_abstract: 本文评估了Jumpstart项目（JSP），这是由休斯顿地区一个学区实施的旨在提高经济弱势三岁儿童入学准备程度的育儿干预措施。与许多通常在受控研究环境中测试的早期儿童项目不同，JSP利用现有学区资源以实现可扩展性和实际应用。我们进行了一项为期三年的随机对照试验，以衡量该项目对儿童认知结果、家长参与度以及变化机制的影响。结果表明，儿童在与课程一致的评估中的表现有所改善，并且通过Bracken入学准备评估衡量的通用认知准备度有适度提高。此外，干预组家长与孩子一起阅读的频率增加，这突显了增强的家长参与是该项目成功背后的关键机制。我们采用了一个结构模型来分析JSP的直接效应以及通过习惯养成改变投资边际生产力或偏好的间接效应。我们的分析得出结论，项目影响的75%归因于直接效应，而25%是通过家长投资习惯养成的变化来中介的。我们的研究强调了可扩展的、现实世界的干预措施在弥合早期儿童发展中的社会经济差距以及为有效教育政策设计提供信息方面的潜力。

papers.title: The Short-Run Effects of Congestion Pricing in New York City
papers.authors: Cody Cook, Aboudy Kreidieh, Shoshana Vasserman, Hunt Allcott, Neha Arora, Freek van Sambeek, Andrew Tomkins, Eray Turkel
papers.abstract: We study the impacts of New York City’s Central Business District (CBD) Tolling Program, the first cordon-based congestion pricing scheme in the United States. Using a generalized synthetic controls design, we find that the policy increased speeds on CBD roads by 11%, with little-to-no effect on air quality, transactions at shops and restaurants, or overall foot traffic in the CBD. Speeds also increased on roads outside the CBD that are commonly traversed by drivers headed to/from the CBD. These spillovers lead to faster trips throughout the metro area, including for many unpriced trips. We develop a simple model to bound the driver welfare effects, and estimate gains of at least $14.3 million/week (before any revenue recycling). These gains are largely driven by diffuse time savings for the many unpriced trips outside the CBD, highlighting the importance of accounting for network-wide spillovers. Finally, we show how characteristics of local travel patterns and road networks can inform the potential impacts of introducing cordon-based congestion pricing in other cities.
papers.zh_title: 纽约市拥堵收费的短期效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了纽约市中央商务区（CBD）收费计划的影响，这是美国首个基于环线的拥堵收费方案。采用广义合成控制设计，我们发现该政策使CBD道路的车速提高了11%，但对空气质量、商店和餐厅的交易量或CBD的整体人流量几乎没有影响。在CBD之外、司机往返CBD常经过的道路上，车速也有所提高。这些溢出效应使得整个都市区的出行时间缩短，包括许多未收费的行程。我们开发了一个简单模型来界定司机福利效应，并估计出每周至少1430万美元的收益（在任何收入循环利用之前）。这些收益主要来自CBD之外许多未收费行程的广泛时间节省，凸显了考虑全网络溢出效应的重要性。最后，我们展示了当地出行模式和道路网络的特征如何为在其他城市引入基于环线的拥堵收费的潜在影响提供信息。

papers.title: The Rise of Healthcare Jobs
papers.authors: Joshua D. Gottlieb, Neale Mahoney, Kevin Rinz, Victoria Udalova
papers.abstract: Healthcare employment has grown more than twice as fast as the labor force since 1980, overtaking retail trade to become the largest industry by employment in 2009. We document key facts about the rise of healthcare jobs. Earnings for healthcare workers have risen nearly twice as fast as those in other industries, with relatively large increases in the middle and upper-middle parts of the earnings distribution. Healthcare workers have remained predominantly female, with increases in the share of female doctors offsetting increases in the shares of male nurses and aides. Despite a few high-profile examples to the contrary, regions experiencing manufacturing job losses have not systematically reinvented themselves by pivoting from ``manufacturing to meds.''
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS；JEL：I11, J21, J31, J44
papers.zh_title: 医疗保健岗位的崛起
papers.zh_abstract: 自1980年以来，医疗保健行业的就业增长速度是劳动力增长速度的两倍多，并于2009年超过零售业，成为就业人数最多的行业。我们记录了医疗保健岗位崛起的几个关键事实。医疗保健工作者的收入增长速度几乎是其他行业的两倍，收入分配的中部和中部偏上部分增长相对较大。医疗保健工作者仍然以女性为主，女性医生比例的增加抵消了男性护士和护理员比例的增加。尽管存在少数引人注目的反例，但经历制造业岗位流失的地区并未通过从“制造业转向医药业”而系统地实现自我转型。

papers.title: The New Geography of Labor Markets
papers.authors: Mert Akan, Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Thomas Bowen, Shelby R. Buckman, Steven J. Davis, Hyoseul Kim
papers.abstract: We study where Americans live in relation to their employer’s worksite using matched employer-employee data, and how that relationship changes with the rise of work from home (WFH). Mean distance from home to employer’s worksite rose more than 70% between 2019 and 2024 in our dataset. Twelve percent of employees hired after March 2020 reside fifty or more miles from their employer by 2024, triple the pre-pandemic share. Distance to employer rose most for those in their 30s and 40s, among highly paid employees, and in Finance, Information, and Professional Services. Especially for the affluent, the pandemic-instigated rise in WFH initiated a multi-year pattern of net migration to areas with cheaper housing and states with lower tax rates. Finally, we show that distant employees exhibit more sensitivity to firm-level adjustments on hiring and separation margins. These developments have implications for residential location, state-level tax revenues, labor markets, and household welfare.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO, LE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：J20
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场的新地理格局
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用匹配的雇主-雇员数据研究美国人居住地与其雇主工作地点之间的关系，以及这种关系如何随着居家办公（WFH）的兴起而变化。在我们的数据集中，从家到雇主工作地点的平均距离在2019年至2024年间增长了超过70%。2020年3月之后入职的员工中，有12%到2024年时居住在距离雇主50英里或更远的地方，是疫情前比例的三倍。与雇主距离的增加在30多岁和40多岁的人群、高薪员工以及金融、信息和专业服务行业中最为显著。对于富裕人群而言，疫情引发的WFH兴起开启了一个多年期的净迁移模式，即迁往住房更便宜、税率更低的州。最后，我们表明，远程员工对公司在招聘和解雇方面的调整表现出更高的敏感性。这些发展对居住地选择、州级税收收入、劳动力市场和家庭福利都有影响。

papers.title: Why Are Nordic Workers so Remote?: Potential Causes and (Some) Indirect Labor Market Consequences
papers.authors: Adam Gill, Lena E. Hensvik, Oskar Nordström Skans
papers.abstract: In this article, we show that working from home is much more prevalent in the Nordic countries than in the rest of Europe and we discuss potential causes and labor market consequences of this stylized fact. Likely contributing causes include a good technological infrastructure and comparatively widespread digital preparedness in the population. Recent research also suggests that trust is a crucial prerequisite for maintaining a spatial separation between supervisors and workers in marginal occupations. We show that survey measures of trust are extremely high in all Nordic countries, and that these measures correlate very strongly with work-from-home across countries and industries in Europe even controlling for a range of cross-country differences. Finally, we discuss potential spillover effects of increased hybrid work on the Nordic labor markets. We show evidence suggesting that increased hybrid work has caused a relocation of the production of local service firms from business centers to high-work-from-home residential areas, without affecting average commuting distances of service workers.
papers.zh_title: 为什么北欧员工如此倾向于远程办公？潜在原因及（部分）间接劳动力市场后果
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们表明居家办公在北欧国家比在欧洲其他地区更为普遍，并讨论了这一典型事实的潜在原因和劳动力市场后果。可能的促成因素包括良好的技术基础设施和人口中相对广泛的数字准备度。近期研究还表明，信任是维持边缘职业中监管者与员工之间空间分离的关键前提。我们表明，所有北欧国家的信任度调查指标都非常高，并且这些指标与欧洲各国和各行业的居家办公率存在非常强的相关性，即使在控制了一系列跨国差异后也是如此。最后，我们讨论了混合办公增加对北欧劳动力市场的潜在溢出效应。我们提供的证据表明，混合办公的增加已导致本地服务企业的生产从商业中心向高居家办公率的住宅区转移，但这并未影响服务工人的平均通勤距离。

papers.title: The Origins and Evolution of Occupational Licensing in the United States
papers.authors: Nicholas A. Carollo, Jason F. Hicks, Andrew Karch, Morris M. Kleiner
papers.abstract: Despite a dramatic increase in government regulation over the past century, relatively little is known about how new regulatory institutions emerge and evolve over long periods of time. In this paper, we examine the history and political economy of occupational licensing, a major category of labor regulation in the United States. We first develop a theoretical framework in which licensing arises as an endogenous policy choice shaped by potential social welfare considerations and professional association influence. We then evaluate the model’s empirical implications using a new historical database that records the adoption of state and federal licensing requirements for hundreds of occupations from 1870 to 2020. We show, first, that occupations whose tasks plausibly pose greater risks to consumers are more extensively licensed and were regulated earlier, on average, within states. Second, market size is strongly associated with the timing of policy adoption in the early 20th century, while political and institutional characteristics are more influential in later decades. Using an occupation-specific shift-share instrument for immigration-driven supply shocks, we find that an exogenous increase labor market competition raises the likelihood of regulation, consistent with incumbent practitioners’ incentives to restrict entry. Finally, we show that state professional associations substantially increase the probability of regulation immediately after their founding, highlighting the importance of political organization. Together, these findings demonstrate that a combination of public and private interests, as well as broader institutional factors, jointly influenced the adoption and diffusion of occupational licensing and regulation across states.
papers.zh_title: 美国职业许可的起源与演变
papers.zh_abstract: 对职业许可的分析主要集中在劳动力市场和消费者福利效应上。相比之下，关于职业许可法律如何起源或其演变的关键因素，我们所知相对较少。在本文中，我们研究了1870年至2020年美国许可要求的决定因素。我们首先构建了一个模型，其中许可是作为内生政治结果出现的，并利用这一框架研究市场特征和政治激励如何影响监管者的选择。我们的实证分析基于一个新颖的数据库，该数据库追踪了数百种独特职业的许可立法初始颁布情况，以及随时间推移对获取部分特定许可证所需资格条件的变更。我们首先表明，与模型预测一致，对于那些任务可能对消费者构成风险的职业，许可要求更为普遍且被更早采用。其次，大型、城市化程度高的州更有可能制定新政策。第三，在1940年之前受到监管的职业中，许可要求出现在从业者更多、且在职工人可能面临更大劳动力市场竞争的州更早。1980年之后，州级因素与政策采纳时间的关联性更强。最后，以州级专业协会的成立为衡量标准的政治组织，显著提高了监管的可能性。我们的发现共同表明，公共利益和私人利益都促进了许可要求在各州和各职业间的扩散。

papers.title: Recombinant Innovation, Novel Ideas, and the Start of Nobel Prize-Winning Work
papers.authors: John Ham, Brian Quistorff, Bruce A. Weinberg
papers.abstract: We draw on a recombinant view of innovation, where being in a new location and/or multiple locations leads to exposure to novel combinations of ideas that increase the creativity of top scientists. Using a rich, unique dataset we helped assemble, we estimate the empirical relationship between being in a new location and/or multiple locations and the expected interval before an eventual Nobel laureate (ENL) commences their prize-winning work. We find that being in a new location and in multiple locations are substantially and significantly associated with a shorter expected interval before ENLs commence their prize-winning work.
papers.zh_title: 重组式创新、新颖思想与诺贝尔奖获奖工作的开端
papers.zh_abstract: 我们借鉴了创新的重组观点，即身处新地点和/或多个地点，会使顶尖科学家接触到新颖的思想组合，从而增强其创造力。利用我们协助构建的一个丰富且独特的数据集，我们估计了身处新地点和/或多个地点与未来诺贝尔奖得主（ENL）开始其获奖工作之前的预期间隔之间的实证关系。我们发现，身处新地点和身处多个地点，都与ENL开始其获奖工作之前的预期间隔显著缩短密切相关。

papers.title: Rules versus Discretion in Capital Regulation
papers.authors: Urban Jermann, Haotian Xiang
papers.abstract: We study capital regulation in a dynamic model for bank deposits. Capital regulation addresses banks’ incentive for excessive leverage that dilutes depositors, but preserves some dilution to reduce bank defaults. We show theoretically that capital regulation is subject to a time inconsistency problem. In a model with non-maturing deposits where optimal withdrawals make deposits endogenously long-term, we find commitment to have important effects on the optimal level and cyclicality of capital adequacy. Our results call for a systematic framework that limits capital regulators’ discretion.
papers.zh_title: 资本监管中的规则与自由裁量权
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个银行活期存款动态模型中的资本监管。资本监管旨在解决银行过度杠杆化（这会稀释存款人利益）的激励问题，但同时保留一定程度的稀释以减少银行违约。我们从理论上证明，资本监管存在时间不一致性问题。在一个具有非到期存款的模型中，最优取款行为使存款内生地具有长期性，我们发现承诺机制对最优资本充足水平及其周期性具有重要影响。我们的研究结果呼吁建立一个限制资本监管者自由裁量权的系统性框架。

papers.title: Should Friday be the New Saturday? Hours Worked and Hours Wanted
papers.authors: Gregor Jarosch, Laura Pilossoph, Anthony Swaminathan
papers.abstract: This paper investigates self-reported wedges between how much people work and how much they want to work, at their current wage. More than two-thirds of full-time workers in German survey data are overworked—usual hours exceed desired hours. We combine this evidence with a simple model of labor supply to assess the welfare consequences of tighter weekly hours limits via willingness-to-pay calculations. According to counterfactuals, the optimal length of the workweek in Germany is 37 hours. Introducing such a cap would raise welfare by 0.6-1.2% of GDP. The gains from a shortened workweek are largest for workers who are married, female, college-educated, white-collar, middle aged, and high income. An extended analysis integrates a non-constant wage-hours relationship, falling capital returns, and a shrinking tax base.
papers.zh_title: 周五应该成为新的周六吗？工作时长与期望工作时长
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在现行工资水平下，人们自我报告的实际工作时长与期望工作时长之间的差距。根据德国调查数据，超过三分之二的全职工作者存在过度劳动——通常工作时长超过了期望时长。我们将这一证据与一个简单的劳动力供给模型相结合，通过意愿支付计算来评估更严格的每周工时上限的福利后果。根据反事实分析，德国最佳每周工作长度为37小时。引入这样一个上限将使福利提高GDP的0.6%-1.2%。缩短工作周的收益对于已婚、女性、大学学历、白领、中年和高收入的工作者最大。一项扩展分析整合了非恒定的工资-工时关系、下降的资本回报以及缩小的税基。

papers.title: Supply Constraints do not Explain House Price and Quantity Growth Across U.S. Cities
papers.authors: Schuyler Louie, John A. Mondragon, Johannes Wieland
papers.abstract: The standard view of housing markets holds that differences in the flexibility of local housing supply—shaped by factors like geography and regulation—explain differences in how house price and quantity growth respond to rising demand across U.S. cities. However, from 2000 to 2020, we find that higher income growth predicts the same growth in house prices, housing quantity, and population regardless of a city’s estimated housing supply elasticity. We find the same results when we examine rents, expand the sample to 1980 to 2020, use different elasticity measures, use per capita income or population growth instead of total income growth, and when exploiting a variety of plausibly exogenous variation in local housing demand. Using a general demand-and-supply framework, we show that these results imply that estimated housing supply constraints are unimportant in explaining differences in rising house prices among U.S. cities. Our conclusions challenge the prevailing view of local housing and labor markets and suggest that relaxing regulatory housing supply constraints may not materially affect housing affordability.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, LS, ME, PE, PR；JEL：E22, J61, R21, R31, R52
papers.zh_title: 供给约束无法解释美国各城市的房价与数量增长
papers.zh_abstract: 关于住房市场的标准观点认为，当地住房供给灵活性的差异——由地理和监管等因素塑造——解释了美国各城市房价和住房数量增长对需求上升的不同反应。然而，从2000年到2020年，我们发现，无论一个城市估计的住房供给弹性如何，更高的收入增长都预示着相同的房价、住房数量和人口增长。当我们考察租金、将样本扩展到1980年至2020年、使用不同的弹性衡量指标、使用人均收入或人口增长而非总收入增长，以及利用当地住房需求的各种外生变化时，我们得到了相同的结果。使用一个通用的供需框架，我们表明这些结果意味着，估计的住房供给约束在解释美国各城市房价上涨差异方面并不重要。我们的结论挑战了关于当地住房和劳动力市场的主流观点，并表明放松监管性的住房供给约束可能不会实质性地影响住房可负担性。

papers.title: Racial Disparities and Bias in Consumer Bankruptcy
papers.authors: Bronson Argyle, Sasha Indarte, Benjamin Iverson, Christopher Palmer
papers.abstract: We document substantial racial disparities in consumer bankruptcy outcomes and investigate the role of racial bias in contributing to these disparities. Using data on the near universe of US bankruptcy cases and self-reported and manually-identified measures of race, we show that minority filers are unconditionally 12.7 and 2.3 percentage points more likely to have their bankruptcy cases dismissed without debt relief in Chapters 13 and 7, respectively. We uncover strong evidence of racial homophily: in Chapter 13, where trustees have more discretion, minority filers are 2.3 percentage points more likely to be dismissed when randomly assigned to a White bankruptcy trustee than to a minority trustee. Black and Hispanic Chapter 13 filers are the most negatively affected by homophily. To interpret our findings, we develop a general decision model and new identification results relating homophily to bias. Our homophily approach is particularly useful in settings where traditional outcome tests for bias are not feasible because the decision-maker's objective is not well defined or decision-relevant outcomes or risk factors are unobserved. Applying this framework to our homophily estimate implies that at least 15% of the unconditional Chapter 13 dismissal gap and 53% of the conditional dismissal gap for minority filers is due to either taste-based or inaccurate statistical discrimination.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LE, LS, PE；JEL：C21, D63, G51, J15, K35
papers.zh_title: 消费者破产中的种族差异与偏见
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了消费者破产结果中显著的种族差异，并研究了种族偏见在造成这些差异中的作用。利用涵盖美国几乎所有破产案件的数据以及自我报告和人工识别的种族衡量指标，我们显示少数族裔申请人在第13章和第7章破产案件中，其案件在没有债务减免的情况下被驳回的可能性分别无条件高出12.7和2.3个百分点。我们发现了强烈的种族同质性证据：在第13章（受托人拥有更多自由裁量权）中，当少数族裔申请人被随机分配给一位白人破产受托人而非少数族裔受托人时，其案件被驳回的可能性高出2.3个百分点。黑人和西班牙裔的第13章破产申请人受同质性影响最为负面。为了解释我们的发现，我们开发了一个通用决策模型以及将同质性与偏见联系起来的新识别结果。我们的同质性方法在传统的结果检验因决策者目标不明确或决策相关结果或风险因素未被观测而不可行的情况下尤为有用。将这一框架应用于我们的同质性估计，意味着少数族裔申请人无条件第13章驳回差距中至少有15%，以及条件驳回差距中至少有53%，是由基于偏好的或不准确的统计歧视造成的。

papers.title: Human Capital at Home: Evidence from a Randomized Evaluation in the Philippines
papers.authors: Noam Angrist, Sarah Kabay, Dean Karlan, Lincoln Lau, Kevin Wong
papers.abstract: Children spend most of their time at home in their early years, yet efforts to promote human capital at home in many low- and middle-income settings remain limited. We conduct a randomized controlled trial to evaluate an intervention which encourages parents and caregivers to foster human capital accumulation among their children between ages 3 and 5, with a focus on math and phonics skills. Children gain 0.52 and 0.51 standard deviations relative to the control group on math and phonics tests, respectively (p<0.001). A year later effects persist, but math gains dissipate to 0.15 (p=0.06) and phonics to 0.13 (p=0.12). We also measure impacts on parents, including both fathers and mothers. Effects appear to be mediated largely through instructional support by parents and not other parent investment mechanisms, such as more positive parent-child interactions or additional time spent on education at home beyond the intervention. We also do not find any crowd-out effects on labor market outcomes, likely since the approach tested is efficient, delivering learning gains in a short period of time.
papers.zh_title: 家庭中的人力资本：来自菲律宾随机评估的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 儿童在早期大部分时间都在家中度过，然而在许多中低收入环境中，促进家庭人力资本的努力仍然有限。我们进行了一项随机对照试验，以评估一项鼓励父母和照顾者在3至5岁儿童中促进人力资本积累的干预措施，重点关注数学和语音技能。与对照组相比，儿童在数学和语音测试中分别获得了0.52和0.51个标准差的提升（p<0.001）。一年后，效果仍然存在，但数学收益降至0.15（p=0.06），语音收益降至0.13（p=0.12）。我们还测量了对父母（包括父亲和母亲）的影响。效果似乎主要通过父母的教学支持来中介，而非其他父母投资机制，例如更积极的亲子互动或超出干预范围的在家庭教育上投入的额外时间。我们也没有发现对劳动力市场结果的任何挤出效应，这可能是因为所测试的方法效率较高，能在短时间内带来学习收益。

papers.title: Expert Patients’ Use of Avoidable Health Care
papers.authors: Pragya Kakani, Simone Matecna, Amitabh Chandra
papers.abstract: We measure whether expert patients – those trained as physicians and nurses – have fewer emergency department visits and the reasons for these differences. Compared to similar patients, physicians and nurses had 19.8% and 5.1% fewer ED visits, principally due to fewer avoidable visits. The differences in avoidable visits between physicians and other patients were largest for diagnoses that often require prescriptions, which physicians often self-prescribed. Our results suggest that improving access to legitimate prescriptions for acute symptoms, more than improving patient education, can reduce avoidable health care.
papers.zh_title: 专家患者对可避免医疗服务的利用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们衡量了专家患者——即受过医生和护士培训的人——是否更少使用急诊科服务，以及这些差异的原因。与类似的患者相比，医生和护士的急诊就诊次数分别减少了19.8%和5.1%，这主要是由于可避免的就诊次数减少。医生与其他患者之间可避免就诊的差异，在通常需要处方的诊断中最大，而医生经常自行开药。我们的结果表明，改善急性症状合法处方的获取途径，比改善患者教育更能减少可避免的医疗服务使用。

papers.title: Expropriation Without Compensation: Copper in Chile, 1970-1973
papers.authors: Sebastian Edwards
papers.abstract: In this essay, I analyze the nationalization of large copper mines during Salvador Allende’s socialist government in Chile in the 1970s. This is one of the earliest cases “nationalization without compensation.” Chile’s legal argument was based on the novel idea that “adequate” payment should be calculated as book value minus “excessive profits.” In turn, excessive profits were defined, for every year, as profits above 12% of book value. I analyze the economic arguments that led to nationalization, and I deconstruct and critically evaluate the methodology used to calculate “excessive profits” and “adequate compensation.” I analyze the US and multinationals’ response to Chile’s nationalization policies.
papers.zh_title: 无补偿的征收：智利的铜矿，1970-1973
papers.zh_abstract: 在这篇文章中，我分析了20世纪70年代萨尔瓦多·阿连德社会主义政府时期智利大型铜矿的国有化。这是最早的“无补偿国有化”案例之一。智利的法律论据基于一个新颖的观点，即“适当”补偿应计算为账面价值减去“超额利润”。而超额利润被定义为每年超过账面价值12%的利润。我分析了导致国有化的经济论点，并解构和批判性地评估了用于计算“超额利润”和“适当补偿”的方法。我分析了美国及跨国公司对智利国有化政策的回应。

papers.title: From Access to Wellness: Early Life Exposure to Abortion Legalization and the Next Generation’s Health
papers.authors: Hamid Noghanibehambari, David Slusky, Hoa Vu
papers.abstract: We examine the multigenerational impacts of legalized abortion in the United States by analyzing how early-life exposure to this policy shift affects birth outcomes in the next generation. Using event study and two-way fixed effects models, we link maternal early-life exposure to legal abortion with improved birth outcomes in the subsequent generation, including higher birth weights and reduced rates of low birth weight. Our analysis of the mechanisms shows that these improvements in birth outcomes are not driven by changes in maternal racial or age composition within the treated generation. Instead, enhanced educational attainment and increased prenatal care utilization among the treated generation appear to play a critical role. Our results highlight the far-reaching implications of reproductive health policies, especially relevant in the post-Dobbs era, where access may once again become constrained for many.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH；JEL：H75, I12, I18, J13, J16, J18
papers.zh_title: 从可及性到健康：早期生活接触堕胎合法化与下一代健康
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过分析早期生活接触这一政策转变如何影响下一代的出生结果，来考察美国堕胎合法化的多代影响。使用事件研究和双向固定效应模型，我们将母亲早期生活接触合法堕胎与下一代出生结果的改善联系起来，包括更高的出生体重和更低的低出生体重率。我们对机制的分析表明，这些出生结果的改善并非由受处理一代母亲种族或年龄构成的变化所驱动。相反，受处理一代教育程度的提高和产前保健利用的增加似乎发挥了关键作用。我们的结果突显了生殖健康政策的深远影响，这在后多布斯时代尤其相关，因为对许多人来说，可及性可能再次受到限制。

papers.title: Standardized Test Scores and Academic Performance at Ivy-Plus Colleges
papers.authors: John N. Friedman, Bruce Sacerdote, Douglas O. Staiger, Michele Tine
papers.abstract: We analyze admissions and transcript records for students at multiple Ivy-Plus colleges to study the relationship between standardized (SAT/ACT) test scores, high school GPA, and first-year college grades. Standardized test scores predict academic outcomes with a normalized slope four times greater than that from high school GPA, all conditional on students’ race, gender, and socioeconomic status. Standardized test scores also exhibit no calibration bias, as they do not underpredict college performance for students from less advantaged backgrounds. Collectively these results suggest that standardized test scores provide important information to measure applicants’ academic preparation that is not available elsewhere in the application file.
papers.zh_title: 标准化考试成绩与常春藤Plus大学的学业表现
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了多所常春藤Plus大学学生的录取和成绩单记录，以研究标准化（SAT/ACT）考试成绩、高中GPA与大学一年级成绩之间的关系。在控制了学生的种族、性别和社会经济地位后，标准化考试成绩预测学业成果的标准化斜率是高中GPA的四倍以上。标准化考试成绩也没有表现出校准偏差，因为它们不会低估来自弱势背景学生的大学表现。总的来说，这些结果表明，标准化考试成绩提供了衡量申请人学业准备的重要信息，而这些信息在申请文件的其他地方是无法获得的。

papers.title: The Effects of Competition in the Retail Gasoline Industry
papers.authors: Reid B. Taylor, Erich Muehlegger
papers.abstract: We estimate the effect of competition on incumbent firm pricing by using high-frequency price data and the precise geographic location for all gas stations in California. Using an event-study design, we find that the entry of a new station is associated with an immediate, persistent 2.7-cent decrease in prices at incumbent stores, which equates to a 7% reduction in estimated retail markups. In contrast, nearby exit results in precisely estimated null effects on prices. We do not find that observable differences in station characteristics explain the asymmetry. Rather, we find that selective exit from more competitive markets and less heavily-trafficked stations explains the null results for exit. We discuss the relevance of our estimates to current environmental policy related to the decarbonization of light-duty transportation and zoning and environmental restrictions on gasoline stations.
papers.zh_title: 零售汽油行业竞争的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用高频价格数据和加州所有加油站的精确地理位置，估计了竞争对现有企业定价的影响。通过事件研究设计，我们发现，新加油站的进入与现有门店价格立即且持续下降2.7美分相关，这相当于估计的零售加成率下降了7%。相比之下，附近加油站的退出对价格产生了精确估计的零效应。我们没有发现加油站特征的显著差异可以解释这种不对称性。相反，我们发现，从竞争更激烈的市场和交通流量较少的加油站中选择性退出，解释了退出带来的零效应。我们讨论了我们的估计与当前与轻型交通脱碳以及加油站的区划和环境限制相关的环境政策的相关性。

papers.title: Recovering Credible Trade Elasticities from Incredible Trade Reforms
papers.authors: George A. Alessandria, Shafaat Yar Khan, Armen Khederlarian, Kim J. Ruhl, Joseph B. Steinberg
papers.abstract: We study how trade-policy dynamics affect the dynamics of trade volumes and the implications of these effects for estimates of the trade elasticity. We use data on US imports and trade policy from 1974–2017 for China and Vietnam—the countries with the largest import growth and the largest tariff reductions over the last fifty years—and a heterogeneous-firm dynamic trade model to recover the dynamic path of the trade elasticity following an unanticipated, permanent tariff change. We estimate a short-run trade elasticity of about three and a long-run trade elasticity of about 14, and find that it takes about five years to close half of the gap between the current and long-run levels of trade. We argue that the expected dynamics of future trade policy before and after these reforms biases down reduced-form estimates of the long-run trade elasticity and biases up estimates of the short-run elasticity. We argue that these measurement issues are even more problematic for other trade reforms, especially those within the Normal Trade Relations (NTR) regime that constitute the majority of the data.
papers.zh_title: 从不可信的贸易改革中恢复可信的贸易弹性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究贸易政策动态如何影响贸易量动态，以及这些效应对贸易弹性估计的影响。我们利用1974年至2017年美国从中国和越南（过去五十年中进口增长最大和关税削减最大的国家）的进口和贸易政策数据，以及一个异质性企业动态贸易模型，来恢复在意外、永久性关税变化后贸易弹性的动态路径。我们估计短期贸易弹性约为3，长期贸易弹性约为14，并发现大约需要五年时间才能弥合当前贸易水平与长期贸易水平之间差距的一半。我们认为，这些改革前后未来贸易政策的预期动态，会向下偏误长期贸易弹性的简化形式估计，并向上偏误短期弹性的估计。我们认为，这些测量问题对于其他贸易改革，尤其是构成数据大部分的“正常贸易关系”（NTR）体制内的改革，问题更为严重。

papers.title: A Guide to Macroeconomics and Climate Change
papers.authors: Adrien Bilal, James H. Stock
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes the literature that links macroeconomics and climate change. We organize our paper around three themes: (i) loss and damage, which assesses long-run economic costs and non-market impacts from climate change; (ii) mitigation and the energy transition, which evaluates the macroeconomic consequences of shifting away from fossil fuels toward renewable energy; and (iii) adaptation, which explores the economic adjustments necessary to manage heat stress, more frequent severe weather events and rising seas. We discuss macroeconomic frameworks that incorporate these forces as well as empirical estimates that guide their calibration. We suggest areas in which macroeconomic research on climate is needed.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG；JEL：E60, F55, H23, H41, Q43, Q50, R10
papers.zh_title: 宏观经济学与气候变化指南
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了将宏观经济学与气候变化联系起来的文献。我们围绕三个主题组织论文：（i）损失与损害，评估气候变化带来的长期经济成本和非市场影响；（ii）减缓与能源转型，评估从化石燃料转向可再生能源的宏观经济后果；（iii）适应，探讨管理热应激、更频繁的恶劣天气事件和海平面上升所需的经济调整。我们讨论了纳入这些力量的宏观经济框架，以及指导其校准的实证估计。我们提出了需要对气候进行宏观经济研究的领域。

papers.title: A Quest for AI Knowledge
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: This paper examines how AI tools that excel at interpolating existing knowledge affect scientific research directions. Using a model where AI assists both scientists (S-AI) and decision-makers (DM-AI), it is shown that AI’s impact on research novelty is non-monotonic and depends critically on capability thresholds. While S-AI predictably encourages knowledge consolidation by reducing costs within established domains—potentially creating distinct pockets of deepening—DM-AI generates surprising effects. With limited capabilities, scientists ignore DM-AI. In a moderate regime, scientists “work to the AI,” constraining novelty to match AI’s operational range. Only with sufficiently advanced DM-AI do scientists unambiguously pursue more novel research. The strong complementarity between AI capabilities and knowledge gaps means that moderate AI may reduce research ambition. These findings challenge the conventional wisdom that interpolative AI uniformly pushes science toward consolidation, revealing a nuanced relationship between AI capabilities and scientific progress instead.
papers.zh_title: 对人工智能知识的探索
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了擅长插值现有知识的人工智能工具如何影响科学研究方向。使用一个模型，其中人工智能既协助科学家（S-AI）也协助决策者（DM-AI），结果表明人工智能对研究新颖性的影响是非单调的，并且关键取决于能力阈值。虽然S-AI通过降低既定领域内的成本，可预测地鼓励知识整合——可能创造不同的深化区域——但DM-AI产生了令人惊讶的效应。当能力有限时，科学家会忽略DM-AI。在中等能力状态下，科学家“为人工智能而工作”，限制新颖性以匹配人工智能的操作范围。只有当DM-AI足够先进时，科学家才会明确地追求更新颖的研究。人工智能能力与知识差距之间的强互补性意味着中等水平的人工智能可能会降低研究雄心。这些发现挑战了插值型人工智能会统一推动科学走向整合的传统观点，反而揭示了人工智能能力与科学进步之间微妙的关联。

papers.title: A Test of the Efficiency of a Given Portfolio in High Dimensions
papers.authors: Mikhail Chernov, Bryan T. Kelly, Semyon Malamud, Johannes Schwab
papers.abstract: We extend the Gibbons–Ross–Shanken test to high-dimensional cases, when the num-ber of test assets far exceeds the sample size and the return covariance matrix is ill-conditioned or singular, as inevitably occurs with large, richly specified test port-folios. In such cases, one must use a regularized (and therefore biased) estimator of the covariance matrix, which distorts the original GRS test statistic. We use Random Matrix Theory to correct for this bias and characterize the asymptotic power of the resulting test. Power increases with the number of test assets and reaches its maximum across a broad range of local alternatives. These findings are supported by extensive simulations. We empirically implement the test on state-of-the-art candidate factor portfolios and test assets to evaluate conditional asset pricing performance.
papers.zh_title: 高维情况下给定投资组合有效性的检验
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将Gibbons-Ross-Shanken检验扩展到高维情况，即当测试资产数量远超样本量且收益协方差矩阵病态或奇异时，这在大规模、丰富设定的测试组合中不可避免。在这种情况下，必须使用正则化（因此有偏）的协方差矩阵估计量，这会扭曲原始的GRS检验统计量。我们使用随机矩阵理论来纠正这种偏误，并描述由此产生的检验的渐近功效。功效随测试资产数量增加而增加，并在广泛的局部备择假设范围内达到最大值。这些发现得到了广泛模拟的支持。我们在实证中，对最先进的候选因子组合和测试资产实施该检验，以评估条件资产定价表现。

papers.title: Methane Abatement Costs in the Oil and Gas Industry: Survey and Synthesis
papers.authors: Joseph E. Aldy, Forest L. Reinhardt, Robert N. Stavins
papers.abstract: There is growing recognition of the relative importance of anthropogenic emissions of methane as a contributor to global climate change. An important source of such emissions in some countries, including the United States, is the oil and gas (O&G) sector. This points to the importance of developing understanding of the marginal abatement cost functions for methane emissions reductions. Scholars have employed a diverse set of methodologies to estimate abatement costs, including engineering cost models, econometric analysis of natural gas markets, and statistical retrospective analysis of state-level regulation. We critically examine these approaches and synthesize their results. We find significant potential for low-cost methane abatement in the O&G sector in the United States and elsewhere, although claims of widespread negative abatement cost opportunities should be taken with a grain of salt. We also find that the potential for low-cost abatement is not without limit. Whereas it appears that cutting methane emissions in half would be relatively inexpensive, a sharp uptick in marginal abatement cost may occur when reductions exceed 60 to 80 percent below baseline levels. This threshold may change over time with technological advances in remote sensing, which can reduce abatement costs at various levels of ambition.
papers.zh_title: 石油和天然气行业的甲烷减排成本：调查与综合
papers.zh_abstract: 人们越来越认识到人为甲烷排放作为全球气候变化贡献者的相对重要性。在一些国家，包括美国，石油和天然气（O&G）部门是此类排放的重要来源。这表明了发展对甲烷排放削减的边际减排成本函数理解的重要性。学者们采用了多种方法来估计减排成本，包括工程成本模型、天然气市场的计量经济分析以及州级监管的统计回顾分析。我们批判性地审视这些方法并综合其结果。我们发现，在美国和其他地方的石油和天然气部门，存在显著的低成本甲烷减排潜力，尽管对广泛存在的负减排成本机会的说法应持保留态度。我们还发现，低成本减排的潜力并非没有限制。虽然将甲烷排放量减半似乎相对便宜，但当减排量超过基线水平的60%至80%时，边际减排成本可能会急剧上升。随着遥感技术的进步，这一阈值可能会随时间变化，这可以在不同雄心水平上降低减排成本。

papers.title: The Academic Consequences of Affirmative Action Bans Combined with Diversity Targets
papers.authors: Eric Zitzewitz
papers.abstract: This paper examines the problem of a college affected by both a legal ban on affirmative action in admissions and pressure to raise enrollment of underrepresented minorities (URMs), as exemplified by UCLA, which adopted a holistic admissions process in 2006 in response to protests over low URM enrollment. The new process increased the URM share of admitted students by about 3 percentage points, but the primary effects of the changes were on admissions decisions within racial/ethnic groups. Within all groups, admission rates for applicants with high SAT scores and low income and parental education declined. Measured relative to UCLA’s pre-2006 revealed preferences, achieving the increase in URM admissions via holistic admissions was roughly 4-5 times as costly as doing so via a simple reallocation of slots between groups. Had UCLA complied with a stricter interpretation of the affirmative action ban, it would have been significantly more costly.
papers.zh_title: 平权行动禁令与多元化目标结合后的学术后果
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一所大学同时面临招生中平权行动的法律禁令和提高代表性不足少数族裔（URM）入学率的压力时的问题，以加州大学洛杉矶分校（UCLA）为例，该校因URM入学率低引发抗议，于2006年采用了整体性审查录取流程。新流程使被录取学生中URM的比例提高了约3个百分点，但这些变化的主要影响在于种族/族裔群体内部的录取决定。在所有群体中，SAT高分但低收入和父母教育程度低的申请者的录取率下降了。相对于UCLA在2006年之前揭示的偏好，通过整体性审查实现URM录取率的增加，其成本大约是通过在群体间简单重新分配名额实现该目标的4到5倍。如果UCLA遵守对平权行动禁令更严格的解释，其成本将会显著更高。

papers.title: In-kind Government Assistance and Crowd-out of Charitable Services: Evidence from Free School Meals
papers.authors: Krista J. Ruffini, Orgul Ozturk, Pelin Pekgun
papers.abstract: Many community organizations provide services similar to government programs, but there is limited evidence how increased government aid affects the use and availability of charitable services. This study examines how greater access to federal nutrition assistance through schoolwide free meal programs affects food bank use within the U.S.’s largest food bank network. A 10 percent increase in access to free school meals reduces the amount of food that food banks distribute by 0.9-1.4 percent, without significantly reducing donations, fundraising activity, or the amount of food available. The reduction of food bank use is only found in areas where relatively few students previously qualified for government aid. Our findings highlight that even safety net programs that serve a specific population and offer distinct services can reduce pressures on charitable organizations, particularly in areas previously underserved by government assistance.
papers.zh_title: 政府实物援助对慈善服务的挤出效应：来自免费学校餐的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 许多社区组织提供与政府项目类似的服务，但关于增加政府援助如何影响慈善服务的使用和可用性的证据有限。本研究考察了通过全校免费餐计划增加联邦营养援助的可及性，如何影响美国最大食品银行网络内的食品银行使用。免费学校餐可及性每增加10%，食品银行分发的食物量就会减少0.9-1.4%，而不会显著减少捐赠、筹款活动或可用食物量。食品银行使用的减少仅出现在先前符合政府援助条件的学生相对较少的地区。我们的研究结果强调，即使是服务于特定人群并提供独特服务的安全网项目，也能减轻慈善组织的压力，特别是在以前政府援助服务不足的地区。

papers.title: New Data and Insights in Regional and Urban Economics
papers.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Leah Platt Boustan, Adam Storeygard
papers.abstract: This chapter surveys new data sources employed in urban and regional economics in the past decade and the insights they have enabled. We first provide a primer on the data sources, including advantages, disadvantages and use cases. Historical data sources include linked census records as well as digitized maps and directories. Contemporary data come from satellites, mobile phones, social media and wikis, posted prices and listings, e-commerce and payment card transactions, newly available administrative sources, and text, among others. We then discuss the advances these data have enabled in substantive areas throughout urban and regional economics, with historical and contemporary examples in each area. We conclude with some predictions and warnings
papers.zh_title: 区域与城市经济学的新数据与新见解
papers.zh_abstract: 本章调查了过去十年城市与区域经济学中采用的新数据来源及其所带来的见解。我们首先提供了这些数据来源的入门介绍，包括其优势、劣势和使用案例。历史数据来源包括关联的人口普查记录，以及数字化的地图和目录。当代数据则来自卫星、手机、社交媒体和维基、挂牌价格和列表、电子商务和支付卡交易、新近可获得的行政数据来源以及文本等。接着，我们讨论了这些数据在区域与城市经济学各实质性领域中所推动的进展，并在每个领域提供了历史和当代的案例。最后，我们提出了一些预测和警示。

papers.title: The Optimal Monetary Policy Response to Tariffs
papers.authors: Javier Bianchi, Louphou Coulibaly
papers.abstract: What is the optimal monetary policy response to tariffs? This paper explores this question within an open-economy New Keynesian model, characterizes the macroeconomic effects of tariffs, and shows that the optimal monetary policy response is expansionary, with inflation rising above and beyond the direct effects of tariffs. This result holds regardless of whether tariffs apply to consumption goods or intermediate inputs, whether the shock is temporary or permanent, and whether terms of trade are exogenous or endogenous. When tariffs address other distortions, monetary policy remains expansionary, but the inflationary effects are mitigated.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E24, E44, E52, F13, F41
papers.zh_title: 关税的最优货币政策应对
papers.zh_abstract: 关税的最优货币政策应对是什么？本文在一个开放经济的新凯恩斯主义模型中探讨了这一问题，描述了关税的宏观经济效应，并表明最优货币政策应对是扩张性的，通胀上升幅度超过关税的直接效应。无论关税适用于消费品还是中间投入品，无论冲击是暂时的还是永久的，无论贸易条件是外生的还是内生的，这一结果都成立。当关税用于解决其他扭曲时，货币政策仍然是扩张性的，但通胀效应会减弱。

papers.title: Correcting Endogeneity via Nonparametric Copula Control Functions
papers.authors: Xixi Hu, Yi Qian, Hui Xie
papers.abstract: We propose a new framework to address endogenous regressors using a novel conditional copula endogeneity model. Endogenous regressor models are nonparametric and agnostic to the functions that determine the values of endogenous regressors from exogenous regressors and unobservables. To capture the regressor-error dependence unexplained by exogenous regressors, conditional Gaussian copulas are used to link the structural error terms and the nonparametric models for endogenous regressors. Building on the model, we develop a two-stage nonparametric control function approach for endogeneity correction without relying on instrumental variables. Specifically, the approach constructs control functions using nonparametric estimates of the conditional cumulative distribution functions of endogenous regressors given exogenous regressors. The method relaxes the assumption of regressors and error jointly following Gaussian copula dependence structure and eliminates the need to model regressors. It unifies and generalizes existing copula-based endogeneity correction methods, while minimizing assumptions about how endogenous regressors are determined. Unlike existing copula control function methods, it can handle discrete endogenous regressors (e.g., binary or low-count) by leveraging variation in relevant exogenous control regressors. We demonstrate the robustness and broad applicability of the proposed method compared to existing copula-based endogeneity correction methods in simulation studies and empirical applications.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：C0, C01, C10, C14, C51

papers.title: A Bid Strategy for Earlier Payment: Evidence and Implications of Front-End Loading in Procurement
papers.authors: Justin Marion, Benjamin Rosa
papers.abstract: Liquidity management is key in industries with variable cash flows. We study how businesses in the highway construction industry manage cash flow by strategically bidding more on work with an earlier payout—a practice known as front-end loading. We find that small contractors, infrequent bidders, and Disadvantaged Business Enterprises front-end load more intensely, indicating a stronger preference for earlier payment. An equilibrium bidding model highlights a novel pathway through which this preference can affect procurement and its managerial and policy implications.
papers.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：D44, D82, D86, H57, L74, R42
papers.zh_title: 争取提前付款的投标策略：采购中前端加载的证据与启示
papers.zh_abstract: 流动性管理在现金流不稳定的行业中至关重要。我们研究了公路建设行业的企业如何通过策略性地对支付时间更早的工程进行更多投标来管理现金流——这种做法被称为前端加载。我们发现，小型承包商、不经常投标的企业以及弱势商业企业进行前端加载的强度更大，表明它们对提前付款有更强的偏好。一个均衡投标模型突显了这种偏好可能影响采购及其管理和政策含义的一条新途径。

papers.title: Worker Rights in Collective Bargaining
papers.authors: Benjamin W. Arold, Elliott Ash, W. Bentley MacLeod, Suresh Naidu
papers.abstract: Collective bargaining agreements (CBAs) specify the contractual rights of unionized workers, but their full legal content has not yet been analyzed by economists. This paper develops novel natural language methods to analyze the empirical determinants and economic value of these rights using a new collection of 30,000 CBAs from Canada in the period 1986-2015. We parse legally binding rights (e.g., “workers shall receive...”) and obligations (e.g., “the employer shall pro-vide...”) from contract text, and validate our measures through evaluation of clause pairs and comparison to firm surveys on HR practices. Using time-varying province-level variation in labor income tax rates, we find that higher taxes increase the share of worker-rights clauses while reducing pre-tax wages in unionized firms, consistent with a substitution effect away from taxed wages toward untaxed rights. Further, an exogenous increase in the value of outside options (from a leave-one-out instrument for labor demand) increases the share of worker rights clauses in CBAs. Combining the regression estimates, we infer that a one-standard-deviation increase in worker rights is valued at about 5.7% of wages.
papers.zh_title: 集体谈判中的工人权利
papers.zh_abstract: 集体谈判协议（CBA）规定了工会工人的合同权利，但其完整的法律内容尚未被经济学家分析过。本文利用1986-2015年期间加拿大30,000份CBA的新数据集，开发了新颖的自然语言方法来分析这些权利的实证决定因素和经济价值。我们从合同文本中解析具有法律约束力的权利（例如，“工人应获得……”）和义务（例如，“雇主应提供……”），并通过评估条款对以及与企业人力资源实践调查进行比较来验证我们的衡量指标。利用省级劳动所得税率的时变差异，我们发现较高的税率会增加工人权利条款的份额，同时降低工会化企业的税前工资，这与从被征税的工资向未被征税的权利的替代效应一致。此外，外部选择权价值的外生增加（使用留一法工具变量衡量劳动力需求）会增加CBA中工人权利条款的份额。结合回归估计，我们推断工人权利的一个标准差增加约等于工资的5.7%。

papers.title: Can Treasury Markets Add and Subtract?
papers.authors: Roberto Gomez Cram, Howard Kung, Hanno Lustig
papers.abstract: Treasury markets respond to the news in CBO cost estimates of individual bills about the future funding requirements from pending legislation. Treasury yields increase on days with major deficit-increasing bills, driven by an increase in expected inflation and nominal term premia, along with a decrease in convenience yields. The effects are three times larger for cost revisions for emergency spending proposals, which are unfunded and have a high probability of enactment. Our high-frequency estimates imply that a 1 percentage point one-time increase in deficits/GDP increases the 10-year nominal yield by 0.75 bps. This effect is equivalent to a 6.75 bps increase in yields for a persistent shock to deficits. Investors use these cost releases to learn about the U.S. fiscal stance. In a model with learning, we find that investors attributed a significant portion of the deficit news from cost releases to revisions in policy parameters and that 57% of the total deficit impact was expected to be unbacked.
papers.zh_title: 国债市场能进行加减运算吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 国债市场会对国会预算办公室（CBO）关于待定立法未来融资需求的单项法案成本估算中的新闻做出反应。在赤字增加法案占主导的日子里，国债收益率上升，这是由预期通胀和名义期限溢价的上升以及便利收益的下降共同驱动的。对于紧急支出提案的成本修正，其影响是三倍，这些提案没有资金来源且颁布可能性很高。我们的高频估计表明，赤字/GDP一次性增加1个百分点，会使10年期名义收益率增加0.75个基点。对于赤字的持续性冲击，这一效应相当于收益率增加6.75个基点。投资者利用这些成本发布来了解美国的财政立场。在一个包含学习的模型中，我们发现投资者将成本发布中赤字新闻的很大一部分归因于政策参数的修正，并且总赤字影响的57%预计是没有资金支持的。

papers.title: Robots and Crime
papers.authors: Yang Liang, Joseph J. Sabia, Dhaval M. Dave
papers.abstract: Leveraging county-level variation in exposure to industry-specific foreign-based robotics shocks, this study is the first to explore the relationship between U.S. robotics expansions and crime. Instrumental variables estimates show that a 10 percent increase in robotics exposure led to a 0.2 to 0.3 percent increase in property crime arrests. In contrast, we find little evidence of a relationship between robotics expansions and violent crime. Our estimates are consistent with robotics-induced declines in employment and earnings among low-skilled manufacturing workers. A back-of-the-envelope calculation suggests that during the period over which robotics exposure induced adverse employment effects, such exposure generated approximately $322 million (2024$) in additional crime costs nationally.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EH, ITI, LE, LS, PR；JEL：D24, J20, K42
papers.zh_title: 机器人与犯罪
papers.zh_abstract: 利用县级层面在特定行业外国机器人冲击暴露程度上的差异，本研究首次探讨了美国机器人扩张与犯罪之间的关系。工具变量估计显示，机器人暴露程度每增加10%，会导致财产犯罪逮捕率增加0.2%至0.3%。相比之下，我们几乎没有发现机器人扩张与暴力犯罪之间存在关系的证据。我们的估计与机器人扩张导致低技能制造业工人就业和收入下降的情况一致。一项粗略计算表明，在机器人暴露导致不利就业影响的时期内，这种暴露在全国范围内产生了约3.22亿美元（2024年美元）的额外犯罪成本。

papers.title: How Much Should We Spend to Reduce A.I.'s Existential Risk?
papers.authors: Charles I. Jones
papers.abstract: During the Covid-19 pandemic, the United States effectively “spent” about 4 percent of GDP — via reduced economic activity — to address a mortality risk of roughly 0.3 percent. Many experts believe that catastrophic risks from advanced A.I. over the next decade are at least this large, suggesting that a comparable mitigation investment could be worthwhile. Existing lives are valued by policymakers at around $10 million each in the United States. To avoid a 1% mortality risk, this value implies a willingness to pay of $100,000 per person — more than 100% of per capita GDP. If the risk is realized over the next two decades, an annual investment of 5% of GDP toward mitigating catastrophic risk could be justified, depending on the effectiveness of such investment. This back-of-the-envelope intuition is supported by the model developed here. In the model, for most of the scenarios and parameter combinations considered, spending at least 1% of GDP annually to mitigate AI risk can be justified even without placing any value on the welfare of future generations.
papers.zh_title: 我们应该花费多少来降低人工智能的生存风险？
papers.zh_abstract: 在新冠疫情期间，美国实际上“花费”了大约4%的GDP——通过减少经济活动——来应对大约0.3%的死亡风险。许多专家认为，未来十年来自高级人工智能的灾难性风险至少与此相当，这表明类似的缓解投资可能是值得的。在美国，政策制定者对现有生命的估值约为每人1000万美元。为了避免1%的死亡风险，这个价值意味着每人愿意支付10万美元——超过人均GDP的100%。如果风险在未来二十年内显现，那么每年将GDP的5%用于缓解灾难性风险的投资可能是合理的，具体取决于此类投资的有效性。这种粗略计算的直觉得到了本文所开发模型的支持。在该模型中，对于所考虑的大多数情景和参数组合，即使不考虑未来世代的福利，每年至少花费GDP的1%来缓解人工智能风险也是合理的。

papers.title: Profitability Retrospective: What Have We Learned?
papers.authors: Robert Novy-Marx, Mamdouh Medhat
papers.abstract: A lot! Profitability subsumes all of “quality” investing, explaining both the performance of the strategies that industry markets and the factors that academics employ. It also has striking power pricing “defensive equity” strategies that overweight low-beta or low-volatility stocks. Profitability tilts explain all the abnormal performance of popular “alternative value” strategies, including those adjusted for “intangibles,” and half of value's post-2007 underperformance. Profitability is crucial for pricing a wide array of seemingly unrelated anomalies, yielding a more parsimonious understanding of the cross section of expected returns.
papers.zh_title: 盈利能力回顾：我们学到了什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 很多！盈利能力涵盖了所有的“质量”投资，既解释了行业市场推广策略的表现，也解释了学术界使用的因子。它在定价超配低贝塔或低波动率股票的“防御性股票”策略方面也具有显著能力。盈利能力倾斜解释了流行的“另类价值”策略（包括那些针对“无形资产”进行调整的策略）的所有异常表现，以及价值策略在2007年后表现不佳的一半原因。盈利能力对于定价一系列看似不相关的异象至关重要，从而对预期收益的横截面提供了更简洁的理解。

papers.title: The Long Shadow of Early Education: Evidence from a Natural Experiment in the Philippines
papers.authors: Thomas Lloyd, Dean Yang
papers.abstract: How does early educational quality affect longer-term academic outcomes? We shed light on this question via a natural experiment in the Philippines—the implementation of a mother tongue education policy in public schools in kindergarten to Grade 3. This policy led to an unexpected decline in educational quality, but differentially in a subset of schools strongly predicted by pre-policy student language composition. We use language composition variables as instrumental variables for treatment. Leveraging panel data and confirming robustness to pre-trends, we find that the policy led to declines in standardized test scores in public primary schools. Employing a triple-difference strategy with Philippine Census data (across cohorts, localities, and decadal censuses), we show that by 2020, cohorts fully exposed to the policy completed 0.3 fewer years of schooling. By revealing how a policy-induced reduction in early education quality reduces educational attainment in later years, our results underscore the importance of investing in the quality of education in the first years of schooling.
papers.zh_title: 早期教育的长期影响：来自菲律宾自然实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 早期教育质量如何影响长期的学业成果？我们通过菲律宾的一个自然实验来阐明这个问题——在公立学校的幼儿园到三年级实施母语教育政策。这项政策导致了教育质量的意外下降，但在一个由政策前学生语言构成强烈预测的学校子集中存在差异。我们使用语言构成变量作为处理变量的工具变量。利用面板数据并确认对事前趋势的稳健性，我们发现该政策导致公立小学标准化考试成绩下降。采用三重差分策略（跨队列、跨地区、跨十年人口普查）分析菲律宾人口普查数据，我们表明，到2020年，完全受该政策影响的队列完成的 schooling 年限减少了0.3年。通过揭示政策导致的早期教育质量下降如何减少后期的教育成就，我们的结果强调了在最初几年的教育质量上进行投资的重要性。

papers.title: Beyond Tariffs: How Did China’s State–Owned Enterprises Shape the US–China Trade War?
papers.authors: Felipe Benguria, Felipe Saffie
papers.abstract: We study the role played by Chinese state–owned firms during the US–China trade war. Based on measures constructed from Chinese firm–level customs microdata, we show that the presence of state–owned enterprises (SOEs) in Chinese imports led to a large negative impact on US exports in addition to the effect of tariffs. Abstracting from general equilibrium effects, while tariffs account for an 8% decline in US exports to China, the SOE effect accounts for a 4% decline. This SOE effect was concentrated toward the end of 2018 and start of 2019, point at which a vast majority of products had already been targeted by tariffs. Further, the SOE effect was concentrated among agricultural goods and industrial supplies, as well as among industries located in US regions with a high share of Republican votes. We also find that US exports were rerouted to the rest of the world in response to Chinese tariffs, but not in response to reduced imports by Chinese SOEs.
papers.zh_title: 超越关税：中国国有企业如何塑造了中美贸易战？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了中国国有企业在中美贸易战期间所扮演的角色。基于从中国企业层面海关微观数据构建的指标，我们表明，除了关税的影响之外，中国进口中国有企业的存在对美国出口产生了巨大的负面影响。撇开一般均衡效应，虽然关税导致美国对华出口下降8%，但国有企业效应则导致下降4%。这种国有企业效应集中在2018年底和2019年初，当时绝大多数产品已经成为关税目标。此外，国有企业效应集中在农产品和工业用品，以及位于美国共和党选票占比较高的地区的行业。我们还发现，美国出口因中国关税而转向世界其他地区，但并未因中国国有企业进口减少而出现转口。

papers.title: Cloze Encounters: The Impact of Pirated Data Access on LLM Performance
papers.authors: Stella Jia, Abhishek Nagaraj
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in text generation, but their performance may be influenced by the datasets on which they are trained, including potentially unauthorized or pirated content. We investigate the extent to which data access through pirated books influences LLM responses. We test the performance of leading foundation models (GPT, Claude, Llama, and Gemini) on a set of books that were and were not included in the Books3 dataset, which contains full-text pirated books and could be used for LLM training. We assess book-level performance using the “name cloze” word-prediction task. To examine the causal effect of Books3 inclusion we employ an instrumental variables strategy that exploits the pattern of book publication years in the Books3 dataset. In our sample of 12,916 books, we find significant improvements in LLM name cloze accuracy on books available within the Books3 dataset compared to those not present in these data. These effects are more pronounced for less popular books as compared to more popular books and vary across leading models. These findings have crucial implications for the economics of digitization, copyright policy, and the design and training of AI systems.
papers.zh_title: 完形填空遭遇：盗版数据访问对大型语言模型性能的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 大型语言模型在文本生成方面展现了卓越的能力，但其性能可能受到训练所用数据集的影响，包括潜在的未经授权或盗版内容。我们调查了通过盗版书籍获取数据在多大程度上影响大型语言模型的响应。我们测试了领先的基础模型（GPT、Claude、Llama和Gemini）在一组包含在Books3数据集和未包含在其中的书籍上的表现。Books3数据集包含全文盗版书籍，并可能用于大型语言模型训练。我们使用“名称完形填空”单词预测任务来评估书籍层面的性能。为了检验Books3包含的因果效应，我们采用了一种工具变量策略，利用了Books3数据集中书籍出版年份的模式。在我们的12,916本书样本中，我们发现，与不在该数据集中的书籍相比，大型语言模型在Books3数据集中可用的书籍上的名称完形填空准确性有显著提高。这些效应对不太受欢迎的书籍比更受欢迎的书籍更为明显，并且在各个领先模型之间有所不同。这些发现对数字化经济学、版权政策以及人工智能系统的设计和训练具有重要影响。

papers.title: Sewers and Urbanization in the Developing World
papers.authors: Sean E. McCulloch, Matthew P. Schaelling, Matthew Turner, Toru Kitagawa
papers.abstract: We investigate the effects of sewer access on developing world cities. It is more difficult to move sewage uphill than downhill, so similar neighborhoods on opposite sides of drainage basin divides face different costs of sewer access. We identify the effect of sewers by comparing outcomes for neighborhoods on opposite sides of drainage basin divides. On average, sewers in Brazil, Colombia, South Africa, Jordan, and Tanzania cause large increases in population density and moderate changes in demographics. There is evidence for heterogeneous effects across countries. Estimates suggest that sewers are as important for the geography of cities as transportation infrastructure.
papers.zh_title: 下水道与发展中国家的城市化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了下水道接入对发展中国家城市的影响。将污水向上坡输送比向下坡输送更困难，因此位于流域分水岭两侧的相似社区面临不同的下水道接入成本。我们通过比较流域分水岭两侧社区的结果来识别下水道的影响。平均而言，巴西、哥伦比亚、南非、约旦和坦桑尼亚的下水道导致人口密度大幅增加，人口结构发生适度变化。有证据表明各国之间存在异质性效应。估计表明，下水道对于城市地理的重要性与交通基础设施相当。

papers.title: Does Fund Size Affect Private Equity Performance? Evidence from Donation Inflows to Private Universities
papers.authors: Abhishek Bhardwaj, Abhinav Gupta, Sabrina T. Howell, Kyle Zimmerschied
