Such guarantees do not exist for other data sources, such as accounting or text data. We build on recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) that represent unstructured data (e.g., text, audio, and images) by high-dimensional latent vectors called embeddings. Just as word embeddings leverage the document structure to represent words, asset embeddings leverage portfolio holdings to represent firms. Thus, this paper is a bridge from recent advances in AI and ML to economics and finance. We explore various methods to estimate asset embeddings, including recommender systems, shallow neural network models such as Word2Vec, and transformer models such as BERT. We evaluate the performance of these models on three benchmarks that can be evaluated using a single quarter of data: predicting relative valuations, explaining the comovement of stock returns, and predicting institutional portfolio decisions. We also estimate investor embeddings (i.e., representations of investors and their strategies), which are useful for investor classification, performance evaluation, and detecting crowded trades. We discuss other applications of asset embeddings, including generative portfolios, risk management, and stress testing. Finally, we develop a framework to give an economic narrative to a group of similar firms, by applying large language models to firm-level text data.
papers.zh_title: 资产嵌入
papers.zh_abstract: 基于会计和金融市场数据的公司特征，通常被用来在经济学和金融学中代表公司。然而，投资者集体使用的信息集远比公司特征丰富得多，包括研究人员不易获得的信息来源。我们从理论上证明，投资组合持有量包含了所有与资产定价相关的信息，这些信息可以在经验上现实的条件下被恢复。对于其他数据来源，如会计或文本数据，则不存在这样的保证。我们借鉴了人工智能和机器学习的最新进展，这些进展通过称为嵌入的高维潜在向量来表示非结构化数据（例如文本、音频和图像）。正如词嵌入利用文档结构来表示单词一样，资产嵌入利用投资组合持有量来表示公司。因此，本文是连接人工智能和机器学习最新进展与经济学和金融学的桥梁。我们探索了估计资产嵌入的各种方法，包括推荐系统、浅层神经网络模型（如Word2Vec）和Transformer模型（如BERT）。我们在三个可以使用单个季度数据评估的基准上评估了这些模型的性能：预测相对估值、解释股票收益的联动性以及预测机构投资组合决策。我们还估计了投资者嵌入（即投资者及其策略的表示），这对于投资者分类、绩效评估和检测拥挤交易非常有用。我们讨论了资产嵌入的其他应用，包括生成式投资组合、风险管理和压力测试。最后，我们开发了一个框架，通过将大型语言模型应用于公司层面的文本数据，为一组相似的公司提供经济叙事。

papers.title: AI as Strategist
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: Can artificial intelligence (AI) function as an organisational strategist? This paper adapts the formal theory of strategy developed by van den Steen (2017, 2018a) to a two-decision framework in which the strategist may be either human or AI. The model distinguishes two channels through which strategy creates value: an expertise effect, which improves the stand-alone quality of key decisions, and a coordination effect, which aligns interdependent choices through influence or control. We compare human and AI strategists along two primitives— confidence (belief accuracy) and agreement (shared judgment)—and show how these shape the effectiveness of authority and persuasion. Our analysis reveals that credibility substitutes for control: as agreement with the strategist increases, the value of formal authority diminishes. Transparent AIs, which generate higher credibility through architectural selection, can guide effectively through influence, while opaque AIs require formal control to realise their expertise advantage. These findings highlight how AI transparency serves as a substitute for authority, yielding design implications for domain-contingent authority and progressive delegation in human–AI collaboration.
papers.zh_title: 作为战略家的人工智能
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能能否充当组织战略家？本文将van den Steen（2017, 2018a）发展的战略形式理论适配到一个双决策框架中，其中战略家可以是人类或人工智能。该模型区分了战略创造价值的两个渠道：专业知识效应，它提高了关键决策的独立质量；以及协调效应，它通过影响或控制来调整相互依赖的选择。我们沿着两个原始维度——信心（信念准确性）和一致性（共同判断）——比较人类和人工智能战略家，并展示这些因素如何塑造权威和说服的有效性。我们的分析揭示，可信度可以替代控制：随着与战略家一致性的增加，正式权威的价值会降低。透明的AI通过架构选择产生更高的可信度，可以通过影响有效地进行指导，而不透明的AI则需要正式控制来实现其专业知识优势。这些发现凸显了AI透明度如何作为权威的替代品，为人类与AI协作中的领域权变授权和渐进式授权提供了设计启示。

papers.title: The Memory Premium
papers.authors: Yuval Salant, Jorg L. Spenkuch, David Almog
papers.abstract: We explore the role of memory for choice behavior in unfamiliar environments. Drawing on a unique data set, we document that decision-makers exhibit a “memory premium.” They tend to choose in-memory alternatives over out-of-memory ones, even when the latter are objectively better. Consistent with well-established regularities regarding the inner workings of human memory, the memory premium is associative, subject to interference and repetition effects, and decays over time. Evidence from a laboratory experiment implies that the memory premium arises because individuals rely on their memory to identify alternatives that warrant careful consideration, albeit in a boundedly rational way.
papers.zh_title: 记忆溢价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了记忆在不熟悉环境中的选择行为中的作用。利用一个独特的数据集，我们记录了决策者表现出一种“记忆溢价”。他们倾向于选择记忆中的选项而非记忆之外的选项，即使后者客观上更好。与关于人类记忆内部运作的既定规律一致，记忆溢价是联想性的，受到干扰和重复效应的影响，并且会随时间衰减。来自实验室实验的证据表明，记忆溢价之所以出现，是因为个体依赖他们的记忆来识别值得仔细考虑的选项，尽管是以一种有限理性的方式。

papers.title: Moral Hazard under Liquidity Constraints
papers.authors: Keith Marzilli Ericson, Johannes G. Jaspersen, Justin R. Sydnor
papers.abstract: Spending induced by health insurance is often called moral hazard and assumed to be inefficient. We adapt standard models and show that for those living “hand-to-mouth”, the financing benefits of insurance cause a portion of moral hazard to be efficient. Although insurance’s price distortions also create some inefficient spending, the net welfare impacts of moral hazard can be positive. We present an intuitive graphical framework and formal results to distinguish moral hazard’s efficient and inefficient components. Simulations show economically significant net benefits of moral hazard in many cases for those with liquidity constraints. Our framework also provides a new way of modeling the “income effect” induced by insurance, and distinguishes it from the “liquidity effect”. While both can lead to efficient moral hazard, moral-hazard benefits from the “liquidity effect” are often substantially larger. We use our framework to revisit prior estimates of Medicaid’s value from the Oregon Health Insurance Experiment. Individuals with minimal liquidity value Medicaid more than twice as much as unconstrained individuals do, and their value exceeds the net cost of providing Medicaid by more than $1, 000 per year, driven largely by a significant positive net welfare value of moral hazard. Finally, we provide simulations showing how liquidity constraints can change estimates of the optimal level of insurance and the value of insurance menus with vertical choice.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：D15, D80, H30, I13
papers.zh_title: 流动性约束下的道德风险
papers.zh_abstract: 由健康保险引发的支出通常被称为道德风险，并被假定为低效的。我们调整了标准模型，并表明对于那些“手口相济”生活的人来说，保险的融资收益导致一部分道德风险是有效的。尽管保险的价格扭曲也造成了一些低效支出，但道德风险的净福利影响可能是正的。我们提出了一个直观的图形框架和正式结果，以区分道德风险的有效和无效组成部分。模拟显示，在许多情况下，对于面临流动性约束的人来说，道德风险具有经济上显著的净收益。我们的框架还提供了一种模拟保险引发的“收入效应”的新方法，并将其与“流动性效应”区分开来。虽然两者都可能导致有效的道德风险，但来自“流动性效应”的道德风险收益通常要大得多。我们利用我们的框架重新审视了俄勒冈健康保险实验中关于医疗补助价值的先前估计。流动性极低的个体对医疗补助的估值是未受约束个体的两倍多，并且他们的估值超过提供医疗补助的净成本每年1000多美元，这主要是由道德风险显著的正净福利价值驱动的。最后，我们提供了模拟，展示了流动性约束如何改变对最优保险水平以及具有垂直选择的保险菜单价值的估计。

papers.title: Global Spillovers of Climate Policy Shocks
papers.authors: Julian di Giovanni, Galina Hale, Neel Lahiri, Anirban Sanyal
papers.abstract: The slow adoption of climate change policies stems from concerns about their economic impact. The EU has led global carbon pricing through its Emissions Trading Scheme (ETS). This study examines the effect of ETS policy shocks on global stock market returns at the country-industry level using linear and spatial autoregression models. Results show that while markets react negatively to rising carbon prices, the impact is small in magnitude. Global spillovers are limited to sectors linked to EU industries via intermediate goods trade, with no significant effects beyond these supply chain linkages. Overall, the unintended consequences of EU climate policies appear negligible, with minimal effects on targeted industries’ stock returns and no spillovers outside supply chain linkages.
papers.zh_title: 气候政策冲击的全球溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 气候变化政策采纳缓慢源于对其经济影响的担忧。欧盟通过其排放交易体系引领了全球碳定价。本研究使用线性和空间自回归模型，在国家-行业层面考察了排放交易体系政策冲击对全球股票市场回报的影响。结果显示，尽管市场对碳价上涨反应消极，但影响幅度很小。全球溢出效应仅限于通过与欧盟行业进行中间品贸易相关联的行业，在这些供应链联系之外没有显著影响。总体而言，欧盟气候政策的意外后果似乎可以忽略不计，对目标行业股票回报的影响极小，并且在供应链联系之外没有溢出效应。

papers.title: Estimating the Footprint of Artisanal Mining in Africa
papers.authors: Darin Christensen, Tamma Carleton, Esther Rolf, Cullen Molitor, Shopnavo Biswas, Karena Yan, Graeme Blair
papers.abstract: Artisanal and small-scale mining (ASM) supplies livelihoods and critical minerals but has been linked to conflict and environmental degradation. We enable monitoring of this largely informal sector by creating high-resolution maps of ASM's footprint in Africa using machine learning models that integrate geographic features and satellite imagery. We find ASM is more extensive than documented: in five countries with on-the-ground surveys, we predict over 231,000 1-km2 grid cells [±2 standard errors: 170,153-297,710] contain ASM activity – over 40 times that recorded by surveyors. Adapting methods for spatial domain adaptation, we map ASM across 20 total countries, estimating that 4% [2-8%] of territory and 17% [10-30%] of the population are impacted by ASM, which encroaches on a larger share of settlements and ecosystems than previously understood.
papers.zh_title: 估算非洲手工采矿的足迹
papers.zh_abstract: 手工和小规模采矿提供了生计和关键矿物，但也与冲突和环境退化有关。我们通过使用整合地理特征和卫星图像的机器学习模型，创建了非洲手工和小规模采矿足迹的高分辨率地图，从而能够监测这一很大程度上非正规的部门。我们发现手工和小规模采矿比记录的范围更广：在五个进行过实地调查的国家，我们预测超过231,000个1平方公里网格单元[±2个标准误：170,153-297,710]包含手工和小规模采矿活动——是调查人员记录数量的40多倍。通过采用空间域自适应方法，我们在总共20个国家绘制了手工和小规模采矿地图，估计4%[2-8%]的领土和17%[10-30%]的人口受到手工和小规模采矿的影响，其对定居点和生态系统的侵占程度比之前理解的要大。

papers.title: The Conflict-of-Interest Discount in the Marketplace of Ideas
papers.authors: John M. Barrios, Filippo Lancieri, Joshua Levy, Shashank Singh, Tommaso Valletti, Luigi Zingales
papers.abstract: We study how conflicts of interest (CoI)—defined as financial, professional, or ideological stakes held by authors—affect perceived credibility in economics research. Using a randomized controlled survey of both economists and a representative sample of the U.S. public, we find that the presence of a CoI reduces trust in a paper’s findings by 28% on average, with substantial heterogeneity across conflict types. We develop a model in which this reduction in trust reflects both the prevalence of conflicted papers and the expected bias conditional on conflict. To isolate the latter, we introduce the CoI Discount: the perceived value of a conflicted paper relative to an otherwise identical, non-conflicted one. We estimate an average CoI Discount of 39%, implying that conflicted papers are valued at just 61% of non-conflicted ones. We validate these survey-based estimates through three complementary exercises: an empirical analysis of actual citation and disclosure patterns in economics, a meta-analysis of evidence from the medical literature, and simulations using large-language models. Our findings highlight a persistent credibility gap that is not eliminated by current disclosure practices and suggest a broader challenge for scientific trust in the presence of author conflicts.
papers.zh_title: 思想市场中的利益冲突折扣
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了利益冲突（CoI）——定义为作者持有的财务、专业或意识形态利益——如何影响经济学研究的感知可信度。通过对经济学家和美国公众代表性样本进行随机对照调查，我们发现，利益冲突的存在平均使人们对论文研究结果的信任度降低28%，且不同冲突类型之间存在显著的异质性。我们建立了一个模型，其中这种信任度的降低既反映了存在利益冲突的论文的普遍性，也反映了在存在冲突条件下预期的偏差。为了分离出后者，我们引入了“利益冲突折扣”：一篇存在利益冲突的论文相对于另一篇其他方面相同但无利益冲突的论文的感知价值。我们估计平均利益冲突折扣为39%，这意味着存在利益冲突的论文的价值仅为无利益冲突论文的61%。我们通过三个互补性验证来证实这些基于调查的估计：对经济学中实际引用和披露模式的实证分析、对医学文献证据的元分析，以及使用大型语言模型进行的模拟。我们的研究结果突显了一个持续的信任差距，该差距并未被当前的披露实践所消除，并表明在作者存在利益冲突的情况下，科学信任面临更广泛的挑战。

papers.title: The Effects of Deleting Medical Debt from Consumer Credit Reports
papers.authors: Victor Duarte, Julia Fonseca, Divij Kohli, Julian Reif
papers.abstract: One in seven Americans carry medical debt, with $88 billion reported on consumer credit reports. In April 2023, the three major credit bureaus stopped reporting medical debts below $500. We study the effects of this information deletion on consumer credit scores, credit limits and utilization, repayment behavior, and payday borrowing. Using a machine learning model, we show that small medical debts are not meaningfully predictive of defaults, suggesting their deletion should have minimal effect on lending decisions. We test this prediction using two complementary research designs. First, a regression discontinuity analysis comparing individuals above and below the $500 threshold finds no direct benefits from the information deletion, ruling out small changes in credit access. Second, to assess indirect effects, we classify consumers based on whether their predicted default probability increases or decreases when debts are deleted. A difference-in-differences analysis comparing these groups before and after the 2023 policy change reveals no evidence of negative spillover effects. Finally, we show that larger medical debts (≥ $500) are also not meaningfully predictive of default, suggesting that eliminating medical debts entirely from credit reports, as planned under a January 2025 decision by the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, is unlikely to affect credit outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 从消费者信用报告中删除医疗债务的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 七分之一的美国人背负医疗债务，消费者信用报告中报告的医疗债务总额达880亿美元。2023年4月，三大信用报告机构停止报告低于500美元的医疗债务。我们研究了这一信息删除对消费者信用评分、信用额度及使用率、还款行为以及发薪日借贷的影响。使用机器学习模型，我们表明小额医疗债务对违约的预测能力并不显著，这表明删除这些债务对贷款决策的影响应该微乎其微。我们使用两种互补的研究设计来检验这一预测。首先，一项比较500美元阈值上下个体的断点回归分析发现，信息删除并未带来直接益处，排除了信贷准入方面的微小变化。其次，为了评估间接影响，我们根据债务被删除时其预测违约概率是增加还是减少对消费者进行分类。比较这些群体在2023年政策变化前后的双重差分分析显示，没有证据表明存在负面溢出效应。最后，我们表明，较大的医疗债务（≥500美元）对违约的预测能力同样不显著，这表明，正如消费者金融保护局2025年1月决定所计划的那样，将医疗债务完全从信用报告中删除，不太可能影响信贷结果。

papers.title: Non-Wage Amenities
papers.authors: Alexandre Mas
papers.abstract: This chapter reviews the analysis of non-wage amenities in the workplace. The competitive model is the point of departure, but the emphasis is on models of imperfect competition that have greater empirical relevance. In addition to the traditional hedonic model for estimating preferences over job characteristics, I review revealed-preference methods that are better suited when there are deviations from perfect competition.
papers.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：J0, J3, J30, J31, J32, J33
papers.zh_title: 非工资福利
papers.zh_abstract: 本章回顾了对工作场所非工资福利的分析。竞争模型是出发点，但重点在于具有更大经验相关性的不完全竞争模型。除了用于估计对工作特征偏好的传统享乐模型外，我还回顾了在偏离完全竞争时更适用的显示性偏好方法。

papers.title: Non-User Utility and Market Power: The Case of Smartphones
papers.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Rafael Jiménez-Durán, Aaron Leonard, Filip Milojević, Christopher Roth
papers.abstract: Firms can increase the demand for their products and consolidate their market power not only by increasing user utility but also by decreasing non-user utility. In this paper, we examine this mechanism by considering the case of smartphones. In particular, Apple has faced criticism for allegedly degrading the Android user experience by making messages to Android devices appear as green bubbles on iPhones—a salient signal often perceived as reflecting a lower socioeconomic status. Using samples of US college students, we show that green bubbles are widely stigmatized and that a majority of both iPhone and Android users would prefer green bubbles to no longer exist. We then conduct an incentivized deactivation experiment, revealing that iPhone users have a significant willingness to pay to prevent their messages from appearing as green bubbles on other iPhones. Next, we examine the market implications of non-user utility and find that respondents are substantially more likely to choose an Android over an iPhone when green bubbles are removed. We conclude by presenting case studies that illustrate how companies use product features to reduce non-user utility in various markets.
papers.zh_title: 非用户效用与市场势力：以智能手机为例
papers.zh_abstract: 企业不仅可以通过提高用户效用，还可以通过降低非用户效用来增加对其产品的需求并巩固其市场势力。在本文中，我们通过考虑智能手机的案例来研究这一机制。具体而言，苹果公司因涉嫌降低安卓用户体验而受到批评，其做法是让发送给安卓设备的信息在iPhone上显示为绿色气泡——这是一个显著的信号，通常被认为反映了较低的社会经济地位。通过对美国大学生样本的研究，我们表明绿色气泡被广泛污名化，并且大多数iPhone和安卓用户都希望绿色气泡不再存在。随后，我们进行了一项激励性的停用实验，揭示出iPhone用户有显著的支付意愿，以防止他们的信息在其他iPhone上显示为绿色气泡。接下来，我们考察了非用户效用的市场影响，发现当绿色气泡被移除时，受访者选择安卓而非iPhone的可能性显著增加。最后，我们通过案例研究来说明企业如何利用产品功能来降低各种市场中的非用户效用。

papers.title: The Cybernetic Teammate: A Field Experiment on Generative AI Reshaping Teamwork and Expertise
papers.authors: Fabrizio Dell'Acqua, Charles Ayoubi, Hila Lifshitz, Raffaella Sadun, Ethan Mollick, Lilach Mollick, Yi Han, Jeff Goldman, Hari Nair, Stewart Taub, Karim Lakhani
papers.abstract: We examine how artificial intelligence transforms the core pillars of collaboration—performance, expertise sharing, and social engagement—through a pre-registered field experiment with 776 professionals at Procter & Gamble, a global consumer packaged goods company. Working on real product innovation challenges, professionals were randomly assigned to work either with or without AI, and either individually or with another professional in new product development teams. Our findings reveal that AI significantly enhances performance: individuals with AI matched the performance of teams without AI, demonstrating that AI can effectively replicate certain benefits of human collaboration. Moreover, AI breaks down functional silos. Without AI, R&D professionals tended to suggest more technical solutions, while Commercial professionals leaned towards commercially-oriented proposals. Professionals using AI produced balanced solutions, regardless of their professional background. Finally, AI’s language-based interface prompted more positive self-reported emotional responses among participants, suggesting it can fulfill part of the social and motivational role traditionally offered by human teammates. Our results suggest that AI adoption at scale in knowledge work reshapes not only performance but also how expertise and social connectivity manifest within teams, compelling organizations to rethink the very structure of collaborative work.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：M15, M2, O3, O31, O33
papers.zh_title: 控制论队友：关于生成式人工智能重塑团队合作与专业知识的实地实验
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过一项在宝洁公司（一家全球性消费品公司）与776名专业人士进行的预先注册的实地实验，考察了人工智能如何改变协作的核心支柱——绩效、专业知识共享和社交参与。在应对真实的产品创新挑战时，专业人士被随机分配为与人工智能合作或不合作，以及单独工作或与另一位专业人士在新产品开发团队中工作。我们的研究结果表明，人工智能显著提升了绩效：配备人工智能的个人达到了没有人工智能的团队的水平，这表明人工智能可以有效地复制人类协作的某些益处。此外，人工智能打破了职能壁垒。在没有人工智能的情况下，研发专业人士倾向于提出更多技术性解决方案，而商业专业人士则倾向于提出商业导向的提案。使用人工智能的专业人士，无论其专业背景如何，都产生了平衡的解决方案。最后，人工智能基于语言的界面引发了参与者更积极的自我报告情绪反应，这表明它可以部分履行传统上由人类队友提供的社会和激励角色。我们的结果表明，在知识工作中大规模采用人工智能不仅重塑了绩效，还重塑了专业知识和社交联系在团队中的体现方式，迫使组织重新思考协作工作的基本结构。

papers.title: The Tokenomics of Staking
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Zhiheng He, Ke Tang
papers.abstract: Tokens offer convenience in digital networks and earn rewards when staked for consensus generation or economic activities. In our continuous-time model, agents dynamically allocate wealth over on-platform transactions and staking. Aggregate staking ratio crucially shapes platform productivity, grows userbase, and links staking to endogenous reward rates and price dynamics. Transaction fees, token issuance, and user heterogeneity all affect platform lifecycle. Empirical findings support the theoretical predictions: (i) correlation between staking ratio and reward rate is cross-sectionally positive, but time-series-wise negative; (ii) staking ratios positively predict excess returns; (iii) the convenience wedge generates UIP violations and significant crypto carry premia.
papers.zh_title: 质押的代币经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 代币在数字网络中提供便利，并在为共识生成或经济活动进行质押时获得奖励。在我们的连续时间模型中，代理人动态地将财富分配于平台内交易和质押。总质押比率关键性地塑造了平台生产力，增长了用户基础，并将质押与内生奖励率和价格动态联系起来。交易费用、代币发行和用户异质性都影响着平台生命周期。实证发现支持理论预测：(i) 质押比率与奖励率之间的相关性在横截面上为正，但在时间序列上为负；(ii) 质押比率正向预测超额收益；(iii) 便利楔子导致了无抛补利率平价的违反和显著的加密货币利差溢价。

papers.title: Financial and Informational Integration Through Oracle Networks
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Eswar S. Prasad, Daniel Rabetti
papers.abstract: Oracles are software components that enable data exchange between siloed blockchains and external environments, enhancing smart contract capabilities and platform interoperability. Oracles play key roles in decentralized finance and blockchain applications in centralized finance. We find that integration into decentralized oracle networks is positively associated with key measures of economic activity such as Total Value Locked, triggered by positive network effects in adoption and usage. Our study reveals symbiotic gains from enhanced interoperability and network effects across protocols on a given chain and among integrated chains. Oracle integration appears to improve risk-sharing and mitigates contagion, increasing resilience during turbulent periods in crypto markets. Overall, oracles emerge as a crucial component to enable informational and economic integration in decentralized finance ecosystems.
papers.zh_title: 通过预言机网络实现金融和信息整合
papers.zh_abstract: 预言机是软件组件，能够实现孤立的区块链与外部环境之间的数据交换，增强智能合约能力和平台互操作性。预言机在去中心化金融和中心化金融的区块链应用中扮演关键角色。我们发现，接入去中心化预言机网络与总锁仓价值等关键经济活动指标呈正相关，这是由采用和使用中的正网络效应触发的。我们的研究揭示了在特定链上的协议之间以及集成链之间，增强互操作性和网络效应所带来的共生收益。预言机集成似乎改善了风险分担并减轻了传染效应，在加密货币市场的动荡时期增强了韧性。总体而言，预言机成为在去中心化金融生态系统中实现信息和经济整合的关键组成部分。

papers.title: The Bullwhip: Time-to-Build and Sectoral Fluctuations
papers.authors: Yan Leng, Ernest Liu, Yifei Ren, Aleh Tsyvinski
papers.abstract: We develop a theory of sectoral fluctuations driven by the propagation of demand shocks along supply chains with heterogeneous time-to-build production. We solve the model in closed form. Downstream producers respond directly to current demand. Upstream producers, due to time-to-build delays, respond to anticipated future demand. Consequently, hump-shaped demand shocks to downstream goods propagate and amplify along the supply chain, generating pronounced volatility in upstream sectors and creating the bullwhip effect. Empirically and quantitatively, we show that the bullwhip is significant across downstream sectors that are important for final consumption.
papers.zh_title: 牛鞭效应：建设周期与行业波动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发展了一个行业波动理论，该理论由需求冲击沿着具有异质性建设周期生产的供应链传播所驱动。我们以闭式解形式求解了模型。下游生产商直接对当前需求做出反应。上游生产商由于建设周期的延迟，则对未来预期需求做出反应。因此，对下游商品的驼峰形需求冲击沿着供应链传播并放大，在上游行业产生显著的波动性，并创造了牛鞭效应。在实证和定量上，我们表明，对于最终消费重要的下游行业，牛鞭效应是显著的。

papers.title: Interim Valuations, Predictability, and Outcomes in Private Equity
papers.authors: Ege Y. Ercan, Steven N. Kaplan, Ilya A. Strebulaev
papers.abstract: Using a novel dataset of U.S. buyout and VC investments, we study the informativeness of fund managers’ interim valuation reports about portfolio companies on final outcomes. We find that when investors assess the performance of individual portfolio companies, they can do better than just relying on the most recent reported valuation. The history of reported valuations is also informative. Investments with greater past staleness or more frequent markdowns tend to perform more poorly in the future than other investments. We also find that the timing of an investment’s exit is predictable. Moreover, the combined knowledge of interim realized and unrealized returns, past staleness, and past markdown frequency can help predict whether an investment will end up in the left or right tail of all investments. These predictions are informative as early as the first year of the investment.
papers.zh_title: 私募股权中的中期估值、可预测性与结果
papers.zh_abstract: 利用一个关于美国并购和风险投资的新数据集，我们研究了基金管理人关于投资组合公司的中期估值报告对最终结果的信息含量。我们发现，当投资者评估单个投资组合公司的业绩时，他们可以做得比仅仅依赖最近报告的估值更好。报告估值的过往历史也具有信息量。过去估值更陈旧或更频繁减记的投资，其未来表现往往比其他投资更差。我们还发现，投资退出的时机是可预测的。此外，结合中期已实现和未实现回报、过去估值陈旧度和过去减记频率的知识，可以帮助预测一项投资最终会落在所有投资的左尾还是右尾。这些预测在投资的第一年就具有信息量。

papers.title: Firm Selection and Growth in Carbon Offset Markets: Evidence from the Clean Development Mechanism
papers.authors: Qiaoyi Chen, Nicholas Ryan, Daniel Xu
papers.abstract: We study carbon offsets sold by firms in China under the Clean Development Mechanism (CDM). We find that offset-selling firms, meant to cut carbon emissions, instead increase them by 49% after starting an offset project. In a model of firm investment decisions and offset review, we estimate that CDM firms increase emissions due to both the selection of higher-growth firms into projects (35 pp) and because offset projects themselves boost firm growth and therefore emissions (14 pp). The CDM reduces global surplus by causing damages from increased emissions four times greater than private gains from trade in the offset market.
papers.zh_title: 碳抵消市场中的企业选择与增长：来自清洁发展机制的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了中国企业在清洁发展机制（CDM）下出售的碳抵消。我们发现，本应削减碳排放的抵消出售企业，在启动抵消项目后，其碳排放反而增加了49%。在一个关于企业投资决策和抵消审查的模型中，我们估计CDM企业排放增加的原因既包括高增长企业被选择进入项目（35个百分点），也包括抵消项目本身促进了企业增长，从而增加了排放（14个百分点）。CDM因导致排放增加所造成的损害，是抵消市场贸易私人收益的四倍，从而减少了全球总剩余。

papers.title: Instrumental Variables Methods Reveal Larger Effects of Menopausal Hormone Therapy in the Landmark Women’s Health Initiative Clinical Trial
papers.authors: Joshua Angrist, Amanda E. Kowalski, Ljubica Ristovska, Marcia L. Stefanick
papers.abstract: Landmark results from the Women's Health Initiative trial showed that random assignment to menopausal hormone therapy (MHT) elevated risks of breast cancer and other adverse events. Recent analyses argue that MHT risks are small. These analyses report intention-to-treat (ITT) effects, ignoring the fact that many women assigned intervention were non-adherent, while many women assigned control initiated treatment. Instrumental variable (IV) methods and adherence data allow us to estimate effects of MHT on compliers who took MHT if and only if assigned. IV estimates show risks and benefits that are substantially larger than the ITT estimates used to inform MHT guidelines.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C26, H0, I1
papers.zh_title: 工具变量方法揭示标志性妇女健康倡议临床试验中绝经期激素治疗的更大效应
papers.zh_abstract: 来自妇女健康倡议试验的标志性结果显示，随机分配接受绝经期激素治疗（MHT）会增加乳腺癌及其他不良事件的风险。近期的分析认为MHT风险很小。这些分析报告了意向治疗（ITT）效应，但忽略了以下事实：许多被分配至干预组的女性并未依从治疗，而许多被分配至对照组的女性则自行开始了治疗。工具变量（IV）方法和依从性数据使我们能够估计MHT对依从者的效应，这些依从者仅在分配至干预组时才接受MHT。IV估计显示的风险和益处，显著大于用于指导MHT指南的ITT估计值。

papers.title: The Effect of Deactivating Facebook and Instagram on Users’ Emotional State
papers.authors: Hunt Allcott, Matthew Gentzkow, Benjamin Wittenbrink, Juan Carlos Cisneros, Adriana Crespo-Tenorio, Drew Dimmery, Deen Freelon, Sandra González-Bailón, Andrew M. Guess, Young Mie Kim, David Lazer, Neil Malhotra, Devra Moehler, Sameer Nair-Desai, Brendan Nyhan, Jennifer Pan, Jaime Settle, Emily Thorson, Rebekah Tromble, Carlos Velasco Rivera, Arjun Wilkins, Magdalena Wojcieszak, Annie Franco, Chad Kiewiet de Jonge, Winter Mason, Natalie Jomini Stroud, Joshua A. Tucker
papers.abstract: We estimate the effect of social media deactivation on users’ emotional state in two large randomized experiments before the 2020 U.S. election. People who deactivated Facebook for the six weeks before the election reported a 0.060 standard deviation improvement in an index of happiness, depression, and anxiety, relative to controls who deactivated for just the first of those six weeks. People who deactivated Instagram for those six weeks reported a 0.041 standard deviation improvement relative to controls. Exploratory analysis suggests the Facebook effect is driven by people over 35, while the Instagram effect is driven by women under 25.
papers.zh_title: 停用Facebook和Instagram对用户情绪状态的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在2020年美国大选前的两项大规模随机实验中估计了停用社交媒体对用户情绪状态的影响。与那些仅在六周中的第一周停用Facebook的对照组相比，在大选前六周停用Facebook的人报告称，在包含快乐、抑郁和焦虑的指数上改善了0.060个标准差。与对照组相比，在这六周内停用Instagram的人报告改善了0.041个标准差。探索性分析表明，Facebook的影响是由35岁以上人群驱动的，而Instagram的影响是由25岁以下女性驱动的。

papers.title: The Political Power of Firms
papers.authors: Matilde Bombardini, Francesco Trebbi
papers.abstract: This paper presents a holistic view of the channels of political influence of large corporations in modern democracies, focusing not only on well-studied instruments, such as campaign contributions and lobbying, but also on more opaque ones, such as charitable giving, political connections, dark money, public advocacy, and employee mobilization. Our quantitative perspective draws on recent work on US politics, including congressional voting, special interest politics, corporate political connections, grassroots, and philanthropic activities. In the process, the chapter offers also a discussion of recent methodological innovations around money in politics. We conclude with some considerations on corporate political disclosure.
papers.zh_title: 企业的政治权力
papers.zh_abstract: 本文呈现了现代民主国家中大型企业政治影响力渠道的整体视图，不仅关注研究充分的工具，如竞选捐款和游说，还关注更不透明的工具，如慈善捐赠、政治关系、暗钱、公共倡导和员工动员。我们的量化视角借鉴了近期关于美国政治的研究，包括国会投票、特殊利益政治、企业政治关系、草根和慈善活动。在此过程中，本章还讨论了围绕金钱政治的最新方法论创新。最后，我们提出了一些关于企业政治信息披露的思考。

papers.title: Quotas in General Equilibrium
papers.authors: David Baqaee, Kunal Sangani
papers.abstract: We study economies with quotas and other quantity-based distortions. Unlike economies with wedge-based distortions, economies with quotas are constrained efficient, not subject to the theory of second best, and satisfy macro-envelope conditions. Thus, the aggregate effects of changes in technologies, distortions, and policy can be summarized by a small set of sufficient statistics. We provide a nonparametric and nonlinear characterization of how quota and productivity changes affect aggregate output, and we derive the welfare costs of misallocation from an inverse demand system that maps quota prices to quota levels. We illustrate the framework by quantifying the effects of reforms in several settings: raising the cap on H-1B visas, relaxing single-family zoning in U.S. cities, eliminating New York City’s taxi medallions, phasing out U.S. quotas on Chinese textiles and apparel, and removing capital controls in Argentina. Across these applications, our method flexibly measures the costs of quota distortions and the gains from reform.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI；JEL：D5, E0, E1, E60, F0, F10, F11, F38, O4, O41
papers.zh_title: 一般均衡中的配额
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了存在配额和其他基于数量的扭曲的经济体。与存在楔子型扭曲的经济体不同，存在配额的经济体是受约束有效的，不受次优理论的影响，并且满足宏观包络条件。因此，技术、扭曲和政策变化的总体效应可以通过一小组充分统计量来概括。我们提供了配额和生产率变化如何影响总产出的非参数和非线性特征描述，并从一个将配额价格映射到配额水平的逆需求系统中推导出资源错配的福利成本。我们通过在几个情境中量化改革的影响来说明该框架：提高H-1B签证的上限、放松美国城市的独栋住宅区划、取消纽约市的出租车牌照、逐步取消美国对中国纺织品和服装的配额，以及取消阿根廷的资本管制。在这些应用中，我们的方法灵活地衡量了配额扭曲的成本和改革的收益。

papers.title: Housing Supply and Housing Affordability
papers.authors: Nathaniel Baum-Snow, Gilles Duranton
papers.abstract: The decline in housing affordability over recent decades has promoted an enhanced interest in housing supply. This chapter presents descriptive evidence about the evolution of us housing prices, quantities, and regulations since 1980, indicating that supply constraints appear to be increasingly binding. We then provide an overview of the various approaches used to model construction and land development for homogeneous and heterogeneous housing in static and dynamic contexts to understand housing supply. Our treatment incorporates empirical implementation and policy implications throughout. Finally, we provide an overview of quantitative evidence on the consequences of relaxing various types of supply constraints.
papers.zh_title: 住房供给与住房可负担性
papers.zh_abstract: 近几十年来住房可负担性的下降，激发了人们对住房供给的更多关注。本章提供了自1980年以来美国住房价格、数量和监管演变的描述性证据，表明供给约束似乎越来越具有约束力。然后，我们概述了用于在静态和动态背景下对同质和异质住房的建设和土地开发进行建模的各种方法，以理解住房供给。我们的论述贯穿始终地包含了实证实施和政策含义。最后，我们概述了关于放松各类供给约束后果的定量证据。

papers.title: Performance Capital Flows in DC Pensions
papers.authors: Bryan Gutierrez Cortez, Victoria Ivashina, Juliana Salomao
papers.abstract: Are defined contribution (DC) pension funds' capital flows sensitive to performance? We examine pressures from individual account holders who can switch their pension managers. Using novel data on retirement accounts for nearly 10 million individuals, we analyze switching behavior based on the plan’s risk profile. Switching across managers within the same pension product is not uncommon, and the tendency to change managers rises over time. Capital flows are sensitive to and increase with fund performance. This sensitivity creates pressure on managers, shaping their incentives and portfolio decisions. A quasi-exogenous increase in outflows leads managers to shift toward higher-yielding bond holdings.
papers.zh_title: 固定缴款养老金中的业绩资本流动
papers.zh_abstract: 固定缴款（DC）养老基金的资本流动对业绩敏感吗？我们考察了来自可以更换其养老金管理人的个人账户持有人的压力。利用近1000万人的退休账户新数据，我们基于计划的风险状况分析了转换行为。在同一养老金产品内更换管理人并不罕见，而且更换管理人的倾向随时间推移而增加。资本流动对基金业绩敏感，并随业绩增长而增加。这种敏感性给管理人带来了压力，塑造了他们的激励和投资组合决策。准外生的资金流出增加导致管理人转向持有更高收益的债券。

papers.title: Does Homeownership Matter? The Long-Term Consequences of Losing a House during the Great Recession
papers.authors: Heidi Artigue, Patrick Bayer, Fernando V. Ferreira, Stephen Ross
papers.abstract: We examine the long-term impact of owning versus renting a home in the United States. Our research design compares two groups of homeowners who experienced similar negative income shocks during the Great Recession but had different probabilities of retaining their homes due to mortgage modifications. While the two groups exhibit nearly identical pre-trends, they diverge by 36 percentage points in home retention. More than half of this disparity persists nearly a decade later, translating into average housing capital gains of $83,000. However, homeownership and housing wealth did not affect creditworthiness, consumption, or neighborhood quality, partly due to tightening credit constraints.
papers.zh_title: 住房所有权重要吗？大衰退期间失去房屋的长期后果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了在美国拥有住房与租赁住房的长期影响。我们的研究设计比较了两组在大衰退期间经历了相似负面收入冲击的房主，但由于抵押贷款修改，他们保留房屋的概率不同。虽然这两组人表现出几乎相同的先期趋势，但在房屋保留率上相差了36个百分点。这种差异的一半以上在近十年后仍然存在，转化为平均83,000美元的住房资本收益。然而，住房所有权和住房财富并未影响信用度、消费或社区质量，部分原因是信贷约束收紧。

papers.title: Public Finance Implications of Economic Inequality
papers.authors: Alan J. Auerbach
papers.abstract: This paper considers questions about the implications of rising inequality for the theory and practice of public finance. It begins by addressing fundamental reasons why the distribution of income or wealth on an annual basis before taxes and transfers offers insufficient information: (1) it does not tell us what resources are actually available to households for consumption; and (2) in providing a snapshot of the resources available to individuals of different ages at a given moment in time, without controlling for life-cycle related differences or income dynamics, it can provide a misleading estimate of the underlying degree of inequality. The paper then considers the implications of high and perhaps rising economic inequality for the design of government policy: top marginal tax rates, phase-outs of government policies for those with higher incomes, the political economy of inequality, and other subjects.
papers.zh_title: 经济不平等的公共财政含义
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了关于日益加剧的不平等对公共财政理论与实践影响的问题。它首先阐述了为何基于税前和转移支付前的年度收入或财富分布提供的信息不足的根本原因：（1）它没有告诉我们家庭实际可用于消费的资源是什么；（2）在提供特定时点上不同年龄个体可用资源的快照时，由于未控制生命周期相关差异或收入动态，它可能对潜在的不平等程度提供有误导性的估计。然后，本文考虑了高且可能日益加剧的经济不平等对政府政策设计的影响：最高边际税率、对高收入者政府政策的逐步退出、不平等的政治经济学以及其他主题。

papers.title: The Long Road to Equality: Racial Capital and Generational Convergence
papers.authors: Patrick Bayer, Kerwin Kofi Charles, JoonYup Park
papers.abstract: The slow convergence of racial disparities in economic outcomes since 1870 suggests a high degree of intergenerational persistence in socioeconomic status at the group level. In contrast, microdata-based estimates of family-level intergenerational mobility suggest much lower persistence. These models also consistently find large, unexplained racial gaps in mobility—even after controlling extensively for family and neighborhood characteristics—implying continued slow convergence in the future. To reconcile these patterns, we introduce the concept of racial capital: the collective material and nonmaterial assets of the racial groups to which a child is exposed while growing up. We show that racial capital (i) explains a substantial share of racial gaps in adult outcomes, (ii) significantly narrows and often reverses estimated racial mobility gaps, and (iii) has the strongest effects where racial dissociation from the White majority group is greatest, as measured by residential and marriage segregation. Unlike standard models, our framework predicts a long-run steady state of near racial equality, but also highlights how the influence of racial capital substantially slows the path to that equilibrium.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：J15, J71, R31, R32
papers.zh_title: 通往平等的漫漫长路：种族资本与代际趋同
papers.zh_abstract: 自1870年以来，经济结果中种族差异的缓慢趋同表明，在群体层面上，社会经济地位具有高度的代际持续性。相比之下，基于微观数据的家庭层面代际流动性估计则显示出低得多的持续性。这些模型还一致发现，即使在广泛控制家庭和社区特征之后，流动性中仍存在巨大的、无法解释的种族差距——这意味着未来将继续缓慢趋同。为了调和这些模式，我们引入了种族资本的概念：儿童成长过程中所接触的种族群体的集体物质和非物质资产。我们表明，种族资本（i）解释了成人结果中种族差距的很大一部分，（ii）显著缩小并常常逆转了估计的种族流动性差距，并且（iii）在种族与白人多数群体的分离程度最大（以居住和婚姻隔离衡量）的地方，其影响最强。与标准模型不同，我们的框架预测了一个接近种族平等的长期稳态，但也强调了种族资本的影响如何显著减缓了通往该均衡的路径。

papers.title: The Long-Run Impacts of Mentoring Underrepresented Minority Groups in Economics
papers.authors: Francisca M. Antman, Sheng Qu, Trevon D. Logan, Bruce A. Weinberg
papers.abstract: We conduct a long-run evaluation of one of the oldest professional mentoring programs for underrepresented groups in economics, the American Economic Association Mentoring Program (AEAMP). The AEAMP was established to address the underrepresentation of racial/ethnic minority groups by mentoring doctoral students and new Ph.D.s in economics. We compare professional outcomes of mentees with similar individuals from the same Ph.D. cohort who did not participate in the program. While there are no differences for many outcomes, mentees are more likely to hold a tenure-track or tenured position. Our results point to the potential for mentoring programs to address persistent racial/ethnic disparities.
papers.zh_title: 指导经济学中代表性不足少数群体的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对经济学中代表性不足群体最古老的专业指导项目之一——美国经济协会指导项目（AEAMP）进行了长期评估。AEAMP旨在通过指导经济学博士生和新晋博士来解决种族/族裔少数群体代表性不足的问题。我们将受指导者的职业结果与来自同一博士年级但未参与该项目的相似个体进行了比较。虽然许多结果没有差异，但受指导者更有可能拥有终身教职轨道或已获终身教职的职位。我们的结果指出了指导项目在解决持续的种族/族裔差异方面的潜力。

papers.title: Interventionist Preferences and the Welfare State: The Case of In-Kind Aid
papers.authors: Sandro Ambuehl, B. Douglas Bernheim, Tony Q. Fan, Zachary Freitas-Groff
papers.abstract: Why is in-kind aid a prominent feature of welfare systems? We present a lab-in-the-field experiment involving members of the general U.S. population and SNAP recipients. After documenting a widespread desire to limit recipients’ choices, we quantify the relative importance of (i) welfarist motives, (ii) utility or disutility derived from curtailing another’s autonomy, and (iii) absolutist attitudes concerning the appropriate form of aid. Choices primarily reflect the two non-welfarist motives. Because people systematically misperceive recipient preferences, their interventions are more restrictive than they intend. Interventionist preferences and non-welfarist motives are more pronounced among the political right, particularly when recipients are black.
papers.zh_title: 干预主义偏好与福利国家：以实物援助为例
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么实物援助是福利体系的一个突出特征？我们进行了一项涉及美国普通民众和SNAP（补充营养援助计划）受助者的实地实验。在记录到普遍存在限制受助者选择的愿望后，我们量化了以下因素的相对重要性：（i）福利主义动机，（ii）从限制他人自主权中获得的效用或产生的负效用，以及（iii）关于援助适当形式的绝对主义态度。选择主要反映了两种非福利主义动机。由于人们系统性地误解了受助者的偏好，他们的干预比其意图更为严格。干预主义偏好和非福利主义动机在政治右翼中更为明显，特别是当受助者是黑人时。

papers.title: Labor Market Polarization and Inequality: A Roy Model Perspective
papers.authors: Andrés Erosa, Luisa Fuster, Gueorgui Kambourov, Richard Rogerson
papers.abstract: We study the forces driving polarization and higher wage inequality since 1980 using a structural model of occupation choice in the tradition of Roy (1951). In our model, changes in relative occupational skill prices proxy for changes in relative demand for occupational labor services. Our analysis yields three main findings. First, although changes in skill prices have quantitatively important effects on employment shares and mean wages, they play essentially no role in accounting for the sharp rise in wage inequality. Second, changes in relative wages are driven by changes in higher order moments and do not reflect changes in relative demand. Third, changes in the variance of idiosyncratic within occupation productivity are the dominant factor behind the sharp rise in inequality.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场极化与不平等：一个罗伊模型视角
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用罗伊（1951）传统下的职业选择结构模型，研究了自1980年以来推动极化与更高工资不平等的力量。在我们的模型中，相对职业技能价格的变化代表了职业劳动力服务相对需求的变化。我们的分析得出三个主要发现。第一，尽管技能价格的变化对就业份额和平均工资有数量上显著的影响，但它们在解释工资不平等的急剧上升方面基本上没有作用。第二，相对工资的变化是由更高阶矩的变化驱动的，并不反映相对需求的变化。第三，特定职业内个体生产率方差的变动是不平等急剧上升背后的主导因素。

papers.title: Global Networks, Monetary Policy and Trade
papers.authors: Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Can Soylu, Muhammed A. Yildirim
papers.abstract: We develop a multi-country, multi-sector New Keynesian model with incomplete markets, input-output linkages, and heterogeneous sectoral price rigidities to study the macroeconomic effects of tariffs. Tariffs act simultaneously as demand and supply shocks. A risk-sharing wedge, driven by terms-of-trade effects and revalued net foreign assets, summarizes the wealth transfer in general equilibrium and determines whether the tariff-imposing country gains or loses. This wedge interacts with a propagation matrix encoding network structure, sectoral rigidity, and cross-country monetary policy heterogeneity, which governs how inherited real marginal-cost distortions feed into inflation and consumption. Through input-output linkages, transitory tariffs generate persistent distortions, unlike standard New Keynesian benchmarks. These distortions exceed what N-country monetary policy can offset, even under flexible exchange rates. Quantitatively, the 2025-2026 tariffs are stagflationary for the U.S. and yield inflation or deflation abroad depending on trade diversion and monetary policy heterogeneity. Tariff threats alone generate inflation shaped by retaliation expectations.
papers.zh_title: 全球网络、货币政策与贸易
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含不完全市场、投入产出关联和异质性部门价格粘性的多国、多部门新凯恩斯模型，以研究关税的宏观经济效应。关税同时作为需求冲击和供给冲击。一个由贸易条件效应和重估的净外国资产驱动的风险分担楔子，概括了一般均衡中的财富转移，并决定了征收关税的国家是获益还是受损。这个楔子与一个编码了网络结构、部门粘性以及跨国货币政策异质性的传播矩阵相互作用，后者决定了继承的实际边际成本扭曲如何传导至通胀和消费。通过投入产出关联，临时关税会产生持续的扭曲，这与标准的新凯恩斯基准模型不同。这些扭曲超出了N国货币政策所能抵消的范围，即使在浮动汇率下也是如此。在数量上，2025-2026年的关税对美国来说是滞胀的，并根据贸易转移和货币政策异质性，在国外产生通胀或通缩。仅关税威胁本身就会产生由报复预期所塑造的通胀。

papers.title: Taxes and Private Firms’ Capital Structure Choices
papers.authors: Mara Faccio, Jin Xu
papers.abstract: Using limitations to the deductibility of interest payments triggered by the introduction of interest ceiling rules globally, we show that affected private firms reduce leverage relative to unaffected firms. In support of a causal effect of taxes on corporate capital structure choices, we show that the results hold for firms near the thresholds triggering the limitations, in a propensity score matched sample, and in countries required to adopt the interest ceiling rules. In contrast, falsification tests show no reduction in leverage for affected firms around pseudo-reform years. Furthermore, within a country, firms with a higher fraction of nondeductible interest payments are less responsive to tax rate changes. More broadly, across 93 countries, we document that private firms tend to decrease leverage in response to tax rate cuts and increase leverage in response to corporate tax rate hikes.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IFM；JEL：F30, G30, G32, G38, H2, H25, H26
papers.zh_title: 税收与私营企业的资本结构选择
papers.zh_abstract: 利用全球范围内引入利息上限规则所触发的利息扣除限制，我们表明受影响的私营企业相对于未受影响的企业降低了杠杆率。为了支持税收对企业资本结构选择的因果效应，我们展示了在接近触发限制门槛的企业、在倾向得分匹配样本中，以及在需要采用利息上限规则的国家中，结果均成立。相比之下，反事实检验显示，在伪改革年份前后，受影响企业的杠杆率并未下降。此外，在一个国家内部，不可扣除利息支付比例较高的企业对税率变化的反应较小。更广泛地，在93个国家中，我们记录了私营企业倾向于在减税时降低杠杆率，并在公司税率提高时增加杠杆率。

papers.title: Partisan Trust in the Federal Reserve
papers.authors: Carola Binder, Cody Couture, Abhiprerna Smit
papers.abstract: This paper examines partisanship in public perceptions of the Federal Reserve. In all years from 2001 through 2023, trust in the Federal Reserve was highest for respondents of the same party as the President. The partisan effects were larger than other demographic differences in trust, but do not explain the large partisan gap in inflation expectations in those years. We conducted a new survey-based information experiment before and after the Presidential inauguration in 2025, and found a changed pattern: Republicans continued to have lower trust in the Fed than did Democrats, even after a Republican President was elected and took office. Yet, Republicans had much lower inflation expectations than Democrats. Responses to open-ended survey questions point to tariffs and President Trump himself as most salient to consumers when considering how inflation will evolve.
papers.meta: Programs：ME；JEL：E02, E03, E30, E5, E51, E58
papers.zh_title: 对美联储的党派信任
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了公众对美联储看法中的党派性。在2001年至2023年的所有年份中，对美联储的信任度在那些与总统同属一个政党的受访者中最高。党派效应大于信任度方面的其他人口统计学差异，但不能解释那些年份中通胀预期的巨大党派差距。我们在2025年总统就职典礼前后进行了一项新的基于调查的信息实验，并发现了一种变化的模式：即使在一位共和党总统当选并上任后，共和党人对美联储的信任度仍然低于民主党人。然而，共和党人的通胀预期远低于民主党人。对开放式调查问题的回答指出，在消费者考虑通胀将如何演变时，关税和特朗普总统本人是最突出的因素。

papers.title: Educational Ambition, Marital Sorting, and Inequality
papers.authors: Frederik Almar, Benjamin Friedrich, Ana Reynoso, Bastian Schulz, Rune M. Vejlin
papers.abstract: This paper revisits the link between education-based marriage market sorting and income inequality. Leveraging Danish administrative data, we develop a novel categorization of “ambition types” that is based on starting wages and wage growth trajectories associated with detailed educational programs. We find a substantial increase in assortative matching by educational ambition over time, and the marriage market explains more than 40% of increasing inequality since 1980. In contrast, sorting trends are flat with the commonly-used educational level categorization. We conclude that the mapping from education to types matters crucially for conclusions about how education-based marriage market sorting contributes to rising income inequality.
papers.zh_title: 教育抱负、婚姻匹配与不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 本文重新审视了基于教育的婚姻市场匹配与收入不平等之间的联系。利用丹麦的行政数据，我们基于与详细教育项目相关的起薪和工资增长轨迹，开发了一种新颖的“抱负类型”分类。我们发现，随着时间的推移，基于教育抱负的选型匹配显著增加，并且自1980年以来，婚姻市场解释了超过40%的不平等加剧。相比之下，使用常用的教育水平分类时，匹配趋势是平稳的。我们得出结论，从教育到类型的映射对于关于基于教育的婚姻市场匹配如何导致收入不平等上升的结论至关重要。

papers.title: If You Had One Shot: Scale and Herding in Innovation Experiments
papers.authors: Ashish Arora, Sharique Hasan, William D. Miles
papers.abstract: Solving complex problems- in medicine, engineering, and other technological domains- often requires exploring multiple approaches, particularly when significant uncertainty exists about which one will lead to success. Conventional wisdom assumes that having many experimenters independently decide which approaches to pursue increases diversity and, thus, also the chances of finding a solution. However, if experimenters herd toward the most promising approach, this convergence may reduce diversity and thus the likelihood of solving the problem. In this paper, we develop a simple model to show that, holding the total number of experiments constant, markets dominated by a few large-scale experimenters- firms conducting multiple experiments- explore more diverse approaches than markets with many single-shot experimenters. Single-shot experimenters tend to converge on the most promising approach, while multi-experimenters are more likely to diversify to avoid the correlation inherent in pursuing multiple experiments within the same approach. We test our model's predictions using data from pharmaceutical R&D. Our analysis shows that increasing the average number of experiments per firm by one unit raises target diversity by over three standard deviations. In turn, a one-standard deviation increase from the mean in target diversity boosts the likelihood of at least one experiment reaching Phase 1 clinical trials by 25.9 percentage points. Our findings inform policies for the optimal allocation of experiments across firms to maximize approach diversity and market-level success.
papers.zh_title: 如果你只有一次机会：创新实验中的规模与从众行为
papers.zh_abstract: 解决复杂问题——在医学、工程和其他技术领域——通常需要探索多种方法，尤其是在哪种方法能带来成功存在重大不确定性时。传统观点认为，让许多实验者独立决定追求哪种方法会增加多样性，从而也增加找到解决方案的机会。然而，如果实验者都从众于最有希望的方法，这种趋同可能会减少多样性，从而降低解决问题的可能性。在本文中，我们开发了一个简单模型来表明，在保持实验总数不变的情况下，由少数大规模实验者（即进行多项实验的企业）主导的市场，比拥有许多单次实验者的市场探索更多样化的方法。单次实验者倾向于集中在最有希望的方法上，而多次实验者更有可能进行多样化，以避免在同一方法内进行多项实验所固有的相关性。我们使用制药研发的数据来检验我们模型的预测。我们的分析表明，每个企业的平均实验数量增加一个单位，会使目标多样性提高超过三个标准差。反过来，目标多样性从均值增加一个标准差，会使至少一项实验进入一期临床试验的可能性提高25.9个百分点。我们的发现为如何在企业间最优分配实验以最大化方法多样性和市场层面成功的政策提供了信息。

papers.title: Putting Economics Back Into Geoeconomics
papers.authors: Christopher Clayton, Matteo Maggiori, Jesse Schreger
papers.abstract: Geoeconomics is the use of a country’s economic strength to exert influence on foreign entities to achieve geopolitical or economic goals. We discuss how concepts of power in the political science and economics literature can be used to guide research on geoeconomics. Economic threats as a form of coercion have seen a recent resurgence. We show how different types of threats can be modeled using simple tools and discuss what channels their potential effectiveness is based on. We discuss important open questions for the future literature to pursue.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ITI, POL；JEL：F02, F12, F15, F33, F36, F38, F5, P43, P45
papers.zh_title: 将经济学重新注入地缘经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 地缘经济学是利用一个国家的经济实力对外国实体施加影响，以实现地缘政治或经济目标。我们讨论了政治科学和经济学文献中的权力概念如何用于指导地缘经济学研究。作为一种胁迫形式的经济威胁近期重新抬头。我们展示了如何使用简单工具对不同类型的威胁进行建模，并讨论了其潜在有效性所基于的渠道。我们讨论了未来文献需要研究的重要开放性问题。

papers.title: Anticipated Discrimination and Major Choice
papers.authors: Louis-Pierre Lepage, Xiaomeng Li, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: We study whether gender differences in university major choices result from anticipated labor market discrimination. First, we document two novel facts using administrative transcript records from a large Midwestern university: women are less likely to study science, technology, engineering, and mathematics (STEM) as well as business and economics, but 1) those who do are positively selected on ability, and 2) obtain higher grades conditional on ability. Second, we show that these facts are consistent with a signaling model in which women anticipate greater labor market discrimination in STEM, business, and economics than in other fields. Third, we provide direct empirical evidence of anticipated discrimination using a student survey. The survey reveals striking patterns of anticipated discrimination by women, particularly in STEM, business, and economics, affecting both expected economic outcomes such as wages as well as expected workplace conditions. We conclude by showing that anticipated discrimination explains women's course taking and intended major choices, but not men's.
papers.zh_title: 预期歧视与专业选择
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了大学专业选择中的性别差异是否源于预期的劳动力市场歧视。首先，我们利用一所中西部大型大学的行政成绩单记录，记录了两个新的事实：女性学习科学、技术、工程和数学（STEM）以及商业和经济学的可能性较小，但1）那些选择这些专业的女性在能力上是正向选择的，并且2）在给定能力的情况下获得了更高的成绩。其次，我们表明这些事实与一个信号模型一致，在该模型中，女性预期在STEM、商业和经济学领域比在其他领域面临更大的劳动力市场歧视。第三，我们利用一项学生调查提供了预期歧视的直接经验证据。该调查揭示了女性预期歧视的显著模式，特别是在STEM、商业和经济学领域，这既影响了预期的经济结果（如工资），也影响了预期的工作场所条件。最后，我们表明预期歧视解释了女性的课程选择和意向专业选择，但不能解释男性的选择。

papers.title: Do Time-Constraints Matter? How, Why, and For Whom?
papers.authors: Kala Krishna, Pelin Akyol, Esma Ozer
papers.abstract: Exams are designed to rank students objectively by their abilities, including elements such as time limits, the number and difficulty of questions, and negative marking policies. Using data from a lab-in-field experiment, we develop and estimate a model of student behavior in multiple-choice exams that incorporates the effects of time constraints and use it to conduct policy analyses for designing more efficient exams in sorting students. We find that additional time benefits men more than women. Our estimated model shows that this is driven by gender differences in the signal production function for the correct answers. Time has a smaller impact on women, while ability and difficulty play a larger role. Risk aversion, in contrast to what is suggested in the literature, does not differ significantly by gender, and confidence rises with more time. Our policy experiments find that exams more effectively rank students when ranking is gender-specific and that time pressure, question difficulty, and student ability have non-monotonic effects on sorting.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, IO；JEL：C69, C93, D89, I29, L0
papers.zh_title: 时间限制重要吗？如何、为何以及对谁重要？
papers.zh_abstract: 考试旨在通过能力客观地对学生进行排名，其设计要素包括时间限制、题目数量和难度以及倒扣分政策。利用一项实验室实地实验的数据，我们构建并估计了一个包含时间限制影响的多项选择题考试中学生行为模型，并利用该模型进行政策分析，以设计能更有效区分学生的考试。我们发现，额外的时间对男性的益处大于女性。我们的估计模型表明，这是由于正确答案的信号生产函数存在性别差异。时间对女性的影响较小，而能力和难度则起着更大的作用。与文献中的观点相反，风险厌恶程度在性别上没有显著差异，并且自信心随着时间增加而增强。我们的政策实验发现，当排名按性别分别进行时，考试能更有效地对学生进行排序，并且时间压力、题目难度和学生能力对区分效果具有非单调的影响。

papers.title: Measuring Income and Income Inequality
papers.authors: Conor J. Clarke, Wojciech Kopczuk
papers.abstract: Income inequality is important, but attempts to measure it arrive at strikingly different conclusions. Why? We use recent disputes over measuring United States income inequality to return to first principles about both the income concept and inequality measurement. We emphasize two broad points. First, no measure of the income distribution is truly comprehensive, or could attempt to be comprehensive without making controversial choices. We document the practical and conceptual problems that the standard ideal—comprehensive Haig-Simons income—raises. Second, much of the controversy in this area turns on the many tradeoffs between starting with individual tax data versus attempting to match more expansive income concepts. Individual tax data reflects only a shrinking subset of a more comprehensive income concept—but it is individual data. Broader alternatives, on the other hand, are harder to allocate to individuals. We document some of the most important and contestable assumptions that allocating national income requires.
papers.zh_title: 衡量收入与收入不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 收入不平等很重要，但衡量它的尝试得出了截然不同的结论。为什么？我们利用近期关于衡量美国收入不平等的争议，回归到关于收入概念和不平等衡量的基本原则。我们强调两个主要观点。首先，没有一种收入分配的衡量标准是真正全面的，或者试图做到全面而不做出有争议的选择。我们记录了标准理想——全面的黑格-西蒙斯收入——所引发的实际和概念性问题。其次，该领域的许多争议都源于从使用个人税收数据入手与试图匹配更广泛的收入概念之间的诸多权衡。个人税收数据仅反映了更全面收入概念中一个日益缩小的子集——但它是个人层面的数据。另一方面，更广泛的替代方案则更难分配给个人。我们记录了在分配国民收入时所需的一些最重要且最具争议的假设。

papers.title: Talk Therapy and Human Capital in Adolescence: Evidence from Nepal
papers.authors: Eric V. Edmonds, Priya Mukherjee, Nikhilesh Prakash, Nishith Prakash, Shwetlena Sabarwal
papers.abstract: We examine the impact of a randomized therapy intervention on Nepali adolescents at risk of school dropout. Our study is the largest of its kind (N = 1,707) and is novel in that participation does not require a preexisting diagnosis. Ninety percent of those offered therapy participated, with younger adolescents demonstrating higher compliance. Among those who complied, therapy significantly reduced psychological distress, improved emotional regulation, and enhanced life perspective, even in individuals without baseline mental health issues. However, these improvements in well-being did not lead to increased school attendance or better cognitive performance, suggesting that additional interventions may be necessary to enhance educational engagement in low-resource settings.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EH；JEL：I12, I15, I25, I31, O12
papers.zh_title: 谈话疗法与青少年时期的人力资本：来自尼泊尔的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一项随机化治疗干预对尼泊尔面临辍学风险的青少年的影响。我们的研究是同类研究中规模最大的（样本量 N = 1,707），其新颖之处在于参与并不需要预先存在的诊断。在提供治疗的人中，90% 参与了治疗，其中年龄较小的青少年表现出更高的依从性。在依从者中，治疗显著减轻了心理困扰，改善了情绪调节，并增强了生活视角，即使在基线没有心理健康问题的个体中也是如此。然而，这些幸福感的改善并未导致更高的出勤率或更好的认知表现，这表明在资源匮乏的环境中，可能需要额外的干预措施来增强教育参与度。

papers.title: The Economics of Encouragement: Can A Simple Email Shape Major Choice?
papers.authors: Olivia Edwards, Jonathan Meer
papers.abstract: We examine the impact of encouragement emails sent to high-performing students in a principles of microeconomics course at a large state university, aimed at motivating them to take additional economics courses and consider an economics major or minor. Using a regression discontinuity design, we find some evidence of an increase in the likelihood of enrolling in intermediate microeconomics, especially for first-generation college students and underrepresented minorities, but limited effects on major switching or declaring an economics minor. Our findings suggest sustained interventions may be necessary to produce lasting effects
papers.zh_title: 鼓励的经济学：一封简单的电子邮件能改变专业选择吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了向一所大型州立大学微观经济学原理课程中成绩优异的学生发送鼓励邮件的影响，这些邮件旨在激励他们选修更多经济学课程并考虑主修或辅修经济学。利用断点回归设计，我们发现一些证据表明，这增加了他们注册中级微观经济学的可能性，尤其是对于第一代大学生和代表性不足的少数族裔，但对转换专业或申报经济学辅修的影响有限。我们的研究结果表明，可能需要持续的干预才能产生持久的效果。

papers.title: Growing Awareness: Evaluating the Impact of Environmental Education on Attitudes, Knowledge, and Behavior
papers.authors: Jennifer Alix-García, Christopher R. Knittel
papers.abstract: Mangroves provide vital ecosystem services like storm surge protection and carbon sequestration, but their coverage is rapidly declining. This study evaluates an environmental education program in the Dominican Republic, targeting children’s attitudes, knowledge, behaviors, and willingness to pay for conservation. The program boosted attitudes, especially in girls, with modest, non-significant behavioral changes. There were also positive spillover effects on peers and parents, with non-treated peers in clubs showing increased mangrove preference and positive attitude shifts in parents.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EEE；JEL：C93, I25, Q57
papers.zh_title: 意识增长：评估环境教育对态度、知识和行为的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 红树林提供重要的生态系统服务，如风暴潮防护和碳封存，但其覆盖面积正在迅速减少。本研究评估了多米尼加共和国的一项环境教育项目，该项目针对儿童对保护的态度、知识、行为和支付意愿。该项目提升了态度，尤其是在女孩中，但行为变化不大且不显著。对同伴和家长也存在积极的溢出效应，俱乐部中未接受干预的同伴表现出对红树林偏好的增加，家长的态度也发生了积极转变。

papers.title: The Risk Sensitivity of Global Liquidity Flows: Heterogeneity, Evolution and Drivers
papers.authors: Stefan Avdjiev, Leonardo Gambacorta, Linda S. Goldberg, Stefano Schiaffi
papers.abstract: The period after the Global Financial Crisis (GFC) was characterized by a considerable risk migration within global liquidity flows, away from cross-border bank lending towards international bond issuance. We show that the post-GFC shifts in the risk sensitivities of global liquidity flows are related to the tightness of the balance sheet (capital and leverage) constraints faced by international (bank and non-bank) lenders and to the migration of borrowers across funding sources. We document that the risk sensitivity of global liquidity flows is higher when funding is provided by financial intermediaries that are facing greater balance sheet constraints. We also provide evidence that the post-GFC migration of borrowers from cross-border loans to international debt securities was associated with a decline in the risk sensitivity of global liquidity flows to EME borrowers.
papers.zh_title: 全球流动性流动的风险敏感性：异质性、演变与驱动因素
papers.zh_abstract: 全球金融危机后的时期，全球流动性流动内部出现了显著的风险迁移，从跨境银行贷款转向国际债券发行。我们表明，全球金融危机后全球流动性流动风险敏感性的变化，与国际（银行和非银行）贷款人面临的资产负债表（资本和杠杆）约束的紧密度，以及借款人跨融资来源的迁移有关。我们证明，当资金由面临更大资产负债表约束的金融中介提供时，全球流动性流动的风险敏感性更高。我们还提供证据表明，全球金融危机后借款人从跨境贷款向国际债务证券的迁移，与新兴市场经济体借款人全球流动性流动风险敏感性的下降有关。

papers.title: Pension Reform and Labor Supply: Retention and Productivity under a Pension Cut
papers.authors: Andrew C. Johnston, Jonah E. Rockoff, James R. Harrington
papers.abstract: We examine the effect of a representative pension reform on the retention and productivity of workers. The reform cut pension annuities and early retirement benefits for public school teachers, projected to save eight percent of pension revenues. We leverage administrative records and a discontinuity in the reform to estimate its effect. Contrary to expectations, the cut increased retention by discouraging early retirement. Using idiosyncratic within-school variation in exposure, we find the reform somewhat increased student achievement by 0.01–0.03 standard deviations, partly through reduced turnover. The reform thus maintained or improved both teacher retention and productivity.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H75, J26, M52
papers.zh_title: 养老金改革与劳动力供给：养老金削减下的留任与生产率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一项具有代表性的养老金改革对工人留任和生产率的影响。该改革削减了公立学校教师的养老金年金和提前退休福利，预计可节省8%的养老金收入。我们利用行政记录和改革中的断点来估计其影响。与预期相反，削减通过阻止提前退休提高了留任率。利用学校内部暴露程度的异质性，我们发现改革使学生的学业成绩提高了0.01-0.03个标准差，部分原因是人员流动减少。因此，该改革维持或提高了教师的留任率和生产率。

papers.title: Heterogeneous Beliefs, Asset Prices, and Business Cycles
papers.authors: Saki Bigio, Dejanir Silva, Eduardo Zilberman
papers.abstract: This paper develops a complete-market production economy with heterogeneous beliefs about TFP growth. Hiring occurs before TFP is known and is, therefore, risky (operational leverage). The firm's discount factor depends on a wealth-weighted average of investors' beliefs. Waves of optimism influence asset markets and percolate to labor hiring, tying together the equity premium, equity volatility, and labor volatility puzzles. A taxonomy of belief systems shows that only extrapolative beliefs amplify the volatility of asset prices and hours and lead to risk build up. Disciplined by survey data, the model matches asset-pricing and business-cycle moments, highlighting how heterogeneous beliefs can be a direct driver of aggregate fluctuations.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：D84, E32, E44, E71, G41
papers.zh_title: 异质性信念、资产价格与经济周期
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个具有关于全要素生产率增长异质性信念的完全市场生产经济。雇佣发生在全要素生产率已知之前，因此是有风险的（经营杠杆）。企业的贴现因子取决于投资者信念的财富加权平均值。乐观情绪浪潮影响资产市场并渗透到劳动力雇佣中，将股权溢价、股权波动率和劳动力波动率之谜联系在一起。对信念体系的分类表明，只有外推性信念会放大资产价格和工作时间的波动性，并导致风险积累。在调查数据的约束下，该模型匹配了资产定价和经济周期的矩，突显了异质性信念如何成为总量波动的直接驱动因素。

papers.title: Paths to the Periphery
papers.authors: James A. Robinson
papers.abstract: My research suggests that world inequality is explained by the incidence of extractive and inclusive institutions. But why do some countries have extractive institutions? I distinguish between two main reasons; first, power relations; second, the “normative order.” Normative orders provide justifications and legitimacy for institutions which may not generate prosperity, but may achieve other goals. These distinctions are critical because they create very different challenges in trying to make institutions more inclusive and create prosperity. I show how countries move from the economic periphery as a consequence of changing both. My own intellectual journey has been in the other direction, however, hence the title of the paper: I was fortunate to be born in Britain, but I have had to unlearn much of my own experience, socialization and training in order to see other societies on their own terms. That’s crucial to be able to help them, but also to learn from them.
papers.zh_title: 通往边缘之路
papers.zh_abstract: 我的研究表明，世界不平等是由榨取性制度和包容性制度的发生率来解释的。但为什么有些国家会采用榨取性制度？我区分了两个主要原因：第一，权力关系；第二，“规范秩序”。规范秩序为那些可能无法带来繁荣但可能实现其他目标的制度提供了正当性和合法性。这些区分至关重要，因为它们为试图使制度更具包容性并创造繁荣带来了截然不同的挑战。我展示了国家如何通过同时改变这两者而从经济边缘地带崛起。然而，我个人的学术旅程却是朝着相反方向进行的，因此有了本文的标题：我有幸出生在英国，但我不得不摒弃自己大量的经验、社会化和训练，以便能够从其他社会自身的角度去理解它们。这对于能够帮助它们，同时也向它们学习至关重要。

papers.title: Training within Firms
papers.authors: Brayan S. Diaz, Andrea Neyra Nazarrett, Julian Ramirez, Raffaella Sadun, Jorge A. Tamayo
papers.abstract: Training investments are essential for improving worker and firm productivity, yet their implementation is often hindered by low participation rates and insufficient worker engagement. This study uses data from three firms—a car manufacturer, a quick-service restaurant chain, and a retail company—to show that variation in training participation among employees is closely tied to differences in middle managers’ behavior and practices. Middle managers who actively engage with their employees and emphasize their well-being and development are associated with significantly higher participation in training programs. These managerial differences significantly influence employee performance and absenteeism, especially during periods of organizational change. Together, these findings underscore the importance of middle managers in bridging the gap between centrally designed HR policies and their effective on-the-ground execution.
papers.zh_title: 企业内部培训
papers.zh_abstract: 培训投资对于提高工人和企业的生产力至关重要，然而其实施常常因参与率低和员工投入不足而受阻。本研究使用了来自三家公司（一家汽车制造商、一家快餐连锁店和一家零售公司）的数据，表明员工培训参与度的差异与中层管理者的行为和实践差异密切相关。那些积极与员工互动并重视其福祉和发展的中层管理者，与显著更高的培训项目参与率相关联。这些管理上的差异显著影响了员工的绩效和缺勤率，尤其是在组织变革时期。总之，这些发现强调了中层管理者在弥合中央设计的人力资源政策与其有效实地执行之间差距的重要性。

papers.title: How Good is AI at Twisting Arms? Experiments in Debt Collection
papers.authors: James J. Choi, Dong Huang, Zhishu Yang, Qi Zhang
papers.abstract: How good is AI at persuading humans to perform costly actions? We study calls made to get delinquent consumer borrowers to repay. Regression discontinuity and a randomized experiment reveal that AI is substantially less effective than human callers. Replacing AI with humans six days into delinquency closes much of the gap. But borrowers initially contacted by AI have repaid 1% less of the initial late payment one year later and are more likely to miss subsequent payments than borrowers who were always called by humans. AI’s lesser ability to extract promises that feel binding may contribute to the performance gap.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PR；JEL：D14, G4, G51, J24
papers.zh_title: 人工智能在说服他人方面有多擅长？债务催收实验
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能在说服人类执行有成本的行为方面有多擅长？我们研究了旨在让拖欠贷款的消费者借款人还款的电话催收。断点回归和一项随机实验表明，人工智能的效果远不如人工催收员。在逾期六天后用人工催收员取代人工智能，可以缩小大部分差距。但与始终由人工催收员联系的借款人相比，最初由人工智能联系的借款人在一年后偿还的初始逾期款项少了1%，并且更有可能错过后续还款。人工智能在提取具有约束力感觉的承诺方面能力较弱，这可能是造成绩效差距的原因之一。

papers.title: Scoring and Cartel Discipline in Procurement Auctions
papers.authors: Juan M. Ortner, Sylvain Chassang, Kei Kawai, Jun Nakabayashi
papers.abstract: Auctioneers suspecting bidder collusion often lack the formal evidence needed for legal recourse. A practical alternative is to design auctions that hinder collusion. Since Abreu et al. (1986), economic theory has emphasized imperfect monitoring as a constraint on collusion, but evidence remains scarce on whether: (i) information frictions meaningfully limit real-world collusion; and (ii) auctioneers can effectively exploit these frictions. Indeed, transparency concerns prevent the introduction of explicit randomness in auction design. We make progress on this issue by studying the impact of subjective scoring in auctions run by Japan’s Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, and Transportation. The adoption of scoring auctions significantly reduced winning bids in ways inconsistent with competition. Model-based inference suggests that the cartel’s dynamic obedience constraints were binding and tightened by imperfect monitoring. Subjective scoring can successfully leverage imperfect monitoring frictions to reduce the scope of collusion.
papers.zh_title: 采购拍卖中的评分与卡特尔纪律
papers.zh_abstract: 怀疑投标人合谋的拍卖方往往缺乏法律追索所需的正式证据。一个实用的替代方案是设计阻碍合谋的拍卖。自Abreu等人（1986）以来，经济理论一直强调不完美监督是对合谋的一种约束，但关于以下两点的证据仍然稀缺：（i）信息摩擦是否切实限制了现实世界中的合谋；（ii）拍卖方能否有效利用这些摩擦。事实上，透明度方面的担忧阻止了在拍卖设计中引入明确的随机性。我们通过研究日本国土交通省运营的拍卖中主观评分的影响，在这一问题上取得了进展。采用评分拍卖显著降低了中标价格，其方式与竞争不一致。基于模型的推断表明，卡特尔的动态服从约束是有效的，并且因不完美监督而收紧。主观评分可以成功地利用不完美监督的摩擦来减少合谋的范围。

papers.title: Substitution Bias and Fixed-Weight Price Indices in Time-Dependent Pricing Models
papers.authors: Lawrence Christiano, Martin S. Eichenbaum, Benjamin K. Johannsen
papers.abstract: This paper compares inflation in true price indices to inflation in fixed-weight price indices. We construct model-based inflation measures in time-dependent pricing models that are analogous to measures of inflation in the data, e.g., the Consumer Price Index. In the standard new Keynesian model, when inflation rises rapidly, the differences between inflation in those indices and true price indices are increasing in the degree of price stickiness and the elasticity of substitution across goods. For commonly used parameter values, those differences are large and persistent for increases in inflation of the size seen after 2020 in the U.S.
papers.zh_title: 时间依赖定价模型中的替代偏差与固定权重价格指数
papers.zh_abstract: 本文比较了真实价格指数中的通胀与固定权重价格指数中的通胀。我们在时间依赖定价模型中构建了基于模型的通胀衡量指标，这些指标类似于数据中的通胀衡量指标，例如消费者价格指数。在标准的新凯恩斯模型中，当通胀快速上升时，这些指数与真实价格指数之间的通胀差异会随着价格粘性程度和商品间替代弹性的增加而增大。对于常用的参数值，对于美国2020年后出现的通胀上升幅度，这些差异是巨大且持久的。

papers.title: The Global Macro Database: A New International Macroeconomic Dataset
papers.authors: Karsten Müller, Chenzi Xu, Mohamed Lehbib, Ziliang Chen
papers.abstract: The Global Macro Database is an open-source, continuously updated dataset of macroeconomic statistics that unifies and extends existing resources. By harmonizing and integrating data from 32 major contemporary sources—including the IMF, World Bank, and OECD—with historical records from 78 additional datasets, we construct comprehensive annual time series for 46 variables across 243 countries. This database covers global macroeconomic trends from the origins of modern data collection to projected estimates for 2030. Using this extensive database, we study the long-run output losses of financial crises and global temperature shocks, two applications in which historical time series are a crucial input. Our findings show that financial crises are associated with statistically detectable contractions in real GDP for five decades into the future, which are considerably larger than previously estimated. Temperature shocks also predict real GDP contractions up to 30 years ahead, especially in emerging economies.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E01, F01, N01, N10, O10
papers.zh_title: 全球宏观数据库：一个新的国际宏观经济数据集
papers.zh_abstract: 全球宏观数据库是一个开源、持续更新的宏观经济统计数据数据集，它统一并扩展了现有资源。通过协调和整合来自32个主要当代来源（包括国际货币基金组织、世界银行和经合组织）的数据以及来自78个额外数据集的历史记录，我们为243个国家的46个变量构建了完整的年度时间序列。该数据库涵盖了从现代数据收集起源到2030年预测估计的全球宏观经济趋势。利用这个广泛的数据库，我们研究了金融危机和全球温度冲击的长期产出损失，这是两个历史时间序列作为关键输入的实证应用。我们的研究结果表明，金融危机与未来五十年内可统计检测到的实际GDP收缩相关，其规模比先前估计的要大得多。温度冲击也能预测未来长达30年的实际GDP收缩，尤其是在新兴经济体中。

papers.title: The Rise of Absorptive Research in Corporate America: 1945-1980
papers.authors: Ashish Arora, Sharon Belenzon, Jungkyu Suh, Hansen Zhang
papers.abstract: We study the post-World War II “Golden Age” of American corporate research from 1945 to 1980, using multiple indicators of corporate research activity. We use an ensemble learning approach to classify firms as either Science Leaders, Absorbers or Followers. Our analysis reveals that only a small fraction of firms, whom we call Leaders, invest in internal research that is on the scientific frontier, with the objective to generate breakthrough inventions. Absorbers invest in research principally to absorb external scientific discoveries to fuel their inventive activity. Followers typically generate incremental innovations, using older scientific knowledge. Consistent with this, we find Leaders were more likely to be at the technological frontier, enjoy greater market power, and benefit from government procurement contracts. As universities and startups began to commercialize academic discoveries, the need for “absorptive corporate labs” declined. The shift ultimately transformed the American innovation landscape, deepening the division of innovative labor between universities, startups, and incumbent corporations, with only a select group of Leader firms continuing to invest in basic science.
papers.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：O3, O31, O33, O34, O35, O36, O38, O39
papers.zh_title: 美国企业吸收性研究的兴起：1945-1980
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用企业研究活动的多个指标，研究了1945年至1980年二战后美国企业研究的“黄金时代”。我们使用集成学习方法将企业分类为科学领导者、吸收者或追随者。我们的分析表明，只有一小部分企业（我们称之为领导者）投资于处于科学前沿的内部研究，其目标是产生突破性发明。吸收者投资于研究主要是为了吸收外部科学发现以推动其发明活动。追随者通常利用较旧的科学知识产生增量创新。与此一致，我们发现领导者更有可能处于技术前沿，享有更大的市场力量，并从政府采购合同中受益。随着大学和初创公司开始将学术发现商业化，对“吸收性企业实验室”的需求下降了。这种转变最终改变了美国的创新格局，加深了大学、初创公司和现有企业之间的创新劳动分工，只有少数领导者企业继续投资于基础科学。

papers.title: The Political Economy of Firm Networks: CEO Ideology and Global Trade
papers.authors: Elisabeth Kempf, Mancy Luo, Margarita Tsoutsoura
papers.abstract: We examine how the political ideology of corporate leaders shapes cross-border firm networks. Exploiting changes in ideological alignment between U.S. firm CEOs and foreign governments around close foreign elections, we show that U.S. firms are more likely to terminate trade relationships with countries led by governments whose ideology becomes more distant from that of their CEOs. The impact is concentrated among CEOs holding strong political views, and is particularly pronounced for shorter trade relationships, suggesting ideological alignment is more relevant in more flexible and substitutable connections. Our findings highlight the role of ideology in shaping the formation and persistence of international firm networks.
papers.zh_title: 企业网络的政治经济学：CEO意识形态与全球贸易
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了企业领导人的政治意识形态如何塑造跨境企业网络。利用美国企业CEO与外国政府在势均力敌的外国选举前后意识形态一致性的变化，我们表明，当外国政府领导人的意识形态与其CEO的意识形态距离变得更远时，美国企业更有可能终止与该国政府的贸易关系。这种影响集中在持有强烈政治观点的CEO身上，并且在较短的贸易关系中尤为显著，这表明意识形态一致性在更灵活和可替代的联系中更为相关。我们的发现强调了意识形态在塑造国际企业网络形成和持续性中的作用。

papers.title: A Theory of Supply Function Choice and Aggregate Supply
papers.authors: Joel P. Flynn, Georgios Nikolakoudis, Karthik Sastry
papers.abstract: Modern theories of aggregate supply are built on the foundation that firms set prices and commit to producing whatever the market demands. We remove this strategic restriction and allow firms to choose supply functions, mappings that describe the prices charged at each quantity of production. Theoretically, we characterize firms’ optimal supply function choices in general equilibrium and study the resulting implications for aggregate supply. Aggregate supply flattens under lower inflation uncertainty, higher idiosyncratic demand uncertainty, and less elastic demand. Quantitatively, our theory can rationalize the flattening of aggregate supply during the Great Moderation and steepening during the 1970s and 2020s.
papers.zh_title: 供给函数选择与总供给理论
papers.zh_abstract: 现代总供给理论建立在企业设定价格并承诺按市场需求生产的假设之上。我们取消了这一战略限制，允许企业选择供给函数，即描述在每个生产数量下所收取价格的映射。在理论上，我们刻画了企业在一般均衡中最优供给函数选择的特征，并研究了其对总供给的影响。在通胀不确定性较低、异质性需求不确定性较高以及需求弹性较低的情况下，总供给曲线趋于平坦。在定量上，我们的理论可以解释大缓和时期总供给曲线的平坦化以及1970年代和2020年代总供给曲线的陡峭化。

papers.title: The Invention of Corporate Governance
papers.authors: Yueran Ma, Andrei Shleifer
papers.abstract: The analysis of corporate governance begins with a central feature of modern capitalism—the separation of ownership and control in large corporations—first empirically documented by Berle and Means (1932). Such separation entails several agency problems reflecting conflicts between managers and shareholders, such as self-dealing by managers, low effort, consumption of perquisites, and excessive growth and diversification. Berle and Means saw self-dealing as the central agency problem and stressed the law as the fundamental mechanism of addressing it. Jensen and Meckling (1976) considered the consumption of perquisites and emphasized private mechanisms, such as financial incentives for managers, to counter wasteful perks. Jensen (1986) instead focused on excessive growth and diversification, which led him to count on leverage and takeovers. The combination of public corporate governance mechanisms, mostly the law, and market governance shaped both theory and practice.
papers.zh_title: 公司治理的发明
papers.zh_abstract: 公司治理的分析始于现代资本主义的一个核心特征——大型企业中所有权与控制权的分离——这一特征首先由Berle和Means（1932）进行了实证记录。这种分离带来了若干代理问题，反映了经理人与股东之间的冲突，例如经理人的自我交易、低努力、在职消费以及过度增长和多元化。Berle和Means认为自我交易是核心代理问题，并强调法律是解决该问题的基本机制。Jensen和Meckling（1976）考虑了在职消费，并强调私人机制（如对经理人的财务激励）来对抗浪费性的额外津贴。Jensen（1986）则聚焦于过度增长和多元化，这使他依赖杠杆和收购。公共公司治理机制（主要是法律）与市场治理的结合塑造了理论与实践。

papers.title: How Tariffs Affect Trade Deficits
papers.authors: Arnaud Costinot, Iván Werning
papers.abstract: We study the positive (not normative) effect of a permanent import tariff on trade deficits. We consider a two-period trade model with general preferences and technology. We first develop an aggregation result showing one can work with induced preferences over aggregate imports and exports. Our main results provide conditions under which tariffs are neutral as well as conditions under which they reduce deficits. A central theme is that the static Engel curve for aggregate imports and exports holds the key to this dynamic question.
papers.zh_title: 关税如何影响贸易逆差
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究永久性进口关税对贸易逆差的正面（而非规范）影响。我们考虑一个具有一般偏好和技术的两期贸易模型。我们首先发展出一个加总结果，表明可以基于对总进口和总出口的诱导偏好进行分析。我们的主要结果提供了关税中性以及关税减少逆差的条件。一个核心主题是，总进口和总出口的静态恩格尔曲线是理解这一动态问题的关键。

papers.title: The Law and Economics of Lawyers: Evidence from the Revolving Door in China’s Judicial System
papers.authors: John Zhuang Liu, Wenwei Peng, Shaoda Wang, Daniel Xu
papers.abstract: This paper examines how power lawyers shape judicial and economic outcomes by studying the “revolving door” between judges and lawyers in China’s judicial system—namely, former judges who quit the bench to practice law. In otherwise identical lawsuits, revolving-door lawyers deliver 8−23% higher win rate for their clients. Their performance in home versus away courts suggests these gains stem from both “know how” and “know who.” We extend the theoretical framework of Dewatripont and Tirole (1999) to show that revolving-door lawyers create countervailing forces in society: they enhance judicial decision-making through evidence and reasoning, but also exploit strategic arguments and connections to bias outcomes in favor of their clients. We estimate a structural model of the judicial process to quantify these trade-offs and find that increasing the supply of power lawyers can have a non-monotonic effect on equilibrium judicial quality.
papers.zh_title: 律师的法律经济学：来自中国司法系统旋转门的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过研究中国司法系统中法官与律师之间的“旋转门”——即辞去法官职务转而从事律师职业的前法官——来考察权力律师如何塑造司法和经济结果。在原本相同的诉讼案件中，旋转门律师为其客户带来的胜诉率高出8-23%。他们在主场法院与客场法院的表现差异表明，这些收益既源于“懂行”也源于“识人”。我们扩展了Dewatripont和Tirole（1999）的理论框架，以表明旋转门律师在社会中创造了两种相反的力量：他们通过证据和推理提升司法决策质量，但也利用战略论证和关系使结果偏向其客户。我们估计了一个司法过程的结构模型来量化这些权衡，并发现增加权力律师的供给对均衡司法质量可能产生非单调的影响。

papers.title: Firm Presence, Pollution, and Agglomeration: Evidence from a Randomized Environmental Place-Based Policy
papers.authors: Michael Gechter, Namrata Kala
papers.abstract: Firm location decisions impose externalities on other firms due to competitive or agglomerative forces, and on the environment. We study an environmental place-based policy that randomly moved 20,000 firms in New Delhi. Relocation reduces pollution, but firm exit increases. We combine the exogenous assignment of firms to industrial plots with a model to estimate spillovers on neighboring firms, showing that firm survival rates could have been increased by allocating firms to plots accounting for input-output linkages. These results provide causal evidence on how firm presence impacts environmental quality, and how spillovers can be used to minimize costs on regulated firms.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE；JEL：D22, L20, O10, Q52, Q53, Q56, Q58, R38
papers.zh_title: 企业存在、污染与集聚：来自一项随机环境地点导向政策的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 企业的选址决策由于竞争或集聚力量对其他企业产生外部性，并对环境产生影响。我们研究了一项环境地点导向政策，该政策随机迁移了新德里的20,000家企业。搬迁减少了污染，但企业退出增加。我们将企业向工业地块的外生分配与一个模型相结合，以估计对邻近企业的溢出效应，表明如果根据投入产出关联分配企业到地块，企业存活率本可以提高。这些结果提供了关于企业存在如何影响环境质量以及如何利用溢出效应最小化受监管企业成本的因果证据。

papers.title: Reducing Nutritional Disparities Through Targeted Pricing: Evidence from a Large Restaurant Chain
papers.authors: Weijia (Daisy) Dai, Ginger Zhe Jin, Ben Zou
papers.abstract: Nutritional disparities across socioeconomic groups contribute to health inequality in the U.S. This paper examines whether practical, firm-led pricing interventions can reduce these disparities by shifting choices toward healthier options among disadvantaged consumers. Using detailed transaction-level data from a large fast-food restaurant chain, we show that consumers in disadvantaged neighborhoods disproportionately select higher-calorie, less healthy items. We exploit quasi-experimental variation from chain-wide promotional discounts to estimate a mixed logit discrete choice model and recover preference heterogeneity across demographic groups. We find that lower-SES consumers are more price-sensitive across all nutritional profiles and exhibit flexibility in substituting between healthy and unhealthy options. Counterfactual simulations demonstrate that modest, targeted price adjustments in disadvantaged neighborhoods can promote healthier eating with minimal impact on revenue.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO；JEL：D12, I12, I14, L83, R20
