papers.zh_title: 通过定向定价减少营养差异：来自大型连锁餐厅的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 不同社会经济群体之间的营养差异加剧了美国的健康不平等。本文考察了由企业主导的、切实可行的定价干预措施是否可以通过引导弱势消费者选择更健康的选项来减少这些差异。利用一家大型快餐连锁店的详细交易层面数据，我们表明，弱势社区的消费者不成比例地选择了热量更高、更不健康的食品。我们利用来自连锁店范围促销折扣的准实验变化来估计混合逻辑离散选择模型，并恢复不同人口群体之间的偏好异质性。我们发现，较低社会经济地位的消费者在所有营养特征上对价格都更敏感，并且在健康与不健康选项之间的替代方面表现出灵活性。反事实模拟表明，在弱势社区进行适度、有针对性的价格调整可以促进更健康的饮食，同时对收入的影响最小。

papers.title: Did War Mobilization Cause Aggregate and Regional Growth?
papers.authors: Taylor Jaworski, Dongkyu Yang
papers.abstract: The participation of the United States in World War II led to a substantial mobilization of domestic resources to produce the materiel used on the battlefields of Europe and in the Pacific. We produce new estimates for the impact of war mobilization on long-run economic growth and regional development in the United States over the postwar period. Guided by an economic geography model, we interpret our estimates as the direct effect of mobilization on local productivity. The findings suggest the largest likely aggregate welfare impact was modest, although there is variation across region. In addition, industrial mobilization contributed to manufacturing growth relatively more in the Northeast and Midwest, and less in the South and West.
papers.zh_title: 战争动员是否导致了总量与区域增长？
papers.zh_abstract: 美国参与第二次世界大战导致国内资源大量动员，以生产用于欧洲和太平洋战场的物资。我们为战争动员对战后时期美国长期经济增长和区域发展的影响提供了新的估计。在经济地理模型的指导下，我们将我们的估计解释为动员对地方生产率的直接影响。研究结果表明，尽管存在区域差异，但最可能的总量福利影响是适度的。此外，工业动员对东北部和中西部制造业增长的贡献相对较大，而对南部和西部的贡献较小。

papers.title: Option Value Neglect: Evidence from Centralized College Admission
papers.authors: Ao Wang, Shaoda Wang, Xiaoyang Ye
papers.abstract: Sequential choices are ubiquitous in daily life, yet making optimal decisions in such settings—where properly accounting for option value is crucial—can be challenging. This paper provides field experimental evidence on the neglect of option value in high-stakes decisions and quantifies the associated welfare consequences. We study a centralized college admissions system where students submit brief preference lists. Although option value should encourage riskier top choices, many students are overly cautious and fail to include safer lower-ranked options. We argue that directed cognition—making myopic decisions while ignoring the value of subsequent options—explains this behavior. An in-field experiment targeting a key framing-based prediction shows that about 50% of applicants exhibit this pattern, especially among disadvantaged students. Counterfactual analysis suggests that de-biasing interventions could significantly reduce outcome gaps and improve overall efficiency.
papers.zh_title: 期权价值忽视：来自集中式大学录取的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 顺序选择在日常生活中无处不在，然而在此类情境中做出最优决策——其中正确考虑期权价值至关重要——可能具有挑战性。本文提供了关于在高风险决策中忽视期权价值的现场实验证据，并量化了相关的福利后果。我们研究了一个集中式大学录取系统，学生在此系统中提交简短的偏好列表。尽管期权价值应鼓励更冒险的顶层选择，但许多学生过于谨慎，未能包含更安全的较低排名选项。我们认为，定向认知——即做出短视决策而忽略后续选项的价值——解释了这种行为。一项针对基于框架的关键预测的现场实验表明，约50%的申请者表现出这种模式，尤其是在弱势学生中。反事实分析表明，去偏干预可以显著缩小结果差距并提高整体效率。

papers.title: From Distraction to Dedication: Commitment and Incentives Against Phone Use in the Classroom
papers.authors: Billur Aksoy, Lester R. Lusher, Scott E. Carrell
papers.abstract: Phone usage in the classroom has been linked to worsened academic outcomes. We present findings from a field experiment conducted at a large public university in partnership with an app marketed as a soft commitment device that provides incentives to reduce phone use in the classroom. We find that app usage led to improvements in classroom focus, attendance, and overall academic satisfaction. Analysis of time spent outside the classroom suggests a potential substitution effect: students using the app allocated less time to study, particularly on campus. Overall, though statistically insignificant, we find improvements in transcript grades associated with app usage.
papers.zh_title: 从分心到专注：针对课堂手机使用的承诺与激励措施
papers.zh_abstract: 课堂上的手机使用已被证明与学业成绩下降有关。我们展示了一项与一款被宣传为软性承诺设备的应用程序合作，在一所大型公立大学进行的实地实验结果，该应用程序通过提供激励措施来减少课堂上的手机使用。我们发现，使用该应用程序改善了课堂专注度、出勤率和整体学业满意度。对课堂外时间花费的分析表明存在潜在的替代效应：使用该应用程序的学生分配给学习的时间更少，尤其是在校园内。总体而言，尽管统计上不显著，但我们发现与使用该应用程序相关的成绩单分数有所改善。

papers.title: Long-Run Effects of Trade Wars
papers.authors: David Baqaee, Hannes Malmberg
papers.abstract: This short note shows that accounting for capital adjustment is critical when analyzing the long-run effects of trade wars on real wages and consumption. The reason is that trade wars increase the relative price between investment goods and labor by taxing imported investment goods and their inputs. This price shift depresses capital demand, shrinks the long-run capital stock, and pushes down consumption and real wages compared to scenarios when capital is fixed. We illustrate this mechanism by studying recent US tariffs using a dynamic quantitative trade model. When the capital stock is allowed to adjust, long-run consumption and wage responses are both larger and more negative. With capital adjustment, U.S. consumption can fall by 2.6%, compared to 0.6% when capital is held fixed, as in a static model. That is, capital stock adjustment emerges as a dominant driver of long-run outcomes, more important than the standard mechanisms from static trade models — terms-of-trade effects and mis- allocation of production across countries.
papers.zh_title: 贸易战的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 这篇简短的论文表明，在分析贸易战对实际工资和消费的长期影响时，考虑资本调整至关重要。原因是贸易战通过对进口投资品及其投入品征税，提高了投资品相对于劳动力的价格。这种价格变化抑制了资本需求，缩减了长期资本存量，并与资本固定不变的情景相比，压低了消费和实际工资。我们通过使用动态量化贸易模型研究美国最近的关税来阐述这一机制。当允许资本存量调整时，长期消费和工资的反应都更大且更负面。在资本调整的情况下，美国消费可能下降2.6%，而如静态模型那样资本固定不变时则下降0.6%。也就是说，资本存量调整成为长期结果的主导驱动因素，比静态贸易模型中的标准机制——贸易条件效应和生产在国家间的错配——更为重要。

papers.title: Skewed Fluctuations and Propagation Through Production Networks
papers.authors: Sai Krishna Kamepalli, Serena Ng, Francisco Ruge-Murcia
papers.abstract: Skewness in macroeconomic time series may arise exogenously if shocks are asymmetrically distributed, or endogenously, as shocks propagate through production networks. These two possibilities are often considered in isolation by previous theoretical work. To evaluate the relative importance of these channels, we nest all possible sources of skewness in an empirical model where output has a network, a common, and an idiosyncratic component. In this model, skewness can arise not only from the three components, but also from coskewness due to their higher order covariation. An analysis of output growth in 43 U.S. sectors shows that coskewness, especially between the network and the common component, is a key source of asymmetry in the data and constitutes a connectivity channel not previously explored in the literature. To help interpret our results, we construct and estimate a micro-founded multi-sector general equilibrium model and show that it can generate skewness and coskewness consistent with the data.
papers.zh_title: 偏态波动与通过生产网络的传导
papers.zh_abstract: 宏观经济时间序列中的偏度可能外生地产生（如果冲击呈不对称分布），也可能内生地产生（当冲击通过生产网络传导时）。以往的理论工作通常孤立地考虑这两种可能性。为了评估这些渠道的相对重要性，我们将所有可能的偏度来源嵌套在一个经验模型中，在该模型中，产出具有网络成分、共同成分和异质成分。在这个模型中，偏度不仅可能来自这三个成分，还可能来自它们的高阶协方差导致的共偏度。对美国43个部门产出增长的分析表明，共偏度，尤其是网络成分与共同成分之间的共偏度，是数据中不对称性的一个关键来源，并构成了文献中此前未曾探索过的连通性渠道。为了帮助解释我们的结果，我们构建并估计了一个基于微观基础的多部门一般均衡模型，并表明该模型能够产生与数据一致的偏度和共偏度。

papers.title: Ethnographic Records, Folklore, and AI
papers.authors: Stelios Michalopoulos
papers.abstract: In this Handbook chapter, I examine how integrating ethnographic and folklore records has shaped research on culture and economics in the 21st century. Advances in text analysis techniques and the incorporation of historical and satellite data have transformed the field. I explore how George Peter Murdock's ethnographic contributions and Yuri Berezkin's seminal folklore motif index have been utilized to shed light on the roots of comparative development. I conclude by proposing a methodology for leveraging Large Language Models to extract cultural insights from folklore motifs, demonstrating how ancestral narratives can complement ethnographic records and offer valuable perspectives on societal norms and the historical forces shaping economic behavior today.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EFG, POL；JEL：O10, Z10, Z13
papers.zh_title: 民族志记录、民间传说与人工智能
papers.zh_abstract: 在这篇手册章节中，我考察了整合民族志和民间传说记录如何塑造了21世纪关于文化与经济学的研究。文本分析技术的进步以及历史数据和卫星数据的纳入已经改变了这一领域。我探讨了乔治·彼得·默多克的民族志贡献和尤里·别列兹金开创性的民间传说母题索引如何被用来阐明比较发展的根源。最后，我提出了一种利用大型语言模型从民间传说母题中提取文化见解的方法论，展示了祖先叙事如何能够补充民族志记录，并为当今塑造经济行为的社会规范和历史力量提供有价值的视角。

papers.title: Health Impacts of Federal Pandemic Aid to State and Local Governments
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Anwita Mahajan
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic led to unprecedented levels of federal transfers to state and local governments. Did this funding impact population health? To answer this question, we leverage the fact that U.S. states that enjoy excess representation in Congress received substantially more fiscal assistance than did relatively underrepresented states. We find that the aid driven by excess representation had substantial impacts on population health. For each $1,000 increase in federal fiscal aid per state resident, we estimate that states experienced 38 fewer deaths from all causes per 100,000 residents from 2020 through 2022, of which 2/3 came from reductions in COVID-19 mortality. We estimate that the last $331 billion in federal pandemic aid, which corresponds with our in-sample variation, generated $591 billion in value through life years saved. Additional aid also reduced rates of COVID-19 related hospitalizations and emergency room visits, though not in the total number of positive cases detected. Plausible mechanisms for these improved outcomes include higher rates of COVID-19 vaccination, which plausibly account for nearly half of the mortality reductions we observe, and higher rates of COVID-19 testing. Medicaid enrollments and hospital capacity do not appear to play substantial mediating roles. Our robustness analyses provide evidence that the effects we estimate cannot be explained by pre-existing mortality trends, by the pandemic's differential impacts on relatively dense vs. rural areas, or by the pandemic's differential impacts on populations with more elderly individuals or with higher prevalence of chronic conditions. The mortality impacts we estimate were substantially greater for non-Hispanic Black Americans than for non-Hispanic White Americans, such that federal funds are associated with a reduction in population-wide health disparities over the course of the pandemic.
papers.zh_title: 联邦疫情援助对州和地方政府健康的影响
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19疫情导致联邦向州和地方政府的转移支付达到了前所未有的水平。这笔资金是否影响了人口健康？为了回答这个问题，我们利用了这样一个事实：在国会中享有超额代表性的美国州获得的财政援助远多于代表性相对不足的州。我们发现，由超额代表性驱动的援助对人口健康产生了实质性影响。我们估计，每增加1000美元的联邦财政援助（按州居民人均计算），各州在2020年至2022年期间每10万居民中所有原因导致的死亡人数减少38人，其中三分之二来自COVID-19死亡率的降低。我们估计，最后3310亿美元的联邦疫情援助（与我们的样本内变化相对应）通过挽救的生命年产生了5910亿美元的价值。额外的援助还降低了与COVID-19相关的住院率和急诊就诊率，但并未减少检测到的阳性病例总数。这些改善结果的合理机制包括更高的COVID-19疫苗接种率（这大概可以解释我们观察到的近一半的死亡率降低）和更高的COVID-19检测率。医疗补助注册人数和医院容量似乎并未发挥重要的中介作用。我们的稳健性分析提供的证据表明，我们估计的影响不能用已有的死亡率趋势、疫情对相对密集地区与农村地区的差异化影响，或者疫情对老年人口较多或慢性病患病率较高人群的差异化影响来解释。我们估计的死亡率影响对非西班牙裔黑人美国人的影响远大于对非西班牙裔白人美国人的影响，因此联邦资金与疫情期间人口健康差距的缩小相关。

papers.title: Fiscal Policy as a Stabilization Tool. The Case for Quasi-Automatic Stabilizers, With an Application to the VAT
papers.authors: Olivier J. Blanchard
papers.abstract: Most of the focus of recent stabilization policy research and practice has been on monetary rather than fiscal policy. This paper explores how, given the limits on monetary policy, fiscal policy could play a larger role. It explores the use of quasi-automatic stabilizers, i.e. changes in taxes or transfers triggered by an aggregate variable. It discusses design issues, in particular how to make such stabilizers truly debt neutral, and what aggregate variable to use as a trigger. It then focuses on a specific stabilizer, a variable VAT rate. It shows its effect in a minimalist NK model, and then discusses a number of analytical issues, both within and out of the minimalist model, such as the implications for inflation, the choice of the tax base, the implications of liquidity constraints, the implication of anticipation effects. It ends by reviewing the empirical evidence on passthrough of VAT changes, and the effects on demand of VAT changes, permanent or temporary.
papers.zh_title: 作为稳定工具的财政政策。准自动稳定器的案例，及其在增值税上的应用
papers.zh_abstract: 近期稳定政策研究和实践的大部分焦点都集中在货币政策而非财政政策上。本文探讨了在货币政策存在限制的情况下，财政政策如何能够发挥更大的作用。它探讨了准自动稳定器的使用，即由某个总量变量触发的税收或转移支付的变化。它讨论了设计问题，特别是如何使此类稳定器真正实现债务中性，以及使用哪个总量变量作为触发条件。然后，它聚焦于一个特定的稳定器——可变增值税税率。它在一个极简的新凯恩斯主义模型中展示了其效果，然后讨论了该极简模型内外的一系列分析性问题，例如对通胀的影响、税基的选择、流动性约束的影响以及预期效应的影响。最后，它回顾了关于增值税变化传导以及永久性或临时性增值税变化对需求影响的实证证据。

papers.title: Field Choice, Skill Specificity, and Labor Market Disruptions
papers.authors: Valerie Smeets, Lin Tian, Sharon Traiberman
papers.abstract: We argue that college students’ field-of-study choices significantly influence how economies respond to labor market disruptions. To do so, we develop and estimate a framework featuring forward-looking students who choose a field of study when entering college, and subsequently make decisions over occupations after graduating and entering the labor market. Different fields endow workers with distinct comparative advantages and varying costs associated with switching occupations. Simulating both a trade war and wide scale adoption of AI, we use our model to make three points. First, relative to models that ignore how new cohorts adjust their field-of-study choices, our framework predicts larger aggregate income responses and greater distributional differences. Second, policies that enhance flexibility in field-of-study decisions—such as relaxing capacity constraints in high-demand programs—raise aggregate output. Finally, these policies also lessen the adverse distributional consequences of shocks, by affording more opportunities to students with lower earnings potential.
papers.zh_title: 专业选择、技能专用性与劳动力市场冲击
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为，大学生对所学专业的选择会显著影响经济体应对劳动力市场冲击的方式。为此，我们构建并估计了一个分析框架，该框架包含了具有前瞻性眼光的学生，他们在进入大学时选择专业，随后在毕业并进入劳动力市场后做出职业选择。不同的专业赋予劳动者不同的比较优势，以及不同的职业转换成本。通过模拟一场贸易战和人工智能的大规模应用，我们利用模型提出了三个观点。首先，相对于忽略新一届学生如何调整其专业选择的模型，我们的框架预测了更大的总体收入反应和更显著的收入分配差异。其次，提高专业选择灵活性的政策——例如放宽高需求专业的容量限制——会提高总产出。最后，这些政策通过为收入潜力较低的学生提供更多机会，也减轻了冲击对收入分配的不利影响。

papers.title: Regulating Out-of-Network Hospital Payments: Disagreement Payoffs, Negotiated Prices, and Access
papers.authors: Elena Prager, Nicholas Tilipman
papers.abstract: Recent policy proposals seek to regulate out-of-network hospital prices. We study how such regulation affects equilibrium prices, network formation, and hospital exit. We estimate a structural model of insurer-hospital bargaining that allows for out-of-network transactions between non-contracting parties. These transactions generate a notion of exit by rendering hospitals unprofitable under some regulations. Estimation relies on a novel measure of out-of-network prices. We find that reducing out-of-network prices would also lower negotiated prices, but potentially at the cost of narrower hospital networks. Aggressive regulation could induce substantial hospital exit, but only under the restrictive assumption that negotiators cannot anticipate the exits.
papers.zh_title: 监管网络外医院支付：分歧收益、谈判价格与可及性
papers.zh_abstract: 近期的政策提案旨在监管网络外医院的价格。我们研究这种监管如何影响均衡价格、网络形成以及医院退出。我们估计了一个保险公司与医院之间讨价还价的结构模型，该模型允许非签约方之间进行网络外交易。这些交易通过使某些医院在特定监管下变得无利可图，从而产生了一种退出的概念。估计依赖于一种新的网络外价格衡量方法。我们发现，降低网络外价格也会降低谈判价格，但可能以医院网络变窄为代价。激进的监管可能导致大量医院退出，但这仅在谈判方无法预见退出的限制性假设下才会发生。

papers.title: The Macroeconomics of Tariff Shocks
papers.authors: Adrien Auclert, Matthew Rognlie, Ludwig Straub
papers.abstract: We study the short-run effects of import tariffs on GDP and the trade balance in an open-economy New Keynesian model with intermediate input trade. We find that temporary tariffs cause a downturn whenever the import elasticity is below an openness-weighted average of the export elasticity and the intertemporal substitution elasticity. We argue that this condition is likely satisfied in practice because durable goods generate great scope for intertemporal substitution, and because it is easier to lose competitiveness on the global market than to substitute between home and foreign goods. Unilateral tariffs tend to improve the trade balance, but when other countries retaliate the trade balance worsens and the contraction deepens. Taking into account the contractionary effect of tariffs dramatically lowers the optimal unilateral tariff derived in standard trade theory.
papers.zh_title: 关税冲击的宏观经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个包含中间投入品贸易的开放经济新凯恩斯模型中，研究了进口关税对GDP和贸易平衡的短期影响。我们发现，当进口弹性低于出口弹性和跨期替代弹性的开放度加权平均值时，临时性关税会导致经济衰退。我们认为，这一条件在实践中很可能成立，因为耐用品为跨期替代提供了巨大空间，并且在全球市场上失去竞争力比在国内和外国商品之间进行替代更容易。单边关税倾向于改善贸易平衡，但当其他国家进行报复时，贸易平衡会恶化，经济收缩会加深。考虑到关税的收缩效应，会显著降低标准贸易理论中得出的最优单边关税水平。

papers.title: State versus Market: China's Infrastructure Investment
papers.authors: Shuoge Qian, Hong Ru, Wei Xiong
papers.abstract: Amid rising global interest in state interventions, this paper examines how China’s infrastructure investments—a key macroeconomic policy tool—affect firm productivity. We focus on a policy that encourages regional governments to improve market conditions for private enterprises. Our analysis shows that a better market environment amplifies infrastructure investment spillovers. However, the overall impact remains neutral or negative despite greater gains in industries with improved market access. These findings highlight the complex interplay between state intervention and market forces, raising concerns about the effectiveness of infrastructure investments in sustaining growth, especially in regions with weak market institutions.
papers.zh_title: 国家与市场：中国的基础设施投资
papers.zh_abstract: 在全球对国家干预的兴趣日益高涨的背景下，本文考察了中国的基础设施投资——一项关键的宏观经济政策工具——如何影响企业生产率。我们聚焦于一项鼓励地方政府改善私营企业市场条件的政策。我们的分析表明，更好的市场环境会放大基础设施投资的溢出效应。然而，尽管在那些市场准入条件改善的行业中获得了更大的收益，但总体影响仍然是中性或负面的。这些发现凸显了国家干预与市场力量之间复杂的相互作用，引发了对基础设施投资在维持增长方面有效性的担忧，尤其是在市场制度薄弱的地区。

papers.title: An Anatomy of U.S. Establishments' Trade Linkages in Global Value Chains
papers.authors: Aaron B. Flaaen, Fariha Kamal, Eunhee Lee, Kei-Mu Yi
papers.abstract: Global value chains (GVC) are a pervasive feature of modern production, but they are hard to measure. Using confidential microdata from the U.S. Census Bureau, we develop novel measures of the linkages between U.S. manufacturing establishments’ imports and exports. We document three new GVC patterns. First, for every dollar of exports, imported inputs represent 13 cents in 2002 and 20 cents by 2017, substantially higher than what aggregate data suggests. Second, we find strong complementarities between input and output markets reflected in “round-trip” trade linkages where an establishment sources inputs from and exports output to the same country. Third, we find a strong positive association between regional trade agreements and GVC trade flows. The aggregate data used to build global input-output tables requires proportionality assumptions that we find mute these relationships. Finally, with a simple model, we show that the round-trip results are consistent with a notion of firm and country-specific fixed costs that are at least partially common between sourcing (imports) and foreign sales (exports).
papers.zh_title: 美国企业在全球价值链中贸易关联的剖析
papers.zh_abstract: 全球价值链是现代生产的一个普遍特征，但很难衡量。利用美国人口普查局的机密微观数据，我们开发了衡量美国制造业企业进口与出口之间关联的新方法。我们记录了三种新的全球价值链模式。首先，每出口一美元，进口投入品在2002年占13美分，到2017年占20美分，这远高于总体数据所显示的水平。其次，我们发现投入品和产出市场之间存在强烈的互补性，这体现在“往返”贸易关联中，即一家企业从同一国家采购投入品并向其出口产出。第三，我们发现区域贸易协定与全球价值链贸易流量之间存在强烈的正相关关系。用于构建全球投入产出表的总体数据需要比例性假设，我们发现这些假设削弱了这些关系。最后，通过一个简单模型，我们表明“往返”结果与企业和国家特定固定成本的概念一致，这些成本至少在采购（进口）和国外销售（出口）之间是部分共通的。

papers.title: The Global Effects of Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanisms
papers.authors: Kimberly A. Clausing, Jonathan M. Colmer, Allan Hsiao, Catherine Wolfram
papers.abstract: Climate change poses a collective action problem: countries bear the costs of carbon regulation, while benefits are shared globally. Carbon border adjustment mechanisms (CBAMs) aim to realign incentives by extending domestic carbon pricing to imports. Using plant-level data for aluminum and steel, which account for 11% of global CO2 emissions, we document that emissions intensity is income-neutral and uncorrelated with production costs. Carbon pricing introduces a new margin of green comparative advantage. With a quantitative trade model, we show that CBAMs can boost domestic competitiveness, reduce emissions leakage, and facilitate collective climate action, while largely avoiding disproportionate burdens on lower-income countries.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, ITI；JEL：F13, H23, O19, Q56, Q58

papers.title: Screening Through Soft Spending Limits: Evidence from the Medicare Therapy Cap
papers.authors: Ashvin Gandhi, Maggie Shi
papers.abstract: Governments and firms often use soft spending limits to curb overspending while allowing exceptions. We study a Medicare policy that capped per-patient physical therapy spending with exceptions for documented medical need. By screening out low-value care, the cap reduced spending by 8 percent without harming patient health. This screening was driven by Medicare’s exception decisions, whereas patients and providers scaled back care indiscriminately. However, the cap also generated horizontal inequities: conditional on need, lower-income and minority patients were more likely to be screened out because they were treated by smaller providers who were slower to adapt to new documentation requirements.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH；JEL：H30, H51, I1, I13, I18
papers.zh_title: 通过软性支出上限进行筛选：来自医疗保险治疗费用上限的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 政府和公司经常使用软性支出上限来遏制过度支出，同时允许例外情况。我们研究了一项医疗保险政策，该政策对每位患者的物理治疗支出设置了上限，但允许因记录在案的医疗需求而例外。通过筛选出低价值护理，该上限在不损害患者健康的情况下将支出减少了8%。这种筛选是由医疗保险的例外决定驱动的，而患者和医疗服务提供者则不加区分地缩减了护理。然而，该上限也产生了横向不公平：在需求相同的情况下，低收入和少数族裔患者更有可能被筛选出去，因为他们由规模较小的医疗服务提供者治疗，而这些提供者适应新文件要求的步伐较慢。

papers.title: Local Energy Access and Industry Specialization: Evidence from World War II Emergency Pipelines
papers.authors: Jacob Greenspon, Gordon H. Hanson
papers.abstract: How does improving access to the supply of energy affect regional specialization in manufacturing? We evaluate the long-run employment impacts of pipelines constructed by the U.S. government during World War II to transport oil and gas from the oil fields of the Southwest to wartime industrial producers in the Northeast. The pipelines were built rapidly to connect end points along a direct path that minimized use of scarce construction materials. Postwar they were converted to supply en route customers, giving counties close to the pipelines access to a cheap and plentiful source of energy. Between 1940 and 1950, counties with better access to pipeline gas had larger increases in their share of employment in energy-intensive industries. These impacts persisted to the mid-1980s for all energy-intensive industries and to the late 1990s for the subset of industries intensive in the direct use of electricity, despite the disruptive effects of the 1970s energy crisis. Our findings are relevant for understanding energy-related path dependence in local economic development patterns and how government intervention in energy markets affects industry location in the short and long run.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EEE, ITI, LS；JEL：F15, J23, N7, R12
papers.zh_title: 本地能源获取与产业专业化：来自二战应急管道的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 改善能源供应可及性如何影响区域制造业专业化？我们评估了美国政府二战期间修建的、用于将石油和天然气从西南部油田输送到战时工业生产者东北部的管道所产生的长期就业影响。这些管道沿着一条旨在最大限度减少稀缺建筑材料使用的直接路径快速建成，以连接端点。战后，它们被改造为向沿途客户供应能源，这使得靠近管道的县能够获得廉价且充足的能源。在1940年至1950年间，管道天然气可及性更好的县，其能源密集型产业就业份额增长更大。尽管1970年代能源危机造成了破坏性影响，但所有能源密集型产业的这些影响一直持续到1980年代中期，而直接使用电力密集型产业的子集则持续到1990年代末。我们的发现对于理解地方经济发展模式中与能源相关的路径依赖，以及政府干预能源市场如何影响产业在短期和长期的区位选择具有重要意义。

papers.title: Protection for Whom? The Political Economy of Protective Labor Laws for Women
papers.authors: Matthias Doepke, Hanno Foerster, Anne Hannusch, Michèle Tertilt
papers.abstract: During the first half of the twentieth century, many US states enacted laws restricting women's labor market opportunities, including maximum hours restrictions, minimum wage laws, and night-shift bans. The era of so-called protective labor laws came to an end in the 1960s as a result of civil rights reforms. In this paper, we investigate the political economy behind the rise and fall of these laws. We argue that the main driver behind protective labor laws was men's desire to shield themselves from labor market competition. We spell out the mechanism through a politico-economic model in which singles and couples work in different sectors and vote on protective legislation. Restrictions are supported by single men and couples with male sole earners who compete with women for jobs. We show that the theory's predictions for when protective legislation will be introduced are well supported by US state-level evidence.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, LS, POL；JEL：D13, D72, D78, E24, J12, J16, N30, O10, O43
papers.zh_title: 为谁保护？女性劳动保护法的政治经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 在二十世纪上半叶，美国许多州颁布了限制女性劳动力市场机会的法律，包括最长工时限制、最低工资法和夜班禁令。所谓的劳动保护法时代随着民权改革在20世纪60年代结束。在本文中，我们研究了这些法律兴衰背后的政治经济学。我们认为，劳动保护法的主要驱动力是男性保护自己免受劳动力市场竞争的愿望。我们通过一个政治经济模型阐述了这一机制，在该模型中，单身人士和夫妇在不同部门工作，并对保护性立法进行投票。限制措施得到了单身男性和男性唯一养家糊口的夫妇的支持，他们与女性竞争工作。我们表明，该理论关于何时引入保护性立法的预测得到了美国州级证据的有力支持。

papers.title: Taming Cycles: China’s Growth Targets and Macroeconomic Management
papers.authors: Jeffery (Jinfan) Chang, Yuheng Wang, Wei Xiong
papers.abstract: China’s hybrid economy blends state planning with market mechanisms, using annual economic targets to guide development and macroeconomic management to ensure their achievement. Local governments set ambitious growth targets to align with central mandates and incentivize subordinates, leading to asymmetric adjustments: targets rise rapidly during booms but decline sluggishly during slowdowns. This dynamic has heightened pressure on local governments to intervene in the economy, particularly after 2010. Our analysis shows that when a region falls short of its growth target, it increases infrastructure investment, land sales, and local government debt to close the gap. Notably, during the relatively stable period of 2011–2019, overly optimistic targets contributed an additional 14.0% of GDP to local government debt. While these interventions helped smooth cyclical fluctuations and moderated the trend of GDP deceleration, they also eroded GDP growth’s reliability as an economic indicator, weakening its correlation with corporate revenue, household demand, and TFP gains.
papers.zh_title: 驾驭周期：中国的增长目标与宏观经济管理
papers.zh_abstract: 中国的混合经济将国家规划与市场机制相结合，利用年度经济目标指导发展，并通过宏观经济管理确保其实现。地方政府设定雄心勃勃的增长目标，以与中央指令保持一致并激励下属，导致非对称调整：目标在经济繁荣时期迅速上升，但在经济放缓时期下降缓慢。这种动态加剧了地方政府干预经济的压力，尤其是在2010年之后。我们的分析表明，当一个地区未达到其增长目标时，它会增加基础设施投资、土地出让和地方政府债务以弥补差距。值得注意的是，在相对稳定的2011-2019年期间，过于乐观的目标使地方政府债务额外增加了GDP的14.0%。虽然这些干预措施有助于平滑周期波动并缓和GDP减速的趋势，但它们也削弱了GDP增长作为经济指标的可靠性，削弱了其与企业收入、家庭需求和全要素生产率增长的关联性。

papers.title: Opioids and Post-COVID Labor-Force Participation
papers.authors: Francesco Chiocchio, Jeremy Greenwood, Nezih Guner, Karen Kopecky
papers.abstract: At the onset of COVID-19, U.S. labor-force participation dropped by about 3 percentage points and remained below pre-pandemic levels three years later. Recovery varied across states, with slower rebounds in those more affected by the pre-pandemic opioid crisis, as measured by age-adjusted opioid overdose death rates. An event study shows that a one-standard-deviation increase in pre-COVID opioid death rates corresponds to a 0.9 percentage point decline in post-COVID labor participation. The result is not driven by differences in overall health between states. The effect of prior opioid exposure had a more significant impact on individuals without a college degree. The slow recovery in states with more opioid exposure was characterized by an increase in individuals who are not in the labor force due to disability.
papers.zh_title: 阿片类药物与疫情后劳动力参与率
papers.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19疫情爆发之初，美国劳动力参与率下降了约3个百分点，并在三年后仍低于疫情前水平。各州的复苏情况各不相同，那些受疫情前阿片类药物危机影响更严重的州（以年龄调整后的阿片类药物过量死亡率衡量）复苏更慢。一项事件研究显示，疫情前阿片类药物死亡率每增加一个标准差，疫情后劳动力参与率相应下降0.9个百分点。这一结果并非由各州之间的整体健康状况差异所驱动。先前阿片类药物暴露的影响对没有大学学位的个人更为显著。在阿片类药物暴露程度较高的州，复苏缓慢的特征是由于残疾而退出劳动力市场的人数增加。

papers.title: Using Multiple Outcomes to Adjust Standard Errors for Spatial Correlation
papers.authors: Stefano DellaVigna, Guido Imbens, Woojin Kim, David M. Ritzwoller
papers.abstract: Empirical research in economics often examines the behavior of agents located in a geographic space. In such cases, statistical inference is complicated by the interdependence of economic outcomes across locations. A common approach to account for this dependence is to cluster standard errors based on a predefined geographic partition. A second strategy is to model dependence in terms of the distance between units. Dependence, however, does not necessarily stop at borders and is typically not determined by distance alone. This paper introduces a method that leverages observations of multiple outcomes to adjust standard errors for cross-sectional dependence. Specifically, a researcher, while interested in a particular outcome variable, often observes dozens of other variables for the same units. We show that these outcomes can be used to estimate dependence under the assumption that the cross-sectional correlation structure is shared across outcomes. We develop a procedure, which we call Thresholding Multiple Outcomes (TMO), that uses this estimate to adjust standard errors in a given regression setting. We show that adjustments of this form can lead to sizable reductions in the bias of standard errors in calibrated U.S. county-level regressions. Re-analyzing nine recent papers, we find that the proposed correction can make a substantial difference in practice.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, CH, DAE, DEV, ED, EEE, EFG, EH, IO, ITI, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR, TWP；JEL：C21, C33
papers.zh_title: 利用多个结果变量调整空间相关性的标准误
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学中的实证研究经常考察位于地理空间中的经济主体的行为。在这种情况下，统计推断因不同地点经济结果的相互依赖性而变得复杂。解释这种依赖性的常用方法是基于预定义的地理分区对标准误进行聚类。第二种策略是根据单位之间的距离来建模依赖性。然而，依赖性不一定止于边界，并且通常不仅仅由距离决定。本文介绍了一种方法，该方法利用对多个结果变量的观测来调整横截面依赖性的标准误。具体来说，研究人员在关注某个特定结果变量的同时，通常能观察到同一单位的其他几十个变量。我们表明，在横截面相关结构在各结果变量之间共享的假设下，这些结果变量可用于估计依赖性。我们开发了一个程序，称为多结果阈值法（TMO），该程序使用此估计值来调整给定回归设置中的标准误。我们表明，在校准的美国县级回归中，这种形式的调整可以导致标准误偏差的大幅减少。重新分析九篇近期论文，我们发现所提出的修正方法在实践中可以产生显著差异。

papers.title: Optimal Second-best Menu Design: Evidence from Residential Electricity Plans
papers.authors: Maria Garcia-Osipenko, Nicolai V. Kuminoff, Spencer Perry, Nicholas Vreugdenhil
papers.abstract: Utilities increasingly sell electricity using complex menus of time-constant and time-varying price schedules. We study how to design such a menu to maximize social welfare in a second best environment where the marginal private and external costs of generating electricity vary over time, institutional constraints prevent mandating time-varying pricing, and consumer behavior is distorted by frictions. We develop a model of plan choice, consumption, and intertemporal substitution with time-varying marginal social costs, and estimate it using administrative data from a large utility. We provide evidence of substantial intertemporal substitution in response to time-varying price incentives, and selection across plans based on multidimensional heterogeneity. While the current menu’s time-varying plans substantially shift consumption from high-price to low-price hours, we find that they reduce social welfare. This loss is mitigated by information frictions. We show how to redesign the menu to simultaneously improve outcomes for consumers, the utility, and the environment.
papers.zh_title: 最优次优菜单设计：来自居民用电计划的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 公用事业公司越来越多地使用包含恒定电价和时变电价计划的复杂菜单来销售电力。我们研究如何设计这样一个菜单，以在次优环境中最大化社会福利，其中发电的边际私人成本和外部成本随时间变化，制度约束阻止强制实施时变定价，并且消费者行为因摩擦而扭曲。我们开发了一个包含时变边际社会成本的计划选择、消费和跨期替代模型，并使用来自一家大型公用事业公司的行政数据进行估计。我们提供了证据，表明消费者在响应时变价格激励时存在显著的跨期替代，并且基于多维异质性在不同计划之间进行选择。虽然当前菜单中的时变计划显著地将消费从高电价时段转移到低电价时段，但我们发现它们降低了社会福利。这种损失因信息摩擦而得到缓解。我们展示了如何重新设计菜单，以同时改善消费者、公用事业公司和环境的结果。

papers.title: Healthcare Provider Bankruptcies
papers.authors: Samuel Antill, Jessica Bai, Ashvin Gandhi, Adrienne Sabety
papers.abstract: Healthcare firms are filing for Chapter 11 bankruptcy at record rates. We find that bankruptcies increase healthcare staff turnover, worsen care, and harm patients. Using a difference-in- differences design, we estimate that a bankruptcy filing immediately increases staff turnover and worsens the firm’s performance on unannounced inspections. Next, using a patient- distance-to-facility instrument, we document that bankruptcies harm patients through increases in hospitalizations, physical restraints, and bedsores. Finally, we employ a randomized survey experiment of nursing home staff to confirm that bankruptcy filings increase voluntary departures and that replacement workers harm patients.
papers.zh_title: 医疗保健提供者破产
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗保健企业正以创纪录的速度申请第11章破产。我们发现，破产增加了医疗保健人员的流动率，恶化了护理质量，并伤害了患者。使用双重差分设计，我们估计破产申请会立即增加员工流动率，并降低企业在突击检查中的表现。接下来，利用患者与设施距离的工具变量，我们记录了破产通过增加住院率、身体约束和褥疮来伤害患者。最后，我们通过对养老院员工进行随机调查实验，确认破产申请会增加自愿离职率，并且替代员工会伤害患者。

papers.title: When Do FOMC Voting Rights Affect Monetary Policy?
papers.authors: Vyacheslav Fos, Nancy R. Xu
papers.abstract: Using 472 FOMC meetings (1969–2019) and the exogenous rotation of voting rights among Reserve Bank presidents, we identify meetings where local economic conditions in voting districts significantly affect the Federal funds target rate (FFR), while those in non-voting districts show no effect. This voting-group effect persists after controlling for national conditions and Greenbook forecasts, implying that actual FFR decisions plausibly deviated from what average information and expectations would have suggested. Distortions are sizable, persistent, and priced into futures and Treasury markets prior to FOMC meetings. We demonstrate these findings using both components of the Fed’s dual mandate: inflation and unemployment rates.
papers.zh_title: FOMC投票权何时影响货币政策？
papers.zh_abstract: 利用1969年至2019年间472次FOMC会议以及储备银行行长投票权的外生轮换，我们识别出那些投票区的地方经济状况显著影响联邦基金目标利率的会议，而非投票区则无此效应。这种投票群体效应在控制全国状况和绿皮书预测后依然存在，表明实际的联邦基金利率决策可能偏离了平均信息和预期所建议的水平。这种扭曲是显著的、持续的，并在FOMC会议前被期货和国债市场定价。我们利用美联储双重使命的两个组成部分——通胀率和失业率——来证明这些发现。

papers.title: Mobile Crisis Response Teams Support Better Policing: Evidence from CAHOOTS
papers.authors: Jonathan Davis, Samuel Norris, Jadon Schmitt, Yotam Shem-Tov, Chelsea Strickland
papers.abstract: This paper studies the use of mobile crisis response teams—a non-uniformed pair consisting of a mental health worker and a medic—as a component of emergency response to 911 calls. We provide the first evaluation of the longest-running program in the United States, Crisis Assistance Helping Out on the Streets (CAHOOTS) in Eugene, Oregon, which responds to calls involving mental illness, homelessness, and addiction either instead of or in addition to police officers. We use two complementary research designs to understand the effects and possible scope of these programs. First, we find that a series of program expansions into new areas and times reduced the likelihood that a 911 call resulted in an arrest and increased access to medical services. The arrest reduction likely reflects CAHOOTS’ role in de-escalating tense situations and resolving incidents without coercive measures. CAHOOTS is most often dispatched to the same calls as the police, acting as a supplement rather than a substitute. Second, we exploit idiosyncratic variation in CAHOOTS availability in the post-expansion periods to estimate the effect of additional marginal program expansions. We find that they are used mostly for calls that would otherwise go unanswered, suggesting that the program has reached a scale where it can respond to the most urgent calls. We conclude that crisis response teams play an important role as a complement to the police rather than acting only as substitutes.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：I10, J22, J45, K42
papers.zh_title: 移动危机响应团队支持更好的警务：来自CAHOOTS的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了移动危机响应团队——由一名心理健康工作者和一名医护人员组成的非制服搭档——作为911电话应急响应的一部分。我们首次评估了美国运行时间最长的项目，即俄勒冈州尤金市的“街头危机援助帮助”（CAHOOTS），该项目响应涉及精神疾病、无家可归和成瘾的电话，要么替代警察，要么作为警察的补充。我们使用两种互补的研究设计来理解这些项目的效果和可能范围。首先，我们发现一系列项目扩展到新区域和时间段，降低了911电话导致逮捕的可能性，并增加了获得医疗服务的机会。逮捕减少可能反映了CAHOOTS在缓和紧张局势和在不使用强制措施的情况下解决事件中的作用。CAHOOTS最常与警察同时被派往同一电话，作为补充而非替代。其次，我们利用扩展后时期CAHOOTS可用性的特殊变化来估计额外边际项目扩展的效果。我们发现这些扩展主要用于那些否则将无人响应的电话，表明该项目已达到能够响应最紧急电话的规模。我们得出结论，危机响应团队作为警察的补充而非仅仅替代，发挥着重要作用。

papers.title: Fragile Financing? How Corporate Reliance on Shadow Banking Affects their Access to Bank Liquidity
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Manasa Gopal, Sascha Steffen
papers.abstract: Greater reliance on nonbank financing makes firms fragile as it leads banks to limit their access to credit lines. Besides demonstrating this result in panel tests subject to range of controls and robustness checks, we employ the 2014–16 oil-price collapse as an exogenous rollover risk in nonbank financing of non-oil-sector firms by collateralized loan obligations (CLOs) exposed to oil sector firms. Nonbank-reliant firms with looming maturities faced reductions and wider spreads in bank credit lines after the shock, resulting in weaker financial and real performance in spite of their drawdowns of existing credit lines.
papers.zh_title: 脆弱的融资？企业对影子银行的依赖如何影响其获取银行流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 对非银行融资的更大依赖使企业变得脆弱，因为这导致银行限制其获得信贷额度。除了在面板测试中通过一系列控制和稳健性检验证明这一结果外，我们还利用2014-16年油价暴跌作为非银行融资的 exogenous 展期风险，该风险通过暴露于石油行业企业的抵押贷款债务工具（CLOs）影响非石油行业企业。在冲击后，依赖非银行融资且面临即将到期债务的企业，其银行信贷额度减少且利差扩大，导致尽管提取了现有信贷额度，但财务和实际业绩仍然疲弱。

papers.title: Optimal Tariffs When Labor Income Taxes Are Distortionary
papers.authors: Narayana R. Kocherlakota
papers.abstract: It is a classic result in trade theory that it is socially optimal to set the tariff on a good equal to the inverse of the elasticity of its foreign supply. However, this result is based on the assumption that the government can use lump-sum taxes. The paper considers a simple open representative agent economy and characterizes second-best tariffs when the government's only non-tariff source of revenue is linear labor income taxation. If public spending needs are sufficiently large, and import demand is more (less) income-elastic than non-import demand, then the second-best tariff is lower (higher) than the standard optimal tariff.
papers.zh_title: 当劳动所得税具有扭曲性时的最优关税
papers.zh_abstract: 贸易理论中的一个经典结果是，将商品关税设定为其外国供给弹性的倒数在社会上是最优的。然而，这一结果基于政府可以使用一次性总付税的假设。本文考虑一个简单的开放代表性代理人经济体，并刻画当政府唯一的非关税收入来源是线性劳动所得税时的次优关税。如果公共支出需求足够大，并且进口需求的收入弹性大于（小于）非进口需求，那么次优关税低于（高于）标准的最优关税。

papers.title: Paid Sick Leave and Child Maltreatment
papers.authors: Monica Deza, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Alberto Ortega
papers.abstract: Child maltreatment is a major public health concern in the United States. In this study, we examine the impact of recent state paid sick leave mandates on child maltreatment reports over the period 2011-2022. Paid sick leave mandates confer financially protected time that can be used for health and family responsibilities as well as for actions such as court hearings that can reduce exposure to domestic violence. These benefits may reduce child maltreatment reports. Using difference-in-differences and event-study methods, we find that child maltreatment reports decline by 8% following the adoption of a state paid sick leave mandate.
papers.zh_title: 带薪病假与儿童虐待
papers.zh_abstract: 儿童虐待是美国一个主要的公共卫生问题。在本研究中，我们考察了2011-2022年间近期各州带薪病假强制令对儿童虐待报告的影响。带薪病假强制令提供了有经济保障的时间，可用于健康和家庭责任，以及诸如减少家庭暴力暴露的法庭听证等行动。这些好处可能减少儿童虐待报告。使用双重差分和事件研究方法，我们发现，在州通过带薪病假强制令后，儿童虐待报告下降了8%。

papers.title: Global Shocks, Institutional Development, and Trade Restrictions: What Can We Learn from Crises and Recoveries Between 1990 and 2022?
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Hiro Ito, Donghyun Park, Jamel Saadaoui, Gazi Salah Uddin
papers.abstract: The Global Financial Crisis and the COVID-19 pandemic were two major shocks to the world economy in the 21st century. In this study, we analyze the patterns of recessions and recoveries of 101 advanced and developing economies. We identify the turning points of recessions and expansions between 1990 and 2022, and perform cross-country analysis of domestic and external drivers of economic recovery. In addition to the standard independent variables, we include institutional development, political stability, the extent of democracy, and trade restrictions indexes, and explore their roles in explaining recessions and recovery patterns. For the whole sample, we find that deeper recessions are followed by stronger recoveries, in line with Friedman’s plucking model of the business cycle. However, the empirical evidence for the plucking model becomes weaker if institutional development is limited and trade restrictions are high. We show that recessions that create conflict and trade tensions differ sharply from those that do not. Finally, since developing countries tend to have weaker institutions and higher trade barriers, our evidence suggests that countercyclical monetary and fiscal policy may have to play a bigger role in cushioning global shocks in those countries. This, in turn, requires more robust and credible monetary and fiscal policy frameworks.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI；JEL：E62, E63, E65, F32, F41, F43, F45, G01
papers.zh_title: 全球冲击、制度发展与贸易限制：我们能从1990年至2022年间的危机与复苏中学到什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 全球金融危机和COVID-19大流行是21世纪世界经济的两次重大冲击。在本研究中，我们分析了101个发达经济体和发展中经济体的衰退与复苏模式。我们识别了1990年至2022年间衰退和扩张的转折点，并对经济复苏的国内和外部驱动因素进行了跨国分析。除了标准自变量外，我们纳入了制度发展、政治稳定性、民主程度和贸易限制指数，并探讨了它们在解释衰退和复苏模式中的作用。对于整个样本，我们发现更深的衰退之后伴随着更强的复苏，这与弗里德曼的商业周期“拨动模型”一致。然而，如果制度发展有限且贸易限制较高，拨动模型的实证证据会变弱。我们表明，引发冲突和贸易紧张的衰退与那些没有引发这些问题的衰退截然不同。最后，由于发展中国家往往制度较弱且贸易壁垒较高，我们的证据表明，反周期的货币和财政政策可能需要在缓冲这些国家的全球冲击方面发挥更大作用。这反过来又要求更稳健和可信的货币和财政政策框架。

papers.title: From Delay to PayDay: Easing Bureaucrat Access to Implementation Information Strengthens Social Protection Delivery
papers.authors: Eric Dodge, Yusuf Neggers, Rohini Pande, Charity M. Troyer Moore
papers.abstract: Poor implementation frequently impedes social protection delivery in low-state-capacity settings. In such environments, reducing managers' information acquisition costs may improve their grasp of frontline issues and program performance. However, in the presence of managerial rent-seeking, increasing the principal's information may be key, and doing so just for managers can backfire. To assess this trade-off and implications for program performance, we collaborated with two Indian states to randomly vary bureaucrat access to “PayDash”, a digital platform for real-time tracking of worker payment processing for the national rural workfare program. In treated districts, PayDash expedited bureaucrat processing of workfare payments by 17%, and increased available worksites and participating household work days by 23% and 10%, respectively. Work provision rose relatively more during the agricultural lean season. PayDash has the same impact when offered to principals as to managers, and no further gains when offered to both, indicating that manager effort to acquire information constrains implementation. Consistent with information allowing principals to better condition performance incentives on managerial effort, PayDash for principals reduced manager posting transfers by 24%. PayDash strengthened state capacity at a considerably lower cost than hiring staff, while benefiting rural Indians by more than 170 times the costs.
papers.zh_title: 从延迟到发薪日：降低官僚获取实施信息成本强化社会保障交付
papers.zh_abstract: 在低国家能力环境中，糟糕的实施常常阻碍社会保障交付。在此类环境下，降低管理者的信息获取成本可能改善他们对一线问题的把握和项目绩效。然而，在存在管理寻租的情况下，增加委托人的信息可能至关重要，而仅为管理者这样做可能适得其反。为评估这一权衡及其对项目绩效的影响，我们与印度两个邦合作，随机改变官僚对“PayDash”的访问权限——这是一个用于实时追踪国家农村工作福利计划工人付款处理的数字平台。在受处理地区，PayDash将官僚处理工作福利付款的速度加快了17%，并将可用工作站点和参与家庭工作日分别增加了23%和10%。工作提供在农业淡季期间增长相对更多。当PayDash提供给委托人或管理者时，其影响相同，而同时提供给两者时没有进一步增益，这表明管理者获取信息的努力制约了实施。与信息使委托人能更好地根据管理努力调整绩效激励相一致，为委托人提供的PayDash使管理者调任转移减少了24%。PayDash以远低于雇佣员工的成本增强了国家能力，同时使印度农村居民受益超过成本的170倍。

papers.title: Should I Stay or Should I Go? The Response of Labor Migration to Economic Shocks
papers.authors: Andrea Foschi, Christopher House, Christian Proebsting, Linda Tesar
papers.abstract: We examine the responsiveness of labor participation, unemployment and labor migration to exogenous variations in labor demand. Our empirical approach considers four instruments for regional labor demand commonly used in the literature. Empirically, we find that labor migration is a significant margin of adjustment for all our instruments. Following an increase in regional labor demand, the initial increase in employment is accounted for mainly through a reduction in unemployment. Over time however, net labor in-migration becomes the dominant factor contributing to increased regional employment. After 5 years, roughly 60 percent of the increase in employment is explained by the change in population. Responses of labor migration are strongest for individuals aged 20-35. Based on historical data back to the 1950s, we find no evidence of a decline in the elasticity of migration to changes in employment.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ITI, LS, ME；JEL：E24, E32, F66, J61, R23
papers.zh_title: 留下还是离开？劳动力迁移对经济冲击的反应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了劳动力参与、失业和劳动力迁移对劳动力需求外生变化的反应。我们的实证方法考虑了文献中常用的四种区域劳动力需求工具变量。实证上，我们发现劳动力迁移是我们所有工具变量的一个重要调整边际。在区域劳动力需求增加后，就业的初始增长主要通过失业减少来解释。然而，随着时间的推移，净劳动力迁入成为促进区域就业增长的主导因素。5年后，大约60%的就业增长由人口变化解释。劳动力迁移的反应在20-35岁个体中最强。基于可追溯到1950年代的历史数据，我们没有发现迁移对就业变化弹性下降的证据。

papers.title: Bank Financing of Global Supply Chains
papers.authors: Laura Alfaro, Mariya Brussevich, Camelia Minoiu, Andrea F. Presbitero
papers.abstract: Finding new international suppliers is costly, so most importers source inputs from a single country. We match shipment data with the U.S. credit register to analyze the role of banks in mitigating trade search costs during the 2018-2019 U.S.–China trade tensions. Importers of tariff-hit products from China were more likely to exit relationships with Chinese suppliers and to find new suppliers in other Asian countries. To finance their geographic diversification, tariff-hit firms increased credit demand, drawing on credit lines and taking out loans at higher rates. Banks offering trade finance services in Asia eased both financial and information frictions.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, ED, IFM, ITI；JEL：F34, F42, G21
papers.zh_title: 全球供应链的银行融资
papers.zh_abstract: 寻找新的国际供应商成本高昂，因此大多数进口商从单一国家采购投入品。我们将货运数据与美国信贷登记数据匹配，分析银行在2018-2019年中美贸易紧张期间缓解贸易搜寻成本中的作用。受关税影响的中国产品进口商更可能退出与中国供应商的关系，并在其他亚洲国家寻找新供应商。为资助其地理多元化，受关税影响的企业增加了信贷需求，动用信贷额度并以更高利率获得贷款。在亚洲提供贸易融资服务的银行同时缓解了金融和信息摩擦。

papers.title: Assessing Reproducibility in Economics Using Standardized Crowd-sourced Analysis
papers.authors: Abel Brodeur, Seung Yong Sung, Edward Miguel, Lars Vilhuber, Fernando Hoces de la Guardia
papers.abstract: This paper presents a framework to standardize crowd-sourced computational reproductions in economics through the Social Science Reproduction Platform (SSRP). The approach address four main challenges for computational reproductions: a lack of standardization, aggregation issues, existing incentives for “adversarial” interactions, and the loss of knowledge from analyses that are never published. We then summarize the first 487 reproductions uploaded on the SSRP. The results show substantial heterogeneity in the ability to successfully reproduce empirical results in economics research, with approximately 30% of recent studies meeting at least a basic definition of being computationally reproducible.
papers.zh_title: 利用标准化众包分析评估经济学的可复制性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个通过社会科学复制平台（SSRP）标准化经济学众包计算复制的框架。该方法解决了计算复制的四个主要挑战：缺乏标准化、聚合问题、现有“对抗性”互动的激励，以及从未发表的分析导致的知识损失。然后，我们总结了SSRP上上传的前487个复制结果。结果显示，成功复制经济学研究实证结果的能力存在显著异质性，大约30%的近期研究至少满足计算可复制的基本定义。

papers.title: How Much Can Families Afford to Pay for College?
papers.authors: Peter Hinrichs
papers.abstract: This paper studies families’ capacity to pay for college in the United States, focusing on changes over time and differences by race and socioeconomic status. I use data from the National Postsecondary Student Aid Study (NPSAS) to document changes over time in the Expected Family Contribution (EFC) from the Free Application for Federal Student Aid (FAFSA). The results suggest that the EFC has been rising over time, and that this has been driven primarily by families in the upper quartile of the income distribution. I then use data from the Panel Study of Income Dynamics (PSID) to calculate alternative measures of the ability to pay for college. I find that it is possible to alter the distribution of who pays what amount by changing details of the EFC calculation, but the extent of this depends on details of the implementation.
papers.zh_title: 家庭能负担多少大学费用？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究美国家庭支付大学费用的能力，重点关注随时间的变化以及按种族和社会经济地位的差异。我使用国家中学后学生援助研究（NPSAS）的数据，记录联邦学生援助免费申请（FAFSA）中预期家庭贡献（EFC）随时间的变化。结果表明，EFC随时间上升，这主要由收入分布上四分位数的家庭驱动。然后，我使用收入动态面板研究（PSID）的数据计算支付大学费用的替代衡量指标。我发现，通过改变EFC计算的细节可以改变谁支付多少的分布，但这种改变的程度取决于实施细节。

papers.title: Putting US Fiscal Policy on a Sustainable Path
papers.authors: Karen Dynan, Douglas Elmendorf
papers.abstract: Even allowing for substantial uncertainty regarding projections, current US fiscal policies are almost certainly unsustainable. Therefore, policymakers must decide when and in what ways to change policies. Changing policies sooner rather than later would put debt on a lower trajectory and thereby increase national savings and provide insurance against adverse developments by expanding fiscal space, protecting against a persistent shortfall in economic growth, and reducing the chance of a fiscal crisis. Yet, the probability of a near-term fiscal crisis is difficult to assess: Yields on Treasury debt are within their range of the past few decades, which suggests that investors are not that worried about the fiscal outlook—but debt and deficits are at nearly unprecedented levels, and experience shows that investors’ confidence in a government’s fiscal management can deteriorate quickly.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, PE；JEL：E62, H60, H62, H63, H68
papers.zh_title: 将美国财政政策置于可持续路径上
papers.zh_abstract: 即使考虑到预测中的巨大不确定性，当前美国财政政策几乎肯定不可持续。因此，政策制定者必须决定何时以及以何种方式改变政策。尽早而非推迟改变政策将使债务处于较低轨迹，从而增加国民储蓄，并通过扩大财政空间、防范经济持续低迷以及降低财政危机可能性，为不利发展提供保险。然而，近期财政危机的概率难以评估：国债收益率处于过去几十年的范围内，这表明投资者对财政前景并不那么担忧——但债务和赤字处于几乎前所未有的水平，且经验表明投资者对政府财政管理的信心可能迅速恶化。

papers.title: Climate Boards: Do Natural Disaster Experiences Make Directors More Prosocial?
papers.authors: Sehoon Kim, Bernadette A. Minton, Rohan G. Williamson
papers.abstract: We document that corporate directors’ past experience with abnormally severe climatic natural disasters shape their prosocial preferences and influence firm climate policies. Using detailed data on director career histories and county-level natural disasters, we identify Directors with Abnormal Disaster Experiences (DADEs). DADEs are significantly more likely to be affiliated with nonprofit organizations, consistent with heightened prosocial preferences. Importantly, firms with more DADEs on their boards exhibit lower scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas emission intensities and are more likely to implement climate-related policies, including board climate oversight, emission targets, and management incentives to reduce emissions. These effects are driven by influential DADEs serving on governance, audit, or ESG committees, but absent among DADEs on finance, compensation, or risk committees, supporting a preference-based rather than risk-based mechanism. Independent directors, rather than the influence of CEOs, play a central role. The effects are stronger when disaster experiences are accumulated over longer histories and in large or high-emission firms. The results are muted in smaller disasters and not driven by recent trends in attention to climate change. Despite the role of preferences, firms with more DADEs do not exhibit worse financial or operational performance. Using director deaths as plausibly exogenous shocks, we provide causal evidence. Our findings show that directors’ experiences heighten their prosocial preferences that lead them to influence corporate climate policy.
papers.zh_title: 气候董事会：自然灾害经历是否使董事更亲社会？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了公司董事过去经历异常严重的气候自然灾害如何塑造其亲社会偏好并影响公司气候政策。利用详细的董事职业历史数据和县级自然灾害数据，我们识别出具有异常灾害经历（DADE）的董事。DADE董事与非营利组织关联的可能性显著更高，这与增强的亲社会偏好一致。重要的是，董事会中DADE董事更多的公司，其范围1和范围2温室气体排放强度更低，并且更可能实施气候相关政策，包括董事会气候监督、排放目标以及减少排放的管理激励。这些效应由在治理、审计或ESG委员会任职的有影响力的DADE董事驱动，但在财务、薪酬或风险委员会的DADE董事中不存在，这支持了基于偏好而非基于风险的机制。独立董事而非CEO的影响起核心作用。当灾害经历积累时间更长以及在大公司或高排放公司中时，效应更强。在较小灾害中结果减弱，且并非由近期对气候变化关注的趋势驱动。尽管偏好起作用，但DADE董事更多的公司并未表现出更差的财务或运营绩效。利用董事死亡作为看似外生的冲击，我们提供了因果证据。我们的发现表明，董事的经历增强了其亲社会偏好，进而引导他们影响公司气候政策。

papers.title: Corporate Actions as Moral Issues
papers.authors: Zwetelina Iliewa, Elisabeth Kempf, Oliver G. Spalt
papers.abstract: We examine nonpecuniary preferences across a broad set of corporate actions using a representative sample of the U.S. population. Our core findings, based on largescale online surveys, are that (i) self-reported nonpecuniary concerns are large both for stock market investors and non-investors; (ii) concerns about the treatment of workers and CEO pay rank highest—higher than concerns about workforce diversity and fossil energy usage; (iii) Moral Foundations Theory emerges as an important framework for explaining nonpecuniary preferences. Combined, our findings provide new evidence on the importance of moral values as a key determinant of nonpecuniary preferences over corporate actions.
papers.zh_title: 作为道德问题的公司行为
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国人口的具有代表性样本，考察了广泛公司行为中的非金钱偏好。基于大规模在线调查，我们的核心发现是：（i）股票市场投资者和非投资者自我报告的非金钱关切都很大；（ii）对工人待遇和CEO薪酬的关切排名最高——高于对劳动力多样性和化石能源使用的关切；（iii）道德基础理论成为解释非金钱偏好的重要框架。综合来看，我们的发现提供了新证据，表明道德价值观是决定公司行为非金钱偏好的关键因素。

papers.title: The Myth of U.S. Dollar Dominance in Japanese Exports: New Evidence from Japanese Customs Level Data
papers.authors: Uraku Yoshimoto, Kiyotaka Sato, Takatoshi Ito, Junko Shimizu, Yushi Yoshida, Taiyo Yoshimi
papers.abstract: While Japanese exports are generally considered invoiced mainly in U.S. dollars (USD), this study presents contrary evidence that most Japanese firms choose yen-invoiced exports. Surprisingly, only the top one percent of firms in size tend to choose USD-invoiced exports, based on the Japan Customs export declaration data that was newly made available to researchers. By conducting fixed-effect panel estimation using the granular Japan Customs transaction data, combined with the most comprehensive firm-level data compiled by the Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI), we demonstrate that the firm size and the intra-firm export share significantly reduce yen-invoiced exports. Smaller firms with few overseas subsidiaries tend to choose yen-invoiced exports to avoid foreign exchange risk. In contrast, larger firms efficiently manage foreign exchange risk arising from USD-invoiced exports, since they tend to export to overseas subsidiaries and benefit from operational hedging that offsets USD-denominated import payments with export revenues within group companies. Smaller firms would continue to choose yen-invoice exports unless they can benefit from operational hedging.
papers.zh_title: 日元出口计价主导地位的神话：来自日本海关层面数据的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管日本出口通常被认为主要以美元计价，但本研究提供了相反的证据：大多数日本企业选择以日元计价出口。令人惊讶的是，基于新近向研究人员开放的日本海关出口申报数据，只有规模排名前1%的企业倾向于选择美元计价出口。通过使用细粒度的日本海关交易数据进行固定效应面板估计，并结合经济产业省编制的最全面的企业层面数据，我们证明企业规模和内部出口份额显著降低了日元计价出口的比例。拥有较少海外子公司的小型企业倾向于选择日元计价出口以规避外汇风险。相比之下，大型企业能够有效管理因美元计价出口产生的外汇风险，因为它们倾向于向海外子公司出口，并受益于运营对冲——即在集团内部用出口收入抵消以美元计价的进口支付。除非小型企业能够从运营对冲中获益，否则它们将继续选择日元计价出口。

papers.title: The Power of Persuasion: Causal Effects of Household Communication on Women's Employment
papers.authors: Namrata Kala, Madeline McKelway
papers.abstract: In many economic settings, agents lack decision rights but provide input. Intra-household decision-making in contexts with restrictive gender norms is one important example; wives often lack final say over decisions but still give input. Their ability to communicate persuasively while providing input could sway decisions in their favor. We conduct a field experiment in rural India to test whether an effective communication training among married women impacts their labor supply, the most common topic of intra-household disagreement in the sample. The treatment shifted women's communication styles towards the techniques taught in the training. We find positive effects on labor supply and earnings but, consistent with theory, only for women who at baseline were more interested than their husbands in the women working. These effects persist to at least one year following the treatment, leading to a nearly 60% increase in earnings over this period. Mechanisms analyses suggest the changes in labor supply are not due to shifts in bargaining power but rather come from women changing their husbands' preferences about female employment.
papers.zh_title: 说服的力量：家庭沟通对女性就业的因果效应
papers.zh_abstract: 在许多经济环境中，行为主体缺乏决策权但提供意见。在性别规范严格的环境中，家庭内部决策是一个重要例子：妻子通常对决策没有最终决定权，但仍会提供意见。她们在提供意见时进行有效沟通的能力可能影响决策结果。我们在印度农村进行了一项实地实验，检验对已婚女性进行有效沟通培训是否会影响她们的劳动供给——这是样本中家庭内部最常见的分歧话题。该干预措施使女性的沟通风格转向培训所教授的技巧。我们发现，培训对劳动供给和收入产生了积极影响，但根据理论，这种影响仅适用于那些在基线时比丈夫更希望自己工作的女性。这些效应在干预后至少持续一年，导致该期间收入增长近60%。机制分析表明，劳动供给的变化并非源于议价能力的转变，而是来自女性改变了丈夫对女性就业的偏好。

papers.title: Cigarette Taxes and the Household Budget
papers.authors: Michael E. Darden, Reginald B. Hebert, Michael F. Pesko, Samuel Sturm
papers.abstract: We study the effects of cigarette excise taxes on smokers’ household budgets. In a randomized survey experiment, smokers respond to hypothetical tax increases by adjusting cigarette shopping behaviors, substituting toward other tobacco products, and reducing both discretionary and human capital-related expenditures. Using Consumer Expenditure Survey data and a quasi-experimental design, we find cigarette taxes reduce smoking prevalence but increase cigarette expenditures among continuing smokers. A $1 increase in cigarette taxes causes a modest reduction in human capital-related expenditures among below-median-income smokers ($48 less per quarter). Our work uncovers important unintended consequences of cigarette taxes, particularly for low-income individuals.
papers.zh_title: 香烟税与家庭预算
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了香烟消费税对吸烟者家庭预算的影响。在一项随机调查实验中，吸烟者通过调整香烟购买行为、转向其他烟草产品以及减少可自由支配支出和人力资本相关支出来应对假设的税收增加。利用消费者支出调查数据和准实验设计，我们发现香烟税降低了吸烟率，但增加了继续吸烟者的香烟支出。每增加1美元香烟税，会导致中低收入吸烟者的人力资本相关支出适度减少（每季度减少48美元）。我们的研究揭示了香烟税的重要意外后果，特别是对低收入人群而言。

papers.title: Evaluating Recent Crackdowns on Disability Benefits: Effects on Income and Health Care Use in Australia
papers.authors: Manasi Deshpande, Greg Kaplan, Tobias Leigh-Wood
papers.abstract: Many developed countries have enacted reforms to reduce enrollment in disability benefits (DI). We evaluate the effects of a DI crackdown in Australia on the most comprehensive set of outcomes available to date, including earnings, government benefits, family income, and health care utilization. Using a 2014 reform to Australia’s Disability Support Pension, we find that, on average, DI removal has a net zero effect on household income but leads to an increase in prescriptions for strong mental health drugs. However, average effects mask heterogeneity by family structure. For removed recipients living with family, family members increase their earnings by enough to offset the lost DI income, with minimal increase in mental health prescriptions. In contrast, removed recipients living alone do not increase their own earnings or have family support, but their use of strong mental health drugs increases dramatically. We develop a welfare analysis that considers multiple margins of behavioral adjustment. We find that behavioral adjustments offset more than half of the private welfare loss for recipients living with family but very little for those living alone. Government savings exceed household willingness to pay for DI for those living with family, but not for those living alone.
papers.zh_title: 评估近期对残疾福利的打击：对澳大利亚收入和医疗保健使用的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 许多发达国家已实施改革以减少残疾福利的参保人数。我们评估了澳大利亚对残疾福利打击的影响，涉及迄今为止最全面的结果集，包括收入、政府福利、家庭收入和医疗保健使用。利用2014年澳大利亚残疾支持养老金改革，我们发现，平均而言，取消残疾福利对家庭收入净影响为零，但导致强效精神药物处方增加。然而，平均效应掩盖了家庭结构带来的异质性。对于与家人同住的被取消福利者，家庭成员的收入增加足以弥补失去的残疾福利收入，且精神药物处方增加极少。相比之下，独居的被取消福利者既没有增加自身收入，也没有家庭支持，但他们对强效精神药物的使用急剧增加。我们开发了一个考虑多种行为调整维度的福利分析。我们发现，对于与家人同住的被取消福利者，行为调整抵消了超过一半的私人福利损失，但对于独居者则几乎没有抵消。对于与家人同住者，政府节省的资金超过了家庭对残疾福利的支付意愿，但对于独居者则不然。

papers.title: Place Based Economic Development and Tribal Casinos
papers.authors: Randall Akee, Maggie R. Jones, Emilia Simeonova
papers.abstract: Tribal lands in the U.S. have historically experienced some of the worst economic conditions in the nation. We review some existing research on the effect of American Indian tribal casinos on various measures of local economic development. This is an industry that began in the early 1990s and currently generates more than $40 billion annually. We also review the state of the literature on the effects of casino operations on communities in or adjacent to tribal areas. Using a new dataset linking individual and enterprise-level data longitudinally, this study examines the industry- and location-specific impacts of tribal casino operations. We focus in particular on the employment of American Indians. We document positive flows from unemployment and non-casino geographies to work in sectors related to casino operations. Tribal casinos differ from other standard place-based economic development projects in that they are focused on a single industry; we discuss these differences and note that some of the positive spillover effects may be similar to other, more standard place-based policies. Finally, we discuss additional and open-ended questions for future research on this topic.
papers.zh_title: 基于地点的经济发展与部落赌场
papers.zh_abstract: 美国部落土地历史上一直经历着全国最糟糕的经济状况。我们回顾了一些关于美国印第安部落赌场对当地经济发展各项指标影响的现有研究。这是一个始于20世纪90年代初的行业，目前年收入超过400亿美元。我们还回顾了关于赌场运营对部落地区内或邻近社区影响的文献现状。利用一项将个人和企业层面数据纵向关联的新数据集，本研究考察了部落赌场运营的行业和地点特定影响。我们特别关注美国印第安人的就业情况。我们记录了从失业和非赌场地理区域向与赌场运营相关行业工作的正向流动。部落赌场与其他标准的基于地点的经济发展项目不同，因为它们专注于单一行业；我们讨论了这些差异，并指出一些正向溢出效应可能与其他更标准的地点导向政策相似。最后，我们讨论了未来关于这一主题研究的其他开放性问题。

papers.title: Tariff Wars and Net Foreign Assets
papers.authors: Mark A. Aguiar, Manuel Amador, Doireann Fitzgerald
papers.abstract: This paper examines whether and how international financial claims can be honored without default once a trade war erupts. Using a two-country two-good model, we study how unanticipated tariffs revalue international assets and how the outcome depends on ex-ante gross asset positions. When gross positions are strictly positive (each country has claims on the other), sufficiently high bilateral tariffs zero out any ex-ante net debt. Conversely, this net debt cannot be zeroed out when the debtor holds no claims on the creditor. When a country has liabilities denominated in the other country’s goods (or prices), then a sufficiently large tariff levied by the second can immiserize the first, generating multiple equilibria if both sides have such liabilities. These results generalize to settings with an arbitrary number of goods, time, and uncertainty. In a dynamic version, under a severe trade war, domestic interest rates and the real exchange rate must decouple: interest rates align with their autarkic values, and international relative prices revalue net asset positions to zero. We calibrate a two-country model to the US net foreign asset position in 2023 and show that the welfare consequences of a tariff war that stops short of autarky depend critically on the US ex-ante gross portfolio composition.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：F1, F13, F30, F32, F40
papers.zh_title: 关税战与净外国资产
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了贸易战爆发后，国际金融债权是否以及如何在不违约的情况下得到清偿。利用一个两国两商品模型，我们研究了未预期的关税如何重估国际资产，以及结果如何取决于事前总资产头寸。当总头寸严格为正（每个国家都持有对另一国的债权）时，足够高的双边关税会抵消任何事前净债务。相反，当债务国不持有对债权国的债权时，这种净债务无法被抵消。当一个国家的负债以另一国商品（或价格）计价时，那么后者征收的足够高的关税可能使前者陷入贫困，如果双方都有此类负债，则会产生多重均衡。这些结果可以推广到具有任意数量商品、时间和不确定性的设定中。在动态版本中，在严重贸易战下，国内利率和实际汇率必须脱钩：利率与其自给自足水平一致，国际相对价格将净资产头寸重估至零。我们将一个两国模型校准至2023年美国净外国资产头寸，并表明，一场未达到自给自足程度的关税战的福利后果关键取决于美国事前总资产组合构成。

papers.title: US College Students’ Well-Being
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Bruce Sacerdote
papers.abstract: We study the determinants of poor mental health among students at an elite private institution. Survey measures of well-being have declined significantly over the last decade for both high school students and those of college age. This is an international phenomenon that appears to have started in the US around 2013 and that was not caused by but was exacerbated by COVID and the associated lockdowns. We focus on elite and non-elite institutions and examine Dartmouth as a special case. Dartmouth ranks well compared to other institutions. However, around a quarter of Dartmouth students (26%) report they suffer from moderate to severe depression and 22% that they suffer from moderate, to severe, anxiety and 10% say they contemplated suicide. Student’s wellbeing appears to be impacted negatively by stress over finances. We find broad patterns in the data, that ill-being is higher among females, those who engage in little exercise, have low GPAs, are not athletes nor in academic clubs nor religious organizations, reside in fraternity housing or are on financial aid.
papers.zh_title: 美国大学生的幸福感
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一所精英私立大学学生心理健康状况不佳的决定因素。过去十年中，高中生和大学年龄段学生的调查幸福感指标显著下降。这是一个国际现象，似乎于2013年左右在美国开始，并非由新冠疫情及相关封锁引起，但被其加剧。我们聚焦于精英和非精英院校，并将达特茅斯学院作为一个特例进行研究。达特茅斯学院与其他院校相比排名靠前。然而，约四分之一（26%）的达特茅斯学生报告患有中度至重度抑郁症，22%报告患有中度至重度焦虑症，10%表示曾考虑过自杀。学生的幸福感似乎受到财务压力的负面影响。我们在数据中发现了广泛模式：幸福感较低的情况在女性、很少锻炼、GPA低、非运动员、未参加学术俱乐部或宗教组织、住在兄弟会宿舍或接受经济援助的学生中更为普遍。

papers.title: Bureaucratic Incentives and Effectiveness of the One Child Policy in China
papers.authors: Hongbin Li, Lingsheng Meng, Grant Miller, Hanmo Yang
papers.abstract: China’s total fertility rate declined very little following implementation of the One Child Policy (OCP) in 1979/1980, but then fell sharply, by more than one-third, during the early 1990s. In this paper, we propose that strengthening bureaucratic incentives under the “One Vote Veto” (OVV) policy, which strictly prohibited career promotion for adherence failure, was necessary for more “effective” implementation of the OCP—and for its delayed impact on fertility. We use provincial variation in OVV implementation to estimate event study regression inputs needed to build actual and counterfactual sequential multi-decrement fertility life tables, finding that the policy explains 46% of China’s total fertility rate decline during the 1990s, driving it below replacement level. Use of intrauterine devices (IUDs, the most prevalent form of modern contraception in China) that was “recommended” by party officials increased by 133% under the policy, a relative increase more than four times as large as the increase in “voluntary” use. Overall, our paper suggests that population policy made a larger contribution to low fertility in China than suggested by past research. More generally, our paper highlights the central role of aligning bureaucratic incentives with public policy objectives, even in a centrally-planned economy like China’s.
papers.zh_title: 官僚激励与中国独生子女政策的有效性
papers.zh_abstract: 中国的总和生育率在1979/1980年实施独生子女政策后下降甚微，但在20世纪90年代初期急剧下降了超过三分之一。在本文中，我们提出，在“一票否决”政策下加强官僚激励——该政策严格禁止因执行不力而获得职业晋升——对于更“有效”地实施独生子女政策及其对生育率的延迟影响是必要的。我们利用各省在“一票否决”实施上的差异，估计了构建实际和反事实序贯多减次生育生命表所需的事件研究回归输入，发现该政策解释了20世纪90年代中国总和生育率下降的46%，使其降至更替水平以下。在该政策下，由党内官员“推荐”使用的宫内节育器（中国最普遍的现代避孕方式）增加了133%，这一相对增长是“自愿”使用增长的四倍多。总体而言，我们的论文表明，人口政策对中国低生育率的贡献比过去研究认为的更大。更一般地说，我们的论文强调了将官僚激励与公共政策目标对齐的核心作用，即使是在像中国这样的中央计划经济体中也是如此。

papers.title: Why Do Union Jobs Pay More? New Evidence from Matched Employer-Employee Data
papers.authors: Pierre-Loup Beauregard, Thomas Lemieux, Derek Messacar, Raffaele Saggio
papers.abstract: We use Canadian matched employer-employee data to assess the sources of the union pay premium. After controlling for worker heterogeneity using the Abowd, Kramarz, and Margolis (1999) (AKM) two-way fixed effects approach, we find that unionized firms pay about 15 log points more than non-unionized firms. Forty percent of this gap is linked to productivity differences between unionized and non-unionized firms as measured by value added per worker. The remaining gap reflects unions’ ability to extract more rents for workers. Our estimates imply that unions raise pay among unionized workers by around 9 log points. The union effect grows to about 11 log points in an extension of the AKM approach where unions also affect the returns to unobservable worker characteristics.
papers.zh_title: 为什么工会工作薪酬更高？来自匹配雇主-雇员数据的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用加拿大匹配的雇主-雇员数据来评估工会薪酬溢价的来源。在采用Abowd、Kramarz和Margolis（1999）提出的双向固定效应方法（AKM）控制工人异质性后，我们发现工会化企业的薪酬比非工会化企业高出约15个对数点。这一差距中有40%与工会化企业和非工会化企业之间以人均增加值衡量的生产率差异相关。剩余的差距则反映了工会为工人攫取更多租金的能力。我们的估计表明，工会使工会化工人的薪酬提高了约9个对数点。在AKM方法的扩展中，当工会还影响不可观测的工人特征的回报时，工会效应增长到约11个对数点。

papers.title: Tariffs and Retaliation: A Brief Macroeconomic Analysis
papers.authors: Stéphane Auray, Michael B. Devereux, Aurélien Eyquem
papers.abstract: We quantify the macroeconomic effects of the tariff measures announced (but not entirely implemented yet) on Liberation Day (April 2nd, 2025) through the lens of a New-Keynesian two-country model calibrated to the US and the rest of the world. We study both a unilateral 10pp tariff increase and a global trade war scenario with retalia- tory tariffs of a similar magnitude. In either case, tariffs are always sharply contractionary for US GDP, increasing inflation and widening the trade deficit. Measured in welfare terms a unilateral tariff generates gains for the US due to a large terms of trade appreciation, but these US welfare gains vanish with global retaliation. Three features of the model are critical in the evaluation of the tariff impact - the asymmetry in size and openness between the US and the rest of the world, the endogenous response of monetary policy to the inflationary effects of tariffs, and the importance of trade in intermediate goods for the scale of the global response to a tariff shock.
papers.zh_title: 关税与报复：一个简短的宏观经济分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过一个校准至美国和世界其他地区的新凯恩斯主义两国模型，量化了2025年4月2日“解放日”宣布（但尚未完全实施）的关税措施的宏观经济效应。我们研究了单边提高10个百分点关税的情景，以及规模类似的报复性关税导致的全球贸易战情景。在两种情况下，关税都会对美国GDP产生急剧的紧缩效应，推高通胀并扩大贸易逆差。以福利衡量，单边关税因贸易条件大幅改善而为美国带来收益，但这些美国福利收益在全球报复中消失。模型中有三个特征对评估关税影响至关重要——美国与世界其他地区在规模和开放度上的不对称性、货币政策对关税通胀效应的内生反应，以及中间品贸易在关税冲击全球反应规模中的重要性。

papers.title: The Importance of Preventive Medical Care for Managing Chronic Disease
papers.authors: Claire Boone, Pablo A. Celhay, Paul Gertler, Tadeja Gracner
papers.abstract: We study how preventive medical care use affects health behaviors and outcomes for patients with chronic diseases. Leveraging variation induced by a national appointment reminder program, rolled out across 315 public primary care clinics in Chile, we use an instrumental variables approach with patient-level administrative data from over 300,000 patients with type 2 diabetes or hypertension. We find that increased preventive visits lead to more screening tests and large increases in medication adherence. Preventive care also leads to earlier detection and treatment of cardiovascular complications; we document an increase in cardiovascular hospitalizations but a reduction in in-hospital mortality.
papers.zh_title: 预防性医疗保健对管理慢性病的重要性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究预防性医疗保健的使用如何影响慢性病患者的健康行为与结果。利用智利315家公立初级保健诊所推行的全国性预约提醒计划所引发的变异，我们采用工具变量方法，分析了超过30万名2型糖尿病或高血压患者的个体层面行政数据。我们发现，增加预防性就诊次数会导致更多的筛查检测以及药物依从性的大幅提升。预防性医疗保健还导致心血管并发症的早期发现和治疗；我们记录了心血管住院率的增加，但住院死亡率有所下降。

papers.title: Money or Time? Heterogeneous Effects of Unconditional Cash on Parental Investments
papers.authors: Hema Shah, Lisa A. Gennetian, Katherine Magnuson, Hirokazu Yoshikawa, Laura R. Stilwell, Kimberly Noble, Greg Duncan
papers.abstract: Household time and money allocations in response to income support programs vary across diverse family circumstances and preferences, yet such heterogeneous responses are not well understood. Using data from a large-scale, multisite, U.S.-based randomized controlled study, we examine heterogeneity in the effects of a monthly unconditional cash transfer on monetary and time investments in children. This study offers a novel opportunity to examine heterogeneous effects of a cash transfer by race and ethnicity, where receipt is independent of eligibility based on other demographic characteristics. The effects of the cash transfer on net household income, earnings, and household expenditures were similar for families irrespective of race or ethnicity, even given initial differences in family structure, government benefit receipt, and employment. However, effects on monetary and time investments in children differed. Latino families’ child-focused expenditures increased, equivalent to nearly one-third of the cash transfer, with no effect on maternal employment or time spent with children. Among Black families, maternal work hours decreased and time spent with children on early learning activities increased, with no effect on child-focused expenditures. Marginal propensities to consume child-specific goods from different income sources also varied: Estimates showed a higher marginal propensity to consume child-specific goods from government income than from maternal income among Latino families, and the opposite among Black families. Latino families’ responses to the unconditional cash transfer and to government income are consistent with the notion that signals regarding intended use of income influence spending decisions.
papers.meta: Programs：CH；JEL：H31, I18, I30, I31, I38, J13, J15, J18, J22
papers.zh_title: 金钱还是时间？无条件现金对父母投资的异质性效应
papers.zh_abstract: 家庭在应对收入支持计划时，时间和金钱的分配因不同的家庭环境和偏好而异，然而这种异质性反应尚未得到充分理解。利用一项基于美国的大规模、多地点随机对照研究的数据，我们检验了每月无条件现金转移对儿童金钱和时间投资的异质性效应。这项研究提供了一个新颖的机会，可以按种族和民族检验现金转移的异质性效应，其中现金的获得独立于基于其他人口特征的资格条件。尽管家庭结构、政府福利领取和就业状况存在初始差异，但现金转移对家庭净收入、收入和家庭支出的影响在不同种族或民族的家庭中相似。然而，对儿童金钱和时间投资的影响却有所不同。拉丁裔家庭的儿童专项支出增加，相当于现金转移的近三分之一，但对母亲就业或与孩子相处的时间没有影响。在黑人家庭中，母亲的工作时间减少，与孩子一起进行早期学习活动的时间增加，但对儿童专项支出没有影响。来自不同收入来源的儿童特定商品的边际消费倾向也有所不同：估计显示，在拉丁裔家庭中，来自政府收入的儿童特定商品边际消费倾向高于来自母亲收入的，而在黑人家庭中则相反。拉丁裔家庭对无条件现金转移和政府收入的反应，与收入预期用途信号影响支出决策的观点一致。

papers.title: Do Transfer Pricing Reforms Lead to a Boom in Tax Consultants?
papers.authors: Dina Pomeranz, Juan Carlos Suárez Serrato
papers.abstract: The OECD has promoted the adoption of internationally standardized transfer pricing rules to curb profit shifting for tax avoidance by multinational firms. Bustos et al. (2023) analyzed a large reform in Chile based on these OECD standards and found that it led to a surge in tax advisory services. This paper investigates the external validity of this finding. Combining employment history data with information on countries’ strictness of transfer pricing regulations over time, we analyze the effect for four countries: Chile, Colombia, Spain, and Uruguay. Event-study difference-in-differences analysis shows that reforms led to substantial increase in transfer pricing consultants in most cases. The effect is larger when the reform is stronger and when a country has a lower level of pre-treatment transfer pricing strictness or of transfer pricing consultants.
papers.zh_title: 转让定价改革会导致税务顾问激增吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 经合组织（OECD）推动采用国际标准化的转让定价规则，以遏制跨国企业通过利润转移进行避税。Bustos等人（2023）分析了智利基于这些OECD标准进行的一项重大改革，发现该改革导致了税务咨询服务的激增。本文研究了这一发现的外部有效性。通过将就业历史数据与各国转让定价监管严格程度随时间变化的信息相结合，我们分析了四个国家（智利、哥伦比亚、西班牙和乌拉圭）的效应。事件研究双重差分分析表明，在大多数情况下，改革导致转让定价顾问数量大幅增加。当改革力度更强，且一个国家在改革前的转让定价严格程度或转让定价顾问数量较低时，这种效应更大。

papers.title: Innovation and Health Inequality: Evidence from Direct-Acting Antivirals
papers.authors: Kevin Callison, Michael E. Darden, Keith F. Teltser
papers.abstract: We study disparities in liver transplant allocation when innovation alleviates the scarcity of organs. When direct-acting antivirals for Hepatitis C (HCV) reduced HCV+ liver demand, we show a disproportionate increase in White HCV- liver transplants (56.6%) relative to Black HCV- transplants (11.9%). The time to transplant decreased (31.1%), and the transplant rate increased (19.5pp), only for White HCV- patients. Our results are surprising because liver health is the primary determinant of transplant priority and marginal White patients were of better liver health. We show more similar gains when we focus on privately insured patients and/or areas with more Black patients.
papers.zh_title: 创新与健康不平等：来自直接抗病毒药物的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当创新缓解器官稀缺时，肝脏移植分配中的差异。当针对丙型肝炎（HCV）的直接抗病毒药物减少了对HCV+肝脏的需求时，我们发现白人HCV-肝脏移植数量（56.6%）相对于黑人HCV-肝脏移植数量（11.9%）出现了不成比例的增长。只有白人HCV-患者的移植等待时间缩短（31.1%），移植率提高（19.5个百分点）。我们的结果令人惊讶，因为肝脏健康是移植优先权的主要决定因素，而边缘白人患者的肝脏健康状况更好。当我们关注拥有私人保险的患者和/或黑人患者较多的地区时，我们发现了更相似的收益。

papers.title: A Stepping Stone Approach to Norm Transitions
papers.authors: Selim Gulesci, Sam Jindani, Eliana La Ferrara, David Smerdon, Munshi Sulaiman, H. Peyton Young
papers.abstract: We propose a model to study when an intermediate action can serve as a “stepping stone” that enables the elimination of a harmful norm. While the intermediate action may facilitate the first “step”, it may also become a new norm. We derive intuitive conditions for stepping stones, which depend on the relative size of social penalties and intrinsic utility benefits. We propose an econometric approach to testing whether an intermediate action is a stepping stone, and apply it to original data on female genital cutting in Somalia. The analysis shows that the intermediate action may become the new norm.
papers.zh_title: 规范转型的垫脚石方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个模型，用于研究中间行动何时可以作为“垫脚石”，从而促成有害规范的消除。虽然中间行动可能促进第一步“迈出”，但它也可能成为一种新规范。我们推导出垫脚石的直观条件，这些条件取决于社会惩罚与内在效用收益的相对大小。我们提出了一种计量经济学方法来检验中间行动是否为垫脚石，并将其应用于索马里女性割礼的原始数据。分析表明，中间行动可能成为新规范。

papers.title: Trends in Work Capacity in the US Population: Are Recent Cohorts in Worse Health?
papers.authors: David M. Cutler, Ellen Meara, Susan Stewart
papers.abstract: The growth of longevity in the U.S. and other countries has increased interest in raising the age of eligibility for public retirement benefits. The consequences of this policy depend on the health of the older adult population overall and by socioeconomic group. In this paper, we estimate how multiple dimensions of health in older adults evolve over time and across cohorts, focusing on physical function, mental health, pain, and cognition. Our sample is individuals in the Health and Retirement Study who are aged 51 to 54 at baseline and are followed for up to two decades. We find that limitations in most domains have increased for younger cohorts, especially pain and cognitive impairment. People are more impaired in their 50s, whereas such impairment used to occur in one’s 60s. However, this appears to be a speeding up of impairment more than a long-term increase. Among people in their late 60s, health for later cohorts is similar to health for earlier cohorts. To evaluate the implications of these trends, we simulate the work capacity of adults just before reaching age 65 based on the health status of people at this age and the relationship between health and the labor force outcomes of younger people. Overall health among people at ages 62 to 64 remains high, despite impairment striking at younger ages. However, among people without high school degrees, less than half are predicted to have the capacity to work full time by age 62 to 64, and over a quarter are predicted to be receiving SSDI.
papers.zh_title: 美国人口工作能力趋势：近期队列的健康状况更差吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 美国及其他国家预期寿命的增长，提高了人们对提高公共退休福利领取年龄的兴趣。这一政策的后果取决于老年人口的整体健康状况以及不同社会经济群体的健康状况。在本文中，我们估算了老年人非致命性健康的多个维度——身体功能、心理健康、疼痛和认知——如何随时间及队列演变。我们的样本是健康与退休研究中基线年龄为51至54岁、并接受长达二十年追踪的个体。我们发现，较年轻队列在大多数领域的限制有所增加，尤其是疼痛和认知障碍。人们在50多岁时就出现更多损伤，而这种损伤过去通常发生在60多岁。然而，这似乎是损伤的加速出现，而非长期增加。在接近70岁的人群中，较晚队列的健康状况与较早队列相似。为了评估这些趋势的影响，我们根据该年龄人群的健康状况以及健康与年轻人劳动力市场结果之间的关系，模拟了刚满65岁成年人的工作能力。尽管损伤在更年轻时出现，但62至64岁人群的整体健康状况仍然良好。然而，在没有高中学历的人群中，预计不到一半的人在62至64岁时有能力全职工作，超过四分之一的人预计正在领取社会保障残疾保险（SSDI）。

papers.title: Analyzing the Effects of Occupational Licensing on Earnings Inequality in the United States
papers.authors: Kihwan Bae, Morris M. Kleiner, Conor Norris, Edward J. Timmons
