papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：F22, G24, L26, M13, O32
papers.zh_title: 本土与移民创业者的协同效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了由移民和本土团队共同创立的初创企业的表现。利用将初创企业与创始人及员工的就业和教育历史关联起来的独特数据，我们发现本土-移民团队的表现优于纯本土团队和纯移民团队。本土-移民初创企业在成立三年后拥有更大的就业规模，更有可能获得融资，能进入更大规模的融资轮次，并实现更成功的退出。一项基于大学学位项目中本土学生占比的工具变量策略证实，本土-移民团队规模更大且更有可能获得资金。对多样化劳动力库、成功风险投资以及扩展产品市场的优越获取渠道，是推动本土-移民团队表现优异的关键因素。

papers.title: Should Governments Restrict Foreign Investments in Startups?
papers.authors: Fiona Paine, Richard R. Townsend, Ting Xu
papers.abstract: This paper examines the evolving policy landscape surrounding foreign investment restrictions in innovative startups. Drawing on recent research, we analyze both the security benefits and economic costs of policies like the Foreign Investment Risk Review Modernization Act (FIRRMA). The evidence suggests that foreign investments do facilitate measurable cross-border knowledge spillovers that may raise legitimate security concerns. However, restricting these investments imposes significant costs on domestic innovation ecosystems, including reduced capital availability, disrupted investor networks, and potentially diminished innovation outcomes. These effects extend well beyond directly targeted foreign investors to affect domestic venture firms and startups. We explore design considerations for more effective investment screening policies, including industry targeting, investor heterogeneity, and implementation approaches, as well as complementary policies that might address security concerns while minimizing costs to innovation. We conclude by outlining promising directions for future research on this increasingly important intersection of innovation policy and national security.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, ITI, POL, PR；JEL：F50, F65, G15, G18, G24, O3
papers.zh_title: 政府应限制对初创企业的外国投资吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了围绕创新初创企业外国投资限制的不断演变的政策格局。基于近期研究，我们分析了诸如《外国投资风险评估现代化法案》等政策的安全收益和经济成本。证据表明，外国投资确实促进了可衡量的跨境知识溢出，这可能引发合理的安全担忧。然而，限制这些投资会给国内创新生态系统带来显著成本，包括资本可用性降低、投资者网络中断以及潜在的创新成果减少。这些影响远远超出直接针对的外国投资者，波及国内风险投资公司和初创企业。我们探讨了更有效投资筛选政策的设计考量，包括行业针对性、投资者异质性和实施方法，以及可能在不损害创新的情况下解决安全担忧的补充政策。最后，我们概述了未来研究这一日益重要的创新政策与国家安全交叉领域的富有前景的方向。

papers.title: Convergence? Thoughts About the Evolution of Mainstream Macroeconomics Over the Last 40 Years
papers.authors: Olivier J. Blanchard
papers.abstract:
This year marks the 40th anniversary of the NBER Macro Annual Conference, founded in 1986. This paper reviews the evolution of mainstream macroeconomics since then. It presents my views, informed by a survey of a number of researchers who have made important contributions to the field. I develop two main arguments.
The first is that, starting from strikingly different positions, there has been substantial convergence, in terms of methodology, architecture, and main mechanisms. Methodology: Explicit micro foundations, explicit treatment of distortions, with, at the same time, an increased willingness to deviate from rational expectations, neoclassical utility and profit maximization. Architecture: The wide acceptance of nominal rigidities as an essential distortion, although with mixed feelings. Mechanisms: The wide nature of the shocks to both the demand and the supply side.
The second is that this convergence has been, for the most part, good convergence, i.e. the creation of a generally accepted conceptual and analytical structure, a core to which additional distortions can be added, allowing for discussions and integration of new ideas and evidence, rather than fights about basic methodology. Not everything is right however, with too much emphasis on general equilibrium implications from the start, rather than, first, on partial equilibrium analysis of the phenomenon at hand. 

The appendix to the paper gives a sample of the views of the members of the survey on each of these arguments.
papers.zh_title: 趋同？关于过去40年主流宏观经济学演变的思考
papers.zh_abstract: 今年是NBER宏观年度会议创办40周年（始于1986年）。本文回顾了自那时起主流宏观经济学的演变。本文阐述了我的观点，这些观点基于对多位为该领域做出重要贡献的研究人员的调查。我提出了两个主要论点。第一个论点是，从截然不同的立场出发，在方法论、架构和主要机制方面已出现实质性趋同。方法论：明确的微观基础，对扭曲的明确处理，同时更愿意偏离理性预期、新古典效用和利润最大化。架构：广泛接受名义刚性作为一种基本扭曲，尽管态度复杂。机制：需求侧和供给侧冲击的广泛性质。第二个论点是，这种趋同在很大程度上是良好的趋同，即建立了一个普遍接受的概念和分析结构，一个可以添加额外扭曲的核心，允许讨论和整合新思想与证据，而非围绕基本方法论的争论。然而，并非一切皆正确，从一开始就过度强调一般均衡含义，而非首先对当前现象进行局部均衡分析。论文附录给出了调查成员对每个论点看法的样本。

papers.title: Political Control Over Redistricting and the Partisan Balance in Congress
papers.authors: Kenneth Coriale, Daniel A. Kolliner, Ethan Kaplan
papers.abstract: We estimate the impact of a political party's ability to unilaterally redistrict Congressional seats upon partisan seat share allocations in the U.S. House of Representatives. Controlling for stateXdecade and year effects, we find an 8.2 percentage point increase in the Republican House seat share in the three elections following Republican control over redistricting in the 2000 and 2010 redistricting cycles. We only find significant effects for Democrats in large states. Effects are one half of the average seat gap between the parties in the 2010s. Differences across parties reflect more denied trifectas due to an opposite party governor in Democratic states and greater impacts for Republicans in small states. Differences do not reflect a rise in racial gerrymandering.
papers.zh_title: 选区重划的政治控制与国会党派平衡
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个政党单方面重划国会选区的能力对美国众议院党派席位分配的影响。在控制州×十年和年份效应后，我们发现，在2000年和2010年重划周期中，共和党控制选区重划后的三次选举中，共和党在众议院的席位比例增加了8.2个百分点。我们仅在大型州发现对民主党有显著影响。这些影响是2010年代两党平均席位差距的一半。两党间的差异反映了民主党州因反对党州长而更多被否决的“三连胜”局面，以及共和党在小型州更大的影响。这些差异并不反映种族选区划分的加剧。

papers.title: College Course Shutouts
papers.authors: Kevin J. Mumford, Richard W. Patterson, Anthony Yim
papers.abstract: What happens when college students cannot enroll in the courses they want? Using conditional random assignment to oversubscribed courses at a large public university, we find that a course shutout reduces the probability that a student ever takes any course in the corresponding subject by 30%. Course shutouts are particularly disruptive for female students, reducing women's cumulative GPAs, probability of majoring in STEM, on-time graduation, and early-career earnings. In contrast, shutouts do not appear to be disruptive to male students' long-run outcomes, with one exception—shutouts significantly increase the probability that men choose a major from the business school.
papers.zh_title: 大学课程选课受阻
papers.zh_abstract: 当大学生无法注册他们想要的课程时会发生什么？利用一所大型公立大学超额订阅课程的条件随机分配，我们发现，课程选课受阻使学生修读相应学科任何课程的概率降低30%。课程选课受阻对女学生的干扰尤其严重，降低了女性的累积平均绩点、主修STEM专业的概率、按时毕业率以及早期职业收入。相比之下，选课受阻似乎对男学生的长期结果没有破坏性影响，但有一个例外——选课受阻显著增加了男性选择商学院专业的概率。

papers.title: Firms’ Inflation and Wage Expectations During the Inflation Surge
papers.authors: Erwan Gautier, Frédérique Savignac, Olivier Coibion
papers.abstract: Using a new survey of French firms spanning the full 2020–2025 inflation cycle, we document that de-anchoring and passthrough decoupled during the inflation surge: the firms whose expectations drifted furthest from target were precisely those that did not act on them, while firms that embedded expectations into wages and prices remained relatively well anchored. A growing tail of firms expected persistently high inflation — “inflation disasters” — but these were disproportionately smaller, less attentive firms extrapolating local cost pressures. As a result, the surge in expectations did not generate wage-price dynamics, limiting the scope for a self-sustaining inflation spiral.
papers.zh_title: 通胀飙升期间企业的通胀与工资预期
papers.zh_abstract: 利用一项覆盖2020-2025年完整通胀周期的新法国企业调查，我们记录了在通胀飙升期间，预期脱锚与传导效应出现脱钩：那些预期偏离目标最远的企业恰恰是那些未据此采取行动的企业，而将预期纳入工资和价格的企业则保持了相对良好的锚定。越来越多的企业预期通胀将持续高企——即“通胀灾难”——但这些企业不成比例地是规模较小、关注度较低的企业，它们只是外推了本地成本压力。因此，预期的飙升并未引发工资-价格动态，限制了自我维持通胀螺旋的可能性。

papers.title: The Long-Run and Intergenerational Effects of Conditional Cash Transfers: Evidence from Chile’s Indigenous Grants
papers.authors: Adrienne M. Lucas, Patrick J. McEwan, David Torres Irribarra
papers.abstract: Since 1991, Chile has provided renewable cash transfers to indigenous children enrolled in school. We estimate intent-to-treat effects of expected grant exposure on the recipient generation and their children, exploiting cohort variation in exposure and comparisons to never-treated adults. Fixed effects absorb attributes shared by those born in the same year and community. Cohorts with the greatest exposure had 20 percent higher earnings, and higher labor supply, schooling attainment, and learning per year of school. Maternal exposure improved children’s test scores and grades, and reduced household receipt of indigenous grants and means-tested transfers.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED；JEL：I24, I28, I38, O10, O15
papers.zh_title: 有条件现金转移的长期与代际效应：来自智利土著补助金的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 自1991年以来，智利向在校就读的土著儿童提供可续期的现金转移。我们估计了预期补助金暴露对受助一代及其子女的意向性治疗效应，利用了暴露程度的队列差异以及与从未接受治疗的成年人的比较。固定效应吸收了同年出生和同一社区人群共有的属性。暴露程度最高的队列收入高出20%，并且劳动供给、教育成就和每年学习成果更高。母亲的暴露改善了子女的考试成绩和年级水平，并减少了家庭对土著补助金和基于经济状况调查的转移支付的领取。

papers.title: Changes in the College Mobility Pipeline Since 1900
papers.authors: Zachary Bleemer, Sarah Quincy
papers.abstract: Going to college has consistently conferred a large wage premium. We show that the relative premium received by lower-income Americans has halved since 1960. We decompose this steady rise in ‘collegiate regressivity’ using dozens of survey and administrative datasets documenting 1900–2020 wage premiums and the composition and value-added of collegiate institutions and majors. Three factors explain 80 percent of collegiate regressivity’s growth. First, the teaching-oriented public universities where lower-income students are concentrated have relatively declined in funding, retention, and economic value since 1960. Second, lower-income students have been disproportionately diverted into community and for-profit colleges since 1980 and 1990, respectively. Third, higher-income students’ falling humanities enrollment and rising computer science enrollment since 2000 have increased their degrees’ value. Selection into college-going and across four-year universities are second-order. College-going provided equitable returns before 1960, but collegiate regressivity now curtails higher education’s potential to reduce inequality and mediates 25 percent of intergenerational income transmission.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I23, I26, J62, N32
papers.zh_title: 自1900年以来大学流动性管道的变化
papers.zh_abstract: 上大学一直带来巨大的工资溢价。我们表明，自1960年以来，低收入美国人获得的相对溢价已减半。我们利用数十个调查和行政数据集（记录了1900-2020年的工资溢价以及大学机构和专业的构成与附加值）分解了这一“大学回归性”的稳步上升。三个因素解释了大学回归性增长的80%。首先，低收入学生集中的教学型公立大学自1960年以来在资金、保留率和经济价值方面相对下降。其次，低收入学生自1980年和1990年以来分别被不成比例地分流到社区学院和营利性大学。第三，自2000年以来，高收入学生人文学科入学率下降和计算机科学入学率上升增加了其学位的价值。进入大学和进入四年制大学的选择是次要因素。上大学在1960年之前提供了公平的回报，但如今大学回归性削弱了高等教育减少不平等的潜力，并介导了25%的代际收入传递。

papers.title: Firm Quality Dynamics and the Slippery Slope of Credit Intervention
papers.authors: Wenhao Li, Ye Li
papers.abstract: A salient trend in crisis intervention has emerged in recent decades: Government and central banks offered funding directly to nonfinancial firms, bypassing banks and other credit intermediaries. We analyze the long-term consequences of such policies by focusing on firm quality dynamics. In a laissez-faire economy, firms with high productivity are more likely to survive crises than those with low productivity. The government funding support saves more firms but cannot be customized based on firm productivity, dampening the cleansing effect of crises. The policy distortion is self-perpetuating: A downward bias in firm quality distribution necessitates interventions of greater scale in future crises. Our mechanism is quantitatively important: we show that if policy makers ignore such distortionary effects on firm quality dynamics, the resultant credit intervention would almost double the optimal amount.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG；JEL：E50, E60, G01, G18
papers.zh_title: 企业质量动态与信贷干预的滑坡效应
papers.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，危机干预中出现了一个显著趋势：政府和央行绕过银行及其他信贷中介，直接向非金融企业提供资金。我们通过聚焦企业质量动态来分析此类政策的长期后果。在自由放任经济中，高生产率企业比低生产率企业更有可能在危机中存活。政府资金支持拯救了更多企业，但无法根据企业生产率进行定制化调整，从而削弱了危机的净化效应。这种政策扭曲具有自我延续性：企业质量分布的下行偏差要求未来危机中实施更大规模的干预。我们的机制在数量上具有重要意义：我们表明，如果政策制定者忽视这种对企业质量动态的扭曲效应，由此产生的信贷干预规模将几乎是最优水平的两倍。

papers.title: What Economists Should Know about the 340B Drug Discounting Program
papers.authors: Charles J. Courtemanche, Joseph Garuccio
papers.abstract: The 340B Drug Pricing Program was instituted to bolster the non-profit health care safety net without relying on taxpayer money. It allows participating health care facilities, called covered entities, to purchase drugs filled at in-house or contracted external pharmacies at discounts from manufacturers. Covered entities, most of which are hospitals, argue that discounts from the program are critical to their ability to provide charity care and unprofitable lines of service. At the same time, with 340B purchases now comprising over 13% of prescription drug sales, drug manufacturers argue that the program has grown beyond its original intent and led to important revenue losses. These manufacturers have responded to the rapid growth in the network of contract pharmacies by enacting restrictions on distribution that in turn led to a flurry of lawsuits and legislative activity. Given the 340B program’s size, importance, and role in ongoing policy debates, it is perhaps surprising that it has received very little attention in economics journals. Our paper reviews the scholarly literature on the 340B program, which lies almost completely in public health and medical journals, with an eye for the gaps in this literature that economics research can help fill. In particular, economists’ causal inference econometric toolkit and theoretical understanding of the role of government intervention can help improve our understanding of 340B’s impacts and lead to more informed policy decisions.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：I11, I18, L25, L51
papers.zh_title: 经济学家应了解的340B药品折扣计划
papers.zh_abstract: 340B药品定价计划旨在不依赖纳税人资金的情况下加强非营利医疗安全网。该计划允许参与医疗机构（称为覆盖实体）以折扣价从制造商处购买药品，这些药品可在内部药房或签约的外部药房配发。覆盖实体（其中大部分是医院）认为，该计划的折扣对其提供慈善护理和无利可图的服务项目至关重要。与此同时，由于340B采购目前占处方药销售额的13%以上，药品制造商认为该计划已超出其最初意图，并导致重大收入损失。这些制造商针对合同药房网络的快速增长，对分销实施了限制，这反过来又引发了一系列诉讼和立法活动。鉴于340B计划的规模、重要性以及在当前政策辩论中的作用，令人惊讶的是，它在经济学期刊上受到的关注非常少。我们的论文回顾了关于340B计划的学术文献，这些文献几乎完全发表在公共卫生和医学期刊上，并着眼于这些文献中经济学研究可以帮助填补的空白。特别是，经济学家的因果推断计量经济学工具包以及对政府干预作用的理论理解，有助于提高我们对340B影响的理解，并促成更明智的政策决策。

papers.title: Adjusters and Casualties: The Anatomy of Labor Market Displacement
papers.authors: Eric A. Hanushek, Simon Janssen, Jacob D. Light, Lisa K. Simon
papers.abstract: We analyze the full distribution of displaced workers’ earnings losses using a new method that combines matching and synthetic control group approaches at the individual level. We find that the distribution of earnings losses is highly skewed. Average losses, as estimated by conventional event studies, are driven by a small number of workers who suffer catastrophic losses, while most recover quickly. Observable worker characteristics explain only a small fraction of the variance in earnings losses. Instead, we find substantial heterogeneity in earnings losses even among workers displaced by the same firm who have identical observed characteristics such as education, age, and gender. Workers with minimal earnings losses adjust quickly by switching industries, occupations, and especially regions, while comparable workers with catastrophic losses adjust slowly, even though they are forced to make comparable numbers of switches in the long run.
papers.zh_title: 调整者与受害者：劳动力市场失业的剖析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们采用一种新方法，在个体层面结合匹配和合成控制组方法，分析了失业工人收入损失的全部分布。我们发现，收入损失的分布高度偏斜。传统事件研究估计的平均损失，是由少数遭受灾难性损失的工人驱动的，而大多数工人则迅速恢复。可观测的工人特征仅能解释收入损失方差的一小部分。相反，我们发现，即使是被同一家企业解雇、且具有相同可观测特征（如教育、年龄和性别）的工人之间，收入损失也存在显著的异质性。收入损失最小的工人通过转换行业、职业，尤其是地区来迅速调整，而遭受灾难性损失的可比工人则调整缓慢，尽管从长期来看，他们被迫进行同等数量的转换。

papers.title: The Geography of Opportunity after the Civil War: Black and White Americans’ Intra- and Intergenerational Mobility into Property Ownership
papers.authors: William J. Collins, Nicholas C. Holtkamp
papers.abstract: This paper sheds new light on historical black-white disparities in wealth and economic mobility by examining datasets of linked census records. First, we compare black and white men’s intra- and intergenerational mobility into property ownership between 1870, the first census taken after the Civil War, and 1900. Conditional on not owning property in 1870, black men’s mobility rate into property ownership was far lower than white men’s. If black men’s post-1870 mobility had mirrored that of landless white men, the black-white home ownership gap in 1900 would have been small. Second, we show that for black men located in cotton-intensive counties in 1870, the likelihood of owning property in 1900 was far lower than for black men located elsewhere. This is salient in national samples as well as in samples restricted to the states of the former Confederacy, with and without extensive controls. The pattern is connected to the prevalence of sharecropping and relatively high black population shares. For white men, the difference in upward mobility between cotton-intensive and other areas was much smaller. Many black households acquired land and homes of their own in this era, an important channel for economic advance, but their geographic concentration in areas with fewer opportunities to acquire property implied low aggregate rates of upward mobility.
papers.zh_title: 内战后机遇的地理分布：黑人与白人美国人在财产所有权上的代内与代际流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过分析关联的人口普查记录数据集，为历史上黑人与白人在财富和经济流动性上的差距提供了新的视角。首先，我们比较了1870年（内战后首次人口普查）至1900年间黑人与白人男性在财产所有权上的代内与代际流动性。在1870年未拥有财产的条件下，黑人男性进入财产所有权的流动率远低于白人男性。如果黑人男性在1870年后的流动性能与无土地的白人男性相当，那么1900年的黑白住房拥有率差距将会很小。其次，我们发现，对于1870年位于棉花密集型县的黑人男性，其在1900年拥有财产的可能性远低于位于其他地区的黑人男性。这一现象在全国样本以及仅限于前邦联各州的样本中均显著存在，无论是否加入大量控制变量。这种模式与分成制佃农的盛行以及相对较高的黑人人口比例有关。对于白人男性而言，棉花密集型地区与其他地区之间向上流动性的差异要小得多。在这一时期，许多黑人家庭获得了自己的土地和房屋，这是经济进步的重要渠道，但他们在地理上集中于财产获取机会较少的地区，导致了总体向上流动率较低。

papers.title: Decoupling Taste-Based versus Statistical Discrimination in Elections
papers.authors: Amanda de Albuquerque, Frederico Finan, Anubhav Jha, Laura Karpuska, Francesco Trebbi
papers.abstract: We present a methodology for decoupling taste-based versus statistical discrimination in political behavior. We combine a flexible empirical model of voting, featuring vertical and horizontal candidate differentiation in gender, ability, and policy positions, with a large-scale micro-targeted electoral experiment aimed at increasing female candidate vote shares. Our structural econometric approach allows to separately identify preference parameters driving taste-based discrimination and beliefs parameters driving statistical discrimination through expectations about ability and policy positions of female politicians. Our application to Brazilian municipal elections uncovers substantial levels of taste-based and statistical discrimination. Counterfactual political campaigns show promise in reducing both.
papers.zh_title: 在选举中分离基于偏好的歧视与统计性歧视
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种在政治行为中分离基于偏好的歧视与统计性歧视的方法。我们将一个灵活的投票实证模型（该模型在性别、能力及政策立场上包含纵向和横向的候选人差异化）与一项旨在提高女性候选人得票率的大规模微观定向选举实验相结合。我们的结构计量经济学方法能够分别识别驱动基于偏好的歧视的偏好参数，以及通过关于女性政治家能力和政策立场的预期来驱动统计性歧视的信念参数。我们将该方法应用于巴西市政选举，发现了显著的基于偏好的歧视和统计性歧视。反事实的政治竞选活动在减少这两种歧视方面显示出潜力。

papers.title: Inflation, Expectations and Monetary Policy: What Have We Learned and to What End?
papers.authors: Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko
papers.abstract: We review recent research and experiences linking inflation and expectations, emphasizing what has been learned since 2020. One clear lesson is that the inflation expectations of most economic agents have been and remain unanchored. The unanchored nature of inflation expectations, in combination with supply shocks, can explain much of the inflation surge and subsequent disinflation when viewed through the lens of an expectations-augmented Phillips curve, both in the U.S. and abroad. New policy frameworks are unlikely to address this feature of expectations. Only a communication strategy that breaks what we refer to as the “cycle of selective inattention” is likely to be successful, but it is probably already too late to stop the next inflation surge.
papers.zh_title: 通胀、预期与货币政策：我们学到了什么，目标何在？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了近期关于通胀与预期之间联系的研究与经验，重点强调了自2020年以来的发现。一个明确的教训是，大多数经济主体的通胀预期过去是、现在仍然是脱锚的。通胀预期的脱锚性质，结合供给冲击，可以通过预期增强型菲利普斯曲线的视角解释美国及海外通胀飙升及随后的反通胀过程的大部分。新的政策框架不太可能解决预期的这一特征。只有一种打破我们称之为“选择性忽视循环”的沟通策略才有可能成功，但可能已经为时已晚，无法阻止下一次通胀飙升。

papers.title: Recovering from COVID
papers.authors: James H. Stock, Mark W. Watson
papers.abstract: The COVID business cycle was unique. The recession was by far the deepest and shortest in the U.S. postwar record and the recovery was remarkably rapid. The cycle saw an unprecedented reallocation of employment and consumption away from in-person services towards goods that can be consumed at home and outdoors. This paper provides a simple empirical model that attributes these and other anomalies in real economic activity to a single unobserved shock. That shock is closely connected to COVID deaths, and diminishes in importance over the expansion, consistent with self-protective measures like masking, COVID fatigue, and eventually the availability of the vaccine. The COVID shock and anomalous COVID dynamics largely disappeared by late 2022. It appears that macrodynamics have returned to normal and that the structural shifts wrought by the pandemic have had limited effects on the underlying economic trends of key indicators, despite notable changes like the prevalence of remote work. The greatest macroeconomic legacy of the COVID business cycle has been on the national debt.
papers.zh_title: 从新冠疫情中复苏
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠商业周期是独一无二的。此次衰退是美国战后记录中最深且最短的，复苏也异常迅速。该周期见证了就业和消费从面对面服务向可在家庭和户外消费的商品前所未有的重新配置。本文提供了一个简单的实证模型，将实际经济活动中的这些及其他异常现象归因于一个单一未观测到的冲击。该冲击与新冠死亡人数密切相关，并在经济扩张过程中重要性逐渐减弱，这与戴口罩等自我保护措施、新冠疲劳以及最终疫苗的可用性相一致。新冠冲击和异常的新冠动态在2022年底基本消失。宏观动态似乎已恢复正常，尽管出现了远程工作普及等显著变化，但疫情造成的结构性转变对关键指标的潜在经济趋势影响有限。新冠商业周期最大的宏观经济遗产体现在国家债务上。

papers.title: Real-world Effectiveness of the Influenza Vaccine in Young Children
papers.authors: Michael L. Anderson, Carlos Dobkin, Devon Gorry, Hung-Fu Tseng
papers.abstract: Influenza causes substantial illness and healthcare utilization among children. Randomized clinical trials (RCTs) demonstrate that the influenza vaccine reduces influenza illness detectable via active surveillance, but RCTs typically have insufficient samples to examine economically meaningful outcomes such as healthcare provider visits. In this study we document that children aged two through five whose well-child visits occur when the seasonal influenza vaccine is broadly available are 23.4 percentage points more likely to be vaccinated than those whose visits do not. Using large administrative healthcare datasets, we leverage this variation in vaccination rates to show that the influenza vaccine reduces outpatient and emergency department visits significantly. The results imply that making pediatric influenza vaccinations more convenient could substantially increase vaccination rates and reduce healthcare expenditures.
papers.zh_title: 流感疫苗在幼儿中的真实世界有效性
papers.zh_abstract: 流感导致儿童出现大量疾病和医疗资源使用。随机临床试验表明，流感疫苗可减少通过主动监测发现的流感疾病，但临床试验通常样本量不足，无法检验具有经济意义的结果，如医疗服务提供者就诊。在本研究中，我们记录了年龄在2至5岁之间的儿童，如果其健康儿童就诊时间恰逢季节性流感疫苗广泛可用的时期，其接种疫苗的可能性比就诊时间不在该时期的儿童高出23.4个百分点。利用大型行政医疗数据集，我们利用疫苗接种率的这种变化来证明流感疫苗能显著减少门诊和急诊就诊。结果表明，提高儿童流感疫苗接种的便利性可以大幅提高接种率并减少医疗支出。

papers.title: The Structural Transformation of Innovation
papers.authors: Diego A. Comin, Danial Lashkari, Martí Mestieri
papers.abstract: We document the structural transformation of innovation using historical patent data since the 1850s, along with R&D expenditure and TFP growth for the post-war period. Over time, innovation has shifted from agricultural sectors to manufacturing, and, more recently, to services. We develop and quantify a multi-sector semi-endogenous growth model of structural change in innovation and production, incorporating the classical demand-pull and technology-push drivers of innovation. Sectors differ in their innovation technologies, and the extent to which they benefit from knowledge spillovers (technology-push). Nonhomothetic demand shifts the market shares toward income-elastic sectors along the growth process (demand-pull). A calibrated version of our model replicates the structural transformations of innovation and production observed in the US data. Using the model, we evaluate the future impact of Baumol’s disease on aggregate productivity and find it to be minimal. Our results suggest that aggregate productivity growth may recover in the coming decades as the service sector becomes increasingly innovation-driven.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, PR；JEL：E02, O1, O4, O5
papers.zh_title: 创新的结构性转型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用自1850年代以来的历史专利数据，以及战后时期的研发支出和全要素生产率增长，记录了创新的结构性转型。随着时间的推移，创新已从农业部门转向制造业，并在近期转向服务业。我们开发并量化了一个包含创新和生产结构性变化的多部门半内生增长模型，该模型融合了经典的创新需求拉动和技术推动驱动因素。各部门在创新技术以及从知识溢出（技术推动）中获益的程度上存在差异。非位似需求在增长过程中将市场份额转向收入弹性高的部门（需求拉动）。我们模型的校准版本复制了美国数据中观察到的创新和生产的结构性转型。利用该模型，我们评估了鲍莫尔病对未来生产率的潜在影响，发现其影响微乎其微。我们的结果表明，随着服务业日益成为创新驱动，未来几十年全要素生产率增长可能会恢复。

papers.title: Internal Migration and the Spatial Reorganization of Agriculture
papers.authors: Raahil Madhok, Frederik Noack, Ahmed Mushfiq Mobarak, Olivier Deschenes
papers.abstract: This paper studies how agricultural production responds to the loss of agricultural labor during the process of urbanization and structural transformation. Using household microdata from India and exogenous variation in migration opportunities induced by urban income shocks, we show that agricultural households do not systematically replace lost labor with increased capital. Instead, they cultivate less land and lower their use of agricultural technology, reducing crop production. Resulting changes in land and crop prices induce non-migrant households to expand agricultural investments and production. In aggregate, market adaptation mitigates over three-fourths of the direct agricultural losses from urbanization. Spatial reorganization moves food production from land near urban areas toward more remote areas with lower emigration.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE；JEL：J43, O13, O15, Q15, R11
papers.zh_title: 内部迁移与农业的空间重组
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在城市化与结构性转型过程中，农业生产如何应对农业劳动力的流失。利用印度家庭微观数据以及由城市收入冲击引发的迁移机会的外生变化，我们表明农业家庭并未系统地用增加的资本来替代流失的劳动力。相反，他们耕种更少的土地，降低农业技术的使用，从而减少了作物产量。由此导致的土地和作物价格变化促使非迁移家庭扩大农业投资和生产。总体而言，市场适应缓解了城市化对农业造成的直接损失的四分之三以上。空间重组将粮食生产从靠近城市地区的土地转移到移民迁出率更高的更偏远地区。

papers.title: Local Monetary Policy
papers.authors: Vyacheslav Fos, Tommaso Tamburelli, Nancy R. Xu
papers.abstract: When Federal Reserve districts experience high inflation or low unemployment but lack voting rights to influence FOMC decisions, credit extended to commercial banks through the Discount Window (DW) declines. Our identification strategy is based on the exogenous rotation of voting rights among Reserve Banks and on within borrower-time and district-time variation in DW loans and Federal Home Loan Bank (FHLB) loans, implying that factors related to changes in macroeconomic conditions, local credit demand, or borrower characteristics do not drive the results. The effect on bank funding sources translates into changes in the composition of loans extended by commercial banks.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, ME, POL；JEL：D7, E5, E51, E58
papers.zh_title: 地方性货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 当联邦储备区经历高通胀或低失业率但缺乏影响联邦公开市场委员会决策的投票权时，通过贴现窗口向商业银行提供的信贷会减少。我们的识别策略基于储备银行投票权的外生轮换，以及借款方-时间层面和地区-时间层面在贴现窗口贷款与联邦住房贷款银行贷款上的差异，这意味着与宏观经济状况变化、当地信贷需求或借款方特征相关的因素并非驱动结果的原因。对银行资金来源的影响转化为商业银行发放贷款构成的变化。

papers.title: How Damaging is Shouting "Fire" in a Crowded Theatre?
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: The canonical example of unprotected speech—falsely shouting “fire” in a crowded theatre—presumes such an act inevitably causes harmful panic. This paper challenges that presumption through a game-theoretic analysis of evacuation dynamics. I model a theatre as an N × M grid where rational patrons navigate spatial constraints while evacuating. Strategic conflicts arise only when patrons are equidistant from exits, creating localized “clash games” that admit multiple equilibria, including numerous pure-strategy equilibria that achieve zero-collision evacuations. Using global games methodology, I show that strategic uncertainty uniquely selects an equilibrium, where those entering from rows have precedence over those already in aisles. However, introducing a panic mechanism based on accumulated waiting time reveals a tension: the strategically optimal East-priority equilibrium proves most vulnerable to behavioral breakdown, while the alternating equilibrium exhibits superior robustness to panic. These findings suggest that whether false alarms cause harmful disorder depends critically on the interaction between spatial geometry, strategic behavior, and psychological limits—not merely on the alarm itself.
papers.zh_title: 在拥挤的剧院里喊“着火了”会造成多大损害？
papers.zh_abstract: 不受保护的言论的典型例子——在拥挤的剧院里虚假地喊“着火了”——假定这种行为不可避免地会导致有害的恐慌。本文通过博弈论分析疏散动态来挑战这一假定。我将剧院建模为一个N×M的网格，其中理性的顾客在疏散时需应对空间限制。只有当顾客与出口距离相等时，才会出现战略冲突，从而产生局部化的“冲突博弈”，这类博弈允许多重均衡，包括许多实现零碰撞疏散的纯策略均衡。利用全局博弈方法，我表明战略不确定性唯一地选择了一个均衡，在该均衡中，从排内进入的顾客优先于已在过道中的顾客。然而，引入基于累积等待时间的恐慌机制揭示了一种张力：战略上最优的“东侧优先”均衡在行为崩溃方面最为脆弱，而交替均衡则表现出对恐慌的卓越稳健性。这些发现表明，虚假警报是否会导致有害的混乱，关键取决于空间几何、战略行为和心理极限之间的相互作用，而不仅仅是警报本身。

papers.title: Remote Work, Employee Mix, and Performance
papers.authors: Cevat Giray Aksoy, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Victoria Marino, Cem Ozguzel
papers.abstract: We study the shift to fully remote work at a large call center in Turkey, highlighting three findings. First, fully remote work increased the share of women, including married women, rural and smaller-town residents. By accessing groups with traditionally lower labor-force participation the firm was able to increase its share of graduate employees by 14% without raising wages. Second, workforce productivity rose by 10%, reflecting shorter call durations for remote employees. This was facilitated by a quieter home working environment, avoiding the background noise in the office. Third, fully remote employees with initial in-person training saw higher long-run remote productivity and lower attrition rates. This underscores the advantages of initial in-person onboarding for fully remote employees.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EFG, IO, LS, PE, PR；JEL：J0
papers.zh_title: 远程工作、员工构成与绩效
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了土耳其一家大型呼叫中心向完全远程工作的转变，突出了三个发现。首先，完全远程工作提高了女性（包括已婚女性）、农村和小城镇居民的比例。通过接触传统上劳动参与率较低的群体，该公司能够在未提高工资的情况下，将其毕业生员工比例提高14%。其次，员工生产率提高了10%，这反映了远程员工通话时长的缩短。这得益于更安静的家庭工作环境，避免了办公室的背景噪音。第三，接受过初始面对面培训的完全远程员工，其长期远程生产率更高，离职率也更低。这凸显了为完全远程员工提供初始面对面入职培训的优势。

papers.title: The Old Keynesian Model
papers.authors: Robert J. Barro
papers.abstract: Articles from the 1970s applied a general-disequilibrium framework to the determination of output and employment with sticky nominal prices and wages. Quantities are determined on the short sides of the goods and labor market and involve non-price rationing. With general excess supply, where prices and wages are “too high,” output and employment are determined by the Keynesian demand multiplier, based on the marginal propensity to consume. In the case of general excess demand, where prices and wages are “too low,” output and employment are determined by a supplier multiplier, based on the marginal propensity to work. In these two cases, output and employment are independent of the real wage. However, starting from general market clearing, deviations from the general-market-clearing real wage in either direction reduce output and employment. The New Keynesian Model, which also relies on sticky prices, amounts to an extension of the general-excess-supply case of the Old Keynesian Model. The New Keynesian Model assumes that quantities are always demand determined, but this assumption is tenable only under general excess supply. A promising alternative to the non-price rationing of quantities in the Old Keynesian Model is a setup with search-and-matching frictions in the markets for goods and labor.
papers.zh_title: 旧凯恩斯主义模型
papers.zh_abstract: 20世纪70年代的文章将一般非均衡框架应用于名义价格和工资粘性条件下的产出与就业决定。数量由商品市场和劳动力市场的短边决定，并涉及非价格配给。在价格和工资“过高”的一般超额供给情况下，产出和就业由基于边际消费倾向的凯恩斯需求乘数决定。在价格和工资“过低”的一般超额需求情况下，产出和就业由基于边际工作倾向的供给乘数决定。在这两种情况下，产出和就业与实际工资无关。然而，从一般市场出清出发，实际工资向任一方向偏离一般市场出清水平都会减少产出和就业。同样依赖价格粘性的新凯恩斯主义模型，相当于旧凯恩斯主义模型一般超额供给情况的扩展。新凯恩斯主义模型假设数量总是由需求决定，但这一假设仅在一般超额供给下才成立。旧凯恩斯主义模型中数量非价格配给的一个有前景的替代方案，是在商品和劳动力市场中引入搜索与匹配摩擦的设定。

papers.title: Spillovers from Public Health Policies in Schools: Evidence from COVID Mask Mandates
papers.authors: Matthew A. Guzman, Scott A. Imberman, Neil R. Filosa, Tara Kilbride, Nat Malkus
papers.abstract: Schools have long played a frontline role in efforts to contain infectious diseases and prevent spread to the wider community. These include vaccination requirements, school closures during periods of high illness, and the implementation of non-pharmaceutical interventions (NPI) during outbreaks. In this paper we investigate the impact of mask mandates in schools on COVID spread. We use event study and difference-in-differences models that exploit the removal of mask mandates in districts serving 50% of public school students in the U.S. surrounding the revocation of CDC guidance recommending school masking in February and early March of 2022. We estimate that going from 0% to 100% mandated masking in a county reduces COVID deaths by 0.57 per 100k people. We further estimate that the removal of mandates during this time contributed to 21800 COVID deaths through the rest of 2022, 9% of the U.S. total that year. Due to the fact that COVID deaths among students and, to a lesser extent, school staff were rare in the U.S. given school age profiles, we argue that the bulk of these deaths were from spillovers to residents in the wider community.
papers.zh_title: 学校公共卫生政策的溢出效应：来自新冠口罩强制令的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 长期以来，学校在遏制传染病并防止其向更广泛社区传播的努力中一直扮演着前线角色。这包括疫苗接种要求、疾病高发期的学校关闭，以及疫情期间非药物干预措施的实施。在本文中，我们研究了学校口罩强制令对新冠传播的影响。我们利用事件研究和双重差分模型，这些模型利用了2022年2月和3月初美国疾病控制与预防中心撤销建议学校佩戴口罩的指南前后，覆盖美国50%公立学校学生的学区取消口罩强制令的情况。我们估计，在一个县内，口罩强制令覆盖率从0%增加到100%，可使每10万人中的新冠死亡人数减少0.57人。我们进一步估计，在此期间取消口罩强制令，导致2022年剩余时间内新增21800例新冠死亡病例，占当年美国新冠死亡总数的9%。由于在美国，考虑到学生（以及在较小程度上学校教职工）的年龄分布，新冠死亡病例本就罕见，我们认为这些死亡中的大部分是由于对更广泛社区居民的溢出效应所致。

papers.title: Bidding for Talent: A Test of Conduct in a High-Wage Labor Market
papers.authors: Nina Roussille, Benjamin Scuderi
papers.abstract: We develop a procedure for adjudicating between models of firm wage-setting conduct. Using data from a U.S. job search platform, we propose a methodology to aggregate workers’ choices over menus of jobs into rankings of firms’ non-wage amenities. We use these estimates to formulate a test of conduct based on exclusion restrictions. Oligopsonistic models incorporating strategic interactions between firms and tailoring of wage offers to workers’ outside options are rejected in favor of monopsonistic models featuring near-uniform markdowns. Misspecification has meaningful consequences: our preferred model predicts average markdowns of 19.5%, while others predict average markdowns as large as 26.6%.
papers.zh_title: 人才竞标：高工资劳动力市场行为检验
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一套程序，用于裁定企业工资设定行为的不同模型。利用来自美国一个求职平台的数据，我们提出了一种方法，将工人对工作菜单的选择汇总为对企业非工资福利的排名。我们利用这些估计值，基于排他性约束构建了一个行为检验。包含企业间战略互动以及根据工人外部选择定制工资报价的寡头垄断模型被拒绝，而支持具有近乎统一加价率的买方垄断模型。模型误设具有重要后果：我们偏好的模型预测平均加价率为19.5%，而其他模型预测的平均加价率高达26.6%。

papers.title: Measuring Self-Reported Well-Being
papers.authors: Ori Heffetz, Yehonatan Caspi
papers.abstract: What should researchers consider when designing experiments that (also) collect self-reported well-being (SWB) data? Focusing on experiments in economics, we examine the motivation behind SWB-data collection, survey leading past examples, and highlight potential pitfalls and their proposed countermeasures.\nWe offer three main messages and a call to action. First, SWB measures should be handled with caution, especially in experiments. Second, despite their limitations, SWB measures can be used cleverly in the lab to provide evidence on questions that choice data alone cannot answer. Third, when collected, analyzed, and interpreted with appropriate caution, SWB measures can be important policy-evaluation outcomes, complementing the inherently incomplete picture provided by more traditional outcomes.\nWe call on researchers to carefully and thoughtfully collect (a variety of) SWB measures in their online, lab, and field experiments. Such a joint, decentralized effort would also mean that over time, SWB data get explored, accumulated, and, hopefully, better understood.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, DEV, EH；JEL：C83, C90, D90, I31
papers.zh_title: 测量自我报告的幸福感
papers.zh_abstract: 研究人员在设计（也）收集自我报告幸福感数据的实验时，应考虑哪些因素？聚焦于经济学实验，我们审视了收集自我报告幸福感数据的动机，调查了以往的主要例子，并强调了潜在的陷阱及其提出的应对措施。我们提供三个主要信息和一个行动呼吁。首先，自我报告幸福感指标应谨慎对待，尤其是在实验中。其次，尽管存在局限性，自我报告幸福感指标可以在实验室中被巧妙地用于提供仅凭选择数据无法回答的问题的证据。第三，当以适当的谨慎态度收集、分析和解释时，自我报告幸福感指标可以成为重要的政策评估结果，补充传统结果所固有的不完整图景。我们呼吁研究人员在其在线、实验室和实地实验中，仔细且深思熟虑地收集（多种）自我报告幸福感指标。这种联合的、分散的努力也意味着，随着时间的推移，自我报告幸福感数据将得到探索、积累，并有望得到更好的理解。

papers.title: What Do People Want?
papers.authors: Daniel J. Benjamin, Kristen B. Cooper, Ori Heffetz, Miles S. Kimball, Tushar Kundu
papers.abstract: Philosophical perspectives on human desires and values vary; economic theory-driven measurement techniques can provide relevant empirical evidence. We elicited over half a million stated preference choices over 126 dimensions or “aspects” of well-being from a sample of 896 online respondents. We also elicited, via self-reported well-being (SWB) questions, respondents’ current levels of the aspects. From the stated preference data, we estimate for each aspect its relative marginal utility per point on our 0-100 response scale. We validate these estimates by comparing them to alternative methods for estimating preferences, and we offer a range of estimates between those that take self-reports at face value and those that (over-)correct for potential social-desirability reporting bias. Our findings suggest that our respondents value, first and foremost, three basic things: family, money, and health (not necessarily in this order). While commonly studied concepts—such as happiness, life satisfaction, life’s ranking on a ladder, and meaning—are all important, respondents place the highest marginal utilities on aspects related to family well-being and health, and financial freedom and security. We document substantial heterogeneity in preferences across respondents within—but not between—demographic groups, with aspects’ current levels predicting preferences for the aspects.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：D12, D90, I31
papers.zh_title: 人们想要什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们从亚马逊土耳其机器人平台上的3358名受访者样本中，收集了超过一百万条关于126个幸福感维度或“方面”的陈述性偏好选择。我们的调查还收集了关于受访者当前幸福感各方面水平的自我报告幸福感问题。根据陈述性偏好数据，我们估计了每个方面在我们0-100响应量表上每一点的相对对数边际效用。我们通过将这些估计值与估计偏好的替代方法进行比较来验证它们。我们的发现提供了实证证据，既补充又挑战了关于人类欲望和价值观的哲学观点。我们的结果支持亚里士多德关于通过家庭关系实现幸福（eudaimonia）的概念以及马斯洛对基本安全需求的强调，但也表明当代幸福感理论可能过度强调幸福和生活满意度等抽象概念，而低估了受访者赋予最高边际效用的具体方面，如家庭福祉、财务安全和健康。我们记录了受访者之间在人口群体内部（而非群体之间）偏好的显著异质性，当前的自我报告幸福感水平解释了这种变异的重要部分。

papers.title: Exchange Rates and Monetary Stabilization of Tariff Shocks
papers.authors: Paul Bergin, Giancarlo Corsetti
papers.abstract: Home currency appreciation can neutralize the relative price distortions created by a tariff, moderating the rise in home import prices. A combination of domestic and foreign monetary policy appropriately managing the exchange rate can thus improve the trade-off between the objectives of supporting domestic demand and containing inflation. Using a New Keynesian two-country model, we analyze the role of the exchange rate in the optimal stabilization of unilateral home tariff shocks hitting, respectively, differentiated sticky-price goods and non-differentiated flexible price goods. In response to a tariff on the former, the cooperative Ramsey optimal monetary policy prescribes home appreciation, implemented mainly through a robust foreign monetary expansion. The monetary response in the home (tariff-imposing) country may be expansionary or contractionary, depending on trade elasticities, but it tends to be modest. If tariffs instead are imposed on flexible-price goods (commodities), the Ramsey optimal monetary response is the opposite, calling for a robust home monetary expansion containing home currency appreciation.
papers.zh_title: 汇率与关税冲击的货币稳定化
papers.zh_abstract: 本币升值可以抵消关税造成的相对价格扭曲，从而减缓本国进口价格的上涨。因此，通过国内外货币政策适当组合来管理汇率，可以改善支持国内需求和遏制通胀这两个目标之间的权衡。利用新凯恩斯两国模型，我们分析了汇率在分别冲击差异化粘性价格商品和非差异化弹性价格商品的单边本国关税冲击的最优稳定化中的作用。作为对前者关税的回应，合作性的拉姆齐最优货币政策规定本币升值，主要通过强劲的外国货币扩张来实现。本国（征收关税的）国家的货币反应可能是扩张性的也可能是收缩性的，取决于贸易弹性，但往往较为温和。如果关税是针对弹性价格商品（大宗商品）征收的，则拉姆齐最优货币反应相反，要求强劲的本国货币扩张以遏制本币升值。

papers.title: The Effect of a Monthly Unconditional Cash Transfer on Children’s Development at Four Years of Age: A Randomized Controlled Trial in the U.S.
papers.authors: Kimberly Noble, Katherine Magnuson, Greg Duncan, Lisa A. Gennetian, Hirokazu Yoshikawa, Nathan A. Fox, Sarah Halpern-Meekin, Sonya Troller-Renfree, Sangdo Han, Shannon Egan-Dailey, Timothy D. Nelson, Jennifer Mize Nelson, Sarah Black, Michael Georgieff, Debra Karhson
papers.abstract: Developmental differences between children growing up in poverty and their higher-income peers are frequently reported. However, the extent to which such differences are caused by differences in family income is unclear. To study the causal role of income on children’s development, the Baby’s First Years randomized control trial provided families with monthly unconditional cash transfers. One thousand racially and ethnically diverse mothers with incomes below the U.S. federal poverty line were recruited from postpartum wards in 2018-19, and randomized to receive either $333/month or $20/month for the first several years of their children’s lives. After the first four years of the intervention (n=891), we find no statistically significant impacts of the cash transfers on four preregistered primary outcomes (language, executive function, social-emotional problems, and high-frequency brain activity) nor on three secondary outcomes (visual processing/spatial perception, pre-literacy, maternal reports of developmental diagnoses). Possible explanations for these results are discussed.
papers.zh_title: 每月无条件现金转移对四岁儿童发展的影响：美国一项随机对照试验
papers.zh_abstract: 贫困家庭儿童与高收入家庭儿童之间的发展差异经常被报道。然而，这种差异在多大程度上是由家庭收入差异造成的尚不清楚。为了研究收入对儿童发展的因果作用，“婴儿的第一年”随机对照试验为家庭提供了每月无条件现金转移。研究从2018-19年产后病房招募了1000名收入低于美国联邦贫困线的种族和民族多样化的母亲，并随机分配她们在孩子出生后的头几年每月获得333美元或20美元。在干预实施四年后（样本量n=891），我们发现现金转移对四个预先登记的主要结果（语言、执行功能、社会情感问题和高频脑活动）以及三个次要结果（视觉处理/空间感知、读写前技能、母亲报告的发育诊断）均无统计学显著影响。本文讨论了这些结果的可能解释。

papers.title: Meaning At Work
papers.authors: Nava Ashraf, Oriana Bandiera, Virginia Minni, Luigi Zingales
papers.abstract: We evaluate a firm’s unusual, worker-centered, solution to the agency problem: enabling employees to reduce the cost of effort rather than pushing them with performance rewards. We randomize the roll-out of the firm’s “Discover Your Purpose” intervention among 2,976 white-collar employees and evaluate their outcomes over two years. We find that performance increases because the low performers either leave the firm or improve in their current jobs. The trade-off between meaning and pay flattens as those with low meaning and high pay leave the firm. Treatment also reshapes stated priorities and reduces gender gaps in preferences and behaviors, including uptake of parental leave. A cost-benefit analysis reveals high returns that are shared between the firm and the employees through higher bonuses. Finally, we show that observational data obscure these gains, causing firms to underestimate the intervention’s true value.
papers.zh_title: 工作中的意义
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了一家公司在代理问题上采取的独特、以员工为中心的解决方案：让员工能够降低努力成本，而不是用绩效奖励来推动他们。我们在2976名白领员工中随机推广了该公司的“发现你的目标”干预措施，并评估了他们两年内的结果。我们发现绩效提升是因为低绩效员工要么离开公司，要么在当前岗位上有所改进。意义与薪酬之间的权衡变得平坦，因为那些意义感低但薪酬高的员工离开了公司。干预措施还重塑了员工陈述的优先事项，并减少了偏好和行为上的性别差距，包括育儿假的接受情况。成本效益分析显示，通过更高的奖金，公司和员工共享了高回报。最后，我们表明观察性数据掩盖了这些收益，导致公司低估了干预措施的真实价值。

papers.title: Martyrs, Morale, and Militarism: The Political Impact of Devastation and Slaughter
papers.authors: Shizuka Inoue, David E. Weinstein, Atsushi Yamagishi
papers.abstract: Opinion is sharply divided about whether the bombing of an enemy’s civilian targets and the killing of their combatants result in an adversary’s population becoming pacifist or pro-military. Identification is difficult because natural experiments are rare, and effects may be heterogeneous. For example, killing enemy combatants may create martyrs, while targeting civilians may lower their pro-war morale. We solve this problem by leveraging a natural experiment in Japan in which military casualties and urban destruction varied exogenously, but differentially, across cities. We then estimate the impact of devastation and slaughter on support for Japan’s Liberal Democratic Party, which aims to revise Japan’s constitution to enable it to rearm. We find contrasting effects of targeting soldiers and civilians—military deaths induce future pro-military voting, while urban destruction induces pacifist voting. Moreover, these effects persist long after most people with direct experience of the war have died.
papers.zh_title: 烈士、士气与军国主义：毁灭与屠杀的政治影响
papers.zh_abstract: 关于轰炸敌方平民目标以及杀伤敌方战斗人员是否会导致敌方民众变得反战或亲军，意见存在严重分歧。由于自然实验罕见且效应可能具有异质性，识别这一问题十分困难。例如，杀伤敌方战斗人员可能制造烈士，而针对平民则可能降低其好战士气。我们利用日本的一个自然实验解决了这个问题，在该实验中，军事伤亡和城市破坏在不同城市之间是外生的但存在差异。然后，我们估计了毁灭与屠杀对支持日本自民党（该党旨在修改日本宪法以实现重新武装）的影响。我们发现，针对士兵和平民的目标产生了截然不同的效果——军事死亡诱导了未来的亲军投票，而城市破坏则诱导了反战投票。此外，这些效应在大多数有战争直接经历的人去世后仍长期持续。

papers.title: Conditioning Out the Poor? Consumption Inequality and the Design of Cash Transfer Programs
papers.authors: Santosh Anagol, Thomas Fujiwara, Martin Navarrete
papers.abstract: Conditionality can exclude poor households from receiving transfers. Reanalyzing five randomized evaluations of conditional cash transfers (CCTs), we find that 9–37% of eligible recipients fail to meet conditions, and they typically have lower baseline consumption. We assess the welfare implications of budget-neutral shifts from CCTs to unconditional cash transfers. Conditionality exacerbating inequality among eligible recipients can be quantitatively important for welfare impacts. We quantify how large conditionality-induced human capital gains must be for the welfare benefits of CCTs to outweigh the inequality costs generated by conditionality.
papers.zh_title: 条件排除穷人？消费不平等与现金转移项目的设计
papers.zh_abstract: 条件性可能将贫困家庭排除在转移支付之外。重新分析五项有条件现金转移（CCT）的随机评估，我们发现9%至37%的合格受助者未能满足条件，且他们通常具有较低的基线消费水平。我们评估了从CCT向无条件现金转移进行预算中性转变的福利影响。条件性加剧合格受助者之间的不平等，这对福利影响在数量上可能很重要。我们量化了条件性所带来的人力资本收益必须有多大，才能使CCT的福利收益超过条件性所产生的平等成本。

papers.title: Global Price Shocks and International Monetary Coordination
papers.authors: Veronica Guerrieri, Guido Lorenzoni, Iván Werning
papers.abstract: Individual central banks respond to global supply shocks that transmit inflationary pressures—such as oil prices, shipping costs, and bottlenecks in global supply chains—taking these conditions as given. However, their combined global response determines global demand and, thus, the resulting global price pressure. This paper builds a simple monetary open economy model to explore the economic implications of this channel. We show that, following a negative world supply shock, uncoordinated monetary policy may be excessively loose. Our mechanism for this “expansionary bias” applies to an aggregate shock in a symmetric world economy of small open economies having no individual control over their terms of trade. In these ways, it is distinct from asymmetric shocks and terms-of-trade manipulation motives emphasized in the monetary coordination literature.
papers.zh_title: 全球价格冲击与国际货币协调
papers.zh_abstract: 各中央银行在应对传递通胀压力的全球供给冲击（如油价、航运成本和全球供应链瓶颈）时，将这些条件视为既定。然而，它们联合起来的全球反应决定了全球需求，从而决定了由此产生的全球价格压力。本文构建了一个简单的货币开放经济模型，以探讨这一渠道的经济含义。我们表明，在负向世界供给冲击之后，不协调的货币政策可能过于宽松。我们这种“扩张性偏向”的机制适用于对称世界经济中的总冲击，该世界由众多小型开放经济体组成，这些经济体无法单独控制其贸易条件。因此，它与货币协调文献中强调的非对称冲击和贸易条件操纵动机截然不同。

papers.title: The Optimal Macro Tariff
papers.authors: Oleg Itskhoki, Dmitry Mukhin
papers.abstract: What is the optimal macroeconomic tariff when trade is imbalanced and the policy objectives go beyond social welfare and also include fiscal revenues, increasing the number of manufacturing jobs, and closing a trade deficit? We study these questions in an environment which allows for long-run bilateral and aggregate trade deficits that reflect the country’s net foreign asset position and differential returns on foreign assets and liabilities (the “exorbitant privilege”). Only in special cases does the optimal tariff emerge as an increasing function of a trade deficit and for reasons unrelated to trade competitiveness. Instead, the planner trades off the conventional benefits of improved terms of trade with the costs from negative valuation effects on the country’s gross financial position. In our model calibrated to the United States, its large external dollar liabilities reduce the optimal tariff three-fold, from 34% to 9%, and act as an effective hedge for its trade partners against a trade war. In contrast to the expenditure switching logic and Lerner symmetry, closing the trade imbalance calls for an appreciation of the dollar to a level that depends solely on the US external financial position, and not on trade shares or trade elasticities, and can be achieved by means of an import tariff or an export subsidy. Alternatively, financial and trade rebalancing may happen if a tariff war results in the loss of privilege and the associated dollar depreciation.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, POL；JEL：F13, F31, F4
papers.zh_title: 最优宏观关税
papers.zh_abstract: 当贸易失衡且政策目标超越社会福利，还包括财政收入、增加制造业就业岗位以及缩小贸易逆差时，最优宏观经济关税是什么？我们在一个允许长期双边和总体贸易逆差的环境中研究这些问题，这些逆差反映了该国的净外国资产头寸以及外国资产和负债的差异化回报（“过度特权”）。仅在特殊情况下，最优关税才表现为贸易逆差的递增函数，且原因与贸易竞争力无关。相反，规划者需要在改善贸易条件的传统收益与对该国总金融头寸产生的负面估值效应成本之间进行权衡。在我们针对美国校准的模型中，其庞大的外部美元负债将最优关税降低了三分之二，从34%降至9%，并为其贸易伙伴在贸易战中充当了有效的对冲工具。与支出转换逻辑和勒纳对称性相反，缩小贸易失衡要求美元升值，其水平仅取决于美国的外部金融头寸，而非贸易份额或贸易弹性，并且可以通过进口关税或出口补贴来实现。或者，如果关税战导致特权丧失以及随之而来的美元贬值，金融和贸易再平衡也可能发生。

papers.title: The Persistence of Female Political Power in Africa
papers.authors: Siwan Anderson, Sophia du Plessis, Sahar Parsa, James A. Robinson
papers.abstract: Research on female political representation has tended to overlook the traditional role of women as leaders across many societies. Our study aims to address this gap by investigating the enduring influence of historical female political leadership on contemporary formal political representation in Africa. We test for this persistence by compiling two original datasets: one detailing female political leadership in precolonial societies and another on current female representation in local elections. Our findings indicate that ethnic groups historically allowing women in leadership roles in politics do tend to have a higher proportion of elected female representatives in today’s formal local political institutions. We also observe that institutional, rather than economic, factors significantly shape the traditional political influence of women. Moreover, in accordance with historical accounts, we uncover evidence of a reversal of female political power due to institutional changes enforced by colonial powers.
papers.zh_title: 非洲女性政治权力的持续性
papers.zh_abstract: 关于女性政治代表性的研究往往忽视了女性在许多社会中作为领导者的传统角色。我们的研究旨在通过调查历史上女性政治领导力对当代非洲正式政治代表性的持久影响来填补这一空白。我们通过编制两个原始数据集来检验这种持续性：一个详细记录了前殖民社会中的女性政治领导力，另一个则记录了当前地方选举中的女性代表性。我们的研究结果表明，历史上允许女性担任政治领导角色的族群，在当今正式的地方政治机构中，确实倾向于拥有更高比例的女性当选代表。我们还观察到，制度因素而非经济因素显著塑造了女性的传统政治影响力。此外，与历史记载一致，我们发现了由于殖民势力强加的制度变革而导致女性政治权力逆转的证据。

papers.title: News Selection and Household Inflation Expectations
papers.authors: Ryan Chahrour, Adam Hale Shapiro, Daniel Wilson
papers.abstract: We examine how the media's systematic selection of reporting topics influences household responses to inflation news. In a model where households learn about inflation from news coverage, households account for news selection when forming their expectations. Because media are more likely to report on inflation when it is high, the model implies an asymmetric response to news: high-inflation news changes expectations more than low-inflation news. We test this implication using household panel data, and find that exposure to higher-prices news increases inflation expectations by 0.4 percentage point, while exposure to lower-prices news has no significant effect.
papers.zh_title: 新闻选择与家庭通胀预期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了媒体对报道主题的系统性选择如何影响家庭对通胀新闻的反应。在一个家庭从新闻报道中了解通胀的模型中，家庭在形成预期时会考虑新闻选择。由于媒体更可能在通胀高企时报道通胀，该模型意味着对新闻的非对称反应：高通胀新闻比低通胀新闻更能改变预期。我们使用家庭面板数据检验了这一含义，发现接触价格上涨新闻会使通胀预期提高0.4个百分点，而接触价格下跌新闻则没有显著影响。

papers.title: Take the Load Off: Effort and Technology as Determinants of Electricity Demand Response
papers.authors: Megan R. Bailey, David P. Brown, Blake C. Shaffer, Frank A. Wolak
papers.abstract: As electricity systems transition toward more variable renewable energy, flexible demand has emerged as a critical tool for grid management. Yet a fundamental question remains: Are emerging smart technologies sufficient to unlock demand response, or does human behavior remain the critical barrier? Our field experiment examines this question through a novel approach that individually randomizes peak event timing for each participating household, allowing us to leverage both within- and between-subject variation. We compare the response to “peak events” on electricity consumption for households equipped with three distinct demand response programs: a fully automated system requiring no action; app-enabled smart devices requiring minimal effort; and traditional manual adjustments. The results are striking—households with passive, automated responses reduced consumption five times more than those required to take any action at all, even when the burden is reduced via smart technology. The provision of enabling technologies alone made no difference in households’ responsiveness, as compared to a fully manual setting, when active participation was still required. These findings reveal that the opportunity cost of time, effort, and attention—not technology limitations—may be the fundamental obstacle to unlocking electricity demand flexibility.
papers.zh_title: 卸下负担：努力与技术作为电力需求响应的决定因素
papers.zh_abstract: 随着电力系统向更可变的可再生能源转型，灵活的需求已成为电网管理的关键工具。然而，一个根本性问题依然存在：新兴的智能技术是否足以释放需求响应潜力，还是人类行为仍然是关键障碍？我们的实地实验通过一种新颖方法探讨了这一问题，该方法为每个参与家庭单独随机化高峰事件的时间，使我们能够利用个体内部和个体间的变异。我们比较了配备三种不同需求响应计划的家庭在“高峰事件”中的电力消费响应：无需任何操作的完全自动化系统；需要最少努力的应用程序启用智能设备；以及传统的手动调整。结果令人震惊——与需要采取任何行动（即使通过智能技术减轻了负担）的家庭相比，采用被动、自动化响应的家庭减少了五倍的消费量。当仍需要主动参与时，仅提供赋能技术与完全手动设置相比，在家庭响应性方面没有差异。这些发现表明，时间、努力和注意力的机会成本——而非技术限制——可能是释放电力需求灵活性的根本障碍。

papers.title: Childcare Access and the Allocation of Female Human Capital Across Firms
papers.authors: Elena Simintzi, Sheng-Jun Xu, Ting Xu
papers.abstract: We study how relaxing childcare-related constraints affects the allocation of female human capital across firms. Using linked family-employee-employer tax filing data and cohort-level variation in exposure to Quebec’s universal childcare reform, we show that earlier access to childcare induces new mothers to reallocate toward firms where they were previously underrepresented—firms with more demanding hours, higher risk, and higher pay. The effect is mainly driven by the relaxation of childcare-related time constraints. This reallocation raises mothers’ earnings and improves the performance of the firms they join. Our results suggest that expanding childcare access improves worker-firm matching and firms’ access to productive talent.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, CH, LS, PE, PR；JEL：G30, G38, J13, J16, J2, J6, M5
papers.zh_title: 儿童保育可及性对女性职业和企业绩效的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用关联的税务申报数据，研究了政府补贴的儿童保育对女性职业和企业结果的影响。基于魁北克省一项普及儿童保育改革所导致的儿童保育可及性的队列层面变异，我们表明，更早获得儿童保育不仅增加了新母亲的就业和收入，还促使她们将职业重新分配到以前对新母亲缺乏吸引力的企业。这些企业随后从改革中受益，吸引了更多年轻、有生产力的女性工人，并表现出更好的绩效。我们的结果表明，儿童保育摩擦阻碍了女性的职业发展以及劳动力市场中人力资本的配置。

papers.title: Policies to Reduce Federal Budget Deficits by Increasing Economic Growth
papers.authors: Douglas W. Elmendorf, R. Glenn Hubbard, Zachary Liscow
papers.abstract: Could policy changes boost economic growth enough and at a low enough cost to meaningfully reduce federal budget deficits? We assess seven areas of economic policy: immigration of high-skilled workers, housing regulation, safety net programs, regulation of electricity transmission, government support for research and development, tax policy related to business investment, and permitting of infrastructure construction. We find that growth-enhancing policies almost certainly cannot stabilize federal debt on their own, but that such policies can reduce the explicit tax hikes, spending cuts, or both that are needed to stabilize debt. We also find a dearth of research on the likely impacts of potential growth-enhancing policies and on ways to design such policies to restrain federal debt, and we offer suggestions for ways to build a larger base of evidence.
papers.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：D24, E62, H62, I38, J61, O38, Q48, Q58, R38
papers.zh_title: 通过促进经济增长来减少联邦预算赤字的政策
papers.zh_abstract: 政策变革能否以足够低的成本充分促进经济增长，从而有意义地减少联邦预算赤字？我们评估了七个经济政策领域：高技能工人移民、住房监管、安全网项目、电力传输监管、政府对研发的支持、与商业投资相关的税收政策，以及基础设施建设的许可审批。我们发现，促进增长的政策几乎无法单独稳定联邦债务，但此类政策可以减少稳定债务所需的明确增税、削减支出或两者兼施的规模。我们还发现，关于潜在增长促进政策的可能影响以及如何设计此类政策以限制联邦债务的研究匮乏，并提出了建立更广泛证据基础的建议。

papers.title: Equilibrium Price Responses to Targeted Student Financial Aid
papers.authors: Nano Barahona, Cauê Dobbin, Sebastián Otero
papers.abstract: We study how colleges adjust tuition in response to student financial aid, emphasizing the role of targeting. Our framework highlights two forces: a direct effect that increases tuition, and a composition effect that can reduce tuition when aid targets more price-sensitive students. Using a reform in Brazil’s student loan program, we document both effects empirically and estimate an equilibrium model to evaluate counterfactual policies. We find that merit-based targeting raises tuition by 2.2%, while need-based targeting lowers it by 0.8%, reflecting that lower-income students are more price-sensitive. These price effects have a strong impact on enrollment decisions.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, IO, PE；JEL：H22, H52, I22, I23, I24, L10
papers.zh_title: 针对学生财政援助的均衡价格反应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了大学如何根据学生财政援助调整学费，强调了针对性的作用。我们的框架突出了两种力量：一种直接效应会提高学费，另一种构成效应则可能在援助针对价格敏感度更高的学生时降低学费。利用巴西学生贷款计划的一项改革，我们实证记录了这两种效应，并估计了一个均衡模型以评估反事实政策。我们发现，基于成绩的针对性使学费上涨了2.2%，而基于需求的针对性则使学费降低了0.8%，这反映出低收入学生对价格更为敏感。这些价格效应对入学决策有强烈影响。

papers.title: A Double Dose of Reform: Insurance and Centralized Negotiation in Drug Markets
papers.authors: Panle Jia Barwick, Ashley T. Swanson, Tianli Xia

papers.title: Consumer Sentiment Towards Asians in the Early Days of the Covid-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Kerwin Kofi Charles, Jonathan Guryan, Kyung H. Park
papers.abstract: We revisit the early months of the Covid-19 pandemic to examine whether restaurant foot traffic reveals changes in sentiment towards ethnic groups. Our findings show reduced demand for dining at Asian restaurants located inside Asian enclaves, while outside enclaves, the decline in visits to Asian restaurants was comparable to non-Asian restaurants. In contrast, Italian restaurant enclaves did not experience similar declines in foot traffic after news of the outbreak in Italy and the first U.S. case linked to travel to Italy. We also find suggestive evidence that the shift in consumption was associated with elevated negative sentiment towards Asians rather than efforts to avoid exposure to international travelers.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：I12, I18, J14, J71
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情初期对亚洲人的消费者情绪
papers.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了新冠疫情的最初几个月，以考察餐厅客流量是否揭示了针对不同族裔群体的情绪变化。我们的研究结果显示，位于亚洲人聚居区内的亚洲餐厅的用餐需求有所下降，而在聚居区外，亚洲餐厅的访问量下降与非亚洲餐厅相当。相比之下，在意大利疫情爆发以及美国首例与意大利旅行相关的病例报道后，意大利餐厅聚居区并未经历类似的客流量下降。我们还发现了暗示性证据，表明消费转变与对亚洲人负面情绪升高相关，而非避免接触国际旅行者的努力。

papers.title: No Country for Dying Firms: Evidence from India
papers.authors: Shoumitro Chatterjee, Kala Krishna, Kalyani Padmakumar, Yingyan Zhao
papers.abstract: This paper identifies exit barriers as a new reason for India’s underdeveloped manufacturing sector. These barriers not only deter entry but also trap resources in unproductive firms. We document that Indian institutions generate such barriers and provide causal evidence of their effects. Using a dynamic model that separately identifies direct exit barriers from labor and capital adjustment costs, we find that exit barriers are quantitatively significant, particularly in low-performing states and labor-intensive industries. Our analysis yields three findings. First, reducing firing costs raises value added but reduces employment, whereas relaxing direct exit barriers increases both. Second, simultaneous reform of labor firing costs and direct exit barriers yields synergies. Third, sequencing matters: addressing direct exit barriers before labor firing costs preserves employment while improving efficiency. Finally, we show that exit subsidies are more effective at raising value added, while entry subsidies are more effective at increasing employment.
papers.zh_title: 没有垂死企业容身之地：来自印度的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文指出退出壁垒是印度制造业欠发达的一个新原因。这些壁垒不仅阻碍了进入，还将资源困在低生产率企业中。我们记录了印度制度如何产生此类壁垒，并提供了其影响的因果证据。利用一个动态模型，该模型将直接退出壁垒与劳动力和资本调整成本区分开来，我们发现退出壁垒在数量上显著，尤其是在低绩效邦和劳动密集型行业。我们的分析得出三个发现。首先，降低解雇成本提高了增加值但减少了就业，而放松直接退出壁垒则两者都增加。其次，同时改革劳动解雇成本和直接退出壁垒会产生协同效应。第三，顺序很重要：在劳动解雇成本之前解决直接退出壁垒，可以在提高效率的同时保持就业。最后，我们表明，退出补贴在提高增加值方面更有效，而进入补贴在增加就业方面更有效。

papers.title: Valuing Wildfire Smoke Related Mortality Benefits from Climate Mitigation
papers.authors: Minghao Qiu, Christopher W. Callahan, Iván Higuera-Mendieta, Lisa Rennels, Bryan Parthum, Noah S. Diffenbaugh, Marshall Burke
papers.abstract: Human-induced climate change has increased wildfire risks, associated air pollution, and health damages in North America. Despite its large potential for damage, climate-induced wildfire smoke is rarely incorporated in estimates of the societal costs of climate change. We develop an integrated framework to estimate PM₂.₅ from climate-induced wildfire smoke and the associated mortality damage in the U.S. Our framework combines econometric estimates of smoke-mortality relationships, machine learning estimates of climate-smoke relationships, and econometric estimates of negative feedbacks between current and future wildfire activity. We estimate that 3°C of future warming will lead to 46,200 annual deaths associated with smoke pollution in the US, doubling estimated mortality from smoke during 2011-2020. For an additional tonne of CO₂ emitted in 2025, we estimate a partial social cost of carbon of $15.1 (95%CI: $2.5-$49.3) due to climate-induced wildfire smoke mortality in the U.S, which doubles current estimates of the U.S. domestic social cost of carbon. We estimate that smoke-related mortality benefits due to projected emissions reductions from the 2022 Inflation Reduction Act are alone equal to 25% of estimated abatement costs associated with the Act.
papers.zh_title: 评估气候减缓带来的野火烟雾相关死亡效益
papers.zh_abstract: 人为气候变化增加了北美地区的野火风险、相关空气污染和健康损害。尽管潜在损害巨大，但气候引发的野火烟雾很少被纳入气候变化社会成本的估算中。我们开发了一个综合框架，用于估算美国气候引发的野火烟雾产生的PM₂.₅及其相关的死亡损害。我们的框架结合了烟雾-死亡关系的计量经济学估计、气候-烟雾关系的机器学习估计，以及当前与未来野火活动之间负反馈的计量经济学估计。我们估计，未来升温3°C将导致美国每年有46,200例与烟雾污染相关的死亡，使2011-2020年期间估计的烟雾死亡人数翻倍。对于2025年每额外排放一吨CO₂，我们估计由于美国气候引发的野火烟雾死亡，部分社会碳成本为15.1美元（95%置信区间：2.5-49.3美元），这使当前美国国内社会碳成本的估计值翻倍。我们估计，仅2022年《通胀削减法案》预计减排带来的烟雾相关死亡效益，就相当于该法案估计减排成本的25%。

papers.title: What are the Costs of Weakening Shareholder Primacy? Evidence from a U.S. Quasi-Natural Experiment
papers.authors: Benjamin Bennett, René M. Stulz, Zexi Wang
papers.abstract: We study the economic consequences of weakening shareholder primacy using Nevada Senate Bill 203 as a quasi-natural experiment. A difference-in-differences analysis shows that affected Nevada firms experienced a decline in firm value of more than 4%, as measured by Tobin’s q. Rather than responding with stronger governance to reassure capital providers, affected firms worsen their governance. We document significant real effects through the investment channel: treated firms undertake worse acquisitions and exhibit reduced efficiency in both capital expenditures and R&D spending. Furthermore, weakening shareholder primacy does not improve how stakeholders are treated, as environmental and social performance worsen.
papers.zh_title: 削弱股东至上主义的成本是什么？来自美国准自然实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用内华达州参议院第203号法案作为准自然实验，研究了削弱股东至上主义的经济后果。双重差分分析表明，受影响的內华达州公司其公司价值（以托宾q衡量）下降了超过4%。受影响的公司并未通过加强治理来安抚资本提供者，反而恶化了其治理水平。我们通过投资渠道记录了显著的实际效应：受处理的公司进行了更差的收购，并且在资本支出和研发支出方面的效率均有所下降。此外，削弱股东至上主义并未改善利益相关者的待遇，因为环境和社会绩效均出现恶化。

papers.title: Government Intervention in the Financial Market
papers.authors: Jiang Wang
papers.abstract: Government intervention in the financial market through its own trading fundamentally changes the market's structure, function, behavior and outcome. We develop a general equilibrium framework to study the impact of government trading on market outcome and investor welfare. We show that with incompleteness and asymmetric information, the market equilibrium is in general sub-optimal and government intervention can improve investor welfare even without any additional information. However, the welfare impact of government intervention is sensitive to its policy design and the economy's structural details. In addition, popular policy goals such as informational efficiency, price stability and market liquidity can have different welfare implications. Performance measures for government trades based on market prices can be misleading since these trades also affect prices and welfare.
papers.zh_title: 金融市场中的政府干预
papers.zh_abstract: 政府通过自身交易对金融市场进行干预，从根本上改变了市场的结构、功能、行为和结果。我们构建了一个一般均衡框架来研究政府交易对市场结果和投资者福利的影响。我们证明，在市场不完全和信息不对称的情况下，市场均衡通常是次优的，即使没有额外信息，政府干预也能改善投资者福利。然而，政府干预的福利效应对其政策设计和经济结构细节非常敏感。此外，诸如信息效率、价格稳定和市场流动性等流行政策目标可能具有不同的福利含义。基于市场价格来衡量政府交易绩效的做法可能具有误导性，因为这些交易同时也会影响价格和福利。

papers.title: Invoicing of Japanese Exports and Imports: Analysis of Granular Data by Industry and by Country
papers.authors: Junko Shimizu, Uraku Yoshimoto, Takatoshi Ito, Kiyotaka Sato, Yushi Yoshida, Taiyo Yoshimi
papers.abstract: As a successful competitive research bid to use Japanese customs data, this study calculates the share of trade denomination currency (invoice currency) in Japan's exports and imports by industry and country from individual export and import documents. The results clarify the characteristics of invoice currency choice. The invoice currency share data by industry and country, compiled from customs data, shows each industry's characteristics by country. We confirm that the industry sector of the traded goods plays a role in the choice of invoice currency shares. In addition, we found that invoice currency shares in some industries varied significantly over the sample period from 2014 to 2022. This indicates that heightened geopolitical risks and supply chain restructuring in recent years may affect the choice of invoice currency. We have confirmed a large gap between the average (vs. world) share and the share by individual industry and country. Time-series changes are also remarkable. Our data indicates that the invoice currency shares aggregated in trade with the world do not necessarily reflect changes in invoice currency shares or the actual use of partner country currencies.
papers.zh_title: 日本出口与进口的计价货币：基于行业和国家层面的微观数据分析
papers.zh_abstract: 作为一项成功竞标使用日本海关数据的研究，本研究根据单个进出口单据，计算了日本出口和进口中按行业和国家划分的贸易计价货币（发票货币）份额。结果阐明了发票货币选择的特征。根据海关数据编制的按行业和国家划分的发票货币份额数据，显示了每个行业在不同国家的特征。我们证实，贸易商品的行业部门在发票货币份额的选择中发挥作用。此外，我们发现，在2014年至2022年的样本期内，某些行业的发票货币份额发生了显著变化。这表明，近年来地缘政治风险的加剧和供应链的重组可能影响了发票货币的选择。我们证实了与世界平均份额相比，以及按单个行业和国家划分的份额之间存在巨大差距。时间序列变化也引人注目。我们的数据表明，与全球贸易汇总的发票货币份额并不一定反映发票货币份额的变化或伙伴国货币的实际使用情况。

papers.title: Tradeoffs over Rate Cycles: Activity, Inflation and the Price Level
papers.authors: Kristin Forbes, Jongrim Ha, M. Ayhan Kose
papers.abstract: Central banks often face tradeoffs in how their monetary policy decisions impact economic activity (including employment), inflation and the price level. This paper assesses how these tradeoffs have evolved over time and varied across countries, with a focus on understanding the post-pandemic adjustment. To make these comparisons, we compile a cross-country, historical database of “rate cycles” (i.e., easing and tightening phases for monetary policy) for 24 advanced economies from 1970 through 2024. This allows us to quantify the characteristics of interest rate adjustments and corresponding macroeconomic outcomes and tradeoffs. We also calculate Sacrifice Ratios (output losses per inflation reduction) and document a historically low “sacrifice” during the post-pandemic tightening. This popular measure, however, ignores adjustments in the price level—which increased by more after the pandemic than over the past four decades. A series of regressions and simulations suggest monetary policy (and particularly the timing and aggressiveness of rate hikes) play a meaningful role in explaining these tradeoffs and how adjustments occur during tightening phases. Central bank credibility is the one measure we assess that corresponds to only positive outcomes and no difficult tradeoffs.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E31, E32, E43, E52, E58, F33, F44, N10
papers.zh_title: 利率周期中的权衡：经济活动、通胀与价格水平
papers.zh_abstract: 中央银行在制定货币政策决策时，常常面临如何影响经济活动（包括就业）、通货膨胀和价格水平之间的权衡。本文评估了这些权衡如何随时间演变以及在不同国家间的差异，重点关注理解疫情后的调整。为了进行这些比较，我们编制了一个涵盖24个发达经济体从1970年到2024年的跨国历史“利率周期”（即货币政策的宽松和紧缩阶段）数据库。这使得我们能够量化利率调整的特征以及相应的宏观经济结果和权衡。我们还计算了牺牲率（每降低一单位通胀所损失的产出），并记录了疫情后紧缩期间历史性的低“牺牲”。然而，这一流行指标忽略了价格水平的调整——疫情后价格水平的上涨幅度超过了过去四十年。一系列回归和模拟表明，货币政策（特别是加息的时机和力度）在解释这些权衡以及紧缩阶段如何进行调整方面发挥了重要作用。央行信誉是我们评估的唯一一个仅对应积极结果且不涉及艰难权衡的指标。

papers.title: The Return to Adaptation in a Changing Climate
papers.authors: Harrison Hong, Serena Ng, Jiangmin Xu
papers.abstract: We quantify the economic return to adaptation in a changing climate. Our approach exploits the fact that extreme-weather arrivals are nonhomogeneous: we first estimate each country’s time-varying disaster arrival rate, then test whether per-disaster damage declines when risk is elevated—a key feature of risk-dependent adaptation. We apply this to tropical cyclones across 48 countries over 1980–2019. Indeed, cyclones do significantly less damage when the arrival rate has risen above its historical baseline. The finding survives placebo permutations, lagged-disaster controls, and two-way-fixed-effects critiques. Welfare gains reach several percent of GDP for the most exposed economies and scale sharply under climate projections.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, DEV, EEE, EFG；JEL：O1, O40, O47, Q50, Q54, Q56
papers.zh_title: 气候变化中适应的回报
papers.zh_abstract: 我们量化了气候变化中适应的经济回报。我们的方法利用了极端天气事件到达的非齐次性：我们首先估计每个国家随时间变化的灾害到达率，然后检验当风险升高时，每次灾害的损失是否下降——这是风险依赖型适应的一个关键特征。我们将此方法应用于1980年至2019年间48个国家的热带气旋。确实，当气旋到达率高于其历史基线时，气旋造成的损失显著减少。这一发现在安慰剂置换、滞后灾害控制以及双向固定效应批评的检验下依然稳健。对于最易受冲击的经济体，福利收益可达GDP的百分之几，并在气候预测下急剧放大。

papers.title: Income and Wealth Inequality in the United States: An Update Including the 2022 Wave
papers.authors: Moritz Kuhn, José-Víctor Ríos-Rull
papers.abstract: We provide a comprehensive overview of earnings, income and wealth inequality based on the 2022 Survey of Consumer Finances from the United States. We document the current state of inequality and its evolution over the last three decades organizing the data along key demographic dimensions including age, education, and marital status. The 2022 data reveal that wealth remains highly concentrated, with the top 1% holding 35% of total wealth down from a peak of 39% in 2016. This recent decline in wealth concentration—occurring despite rising income inequality—reflects strong housing price appreciation that disproportionately benefited middle-class households. We extend previous analyses with new perspectives on inequality, including: (1) the role of labor market segmentation in generating wealth disparities beyond standard employment categories; (2) differences in wealth accumulation across birth cohorts showing that younger generations accumulate less wealth than their predecessors at comparable ages; (3) disparities associated with family structure, particularly the financial vulnerability of single-parent households; and (4) heterogeneity in self-reported savings motives, with precautionary savings dominating for lower-wealth households while retirement planning and bequests become more prominent at the top of the distribution. These findings enhance our understanding of the multifaceted nature of inequality and offer essential inputs for structural models and policy design.
papers.zh_title: 美国的收入与财富不平等：包含2022年波次的更新
papers.zh_abstract: 我们基于美国2022年消费者金融调查，对收入、收入和财富不平等进行了全面概述。我们记录了不平等的现状及其在过去三十年间的演变，并按照年龄、教育程度和婚姻状况等关键人口维度对数据进行整理。2022年的数据显示，财富仍然高度集中，最富有的1%人群持有总财富的35%，低于2016年39%的峰值。近期财富集中度的下降——尽管收入不平等在加剧——反映了房价的强劲上涨，这不成比例地惠及了中产阶级家庭。我们通过以下新的不平等视角扩展了先前的分析：（1）劳动力市场分割在产生超出标准就业类别的财富差距中的作用；（2）不同出生队列间财富积累的差异，显示年轻一代在可比年龄积累的财富少于其前辈；（3）与家庭结构相关的差距，特别是单亲家庭的财务脆弱性；（4）自我报告储蓄动机的异质性，其中预防性储蓄在低财富家庭中占主导地位，而退休规划和遗产在财富分布顶端变得更加突出。这些发现增进了我们对不平等多面性的理解，并为结构模型和政策设计提供了必要的输入。

papers.title: Tax Credits and Child Outcomes: Lessons from the U.S., U.K., and Canada
papers.authors: Katherine Michelmore
papers.abstract: Over the last several decades, there have been historic shifts in the structure of cash transfer programs in Western, developed countries, including the U.S., Canada, and U.K. For all three of these countries, the turn of the 21st century marked a shift away from unconditional cash transfer programs like traditional cash welfare, towards an emphasis on benefits that encourage or require work. In this paper, I review the evidence on the impact of tax credits on child outcomes, focusing on what is known about child-oriented tax credits in the U.S. (EITC, CTC), the U.K. (WFTC, CTC, WTC), and Canada (Canada Child Tax Benefit (CCTB), National Child Benefit (NCB), and the Canada Child Benefit (CCB). Overwhelmingly, the evidence from these three countries suggests that tax credits have positive impacts on children on a host of different outcomes, including infant birthweight, childhood health and achievement, educational attainment, wages, and poverty in adulthood. While there is a large, growing body of evidence on the impact of these tax credits on children, future work should further investigate the precise mechanisms through which tax credits impact child outcomes, the characteristics of children most impacted by these credits, and the importance the frequency of credits distribution.
papers.zh_title: 税收抵免与儿童成果：来自美国、英国和加拿大的经验教训
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去的几十年里，包括美国、加拿大和英国在内的西方发达国家的现金转移支付项目结构发生了历史性转变。对于这三个国家而言，21世纪初标志着从传统的无条件现金福利项目，转向强调鼓励或要求工作的福利。在本文中，我回顾了关于税收抵免对儿童成果影响的证据，重点关注美国（EITC, CTC）、英国（WFTC, CTC, WTC）和加拿大（加拿大儿童税收福利金（CCTB）、国家儿童福利金（NCB）和加拿大儿童福利金（CCB））以儿童为导向的税收抵免的已知情况。总体而言，来自这三个国家的证据表明，税收抵免对儿童在一系列不同成果上具有积极影响，包括婴儿出生体重、儿童健康和学业成就、教育程度、工资以及成年后的贫困状况。尽管关于这些税收抵免对儿童影响的证据正在大量增长，但未来的研究应进一步探究税收抵免影响儿童成果的确切机制、受这些抵免影响最大的儿童特征，以及抵免发放频率的重要性。

papers.title: Natural Language Processing and Innovation Research
papers.authors: Antonin Bergeaud, Adam B. Jaffe, Dimitris Papanikolaou
papers.abstract: Innovation is central to models in economics, strategy, management, and finance, yet it remains difficult to measure due to its intangible and knowledge-based na ture. Recent advancements in Natural Language Processing offer new methods to analyze textual artifacts, providing empirical insights into previously hard-to-measure aspects of innovation. This paper provides an overview of the current applications of these methods in empirical innovation research, highlights their transformative potential for reshaping how researchers study and quantify innovation, and discusses the critical challenges that accompany their use.
papers.zh_title: 自然语言处理与创新研究
papers.zh_abstract: 创新是经济学、战略、管理和金融学模型的核心，但由于其无形和基于知识的性质，它仍然难以衡量。自然语言处理的最新进展提供了分析文本制品的新方法，为以前难以衡量的创新方面提供了实证见解。本文概述了这些方法在实证创新研究中的当前应用，强调了它们在重塑研究人员研究和量化创新方式方面的变革潜力，并讨论了伴随其使用而来的关键挑战。

papers.title: Entry and Profits in an Aging Economy: The Role of Consumer Inertia
papers.authors: Gideon Bornstein
papers.abstract: Over the past four decades, the U.S. economy has seen a decline in the share of young firms alongside a rise in the profit share of GDP. This paper explores how population aging contributes to these twin trends through a demand-side channel. The core hypothesis is that younger households exhibit lower consumer inertia—a tendency to stick with previously chosen products—than older households. As demand shifts toward more inertial consumers, entry becomes harder, incumbents raise markups, and market share tilts toward larger firms. To quantify this mechanism, I develop and calibrate a firm dynamics model with overlapping generations of consumers who differ in their degree of inertia. Using detailed micro data, I show that younger households are significantly less inertial. The model implies that population aging accounts for 20%–30% of the observed decline in young firms and rise in profits. Reduced-form evidence across U.S. states and product categories supports the model’s predictions.
papers.zh_title: 老龄化经济中的进入与利润：消费者惯性的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 过去四十年间，美国经济中年轻企业占比下降，同时利润占GDP比重上升。本文探讨人口老龄化如何通过需求侧渠道促成这两大趋势。核心假设是，年轻家庭比老年家庭表现出更低的消费者惯性——即坚持使用先前选择产品的倾向。随着需求转向惯性更强的消费者，企业进入变得更加困难，在位企业提高加价率，市场份额向大企业倾斜。为量化这一机制，我构建并校准了一个包含不同惯性程度代际重叠消费者的企业动态模型。利用详细的微观数据，我发现年轻家庭的惯性显著更低。模型表明，人口老龄化可以解释观察到的年轻企业下降和利润上升的20%–30%。基于美国各州和产品类别的简化形式证据支持了模型的预测。

papers.title: Advising Job Seekers in Occupations with Poor Prospects: A Field Experiment
papers.authors: Michèle Belot, Bart K. de Koning, Didier Fouarge, Philipp Kircher, Paul Muller, Sandra Phlippen
papers.abstract: We study the impact of online information provision to unemployed job seekers who are looking for work in occupations in slack markets, i.e. with only few vacancies per job seeker. Job seekers received suggestions about suitable alternative occupations, and how the prospects of these alternatives compare to their current occupation of interest. Some additionally received a link to a motivational video. We evaluate the interventions using a randomized field experiment covering all eligible job seekers registered to search in the target occupations. The vast majority of treated job seekers open the message revealing the alternative suggestions. The motivational video is rarely watched. Effects on unemployed job seekers in structurally poor labor markets are large: their employment, hours of work and labor income all improve by 5% to 6% after 18 months. Additional survey evidence shows that treated job seekers find employment in more diverse occupations.
papers.zh_title: 为前景不佳职业中的求职者提供建议：一项实地实验
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了向在劳动力市场疲软（即每个求职者对应很少职位空缺）的职业中寻找工作的失业求职者提供在线信息的影响。求职者收到了关于合适替代职业的建议，以及这些替代职业的前景如何与他们当前感兴趣的职业进行比较的信息。部分求职者还额外收到了一个激励视频的链接。我们通过一项随机实地实验评估了这些干预措施，该实验涵盖了所有在目标职业中注册搜索的合格求职者。绝大多数接受处理的求职者打开了包含替代建议的消息。激励视频很少被观看。对结构性劳动力市场疲软中的失业求职者的影响很大：18个月后，他们的就业率、工作时间和劳动收入均提高了5%至6%。额外的调查证据表明，接受处理的求职者在更多样化的职业中找到了工作。

papers.title: Firm Premia and Match Effects in Pay vs. Amenities
papers.authors: Anders Humlum, Mette Rasmussen, Evan K. Rose
papers.abstract: This paper develops a new approach to measuring non-wage amenities and compensating differentials in the labor market. Using a survey of 20,000 job movers in Denmark, we elicit workers’ reservation wage to return to their previous jobs. Our sample contains a large, connected network of firms, enabling us to estimate firm-wide premia and match effects in amenity values. Overall, higher-paying firms provide slightly worse non-pay amenities. Although they provide better perks and flexibility, they also come with higher layoff risk, faster work pace, and greater stress. On average, moves to jobs offering 10% higher pay involve a 5% reduction in the value of amenities, with 0.7% attributable to firm-wide tradeoffs and the remainder attributable to match effects in pay and preferences. Using a rich search model, we quantify the role of amenities in labor market inequality while accounting for preference heterogeneity and endogenous mobility.
