Worse amenities at high-paying firms offset more than half of their wage advantage, and the within-worker variance in pay across firms overstates the variance in utility by 50%.
papers.zh_title: 薪酬与非薪酬福利中的企业溢价与匹配效应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种衡量劳动力市场中非工资性福利及补偿性差异的新方法。通过对丹麦2万名换工作者进行问卷调查，我们获取了工人返回原工作岗位所需的保留工资。样本包含一个庞大且相互关联的企业网络，使我们能够估算企业在福利价值方面的整体溢价和匹配效应。总体而言，薪酬较高的企业提供的非工资性福利略差。尽管它们提供更好的额外津贴和灵活性，但也伴随着更高的裁员风险、更快的工作节奏和更大的压力。平均而言，转向薪酬高出10%的工作岗位，其福利价值会降低5%，其中0.7%归因于企业层面的权衡，其余部分则归因于薪酬和偏好方面的匹配效应。通过一个丰富的搜索模型，我们在考虑偏好异质性和内生流动性的同时，量化了福利在劳动力市场不平等中的作用。高薪企业较差的福利抵消了其工资优势的一半以上，而工人在不同企业间薪酬的个体内方差，将效用方差高估了50%。

papers.title: The Culture and Institutions of Confucianism
papers.authors: Ruixue Jia, James Kai-sing Kung
papers.abstract: This study reviews the culture and institutions of Confucianism and explores their implications for the trajectory of China’s historical development. We trace the origins and evolution of the core elements of Confucianism and synthesize research on its relationship to clan culture, state institutions, and a broad array of societal values. We also highlight promising but underexplored directions for future research. While Confucianism is often invoked to explain China’s absence from the Industrial Revolution and its lack of democratization, we caution against such retrospective determinism. As a multidimensional and abstract tradition, Confucianism likely allows for varied interpretations and institutional adaptations across time and context.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：N15, O43, P51, Z10, Z13
papers.zh_title: 儒家文化的制度内涵
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究回顾了儒家文化的制度内涵，并探讨其对中国历史发展轨迹的影响。我们追溯了儒家核心要素的起源与演变，综合梳理了其与宗族文化、国家制度及广泛社会价值观之间关系的研究。同时，我们指出了未来研究中具有前景但尚未充分探索的方向。尽管儒家思想常被用来解释中国未能参与工业革命以及缺乏民主化进程，但我们对此类回溯性决定论持谨慎态度。作为一种多维且抽象的传统，儒家思想很可能在不同时代和背景下允许多样化的解读和制度适应。

papers.title: Stablecoin Runs and the Centralization of Arbitrage
papers.authors: Yiming Ma, Yao Zeng, Anthony Lee Zhang
papers.abstract: Stablecoins are cryptoassets which are designed to be pegged to the dollar, but are backed by imperfectly liquid USD assets. We show that stablecoins feature concentrated arbitrage: the largest issuer, Tether, only allows 6 agents in an average month to redeem stablecoins for cash. We argue that issuers' choice of arbitrage concentration reflects a tradeoff: efficient arbitrage improves stablecoin price stability in secondary markets, but amplifies run risks by reducing investors' price impact from selling stablecoins. Our findings imply that policies designed to improve stablecoin price stability may have the unintended consequence of increasing stablecoin run risks.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：G1, G2, G21, G23, G28
papers.zh_title: 稳定币挤兑与套利行为的集中化
papers.zh_abstract: 稳定币是一种旨在与美元挂钩的加密资产，但其背后由流动性不完全的美元资产支持。我们发现稳定币存在集中套利现象：最大的发行商Tether平均每月仅允许6个代理人将稳定币兑换为现金。我们认为，发行商对套利集中度的选择反映了一种权衡：高效的套利能改善稳定币在二级市场的价格稳定性，但通过降低投资者出售稳定币的价格冲击，反而放大了挤兑风险。我们的研究结果表明，旨在提高稳定币价格稳定性的政策，可能意外地增加稳定币的挤兑风险。

papers.title: Using Discrepancies to Correct for False Matches in Historical Linked Data
papers.authors: Yuya Sasaki, Ariell Zimran
papers.abstract: We propose a method to correct estimates from historical linked data for bias arising from type-I error—"false matches." We estimate the rate of false matching from the disagreement rate in characteristics that should agree across the two linked datasets. Combined with an understanding of the empirical patterns arising from false matches, knowledge of this rate enables us to correct for bias from false matches. Our method enables correction of estimates of both population moments and regression coefficients with valid inference. We illustrate the properties of our method via simulation and demonstrate them using linked US census data.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE；JEL：C10, C23, C49, C55, C81, C83, J61, J62, N30, N31, N32
papers.zh_title: 利用不一致性修正历史链接数据中的错误匹配
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种方法，用于修正因第一类错误（即“错误匹配”）而导致的历史链接数据估计偏差。我们通过两个链接数据集中本应一致的特征的不一致率来估计错误匹配率。结合对错误匹配所产生经验模式的理解，掌握这一比率使我们能够修正由错误匹配引起的偏差。我们的方法能够修正对总体矩和回归系数的估计，并实现有效的统计推断。我们通过模拟展示了该方法的性质，并利用链接的美国人口普查数据进行了实证验证。

papers.title: The Private Value of Innovating for the Government
papers.authors: Ashish Arora, Sharon Belenzon, Larisa C. Cioaca, Elia Ferracuti
papers.abstract: We quantify the private returns to government R&D contracts awarded to firms. We present new evidence that R&D contracts not only finance innovation but also embed an implicit government guarantee of noncompetitive future procurement for the winning R&D contractor. We measure its private value by analyzing stock market reactions to news about R&D contract awards. Using all federal R&D contracts awarded to U.S. publicly traded firms from 1984 through 2015, we find that the average private return on an R&D contract is 19 times its maximum potential revenue. However, returns are highly skewed, with only 7.5% of firms receiving at least one top-quartile contract. Private returns are linked to future production contracts, but only for noncompetitive awards to vertically integrated or large firms. These results suggest that a procurement regime bundling R&D and production contracts enhances value for firms with production capability. We develop a conceptual framework to clarify this innovation policy lever.
papers.zh_title: 为政府创新带来的私人价值
papers.zh_abstract: 我们量化了授予企业的政府研发合同的私人回报。我们提供了新的证据，表明研发合同不仅资助创新，还隐含了一种政府担保，即获胜的研发承包商将在未来获得非竞争性的采购合同。我们通过分析股票市场对研发合同授予消息的反应来衡量其私人价值。利用1984年至2015年间授予美国上市公司的所有联邦研发合同，我们发现一份研发合同的平均私人回报是其最大潜在收入的19倍。然而，回报高度偏斜，只有7.5%的企业至少获得了一份处于最高四分位数的合同。私人回报与未来的生产合同相关，但这仅适用于授予垂直整合或大型企业的非竞争性合同。这些结果表明，将研发与生产合同捆绑的采购制度，为具备生产能力的企业提升了价值。我们构建了一个概念框架来阐明这一创新政策工具。

papers.title: Expectations and Information Frictions Within Couples: Evidence from a Sequential Survey of Spouses
papers.authors: Adeline L. Delavande, Gizem Koşar, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: This paper combines descriptive and experimental evidence to examine how expectations align and information flows within couples. Using an online survey of 2,200 middle-aged U.S. married couples, we focus on expectations about Social Security benefits. We first document substantial misalignment: the correlation between spouses’ expectations about a given partner’s benefits is 0.70, below full agreement, and varies systematically with couple characteristics, reaching as low as 0.45 for couples with below-median earnings. To identify causal information spillovers, we implement a randomized information experiment paired with a sequential survey design in which one spouse receives targeted information and the other is surveyed later. Information provided to one spouse partially spills over to the other, with the effect on the untreated spouse about half that on the treated one. Spillovers are larger when communication barriers are low and the information is more valuable. Finally, the information treatment improves conditions for more efficient intra-household decision-making.
papers.zh_title: 夫妻间的预期与信息摩擦：来自配偶序贯调查的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文结合描述性和实验性证据，考察夫妻间预期如何协调以及信息如何流动。通过对2200对美国中年已婚夫妇进行在线调查，我们重点关注关于社会保障福利的预期。我们首先记录了显著的预期不一致：配偶双方对某一方福利预期的相关系数为0.70，低于完全一致，并且随夫妻特征系统性地变化，对于收入低于中位数的夫妻，该相关系数低至0.45。为了识别因果性的信息溢出效应，我们实施了一项随机信息实验，并采用序贯调查设计：一方配偶接收特定信息，另一方则在之后接受调查。提供给一方配偶的信息会部分溢出到另一方，对未受信息干预配偶的影响约为对受干预配偶影响的一半。当沟通障碍较低且信息价值更高时，溢出效应更大。最后，信息干预改善了条件，有助于提高家庭内部决策效率。

papers.title: Assessing Maximum Employment: A Flow-Based Approach
papers.authors: Stefano Eusepi, Ayşegül Şahin
papers.abstract: The Federal Reserve’s dual mandate, to achieve maximum employment and stable prices, requires monitoring a broad range of indicators and carefully evaluating the trade-offs between these goals. We propose a flow-based framework to evaluate real-time shortfalls from maximum employment, focusing on unemployment and participation cycles. This approach highlights that employment stability—driven by improved job-finding and reduced job-loss rates—is the primary factor behind procyclicality of participation, rather than labor force entry. Moreover, we show that cyclical recoveries in participation are bound to lag those in unemployment—even during fast recoveries. We link unemployment dynamics to price stability by estimating a New Keynesian Phillips curve (NKPC) using data on labor market flows, prices, wages, and inflation expectations. Our findings suggest that the natural rate of unemployment, u*, rose significantly following the pandemic, reflecting declines in job-filling rates, reduced matching efficiency, and a persistent increase in workers' real reservation wages. The model interprets the recent disinflation episode as a soft landing through rising expectations of a weaker labor market coinciding with the FOMC's tightening cycle. This observation emphasizes the forward-looking nature of inflation dynamics.
papers.zh_title: 评估最大就业：基于劳动力流动的方法
papers.zh_abstract: 美联储的双重使命——实现最大就业和物价稳定——要求监测广泛的指标并仔细评估这些目标之间的权衡。我们提出了一个基于劳动力流动的框架，用于评估实时情况下与最大就业的差距，重点关注失业和劳动参与率周期。该方法强调，就业稳定性——由改善的求职成功率和降低的失业风险驱动——是劳动参与率顺周期性的主要因素，而非劳动力进入。此外，我们表明，即使在快速复苏期间，劳动参与率的周期性回升也必然滞后于失业率的回升。我们通过使用劳动力流动、价格、工资和通胀预期的数据估计新凯恩斯菲利普斯曲线，将失业动态与物价稳定性联系起来。我们的研究结果表明，疫情后自然失业率显著上升，这反映了职位填补率下降、匹配效率降低以及工人实际保留工资的持续增长。该模型将近期的去通胀事件解释为一次软着陆，其机制是劳动力市场疲软预期的上升与联邦公开市场委员会紧缩周期同时发生。这一观察强调了通胀动态的前瞻性特征。

papers.title: Trade and Industrial Policy in Supply Chains: Directed Technological Change in Rare Earths
papers.authors: Laura Alfaro, Harald Fadinger, Jan S. Schymik, Gede Virananda
papers.abstract: Trade and industrial policies restricting critical inputs can inadvertently promote foreign downstream industries via a directed technological response. We provide evidence for this mechanism by examining rare earth elements (REEs) – critical manufacturing inputs with highly concentrated production and low substitutability. We show that China’s REE export restrictions in 2010 induced a surge in global innovation increasing REE input-efficiency and exports in REE-intensive industries. A quantitative trade model with Heckscher-Ohlin-based comparative advantage, directed technological change and input-output linkages rationalizes how input-supply restrictions induce REE-enhancing innovation and expand REE-intensive industries abroad. This directed technological response substantially mitigates foreign welfare losses.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, PR；JEL：E0, E6, F02, F13, F14, F42, F6, O1, O33, O47
papers.zh_title: 供应链中的贸易与产业政策：稀土领域的定向技术变革
papers.zh_abstract: 限制关键投入品的贸易和产业政策，可能通过定向技术响应，无意中促进外国下游产业的发展。我们通过考察稀土元素——一种生产高度集中且可替代性低的关键制造投入品——为这一机制提供了证据。我们表明，中国2010年对稀土出口的限制，引发了全球创新的激增，提高了稀土投入效率，并增加了稀土密集型产业的出口。一个基于赫克歇尔-俄林比较优势、定向技术变革和投入产出联系的定量贸易模型，解释了投入品供应限制如何诱导稀土增强型创新，并扩大国外稀土密集型产业。这种定向技术响应显著减轻了外国的福利损失。

papers.title: America's Housing Supply Problem: The Closing of the Suburban Frontier?
papers.authors: Edward L. Glaeser, Joseph Gyourko
papers.abstract: Housing prices across much of America have hit historic highs, while less housing is being built. If the U.S. housing stock had expanded at the same rate from 2000-2020 as it did from 1980-2000, there would be 15 million more housing units. This paper analyzes the decline of America’s new housing supply, focusing on large sunbelt markets such as Atlanta, Dallas, Miami and Phoenix that were once building superstars. New housing growth rates have decreased and converged across these and many other metros, and prices have risen most where new supply has fallen the most. A model illustrates that structural estimation of long-term supply elasticity is difficult because variables that make places more attractive are likely to change neighborhood composition, which itself is likely to influence permitting. Our framework also suggests that as barriers to building become more important and heterogeneous across place, the positive connection between building and home prices and the negative connection between building and density will both attenuate. We document both of these trends throughout America’s housing markets. In the sunbelt, these changes manifest as substantially less building in lower density census tracts with higher home prices. America’s suburban frontier appears to be closing.
papers.zh_title: 美国的住房供应问题：郊区前沿的关闭？
papers.zh_abstract: 美国大部分地区的房价已创历史新高，而住房建设却在减少。如果美国住房存量在2000年至2020年间以1980年至2000年相同的速度扩张，那么将多出1500万套住房单元。本文分析了美国新房供应下降的原因，重点关注亚特兰大、达拉斯、迈阿密和菲尼克斯等曾经的建设明星——大型阳光地带市场。在这些城市及许多其他大都市，新房增长率已下降并趋同，而新房供应下降最多的地区房价涨幅最大。一个模型表明，长期供应弹性的结构性估计很困难，因为使地方更具吸引力的变量可能会改变社区构成，而社区构成本身又可能影响许可审批。我们的框架还表明，随着建设障碍在不同地区变得更重要且更具异质性，建设与房价之间的正相关关系以及建设与密度之间的负相关关系都将减弱。我们记录了美国住房市场中的这两种趋势。在阳光地带，这些变化表现为在房价较高、密度较低的人口普查区建设大幅减少。美国的郊区前沿似乎正在关闭。

papers.title: Collateral and Secured Debt
papers.authors: Adriano A. Rampini, S. Viswanathan
papers.abstract: We argue that firms’ assets, especially their tangible assets, serve as collateral restricting both secured and unsecured debt. Secured debt is explicitly collateralized, placing a lien on specific assets, which facilitates enforcement. Unsecured debt is backed by unencumbered assets and thus implicitly collateralized. The explicit collateralization of secured debt entails costs but enables higher leverage. Therefore, financially constrained firms use more secured debt both across and within firms. Our dynamic model is consistent with stylized facts on the relation between secured debt and measures of financial constraints and between leverage and tangible assets, and with evidence from a causal forest.
papers.zh_title: 抵押品与担保债务
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为，企业的资产，尤其是其有形资产，作为抵押品限制了担保债务和无担保债务。担保债务是明确以抵押品担保的，对特定资产设置留置权，这有助于执行。无担保债务由未设押资产支持，因此是隐含的抵押品担保。担保债务的明确抵押担保会产生成本，但能够实现更高的杠杆率。因此，财务受限的企业在跨企业和企业内部都使用更多的担保债务。我们的动态模型与关于担保债务与财务约束指标之间关系、杠杆率与有形资产之间关系的典型事实，以及与来自因果森林的证据是一致的。

papers.title: Why Do Households Save and Work?
papers.authors: Margherita Borella, Mariacristina De Nardi, Fang Yang, Johanna P. Torres Chain
papers.abstract: This paper quantifies why households save and work using a life-cycle model that incorporates wage risk, endogenous labor supply of both spouses, marital transitions, health, medical expenses, mortality, and bequest motives at the death of the first and last household member. We estimate it using PSID and HRS data and conduct counterfactuals to assess the quantitative role of individual mechanisms. Precautionary saving against wage risk is smaller than in models that abstract from labor supply and within-household insurance. Bequest motives and medical expenses remain important drivers of wealth, while marriage and divorce generate large but offsetting effects across household types.
papers.zh_title: 家庭为何储蓄和工作？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文使用一个生命周期模型来量化家庭储蓄和工作的原因，该模型包含了工资风险、夫妻双方的内生劳动供给、婚姻转变、健康状况、医疗支出、死亡率以及首位和末位家庭成员去世时的遗赠动机。我们使用PSID和HRS数据对其进行估计，并进行反事实分析以评估各个机制的定量作用。针对工资风险的预防性储蓄小于那些忽略劳动供给和家庭内部保险的模型所得到的结果。遗赠动机和医疗支出仍然是财富的重要驱动因素，而婚姻和离婚则在不同家庭类型之间产生了巨大但相互抵消的影响。

papers.title: Social and Health Outcomes around Divorce: Evidence from New Zealand
papers.authors: Kabir Dasgupta, Andrew C. Johnston, Linda Kirkpatrick, Maxim N. Massenkoff, Alexander Plum
papers.abstract: How does family breakdown and divorce affect spouses and their children? We provide new evidence using a matched difference-in-differences design in rich administrative data from New Zealand. While most outcomes remain stable prior to separation, parents' mental health deteriorates in the lead-up. At separation, men's employment falls while women's rises, and women become much more likely to receive government benefits. Men temporarily double their criminal offending; about a third of the increase is domestic disputes. Both parents become more likely to be the victim of non-domestic crime as well. As for mental health, parents become more anxious and depressed at separation, and these remain elevated well after the couple has parted. Their children, too, face increased risks after separation: anxiety, depression, school absenteeism, and crime victimization all rise.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I31, J12, J13, J21
papers.zh_title: 离婚前后的社会与健康结果：来自新西兰的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 家庭破裂和离婚如何影响配偶及其子女？我们利用新西兰丰富的行政数据，采用匹配的双重差分设计提供了新的证据。虽然大多数结果在分居前保持稳定，但父母的心理健康在分居前会恶化。在分居时，男性的就业下降而女性的就业上升，女性领取政府福利的可能性大大增加。男性的犯罪率暂时翻倍；其中约三分之一的增长来自家庭纠纷。父母双方成为非家庭犯罪受害者的可能性也增加了。在心理健康方面，父母在分居时变得更加焦虑和抑郁，并且在夫妻分开后很长一段时间内仍处于较高水平。他们的子女在分居后也面临更大的风险：焦虑、抑郁、逃学和成为犯罪受害者的比例均有所上升。

papers.title: How Longevity and Health Information Shapes Retirement Advice
papers.authors: Abigail Hurwitz, Olivia S. Mitchell
papers.abstract: We investigate how advisors’ own health and survival assessments, and information about their advisees’ health and survival probabilities, shape their recommendations regarding retirement spending and investment. Using experiments involving amateur and professional advisors, we show that advisors’ self-assessments have only mild effects on their recommendations, but they do respond differently when provided longevity and health information about their advisees. Moreover, amateur advisors mainly react to simple cues, while professional advisors are more sensitive to client-specific information. While many rely on informal advice from friends or family, amateurs often cannot accurately analyze and utilize key information needed to provide suitable advice.
papers.zh_title: 寿命与健康信息如何塑造退休建议
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了顾问自身的健康和生存评估，以及关于其咨询对象的健康和生存概率的信息，如何影响他们关于退休支出和投资的建议。通过涉及业余顾问和专业顾问的实验，我们表明，顾问的自我评估对其建议只有轻微影响，但当他们获得关于咨询对象的寿命和健康信息时，他们的反应确实不同。此外，业余顾问主要对简单的线索做出反应，而专业顾问对客户特定信息更为敏感。尽管许多人依赖来自朋友或家人的非正式建议，但业余顾问通常无法准确分析和利用提供合适建议所需的关键信息。

papers.title: Local Projections or VARs? A Primer for Macroeconomists
papers.authors: José Luis Montiel Olea, Mikkel Plagborg-Møller, Eric Qian, Christian K. Wolf
papers.abstract: What should applied macroeconomists know about local projection (LP) and vector autoregression (VAR) impulse response estimators? The two methods share the same estimand, but in finite samples lie on opposite ends of a bias-variance trade-off. While the low bias of LPs comes at a quite steep variance cost, this cost must be paid to achieve robust uncertainty assessments. Hence, when the goal is to convey what can be learned about dynamic causal effects from the data, VARs should only be used with long lag lengths, ensuring equivalence with LP. For LP estimation, we provide guidance on selection of lag length and controls, bias correction, and confidence interval construction.
papers.zh_title: 局部投影还是VAR？宏观经济学家入门指南
papers.zh_abstract: 应用宏观经济学家应该了解局部投影（LP）和向量自回归（VAR）脉冲响应估计量的哪些内容？这两种方法具有相同的估计目标，但在有限样本中处于偏差-方差权衡的两端。虽然LP的低偏差是以相当高的方差成本为代价的，但必须支付这一成本才能实现稳健的不确定性评估。因此，当目标是传达可以从数据中学到的关于动态因果效应的信息时，VAR只应在使用较长滞后阶数的情况下使用，以确保与LP等价。对于LP估计，我们提供了关于滞后阶数和控制变量选择、偏差校正以及置信区间构建的指导。

papers.title: Why Are Superstar Firms the Best Places to Work? Competitive Advantage in Amenity Provision and the Declining Labor Share
papers.authors: Ioannis Branikas, Briana Chang, Harrison Hong, Nan Li
papers.abstract: Why are superstar firms the best places to work? We document that worker satisfaction scales nearly twice as fast as wages with firm size. Our assignment model distinguishes selection (talent sorting) from competitive advantage (amenity provision); amenity-cost advantages cause utility to rise more steeply than wages. Using Glassdoor data, competitive advantage explains roughly half of the utility increase with firm size. As workers increasingly value non-pecuniary amenities, superstar firms with a cost advantage substitute wages for amenities, raising profits and reducing the measured labor share all while raising worker utility. Declining labor shares need not signal deteriorating worker welfare.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS；JEL：G0, G3, G39, J3, J31, J33
papers.zh_title: 为什么超级明星企业是最好的工作场所？福利供给的竞争优势与劳动份额下降
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么超级明星企业是最好的工作场所？我们记录了员工满意度随企业规模增长的速度几乎是工资增长速度的两倍。我们的分配模型区分了选择（人才分类）和竞争优势（福利供给）；福利-成本优势导致效用比工资增长得更陡峭。利用Glassdoor数据，竞争优势解释了约一半的效用随企业规模的增长。随着工人越来越重视非金钱福利，具有成本优势的超级明星企业用福利替代工资，提高了利润并降低了衡量的劳动份额，同时提高了工人效用。劳动份额下降不一定意味着工人福利恶化。

papers.title: What Explains Growing Gender and Racial Education Gaps?
papers.authors: Zvi Eckstein, Michael P. Keane, Osnat Lifshitz
papers.abstract: In the 1960 cohort, American men and women graduated from college at similar rates, and this was true for Whites, Blacks and Hispanics. But in more recent cohorts, women graduate at much higher rates than men. Gaps between race/ethnic groups have also widened. To understand these patterns, we develop a model of individual and family decision-making where education, labor supply, marriage and fertility are all endogenous. Assuming stable preferences, our model explains changes in education for the ‘60-‘80 cohorts based on three exogenous factors: family background, labor market and marriage market constraints. We find changes in parental background account for 1/4 of the growth in women’s college graduation from the ’60 to ’80 cohort. The marriage market accounts for 1/5 and the labor market explains the rest. Thus, parent education plays an important role in generating social mobility, enabling us to predict future evolution of college graduation rates due to this factor. We predict White women’s graduation rate will plateau, while that of Hispanic and Black women will grow rapidly. But the aggregate graduation rate will grow very slowly due to the increasing Hispanic share of the population.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, ED, LS；JEL：D15, J11, J13, J15
papers.zh_title: 是什么解释了日益扩大的性别和种族教育差距？
papers.zh_abstract: 在1960年出生队列中，美国男性和女性的大学毕业率相似，对于白人、黑人和西班牙裔也是如此。但在更近期的队列中，女性的大学毕业率远高于男性。种族/民族群体之间的差距也在扩大。为了理解这些模式，我们建立了一个个人和家庭决策模型，其中教育、劳动供给、婚姻和生育都是内生的。假设偏好稳定，我们的模型基于三个外生因素——家庭背景、劳动力市场和婚姻市场约束——解释了'60至'80队列的教育变化。我们发现，从'60到'80队列，父母背景的变化解释了女性大学毕业率增长的四分之一。婚姻市场解释了五分之一，劳动力市场解释了其余部分。因此，父母教育在产生社会流动性方面发挥着重要作用，使我们能够预测未来因这一因素导致的大学毕业率演变。我们预测白人女性的毕业率将趋于平稳，而西班牙裔和黑人女性的毕业率将快速增长。但由于西班牙裔人口比例不断增加，总体毕业率将增长非常缓慢。

papers.title: A Quantitative Theory of Heterogeneous Returns to Wealth
papers.authors: Guido Menzio, Saverio Spinella
papers.abstract: Recent empirical evidence documents that different individuals earn systematically different rates of return, even after controlling for portfolio composition. We propose a general equilibrium theory of residual heterogeneity in rates of return on wealth by embedding a financial market with search frictions into a monetary incomplete-market model. We show that the distribution of rates of return offered in the financial market is endogenous and depends on the marginal product of capital, the return on fiat money, and the joint distribution of households across wealth and financial human capital. When calibrated, the model succeeds in reproducing the extent of residual dispersion in returns to wealth across individuals. We use the calibrated model to study various policies and counterfactuals, with a particular focus on monetary policy.
papers.zh_title: 财富回报异质性的定量理论
papers.zh_abstract: 近期经验证据表明，即使控制了投资组合构成，不同个体获得的回报率也存在系统性差异。我们通过将存在搜索摩擦的金融市场嵌入货币性不完全市场模型，提出了财富回报率残差异质性的—般均衡理论。我们证明，金融市场提供的回报率分布是内生的，取决于资本边际产出、法定货币回报率以及家庭在财富和金融人力资本上的联合分布。校准后，该模型成功再现了个体间财富回报残差离散程度。我们利用校准模型研究各种政策和反事实情景，特别关注货币政策。

papers.title: Artificial Intelligence and Technological Unemployment
papers.authors: Ping Wang, Tsz-Nga Wong
papers.abstract: How large is the impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on labor productivity and unemployment? This paper introduces a labor-search model of technological unemployment, conceptualizing the generative aspect of AI as a learning-by-using technology. AI capability improves through machine learning from workers and in turn enhances their labor productivity, but eventually displaces workers if wage renegotiation fails. Three distinct equilibria emerge: no AI, some AI with higher unemployment, or unbounded AI with sustained endogenous growth and little impact on employment. By calibrating to the U.S. data, our model predicts more than threefold improvements in productivity in some-AI steady state, alongside a long-run employment loss of 23%, with half this loss occurring over the initial five-year transition. Plausible change in parameter values could lead to global and local indeterminacy. The mechanism highlights the considerable uncertainty of AI's impacts in the presence of labor-market frictions. In the unbounded-AI equilibrium, technological unemployment would not occur. We further show that equilibria are inefficient despite adherence to the Hosios condition. By improving job-finding rate and labor productivity, the optimal subsidy to jobs facing the replacement risk of AI can generate a welfare gain from 26.6% in the short run to over 50% in the long run.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能与技术性失业
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能对劳动生产率和失业的影响有多大？本文引入了一个技术性失业的劳动搜索模型，将人工智能的生成性方面概念化为一种边用边学的技术。人工智能能力通过从工人那里进行机器学习而提升，进而提高工人的劳动生产率，但如果工资重新谈判失败，最终会取代工人。出现了三种不同的均衡：无人工智能、存在人工智能但失业率更高、或无限人工智能伴随持续内生增长且对就业影响甚微。通过校准至美国数据，我们的模型预测在存在人工智能的稳态下，生产率提高三倍以上，同时长期就业损失为23%，其中一半损失发生在最初的五年过渡期内。参数值的合理变化可能导致全局和局部不确定性。该机制凸显了在存在劳动力市场摩擦的情况下，人工智能影响的巨大不确定性。在无限人工智能均衡中，技术性失业不会发生。我们进一步证明，尽管遵循Hosios条件，均衡仍是低效的。通过提高工作发现率和劳动生产率，针对面临被人工智能替代风险的工作的最优补贴，可以在短期内产生26.6%的福利收益，长期则超过50%。

papers.title: Collusion through Common Leadership
papers.authors: Alejandro Herrera-Caicedo, Jessica Jeffers, Elena Prager
papers.abstract: This paper studies whether common leadership, defined as two firms sharing executives or board directors, contributes to collusion. Using an explicit measure of labor market collusion from unsealed court evidence, we find that the probability of collusion between two firms increases by 11 percentage points after the onset of common leadership, a ninefold increase over the baseline rate. These results are not driven by closeness of product or labor market competition. Our findings are consistent with the increasing attention toward common leadership under Clayton Act Section 8.
papers.zh_title: 通过共同领导进行合谋
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究共同领导（即两家公司共享高管或董事会成员）是否有助于合谋。利用来自未密封法庭证据的劳动力市场合谋的明确度量，我们发现，在共同领导开始后，两家公司之间合谋的概率增加了11个百分点，是基准率的九倍。这些结果并非由产品或劳动力市场竞争的接近程度驱动。我们的发现与《克莱顿法案》第8条下对共同领导日益增长的关注相一致。

papers.title: Job Sorting and the Labor Market Effects of a Criminal Record
papers.authors: Randi Hjalmarsson, Matthew J. Lindquist, Louis-Pierre Lepage, Conrad Miller
papers.abstract: We examine the effects of a criminal record on labor market outcomes and the mediating role of job sorting using Swedish register data. Prime-age adults with criminal records earn about 30% less than observably similar adults without records and are concentrated in specific employers and occupations. To estimate the causal effect of a criminal record, we use an event study design that compares outcomes for adults charged with an offense for the first time to matched adults who were suspected of a similar offense but not charged. Acquiring a criminal record reduces months employed by 2% and annual earnings by 5%. These negative effects are: twice as large for more serious or subsequent charges, not driven by job displacement or incapacitation, and not mitigated by automatic record expungement, which typically occurs 5 or 10 years after case disposition. We classify firms by their propensity to hire workers with criminal records, holding suspected offense history fixed. A criminal record reduces employment at firms classified as less likely to hire workers with criminal records, increases employment at other firms, and decreases monthly earnings across all firm types. Firm propensity to hire workers with criminal records varies substantially—even within industries—and is linked to firm size and managers’ prior exposure to people with records. Leveraging manager moves across small firms, we find that when a firm hires a new manager with greater prior exposure to people with criminal records, it hires more people with records, with no detectable effect on productivity.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS；JEL：J30, J6, J71, K42, M51
papers.zh_title: 工作分类与犯罪记录的劳动力市场效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用瑞典登记数据，研究了犯罪记录对劳动力市场结果的影响以及工作分类的中介作用。有犯罪记录的壮年成年人比观察特征相似的无记录成年人收入低约30%，并且集中在特定的雇主和职业中。为了估计犯罪记录的因果效应，我们采用事件研究设计，将首次被指控犯罪的成年人的结果与匹配的因类似罪行被怀疑但未被指控的成年人进行比较。获得犯罪记录使就业月数减少2%，年收入减少5%。这些负面效应：对于更严重或后续指控，其影响加倍；并非由工作置换或失能效应驱动；也不会因通常在案件处理后5年或10年发生的自动记录消除而减轻。我们根据企业雇佣有犯罪记录工人的倾向对其进行分类，同时固定被怀疑的犯罪历史。犯罪记录减少了在被归类为不太可能雇佣有犯罪记录工人的企业中的就业，增加了在其他企业中的就业，并降低了所有类型企业的月收入。企业雇佣有犯罪记录工人的倾向差异很大——即使在行业内部——并且与企业规模以及管理者之前接触有记录人员的经历有关。利用管理者在小型企业间的流动，我们发现，当一家企业雇佣了一位之前接触有犯罪记录人员更多的新管理者时，它会雇佣更多有记录的人，而对生产率没有可检测的影响。

papers.title: Climbing the Energy Ladder: How Energy Resources Hinder, Facilitate, and Fuel Economic Growth
papers.authors: Derek Lemoine
papers.abstract: I show that the nature of the energy resources available to an economy qualitatively determines long-run growth outcomes. A harvested resource such as biomass drags on growth, a mined resource such as coal enables output per capita to hold constant, and both a tapped resource such as oil and a manufactured resource such as solar panels risk degrowth if energy return on energy invested (EROI) cannot stay above a threshold. The only energy resource that can fuel long-run growth is a manufactured resource such as solar panels. Either that resource must rely on substitutable energy inputs that have a sufficiently large EROI, or it must be produced by robots that are themselves produced from robots and energy. Even in these cases, coal and oil economies may have been necessary stages on the way from a biomass economy to a solar economy.
papers.zh_title: 攀登能源阶梯：能源资源如何阻碍、促进和推动经济增长
papers.zh_abstract: 我证明，经济体可获得的能源资源的性质在质上决定了长期增长结果。诸如生物质能之类的收获型资源会拖累增长，诸如煤炭之类的开采型资源能使人均产出保持不变，而诸如石油之类的开采型资源和诸如太阳能电池板之类的制造型资源，如果能源投资回报率不能保持在阈值以上，则都存在增长下降的风险。唯一能够推动长期增长的能源资源是诸如太阳能电池板之类的制造型资源。这种资源要么必须依赖具有足够大能源投资回报率的可替代能源投入，要么必须由机器人生产，而这些机器人本身又由机器人和能源生产。即使在这些情况下，煤炭和石油经济可能也是从生物质经济走向太阳能经济的必要阶段。

papers.title: Administrative Fragmentation in Health Care
papers.authors: Riley League, Maggie Shi
papers.abstract: This paper examines the impact of reducing the administrative fragmentation of billing and payment, one commonly cited cause of inefficiency in US health care. We study a Medicare reform that consolidated billing processes across service types, using its staggered rollout and hospitals’ prior levels of administrative fragmentation for identification. The reform dramatically reduced fragmentation and modestly lowered claim denial rates but had no effect on spending, post-discharge care, or rehospitalizations. It also did not affect administrative costs or technology adoption. These findings suggest that addressing administrative fragmentation alone is unlikely to significantly improve health care efficiency.
papers.zh_title: 医疗保健中的行政碎片化
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了减少账单和支付的行政碎片化（美国医疗保健中一个常被引用的低效率原因）的影响。我们研究了一项整合了不同服务类型账单流程的医疗保险改革，利用其分阶段推出以及医院先前的行政碎片化水平进行识别。该改革显著减少了碎片化，并适度降低了索赔拒绝率，但对支出、出院后护理或再住院没有影响。它也没有影响行政成本或技术采用。这些发现表明，仅解决行政碎片化问题不太可能显著提高医疗保健效率。

papers.title: City Size, Monopsony, and the Employment Effects of Minimum Wages
papers.authors: Priyaranjan Jha, Jyotsana Kala, David Neumark, Antonio Rodriguez-Lopez
papers.abstract: We assess how minimum wage effects on restaurant employment in the U.S. vary with labor market size and monopsony power. Using city-level data, we construct monopsony proxies based on labor flows and concentration. Minimum wages bind less in larger cities, consistent with the urban wage premium, and omitting this relationship overstates how labor market power reduces adverse employment effects of minimum wages. Nonetheless, accounting for city size, lower job market fluidity is linked to weaker negative employment effects, consistent with search models. By contrast, traditional concentration measures do not consistently predict variation in the effects of minimum wages.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LE, LS, PE；JEL：J38, J42, R23
papers.zh_title: 城市规模、买方垄断与最低工资的就业效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了美国最低工资对餐饮业就业的影响如何随劳动力市场规模和买方垄断势力而变化。利用城市层面数据，我们基于劳动力流动和集中度构建了买方垄断代理变量。最低工资在大城市约束力较弱，这与城市工资溢价一致，忽略这种关系会高估劳动力市场势力减少最低工资不利就业效应的程度。尽管如此，在考虑城市规模后，较低的就业市场流动性（job market fluidity）与较弱的负面就业效应相关，这与搜索模型一致。相比之下，传统的集中度指标并不能一致地预测最低工资效应的变化。

papers.title: The Effects of Switching Electronic Health Record Developer on Specialty Referrals
papers.authors: Bingjin Xue, Chad Meyerhoefer
papers.abstract: We use national physician-pair panel data to examine how switching electronic health record (EHR) developers affects out-of-network referrals from primary care physicians (PCPs) to specialists. We estimate a difference-in-differences model, exploiting changes in EHR developer adoption by physicians’ affiliated hospitals. After a change in the PCP’s EHR developer, referrals to same-developer specialists increase by 5.8%, and referrals to specialists using the PCP’s prior EHR decrease by 4.2%. Referrals to the PCP’s most commonly referred-to specialists are not affected by changes in EHR developer, but shifts in referral patterns are particularly pronounced when the PCP is male and the specialist is female, when the PCP has more experience than the specialist and when the new EHR developer has a majority market share. These results are robust to estimation approaches that account for heterogenous treatment effects and physician selection into hospital systems. Our theoretical model indicates that PCP preferences for convenience may reduce referrals to the highest-quality specialists and lead to EHR market agglomeration, presenting a possible economic rationale for antitrust regulation of information blocking.
papers.zh_title: 切换电子健康记录开发商对专科转诊的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用全国性的医生配对面板数据，研究切换电子健康记录开发商如何影响从初级保健医生到专科医生的网络外转诊。我们采用双重差分模型，利用医生所属医院在电子健康记录开发商采用上的变化进行识别。在初级保健医生的电子健康记录开发商变更后，向同一开发商专科医生的转诊增加了5.8%，而向使用初级保健医生先前电子健康记录的专科医生的转诊减少了4.2%。向初级保健医生最常转诊的专科医生的转诊不受电子健康记录开发商变化的影响，但当初级保健医生为男性且专科医生为女性、初级保健医生比专科医生更有经验、以及新电子健康记录开发商拥有多数市场份额时，转诊模式的转变尤为明显。这些结果对于考虑异质性处理效应和医生选择进入医院系统的估计方法都是稳健的。我们的理论模型表明，初级保健医生对便利性的偏好可能会减少向最高质量专科医生的转诊，并导致电子健康记录市场集聚，这为信息封锁的反垄断监管提供了可能的经济学依据。

papers.title: Racial Disparities in Mortality by Sex, Age, and Cause of Death
papers.authors: Robert Kaestner, Anuj Gangopadhyaya, Cuiping Schiman
papers.abstract: Racial differences in mortality are large, persistent and likely caused, at least in part, by racism. While the causal pathways linking racism to mortality are conceptually well defined, empirical evidence to support causal claims related to its effect on health is incomplete. In this study, we provide a unique set of facts about racial disparities in mortality that all theories of racism and health need to confront to be convincing. We measure racial disparities in mortality between ages 40 and 80 for both males and females and for several causes of death and, measure how those disparities change with age. Estimates indicate that racial disparities in mortality grow with age but at a decreasing rate. Estimates also indicate that the source of racial disparities in mortality changes with age, sex and cause of death. For men in their fifties, racial disparities in mortality are primarily caused by disparities in deaths due to external causes. For both sexes, it is racial disparities in death from healthcare amenable causes that are the main cause of racial disparities in mortality between ages 55 and 75. Notably, racial disparities in cancer and other causes of death are relatively small even though these causes of death account for over half of all deaths. Adjusting for economic resources and health largely eliminate racial disparities in mortality at all ages and the mediating effect of these factors grows with age. The pattern of results suggests that, to the extent that racism influences health, it is primarily through racism’s effect on investments to treat healthcare amenable diseases that cause racial disparities in mortality.
papers.zh_title: 按性别、年龄和死因划分的死亡率种族差异
papers.zh_abstract: 死亡率方面的种族差异巨大且持续存在，并且至少部分是由种族主义造成的。尽管将种族主义与死亡率联系起来的因果路径在概念上定义明确，但支持其影响健康这一因果主张的经验证据尚不完整。在本研究中，我们提供了一组关于死亡率种族差异的独特事实，所有关于种族主义和健康的理论都需要面对这些事实才能令人信服。我们测量了40至80岁之间男性和女性以及多种死因的死亡率种族差异，并测量了这些差异如何随年龄变化。估计表明，死亡率种族差异随年龄增长而扩大，但增速递减。估计还表明，死亡率种族差异的来源随年龄、性别和死因而变化。对于五十多岁的男性，死亡率种族差异主要由外部原因导致的死亡差异引起。对于两性而言，在55至75岁之间，可医疗干预原因导致的死亡种族差异是死亡率种族差异的主要原因。值得注意的是，癌症和其他死因的种族差异相对较小，尽管这些死因占所有死亡的一半以上。调整经济资源和健康状况后，几乎消除了所有年龄段的死亡率种族差异，并且这些因素的中介效应随年龄增长而增强。结果模式表明，就种族主义影响健康而言，它主要是通过种族主义对治疗可医疗干预疾病的投资产生影响，从而导致了死亡率种族差异。

papers.title: Republican Support and Economic Hardship: The Enduring Effects of the Opioid Epidemic
papers.authors: Carolina Arteaga, Victoria Barone
papers.abstract: In this paper, we establish a causal connection between two of the most salient social developments in the United States over the past decades: the opioid epidemic and the political realignment between the Republican and Democratic parties. Drawing on unsealed records from litigation against Purdue Pharma, we uncover rich geographic variation in the marketing of prescription opioids that serves as a quasi-exogenous source of exposure to the epidemic. We use this variation to document significant increases in drug-related mortality and greater reliance on public transfer programs. This induced economic hardship led to substantial changes in the political landscape of the communities most affected by the opioid epidemic. We estimate that from the mid-2000s to 2022, exposure to the opioid epidemic continuously increased the Republican vote share in House, presidential, and gubernatorial elections. By the 2022 House elections, a one-standard-deviation increase in our measure of exposure led to a 4.5 percentage point increase in the Republican vote share. From 2012 until 2022, this increase in the House vote share translated into Republicans winning additional seats.
papers.zh_title: 共和党支持与经济困境：阿片类药物流行的持久影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们建立了美国过去几十年中两个最显著的社会发展之间的因果关系：阿片类药物流行以及共和党与民主党之间的政治重组。利用针对普渡制药诉讼中解封的记录，我们发现了处方阿片类药物营销中丰富的地区差异，这构成了接触该流行病的准外生来源。我们利用这种差异记录了药物相关死亡率的显著增加以及对公共转移支付项目更大的依赖。这种诱发的经济困境导致了受阿片类药物流行影响最严重的社区政治格局的重大变化。我们估计，从2000年代中期到2022年，接触阿片类药物流行持续增加了共和党在众议院、总统和州长选举中的得票率。到2022年众议院选举时，我们的接触度衡量指标每增加一个标准差，共和党得票率就会增加4.5个百分点。从2012年到2022年，众议院得票率的这种增加转化为共和党赢得了额外的席位。

papers.title: Pushing the Envelope: The Effects of Salary Negotiations
papers.authors: Zoë B. Cullen, Bobak Pakzad-Hurson, Ricardo Perez-Truglia
papers.abstract: Salary negotiations are a widespread phenomenon that can shape key labor market outcomes, including welfare and inequality. We provide novel empirical and theoretical insights into the causes and consequences of salary negotiations. We conducted two field experiments involving over 3,100 job seekers in the U.S. tech sector, designed to examine two types of information frictions. We find that a light-touch encouragement intervention significantly increased both negotiation attempts and compensation gains. In contrast, providing a substantial discount on negotiation coaching did not significantly affect negotiation attempts. We develop a new model of salary negotiations, incorporating risk and information frictions, that can better explain our experimental and non-experimental findings. The model’s equilibrium analysis indicates that policies encouraging negotiation can enhance both welfare and equity.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：C9, D80, J30, J38, J7
papers.zh_title: 挑战极限：薪资谈判的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 薪资谈判是一种普遍现象，可以塑造关键的劳动力市场结果，包括福利和不平等。我们对薪资谈判的原因和后果提供了新颖的经验和理论见解。我们进行了两项涉及美国科技行业超过3100名求职者的实地实验，旨在考察两种类型的信息摩擦。我们发现，一种轻触式的鼓励干预显著增加了谈判尝试和薪酬收益。相比之下，为谈判辅导提供大幅折扣并未显著影响谈判尝试。我们开发了一个新的薪资谈判模型，纳入了风险和摩擦因素，可以更好地解释我们的实验和非实验发现。该模型的均衡分析表明，鼓励谈判的政策可以增强福利和公平性。

papers.title: The French Touch: Product Quality and France’s Great Trade Liberalization, 1850-1874
papers.authors: Stéphane Becuwe, Bertrand Blancheton, Christopher M. Meissner
papers.abstract: We explore changes in product quality during France’s major liberalization episode of the mid-nineteenth century. Using new data and existing techniques from the international trade literature, we investigate the relative quality of French products versus those of international competitors, within industry changes in quality, and within product quality changes. France produced relatively high quality/high unit value products in the traded sector throughout the period. Liberalization was associated with an overall decline in the quality of French exports. However, some of the best-selling exports experienced an apparent rise in quality around the time of liberalization. As for imports, while French spending may have switched to lower quality products due to liberalization, lower tariffs were associated with rising within product quality.
papers.zh_title: 法式风情：产品质量与法国的大贸易自由化（1850-1874）
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了19世纪中叶法国重大自由化时期产品质量的变化。利用国际贸易文献中的新数据和现有技术，我们研究了法国产品相对于国际竞争对手的相对质量、行业内的质量变化以及产品内的质量变化。在整个时期内，法国在贸易部门生产了相对高质量/高单位价值的产品。自由化与法国出口质量的整体下降相关。然而，一些最畅销的出口产品在自由化前后质量出现了明显上升。至于进口，虽然由于自由化，法国的支出可能转向了较低质量的产品，但较低的关税与产品内质量的上升相关。

papers.title: Measuring Markets for Network Goods
papers.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Matthew Gentzkow, Rafael Jiménez-Durán, Aaron Leonard, Filip Milojević, Christopher Roth
papers.abstract: Market definition is challenging in settings with network effects, where substitution patterns depend on changes in network size. We study these effects in the context of social media. We conduct an incentivized experiment comparing substitution in response to a proposed U.S. TikTok ban, in which all users simultaneously leave the app, with substitution when only a single user deactivates. We find substantially higher valuations of alternative social apps under a collective TikTok ban than under an individual TikTok deactivation. Mechanism evidence shows that both anticipated content-supply shifts and social coordination partly explain the wedge, with the relative importance of each channel varying across platforms. We then show that a collective time limit challenge, where peers jointly reduce TikTok and Instagram use, leads to more time spent on alternative social apps than has been observed in prior individual deactivation experiments. Together, our results suggest that individual-level substitution estimates can be an unreliable guide to market definition for network goods.
papers.zh_title: 衡量网络商品的市场
papers.zh_abstract: 在存在网络效应的环境中，市场界定具有挑战性，因为替代模式取决于网络规模的变化。我们在社交媒体的背景下研究了这些效应。我们进行了一项激励实验，比较了在拟议的美国TikTok禁令（所有用户同时离开该应用）下的替代行为，与仅单个用户停用时的替代行为。我们发现，在集体TikTok禁令下，对替代社交应用的估值远高于个人TikTok停用下的估值。机制证据表明，预期的内容供给变化和社会协调部分解释了这种差异，且每个渠道的相对重要性因平台而异。然后我们表明，一项集体时间限制挑战（同伴共同减少TikTok和Instagram的使用）导致在替代社交应用上花费的时间多于先前个人停用实验中所观察到的。总之，我们的结果表明，个体层面的替代估计可能不是网络商品市场界定的可靠指南。

papers.title: Financial Firepower: School Shootings and the Strategic Contributions of Pro-Gun PACs
papers.authors: Eric A. Baldwin, Takuma Iwasaki, John J. Donohue
papers.abstract: Fatal school shootings often spark support for stricter gun laws, threatening the gun lobby’s influence and agenda. To prevent political fallout, do pro-gun Political Action Committees increase contributions after fatal school shootings? Leveraging a novel dataset of pro-gun PAC contributions and school shooting incidents, we implement a difference-in-differences design with staggered treatment adoption to estimate the causal effect of school shootings on contributions to House candidates. We find that pro-gun PACs increase contributions by 30.2% to candidates in districts with fatal school shootings, but show no significant response to non-fatal school shootings or other mass shootings. The temporal pattern reveals strategic behavior: contribution spikes emerge in the wake of fatal school shootings and in proximity to elections, with effects dramatically amplified as Election Day approaches; within two months of Election Day, contributions increase by 1,730%. These effects are concentrated in competitive districts (margins of 5%). Our findings provide robust evidence that pro-gun PACs deploy targeted financial contributions in response to school shootings, with the magnitude and timing suggesting a strategic counter-mobilization effort to maintain influence in affected districts when gun policy becomes locally salient and elections are near. Our findings underscore a gap in democratic accountability: while public opinion should drive policy change, organized interests with financial power can insulate political candidates from public pressure and obstruct its translation into legislative reform.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, PE, POL；JEL：C21, C22, C23, D72, D78, K00
papers.zh_title: 金融火力：校园枪击案与支持持枪政治行动委员会的战略性捐款
papers.zh_abstract: 致命的校园枪击事件常常引发对更严格枪支法律的支持，威胁到枪支游说团体的影响力和议程。为了防止政治后果，支持持枪的政治行动委员会（PAC）是否会在致命校园枪击事件后增加捐款？利用一个包含支持持枪PAC捐款和校园枪击事件的新数据集，我们采用交错处理采纳的双重差分设计来估计校园枪击事件对众议院候选人捐款的因果效应。我们发现，在发生致命校园枪击事件的选区，支持持枪的PAC对候选人的捐款增加了30.2%，但对非致命校园枪击事件或其他大规模枪击事件没有显著反应。时间模式揭示了战略性行为：捐款激增出现在致命校园枪击事件发生后以及临近选举时，随着选举日的临近，效应急剧放大；在选举日前两个月内，捐款增加了1730%。这些效应集中在竞争激烈的选区（胜负差距为5%）。我们的研究结果提供了强有力的证据，表明支持持枪的PAC针对校园枪击事件部署了有针对性的金融捐款，其规模和时机表明这是一种战略性的反动员努力，旨在当枪支政策在当地变得突出且选举临近时，在受影响的选区维持影响力。我们的发现强调了民主问责制中的一个缺口：虽然公众舆论应推动政策变革，但拥有金融力量的有组织利益集团可以使政治候选人免受公众压力，并阻碍其转化为立法改革。

papers.title: Public and Private Transit: Evidence from Lagos
papers.authors: Daniel Björkegren, Alice Duhaut, Geetika Nagpal, Nick Tsivanidis
papers.abstract: Private minibuses dominate transport in many developing country cities. They serve 62% of trips in Lagos, the largest city in sub-Saharan Africa. We collect panel data to measure how private minibuses respond to the rollout of a new public bus network. When the government enters a route, minibuses depart less frequently, driver profits fall, and drivers switch to connected routes, reducing prices. We develop a custom app to estimate how commuters trade off prices and wait times in an RCT. The private response harms commuters on treated routes, who wait longer, but benefits those on connected routes, who face only lower prices. Overall, 10% of the commuter welfare gains of building the public transit system arise from the response of private transit. Drivers lose welfare equal to half of the commuter gains.
papers.zh_title: 公共与私人交通：来自拉各斯的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在许多发展中国家的城市，私人小巴主导着交通。在撒哈拉以南非洲最大的城市拉各斯，它们服务于62%的出行。我们收集面板数据来衡量私人小巴如何应对新公共巴士网络的推出。当政府进入一条线路时，小巴发车频率降低，司机利润下降，并且司机转向相连线路，从而降低了价格。我们开发了一个定制应用程序，通过随机对照试验（RCT）来估算通勤者如何在价格和等待时间之间进行权衡。私人反应损害了受处理线路上的通勤者，他们等待时间更长，但使相连线路上的通勤者受益，他们只面临更低的价格。总体而言，建设公共交通系统带来的通勤者福利收益中，有10%来自私人交通的响应。司机损失的福利相当于通勤者收益的一半。

papers.title: A Dynamic Theory of Optimal Tariffs
papers.authors: Eduardo Dávila, Andrés Rodríguez-Clare, Andreas Schaab, Stacy Tan
papers.abstract: The classic tariff formula states that the optimal unilateral tariff equals the inverse of the foreign export supply elasticity. We generalize this result and show that an intertemporal tariff formula characterizes the efficient tariff in a large class of dynamic heterogeneous agent (HA) economies with multiple goods. Intertemporal export supply elasticities and relative tariff revenue weights are sufficient statistics for the optimal tariff that decentralizes the efficient allocation. We also develop a general theory of second-best optimal tariffs. In dynamic HA incomplete markets economies, Ramsey optimal tariffs trade off intertemporal terms of trade manipulation against production efficiency, risk-sharing, and redistribution. Intertemporal export supply elasticities and relative tariff revenue weights remain sufficient statistics for the intertemporal terms of trade manipulation motive of second-best optimal tariffs. We apply our results to a quantitative heterogeneous agent New Keynesian (HANK) model with trade.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, PE；JEL：F13, F41, H21
papers.zh_title: 最优关税的动态理论
papers.zh_abstract: 经典的关税公式指出，最优单边关税等于外国出口供给弹性的倒数。我们将这一结果推广，并证明一个跨期关税公式刻画了在包含多种商品的一大类动态异质性主体（HA）经济体中的有效关税。跨期出口供给弹性和相对关税收入权重是分散有效配置的最优关税的充分统计量。我们还发展了一个关于次优最优关税的一般理论。在动态HA不完全市场经济学中，拉姆齐最优关税在跨期贸易条件操纵与生产效率、风险分担和再分配之间进行权衡。跨期出口供给弹性和相对关税收入权重仍然是次优最优关税的跨期贸易条件操纵动机的充分统计量。我们将我们的结果应用于一个包含贸易的定量异质性主体新凯恩斯（HANK）模型。

papers.title: Public Debt Bubbles, Liquidity, and Risk: Policy Assessments Based on the Zero-Beta Interest Rate
papers.authors: Narayana R. Kocherlakota
papers.abstract: This paper studies stationary equilibria in a novel class of analytically tractable incomplete markets models with a public debt bubble (meaning that the interest rate r̅ on riskfree government bonds is less than the growth rate). Within the models, the return rᴋ to physical capital can exceed r̅ because capital is exposed to aggregate risk and because it is less liquid than public debt. I follow di Tella et al. (2024), and define r_zero to be the zero-beta interest rate (on an asset with no aggregate risk and the same (il)liquidity properties as physical capital). I provide two distinct sufficient conditions in a zero-growth economy under which the government can increase welfare by following a fiscal policy which induces a higher r̅ . The first case is that r_zero < 0 (which also implies that r̅ < 0). The second case is that r̅ < 0 and r_zero (on average) satisfies the aggregate consumption Euler equation. I argue that the estimates of r_zero in di Tella et al. (2024) are in alignment with this second case.
papers.zh_title: 公共债务泡沫、流动性与风险：基于零贝塔利率的政策评估
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一类新颖的、可解析处理的不完全市场模型中的稳态均衡，该模型存在公共债务泡沫（意味着无风险政府债券的利率r̅低于增长率）。在这些模型中，实物资本的回报率rᴋ可能超过r̅，因为资本面临总体风险，并且其流动性低于公共债务。我遵循di Tella等人（2024）的方法，将r_zero定义为零贝塔利率（即一种没有总体风险且与实物资本具有相同（非）流动性特征的资产的利率）。在一个零增长经济体中，我提供了两个不同的充分条件，在这些条件下，政府可以通过实施导致r̅上升的财政政策来提高福利。第一种情况是r_zero < 0（这也意味着r̅ < 0）。第二种情况是r̅ < 0且r_zero（平均而言）满足总消费欧拉方程。我认为di Tella等人（2024）对r_zero的估计与第二种情况一致。

papers.title: On the Measurement of Social Heterogeneity
papers.authors: Klaus Desmet, Ignacio Ortuño-Ortín, Romain Wacziarg
papers.abstract: We discuss a wide range of measures of social heterogeneity, both theoretically and empirically. In our framework, individuals who differ from each other either in terms of their identity traits or of their cultural values experience antagonism toward each other. Depending on the type of interpersonal differences that may give rise to social antagonism, we derive a wide range of microfounded measures of social heterogeneity, many of which have been frequently used in the social sciences to characterize the causes and effects of socially relevant differences between individuals. Using these measures, we explore the worldwide landscape of social heterogeneity. We end our discussion with a consideration of the social, political and economic effects of these various metrics of heterogeneity.
papers.zh_title: 论社会异质性的测量
papers.zh_abstract: 我们从理论和实证两方面讨论了一系列广泛的社会异质性度量指标。在我们的框架中，那些在身份特征或文化价值观上彼此不同的个体之间会产生对抗。根据可能引发社会对抗的人际差异类型，我们推导出了多种具有微观基础的社会异质性度量指标，其中许多指标在社会科学中已被频繁用于刻画个体之间社会相关差异的原因和影响。利用这些指标，我们探索了全球社会异质性的格局。我们以对这些不同异质性指标的社会、政治和经济影响的考量来结束我们的讨论。

papers.title: From Tank to Odometer: Winners and Losers from a Gas-to-VMT Tax Shift
papers.authors: Christopher R. Knittel, Gilbert E. Metcalf, Shereein Saraf
papers.abstract: With the increase in fuel economy of the personal transportation fleet along with the increased penetration of hybrid and electric vehicles, federal motor vehicle fuel excise tax revenue has been steadily declining. This has led to calls for finding a replacement for this tax. One option is to replace the gas tax with a vehicle miles traveled (VMT) tax. To investigate the impact of such a tax swap, we combine data from the 2017 National Household Transportation Survey (NHTS) and the American Community Survey (ACS). Using machine learning techniques, we generate estimates of VMT and gasoline tax collections at the census tract level. This allows us to explore the distributional implications of this tax swap at a geographically disaggregated level. We find, as have previous researchers, that this tax swap is modestly progressive. Our more granular geographic analysis highlights striking disparities not previously reported. We find that rural areas and census tracts in the center of the country generally benefit from this tax swap, while urban and bicoastal areas generally experience higher taxation. Additionally, Republican-leaning districts, which overlap significantly with rural areas, see marked gains compared to Democratic districts.
papers.zh_title: 从油箱到里程表：从汽油税转向里程税（VMT税）的赢家与输家
papers.zh_abstract: 随着个人交通车队燃油经济性的提高以及混合动力和电动汽车普及率的增加，联邦机动车燃油消费税收入一直在稳步下降。这引发了寻找该税种替代方案的需求。一种选择是用车辆行驶里程（VMT）税取代汽油税。为了研究这种税收转换的影响，我们结合了2017年全国家庭旅行调查（NHTS）和美国社区调查（ACS）的数据。利用机器学习技术，我们在人口普查区层面生成了VMT和汽油税收入的估计值。这使得我们能够在高度地理细分的层面上探索这种税收转换的分配效应。我们发现，与先前的研究者一样，这种税收转换具有适度的累进性。我们更细粒度的地理分析揭示了此前未曾报道的显著差异。我们发现，农村地区和位于美国中部的人口普查区通常从这种税收转换中受益，而城市和沿海地区通常面临更高的税收。此外，与农村地区高度重叠的倾向共和党的选区，与民主党选区相比，看到了显著的收益。

papers.title: Capability Inversion: The Turing Test Meets Information Design
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes the design of tests to distinguish human from artificial intelligence through the lens of information design. We identify a fundamental asymmetry: while AI systems can strategically underperform to mimic human limitations, they cannot overperform beyond their capabilities. This leads to our main contribution—the concept of capability inversion domains, where AIs fail detection not through inferior performance, but by performing “suspiciously well” when they overestimate human capabilities. We show that if an AI significantly overestimates human ability in even one domain, it cannot reliably pass an optimally designed test. This insight reverses conventional intuition: effective tests should target not what humans do well, but the specific patterns of human imperfection that AIs systematically misunderstand. We identify structural sources of persistent misperception—including the difficulty of learning about failure from successful examples and fundamental differences in embodied experience—that make certain capability inversions exploitable for detection even as AI systems improve.
papers.zh_title: 能力反转：图灵测试遇上信息设计
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过信息设计的视角分析了区分人类与人工智能的测试设计。我们识别出一个根本性的不对称性：虽然人工智能系统可以策略性地表现不佳以模仿人类的局限性，但它们无法超越自身能力进行过度表现。这引出了我们的主要贡献——能力反转域的概念，在这些领域中，人工智能未能通过检测并非由于表现较差，而是因为当它们高估人类能力时，表现得“好得可疑”。我们证明，如果人工智能在哪怕一个领域显著高估了人类能力，它就无法可靠地通过一个最优设计的测试。这一见解颠覆了传统直觉：有效的测试不应针对人类擅长什么，而应针对人工智能系统性地误解的人类不完美的特定模式。我们识别出持续误解的结构性来源——包括从成功案例中学习失败的困难以及具身经验的根本差异——这些使得某些能力反转即使在人工智能系统改进时也可被利用来进行检测。

papers.title: Basic Income and the Dynamics of Employment and Human Capital in a Non-Urban Disadvantaged Setting
papers.authors: Jorge Luis García, Patrick L. Warren, L. Reed Watson
papers.abstract: Why and when could basic income inhibit employment? We randomize 200 dollars of basic income per month for two years within a non-urban disadvantaged sample tracked using high-frequency administrative data. The amount provided is 21% of average all-source income. In the short term (0.5 years after baseline), relative to the control group, treatment-group employment decreases by 58%, average all-source income remains constant, and health-investment rates increase. In the longer term (1.25 years after baseline), employment and health-investment rates revert to their control-group counterparts. Treatment participants receive basic income, take time off work, address health needs, and, subsequently, reintegrate into employment.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：H20, I12, J01, J08
papers.zh_title: 基本收入与非城市弱势环境中的就业和人力资本动态
papers.zh_abstract: 基本收入为何以及何时会抑制就业？我们在一个非城市弱势样本中，随机分配每月200美元的基本收入，为期两年，并使用高频行政数据进行追踪。提供的金额占平均所有来源收入的21%。在短期内（基线后0.5年），相对于对照组，处理组的就业率下降了58%，平均所有来源收入保持不变，健康投资率增加。在长期内（基线后1.25年），就业率和健康投资率恢复到对照组的水平。处理组参与者获得基本收入，休假处理健康需求，随后重新融入就业。

papers.title: Do Vaping Taxes Tip the Scale? The Effect of E-Cigarette Taxation on Obesity
papers.authors: Charles J. Courtemanche, Tessie Krishna, Yang Liang, Joseph J. Sabia, Anthony Chuo
papers.abstract: A large literature documents that quitting cigarette smoking may lead to weight gain because nicotine is an appetite suppressant and metabolic stimulant. However, researchers in this literature emphasize that the health benefits of smoking cessation exceed the harms from the weight typically gained. New products, such as electronic nicotine delivery systems (ENDS), that deliver nicotine with a lower health risk than combustible cigarettes could conceivably alter this tradeoff in favor of nicotine use. Accordingly, this study asks whether a leading policy tool to curb ENDS use – ENDS taxes – has the unintended consequence of causing weight gain. We find that, despite reducing nicotine vaping, ENDS taxes lead to robust reductions in weight and body mass index among female teens. A one-dollar (per mL of e-liquid) increase in the ENDS tax rate (2023$) leads to a 0.8-1.0 percentage-point decline in the probability that a female youth is obese. For male teens and both female and male adults, the estimated impacts are generally smaller and statistically indistinguishable from zero. An investigation of mechanisms reveals possible explanations for the absence of weight gain from ENDS taxes. The first is ENDS-tax-induced substitution to cigarettes, which offsets reductions in nicotine consumption from ENDS. The second is indirect effects on weight-related behaviors, including reductions in alcohol and marijuana use and increased healthier food consumption.
papers.zh_title: 电子烟税会打破平衡吗？电子烟税收对肥胖的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 大量文献记载，戒烟可能导致体重增加，因为尼古丁是一种食欲抑制剂和代谢刺激剂。然而，该文献的研究人员强调，戒烟的健康益处超过了通常体重增加带来的危害。电子尼古丁输送系统等新产品以比可燃香烟更低的健康风险输送尼古丁，可能改变这种权衡，有利于尼古丁的使用。因此，本研究探讨了限制电子烟使用的主要政策工具——电子烟税——是否会导致体重增加这一意外后果。我们发现，尽管减少了尼古丁电子烟的使用，电子烟税却导致女性青少年体重和身体质量指数显著下降。电子烟税率每增加1美元（每毫升烟油，2023年美元），女性青少年肥胖的概率下降0.8-1.0个百分点。对于男性青少年以及女性和男性成年人，估计的影响通常较小，且在统计上与零无显著差异。对机制的调查揭示了电子烟税未导致体重增加的可能解释。首先是电子烟税诱导向香烟的替代，这抵消了电子烟尼古丁消费的减少。其次是对体重相关行为的间接影响，包括减少酒精和大麻使用以及增加更健康食品的消费。

papers.title: Modifying Monopoly: Negotiated Medicare Drug Price Reductions May Not Increase Access or Use for Most Patients Taking the Targeted Drugs
papers.authors: Debra Lederman, Alexander L. Olssen, Mark Pauly
papers.abstract: This paper studies two major changes in the financing of Part D drugs for Medicare due to the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA). Effective 2025 it capped out of pocket (OOP) payments at $2000 per year, and effective 2026 it will pay lower prices (negotiated by Medicare) for 10 targeted costly and effective drugs. This paper uses a large representative claims sample to explore the combined effect of these two provisions on the marginal cost sharing that affects beneficiaries’ access to these drugs. While many beneficiaries will be expected to see lower marginal OOP prices, we find that a majority of those using the targeted drugs will face either no change in their marginal OOP or, in a large fraction of cases, an increase in their dollar cost sharing per additional unit of use. This happens even when beneficiaries see reductions in their annual OOP cost because of the nonlinear nature of cost sharing in the Medicare Part D drug.
papers.zh_title: 修改垄断：谈判后的医疗保险药品降价可能不会增加大多数服用目标药物患者的获取或使用
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了《通货膨胀削减法案》导致的医疗保险D部分药品融资的两项重大变化。自2025年起，它将自付费用上限设定为每年2000美元；自2026年起，它将为10种目标昂贵且有效的药物支付更低的价格（由医疗保险谈判确定）。本文使用一个大型代表性索赔样本来探讨这两项规定对影响受益人获取这些药物的边际成本分担的联合效应。虽然预计许多受益人会看到更低的边际自付价格，但我们发现，大多数使用目标药物的人要么面临边际自付费用没有变化，要么在很大比例的情况下，每增加一单位使用量，其美元成本分担增加。即使受益人因医疗保险D部分药品成本分担的非线性性质而看到年度自付成本减少，这种情况也会发生。

papers.title: Inflation Dynamics with a Generalized Lucas Phillips Curve
papers.authors: John H. Cochrane
papers.abstract: I investigate a generalized form of the Lucas (1972) Phillips curve, in which firms take varying amounts of time to learn aggregate demand, in standard textbook new-Keynesian models. This Phillips curve helps to reconcile the sharp divergence between the standard model on the one hand and the beliefs of most policy analysts and the available evidence on the other. In the standard model, inflation and output rise after interest rates rise, with only the possibility of a one-time downward jump. With the generalized Lucas Phillips curve, inflation is initially unstable, so a small initial disinflation builds up before turning around. The model preserves the desirable long-run stability and neutrality of the standard model.
papers.zh_title: 具有广义卢卡斯菲利普斯曲线的通胀动态
papers.zh_abstract: 我在标准教科书式新凯恩斯模型中，研究了卢卡斯（1972）菲利普斯曲线的一种广义形式，其中企业需要不同的时间来了解总需求。这条菲利普斯曲线有助于调和标准模型与大多数政策分析者的信念及现有证据之间的尖锐分歧。在标准模型中，利率上升后通胀和产出上升，只可能有一次性的向下跳跃。而使用广义卢卡斯菲利普斯曲线，通胀最初是不稳定的，因此一个小的初始通缩在逆转之前会先累积起来。该模型保留了标准模型理想的长期稳定性和中性。

papers.title: Trade within Multinational Boundaries
papers.authors: Laura Alfaro, Paola Conconi, Fariha Kamal, Zachary Kroff
papers.abstract: Traditional theories of firm boundaries predict trade between vertically related units of the same firm. Using novel data that combine a comprehensive mapping of U.S. multinationals’ production networks with their customs filings, we uncover a strong positive relationship between input-output linkages and trade between parents and their affiliates. We also find that intrafirm trade is prevalent, particularly between geographically proximate units: three-quarters of affiliates in North America trade with their U.S. parent. These results overturn prior findings based on survey data on intrafirm trade. Administrative intrafirm records enable correcting measurement errors in survey data, reconciling traditional theories with empirical evidence.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, IO, ITI；JEL：D23, F14, F23, F4, L20
papers.zh_title: 跨国边界内的贸易
papers.zh_abstract: 关于企业边界的传统理论预测了同一企业垂直相关单位之间的贸易。利用结合了美国跨国公司生产网络全面映射与其海关申报单的新数据，我们发现了投入产出关联与母公司和其附属公司之间贸易的强正相关关系。我们还发现公司内部贸易很普遍，尤其是在地理上接近的单位之间：北美四分之三的附属公司与其美国母公司进行贸易。这些结果推翻了基于公司内部贸易调查数据的先前发现。行政性的公司内部记录能够纠正调查数据中的测量误差，使传统理论与经验证据相一致。

papers.title: Competition and Management Upgrading: Experimental Evidence from Ethiopia
papers.authors: Girum Abebe, Stefano Caria, Pascaline Dupas, Marcel Fafchamps, Tigabu Getahun
papers.abstract: We experimentally test two seminal hypotheses on the impact of competition on firms' management upgrading. In a first experiment, we protect firms from labor market competition by reducing the risk that a freshly trained manager would be poached by a rival firm. We find that this protection does not increase firms’ investment in management training. In a second suite of experiments, we boost perceived product market competition by informing firms either that rival firms have received management training or that foreign firms are gaining easier access to the domestic market. Again, we find no evidence that this increases firms’ average willingness to invest in management training. To explain why firms do not feel threatened by competition, we present evidence suggesting that, in contrast to commonly held assumptions, firm managers in our setting hold a mental model of competition that posits positive—instead of negative—spillovers, arising primarily from differentiation.
papers.zh_title: 竞争与管理升级：来自埃塞俄比亚的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过实验检验了关于竞争对企业管理升级影响的两个开创性假设。在第一个实验中，我们通过降低新培训的管理者被竞争对手挖走的风险，保护企业免受劳动力市场竞争的影响。我们发现这种保护并未增加企业对管理培训的投资。在第二个系列实验中，我们通过告知企业竞争对手已接受管理培训或外国企业更容易进入国内市场，来增强感知的产品市场竞争。同样，我们没有发现证据表明这增加了企业投资管理培训的平均意愿。为了解释为什么企业不感到竞争的威胁，我们提供的证据表明，与普遍假设相反，我们环境中的企业管理者持有一种竞争的心理模型，该模型假设存在正面的——而非负面的——溢出效应，主要源于差异化。

papers.title: Post-Pandemic Global Inflation, Disinflation, and Central Bank Policy Responses: A Review of the Facts, Empirical Findings, and their Implications for Monetary Policy Framework Assessments
papers.authors: Richard H. Clarida
papers.abstract: This paper examines the 2021-2022 global inflation surge and the belated but aggressive monetary policy response to it by advanced economy central banks. Drawing on body of recent empirical research, it identifies three primary drivers of the global inflation surge: supply shocks from pandemic disruptions and Russia’s invasion of Ukraine, accommodative fiscal and monetary policies that responded to the economic dislocation caused by pandemic, and a demand shift toward goods relative to services, that exacerbated supply chain pressures. Advanced economy central banks were initially slow to react but ultimately raised rates aggressively and succeeded, with help from a reversal of the initial supply shocks which contributed to the initial inflation surge, in returning inflation to “2 point something” were confident enough in the prospects for further disinflation to began cutting interest rates by the summer of 2024. The paper explores benefits and costs of proposals to make forward guidance on the policy rate and the balance sheet more robust and considers the benefits and costs of incorporating scenario analysis into the communication toolkit.
papers.zh_title: 疫情后的全球通胀、通缩与央行政策应对：事实、实证发现及其对货币政策框架评估的启示综述
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了2021-2022年的全球通胀飙升以及发达经济体央行对此迟缓但激进的货币政策应对。基于近期实证研究，本文识别出全球通胀飙升的三个主要驱动因素：来自疫情干扰和俄罗斯入侵乌克兰的供给冲击；应对疫情造成的经济混乱的宽松财政和货币政策；以及需求从服务转向商品，加剧了供应链压力。发达经济体央行最初反应缓慢，但最终激进加息并成功地将通胀恢复到“2点几”的水平，这得益于最初导致通胀飙升的供给冲击的逆转，并且它们对进一步通缩的前景足够有信心，以至于在2024年夏季开始降息。本文探讨了使政策利率和资产负债表的前瞻性指引更加稳健的提案的收益和成本，并考虑了将情景分析纳入沟通工具包的收益和成本。

papers.title: Bequests
papers.authors: Charles Yuji Horioka
papers.abstract: In this paper, we discuss bequests and other intergenerational transfers and what impact they have on the consumption, saving, and labor supply behavior of households. We show that bequests and other intergenerational transfers are prevalent in most countries, that they are sometimes motivated by altruism and sometimes by selfishness, that they affect the consumption and saving behavior of households to some extent, especially that of elderly households, that they affect the labor supply behavior of households, especially that of bequest recipients, and that they have important policy implications.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D11, D12, D14, D15, D31, D64, E21, H31, J22
papers.zh_title: 遗产
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们讨论遗产和其他代际转移，以及它们对家庭消费、储蓄和劳动力供给行为的影响。我们表明，遗产和其他代际转移在大多数国家普遍存在，它们有时出于利他动机，有时出于自私动机，它们在一定程度上影响家庭的消费和储蓄行为，尤其是老年家庭，它们影响家庭的劳动力供给行为，尤其是遗产接受者，并且它们具有重要的政策含义。

papers.title: Welfare Programs and Crime Spillovers
papers.authors: David Jinkins, Elira Kuka, Claudio Labanca
papers.abstract: Research on the social safety net examines its effects on recipients and their families. We show that these effects extend beyond recipients’ families. Using a regression discontinuity design and administrative data, we study a Danish policy that cut welfare benefits for refugees, increasing crime among affected individuals. Linking refugees to neighbors, we find increased crime among non-Danish neighbors, with spillovers persisting even after direct effects stabilize. Accounting for these spillovers raises the marginal value of public funds by 20%. We explore several mechanisms and find evidence consistent with peer effects among young individuals from the same country of origin.
papers.zh_title: 福利计划与犯罪溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 关于社会安全网的研究考察了其对受益者及其家庭的影响。我们表明，这些影响超出了受益者家庭的范围。利用断点回归设计和行政数据，我们研究了一项丹麦政策，该政策削减了难民的福利金，增加了受影响个体的犯罪。将难民与其邻居联系起来，我们发现非丹麦裔邻居的犯罪增加，即使在直接影响稳定后，溢出效应仍然持续。考虑这些溢出效应使公共资金的边际价值提高了20%。我们探讨了几种机制，并发现了与来自同一原籍国的年轻人之间的同伴效应相一致的证据。

papers.title: Does Matching Contribution Incentivize Informal Workers to Participate in Retirement Saving Plans? A Randomized Evaluation Interacted with a Natural Experiment
papers.authors: Noelia Bernal, Sebastian Galiani, Oswaldo Molina
papers.abstract: We conducted a large field experiment in Peru on informal workers and studied whether offering them a matching contribution raise participation and contributions in their Individual Retirement Accounts. We had three groups: a control group receiving no match, and two treatments groups receiving 50 and 100 percent match, respectively. Additionally, due to the time span, we can also analyze the difference responses between pre and during Covid-19. The results were as follows. First, the match incentive increases participation. Workers in the 50 and 100 percent match groups show participation rates of 5.2 and 6.5 p.p. higher than workers in the control group, respectively. The participation effect is also present pre Covid-19 and disappears during it. Second, the 100 percent match incentive was the only effective in increasing savings among all individuals (1.4 p.p.), pre (2.3 p.p.) and during Covid-19 (0.97 p.p.). This effect still presents in LATE specification with higher p.p. Third, 100% match was again the only effective to make contribute more than once, in the full sample (1.2 p.p.), and pre Covid-19 (2.7 p.p.), including LATE specification (full sample – 5.6 p.p.; pre Covid-19 – 8.2p.p.). Fourth the 50 percent match is not effective in raising contribution in any specification.
papers.zh_title: 匹配缴款能否激励非正规工人参与退休储蓄计划？一项与自然实验交互的随机评估
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在秘鲁对非正规工人进行了一项大型实地实验，研究向他们提供匹配缴款是否会提高其个人退休账户的参与率和缴款额。我们设置了三个组：一个不接受匹配的对照组，以及分别接受50%和100%匹配的两个处理组。此外，由于时间跨度，我们还可以分析新冠疫情前和期间的不同反应。结果如下。首先，匹配激励提高了参与率。50%和100%匹配组的工人参与率分别比对照组高5.2和6.5个百分点。参与效应在新冠疫情前也存在，但在疫情期间消失。其次，100%匹配激励是唯一有效提高所有个体储蓄的激励（1.4个百分点），在新冠疫情前（2.3个百分点）和期间（0.97个百分点）均有效。这一效应在LATE设定中仍然存在，且百分点更高。第三，100%匹配再次是唯一有效促使多次缴款的激励，在全样本（1.2个百分点）和新冠疫情前（2.7个百分点）均有效，包括LATE设定（全样本 – 5.6个百分点；新冠疫情前 – 8.2个百分点）。第四，50%匹配在任何设定下均未能有效提高缴款额。

papers.title: Using AI to Generate Option C Scaling Ideas: A Case Study in Early Education
papers.authors: Faith Fatchen, John A. List, Francesca Pagnotta
papers.abstract: In recent years, field experiments have reshaped policy worldwide, but scaling ideas remains a thorny challenge. Perhaps the most important issue facing policymakers today is deciding which ideas to scale. One approach to attenuate this information problem is to augment traditional A/B experimental designs to address questions of scalability from the beginning. List 2024 denotes this approach as “Option C” thinking. Using early education as a case study, we show how AI can overcome a critical barrier in Option C thinking – generating viable options for scaling experimentation. By integrating AI-driven insights, this approach strengthens the link between controlled trials and large-scale implementation, ensuring the production of policy-based evidence for effective decision-making.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, PE；JEL：C9, C90, C91, C92, C93, C99
papers.zh_title: 利用人工智能生成选项C扩展思路：以早期教育为例
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，实地实验重塑了全球政策，但如何扩展思路仍是一个棘手挑战。当今政策制定者面临的最重要问题或许是决定哪些思路值得扩展。缓解这一信息问题的一种方法是从一开始就增强传统的A/B实验设计，以解决可扩展性问题。List（2024）将这种方法称为“选项C”思维。以早期教育为案例，我们展示了人工智能如何克服选项C思维中的一个关键障碍——为扩展实验生成可行的选项。通过整合人工智能驱动的洞察，这种方法加强了受控试验与大规模实施之间的联系，确保为有效决策提供基于政策的证据。

papers.title: Like Great-Grandparent, Like Great-Grandchild? Multigenerational Mobility in American History
papers.authors: Zachary Ward, Kasey Buckles, Joseph Price
papers.abstract: Using data on 2.5 million great-grandchildren linked to their great-grandfathers in the US (1850–1940), we show that economic gaps persisted strongly across four generations despite major structural change. We find that one-third of the initial differences in economic status across white great-grandfathers remained in their great-grandchildren. When including both Black and white families, this persistence rises to about 50 percent, largely because the gap between Black and white families closed slowly over time. Grandparent and great-grandparent status matter beyond the father's status, indicating slower convergence to the mean than predicted by two-generational estimates. However, this excess persistence is largely driven by enduring racial inequality as grandparent effects are small within the white population.
papers.zh_title: 曾祖辈如何，曾孙辈亦如何？美国历史上的多代际流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 利用美国（1850-1940年）250万曾孙辈与其曾祖父相关联的数据，我们表明，尽管经历了重大结构性变革，经济差距在四代人之间依然持续存在。我们发现，白人曾祖父之间经济地位的初始差异中，有三分之一仍保留在其曾孙辈中。当同时纳入黑人和白人家庭时，这种持续性上升至约50%，这主要是因为黑人与白人家庭之间的差距随时间推移缓慢缩小。祖父母和曾祖父母的地位超越了父亲地位的影响，表明向均值的收敛速度慢于两代际估计所预测的速度。然而，这种额外的持续性在很大程度上是由持久的种族不平等驱动的，因为在白人群体内部，祖父母效应很小。

papers.title: The Neoclassical Theory of Firm Investment and Taxes: A Reassessment
papers.authors: Gabriel Chodorow-Reich
papers.abstract: This article corrects a 60-year history of mis-application of the neoclassical theory of investment to interpret empirical work and guide policy analysis. Empirical estimates of firm-level user cost elasticities of investment or capital have in fact studied two distinct objects, an elasticity holding output fixed that identifies the elasticity of substitution between capital and labor (Eisner and Nadiri, 1968) and an elasticity holding the wage fixed that sheds light on the revenue elasticity of capital (Coen, 1969). A review finds a consensus range for the Coen short-run user cost elasticity that translates into a priori plausible values for the revenue elasticity of capital, offering validation to the neoclassical theory. The long-run general equilibrium capital elasticity to the user cost instead holds labor fixed and depends on both firm-level parameters. This synthesis offers a framework for future work and helps to explain why policy institutions have differing views on the effects of corporate taxes.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME, PE；JEL：E23, G31, H25
papers.zh_title: 新古典企业投资与税收理论：重新评估
papers.zh_abstract: 本文纠正了60年来对新古典投资理论的误用历史，这些误用体现在解释实证工作和指导政策分析中。对企业层面投资或资本的用户成本弹性的实证估计实际上研究了两个不同的对象：一个是在产出固定时估计的弹性，它识别了资本与劳动之间的替代弹性（Eisner和Nadiri, 1968）；另一个是在工资固定时估计的弹性，它揭示了资本的收入弹性（Coen, 1969）。综述发现，Coen短期用户成本弹性的共识范围转化为先验合理的资本收入弹性值，从而验证了新古典理论。长期一般均衡中资本对用户成本的弹性则保持劳动固定，并取决于这两个企业层面参数。这一综合为未来工作提供了一个框架，并有助于解释为何政策机构对企业税的影响持有不同观点。

papers.title: Increasing Degree Attainment Among Low-Income Students: The Role of Intensive Advising and College Quality
papers.authors: Andrew C. Barr, Benjamin L. Castleman
papers.abstract: A college degree offers a pathway to economic mobility for low-income students. Using a multi-site randomized controlled trial combined with administrative and survey data, we demonstrate that intensive advising during high school and college significantly increases bachelor’s degree attainment among lower-income students. We leverage unique data on pre-advising college preferences and causal forest methods to show that these gains are primarily driven by improvements in initial enrollment quality. Our results suggest that strategies targeting college choice may be a more effective and efficient means of increasing degree attainment than those focused solely on affordability.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H52, I24, J24
papers.zh_title: 提高低收入学生的学位获得率：强化咨询与大学质量的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 大学学位为低收入学生提供了经济流动的途径。通过一项结合行政数据和调查数据的多地点随机对照试验，我们证明，在高中和大学期间提供强化咨询能显著提高低收入学生的学士学位获得率。我们利用咨询前大学偏好的独特数据和因果森林方法表明，这些收益主要源于初始入学质量的改善。我们的结果表明，与仅关注可负担性的策略相比，针对大学选择的策略可能是提高学位获得率更有效且更高效的手段。

papers.title: The Social Desirability Atlas
papers.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Ingar K. Haaland, Nicolas Röver, Christopher Roth
papers.abstract: Social desirability bias (SDB) is a pervasive threat to the validity of survey and experimental data. Respondents might often misreport sensitive attitudes and behaviors to appear more socially acceptable. We begin by synthesizing empirical evidence on the prevalence and magnitude of SDB across various domains, focusing on studies with individual-level benchmarks. We then critically assess commonly used strategies to mitigate SDB, highlighting how they can sometimes fail by creating confusion or inadvertently increasing perceived sensitivity. To help researchers navigate these challenges, we offer practical guidance on selecting the most suitable tools for different research contexts. Finally, we examine how SDB can distort treatment effects in experiments and discuss mitigation strategies.
papers.zh_title: 社会期望偏差图谱
papers.zh_abstract: 社会期望偏差（SDB）是对调查和实验数据有效性的普遍威胁。受访者可能经常误报敏感态度和行为，以显得更符合社会期望。我们首先综合了关于SDB在各个领域普遍性和程度的实证证据，重点关注具有个体层面基准的研究。然后，我们批判性地评估了常用的缓解SDB的策略，强调它们有时可能因造成混淆或无意中增加感知敏感性而失败。为了帮助研究人员应对这些挑战，我们提供了针对不同研究背景选择最合适工具的实用指南。最后，我们考察了SDB如何扭曲实验中的处理效应，并讨论了缓解策略。

papers.title: Scalable Targeting of Social Protection: When Do Algorithms Out-Perform Surveys and Community Knowledge?
papers.authors: Emily Aiken, Anik Ashraf, Joshua Blumenstock, Raymond Guiteras, Ahmed Mushfiq Mobarak
papers.abstract: Innovations in big data and algorithms are enabling new approaches to target interventions at scale. We compare the accuracy of three different systems for identifying the poor to receive benefit transfers — proxy means-testing, nominations from community members, and an algorithmic approach using machine learning to predict poverty using mobile phone usage behavior — and study how their cost-effectiveness varies with the scale and scope of the program. We collect mobile phone records from all major telecom operators in Bangladesh and conduct community-based wealth rankings and detailed consumption surveys of 5,000 households, to select the 22,000 poorest households for $300 transfers from 106,000 listed households. While proxy-means testing is most accurate, algorithmic targeting becomes more cost-effective for national-scale programs where large numbers of households have to be screened. We explore the external validity of these insights using survey data and mobile phone records data from Togo, and cross-country information on benefit transfer programs from the World Bank.
papers.zh_title: 社会保障的可扩展精准瞄准：算法何时优于调查和社区知识？
papers.zh_abstract: 大数据和算法的创新正在为大规模干预措施的精准瞄准提供新方法。我们比较了三种识别贫困人口以发放福利转移支付系统的准确性——代理家计调查、社区成员提名以及利用机器学习通过手机使用行为预测贫困的算法方法——并研究了它们的成本效益如何随项目的规模和范围而变化。我们收集了孟加拉国所有主要电信运营商的手机记录，并对5000户家庭进行了社区财富排名和详细消费调查，从106000户登记家庭中选出22000户最贫困家庭，每户发放300美元转移支付。虽然代理家计调查最准确，但对于需要筛选大量家庭的国家级项目，算法瞄准变得更具成本效益。我们利用多哥的调查数据和手机记录数据，以及世界银行的跨国福利转移项目信息，探讨了这些洞察的外部有效性。

papers.title: Who Benefits from Paid Family Leave? The Impact on Informal and Formal Care for Middle-Aged and Older Adults with Disabilities
papers.authors: Yuting Qian, Xi Chen
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes the impact of paid family leave (PFL) policies on informal and formal care for middle-aged and older adults with disabilities in the U.S., and how the heterogeneous benefits accrue to different families. We use data from the 1998-2018 Health and Retirement Study (HRS) and leverage the PFL programs implemented in California (2004), New Jersey (2009), and New York (2018) in a difference-in-differences (DiD) design. We deploy both the conventional two-way fixed effects (TWFE) model and an adapted DiD estimator developed by Sun and Abraham for staggered rollout designs. We find that PFL access is associated with a 5.7 percentage point increase in the likelihood that individuals with disabilities receive informal care from their children. We also show that PFL access significantly increases the use of home care services and nursing home care. These effects are primarily concentrated among individuals with disabilities who have both a spouse and children, and are almost non-existent among those who have only children and no spouse. Our findings demonstrate that PFL policies improve care access and help address unmet care needs for middle-aged and older adults with disabilities, but their impact remains limited for certain vulnerable subgroups, particularly those with only children.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I10, I38, J14, J18
papers.zh_title: 谁从带薪家事假中受益？对中老年残疾人士非正式和正式照护的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了美国带薪家事假（PFL）政策对中老年残疾人士非正式和正式照护的影响，以及异质性收益如何在不同家庭中分配。我们使用1998-2018年健康与退休研究（HRS）的数据，并利用加利福尼亚州（2004年）、新泽西州（2009年）和纽约州（2018年）实施的PFL项目，采用双重差分（DiD）设计。我们同时部署了传统的双向固定效应（TWFE）模型和Sun与Abraham为交错推出设计改编的DiD估计量。我们发现，获得PFL与残疾人士从子女处获得非正式照护的可能性增加5.7个百分点相关。我们还表明，获得PFL显著增加了家庭护理服务和养老院护理的使用。这些效应主要集中在既有配偶又有子女的残疾人士中，而在仅有子女而无配偶的群体中几乎不存在。我们的发现表明，PFL政策改善了照护可及性，有助于满足中老年残疾人士未满足的照护需求，但其对某些脆弱亚群（特别是仅有子女的群体）的影响仍然有限。

papers.title: Nicotine Vaping and Youth Mental Health: New Evidence from E-Cigarette Regulations
papers.authors: Chad D. Cotti, Tessie Krishna, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Erik T. Nesson, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: The confluence of a youth mental health crisis and high rates of teenage nicotine vaping has led some U.S. tobacco control advocates to argue that reducing access to electronic nicotine delivery systems (ENDS) — through policies such as ENDS taxation — may improve youth and young adult mental health. Using data from several nationally representative surveys (Youth Risk Behavior Survey, Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System, and Population Assessment of Tobacco and Health) and a generalized difference-in-differences approach, we find no evidence that ENDS taxation improves youth and young adult mental health. With 95 percent confidence, we can rule out that the mean state ENDS tax increase adopted during our analysis sample ($0.34 per mL of e-liquid in 2023$) reduces persistent depressive symptoms among youths by more than 0.3 percent and suicide ideation by more than 1.0 percent.
