Moreover, discrete-time hazard models provide little evidence that ENDS taxes affect dynamics in youth mental health. A similar pattern of results emerges when we examine a wider set of ENDS regulations, including minimum legal purchasing ages, e-cigarette licensure laws, online sales restrictions, and restrictions on indoor nicotine vaping.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：I10, I18
papers.zh_title: 尼古丁电子烟与青少年心理健康：来自电子烟监管的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 青少年心理健康危机与青少年尼古丁电子烟高使用率的交汇，导致一些美国烟草控制倡导者认为，减少电子尼古丁传送系统（ENDS）的可及性——例如通过ENDS税收等政策——可能改善青少年和年轻人的心理健康。利用来自多个全国代表性调查（青少年风险行为调查、行为风险因素监测系统和烟草与健康人口评估）的数据以及广义双重差分方法，我们没有发现ENDS税收能改善青少年和年轻人心理健康的证据。在95%的置信水平下，我们可以排除我们分析样本期间各州平均ENDS税收增加（2023年每毫升电子液体0.34美元）会使青少年持续性抑郁症状减少超过0.3%、自杀意念减少超过1.0%的可能性。此外，离散时间风险模型几乎没有提供ENDS税收影响青少年心理健康动态的证据。当我们考察更广泛的ENDS监管措施（包括最低法定购买年龄、电子烟许可法、在线销售限制和室内尼古丁电子烟限制）时，出现了类似的结果模式。

papers.title: Abortion Restrictions and Intimate Partner Violence in the Dobbs Era
papers.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Christine Durrance, Bilge Erten, Yang Wang, Barbara L. Wolfe
papers.abstract: In overturning Roe v. Wade and triggering laws in many states that ban or severely restrict abortion, the Supreme Court’s landmark 2022 Dobbs decision dramatically altered the landscape of reproductive health in the U.S. Prior research has highlighted the far-reaching impact of abortion restrictions for women and families, which extend beyond their proximate effects on abortions, births, and fertility. We provide some of the first causal evidence on how abortion restrictions in the post-Dobbs era have impacted women’s risk of exposure to intimate partner violence (IPV). IPV is the most common form of violence experienced by women, and changes in access to abortion may generate unintended effects on various inputs (economic resources, stress, intrahousehold bargaining) that could affect relationship dynamics and raise the risk of IPV. Leveraging information on IPV incidents reported to law enforcement from 2017- 2023 combined with post-Dobbs changes in county-level travel distance to abortion facilities, analyses are based on a generalized difference-in-differences approach. We find that abortion restrictions – alternately measured by the increase in travel distance and by the presence of a near-total ban – significantly increased the rate of IPV for reproductive-age women in treated counties by about seven to 10 percent. These estimates imply at least 9,000 additional incidents of IPV among women in the treated “trigger ban” states, which is predicted to add over $1.24 billion in social costs.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：I11, I12, I18, J13, K23
papers.zh_title: 多布斯时代堕胎限制与亲密伴侣暴力
papers.zh_abstract: 美国最高法院2022年具有里程碑意义的多布斯判决推翻了罗诉韦德案，并触发许多州颁布禁止或严格限制堕胎的法律，从而彻底改变了美国生殖健康的格局。先前的研究已强调堕胎限制对女性和家庭的深远影响，这些影响超出了其对堕胎、生育和生育率的直接效应。我们首次提供了关于后多布斯时代堕胎限制如何影响女性遭受亲密伴侣暴力风险的部分因果证据。亲密伴侣暴力是女性经历的最常见暴力形式，而堕胎可及性的变化可能对多种投入因素（经济资源、压力、家庭内部议价能力）产生非预期效应，这些因素可能影响关系动态并增加亲密伴侣暴力风险。利用2017年至2023年向执法部门报告的亲密伴侣暴力事件信息，并结合后多布斯时代县级到堕胎机构的旅行距离变化，我们的分析基于广义双重差分方法。我们发现，堕胎限制——以旅行距离增加和近乎全面禁令的存在作为替代衡量指标——显著使处理县育龄女性的亲密伴侣暴力发生率增加了约7%至10%。这些估计意味着，在实施“触发禁令”的处理州，女性中至少额外发生了9000起亲密伴侣暴力事件，预计将增加超过12.4亿美元的社会成本。

papers.title: Defaulting 401(k) Assets into Payout Annuities for “Pretty Good” Lifetime Incomes
papers.authors: Vanya Horneff, Raimond Maurer, Olivia S. Mitchell
papers.abstract: Some US defined contribution plans offer retirees access to an annuity or lifetime income stream as payout options from their 401(k) accounts. Nevertheless, for behavioral reasons, some retirees may hesitate to elect lifetime income streams as a drawdown vehicle. To counter this, plan sponsors could automatically allocate a portion of retirees’ 401(k) assets to annuities, now that regulatory barriers to doing so have eased. Using a lifecycle economic model, we evaluate the pros and cons of defaulting retirees’ 401(k) assets into payout annuities. We show that defaulting 20% of a retiree’s assets over a threshold into an immediate annuity enhances retirement security for most plan participants. An annuity deferred to the age of 80 is particularly beneficial to college graduates, in terms of enhancing their welfare
papers.zh_title: 将401(k)资产默认配置为支付年金以实现“相当不错”的终身收入
papers.zh_abstract: 美国一些固定缴款计划为退休人员提供从其401(k)账户中提取年金或终身收入流的选项。然而，出于行为原因，一些退休人员可能不愿选择终身收入流作为提取工具。为了应对这一问题，计划发起人可以自动将退休人员部分401(k)资产配置为年金，因为现在这样做的监管障碍已经减少。我们使用生命周期经济模型，评估将退休人员401(k)资产默认配置为支付年金的利弊。我们表明，将退休人员超过某一门槛的20%资产默认配置为即期年金，能增强大多数计划参与者的退休保障。对于大学毕业生而言，延迟到80岁开始领取的年金在提升福利方面尤其有益。

papers.title: Firm Investment and the User Cost of Capital: New U.S. Corporate Tax Reform Evidence
papers.authors: Jonathan S. Hartley, Kevin A. Hassett, Joshua D. Rauh
papers.abstract: The Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (TCJA) marked the first time in three decades that material changes were made to the corporate tax code of the United States. We use TCJA as a quasi natural experiment to estimate the impact of changes in user cost of capital on investment. Following the method of Auerbach and Hassett (1991), using cross-sectional data we find that the user cost is associated with higher rates of investment consistent with previous studies. BEA asset types with greater reductions in user cost of capital and marginal effective tax rate (METR) after the 2017 TCJA had greater statistically significant increases in their investment rates several years after the tax reform. Specifically, we find the magnitude of a 1 percentage point decrease in user cost is associated with a 1.68 to 3.05 percentage point increase in the rate of investment, larger than prior estimates of the responsiveness of investment with respect to user cost of capital.
papers.zh_title: 企业投资与资本使用成本：来自美国新公司税改革的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 2017年的《减税与就业法案》是美国三十年来首次对公司税法进行重大修改。我们利用《减税与就业法案》作为准自然实验，估计资本使用成本变化对投资的影响。遵循Auerbach和Hassett（1991）的方法，使用横截面数据，我们发现资本使用成本与更高的投资率相关，这与先前的研究一致。在2017年《减税与就业法案》之后，资本使用成本和边际有效税率下降幅度更大的美国经济分析局资产类型，在税改数年后的投资率出现了统计上显著的更大增长。具体而言，我们发现资本使用成本每下降1个百分点，投资率会上升1.68至3.05个百分点，这比先前关于投资对资本使用成本反应程度的估计值更大。

papers.title: Childless or Child-fewer? Childlessness and Parity Progression where Fertility is Below Replacement
papers.authors: Michael Geruso, Dean Spears
papers.abstract: Birth rates are falling worldwide, in every region. Falling birth rates can be decomposed into two components: (1) an increase in childlessness (i.e., lifetime nulliparity), and (2) fewer children ever born to women who have at least one child (completed cohort fertility among the parous). This paper quantifies the contributions of these two components for women in advanced economies in Europe, North and South America, and southeast Asia, and for recent cohorts in Indian districts. In both samples, we find that the birth rate among parous women is an important component in explaining low overall birth rates. Childlessness explains only 38% of the decline in cohort fertility in the advanced economies in our analysis. In the Indian context, childlessness accounts for only 6% of the difference between high-fertility and below-replacement districts. Moreover, in many country-cohorts and Indian districts, average completed cohort fertility would be below the replacement threshold even when considering only women who do have children—that is, omitting the zeros from the average. This is in tension with widespread recent narratives that attribute falling birth rates to increasing childlessness: To the contrary, in many populations average birth rates even among parents would be low enough eventually to cause depopulation.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH, PE；JEL：I1, J10, J13
papers.zh_title: 无子女还是少子女？生育率低于更替水平下的无子女状况与胎次递进
papers.zh_abstract: 全球各地的出生率都在下降。出生率下降可分解为两个组成部分：（1）无子女比例（即终身未生育）的增加，以及（2）至少生育一个子女的女性所生子女数（已育女性的完成队列生育率）的减少。本文量化了这两个组成部分对欧洲、北美和南美以及东南亚发达经济体女性以及印度各地区近期队列的贡献。在这两个样本中，我们发现已育女性的生育率是解释总体低出生率的重要因素。在我们的分析中，无子女仅解释了发达经济体队列生育率下降的38%。在印度背景下，无子女仅解释了高生育率地区与低于更替水平地区之间差异的6%。此外，在许多国家-队列和印度地区，即使只考虑有子女的女性——即从平均值中剔除零值——平均完成队列生育率也低于更替阈值。这与近期广泛流传的将出生率下降归因于无子女增加的说法相矛盾：相反，在许多人群中，即使父母群体的平均生育率也低到足以最终导致人口减少。

papers.title: Wildfire, Smoke and Mental Health in Canada
papers.authors: Janet Currie, Soodeh Saberian
papers.abstract: This study examines the relationship between wildfires and mental health-related hospitalizations in Canada from 2006 to 2018. Most previous estimates of the mental health costs of wildfire have focused on the impacts of exposure to PM₂.₅. We break new ground by highlighting other pathways for wildfires to affect mental health, including evacuation orders, direct local costs of fires, and climate anxiety, which is proxied using wildfire-related Twitter activity. We find that all these mechanisms affect mental health-related hospitalizations, with especially large impacts on hospitalizations for anxiety and substance abuse. Conditional on air quality, wildfire events that draw national attention worsen the mental health of susceptible people, even when they live far away. Elderly people and those with pre-existing health conditions that make them more vulnerable, are more strongly affected. The results indicate that climate anxiety stoked by wildfire events may account for much of the overall mental health cost. Accounting for these additional mechanisms does little to diminish the estimated effect of PM ₂.₅ from wildfire smoke, however, suggesting that the additional factors have effects on mental health that are in addition to those of PM₂.₅.
papers.zh_title: 野火、烟雾与加拿大心理健康
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了2006年至2018年加拿大野火与心理健康相关住院之间的关系。先前大多数关于野火心理健康成本的估计都集中在PM₂.₅暴露的影响上。我们开辟了新领域，强调了野火影响心理健康的其他途径，包括疏散令、火灾的直接当地成本以及气候焦虑（以野火相关的推特活动作为代理指标）。我们发现，所有这些机制都会影响心理健康相关的住院，对焦虑和药物滥用住院的影响尤其大。在控制空气质量的情况下，引起全国关注的野火事件会恶化易感人群的心理健康，即使他们居住在远离火灾的地方。老年人和已有健康问题使其更脆弱的人群受到的影响更强。结果表明，野火事件引发的气候焦虑可能占总体心理健康成本的很大一部分。然而，考虑这些额外机制并不会削弱野火烟雾中PM₂.₅的估计效应，这表明这些额外因素对心理健康的影响是独立于PM₂.₅之外的。

papers.title: ‘Sorting’ Out Gender Discrimination and Disadvantage: Evidence from Student Evaluations of Teaching
papers.authors: Sara Ayllón, Lars J. Lefgren, Richard W. Patterson, Olga B. Stoddard, Nicolás Urdaneta Andrade
papers.abstract: How should gender discrimination and systemic disadvantage in teaching evaluations be addressed when more discriminatory and less generous students sort into fields, courses, and instructors’ sections? We estimate student-level measures of gender bias and generosity by comparing how the same student rates male and female instructors, controlling for professor fixed effects. Accounting for measurement error, we document substantial heterogeneity in bias and generosity across students. Bias varies systematically by student gender, and sorting patterns disadvantage female faculty in some courses and male faculty in others. We propose Empirical Bayes–inspired adjustments that correct evaluations for predictable disadvantages caused by student sorting.
papers.zh_title: “分类”揭示性别歧视与劣势：来自学生教学评价的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 当更具歧视性和更不慷慨的学生分类进入特定领域、课程和教师班级时，应如何解决教学评价中的性别歧视和系统性劣势？我们通过比较同一名学生如何评价男性和女性教师，并控制教授固定效应，来估计学生层面的性别偏见和慷慨程度指标。在考虑测量误差后，我们记录了学生在偏见和慷慨程度上的显著异质性。偏见因学生性别而系统性地变化，分类模式在某些课程中使女性教师处于劣势，而在其他课程中则使男性教师处于劣势。我们提出了基于经验贝叶斯方法的调整，以纠正因学生分类造成的可预测劣势对评价的影响。

papers.title: Efficiency in Job-Ladder Models
papers.authors: Masao Fukui, Toshihiko Mukoyama
papers.abstract: This paper examines the efficiency of a decentralized equilibrium in a broad class of random-search job-ladder models. We decompose the source of inefficiency into two margins: (i) the investment margin, that is, the difference between the private and social benefit of job creation given the surplus of a match, and (ii) the valuation margin, that is, the difference between the private valuation and the social valuation of a match surplus. In the presence of on-the-job searches, the well-known Hosios condition no longer guarantees the market equilibrium aligns with the efficient allocation along both margins. On-the-job searches contribute to the overvaluation of the match surplus in market equilibrium, especially at the top of the job ladder. Consequently, the decentralized equilibrium with the Hosios condition features excess creation of vacancies in the steady state. On-the-job searches also lead to excess volatility in unemployment in response to aggregate productivity shocks. Quantitatively, we find a significant difference between the equilibrium outcome and the efficient allocation under standard calibration. We also consider several decentralizations of the efficient allocation to shed light on the optimal policies under the frictional labor market.
papers.zh_title: 职位阶梯模型中的效率
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了广泛类别的随机搜索职位阶梯模型中分散均衡的效率。我们将低效率的来源分解为两个边际：（i）投资边际，即给定匹配剩余下职位创造的私人收益与社会收益之间的差异，以及（ii）估值边际，即匹配剩余的私人估值与社会估值之间的差异。在存在在职搜索的情况下，著名的Hosios条件不再能保证市场均衡在这两个边际上与有效配置一致。在职搜索导致市场均衡中匹配剩余被高估，尤其是在职位阶梯的顶端。因此，满足Hosios条件的分散均衡在稳态下表现为过度创造职位空缺。在职搜索还导致失业对总生产率冲击的反应出现过度波动。在定量上，我们发现在标准校准下，均衡结果与有效配置之间存在显著差异。我们还考虑了有效配置的几种分散化方式，以揭示摩擦性劳动力市场下的最优政策。

papers.title: How Does Privacy Regulation Affect Transatlantic Venture Investment? Evidence from GDPR
papers.authors: Jian Jia, Ginger Zhe Jin, Mario Leccese, Liad Wagman
papers.abstract: We examine how the GDPR affected transatlantic venture investment. Using investment data from 2014 to 2019, we find that the GDPR’s rollout in May 2018 led to a significant decline in US investor activity in the EU, evidenced by fewer deals and investment, especially for newer and data-related ventures. Investors shifted toward geographically closer ventures and relied more on syndication, particularly with EU-based lead investors. While the shift to local investing drove the overall decline, syndication partially offset it. The results highlight the role of digital policies in shaping investment strategies and influencing transatlantic capital flows.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, IO, ITI, LE；JEL：D8, G11, K20
papers.zh_title: 隐私监管如何影响跨大西洋风险投资？来自GDPR的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了《通用数据保护条例》如何影响跨大西洋风险投资。使用2014年至2019年的投资数据，我们发现2018年5月《通用数据保护条例》的实施导致美国投资者在欧盟的活动显著下降，表现为交易和投资减少，尤其是针对较新和数据相关的企业。投资者转向地理上更近的企业，并更多地依赖联合投资，特别是与欧盟主导投资者合作。虽然转向本地投资导致了整体下降，但联合投资部分抵消了这一影响。结果凸显了数字政策在塑造投资策略和影响跨大西洋资本流动中的作用。

papers.title: Labor Markets in Developing Countries
papers.authors: Emily Breza, Supreet Kaur
papers.abstract: The process of development is accompanied by marked changes in the structure of the labor market. We lay out a broad set of stylized features that distinguish developing country labor markets from those in richer countries. We organize our review around one particularly striking difference: in poor countries, working age individuals are employed in wage work only 20-50% of the time. There is evidence that this low wage employment reflects high levels of involuntary unemployment (often masked by self-employment), along with frictions such as wage rigidity, market power, and search and matching frictions. At the same time, there is growing documentation that workers prefer self-employment or unemployment to many of the wage jobs that are available to them, especially low-skill work in the formal sector. We offer evidence on several ways in which poverty itself can dampen labor supply, so that "low" labor supply may itself be an outcome of under-development. Throughout our review, we highlight how three core aspects of poverty—missing markets, the importance of social ties, and institutional irregularity—are important for understanding why developing country labor markets may behave differently from those in richer settings. This has relevance for understanding how labor markets change in response to, and help facilitate, the process of development.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：E24, J22, J23, J31, J63, J64, O15, O17
papers.zh_title: 发展中国家的劳动力市场
papers.zh_abstract: 发展过程伴随着劳动力市场结构的显著变化。我们梳理了一系列区分发展中国家与富裕国家劳动力市场的典型特征。我们的综述围绕一个尤为显著的差异展开：在贫困国家，劳动年龄个体仅有20-50%的时间从事有薪工作。有证据表明，这种低水平的有薪就业反映了高水平的非自愿失业（通常被自雇就业所掩盖），以及工资刚性、市场势力和搜寻匹配摩擦等摩擦因素。同时，越来越多的文献显示，工人更偏好自雇就业或失业，而非许多可获得的带薪工作，尤其是正规部门的低技能工作。我们提供了证据，说明贫困本身可能通过多种途径抑制劳动力供给，因此“低”劳动力供给本身可能是欠发展的结果。在整个综述中，我们强调贫困的三个核心方面——市场缺失、社会关系的重要性以及制度不规范——对于理解发展中国家劳动力市场为何可能与富裕国家表现不同至关重要。这对于理解劳动力市场如何响应并促进发展过程具有现实意义。

papers.title: Growth in AI Knowledge
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: How does artificial intelligence affect the creation of new knowledge and long-run economic growth? This paper develops a general equilibrium model where AI enhances decision-making by interpolating between existing knowledge points, reducing uncertainty within the boundaries of what is already known. This capability creates competing incentives for knowledge creation: AI makes dense knowledge clusters more valuable by enabling interpolation, but also reduces the penalty for knowledge gaps. We show that AI’s impact on growth depends on a critical threshold in its capabilities. When AI has a modest interpolation range, it encourages incremental research that increases knowledge density, raising growth when ideas are getting harder to find. When AI has an extensive range, it promotes exploratory research that reduces knowledge density, paradoxically slowing growth despite direct productivity gains. The welfare effects depend on both AI capabilities and market structure— monopolistic AI provision can improve welfare by restricting adoption and preventing excessive exploration, while competitive provision amplifies research distortions. These results suggest that policies limiting AI capabilities or promoting market power in AI provision may have unexpected benefits for innovation and growth when research productivity depends on knowledge density.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能知识的增长
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能如何影响新知识的创造和长期经济增长？本文构建了一个一般均衡模型，其中人工智能通过在现有知识点之间进行插值来增强决策能力，从而减少已知边界内的不确定性。这种能力为知识创造创造了相互竞争的激励：人工智能通过实现插值使密集的知识集群更有价值，但也降低了知识空白的代价。我们表明，人工智能对增长的影响取决于其能力的一个关键阈值。当人工智能的插值范围适中时，它会鼓励增加知识密度的渐进式研究，从而在想法越来越难发现时提高增长。当人工智能的范围广泛时，它会促进降低知识密度的探索性研究，尽管有直接的生产率提升，却会矛盾地减缓增长。福利效应取决于人工智能能力和市场结构——垄断性的人工智能供给可以通过限制采用和防止过度探索来改善福利，而竞争性供给则会放大研究扭曲。这些结果表明，当研究生产率依赖于知识密度时，限制人工智能能力或促进人工智能供给市场力量的政策可能对创新和增长产生意想不到的益处。

papers.title: Long-term Vertical Contracts, Geography, and the Persistence of Brand Shares
papers.authors: Robert Clark, Jean-François Houde, Xinrong Zhu
papers.abstract: Previous research highlights persistent differences in national brand market shares across regions, driven by geographic consumer preferences and early entry advantages (Bronnenberg et al. 2007, 2009). This study investigates the extent to which long-term vertical contracts can explain the observed geographic dispersion and persistence of national brand dominance. Using NielsenIQ data from the same product categories as Bronnenberg et al. (2007), we follow Abowd et al. (1999) to decompose the variance in brand shares into Brand × Retailer and Brand × Market effects. Results show that 50% of the variance is explained by retailer effects, compared to 20% by market effects. This suggests that some retailers use vertical contracts that favor a specific brand across all markets in which they compete, such as exclusive-dealing, slotting allowances, or category-captaincy contracts, and that these play a key role in sustaining national brand dominance documented in prior literature. By emphasizing how retailer-specific factors drive observed patterns, we complement demand-side explanations and shift attention to supply-side factors that could affect competition.
papers.zh_title: 长期纵向合约、地理因素与品牌份额的持续性
papers.zh_abstract: 先前的研究强调了全国性品牌市场份额在不同地区间的持续差异，这种差异由地理上的消费者偏好和早期进入优势驱动（Bronnenberg et al. 2007, 2009）。本研究探讨了长期纵向合约在多大程度上可以解释所观察到的全国性品牌主导地位的地理分布和持续性。使用与Bronnenberg等人（2007）相同产品类别的NielsenIQ数据，我们遵循Abowd等人（1999）的方法，将品牌份额的方差分解为品牌×零售商效应和品牌×市场效应。结果显示，50%的方差由零售商效应解释，而市场效应仅解释20%。这表明，一些零售商使用有利于特定品牌的纵向合约（例如独家交易、上架费或品类领航合约），且这些合约在其竞争的所有市场中均适用，从而在维持先前文献所记录的全国性品牌主导地位方面发挥了关键作用。通过强调零售商特定因素如何驱动观察到的模式，我们补充了需求侧的解释，并将注意力转向可能影响竞争的供给侧因素。

papers.title: Measuring Industrial Policy: A Text-Based Approach
papers.authors: Réka Juhász, Nathan J. Lane, Emily Oehlsen, Veronica C. Perez
papers.abstract: Since the 18th century, policymakers have debated the merits of industrial policy (IP). Yet, economists lack basic facts about its use due to measurement challenges. We propose a new approach to IP measurement based on information contained in policy text. We show how off-the-shelf supervised machine learning tools can be used to categorize industrial policies at scale. Using this approach, we validate long-standing concerns with earlier measurement approaches that conflate IP with other types of policy. We apply our methodology to a global database of commercial policy descriptions, and provide a first look at IP use at the country, industry, and year levels (2010-2022). The new data on IP suggest that i) IP is on the rise; ii) modern IP tends to use subsidies and export promotion measures as opposed to tariffs; iii) rich countries heavily dominate IP use; iv) IP tends to target sectors with an established comparative advantage, particularly in high-income countries.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, ITI, POL, PR；JEL：C38, L52, O25
papers.zh_title: 衡量产业政策：一种基于文本的方法
papers.zh_abstract: 自18世纪以来，政策制定者一直在争论产业政策（IP）的利弊。然而，由于测量方面的挑战，经济学家缺乏关于其使用的基本事实。我们提出了一种基于政策文本所含信息的产业政策测量新方法。我们展示了如何利用现成的监督式机器学习工具来大规模地对产业政策进行分类。通过这种方法，我们验证了早期测量方法长期存在的担忧，即这些方法将产业政策与其他类型的政策混为一谈。我们将我们的方法应用于一个全球商业政策描述数据库，并首次从国家、行业和年份层面（2010-2022年）审视了产业政策的使用情况。关于产业政策的新数据表明：i) 产业政策正在兴起；ii) 现代产业政策倾向于使用补贴和出口促进措施，而非关税；iii) 富裕国家在产业政策使用中占据主导地位；iv) 产业政策倾向于针对具有既定比较优势的行业，尤其是在高收入国家。

papers.title: AI and Social Media: A Political Economy Perspective
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Asuman Ozdaglar, James Siderius
papers.abstract: We consider the political consequences of the use of artificial intelligence (AI) by online platforms engaged in social media content dissemination, entertainment, or electronic commerce. We identify two distinct but complementary mechanisms, the social media channel and the digital ads channel, which together and separately contribute to the polarization of voters and consequently the polarization of parties. First, AI-driven recommendations aimed at maximizing user engagement on platforms create echo chambers (or “filter bubbles”) that increase the likelihood that individuals are not confronted with counter-attitudinal content. Consequently, social media engagement makes voters more polarized, and then parties respond by becoming more polarized themselves. Second, we show that party competition can encourage platforms to rely more on targeted digital ads for monetization (as opposed to a subscription-based business model), and such ads in turn make the electorate more polarized, further contributing to the polarization of parties. These effects do not arise when one party is dominant, in which case the profit-maximizing business model of the platform is subscription-based. We discuss the impact regulations can have on the polarizing effects of AI-powered online platforms.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能与社交媒体：一个政治经济学视角
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考虑了从事社交媒体内容传播、娱乐或电子商务的在线平台使用人工智能的政治后果。我们识别出两种不同但互补的机制，即社交媒体渠道和数字广告渠道，它们共同且各自地加剧了选民的极化，进而导致政党的极化。首先，旨在最大化平台用户参与度的人工智能驱动推荐创造了回音室（或“过滤气泡”），增加了个人不接触对立态度内容的可能性。因此，社交媒体参与使选民更加极化，然后政党通过自身变得更加极化来回应。其次，我们表明政党竞争可以鼓励平台更多地依赖定向数字广告来实现货币化（相对于基于订阅的商业模式），而这种广告反过来又使选民更加极化，进一步加剧了政党的极化。当一个政党占主导地位时，这些效应不会出现，在这种情况下，平台利润最大化的商业模式是基于订阅的。我们讨论了监管可能对人工智能驱动的在线平台的极化效应产生的影响。

papers.title: A Theory of Endogenous Degrowth and Environmental Sustainability
papers.authors: Philippe Aghion, Timo Boppart, Michael Peters, Matthew Schwartzman, Fabrizio Zilibotti
papers.abstract: We develop and quantify a novel growth theory in which economic activity endogenously shifts from material production to quality improvements. Consumers derive utility from goods with differing environmental footprints: necessities are material-intensive and polluting, while luxuries are more service-based and emit less. Innovation can be directed toward either material productivity or product~quality. Because demand for luxuries is more sensitive to quality, the economy gradually becomes “weightless”: growth is driven by quality improvements, services become the dominant employment sector, and material production stabilizes at a finite level. This structural transformation enables rising living standards with declining environmental intensity, providing an endogenous path to degrowth in material output without compromising economic progress. Policy can accelerate the transition, but its burden is uneven, falling more heavily on the poor than on the rich.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, PR；JEL：E0, O41, O44, Q5
papers.zh_title: 内生性去增长与环境可持续性理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出并量化了一种新颖的增长理论，其中经济活动从物质生产内生性地转向质量改进。消费者从具有不同环境足迹的商品中获得效用：必需品是物质密集型且污染性的，而奢侈品则更基于服务且排放较少。创新可以导向物质生产率或产品质量。由于奢侈品需求对质量更敏感，经济逐渐变得“无重量”：增长由质量改进驱动，服务业成为主导就业部门，物质生产稳定在有限水平。这种结构性转型使得生活水平提高的同时环境强度下降，为物质产出去增长提供了一条内生路径，且不损害经济进步。政策可以加速这一转型，但其负担并不均衡，对穷人的影响比对富人更重。

papers.title: Expertise
papers.authors: David Autor, Neil Thompson
papers.abstract: When job tasks are automated, does this augment or diminish the value of labor in the tasks that remain? We argue the answer depends on whether removing tasks raises or reduces the expertise required for remaining non-automated tasks. Since the same task may be relatively expert in one occupation and inexpert in another, automation can simultaneously replace experts in some occupations while augmenting expertise in others. We propose a conceptual model of occupational task bundling that predicts that changing occupational expertise requirements have countervailing wage and employment effects: automation that decreases expertise requirements reduces wages but permits the entry of less expert workers; automation that raises requirements raises wages but reduces the set of qualified workers. We develop a novel, content-agnostic method for measuring job task expertise, and we use it to quantify changes in occupational expertise demands over four decades attributable to job task removal and addition. We document that automation has raised wages and reduced employment in occupations where it eliminated inexpert tasks, but lowered wages and increased employment in occupations where it eliminated expert tasks. These effects are distinct from—and in the case of employment, opposite to—the effects of changing task quantities. The expertise framework resolves the puzzle of why routine task automation has lowered employment but often raised wages in routine task-intensive occupations. It provides a general tool for analyzing how task automation and new task creation reshape the scarcity value of human expertise within and across occupations.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E24, J11, J23, J24
papers.zh_title: 专长
papers.zh_abstract: 当工作任务被自动化时，这是增强还是削弱了剩余任务中劳动力的价值？我们认为答案取决于移除任务是否提高或降低了剩余非自动化任务所需的专长。由于同一项任务在一个职业中可能相对专业，而在另一个职业中不专业，自动化可以同时取代某些职业中的专家，同时增强其他职业中的专长。我们提出了一个职业任务捆绑的概念模型，该模型预测职业专长要求的变化具有相反的工资和就业效应：降低专长要求的自动化会降低工资，但允许专长较低的工人进入；提高专长要求的自动化会提高工资，但会减少合格工人的数量。我们开发了一种新颖的、与内容无关的方法来衡量工作任务专长，并利用它来量化四十年来因任务移除和添加而导致的职业专长需求变化。我们证明，在消除非专业任务的职业中，自动化提高了工资并减少了就业；但在消除专业任务的职业中，自动化降低了工资并增加了就业。这些效应与任务数量变化的效应不同——就就业而言，甚至相反。专长框架解决了为什么常规任务自动化降低了就业，但往往提高了常规任务密集型职业工资的谜题。它提供了一个通用工具，用于分析任务自动化和新任务创建如何重塑跨职业和职业内部人类专长的稀缺价值。

papers.title: Convenience Lost
papers.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Robert J. Richmond, Tony Zhang
papers.abstract: We show long-term Treasury convenience yields are more sensitive to changes in Treasury supply than short-term Treasury convenience yields. The fiscal expansion in the past two decades and the resultant increase in Treasury supply depressed convenience yields heterogeneously across maturities — driving them close to zero for short-term Treasurys and into negative territory for long-term Treasurys. As a result, the aggregate seigniorage revenue earned by the U.S. from issuing safe and liquid financial assets has declined by a third. Issuing only short-term Treasurys could preserve the seigniorage revenue earned from Treasury convenience yields but would expose the government to more rollover risk.
papers.zh_title: 便利性收益的丧失
papers.zh_abstract: 我们证明，长期国债的便利性收益对国债供给变化的敏感度高于短期国债的便利性收益。过去二十年的财政扩张以及由此导致的国债供给增加，在不同期限上不均等地压低了便利性收益——使其在短期国债中趋近于零，在长期国债中则进入负值区间。因此，美国通过发行安全且流动性强的金融资产所获得的总铸币税收入下降了三分之一。仅发行短期国债可以保留从国债便利性收益中获得的铸币税收入，但这会使政府面临更大的展期风险。

papers.title: Production Function Estimation without Invertibility: Imperfectly Competitive Environments and Demand Shocks
papers.authors: Ulrich Doraszelski, Li Lixiong
papers.abstract: We advance the proxy variable approach to production function estimation. We show that the invertibility assumption at its heart is testable. We characterize what goes wrong if invertibility fails and what can still be done. We show that rethinking how the estimation procedure is implemented either eliminates or mitigates the bias that arises if invertibility fails. Furthermore, we show how a modification of the procedure ensures Neyman orthogonality, enhancing efficiency and robustness by rendering the asymptotic distribution of the GMM estimator in the second step of the estimation procedure invariant to estimation noise from the first step.
papers.zh_title: 无需可逆性的生产函数估计：不完全竞争环境与需求冲击
papers.zh_abstract: 我们推进了生产函数估计的代理变量方法。我们证明，其核心的可逆性假设是可检验的。我们刻画了当可逆性失效时会出现什么问题，以及仍然可以采取哪些措施。我们表明，重新思考估计程序的实施方式可以消除或减轻因可逆性失效而产生的偏差。此外，我们展示了如何通过修改该程序来确保奈曼正交性，通过使估计程序第二步中GMM估计量的渐近分布不受第一步估计噪声的影响，从而提高效率和稳健性。

papers.title: Group Health Insurance Versus ACA Marketplaces: Selection, Subsidies, and Welfare
papers.authors: Sebastián Fleitas, Caitlyn Fleming, Gautam Gowrisankaran, Anthony T. Lo Sasso
papers.abstract: The Affordable Care Act (ACA) changed incentives for individual and employer-sponsored insurance. Using unique small group market (SGM) data with detailed claims and enrollment information, we analyze the welfare gains across households in the SGM from alternative formulations of ACA health insurance exchanges (HIXs). Accounting for observable heterogeneity increases estimated demand elasticities. Moving all SGM enrollees to HIXs would reduce equilibrium adverse selection in HIX-type markets, increasing welfare for these households by $842 annually. The majority of households would obtain higher equilibrium welfare from HIXs, stemming from having more choices. Adding the 2014 ACA penalties only modestly decreases adverse selection.
papers.zh_title: 团体健康保险与ACA市场：选择、补贴与福利
papers.zh_abstract: 《平价医疗法案》改变了对个人保险和雇主提供保险的激励。利用独特的小团体市场数据，其中包含详细的理赔和参保信息，我们分析了ACA健康保险交易所的不同形式对小团体市场中各家庭福利收益的影响。考虑可观测的异质性会提高估计的需求弹性。将所有小团体市场参保者转移到健康保险交易所将减少交易所型市场中的均衡逆向选择，使这些家庭的年福利增加842美元。大多数家庭将从健康保险交易所获得更高的均衡福利，这源于拥有更多的选择。增加2014年ACA罚款仅会适度减少逆向选择。

papers.title: Medical School Closures, Market Adjustment, and Mortality in the Flexner Report Era
papers.authors: Karen Clay, Grant Miller, Margarita Portnykh, Ethan J. Schmick
papers.abstract: Early twentieth century efforts to overhaul the quality of medical education in the United States (principally between 1905 and 1915 – the “Flexner Report Era”) led to a steep decline in the number of medical schools and medical school graduates. In this paper, we examine the consequences of these medical school closures be- tween 1900 and 1930 for county-level physicians, nurses, and midwives per capita as well as for infant, non-infant, and total mortality. To do so, we construct a school closure intensity measure for all counties in the United States, combining variation in (i) distance from closures, (ii) the historical number of graduates from closing schools, and (iii) the timing of closures. Nearby medical school closures (within 300 miles) led to a 4% reduction in physicians per capita, even after physician market adjustment through physician migration and postponed retirement. Strikingly, we find that medical school closures led infant mortality rates to decline by 8% and non- infant mortality rates to decline by 4%, suggesting that reducing the supply of poorly trained physicians may have reduced mortality.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, EH；JEL：I11, I18, N31, N32
papers.zh_title: 医学院关闭、市场调整与弗莱克斯纳报告时代的死亡率
papers.zh_abstract: 二十世纪初，美国为提高医学教育质量而进行的改革（主要在1905年至1915年间，即“弗莱克斯纳报告时代”）导致医学院和医学院毕业生数量急剧下降。在本文中，我们研究了1900年至1930年间这些医学院关闭对县级人均医生、护士和助产士数量，以及婴儿死亡率、非婴儿死亡率和总死亡率的影响。为此，我们为美国所有县构建了一个医学院关闭强度指标，该指标综合了以下三个方面的变化：(i) 与关闭地点的距离，(ii) 关闭学校的历史毕业生数量，以及(iii) 关闭的时间。附近的医学院关闭（300英里以内）导致人均医生数量减少4%，即使在通过医生迁移和推迟退休进行医生市场调整之后也是如此。引人注目的是，我们发现医学院关闭导致婴儿死亡率下降8%，非婴儿死亡率下降4%，这表明减少训练不足的医生供给可能降低了死亡率。

papers.title: Cosmetology Gets a Trim: The Impact of Reducing Licensing Hours on Colleges and Students
papers.authors: Nicolas Acevedo Rebolledo, Kathryn J. Blanchard, Stephanie Riegg Cellini
papers.abstract: In the United States, licenses are required for entry into many different occupations. Requirements vary by state and occupation, but many licenses require a minimum number of training or instructional hours. We consider the impact of these hours requirements on students and postsecondary institutions, with a particular focus on cosmetology (also known as hairstyling or beauty). Cosmetology licensing requires extensive training hours (between 500 and 2,100 hours) in every state and typically exceeds the time required for similar licenses. We implement a difference-in-difference design based on state-level changes in required licensing hours for cosmetologists between 2011 and 2019. We ask how and whether changes to hours requirements influence student outcomes and institutional behavior. We find that lowering required hours is likely beneficial for students, as it raises completion, lowers tuition, and expands enrollment among some groups of students. Larger institutions appear to reduce their tuition by less than smaller institutions. We find no detectable effects on the earnings of cosmetologists.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS；JEL：I21, I23, I28, J44, J48
papers.zh_title: 美容业的削减：减少执照学时对学院和学生的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国，许多职业的准入都需要执照。各州和职业的要求各不相同，但许多执照要求最低培训或教学时数。我们考虑了这些学时要求对学生和高等教育机构的影响，特别关注美容业（也称为发型设计或美业）。每个州的美容执照都要求大量的培训学时（500至2100小时之间），且通常超过类似执照所需的时间。我们基于2011年至2019年间各州对美容师执照要求学时的变化，实施了一项双重差分设计。我们询问学时要求的变化如何以及是否会影响学生成果和机构行为。我们发现，降低所需学时可能对学生有利，因为它能提高毕业率、降低学费，并扩大部分学生群体的入学人数。大型机构降低学费的幅度似乎小于小型机构。我们没有发现对美容师收入有可检测的影响。

papers.title: Health Insurance Protections and Ex Ante Moral Hazard in Risky Health Behaviors
papers.authors: Barış K. Yörük, Joseph J. Sabia, Tessie Krishna, Dhaval M. Dave
papers.abstract: With the goal of lowering incentives for alcohol and substance abuse, U.S. states have historically permitted private health insurers to deny reimbursement of medical claims stemming from alcohol or opioid impairment. However, a potential unintended consequence of such “exclusion provisions” is that they may reduce providers’ incentives to screen patients for alcohol intoxication and substance abuse, leading to an increase in risky health behaviors that carry substantial externality costs. In response to these concerns, 16 states and the District of Columbia repealed their exclusion provisions and replaced them with explicit prohibitions on the denial of health insurance claims resulting from alcohol and other substance use impairment (PDHIAs). This study is the first to comprehensively explore the effects of PDHIAs on alcohol- and drug- related outcomes, with a particular focus on externalities associated with these risky health behaviors, allowing us to broadly assess their potential welfare effects. Leveraging a variety of national data sources (Uniform Crime Reports, Fatality Analysis Reporting System, Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System, Treatment Episode Data Set, and Medical Expenditure Panel Survey) in conjunction with a generalized difference-in-differences approach, we find little support for the hypothesis that PDHIAs generated ex ante moral hazard. To the contrary, there is some evidence that PDHIAs may have reduced some criminal arrests, drunk driving behaviors, and alcohol use. One explanation for these findings is that physicians may be more willing to refer treatment services for substance use-related health issues when patients and hospitals are not financially penalized by PDHIAs. Lastly, there is little evidence that PDHIAs had broader impacts on private insurance markets, either in affecting private health insurance coverage or average premiums.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：I10, I11, I12, I13, I18, K23
papers.zh_title: 健康保险保护与风险健康行为中的事前道德风险
papers.zh_abstract: 为了降低对酒精和药物滥用的激励，美国各州历史上曾允许私人健康保险公司拒绝赔付因酒精或阿片类药物损伤引起的医疗索赔。然而，这种“排除条款”的一个潜在意外后果是，它们可能降低医疗服务提供者筛查患者酒精中毒和药物滥用的激励，从而导致具有重大外部性成本的风险健康行为增加。针对这些担忧，16个州和哥伦比亚特区废除了其排除条款，取而代之的是明确禁止因酒精和其他药物使用损伤而拒绝健康保险索赔的规定。本研究首次全面探讨了这些禁止因酒精和其他药物使用损伤而拒绝健康保险索赔的规定对酒精和药物相关结果的影响，特别关注与这些风险健康行为相关的外部性，从而使我们能够广泛评估其潜在的福利效应。利用多种国家数据源（统一犯罪报告、致命事故报告系统、行为风险因素监测系统、治疗事件数据集和医疗支出小组调查），并结合广义双重差分方法，我们几乎没有发现支持这些禁止因酒精和其他药物使用损伤而拒绝健康保险索赔的规定产生事前道德风险这一假设的证据。相反，有一些证据表明，这些规定可能减少了某些刑事逮捕、酒后驾驶行为和酒精使用。对这些发现的一种解释是，当患者和医院不因这些禁止因酒精和其他药物使用损伤而拒绝健康保险索赔的规定而受到经济惩罚时，医生可能更愿意为与物质使用相关的健康问题提供治疗服务转诊。最后，几乎没有证据表明这些禁止因酒精和其他药物使用损伤而拒绝健康保险索赔的规定对私人保险市场产生了更广泛的影响，无论是影响私人健康保险覆盖率还是平均保费。

papers.title: Transition to Green Technology along the Supply Chain
papers.authors: Philippe Aghion, Lint Barrage, Eric Donald, David Hémous, Ernest Liu
papers.abstract: We analyze a model of green technological transition along a supply chain. The model generates a unique equilibrium for given initial conditions but multiple steady-states. We show that: (i) even in the presence of Pigouvian environmental taxation, targeted sectoral subsidies are generally necessary to implement the social optimum; (ii) small, targeted industrial policy may bring large welfare gains; (iii) a government which is unable to subsidize greenification in more than one sector or price carbon at its true social cost should primarily target downstream sectors; (iv) over-investing in greenification in the wrong upstream branch may derail the overall transition towards greenification. Finally, we calibrate our model to decarbonization of heavy duty transportation (trucking, aviation, etc.) via hydrogen. We find that, absent industrial policy, the economy can get stuck in the “wrong” steady-state with CO₂ emissions vastly above the social optimum even with a Pigouvian carbon price in place.
papers.zh_title: 供应链上的绿色技术转型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一个沿供应链进行绿色技术转型的模型。该模型在给定初始条件下产生唯一均衡，但存在多个稳态。我们证明：(i) 即使存在庇古式环境税，通常也需要有针对性的部门补贴才能实现社会最优；(ii) 小规模、有针对性的产业政策可能带来巨大的福利收益；(iii) 一个无法补贴超过一个部门的绿色化或无法按真实社会成本对碳定价的政府，应主要针对下游部门；(iv) 在错误的上游分支过度投资绿色化可能会破坏向绿色化的整体转型。最后，我们将模型校准到通过氢能实现重型运输（卡车运输、航空等）脱碳的情景。我们发现，在没有产业政策的情况下，即使存在庇古式碳价，经济也可能陷入“错误”的稳态，二氧化碳排放量远高于社会最优水平。

papers.title: Controlling Collective Attention: Flooding versus Focusing by Politicians
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: This paper develops a formal model of strategic political communication when citizens have limited attention and heterogeneous inference procedures. A politician privately observes their quality across multiple policy dimensions and must allocate a fixed informational capacity between breadth (number of issues disclosed) and depth (signals per issue). Citizens attend to exactly one dimension and advocate for investigation only when sufficiently suspicious; an investigation is triggered only if enough citizens coordinate on the same issue. We show that high dimensionality with low depth—“flooding the zone”—maximises disagreement among citizens within the feasible (m, n) choices: those attending different issues see small samples and reach divergent conclusions. Politicians with unfavourable information optimally flood when accountability penalties are large, exploiting coordination failures to avoid scrutiny. A key comparative static shows that as accountability penalties rise, the bad type’s optimal breadth is weakly increasing and eventually reaches maximal breadth, exploiting coordination failures to reduce exposure risk. When the good type retains a more concentrated disclosure choice to preserve reputational performance and the possibility of vindication, the resulting equilibrium features action separation in disclosure breadth. The model also admits pooling equilibria in which both types flood and information is abundant but shallow (“transparency theatre”) under the corresponding incentive inequalities. Introducing a mixture of naïve and sophisticated citizens who interpret disclosure strategically changes reputational incentives; we show that equilibria supported by strict inequalities are locally robust to the fraction of sophisticated citizens and that average beliefs vary affinely with this fraction.
papers.zh_title: 控制集体注意力：政治家的信息泛滥与聚焦策略
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个当公民注意力有限且具有异质性推断程序时的战略性政治沟通形式化模型。一位政治家私下观察到自己在多个政策维度上的质量，并必须在广度（披露问题的数量）和深度（每个问题的信号数量）之间分配固定的信息容量。公民只关注一个维度，并且只有在足够怀疑时才会主张进行调查；只有当足够多的公民在同一问题上协调一致时，调查才会被触发。我们表明，在可行的（m, n）选择中，高维度与低深度——“信息泛滥”——能最大化公民之间的分歧：关注不同问题的公民看到小样本并得出不同的结论。拥有不利信息的政治家在问责惩罚较大时会最优地选择信息泛滥，利用协调失败来避免审查。一个关键的比较静态分析表明，随着问责惩罚增加，坏类型的最优广度弱递增并最终达到最大广度，利用协调失败来降低暴露风险。当好类型保留更集中的披露选择以维护声誉表现和获得澄清的可能性时，由此产生的均衡在披露广度上具有行动分离特征。该模型也允许混同均衡，在相应的激励不等式下，两种类型都进行信息泛滥，信息丰富但浅薄（“透明度剧场”）。引入混合了天真型和老练型公民（后者会策略性地解读披露）会改变声誉激励；我们表明，由严格不等式支持的均衡对于老练型公民的比例是局部稳健的，并且平均信念随该比例仿射变化。

papers.title: Is Less Really More? Comparing the Climate and Productivity Impacts of a Shrinking Population
papers.authors: Mark Budolfson, Michael Geruso, Kevin J. Kuruc, Dean Spears, Sangita Vyas
papers.abstract: We test the widely shared view that an important benefit of the ongoing, global decline in fertility and population growth will be reductions in long-run temperatures. We assess climate outcomes and average per capita incomes under a baseline scenario of depopulation against a counterfactual in which the world population stabilizes at a level higher than today’s. Although these paths differ by billions of people in 2200, we find that the implied temperatures differ by less than one tenth of a degree C. Timing drives this result. Fertility shifts take generations to meaningfully change population size, by which time per capita emissions are projected to have significantly declined, even under pessimistic policy assumptions. This makes the additional warming from any plausibly sized fertility changes small relative to other well-studied effects of population growth, including non-rival innovation. Moreover, once the possibility of net-negative emissions is accounted for, even the sign of the population-temperature link becomes ambiguous.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DEV, EEE, PE, PR；JEL：J11, J13, O30, O40, Q54
papers.zh_title: 少即是多？比较人口萎缩对气候和生产力的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们检验了一个广泛持有的观点，即当前全球生育率和人口增长的持续下降将带来长期气温降低的重要益处。我们评估了在人口减少的基准情景下与在人口稳定在高于当前水平的反事实情景下的气候结果和人均平均收入。尽管这些路径在2200年相差数十亿人，但我们发现由此产生的气温差异小于0.1摄氏度。时间因素驱动了这一结果。生育率变化需要几代人才能显著改变人口规模，而到那时，即使在悲观的政策假设下，人均排放量预计也已大幅下降。这使得任何合理规模的生育率变化带来的额外变暖，相对于人口增长的其他经过充分研究的影响（包括非竞争性创新）而言都很小。此外，一旦考虑到净负排放的可能性，人口与气温之间联系的符号甚至变得模糊。

papers.title: The Longevity of Older Wives and Their Husbands: Comparing Actual Couples with Synthetic Couples
papers.authors: Janice Compton, Robert A. Pollak, Seth G. Sanders
papers.abstract: Using data from the National Health Interview Survey (NHIS), we construct two measures of the longevity of older wives and husbands. For definiteness, we focus on couples in which the wife was 60 and the husband 62 in 1988. Our first measure utilizes a 4 x 4 "longevity matrix" in which the bins correspond to the decades in which the spouses died. For example, an entry in the (3,2) bin indicates that the wife died in the 3rd decade (between ages 80 and 89) and the husband in the second decade (between ages 72 and 81). Our second measures use the Gompertz distribution to estimate the censored observations from the NHIS. We use the Gompertz estimates of age-specific mortalities to construct joint and survivor life expectancies for the couples in our working sample. We compare the longevity estimates based on actual couples from the NHIS with estimates based on synthetic couples constructed from the 1988 CDC life tables. Research based on randomly formed synthetic couples constructed from CDC life table data shows that the randomness of mortality and the overlap between spouses' age-specific mortality distributions imply dramatically long life spans for surviving spouses. The 4 x 4 longevity matrices show that longevity effects are magnified at the level of the couple by assortative marriage.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS；JEL：J10, J12, J14, J19
papers.zh_title: 年长妻子及其丈夫的寿命：比较实际夫妻与合成夫妻
papers.zh_abstract: 利用全国健康访谈调查（NHIS）的数据，我们构建了年长妻子和丈夫寿命的两种度量。为明确起见，我们聚焦于1988年妻子60岁、丈夫62岁的夫妻。我们的第一种度量使用一个4×4的“寿命矩阵”，其中单元格对应配偶去世的十年区间。例如，(3,2)单元格中的条目表示妻子在第三个十年（80至89岁之间）去世，丈夫在第二个十年（72至81岁之间）去世。我们的第二种度量使用冈珀茨分布来估计NHIS中的删失观测值。我们利用冈珀茨估计的年龄别死亡率，为工作样本中的夫妻构建联合和遗属预期寿命。我们将基于NHIS实际夫妻的寿命估计与基于1988年CDC生命表构建的合成夫妻的估计进行比较。基于从CDC生命表数据随机形成的合成夫妻的研究表明，死亡率的随机性以及配偶年龄别死亡率分布之间的重叠意味着遗属配偶的寿命极长。4×4寿命矩阵显示，通过选型婚姻，寿命效应在夫妻层面被放大。

papers.title: The Labor Supply Curve is Upward Sloping: The Effects of Immigrant-Induced Demand Shocks
papers.authors: Sigurd Galaasen, Andreas R. Kostøl, Joan Monras, Jonathan Vogel
papers.abstract: What is the effect of immigration on native labor-market outcomes? An extensive literature identifies the differential impact of immigration on natives employed in jobs that are more exposed to immigrant labor (supply exposure). But immigrants consume in addition to producing output. Despite this, no literature identifies the impact on natives employed in jobs that are more exposed to immigrant consumption (demand exposure). We study native labor-market effects of supply and demand exposures to immigration. Theoretically, we formalize both measures of exposure and solve for their effects on native wages. Empirically, we combine employer-employee data with a newly collected dataset covering electronic payments for the universe of residents in Norway to measure supply and demand exposures of native workers to immigration over the period 2000-2015, surrounding EU expansions that begin in 2004. We find large, positive, and persistent differential effects of demand exposure on native worker income. Finally, we embed our qualitative theory into a quantitative framework, choose model elasticities to match our empirical estimates, and measure real wage changes for natives.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力供给曲线是向上倾斜的：移民引发的需求冲击的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 移民对本土劳动力市场结果的影响是什么？大量文献识别了移民对从事更易受移民劳动力影响的岗位（供给暴露）的本土工人的差异化影响。但移民除了生产产出外还进行消费。尽管如此，没有文献识别移民对从事更易受移民消费影响的岗位（需求暴露）的本土工人的影响。我们研究了供给和需求暴露于移民对本土劳动力市场的影响。理论上，我们形式化了这两种暴露度量，并求解了它们对本土工资的影响。实证上，我们将雇主-雇员数据与涵盖挪威全体居民电子支付的新收集数据集相结合，以衡量2000-2015年期间（围绕2004年开始的欧盟扩张）本土工人对移民的供给和需求暴露。我们发现需求暴露对本土工人收入具有巨大、正向且持续的差异化影响。最后，我们将我们的定性理论嵌入一个定量框架，选择模型弹性以匹配我们的实证估计，并衡量本土工人的实际工资变化。

papers.title: Macro Shocks and Firm-Level Response Heterogeneity
papers.authors: Steven J. Davis, Stephen Hansen, Cristhian Seminario-Amez
papers.abstract: Macro shocks produce high dispersion in firm-level equity returns, sales growth, and other outcomes. We show that this dispersion reflects observable differences in business characteristics. To do so, we combine firm-level returns on stock market ``jump" days with text about business risks in prior 10-K filings to construct firm-specific shock exposures. Our exposure measures explain firm-level abnormal returns through interpretable variation in language. They also explain most of the increased dispersion in firm-level revenue growth after major shocks and much of the dispersion in employment growth, investment rates, and earnings surprises. Our evidence yields a novel interpretation for countercyclical dispersion, highlighting the key role of heterogeneous business characteristics in macro shock transmission.
papers.zh_title: 宏观冲击与企业层面反应的异质性
papers.zh_abstract: 宏观冲击在企业层面的股票回报、销售增长和其他结果中产生高度离散性。我们表明，这种离散性反映了商业特征的可观测差异。为此，我们将股票市场“跳跃”日的企业层面回报与先前10-K文件中关于商业风险的文本相结合，构建了企业特定的冲击暴露度。我们的暴露度量通过语言中可解释的变异解释了企业层面的异常回报。它们还解释了重大冲击后企业层面收入增长离散性增加的大部分，以及就业增长、投资率和盈利惊喜离散性的很大一部分。我们的证据为反周期离散性提供了一种新的解释，强调了异质性商业特征在宏观冲击传导中的关键作用。

papers.title: Economic Models of Cultural Transmission
papers.authors: Alberto Bisin, Thierry Verdier
papers.abstract: In this chapter we survey recent advances in modeling cultural transmission in the economics literature. We first present the basic canonical model of the evolution of cultural traits in the social sciences. Both Economics and Evolutionary anthropology build on this canonical model but their approaches are conceptually very different. After elucidating these differences, we introduce several recent economic models of cultural transmission which address a rich set of novel and interesting questions in the literature. We present these models as extensions of the canonical framework, organized along theoretical dimensions that we categorize as pertaining to preferences and technology. We finally briefly discuss how cultural evolution represents a fundamental component - alongside institutional change - of recent theoretical work on the political economy of long-run growth. We conclude suggesting interesting areas for future research.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, POL；JEL：C60, D1, N0, P0, Z10, Z13
papers.zh_title: 文化传播的经济模型
papers.zh_abstract: 在本章中，我们综述了经济学文献中文化传播建模的最新进展。我们首先介绍社会科学中文化特征演化的基本经典模型。经济学和进化人类学都建立在这个经典模型之上，但它们的处理方法在概念上截然不同。在阐明这些差异之后，我们介绍了几种最近的文化传播经济模型，这些模型解决了文献中一系列丰富新颖且有趣的问题。我们将这些模型呈现为经典框架的扩展，按照我们归类为偏好和技术的理论维度进行组织。最后，我们简要讨论了文化演化如何与制度变迁一起，成为近期关于长期增长的政治经济学理论工作的基本组成部分。我们提出未来研究的有趣领域作为结论。

papers.title: Coordination and Cooperation
papers.authors: Pedro Dal Bó, Guillaume Fréchette
papers.abstract: An extensive experimental literature has documented miscoordination in establishing cooperative relationships when they can be supported in indefinitely repeated games: some people systematically try to cooperate, while others do not. The literature has had little success in finding personal characteristics that correlate systematically with these behaviors. We show that subjects who play the risky but efficient action in a simple coordination game (i.e., play stag in a stag hunt game) are significantly more likely to cooperate in indefinitely repeated games. This suggests that subjects who are less susceptible to strategic uncertainty are more likely to attempt to establish cooperative relationships.
papers.zh_title: 协调与合作
papers.zh_abstract: 大量实验文献记录了在无限重复博弈中建立合作关系时出现的协调失败现象：一些人系统性地尝试合作，而另一些人则不然。文献在寻找与这些行为系统相关的个人特征方面收效甚微。我们表明，在简单协调博弈中选择冒险但高效行动（即在猎鹿博弈中选择猎鹿）的受试者，在无限重复博弈中显著更有可能合作。这表明，对战略不确定性较不敏感的受试者更有可能尝试建立合作关系。

papers.title: Attribute Production and Biased Technical Change in Automobiles
papers.authors: Asa Watten, Soren T. Anderson
papers.abstract: Cars have gotten bigger and faster yet more fuel efficient in recent decades. Why? We estimate an equilibrium model of car attribute production using U.S. household microdata for 1995–2017 and structurally decompose attribute trends into underlying mechanisms. We find that technical change led to gains in all attributes. Rising gas prices boosted efficiency but were offset by surging demand for size and acceleration. Efficiency standards were largely ineffective. We show that using technology alone to meet tighter standards quadruples compliance costs, while half the efficiency gain from a fuel-saving technology subsidy is reallocated to other attributes in equilibrium.
papers.zh_title: 汽车中的属性生产与有偏技术变革
papers.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，汽车变得更大、更快，同时也更省油。这是为什么？我们利用1995-2017年美国住户微观数据估计了一个汽车属性生产的均衡模型，并从结构上分解属性趋势背后的潜在机制。我们发现技术变革带来了所有属性的提升。汽油价格上涨提高了效率，但被对尺寸和加速性能的激增需求所抵消。能效标准在很大程度上是无效的。我们表明，仅依靠技术来满足更严格的标准会使合规成本增加四倍，而燃油节约技术补贴所带来的一半效率提升在均衡中被重新分配给了其他属性。

papers.title: How Does Wage Inequality Affect the Labor Movement?
papers.authors: Barbara Biasi, Zoë B. Cullen, Julia H. Gilman, Nina Roussille
papers.abstract: This paper provides causal evidence on how wage inequality among workers affects the labor movement using three complementary research designs: a vignette experiment with union organizers, a natural policy experiment that increased wage inequality among Wisconsin school teachers, and an information intervention during the 2023 Writers Guild of America strike. Across all studies, we find that inequality undermines union strength through multiple channels. First, workers with high individual bargaining power are more likely to withdraw support in unequal environments, preferring individual over collective bargaining. Second, union organizers strategically respond to inequality in ways that may preserve membership but limit redistribution, such as shifting their campaign away from wages and choosing smaller, more homogeneous bargaining units. Taken together, our findings highlight the potential for “inequality traps,” where rising inequality erodes the very institutions designed to counteract it.
papers.zh_title: 工资不平等如何影响劳工运动？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用三种互补的研究设计，提供了关于工人之间工资不平等如何影响劳工运动的因果证据：一项与工会组织者进行的场景实验，一项增加了威斯康星州学校教师工资不平等的自然政策实验，以及2023年美国编剧协会罢工期间的一项信息干预。在所有研究中，我们发现不平等通过多种渠道削弱了工会力量。首先，在不平等环境中，拥有较高个人议价能力的工人更有可能撤回支持，倾向于个人而非集体谈判。其次，工会组织者会战略性地应对不平等，其方式可能维持会员数量但限制再分配，例如将竞选活动从工资议题转移开，并选择更小、更同质的谈判单位。综合来看，我们的发现凸显了“不平等陷阱”的可能性，即日益加剧的不平等侵蚀了旨在抵消不平等的制度本身。

papers.title: Money or Monitoring: Evidence on Improving Worker Effort
papers.authors: Jing Cai, Sai Luo, Shing-Yi Wang
papers.abstract: Higher compensation and increased monitoring are two common strategies for addressing the moral hazard problem between firms and workers. In a field experiment with new hires at an automobile manufacturing firm in China, we randomly varied both signing bonuses and monitoring intensity. Both interventions increased worker output but through different channels: signing bonuses led to longer working hours without significant gains in performance, while enhanced monitoring improved performance as evaluated by managers. Additionally, bonuses reduced quit rates, whereas monitoring raised them. These results suggest that firms should carefully consider their primary objectives and weigh these trade-offs when designing optimal labor contracts.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：C93, J24, J30, M52, O15
papers.zh_title: 金钱还是监督：关于提高工人努力程度的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 提高薪酬和加强监督是解决企业与工人之间道德风险问题的两种常见策略。在一项针对中国某汽车制造企业新员工的实地实验中，我们随机改变了签约奖金和监督强度。两种干预措施都提高了工人产出，但通过不同的渠道：签约奖金导致工作时间延长，但绩效没有显著提高；而加强监督则提高了管理者评估的绩效。此外，奖金降低了离职率，而监督则提高了离职率。这些结果表明，企业在设计最优劳动合同时应仔细考虑其主要目标并权衡这些取舍。

papers.title: State of the Art: Economic Development Through the Lens of Paintings
papers.authors: Clément Gorin, Stephan Heblich, Yanos Zylberberg
papers.abstract: This paper uses 627,369 paintings since 1400 to study how societies experienced major socioeconomic transformations. We develop computer vision algorithms to extract two signals from each artwork—emotional expression and visual indicators of material living standards—and validate them against modern measures of wellbeing and economic output. Our empirical analysis documents how populations experienced socioeconomic changes by exploiting variation in emotional and material signals within artists’ oeuvres and conditional on painting sub-genres. While both respond to shocks to living standards, such as climate or trade, emotional expression also varies with broader economic and institutional conditions, often without corresponding changes in material outcomes. These findings suggest that paintings provide a long-run measure of experienced welfare, complementing conventional indicators of economic performance.
papers.zh_title: 艺术之镜：通过绘画看经济发展
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了自1400年以来的63万幅绘画，以揭示视觉艺术如何反映其社会经济背景。我们开发了一种学习算法来预测每幅画中传达的九种基本情感，并分离出一种情境效应——即在相同地点和年份创作的艺术品之间共享的情感信号，同时控制艺术家、流派和特定时代的影响。这些情感分布编码了关于艺术品创作背景的生活水平、不确定性或不平等性的微妙但有意义的信息。我们提出这种基于历史艺术品的情感度量，作为考察社会如何经历重大社会经济转型（包括气候变率、贸易动态、技术变革、知识生产转变和政治转型）的新视角。

papers.title: Eurosclerosis at 40: Labor Market Institutions, Dynamism, and European Competitiveness
papers.authors: Benjamin Schoefer
papers.abstract: This paper explores a repositioning of Europe’s labor market institutions as potential drivers of the transatlantic gap in macroeconomic performance. Institutional diagnoses were prominent in times of high European unemployment in the 1980-90s. But interest waned as joblessness fell—even though the decline was uneven, precarious work arrangements have grown, and labor markets remain largely unreformed (unlike product and financial markets). Yet, rigid labor market institutions might continue to matter because they can stifle labor market and business dynamism: Europeans switch jobs much less frequently, and restructuring is much rarer. Recent research argues that such immobility impedes wage and productivity growth. Moreover, this low dynamism might contribute to Europe’s specific underperformance in tech, R&D, disruptive innovation, ICT adoption—where creative destruction requires fluid reallocation. This institutional labor market perspective on European competitiveness complements prevailing diagnoses focused on capital and product market fragmentation. Tight labor markets, lower unemployment, and shrinking labor supply might keep this nexus timely.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：E0, J0, O0
papers.zh_title: 四十年的欧洲硬化症：劳动力市场制度、活力与欧洲竞争力
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了将欧洲劳动力市场制度重新定位为跨大西洋宏观经济表现差距的潜在驱动因素。在1980-90年代欧洲高失业时期，制度诊断曾备受关注。但随着失业率下降，人们的兴趣减弱——尽管失业率下降并不均衡，不稳定的工作安排有所增加，且劳动力市场在很大程度上仍未改革（与产品和金融市场不同）。然而，僵化的劳动力市场制度可能仍然重要，因为它们会抑制劳动力市场和商业活力：欧洲人换工作的频率低得多，企业重组也少得多。最近的研究认为，这种不流动性阻碍了工资和生产率增长。此外，这种低活力可能导致欧洲在科技、研发、颠覆性创新、ICT应用等领域的特定表现不佳——在这些领域，创造性破坏需要流动性的重新配置。这种关于欧洲竞争力的制度性劳动力市场视角，补充了当前侧重于资本和产品市场碎片化的诊断。紧张的劳动力市场、较低的失业率和萎缩的劳动力供给可能使这种关联保持时效性。

papers.title: Firewood in the American Economy: 1700 to 2010.
papers.authors: Nicholas Z. Muller
papers.abstract: Despite the central role of firewood in the development of the early American economy, prices for this energy fuel are absent from official government statistics and the scholarly literature. This paper presents the most comprehensive dataset of firewood prices in the United States compiled to date, encompassing over 6,000 price quotes from 1700 to 2010. Between 1700 and 2010, real firewood prices increased by between 0.2% and 0.4%, annually, and from 1800 to the Civil War, real prices increased especially rapidly, between 0.7% and 1% per year. Rising firewood prices and falling coal prices led to the transition to coal as the primary energy fuel. Between 1860 and 1890, the income elasticity for firewood switched from 0.5 to -0.5. Beginning in the last decade of the 18th century, firewood output increased from about 18% of GDP to just under 30% of GDP in the 1830s. The value of firewood fell to less than 5% of GDP by the 1880s. Prior estimates of firewood output in the 19th century significantly underestimated its value. Finally, incorporating the new estimates of firewood output into agricultural production leads to higher estimates of agricultural productivity growth prior to 1860 than previously reported in the literature.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EEE；JEL：N11, N12, N51, N52, N71, N72, Q23
papers.zh_title: 美国经济中的木柴：1700年至2010年
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管木柴在美国早期经济发展中扮演核心角色，但这种能源燃料的价格在官方政府统计数据和学术文献中却缺失。本文提供了迄今为止最全面的美国木柴价格数据集，涵盖了从1700年到2010年的6000多个报价。在1700年至2010年间，实际木柴价格每年上涨0.2%至0.4%；从1800年到内战期间，实际价格增长尤为迅速，每年在0.7%至1%之间。木柴价格上涨和煤炭价格下跌导致了向煤炭作为主要能源燃料的转型。在1860年至1890年间，木柴的收入弹性从0.5变为-0.5。从18世纪最后十年开始，木柴产出从约占GDP的18%增加到19世纪30年代的略低于30%。到19世纪80年代，木柴价值降至GDP的不到5%。先前对19世纪木柴产出的估计显著低估了其价值。最后，将木柴产出的新估计纳入农业生产，会导致1860年之前的农业生产力增长率高于文献先前报告的水平。

papers.title: The Political Economy of Stimulus Transfers
papers.authors: Silvia Vannutelli
papers.abstract: Stimulus transfers are widely used during economic downturns, yet they are often poorly targeted from an economic perspective. I show that political incentives might help explain this discrepancy. I study one of the largest stimulus tax credits in Italy which excluded the poorest individuals and targeted middle-income earners. Leveraging quasi-random geographic variation in recipient shares and a difference-in-differences design, I find that the transfer raised the incumbent party’s vote share by 0.18 percentage points per 1 pp rise in recipients. These gains persist for at least five years. Political returns are stronger in areas with relatively richer beneficiaries, despite weaker consumption responses, and electoral punishment for exclusion is similarly asymmetric: higher-income excluded individuals reduce support for the incumbent, while poorer excluded individuals do not. Voters also punish incumbents when transfers are revoked, helping explain why temporary programs are rarely repealed. A counterfactual transfer targeting poorer households would have increased the consumption response by 30\\% but reduced electoral returns by at least 15\\%. These findings highlight a key political-economy trade-off in stimulus design, where electoral incentives skew transfers toward politically responsive recipients, as opposed to consumption responsive recipients. JEL: D72, H23, H53, I38, O15.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D72, H23, H53, I38
papers.zh_title: 刺激转移支付的政治经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 刺激转移支付在经济衰退期间被广泛使用，但从经济角度来看，它们往往瞄准不当。我表明政治激励可能有助于解释这种差异。我研究了意大利最大的刺激税收抵免之一，该抵免排除了最贫困的个人，而针对中等收入者。利用受益者份额的准随机地理差异和双重差分设计，我发现转移支付使执政党的得票率每增加1个百分点（受益者比例）上升0.18个百分点。这些收益至少持续五年。政治回报在受益者相对较富裕的地区更强，尽管消费反应较弱，而排斥的选举惩罚同样不对称：被排除的较高收入者减少对执政党的支持，而被排除的较贫困者则不会。当转移支付被撤销时，选民也会惩罚执政者，这有助于解释为什么临时项目很少被废除。一项针对较贫困家庭的反事实转移支付将使消费反应增加30%，但会使选举回报至少减少15%。这些发现突显了刺激设计中一个关键的政治经济学权衡，即选举激励将转移支付偏向于政治上有回应的受益者，而非消费上有回应的受益者。JEL: D72, H23, H53, I38, O15。

papers.title: The Power Asymmetry in Fuzzy Regression Discontinuity Designs
papers.authors: Daniel Kaliski, Michael P. Keane, Timothy Neal
papers.abstract: In a fuzzy regression discontinuity (RD) design, the probability of treatment jumps when a running variable (R) passes a threshold (R0). Fuzzy RD estimates are obtained via a procedure analogous to two-stage least squares (2SLS), where an indicator I(R > R0) plays the role of the instrument. Recently, Keane and Neal (2023, 2024) showed that 2SLS t-tests suffer from a “power asymmetry”: 2SLS standard errors are spuriously small (large) when the 2SLS estimate is close to (far from) the OLS estimate. Here, we show that a similar problem arises in Fuzzy RD. Hence, if the endogeneity bias is positive, the Fuzzy RD t-test has little power to detect true negative effects, and inflated power to find false positives. The problem persists even if the instrument is very strong. To avoid this problem one should rely exclusively on the intent-to-treat (ITT) regression to assess significance of the treatment effect.
papers.zh_title: 模糊断点回归设计中的权力不对称性
papers.zh_abstract: 在模糊断点回归设计中，当运行变量R超过阈值R0时，接受处理的概率会发生跳跃。模糊断点回归的估计通过类似于两阶段最小二乘法的程序获得，其中指标I(R > R0)充当工具变量。最近，Keane和Neal（2023, 2024）指出，两阶段最小二乘法的t检验存在“权力不对称性”：当两阶段最小二乘估计值接近（远离）普通最小二乘估计值时，两阶段最小二乘标准误会虚假地偏小（偏大）。在此，我们表明模糊断点回归中也存在类似问题。因此，如果内生性偏差为正，模糊断点回归的t检验检测真实负效应的能力很弱，而发现假阳性结果的能力却增强。即使工具变量非常强，该问题依然存在。为避免此问题，应完全依赖意向性治疗回归来评估处理效应的显著性。

papers.title: How the 1942 Japanese Exclusion Impacted U.S. Agriculture
papers.authors: Peter Zhixian Lin, Giovanni Peri
papers.abstract: In the early 1940s, Japanese American farmers represented a highly skilled segment of the agricultural workforce in the Western United States, characterized by higher education levels and more specialized farming expertise than U.S.-born farmers. During World War II, around 110,000 Japanese Americans (and 22,000 agricultural workers among them) were forcibly relocated from an “exclusion zone” along the West Coast to internment camps. Most never returned to farming. Using county-level panel data from historical agricultural censuses and a triple-difference (DDD) estimation approach we find that, by 1960, counties in the exclusion zone experienced 12% lower cumulative growth in assessed farm value for each percentage point reduction of their 1940 share of Japanese farm workers, relative to counties outside the exclusion zone. These counties also lagged in farm revenues, adoption of high-value crops, mechanization, and adoption of commercial fertilizer. We present suggestive evidence of broader negative spillovers to local economic growth beyond the agricultural sector. Taken together, our findings highlight the long-run economic costs of this policy, illustrating how the loss of skilled farmers can reduce agricultural growth and, in a time of fast technological adoption, may have negative effects on the whole regional development.
papers.zh_title: 1942年日裔美国人驱逐对美国农业的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在20世纪40年代初期，日裔美国农民代表了美国西部农业劳动力中技能高度娴熟的一部分，其特点是比美国本土出生的农民拥有更高的教育水平和更专业的农业专长。二战期间，大约11万日裔美国人（其中包括2.2万农业工人）被强制从西海岸的“排除区”迁往拘留营。大多数人再也没有回到农业领域。利用历史农业普查的县级面板数据和三重差分估计方法，我们发现，到1960年，相对于排除区外的县，排除区内每减少一个百分点1940年日裔农业工人占比，其评估农场价值的累计增长就会低12%。这些县在农场收入、高价值作物采用、机械化和商业肥料使用方面也落后。我们提出了暗示性证据，表明存在超出农业部门、对当地经济增长更广泛的负面溢出效应。综合来看，我们的研究结果凸显了这一政策的长期经济成本，说明了熟练农民的流失如何减缓农业增长，并在技术快速采用的时代可能对整个区域发展产生负面影响。

papers.title: Economics of Childbearing: Trends, Progress, and Challenges
papers.authors: Martha J. Bailey
papers.abstract: The neoclassical economics of childbearing turns 65 this year, marking the anniversary of Gary Becker’s foundational article on the subject in 1960. This review article begins with a study of how childbearing has evolved in the United States over the last century, identifying distinctive features of the post-1960 era. Next, the article discusses standard neoclassical models of childbearing and shows how augmenting them with a supply side, which includes access to and information about contraception and abortion, increases their explanatory power. After reviewing recent quasi-experimental research testing this augmented model, the final part of the article reflects upon the implications of the recent transformation in US fertility rates for women and children and suggests fruitful avenues for future research.
papers.zh_title: 生育经济学：趋势、进展与挑战
papers.zh_abstract: 新古典主义生育经济学今年已满65岁，这标志着加里·贝克尔于1960年发表该主题奠基性文章以来的周年纪念。这篇综述文章首先研究了过去一个世纪美国生育率的演变，识别出1960年后时代的独特特征。接着，文章讨论了标准的新古典主义生育模型，并展示了如何通过纳入供给侧（包括避孕和堕胎的可及性与信息）来增强其解释力。在回顾了检验这一增强模型的近期准实验研究后，文章的最后部分反思了近期美国生育率转变对妇女和儿童的影响，并为未来研究提出了富有成效的方向。

papers.title: Accounting Standards and Antidumping Investigations
papers.authors: Stephen Teng. Sun, Shang-Jin Wei, Jin Xie
papers.abstract: We uncover a new real effect of harmonizing accounting standards on international trade: following a mandatory adoption of International Financial Reporting Standards, exporters experiencing a greater change in reporting requirements become more successful in defending against foreign antidumping cases. The effect is also stronger with better reporting enforcement and is robust to excluding exporters from non-market economies. We discuss channels through which accounting-standards globalization facilitates efficient trade by either mitigating importing countries’ protectionism or curtailing exporters’ dumping activities.
papers.zh_title: 会计准则与反倾销调查
papers.zh_abstract: 我们揭示了协调会计准则对国际贸易的一个新的实际影响：在强制采用国际财务报告准则后，报告要求变化较大的出口商在应对外国反倾销案件时变得更加成功。这一效应在报告执行力度更强的情况下也更为显著，并且在对非市场经济体的出口商进行排除后依然稳健。我们讨论了会计准则全球化通过减轻进口国保护主义或遏制出口商倾销活动来促进高效贸易的渠道。

papers.title: A Macroeconomic Model of Central Bank Digital Currency
papers.authors: Pascal Paul, Mauricio Ulate, Jing Cynthia Wu
papers.abstract: We develop a quantitative New Keynesian DSGE model with monopolistic banks to study the macroeconomic effects of introducing a central bank digital currency (CBDC). Households benefit from an expansion of liquidity services and higher deposit rates as bank deposit market power is curtailed, while bank profits and lending decline. We quantify this trade-off across economies that differ in their level of interest rates. We find substantial welfare gains from introducing a CBDC with an optimal rate that can be approximated by a simple rule of thumb: the maximum of 0% and the policy rate minus 1%.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E3, E4, E5, G21, G51
papers.zh_title: 中央银行数字货币的宏观经济模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含垄断银行的数量化新凯恩斯动态随机一般均衡模型，以研究引入中央银行数字货币的宏观经济效应。随着银行存款市场势力受到抑制，家庭从流动性服务扩张和更高存款利率中受益，而银行利润和贷款则下降。我们在不同利率水平的经济体之间量化了这一权衡。我们发现，引入具有最优利率的中央银行数字货币能带来显著的福利收益，该最优利率可以通过一个简单的经验法则近似：0%与政策利率减去1%中的最大值。

papers.title: Mergers and Quality Provision in Healthcare: Evidence from Nursing Homes
papers.authors: Pinka Chatterji, Chun-Yu Ho, Wenqing Li
papers.abstract: This paper tests whether mergers between nursing home chains and independent facilities affect quality of care using facility-level data from 1999-2019. Staggered difference-in-differences estimates suggest that acquired facilities experience a 5% reduction in health deficiency citations 2 years post-merger. This improvement relies on the continuous supply of efficiency from chains; persists for four years; and is specific to mergers between chains and independent homes. Quality effects are driven by mergers involving smaller, higher-quality and non-private-equity-owned chains. A structural model suggests that the quality effect is generated by enhanced cost efficiency achieved by facilities serving larger numbers of residents after mergers.
papers.zh_title: 医疗保健中的并购与质量提供：来自养老院的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用1999年至2019年的设施层面数据，检验了养老院连锁机构与独立设施之间的并购是否影响护理质量。交错双重差分估计表明，被收购设施在并购后两年内健康缺陷引用数量减少了5%。这一改善依赖于连锁机构持续提供的效率；持续四年；并且特定于连锁机构与独立养老院之间的并购。质量效应由涉及规模较小、质量较高且非私募股权拥有的连锁机构的并购驱动。一个结构模型表明，质量效应源于并购后服务更多居民设施所实现的成本效率提升。

papers.title: Moment Restrictions for Nonlinear Panel Data Models with Feedback
papers.authors: Stéphane Bonhomme, Kevin Dano, Bryan S. Graham
papers.abstract: Many panel data methods, while allowing for general dependence between covariates and time-invariant agent-specific heterogeneity, place strong a priori restrictions on feedback: how past outcomes, covariates, and heterogeneity map into future covariate levels. Ruling out feedback entirely, as often occurs in practice, is unattractive in many dynamic economic settings. We provide a general characterization of all feedback and heterogeneity robust (FHR) moment conditions for nonlinear panel data models and present constructive methods to derive feasible moment-based estimators for specific models. We also use our moment characterization to compute semiparametric efficiency bounds, allowing for a quantification of the information loss associated with accommodating feedback, as well as providing insight into how to construct estimators with good efficiency properties in practice. Our results apply both to the finite dimensional parameter indexing the parametric part of the model as well as to estimands that involve averages over the distribution of unobserved heterogeneity. We illustrate our methods by providing a complete characterization of all FHR moment functions in the multi-spell mixed proportional hazards model. We compute efficient moment functions for both model parameters and average effects in this setting.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LS, TWP；JEL：C01, C14, C33, C41
papers.zh_title: 具有反馈的非线性面板数据模型的矩约束
papers.zh_abstract: 许多面板数据方法虽然允许协变量与个体特定时不变异质性之间存在一般依赖关系，但对反馈（即过去的结果、协变量和异质性如何映射到未来的协变量水平）施加了强烈的先验限制。完全排除反馈（这在实践中经常发生）在许多动态经济环境中并不理想。我们为非线性面板数据模型提供了所有反馈和异质性稳健矩条件的一般刻画，并提出了为特定模型推导可行矩估计量的构造性方法。我们还利用我们的矩刻画计算了半参数效率界，从而能够量化适应反馈所带来的信息损失，并为实践中如何构建具有良好效率性质的估计量提供见解。我们的结果既适用于索引模型参数部分的有限维参数，也适用于涉及未观测异质性分布平均值的估计目标。我们通过为多阶段混合比例风险模型提供所有反馈和异质性稳健矩函数的完整刻画来说明我们的方法。我们在此设定下计算了模型参数和平均效应的有效矩函数。

papers.title: Common Ownership Around the World
papers.authors: Miguel Antón, Florian Ederer, Mireia Giné, Guillermo Ramirez-Chiang
papers.abstract: We study common ownership in 49 countries from 2005 to 2019 and show that it is pervasive and rising around the world. However, despite this global growth, common ownership is still considerably lower in all countries compared to the United States. It is particularly high and growing rapidly among the largest firms, a trend observed across all countries and regions. The rise of common ownership stems not only from increased institutional investment but also from its growing concentration, a development in which the Big Three (BlackRock, Vanguard, State Street) play a dominant role, particularly in the United States. Although non-Big Three institutional investors remain important in other countries, the significant increase in common ownership in many countries is primarily attributable to the breadth, size, and growth of Big Three holdings. We also investigate how common ownership is related to legal, institutional, and market characteristics such as investor protection laws, competition laws, mandatory ESG disclosure, and labor market frictions across firms and countries.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LE；JEL：F65, G32, K21, L40
papers.zh_title: 全球范围内的共同所有权
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2005年至2019年49个国家的共同所有权，发现它在全球范围内普遍存在且不断上升。然而，尽管存在这种全球增长，所有国家的共同所有权水平仍远低于美国。在最大的公司中，共同所有权尤其高且增长迅速，这一趋势在所有国家和地区都能观察到。共同所有权的上升不仅源于机构投资的增加，还源于其日益集中，其中三大资产管理公司（贝莱德、先锋领航、道富）发挥着主导作用，尤其是在美国。尽管非三大机构投资者在其他国家仍然重要，但许多国家共同所有权的显著增长主要归因于三大资产管理公司持股的广度、规模和增长。我们还研究了共同所有权如何与法律、制度和市场特征（如投资者保护法、竞争法、强制性环境、社会和治理披露以及跨公司和国家的劳动力市场摩擦）相关联。

papers.title: Foreign Political Risk and Technological Change
papers.authors: Joel P. Flynn, Antoine B. Levy, Jacob Moscona, Mai Wo
papers.abstract: This paper studies how innovation reacts to foreign political risk and shapes its economic consequences. In a model with foreign political shocks that can disrupt foreign supply, we show that greater political risk abroad increases domestic innovation, thereby lowering reliance on risky sourcing countries. We then combine data on sector-level technology development with time-varying measures of industry-level exposure to foreign political risk and report three sets of empirical findings. First, sectors and commodities with higher exposure to foreign political risk exhibit significantly greater innovative activity. This finding holds across sectors in the US, across country-sector pairs in a global sample, and across critical minerals. Second, the response of innovation is particularly strong when risk emanates from geopolitical adversaries. This is consistent with our finding that trade restrictions are more likely to emerge between non-allies following a rise in political risk in either country. Third, directed innovation reduces countries’ reliance on imports from risky foreign markets. In doing so, technological change abroad amplifies the negative effects of domestic political risk on export performance.
papers.zh_title: 外国政治风险与技术变革
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究创新如何应对外国政治风险并塑造其经济后果。在一个可能扰乱外国供应的外国政治冲击模型中，我们表明，国外政治风险的增加会促进国内创新，从而降低对高风险来源国的依赖。接着，我们将部门层面的技术发展数据与行业层面对外国政治风险暴露的时变指标相结合，报告了三组实证发现。第一，对外国政治风险暴露程度更高的部门和商品表现出显著更强的创新活动。这一发现在美国各部门、全球样本中的国家-部门配对以及关键矿产中均成立。第二，当风险来自地缘政治对手时，创新的反应尤为强烈。这与我们的发现一致，即当任一国家的政治风险上升时，非盟友国家之间更可能出现贸易限制。第三，定向创新降低了各国对高风险外国市场的进口依赖。通过这种方式，外国的技术变革放大了国内政治风险对出口绩效的负面影响。

papers.title: A Stairway to Success: How Parenting Shapes Culture and Social Stratification
papers.authors: Francesco Agostinelli, Matthias Doepke, Giuseppe Sorrenti, Fabrizio Zilibotti
papers.abstract: This chapter argues that parenting choices are a central force in the joint evolution of culture and economic outcomes. We present a framework in which parents-motivated by both their children’s future success and their own normative beliefs-choose parenting styles and transmit cultural traits responding to economic incentives. Values such as work ethic, patience, and religiosity are more likely to be instilled when their anticipated returns, economic or otherwise, are high. The interaction between parenting and economic conditions gives rise to endogenous cultural and economic stratification. We extend the model to include residential sorting and social interactions, showing how neighborhood choice reinforces disparities in trust and human capital. Empirical evidence from the World Values Survey supports the model’s key predictions. We conclude by highlighting open questions at the intersection of parenting, culture, and inequality.
papers.zh_title: 通往成功的阶梯：养育方式如何塑造文化与社会分层
papers.zh_abstract: 本章认为，养育方式的选择是文化与经济结果共同演化的核心力量。我们提出了一个框架，其中父母——既受子女未来成功的驱动，也受自身规范性信念的影响——选择养育方式并传递文化特质，以回应经济激励。诸如职业道德、耐心和宗教信仰等价值观，在其预期回报（无论是经济回报还是其他回报）较高时更可能被灌输。养育方式与经济条件之间的相互作用导致了内生的文化和经济分层。我们将模型扩展到包括居住分选和社会互动，展示了邻里选择如何加剧信任和人力资本方面的差距。来自世界价值观调查的实证证据支持了模型的关键预测。最后，我们强调了养育方式、文化和不平等交叉领域中的未解问题。

papers.title: Uncertainty in Empirical Economics
papers.authors: Frank Schorfheide, Zhiheng You
papers.abstract: Econometricians invest substantial effort in constructing standard errors that yield valid inference under a hypothetical data-generating process. This paper asks a fundamental question: Are the uncertainty statements reported by applied researchers consistent with empirical frequencies? The short answer is no. Drawing on the forecasting literature, we predict estimates from “new” studies using estimates from corresponding baseline studies. By doing this across a large number of study groups and linking parameters through a hierarchical model, we compare stated probabilities to observed empirical frequencies. Alignment occurs only under limited external validity, namely, that the studies estimate different parameters.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS, ME；JEL：C11, C18, C21
papers.zh_title: 实证经济学中的不确定性
papers.zh_abstract: 计量经济学家投入大量精力构建标准误，以便在假设的数据生成过程中得出有效的推断。本文提出了一个基本问题：应用研究者报告的不确定性陈述是否与经验频率一致？简短的回答是：不一致。借鉴预测文献，我们使用相应基线研究的估计值来预测“新”研究的估计值。通过跨大量研究组进行此操作，并利用分层模型连接参数，我们将陈述的概率与观察到的经验频率进行比较。只有在有限的外部有效性条件下，即这些研究估计的是不同参数时，两者才会一致。

papers.title: Immigration and Inequality in the Next Generation
papers.authors: Mark Borgschulte, Heepyung Cho, Darren Lubotsky, Jonathan L. Rothbaum
papers.abstract: We estimate the causal impacts of immigration to U.S. cities on the intergenerational economic mobility of children of U.S.-born parents. Immigration raises the educational attainment and earnings among individuals who grew up in poorer households and reduces the earnings, educational attainment, and employment among those who grew up in more affluent households. On net, immigration diminishes the link between parents' and their children's economic outcomes in the receiving population, and thus increases intergenerational mobility. The increase in mobility is strikingly similar in models estimated across cities and in within-city models that control for the trajectories of immigrant destinations.
papers.zh_title: 移民与下一代的不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了移民到美国城市对本土出生父母子女的代际经济流动性的因果影响。移民提高了在较贫困家庭中长大的个体的教育程度和收入，但降低了在较富裕家庭中长大的个体的收入、教育程度和就业率。总体而言，移民削弱了接收人口中父母与其子女经济结果之间的联系，从而增加了代际流动性。这种流动性的增加在跨城市估计的模型以及控制移民目的地轨迹的城市内模型中惊人地相似。

papers.title: Borrowing Constraints, Markups, and Misallocation
papers.authors: Huiyu Li, Chen Lian, Yueran Ma, Emily Martell
papers.abstract: We document that less constrained firms in an industry have higher markups. This connection between markups and borrowing constraints has important allocative efficiency implications: it lowers the TFP losses from markup dispersion, because looser borrowing constraints help higher markup firms produce more and move their market shares closer to the efficient level. We further document that this relationship is stronger in industries where firms rely more on earnings to borrow, and that markup dispersion is also higher in these industries. We explain all of these patterns using a standard Kimball demand model augmented with borrowing against assets and earnings, and show that the connection between markups and borrowing constraints substantially lowers TFP losses from markup dispersion, especially when firms rely on earnings to borrow.
papers.zh_title: 借贷约束、加成率与资源错配
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录到，行业中受约束较少的公司具有更高的加成率。加成率与借贷约束之间的这种联系具有重要的配置效率含义：它降低了由加成率分散造成的全要素生产率损失，因为更宽松的借贷约束有助于高加成率公司增加产出，并将其市场份额推向更接近有效水平。我们进一步记录到，这种关系在更依赖收益进行借贷的行业中更强，并且这些行业的加成率分散程度也更高。我们使用一个标准的Kimball需求模型（并增加了基于资产和收益的借贷）来解释所有这些模式，并表明加成率与借贷约束之间的联系显著降低了由加成率分散造成的全要素生产率损失，尤其是在公司依赖收益进行借贷时。

papers.title: Net Worth Poverty in Childhood: How Duration and Timing Affect Educational Outcomes
papers.authors: Christina M. Gibson-Davis, Lisa A. Keister, Lisa A. Gennetian, Shuyi Qiu
papers.abstract: Very low household wealth, or net worth poverty (NWP), is the modal form of poverty for American children, yet little is understood about how it is experienced across childhood or its associations with children’s human capital accumulation. Using data from the 1999-2021 waves of the Panel Study of Income Dynamics on a cohort of children followed from birth to age 20, this study examines the influence of NWP exposure and duration across a child’s life course on high school graduation and college attendance.
