Findings show that through age 18, children experienced more frequent and enduring spells of net worth poverty than income poverty. NWP was negatively associated with high school graduation and college attendance independent of the effects of income poverty. Effects were more pronounced for college attendance than for high school graduation, perhaps reflecting the resource-intensive nature of college. The negative effects of NWP were most pronounced for the 31% of the sample that was NWP for at least four waves. The timing of NWP relative to developmental stage did not seem to matter, as children were at risk regardless of the age at which they experienced net worth poverty.
papers.zh_title: 童年期的净资产贫困：持续时间和时机如何影响教育结果
papers.zh_abstract: 极低的家庭财富，即净资产贫困，是美国儿童贫困的主要形式，然而关于儿童期如何经历净资产贫困及其与儿童人力资本积累的关联，人们知之甚少。本研究使用1999-2021年收入动态面板研究中一个从出生追踪至20岁的儿童队列数据，考察了儿童生命历程中净资产贫困的暴露和持续时间对高中毕业和大学入学的影响。结果显示，到18岁时，儿童经历净资产贫困的频率和持续时间均高于收入贫困。净资产贫困与高中毕业和大学入学呈负相关，且独立于收入贫困的影响。对大学入学的影响比对高中毕业的影响更为显著，这可能反映了大学对资源的高需求。对于样本中至少四个时期处于净资产贫困的31%的儿童，净资产贫困的负面影响最为显著。净资产贫困相对于发展阶段的时间似乎并不重要，因为无论儿童在哪个年龄经历净资产贫困，他们都面临风险。

papers.title: Building Costs and House Prices
papers.authors: Brian Potter, Chad Syverson
papers.abstract: We take a long, broad, and theoretically agnostic view toward the connection between building costs and house prices in the US housing market. We find that building costs have never had all that much explanatory power over US housing prices, but even the imperfect correlations of the past have weakened further in recent decades along multiple dimensions.
papers.zh_title: 建筑成本与房价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对美国住房市场中建筑成本与房价之间的联系采取了一种长期、广泛且理论上不可知论的视角。我们发现，建筑成本对美国房价的解释力从来都不强，但即使是过去不完美的相关性，在近几十年来也在多个维度上进一步减弱了。

papers.title: Blockbusters, Sequels and the Nature of Innovation
papers.authors: Wesley M. Cohen, Matthew J. Higgins, William D. Miles, Yoko Shibuya
papers.abstract: Using detailed product- and invention-level data from the pharmaceutical industry, we demonstrate that firms with high-selling “blockbuster” drugs concentrate their development efforts on new drugs that target the same customer segments and are technologically similar to existing offerings. We propose that this pattern can be explained by an expectation of “demand stickiness”, whereby firms expect current sales to persist when follow-on products offer similar functionality, making investment in the development of similar technology within that customer segment more likely. Firms’ marketing and R&D capabilities reinforce this behavior, but they do not fully explain it. By shifting the focus from firm-level characteristics to product-level drivers of innovation, our findings highlight how the commercial success of individual products shapes the direction of technological change in R&D-intensive industries.
papers.zh_title: 重磅产品、续集与创新的本质
papers.zh_abstract: 利用制药行业详细的产品和发明层面数据，我们证明，拥有特别畅销的“重磅”产品的公司将其开发工作集中在既针对相同客户群体、又更可能在技术上与现有重磅产品相似的新产品上。这种行为是由对现有产品需求粘性的预期所驱动的，限制了公司投资于针对不同客户群体的全新产品的激励。我们的发现揭示了重磅产品如何塑造公司的客户群体和创新选择，对理解研发密集型行业中技术变革的动态具有启示意义。

papers.title: The Net Benefits of Raising Bachelor’s Degree Completion through the City University of New York ACE Program
papers.authors: Judith Scott-Clayton, Irwin Garfinkel, Elizabeth Ananat, Sophie M. Collyer, Robert Paul Hartley, Anastasia Koutavas, Buyi Wang, Christopher Wimer
papers.abstract: In 2015, the City University of New York (CUNY) launched a new program— Accelerate, Complete, and Engage (ACE)—aimed at improving college graduation rates. A prior randomized-control evaluation of the program found a nearly 12 percentage point increase in graduation five years after college entry. Using this impact estimate and national data on earnings by gender, age, and degree status; we estimate incremental expected long-run benefits and costs for participants, as well as intergenerational effects for the children of participants, relative to “business as usual” for the control group. Our main estimate indicates net social benefits of more than $48,000 over a lifetime per participant from greater earnings and labor force attachment, improvements in health, and savings in public transfers. A major contribution of our analysis is the estimation of second-generational benefits. Including intergenerational benefits for children who grow up in newly higher-earning families nearly triples this estimate, to over $130,000 in net social benefits per participant. These results are sensitive to assumptions about whether the impact on graduation after five years persists indefinitely, or whether the control group eventually catches up. Still, net social benefits are strongly positive even under our most conservative assumptions.
papers.zh_title: 通过纽约市立大学ACE项目提高学士学位完成率的净收益
papers.zh_abstract: 2015年，纽约市立大学（CUNY）启动了一项名为“加速、完成与参与”（ACE）的新项目，旨在提高大学毕业率。此前对该项目的一项随机对照评估发现，大学入学五年后的毕业率提高了近12个百分点。利用这一影响估计值以及按性别、年龄和学位状况划分的全国收入数据，我们估算了参与者相对于对照组“常规情况”的增量预期长期收益和成本，以及参与者子女的代际效应。我们的主要估计表明，由于更高的收入和劳动力市场参与度、健康状况的改善以及公共转移支付的节省，每位参与者一生中可获得超过48,000美元的净社会收益。我们分析的一个主要贡献是对第二代收益的估计。将成长于新近更高收入家庭的儿童的代际收益纳入考虑后，这一估计值几乎增加了两倍，达到每位参与者超过130,000美元的净社会收益。这些结果对以下假设很敏感：五年后对毕业率的影响是否会无限期持续，或者对照组最终是否会赶上。尽管如此，即使在我们最保守的假设下，净社会收益也仍然强烈为正。

papers.title: Maturity Risks and Bank Runs
papers.authors: Jihene Arfaoui, Harald Uhlig
papers.abstract: Inspired by the Silicon Valley Bank run and building on Diamond- Dybvig (1993), we develop a model in which asset price fluctuations can trigger bank runs. Liquidation amounts to selling assets at their market price. Depositors can buy and hold the assets after paying an idiosyncratic cost. We characterize the equilibria. We introduce a withdrawal pressure function to distinguish between fundamental runs, driven by market price declines, and self-enforcing runs triggered by depositor panic. Deposit insurance can prevent self-enforcing runs but incurs losses during fundamental runs. Regulatory measures ensuring price resilience reduce run risks, but at the expense of depositor welfare.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E43, E44, G01, G21, G28
papers.zh_title: 期限风险与银行挤兑
papers.zh_abstract: 受硅谷银行挤兑事件的启发，并在Diamond-Dybvig（1993）模型的基础上，我们构建了一个模型，其中资产价格波动可能引发银行挤兑。清算相当于按市场价格出售资产。存款人在支付异质性成本后可以购买并持有这些资产。我们对均衡进行了刻画。我们引入了一个提款压力函数，以区分由市场价格下跌驱动的根本性挤兑和由存款人恐慌引发的自我强化挤兑。存款保险可以防止自我强化挤兑，但在根本性挤兑期间会产生损失。确保价格韧性的监管措施降低了挤兑风险，但以牺牲存款人福利为代价。

papers.title: Do Physicians Follow the Golden Rule? Evidence of Imperfect Agency and Moral Hazard from Physicians’ Self-Prescriptions
papers.authors: Mariana Carrera, Niels Skipper
papers.abstract: Using data on prescriptions for cholesterol-lowering drugs (statins), we study differences in the treatments chosen by Danish physicians for themselves versus for their patients. We estimate that physicians discount patient health benefit relative to their own, valuing the additional potency of a stronger statin by significantly more if it is for their own use. We exploit variation in expected coinsurance to estimate that moral hazard accounts for a modest share, no more than 15%, of this additional valuation. Statin-using physicians also respond more quickly to a patent expiration, suggesting greater effort to stay informed on drug classes they personally use.
papers.zh_title: 医生遵循黄金法则吗？来自医生自我处方的非完全代理与道德风险证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用降胆固醇药物（他汀类药物）的处方数据，我们研究了丹麦医生为自己和患者选择治疗方案时的差异。我们估计，医生对患者健康收益的重视程度低于对自身健康收益的重视程度，如果药物是给自己使用，他们对更强效他汀类药物额外效力的估值会显著更高。我们利用预期共付率的差异来估计，道德风险仅占这种额外估值的较小部分，不超过15%。使用他汀类药物的医生对专利到期反应也更快，这表明他们在个人使用的药物类别上付出了更多努力以保持信息更新。

papers.title: Uncertainty through the Production Network: Sectoral Origins and Macroeconomic Implications
papers.authors: Matteo Cacciatore, Giacomo Candian
papers.abstract: We study how uncertainty propagates through production networks. First, we construct a highly disaggregated, forward-looking measure of industry-level uncertainty using option-implied volatility data for U.S. firms. Second, we identify the effects of higher uncertainty within industries, across the supply chain, and at the aggregate level. We find that heightened uncertainty in upstream industries (e.g., chemical manufacturing, iron and steel mills) behaves like a negative supply shock—raising prices and lowering employment across the production network. In contrast, greater uncertainty in downstream industries (e.g., automotive manufacturing, insurance carriers) behaves like an adverse demand shock, reducing both prices and employment. At the aggregate level, the inflation response depends on where uncertainty originates within the supply chain. A multi-sector model with time-varying sectoral uncertainty demonstrates that production linkages play a central role in explaining these empirical findings.
papers.zh_title: 通过生产网络传导的不确定性：行业起源与宏观经济影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了不确定性如何通过生产网络传导。首先，我们利用美国企业的期权隐含波动率数据，构建了一个高度细化的、前瞻性的行业层面不确定性指标。其次，我们识别了行业内、供应链上下游以及总体层面不确定性上升的影响。我们发现，上游行业（例如化学制造业、钢铁厂）不确定性上升表现为负向供给冲击——在整个生产网络中推高价格并降低就业。相比之下，下游行业（例如汽车制造业、保险公司）不确定性上升表现为负向需求冲击，同时降低价格和就业。在总体层面，通胀反应取决于不确定性在供应链中的起源。一个包含时变行业不确定性的多部门模型表明，生产关联在解释这些实证发现中起着核心作用。

papers.title: FCI-star
papers.authors: Ricardo J. Caballero, Tomás E. Caravello, Alp Simsek
papers.abstract: Central banks rely on r∗—the neutral interest rate—to assess policy stance. However, monetary policy affects activity through broad financial conditions, not only the short-term rate. We propose FCI∗, the neutral level of a financial conditions index consistent with output at potential. Unlike r∗, FCI∗ is insulated from financial fluctuations: when asset prices move, FCI captures their estimated effect on output, leaving FCI∗ to reflect only what the macroeconomy requires. In U.S. data, r∗ co-moves with the equity premium; FCI∗ does not. FCI gaps provide useful real-time guidance on policy stance, especially when financial conditions diverge from the policy rate.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：C32, E43, E44, E52, E58
papers.zh_title: FCI-star
papers.zh_abstract: 中央银行依赖r*（中性利率）来评估政策立场。然而，货币政策通过广泛的金融状况（而不仅仅是短期利率）影响经济活动。我们提出了FCI*，即与潜在产出相一致的金融状况指数的中性水平。与r*不同，FCI*不受金融波动的干扰：当资产价格变动时，FCI捕捉其对产出的估计影响，而FCI*仅反映宏观经济所需。在美国数据中，r*与股权溢价共同变动；FCI*则不然。FCI缺口为政策立场提供了有用的实时指导，尤其是在金融状况与政策利率出现背离时。

papers.title: Tapping Business and Household Surveys to Sharpen Our View of Work from Home
papers.authors: Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Kathryn Bonney, Cory L. Breaux, Cathy Buffington, Steven J. Davis, Lucia S. Foster, Brian McKenzie, Keith Savage, Cristina Tello-Trillo
papers.abstract: The Business Trends and Outlook Survey collected detailed data on work from home (WFH) practices at more than 150,000 American firms from November 2024 to January 2025. These data fill a key gap by providing timely business-level measures of WFH for the U.S. economy and complementing parallel data collection efforts in household-level surveys. We document four main results. First, employees WFH one day per week on average across firms, ranging from 2.8 days per week in the Information sector to 0.1 days in the Accommodation and Food Services sector. Second, looking five years ahead, businesses expect WFH rates at their own organizations to remain at one day per week, on average. Third, the most common view of businesses is that productivity is similar for WFH and onsite work. Seven percent of firms say onsite work is more productive, while two percent say WFH is more productive. Fourth, 70 percent of firms do not monitor whether their employees meet onsite work requirements, and 75 percent do not track how much their employees WFH. These results confirm that WFH is an enduring feature of the U.S. economic landscape, with massive variation in its extent across employees, businesses, and sectors. These lessons also serve as a starting point for enhancing WFH-related content in the American Community Survey and other household surveys.
papers.zh_title: 利用企业与家庭调查来深化我们对居家办公的认识
papers.zh_abstract: 商业趋势与展望调查收集了2024年11月至2025年1月期间超过15万家美国企业关于居家办公（WFH）实践的详细数据。这些数据填补了一个关键空白，为美国经济提供了及时的企业层面WFH衡量指标，并补充了家庭层面调查的并行数据收集工作。我们记录了四个主要结果。首先，各企业员工平均每周居家办公一天，范围从信息行业的每周2.8天到住宿和餐饮服务行业的0.1天。其次，展望未来五年，企业预计其自身组织的WFH比率平均仍将维持在每周一天。第三，企业最普遍的观点是WFH和现场办公的生产率相似。7%的企业认为现场办公生产率更高，而2%的企业认为WFH生产率更高。第四，70%的企业不监控员工是否满足现场办公要求，75%的企业不追踪员工居家办公的时间。这些结果证实，WFH是美国经济格局的一个持久特征，其在员工、企业和行业之间的普及程度存在巨大差异。这些经验教训也可作为增强美国社区调查及其他家庭调查中WFH相关内容的起点。

papers.title: Life Satisfaction in Western Europe and the Gradual Vanishing of the U-shape in Age
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: Using Eurobarometer data for 21 Western European countries since 1973 we show the U-shape in life satisfaction by age, present for so long, has now vanished. In 13 northern European countries - Belgium, Denmark, Finland, Germany, Iceland, Ireland, Luxembourg, the Netherlands, Norway, Sweden, Switzerland, Turkey and the UK - the U-shape has been replaced by life satisfaction rising in age. We confirm these findings with evidence from the European Social Surveys, the Global Flourishing Survey and Global Minds. Evidence of change in the U-shape is mixed for Austria and France. In six southern European countries – Cyprus, Greece, Italy, Malta, Spain and Portugal - the U-shape was replaced by life satisfaction declining in age. In these southern European countries, life satisfaction of the young has been rising since around 2015. A contributory factor is the rapid decline in youth unemployment from its 2015 peak.
papers.zh_title: 西欧的生活满意度与年龄U型曲线的逐渐消失
papers.zh_abstract: 利用自1973年以来21个西欧国家的欧洲晴雨表数据，我们表明长期存在的按年龄划分的生活满意度U型曲线现已消失。在13个北欧国家——比利时、丹麦、芬兰、德国、冰岛、爱尔兰、卢森堡、荷兰、挪威、瑞典、瑞士、土耳其和英国——U型曲线已被生活满意度随年龄上升所取代。我们通过欧洲社会调查、全球繁荣调查和全球心智调查的证据证实了这些发现。奥地利和法国的U型曲线变化证据不一。在六个南欧国家——塞浦路斯、希腊、意大利、马耳他、西班牙和葡萄牙——U型曲线已被生活满意度随年龄下降所取代。在这些南欧国家，年轻人的生活满意度自2015年左右以来一直在上升。一个促成因素是青年失业率从2015年的峰值迅速下降。

papers.title: Designing Human-AI Collaboration: A Sufficient-Statistic Approach
papers.authors: Nikhil Agarwal, Alex Moehring, Alexander Wolitzky
papers.abstract: We propose a sufficient statistic for designing AI information-disclosure and selective automation policies. The approach allows for endogenous and biased beliefs, and effort crowd-out, without using a structural model of human decision-making. We deploy and validate our approach in a fact-checking experiment. Humans under-respond to AI predictions and reduce effort when presented with confident AI predictions. Overconfidence in own-signal rather than under-confidence in AI drives AI under-response. The optimal policy automates decisions where the AI is confident and delegates the other decisions while fully disclosing the AI prediction. Although automation is valuable, the benefit of assisting humans with AI is negligible.
papers.zh_title: 设计人机协作：一个充分统计量方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个用于设计人工智能信息披露和选择性自动化政策的充分统计量。该方法允许存在内生性和有偏信念以及努力挤出效应，而无需使用人类决策的结构模型。我们在一个事实核查实验中部署并验证了我们的方法。人类对人工智能预测的反应不足，并且在面对高置信度的人工智能预测时会减少努力。对自己信号的过度自信而非对人工智能的缺乏信心是导致对人工智能反应不足的原因。最优政策是在人工智能有信心的决策上实现自动化，并将其他决策委托给人类，同时完全披露人工智能的预测。尽管自动化是有价值的，但用人工智能辅助人类的收益微乎其微。

papers.title: A Matter of Time? Measuring Effects of Public Schooling Expansions on Families
papers.authors: Chloe Gibbs, Jocelyn S. Wikle, Riley Wilson
papers.abstract: We leverage pronounced changes in the availability of public schooling for young children—through duration expansions to the kindergarten day—to better understand how an implicit childcare subsidy affects mothers and families. Exploiting full-day kindergarten variation across place and time from 1992 through 2022 and novel data on state-level policy changes, combined with a comparison of children of typical kindergarten age to older children, we measure effects on parental labor supply and family childcare expenses. Results suggest that families are responsive to these shifts. Full-day kindergarten expansions were responsible for as much as 24 percent of the growth in employment of mothers with kindergarten-aged children in this time frame.
papers.zh_title: 时间问题？衡量公立教育扩张对家庭的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用幼儿公立教育可及性的显著变化——通过延长幼儿园学日至全天——来更好地理解隐性儿童保育补贴如何影响母亲和家庭。利用1992年至2022年间全天制幼儿园在地区和时期上的差异，以及关于州级政策变化的新数据，并结合对典型幼儿园年龄儿童与年长儿童的比较，我们衡量了这些变化对父母劳动供给和家庭儿童保育支出的影响。结果表明，家庭对这些变化反应灵敏。全天制幼儿园的扩张，在这一时期内，对幼儿园年龄儿童母亲就业增长的贡献高达24%。

papers.title: Culture, Policy, and Economic Development
papers.authors: Natalie Bau, Sara Lowes, Eduardo Montero
papers.abstract: Culture shapes how policies are made and how people react to them. This chapter explores how culture and development policy affect each other. First, we provide evidence that cultural mismatch — specifically a mismatch between project manager background and the location of project implementation — is associated with the reduced success of World Bank projects. Second, drawing on historical and ethnographic work, we show that disregarding local cultural norms can undermine well-intentioned development policies. Third, we review economic research demonstrating that cultural practices systematically shape policy effectiveness, often leading to heterogeneous or unintended effects. Fourth, we discuss evidence that policies themselves can reshape cultural norms, sometimes in unexpected ways. Finally, we discuss research on tailoring interventions to the local context and conclude with lessons for future research.
papers.zh_title: 文化、政策与经济发展
papers.zh_abstract: 文化塑造了政策的制定方式以及人们对政策的反应。本章探讨文化与发展政策如何相互影响。首先，我们提供证据表明，文化错配——特别是项目经理背景与项目实施地点之间的错配——与世界银行项目成功率降低相关。其次，借鉴历史和人种学研究成果，我们表明忽视当地文化规范可能会破坏本意良好的发展政策。第三，我们回顾了经济学研究，这些研究表明文化实践系统地塑造了政策有效性，常常导致异质性或非预期效应。第四，我们讨论了政策本身可以重塑文化规范的证据，有时是以意想不到的方式。最后，我们探讨了针对当地环境定制干预措施的研究，并总结了未来研究的经验教训。

papers.title: Quantifying Racial Disparities Using Consecutive Employment Spells
papers.authors: Isaac Sorkin
papers.abstract: This paper develops a framework to quantify racial disparities in earnings and employment that are not plausibly due to differences in productivity. Over an employment cycle, employers learn about worker productivity and workers move to more productive and less prejudiced employers. I use implications of this behavior to match high-tenure Black and white workers on unobservables. I look at matched pairs who lose their jobs in a mass layoff. Gaps in earnings and separations between these workers in their next jobs are not plausibly due to differences in productivity. Using U.S. data, earnings differences between these matched workers are five log points, about a quarter of the racial earnings gap among high-tenure workers. Similarly, matched Black workers are more likely to separate.
papers.zh_title: 利用连续就业经历量化种族差异
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个框架，用于量化在收入与就业方面不太可能归因于生产力差异的种族差异。在一个就业周期中，雇主了解工人的生产力，工人则流向生产力更高、偏见更少的雇主。我利用这一行为的含义，将高任期黑人和白人工人在不可观测特征上进行匹配。我关注在大规模裁员中失去工作的匹配对。这些工人在下一份工作中的收入差距和离职率不太可能归因于生产力差异。利用美国数据，这些匹配工人之间的收入差异为五个对数点，约占高任期工人种族收入差距的四分之一。同样，匹配的黑人工人更有可能离职。

papers.title: Small Business Innovation Applied to National Needs
papers.authors: Kyle R. Myers, Lauren Lanahan, Evan Johnson
papers.abstract: Small businesses have long supplied a disproportionate share of major innovations in the United States. We review a centerpiece policy on this topic: the US Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) program. We trace its legislative history and summarize program evaluations over the past four decades. Using newly matched data on SBIR awards and venture capital investments into small businesses, we show that, despite often being compared to venture-backed businesses, SBIR-backed businesses pursue very different strategies. We use simple economic theories to motivate the SBIR program as a vehicle for the government to invest in small-scale, well-defined, but risky technologies that have large externalities, and we highlight a number of case studies consistent with this framework. Because the motivating friction lies at the level of ideas, our perspective encourages future evaluations to determine how the SBIR program influences not just who does the inventing, but what gets invented. Looking forward we discuss how rising industrial concentration and the diffusion of artificial intelligence may reshape the program’s comparative advantage in the innovation policy toolkit.
papers.zh_title: 面向国家需求的小企业创新
papers.zh_abstract: 长期以来，小企业在美国重大创新中占据了不成比例的份额。我们回顾了这方面的核心政策：美国小企业创新研究（SBIR）计划。我们追溯了其立法历史，并总结了过去四十年的项目评估。利用新匹配的SBIR奖励数据和小企业风险投资数据，我们表明，尽管经常与风险投资支持的企业相比较，但SBIR支持的企业追求的是截然不同的战略。我们使用简单的经济理论来论证SBIR计划是政府投资于小规模、定义明确但风险较高、具有巨大外部性技术的工具，并强调了与此框架一致的若干案例研究。由于激励摩擦存在于创意层面，我们的视角鼓励未来的评估确定SBIR计划如何不仅影响谁在进行发明，而且影响发明了什么。展望未来，我们讨论了工业集中度的上升和人工智能的扩散可能如何重塑该计划在创新政策工具箱中的比较优势。

papers.title: Measuring the Production of Scientific Human Capital: New Data, Methods, and Evidence on the U.S. Scientific Training Ecosystem
papers.authors: Dror Shvadron, Hansen Zhang, Lee Fleming, Daniel P. Gross
papers.abstract: Using newly-collected data on the near-population of U.S. STEM PhD graduates since 1950, we develop a dissertation-based methodology for measuring PhD populations and use it to present new evidence on who funds PhD training, how many graduates are trained in areas of strategic national importance, and the effects of public investment in PhD training on the scientific workforce. The U.S. federal government is by far the largest source of financial and in-kind support for STEM PhD training in America. We identify universities and fields where PhD training has high rates of government, industry, or philanthropic support, and the organizations and universities that fund and train the most PhDs in critical technology areas such as AI, quantum information technology, and biotechnology. Leveraging variation in government support across agencies and over time, we provide evidence suggesting that increasing government-funded PhD trainees increases PhD production roughly one-for-one. To support further research, we provide public datasets at multiple levels of aggregation, reporting PhD graduates by (i) critical technology area and (ii) source of support. These data and methods complement existing data collection efforts by national statistics agencies, producing information which is otherwise costly to collect or not systematically observed, and can be extended forward in time and to other countries.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, PE, PR；JEL：I23, I28, O31, O32, O33, O38
papers.zh_title: 资助美国科学培训生态系统：新数据、方法与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用新收集的、涵盖自1950年以来美国STEM博士毕业生近乎总体的数据，我们考察了谁资助博士培训、有多少毕业生在具有国家战略重要性的领域接受培训，以及公共投资于博士培训对科学劳动力的影响。美国联邦政府是美国STEM博士培训最大的资金和实物支持来源。我们识别出博士培训中政府、行业或慈善支持强度较高或较低的大学和领域，以及在人工智能、量子信息技术和生物技术等关键技术领域资助和培训最多博士的组织和大学。利用不同机构间以及随时间变化的政府支持差异，我们提供的证据表明，增加政府资助的博士培训生大致会一对一地增加博士产出。为支持进一步研究，我们提供了多个聚合层次的公共数据集，报告了按（i）关键技术领域和（ii）支持来源分类的博士毕业生。

papers.title: Financing the Next VC-Backed Startup: The Role of Gender
papers.authors: Camille Hebert, Emmanuel Yimfor, Heather Tookes
papers.abstract: What is the role of gender in the serial founding of VC-backed startups? Despite robust evidence linking serial entrepreneurship to startup success, women comprise 13.3% of VC-backed founders but only 4% of those founding three or more startups. Using a novel design comparing men and women cofounders of the same startup, we estimate substantial gender gaps in subsequent funding outcomes on average and following failure or success of the current startup. We find these at both the extensive and intensive margins. For example, following failure, women are 22.5% less likely to found another VC-backed startup compared to their cofounders who are men. Among those who do found another VC-backed firm, women raise 53.3% less capital following failure of the current venture and 24.6% less capital following success. These gaps contribute to the well-documented gender gap in VC funding. Lower interest of women in founding new firms can only partially explain our findings. We find no evidence of gender differences in founder quality or of statistical updating by investors. Instead, consistent with unequal treatment of women, we find that women serial founders are penalized with smaller VC deals following failures of their prior startups but they are not rewarded with larger deal sizes following past successes. By contrast, men are rewarded for their prior experiences as founders, regardless of whether their startups were failures or successes. In line with theories of stereotyping and confirmation bias, we also find striking negative spillovers from unrelated women-founded failures within investors’ portfolios (and no positive spillovers from their successes).
papers.zh_title: 为下一家风险投资支持的初创企业融资：性别的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 在风险投资支持的初创企业的连续创业中，性别扮演什么角色？尽管有确凿证据表明连续创业与初创企业成功相关，但女性仅占风险投资支持创始人的13.3%，而在创立三家或更多初创企业的创始人中仅占4%。利用一种新颖的设计，比较同一家初创企业的男性和女性联合创始人，我们估计出在后续融资结果上存在显著的性别差距，无论是在当前初创企业失败还是成功之后，平均而言也是如此。我们在广延边际和集约边际上都发现了这些差距。例如，在失败之后，女性创立另一家风险投资支持初创企业的可能性比其男性联合创始人低22.5%。在那些确实创立了另一家风险投资支持企业的女性中，在当前企业失败后，她们筹集的资本少53.3%；在成功之后，则少24.6%。这些差距导致了有充分文献记载的风险投资融资中的性别差距。女性对创立新企业的较低兴趣只能部分解释我们的发现。我们没有发现创始人质量存在性别差异或投资者进行统计更新的证据。相反，与对女性的不平等待遇一致，我们发现女性连续创业者在先前初创企业失败后会因较小的风险投资交易而受到惩罚，但在过去成功之后并未获得更大的交易规模奖励。相比之下，男性会因其作为创始人的先前经验而获得奖励，无论其初创企业是失败还是成功。与刻板印象和确认偏误理论一致，我们还发现投资者投资组合中不相关的女性创办企业失败存在显著的负面溢出效应（而其成功则没有正面溢出效应）。

papers.title: Private Equity and Workers: Modeling and Measuring Monopsony, Implicit Contracts, and Efficient Reallocation
papers.authors: Kyle F. Herkenhoff, Josh Lerner, Gordon M. Phillips, Francisca Rebelo, Benjamin Sampson
papers.abstract: We measure the real effects of private equity buyouts on worker outcomes by building a new database that links transactions to matched employer-employee data in the United States. To guide our empirical analysis, we derive testable implications from three theories in which private equity managers alter worker outcomes: (1) exertion of monopsony power in concentrated markets, (2) breach of implicit contracts with targeted groups of workers, including managers and top earners, and (3) efficient reallocation of workers across plants. We do not find any evidence that private equity-backed firms vary wages and employment based on local labor market power proxies. Wage losses are also very similar for managers and top earners. Instead, we find strong evidence that private equity managers downsize less productive plants relative to productive plants while simultaneously reallocating high-wage workers to more productive plants. We conclude that post-buyout employment and wage dynamics are consistent with professional investors providing incentives to increase productivity and monitor the companies in which they invest.
papers.zh_title: 私募股权与工人：对买方垄断、隐性合同与有效重新配置的建模与衡量
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过构建一个将交易与美国匹配的雇主-雇员数据联系起来的新数据库，来衡量私募股权收购对工人结果的真实影响。为指导我们的实证分析，我们从三种理论中推导出可检验的含义，这些理论中私募股权管理者改变了工人结果：（1）在集中市场中行使买方垄断力量，（2）违反与目标工人群体（包括管理者和高收入者）的隐性合同，以及（3）跨工厂的工人有效重新配置。我们没有发现任何证据表明私募股权支持的企业根据当地劳动力市场力量代理指标来调整工资和就业。管理者和高收入者的工资损失也非常相似。相反，我们发现了强有力的证据，表明私募股权管理者相对于高生产率工厂缩减了低生产率工厂的规模，同时将高工资工人重新配置到高生产率工厂。我们得出结论，收购后的就业和工资动态与专业投资者提供激励以提高生产率并监督其投资公司的行为是一致的。

papers.title: AI and the Fed
papers.authors: Sophia Kazinnik, Erik Brynjolfsson
papers.abstract: This paper examines how central banks can strategically integrate artificial intelligence (AI) to enhance their operations. Using a dual-framework approach, we demonstrate how AI can transform both strategic decision-making and daily operations within central banks, taking the Federal Reserve System (FRS) as a representative example. We first consider a top-down view, showing how AI can modernize key central banking functions. We then adopt a bottom-up approach focusing on the impact of generative AI on specific tasks and occupations within the Federal Reserve and find a significant potential for workforce augmentation and efficiency gains. We also address critical challenges associated with AI adoption, such as the need to upgrade data infrastructure and manage workforce transitions.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME, PE, PR；JEL：C8, C9, G4
papers.zh_title: 人工智能与美联储
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了中央银行如何战略性地整合人工智能（AI）以增强其运营。通过采用双重框架方法，我们以美联储系统（FRS）为代表，展示了AI如何改变中央银行内部的战略决策和日常运营。我们首先从自上而下的视角出发，展示了AI如何现代化关键中央银行职能。然后，我们采用自下而上的方法，聚焦于生成式AI对美联储内部特定任务和职业的影响，并发现其在劳动力增强和效率提升方面具有显著潜力。我们还讨论了与AI采用相关的关键挑战，例如升级数据基础设施和管理劳动力转型的必要性。

papers.title: Transitory and Permanent Import Tariff Shocks in the United States: An Empirical Investigation
papers.authors: Stephanie Schmitt-Grohé, Martín Uribe
papers.abstract: We estimate transitory and permanent import tariff shocks in the United States over the postwar period. We find that transitory tariff increases are neither inflationary nor contractionary, and are not associated with monetary tightening. In contrast, permanent tariff increases trigger a temporary rise in inflation (a one-off increase in the price level) and a brief tightening of monetary policy. Consistent with the intertemporal approach to the balance of payments, transitory tariff increases reduce imports and improve the trade balance, whereas permanent increases leave both largely unchanged. Transitory shocks account for approximately 80 percent of tariff movements. Overall, tariff shocks are estimated to be a minor driver of U.S. business cycle fluctuations on average and even during episodes of substantial tariff hikes, such as Nixon 1971, Ford 1975, and Trump 2018.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E31, E52, F13, F41
papers.zh_title: 美国暂时性与永久性进口关税冲击：一项实证研究
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了战后时期美国的暂时性和永久性进口关税冲击。我们发现，暂时性关税增加既不会引发通胀，也不会导致经济收缩，并且与货币紧缩无关。相比之下，永久性关税增加会引发通胀的暂时上升（价格水平的一次性上涨）和货币政策的短暂收紧。与国际收支跨期方法一致，暂时性关税增加会减少进口并改善贸易平衡，而永久性关税增加则使两者基本保持不变。暂时性冲击约占关税变动的80%。总体而言，估计关税冲击平均而言是美国商业周期波动的次要驱动因素，即使在尼克松1971年、福特1975年和特朗普2018年等大幅加征关税时期也是如此。

papers.title: Person and Place Effects in Scientific Discovery
papers.authors: Amitabh Chandra, Connie Xu
papers.abstract: How much of a scientist’s research output is attributable to individual talent, and how much to the institution where they work? Because markets systematically under-provide fundamental science, the answer matters for how societies allocate the resources that substitute for missing market incentives, how the scientific community evaluates researchers for promotion and grants, and whether the current distribution of scientists across institutions maximizes knowledge production. We study this question using citation-weighted publications in leading life-science journals and a movers design that exploits variation in the output of nearly 40,000 scientists who change institutions. We find that 50 to 60 percent of the variation in a scientist’s research output is attributable to institutional factors. After correcting for limited mobility bias, we document positive assortative matching between scientists and institutions (a correlation of 0.3 between person and place effects), a necessary condition for maximizing aggregate knowledge production under the multiplicative structure of our model. Around two-thirds of the institutional effect is explained by the presence of star researchers. A scientist’s output responds to both the total output of their institution and its funding level, but not to the size of the local research cluster, suggesting that institutional effects operate through the human capital environment within an institution rather than through agglomeration or research funding alone. The symmetry of effects for upward and downward movers implies that institutional advantages do not permanently transfer to scientists who leave. These effects have not diminished despite technologies facilitating remote collaboration, are robust to detailed field-by-year controls, and raise the possibility that similar patterns extend to other areas of fundamental science.
papers.zh_title: 科学发现中的人与机构效应
papers.zh_abstract: 科学家的研究成果有多少归因于个人才能，又有多少归因于其所在机构？由于市场系统性地对基础科学投入不足，这个问题的答案对于社会如何分配资源以替代缺失的市场激励、科学界如何评估研究人员的晋升和资助、以及当前科学家在机构间的分布是否最大化知识生产至关重要。我们利用在顶级生命科学期刊上发表的引用加权出版物，以及一个利用近40,000名更换机构的科学家产出变化的研究者流动设计来研究这个问题。我们发现，科学家研究成果变异的50%到60%可归因于机构因素。在纠正有限流动性偏差后，我们记录了科学家与机构之间的正向分类匹配（人与机构效应之间的相关性为0.3），这是在模型乘法结构下最大化总知识生产的必要条件。大约三分之二的机构效应可由明星研究者的存在来解释。科学家的产出对其所在机构的总产出和资助水平均有反应，但对本地研究集群的规模没有反应，这表明机构效应是通过机构内的人力资本环境而非单纯的集聚或研究资助来运作的。向上和向下流动者效应的对称性意味着，机构优势不会永久性地转移给离开的科学家。尽管促进远程协作的技术已经存在，但这些效应并未减弱，并且在加入详细的领域-年份控制后依然稳健，这提高了类似模式可能扩展到基础科学其他领域的可能性。

papers.title: The Revenue and Distributional Impacts of Unemployment Insurance Reform: Evidence from California
papers.authors: Mark Duggan, Jonathan Gruber, Audrey Guo
papers.abstract: In the United States, unemployment insurance (UI) is funded through employer-side payroll taxes that are experience-rated based on previous UI claims. States differ significantly with respect to the financing of their programs, and a majority of state programs do not currently meet minimum UI trust fund solvency standards. A common culprit in the least solvent states is a very low tax base of earnings on which UI taxes are levied. We focus on California, the least solvent of the 50 state UI programs, with debt currently to the federal government of $21 billion, and which has the lowest base of taxable earnings at $7000 per year. We use matched employer-employee administrative data to estimate the impact of financing reforms to California’s UI system. We find that raising the taxable earnings base would replenish the state’s UI trust fund and would increase experience rating by reducing the number of systematically subsidized firms. While this improves vertical equity of the UI system, it would also worsen horizontal equity by imposing much larger percentage increases in tax costs on the firms with the fewest layoffs. Alternatively, matching the higher tax base with both higher maximum and lower minimum rates could improve both experience rating and horizontal equity.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：H25, J38, J65
papers.zh_title: 失业保险改革的收入与分配影响：来自加利福尼亚州的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国，失业保险（UI）通过雇主方工资税来资助，该税根据以往的UI索赔进行经验评级。各州在项目融资方面存在显著差异，大多数州的项目目前未达到最低UI信托基金偿付能力标准。在偿付能力最差的州中，一个常见原因是征收UI税的工资税基非常低。我们聚焦于加利福尼亚州，它是50个州UI项目中偿付能力最差的，目前欠联邦政府210亿美元债务，并且其应税工资基数最低，为每年7000美元。我们使用匹配的雇主-雇员行政数据来估计加州UI系统融资改革的影响。我们发现，提高应税工资基数将补充该州的UI信托基金，并通过减少系统性地获得补贴的企业数量来增强经验评级。虽然这改善了UI系统的纵向公平性，但也会通过向裁员最少的公司施加更大比例的税收成本增加，从而恶化横向公平性。或者，将更高的税基与更高的最高税率和更低的最低税率相匹配，可以同时改善经验评级和横向公平性。

papers.title: Health Spillovers: The Broad Impact of Spousal Health Shocks
papers.authors: Carolina Arteaga, Natalia Vigezzi, Pilar García-Gómez
papers.abstract: In this paper we provide new evidence on the health spillover effects of health shocks within couples. Using administrative data from the Netherlands and a matching event-study framework, we estimate the causal effect of experiencing a health shock within a couple on the health of the initially unaffected partner. Our findings reveal a significant deterioration in the partner’s health outlook, characterized by substantial increases in hospital visits, overnight stays, and mortality. The health decline is broad in scope, encompassing higher risk of infections, accidents, and digestive and cardiovascular conditions. This deterioration is accompanied by substantial increases in stress, anxiety and depression for both men and women, as well as sleep disorders for women. These effects are not driven by a heavy caregiving load, financial distress or worsening of health behaviors. On the contrary, the adverse outcomes persist despite suggestive positive changes, including increased exercise for both men and women, and reduced alcohol consumption among women.
papers.zh_title: 健康溢出效应：配偶健康冲击的广泛影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们提供了关于夫妻内部健康冲击的健康溢出效应的新证据。利用来自荷兰的行政数据和匹配事件研究框架，我们估计了夫妻中一方经历健康冲击对最初未受影响伴侣健康的因果效应。我们的研究结果显示，伴侣的健康前景显著恶化，表现为住院次数、住院过夜次数和死亡率的大幅增加。健康恶化的范围很广，包括感染、事故、消化系统和心血管疾病风险的增加。这种恶化伴随着男性和女性压力、焦虑和抑郁的显著增加，以及女性睡眠障碍的增加。这些效应并非由沉重的照护负担、财务困境或健康行为恶化所驱动。相反，尽管出现了积极的改变迹象，包括男性和女性运动增加以及女性饮酒减少，但不良后果仍然持续存在。

papers.title: Technifying Ventures
papers.authors: Yoshiki Ando, Emin Dinlersoz, Jeremy Greenwood, Ruben Piazzesi
papers.abstract: What is the relationship between advanced technology adoption, venture capital (VC) funding, employment, and growth? Using US Census Bureau microdata, the analysis shows both factors are independently and positively associated with firm outcomes, but their combination matters most. VC backing is concentrated among a small group of firms that experience large employment gains post-funding. In contrast, advanced technology is adopted by a broader range of firms, which see smaller post-adoption employment increases. A startup model is calibrated with firm-level data to study reallocation effects associated with tax and subsidy changes, and quantify the economic roles of VC and advanced technology.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, PR；JEL：E13, G24, O30, O40
papers.zh_title: 技术化创业企业
papers.zh_abstract: 先进技术采用、风险投资（VC）融资、就业和增长之间的关系是什么？利用美国人口普查局的微观数据，分析表明这两个因素都与公司结果独立且正相关，但它们的组合最为重要。风险投资支持集中在少数公司，这些公司在获得融资后经历了大规模的就业增长。相比之下，先进技术被更广泛的公司采用，这些公司在采用后就业增长较小。我们利用企业层面数据校准了一个初创企业模型，以研究与税收和补贴变化相关的重新分配效应，并量化风险投资和先进技术的经济作用。

papers.title: Extending Healthspans in an Aging World
papers.authors: Stephen P. Utkus, Olivia S. Mitchell
papers.abstract: Extensions in human longevity are prompting a growing interest in maximizing healthspan, or the number of years of life unencumbered by the chronic diseases of old age. This chapter reviews recent research on healthy life extension, including several measures and determinants of longer healthspans. We also provide an overview of recent efforts by medical and business enterprises to enhance longevity and healthspan, followed by a discussion of policy and workplace options to foster healthier lives. Such efforts hold the promise of improving quality of life, expanding labor supply, and lowering the cost of health care costs associated with population aging.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LS；JEL：I12, I24, J11, J14, J16
papers.zh_title: 在老龄化世界中延长健康寿命
papers.zh_abstract: 人类寿命的延长正促使人们越来越关注最大化健康寿命，即不受老年慢性病困扰的生命年数。本章回顾了关于健康寿命延长的近期研究，包括衡量更长健康寿命的几种方法和决定因素。我们还概述了医疗和商业企业为延长寿命和健康寿命所做的近期努力，随后讨论了促进更健康生活的政策和工作场所选择。这些努力有望改善生活质量、扩大劳动力供给，并降低与人口老龄化相关的医疗保健成本。

papers.title: The Real Costs of Washing Away Corruption: Evidence from Brazil’s Lava Jato Investigation
papers.authors: Claudio Ferraz, Luiz C. Moura, Lars Norden, Ricardo Schechtman
papers.abstract: We investigate the economic impacts of one of the world's largest anti-corruption crackdowns, Brazil's Operação Lava Jato (Car Wash). Using a difference-in-differences analysis of unique, matched firm-bank data, we find sizable declines in employment and wage bills for investigated firms, alongside reduced access to credit. We also find adverse indirect effects through the bank credit channel, where highly exposed banks reduce credit to non-investigated firms, particularly for politically connected existing borrowers. Non-investigated firms exposed to the economic shock through their bank relationships suffer declines in wage bills and employment. The findings highlight the intricate economic implications of anti-corruption policies targeting large corporations.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, LE, LS, POL；JEL：D73, G21, G30, K42
papers.zh_title: 清洗腐败的真实代价：来自巴西“洗车行动”调查的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了全球最大规模的反腐行动之一——巴西的“洗车行动”（Operação Lava Jato）的经济影响。利用独特的匹配企业-银行数据进行双重差分分析，我们发现受调查企业的就业和工资总额显著下降，同时信贷获取渠道减少。我们还通过银行信贷渠道发现了不利的间接效应：风险敞口较大的银行减少了对非调查企业的信贷，尤其是对有政治关联的现有借款人的信贷。通过银行关系暴露于经济冲击的非调查企业，其工资总额和就业也出现下降。这些发现凸显了针对大型企业的反腐政策所蕴含的复杂经济影响。

papers.title: Effects of the Minimum Wage on Employment of Young Adults with Cognitive Disabilities
papers.authors: Barry Chiswick, Hope Corman, Dhaval M. Dave, Nancy Reichman
papers.abstract: We estimate the effects of increases in the minimum wage on labor market outcomes of working-age adults with cognitive disabilities, a vulnerable and low-skilled group, using data from the American Community Survey (2008-2023) and a generalized difference-in-differences research design. We found that a higher effective minimum wage reduces employment and labor force participation but has no effect on labor supply at the intensive margin for this group. Effects were stronger for those with lower educational attainment. We found no significant labor market effects of an increase in the minimum wage for individuals with physical disabilities or in the non-disabled population.
papers.zh_title: 最低工资对认知障碍青年就业的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国社区调查（2008-2023年）的数据和广义双重差分研究设计，估计了最低工资上涨对患有认知障碍的劳动年龄成年人（一个脆弱且低技能的群体）劳动力市场结果的影响。我们发现，更高的有效最低工资降低了该群体的就业率和劳动力参与率，但对集约边际上的劳动力供给没有影响。对于受教育程度较低的人群，这种影响更为强烈。我们发现，最低工资上涨对肢体残疾人群或非残疾人群没有显著的劳动力市场影响。

papers.title: Why Is Fertility So Low in High Income Countries?
papers.authors: Melissa Schettini Kearney, Phillip B. Levine
papers.abstract: We consider why fertility has fallen in recent decades in almost all high-income countries. We begin by documenting declining total fertility and rising childlessness across cohorts, highlighting the need to focus on cohort versus period-specific fertility rates. With this motivation, we propose a conceptual model of fertility determination that augments the standard Becker model with an explicit role for social norms and cohort-specific contextual factors, including broad social and economic influences and an expanded set of consumption and lifestyle options. We posit that these forces have led to “shifting priorities,” reducing the centrality of parenthood. We then review existing empirical evidence –and conclude that the decline in fertility likely reflects a complex mix of changing norms around work, parenting, gender roles, and leisure consistent with our cohort-based conceptual framework. We conclude with suggestions for future research and a brief discussion of policy implications.
papers.zh_title: 为什么高收入国家的生育率如此之低？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了近几十年来几乎所有高收入国家生育率下降的原因。我们首先记录了各队列中总生育率下降和终身不育率上升的情况，强调了关注队列特定生育率而非时期特定生育率的必要性。基于此动机，我们提出了一个生育率决定的概念模型，该模型在标准贝克尔模型的基础上，增加了社会规范和队列特定背景因素（包括广泛的社会经济影响以及更多样化的消费和生活方式选择）的明确作用。我们假设这些力量导致了“优先级的转变”，降低了为人父母的核心地位。然后，我们回顾了现有的实证证据，并得出结论：生育率下降可能反映了围绕工作、育儿、性别角色和休闲的规范变化这一复杂组合，这与我们基于队列的概念框架是一致的。最后，我们提出了未来研究的建议，并简要讨论了政策含义。

papers.title: Doctors as Gatekeepers in Social Insurance: Evidence from Workers’ Compensation Insurance
papers.authors: Marika Cabral, Marcus Dillender
papers.abstract: In many social insurance programs, eligibility for disability benefits depends on medical evaluations performed by doctors. This paper studies the role of doctors as gatekeepers in workers’ compensation insurance and quantifies the discretion they exercise in medical evaluations of physical impairments. Using comprehensive administrative data and random assignment of doctors to independent medical examinations, we identify substantial systematic variation in evaluation decisions across doctors and estimate its consequences for claimant outcomes and program costs. Being evaluated by a one standard-deviation more generous doctor increases subsequent cash benefits by about 20%, compensated time out of work by 20%, injury-related medical spending by 12%, and total workers’ compensation costs by 17%. Doctor effects vary meaningfully with observable characteristics. We further examine how discretion interacts with institutional rules and economic incentives when claimants can select their own doctors. More generous doctors attract more claimants, while insurers are more likely to dispute their evaluations, indicating that both parties influence the allocation of gatekeepers in line with their incentives and thereby shape the distribution of program benefits. Finally, we show that alternative evaluator assignment rules can substantially affect claimant outcomes and program costs, underscoring the importance of policies governing the allocation and oversight of gatekeepers in the design of workers’ compensation and other disability-related social insurance programs.
papers.zh_title: 医生作为社会保险的守门人：来自工伤保险的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在许多社会保险项目中，伤残津贴的资格取决于医生进行的医学评估。本文研究了医生在工伤保险中作为守门人的作用，并量化了他们在身体损伤医学评估中行使的自由裁量权。利用全面的行政数据和医生对独立医学检查的随机分配，我们识别出不同医生在评估决策上存在显著的系统性差异，并估计了其对索赔人结果和项目成本的影响。由慷慨程度高一个标准差的医生进行评估，会使后续现金津贴增加约20%，带薪休假时间增加20%，与工伤相关的医疗支出增加12%，工伤保险总成本增加17%。医生的影响随其可观测特征而有显著变化。我们进一步考察了当索赔人可以选择自己的医生时，自由裁量权如何与制度规则和经济激励相互作用。更慷慨的医生会吸引更多索赔人，而保险公司则更有可能对其评估提出异议，这表明双方都根据自身激励影响守门人的分配，从而塑造了项目福利的分配。最后，我们表明，替代性的评估者分配规则会显著影响索赔人结果和项目成本，这凸显了在设计工伤保险及其他与伤残相关的社会保险项目时，管理守门人分配和监督的政策的重要性。

papers.title: Due Diligence and the Allocation of Venture Capital
papers.authors: Xiaoyong (Jack) Fu, Lucian A. Taylor
papers.abstract: How do investors choose the intensity of their due diligence, and how does that choice affect investment outcomes? Using cell phone signal data, we measure the duration of pre-investment meetings between venture capitalists (VCs) and startup employees. This measure captures one important component of VC due diligence. Less due diligence is associated with hotter deals and markets, busier investors, and greater distance, consistent with a theory of costly learning. Also consistent with that theory, less due diligence is associated with more volatile investment performance, as VCs allocate capital under greater uncertainty. Overall, VCs appear to trade off the costs of due diligence with its improvements to capital allocation.
papers.zh_title: 尽职调查与风险资本的配置
papers.zh_abstract: 投资者如何选择其尽职调查的强度，以及这种选择如何影响投资结果？利用手机信号数据，我们衡量了风险投资家（VC）与初创企业员工在投资前会面的持续时间。这一指标捕捉了风险投资家尽职调查的一个重要组成部分。较少的尽职调查与更热门的交易和市场、更忙碌的投资者以及更大的地理距离相关，这与高成本学习的理论一致。同样与该理论一致的是，较少的尽职调查与更不稳定的投资业绩相关，因为风险投资家在更大的不确定性下配置资本。总体而言，风险投资家似乎在尽职调查的成本与其对资本配置的改进之间进行权衡。

papers.title: Do Pensions Enhance Teacher Effort and Selective Retention?
papers.authors: Michael D. Bates, Andrew C. Johnston
papers.abstract: Theoretical rationales for employer-provided pensions often focus on their ability to increase employee effort and selectively retain quality workers. We test these hypotheses using rich administrative data on public school teachers around the pension-eligibility threshold. When teachers cross the threshold, their effective compensation drops by over 50 percent of salary due to sharply reduced pension accrual rates. Standard economic models predict this compensation reduction should decrease teacher effort and output, yet we observe no such decline. This suggests that yearly pension accruals near retirement do not meaningfully increase effort. Similarly, if pensions selectively retained better teachers, we would expect average teacher quality to decline when the retentive incentive disappears at the threshold. Instead, we find no change in the composition of teacher quality, suggesting pensions do not selectively retain higher-performing workers in late career.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：H55, I21, J33, J45, M52
papers.zh_title: 养老金能否提升教师努力程度并实现选择性留任？
papers.zh_abstract: 雇主提供养老金的理论依据通常侧重于其提高员工努力程度和选择性留住高质量员工的能力。我们利用公立学校教师在养老金资格门槛附近的丰富行政数据来检验这些假设。当教师跨过这一门槛时，由于养老金累积率急剧下降，其有效薪酬会下降超过工资的50%。标准经济模型预测，这种薪酬减少应会降低教师的努力程度和产出，然而我们并未观察到这种下降。这表明，临近退休时每年的养老金累积并未显著提高努力程度。同样，如果养老金能选择性留住更好的教师，那么当这一留任激励在门槛处消失时，我们应预期教师平均质量会下降。相反，我们发现教师质量的构成没有变化，这表明养老金在职业生涯后期并未选择性留住表现更优的员工。

papers.title: What Do Market-Access Subsidies Do? Experimental Evidence from Tunisia
papers.authors: Nadia Ali, Giacomo De Giorgi, Aminur Rahman, Eric Verhoogen
papers.abstract: Many countries seek to promote exports by subsidizing market access, but evidence on such efforts has been mixed. We present the first randomized evaluation of a government financial-support program explicitly targeting exports, the Tasdir+ program in Tunisia. The program offered matching grants for fixed market-access costs but not variable costs. Tracking outcomes in administrative data, we find positive effects on exports on average. We find limited impacts on the number of destinations or exported products, which were stated policy targets. The finding that the fixed-cost subsidies expanded exports on the intensive margin but not the extensive margins of destinations or products stands in contrast to the predictions of several workhorse trade models.
papers.zh_title: 市场准入补贴有何作用？来自突尼斯的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 许多国家试图通过补贴市场准入来促进出口，但关于此类努力的证据好坏参半。我们首次对明确针对出口的政府财政支持项目——突尼斯的Tasdir+项目——进行了随机评估。该项目为固定市场准入成本（而非可变成本）提供配套赠款。通过追踪行政数据中的结果，我们发现平均而言对出口有积极影响。我们发现对目标目的地数量或出口产品数量的影响有限，而这两者都是既定的政策目标。固定成本补贴在集约边际上扩大了出口，但在目的地或产品的广延边际上没有效果，这一发现与几个主流贸易模型的预测形成对比。

papers.title: Out-of-School Learning: Subtitling vs. Dubbing and the Acquisition of Foreign-Language Skills
papers.authors: Frauke Baumeister, Eric A. Hanushek, Ludger Woessmann
papers.abstract: The development of English-language skills, a near necessity in today’s global economy, is heavily influenced by historical national decisions about whether to subtitle or dub TV content. While prior studies of language acquisition have focused on schools, we show the overwhelming influence of out-of-school learning. We identify the causal effect of subtitling in a difference-in-differences specification that compares English to math skills in European countries that do and do not use subtitles. We find a large positive effect of subtitling on English-language skills of over one standard deviation. The effect is robust to accounting for linguistic similarity, economic incentives to learn English, and cultural protectiveness. Consistent with oral TV transmission, the effect is larger for listening and speaking skills than for reading.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I2, J24
papers.zh_title: 校外学习：字幕配音与外语技能的习得
papers.zh_abstract: 英语技能的发展在当今全球经济中几乎是必需的，它深受历史上各国关于电视内容采用字幕还是配音的国家决策的影响。虽然以往的语言习得研究侧重于学校，但我们展示了校外学习的压倒性影响。我们在一个双重差分设定中识别了字幕的因果效应，该设定比较了使用和不使用字幕的欧洲国家中英语与数学技能。我们发现字幕对英语技能有超过一个标准差的巨大正向影响。在考虑了语言相似性、学习英语的经济动机以及文化保护性之后，这一结果依然稳健。与电视的口语传播特性一致，这种效应对听力和口语技能的影响大于对阅读技能的影响。

papers.title: Basel Endgame: Bank Capital Requirements and the Future of International Standard Setting
papers.authors: Stephen G. Cecchetti, Jeremy C. Kress, Kermit L. Schoenholtz
papers.abstract: In 2023, US regulators proposed the “Basel Endgame,” a long-awaited overhaul of bank capital requirements. The proposal aimed to bring the United States into compliance with international standards established by the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision in response to the 2008 Global Financial Crisis. However, fierce industry opposition to what banks viewed as a costly increase in capital requirements effectively killed the proposal. In this essay, we describe the purpose of bank capital and the history of international standard-setting in bank regulation. We then highlight the most important aspects of the Basel Endgame, as well as the arguments for and against adopting the rule. We show that the debate unnecessarily conflated two distinct questions: (1) whether the United States should comply with international regulatory standards, and (2) whether the United States should raise large banks’ capital requirements. While there are strong grounds to answer both questions in the affirmative, they need not be addressed together. That is, the United States can implement international standards in a capital-neutral manner to preserve global cooperation in bank regulation, leaving the separate question of raising capital requirements for another day.
papers.zh_title: 巴塞尔终局：银行资本要求与国际标准制定的未来
papers.zh_abstract: 2023年，美国监管机构提出了“巴塞尔终局”，这是一项期待已久的银行资本要求改革。该提案旨在使美国符合巴塞尔银行监管委员会为应对2008年全球金融危机而制定的国际标准。然而，银行业对银行视为成本高昂的资本要求增加进行了激烈反对，这实际上扼杀了该提案。在本文中，我们描述了银行资本的目的以及银行监管中国际标准制定的历史。然后，我们强调了巴塞尔终局最重要的方面，以及支持和反对采纳该规则的论点。我们表明，这场辩论不必要地将两个不同的问题混为一谈：（1）美国是否应遵守国际监管标准，以及（2）美国是否应提高大型银行的资本要求。虽然这两个问题都有充分理由得到肯定回答，但它们不必同时处理。也就是说，美国可以以资本中性的方式实施国际标准，以维护银行监管中的全球合作，而将提高资本要求的单独问题留待日后解决。

papers.title: Lab Experiments in Developing Country Contexts
papers.authors: Sara Lowes, Nathan Nunn
papers.abstract: Lab-in-the-field experiments, in which lab experiments are conducted in more naturalistic settings, are increasingly being implemented in developing country contexts. In this chapter, we outline the conceptual and logistical challenges typically associated with lab-in-the-field experiments in non-Western settings. We describe the importance of worldviews and how researcher preconceptions may inadvertently shape the types of research questions that are asked. We emphasize the importance of increasing diversity of subject pools and researchers. We also suggest a set of best practices when implementing lab-in-the-field experiments in developing countries.
papers.zh_title: 发展中国家背景下的实验室实验
papers.zh_abstract: 田野实验室实验，即在更自然的环境中进行实验室实验，正越来越多地在发展中国家背景下实施。在本章中，我们概述了在非西方环境中进行田野实验室实验通常面临的概念和后勤挑战。我们描述了世界观的重要性，以及研究者的先入之见可能如何无意中塑造所提出的研究问题类型。我们强调了增加受试者群体和研究者多样性的重要性。我们还提出了一套在发展中国家实施田野实验室实验时的最佳实践建议。

papers.title: Matching-Gift Incentives and Blood Donation: Linking Local and Global Altruism
papers.authors: Gary Charness, Ramon Cobo-Reyes, Nicola Lacetera, Juan A. Lacomba, Francisco Lagos, Mario Macis, Juliette Milgram-Baleix, María José Ruiz-Martos
papers.abstract: We conducted a large-scale field experiment in Granada, Spain, to assess the motivating effect on blood donation of matching each attempt to donate with a charitable contribution pledge for children in developing countries. The intervention involved 344 blood drives and 21,888 participants. Compared to a control condition with no pledges, the pro-social incentives significantly increased blood donation rates by approximately 5% on average. Offering a day or a week’s worth of food for vulnerable populations led to the largest and most robust increases in donations, and repeated exposure to incentives had a reinforcing effect on subsequent donation behavior, especially for individuals who previously donated when incentivized. An auxiliary survey examining the perceived importance and motivational impact of food-related incentives corroborates our findings. Our results suggest that coordination between blood donation campaigns and humanitarian aid programs could enhance the blood supply at minimal additional cost. More broadly, policymakers and nonprofit organizations can align global and local altruism by linking humanitarian assistance with initiatives promoting civic engagement and public health.
papers.zh_title: 配捐激励与献血：连接本地与全球利他主义
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在西班牙格拉纳达进行了一项大规模实地实验，以评估将每次献血尝试与为发展中国家儿童提供慈善捐款承诺相匹配对献血的激励效果。干预涉及344场献血活动和21,888名参与者。与没有承诺的对照组相比，亲社会激励平均显著提高了约5%的献血率。为弱势群体提供一天或一周的食物导致最大且最稳健的献血增加，并且反复接触激励对后续献血行为产生了强化效应，特别是对于之前在有激励时献过血的个人。一项考察食物相关激励感知重要性和激励影响的辅助调查证实了我们的发现。我们的结果表明，献血活动与人道主义援助项目之间的协调可以以最小的额外成本增加血液供应。更广泛地说，政策制定者和非营利组织可以通过将人道主义援助与促进公民参与和公共卫生的倡议联系起来，来协调全球和本地的利他主义。

papers.title: Government Monitoring of Health Care Quality: Evidence from the Nursing Home Sector
papers.authors: Yiqun Chen, Marcus Dillender
papers.abstract: In contracting out, monitoring is an important policy tool to extract information on firm quality and incentivize quality provision. This paper examines a central quality inspection of nursing homes, a sector with significant welfare implications but widespread public concerns about the quality of care. Using data on nursing homes across the US, we find that nursing homes exhibit strategic responses to the inspection in multiple core dimensions. Nursing homes increase the quantity and quality of labor inputs, reduce admissions, increase temporary discharges, and improve patient care in response to the inspection. However, nearly all responses drop immediately once the inspection is completed. While inspection ratings are unlikely to reflect nursing homes’ absolute quality given the strategic responses, we find that they nonetheless predict nursing homes’ relative quality: using a quasi-experimental research design, we find that staying at higher-rated nursing homes lowers patient mortality. Finally, we examine the role of the inspection in incentivizing sustained nursing home quality improvements through quality deficiency citations, finding mixed effects.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：D22, I11, I18, L21, L23, L51, L88
papers.zh_title: 政府对医疗质量的监控：来自养老院行业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在合同外包中，监控是提取企业质量信息并激励质量提供的重要政策工具。本文考察了对养老院的中央质量检查，这是一个具有重大福利影响但护理质量普遍受到公众关注的行业。利用美国各地养老院的数据，我们发现养老院在多个核心维度上对检查表现出战略性反应。养老院增加劳动力投入的数量和质量，减少入院人数，增加临时出院人数，并改善患者护理以应对检查。然而，几乎所有反应在检查完成后立即消失。尽管鉴于这些战略性反应，检查评级不太可能反映养老院的绝对质量，但我们发现它们仍然预测了养老院的相对质量：使用准实验研究设计，我们发现入住评级较高的养老院会降低患者死亡率。最后，我们通过质量缺陷引用检查在激励养老院持续质量改进方面的作用，发现了混合效应。

papers.title: Rounding up the Effect of Tariffs on Financial Markets: Evidence from April 2, 2025
papers.authors: Felipe Benguria, Felipe Saffie
papers.abstract: We measure the response of financial outcomes to the US announcement on April 2, 2025, of tariffs on nearly all its trading partners. To address the challenge posed by potential anticipation by economic agents, we decompose these tariffs into a component associated with bilateral deficits and an arguably unanticipated component resulting from the rounding up of the continuous deficit measure to the next whole number or to the baseline 10% rate. We measure the short-term response of stock prices and exchange rates, focusing on all countries with which the US has a bilateral deficit. For both outcomes, the round-up component’s effect is an order of magnitude larger than that of the deficit component. We find that a one percentage point higher tariff is associated with a statistically significant 0.23% decline in stock prices. Further, we find no evidence of a dollar appreciation; if anything, higher tariffs are associated with a dollar depreciation, driven by countries with a floating regime. We show this is consistent with a model that allows for trade reallocation and in which exports to the US are invoiced in dollars while exports to the rest of the world are partly invoiced in producer currency.
papers.zh_title: 关税对金融市场影响的取整效应：来自2025年4月2日的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们衡量了金融市场结果对美国于2025年4月2日宣布对几乎所有贸易伙伴征收关税的反应。为应对经济主体可能预期这一挑战，我们将这些关税分解为与双边赤字相关的部分，以及由于将连续赤字指标向上取整到下一个整数或基线10%税率而产生的、可以说是未预期的部分。我们衡量了股票价格和汇率的短期反应，重点关注美国与之存在双边赤字的所有国家。对于这两个结果，取整部分的影响比赤字部分的影响大一个数量级。我们发现，关税每提高一个百分点，股票价格就会显著下降0.23%。此外，我们没有发现美元升值的证据；相反，更高的关税与美元贬值相关，这主要是由实行浮动汇率制度的国家推动的。我们表明，这与一个允许贸易重新分配且对美出口以美元计价而对世界其他地区出口部分以生产者货币计价的模型是一致的。

papers.title: Adaptive Priority Mechanisms
papers.authors: Oğuzhan Çelebi, Joel P. Flynn
papers.abstract: How should authorities that care about match quality and diversity allocate resources in the face of uncertainty? We introduce adaptive priority mechanisms (APM) that prioritize agents based on their scores and characteristics. We show that APM uniquely implement the ex post optimal allocation. The ubiquitous priority and quota mechanisms are optimal if and only if the authority is risk-neutral or extremely risk-averse over diversity, respectively. Deferred Acceptance implements the unique stable matching when all authorities use the optimal APM. We provide a practical roadmap for implementing APM as a market-design solution and illustrate this using Chicago Public Schools data.
papers.zh_title: 自适应优先级机制
papers.zh_abstract: 关心匹配质量和多样性的当局应如何在不确定性下分配资源？我们引入了自适应优先级机制（APM），该机制根据代理人的分数和特征对其进行优先排序。我们证明，APM唯一地实现了事后最优分配。当且仅当当局对多样性风险中性或极度风险厌恶时，普遍存在的优先级和配额机制分别是最优的。当所有当局都使用最优APM时，延迟接受机制实现了唯一的稳定匹配。我们提供了将APM作为市场设计解决方案实施的实用路线图，并使用芝加哥公立学校的数据进行了说明。

papers.title: The Economics of Bicycles for the Mind
papers.authors: Ajay K. Agrawal, Joshua S. Gans, Avi Goldfarb
papers.abstract: Steve Jobs described computers as “bicycles for the mind,” a tool that allowed people to dramatically leverage their capabilities. This paper presents a formal model of cognitive tools and technologies that enhance mental capabilities. We consider agents engaged in iterative task improvement, where cognitive tools are assumed to be substitutes for implementation skills and may or may not be complements to judgment, depending on their type. The ability to recognise opportunities to start or improve a process, which we term opportunity judgment, is shown to always complement cognitive tools. The ability to know which action to take in a given state, which we term payoff judgment, is not necessarily a complement to cognitive tools. Using these concepts, we can synthesise the empirical literature on the impact of computers and artificial intelligence (AI) on productivity and inequality. Specifically, while both computers and AI appear to increase productivity, computers have also contributed to increased inequality. Empirical work on the impact of AI on inequality has shown both increases and decreases, depending on the context. We also apply the model to understand how cognitive tools might influence incentives to automate processes and allocate decision-making authority within teams.
papers.zh_title: 思维自行车经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 史蒂夫·乔布斯将计算机描述为“思维的自行车”，一种让人们能够极大发挥自身能力的工具。本文提出了一个增强心智能力的认知工具和技术的形式化模型。我们考虑从事迭代任务改进的代理人，其中认知工具被假定为实施技能的替代品，并且根据其类型，可能或可能不与判断力互补。识别启动或改进过程机会的能力（我们称之为机会判断）被证明总是与认知工具互补。在给定状态下知道采取何种行动的能力（我们称之为收益判断）不一定是认知工具的互补品。利用这些概念，我们可以综合关于计算机和人工智能对生产率和不平等影响的实证文献。具体来说，虽然计算机和人工智能似乎都提高了生产率，但计算机也导致了不平等的加剧。关于人工智能对不平等影响的实证工作显示，根据具体情境，不平等既有增加也有减少。我们还应用该模型来理解认知工具如何可能影响自动化流程的激励以及在团队内分配决策权。

papers.title: Did California's Fast Food Minimum Wage Reduce Employment?
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Olivia Edwards, Jonathan Meer
papers.abstract: We analyze the effect of California's $20 fast food minimum wage, which was enacted in September 2023 and went into effect in April 2024, on employment in the fast food sector. In unadjusted data from the Quarterly Census of Employment and Wages, we find that employment in California's fast food sector declined by 2.7 percent relative to employment in the fast food sector elsewhere in the United States from September 2023 through September 2024. Adjusting for pre-AB 1228 trends increases this differential decline to 3.2 percent, while netting out the equivalent employment changes in non-minimum-wage-intensive industries further increases the decline. Our median estimate translates into a loss of 18,000 jobs in California's fast food sector relative to the counterfactual.
papers.zh_title: 加州快餐业最低工资是否减少了就业？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了加州20美元快餐业最低工资（于2023年9月颁布，2024年4月生效）对快餐业就业的影响。在未经调整的《季度就业与工资普查》数据中，我们发现，从2023年9月到2024年9月，加州快餐业就业相对于美国其他地区快餐业就业下降了2.7%。在调整了AB 1228法案前的趋势后，这一差异下降幅度增至3.2%，而剔除非最低工资密集型行业的等效就业变化后，下降幅度进一步扩大。我们的中位数估计表明，相对于反事实情景，加州快餐业损失了18,000个工作岗位。

papers.title: The Effect of Hospital Breastfeeding Policies on Infant Health
papers.authors: Emily C. Lawler, Meghan M. Skira
papers.abstract: We study the effects of state hospital regulations intended to increase breastfeeding by requiring certain care standards during the postpartum hospital stay. Policy adoption increased breastfeeding initiation by 3.3–4.1 percentage points (4.2–5.2 percent) and breastfeeding at 3 months postpartum by 6–9 percent. Further, following adoption, infant mortality declined by 0.2 deaths per 1,000 live births (3.5 percent), and infant hospitalization charges fell. Declines in mortality and charges primarily occurred among medically vulnerable infants, consistent with evidence that breast milk supports immune development. Additional evidence suggests that improvements in infant sleep practices also played a role in reducing mortality.
papers.zh_title: 医院母乳喂养政策对婴儿健康的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了旨在通过要求产后住院期间特定护理标准来提高母乳喂养率的州级医院法规的影响。政策实施使母乳喂养启动率提高了3.3至4.1个百分点（4.2%至5.2%），产后3个月母乳喂养率提高了6%至9%。此外，政策实施后，婴儿死亡率每千活产下降0.2例（3.5%），婴儿住院费用也有所降低。死亡率和费用的下降主要发生在医学上脆弱的婴儿中，这与母乳支持免疫系统发育的证据一致。其他证据表明，婴儿睡眠实践的改善也在降低死亡率方面发挥了作用。

papers.title: Evaluating Experimental Designs
papers.authors: Erik Snowberg, Leeat Yariv
papers.abstract: This introductory chapter outlines key criteria for evaluating experimental measures, and connects these criteria to the selection of experimental parameters across various contexts. We aim for this chapter to serve as a framework for assessing the different measures, elicitations, and designs explored throughout the handbook.
papers.zh_title: 评估实验设计
papers.zh_abstract: 这篇引言章节概述了评估实验措施的关键标准，并将这些标准与不同情境下实验参数的选择联系起来。我们旨在使本章成为一个框架，用于评估手册中探讨的各种措施、诱导方法和设计。

papers.title: Does Universal Occupational Licensing Recognition Improve Patient Access? Evidence from Healthcare Utilization
papers.authors: Yun taek Oh, Morris M. Kleiner
papers.abstract: This paper examines the impact of universal reciprocity of out-of-state physician licenses on the regional labor supply of physicians and consumers’ access to healthcare services. After adopting universal reciprocity, out-of-state practice physicians per capita increased by 0.012. Respondents with personal doctors or healthcare providers increased by 6.0 percentage points, and those having medical cost issues decreased by 1.5 percentage points among working-age individuals. Residency requirements for license reciprocity serve as barriers to improving access to healthcare services. Reducing regulatory barriers could achieve regional equilibrium and enhance both consumer and worker welfare in healthcare.
papers.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：I31, I50, J08, J22, J40, J44, J48, J68
papers.zh_title: 通用职业执照互认能否改善患者就医？来自医疗保健利用的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了州外医生执照的通用互认对医生区域劳动力供给和消费者医疗保健服务可及性的影响。在采用通用互认后，人均州外执业医生增加了0.012人。在劳动年龄个体中，拥有个人医生或医疗保健提供者的受访者比例增加了6.0个百分点，而存在医疗费用问题的比例下降了1.5个百分点。执照互认的居住要求是改善医疗保健服务可及性的障碍。减少监管壁垒可以实现区域均衡，并提高医疗保健中消费者和工人的福利。

papers.title: The Death and Life of Great British Cities
papers.authors: Stephan Heblich, Dávid Krisztián Nagy, Alex Trew, Yanos Zylberberg
papers.abstract: Does industrial concentration shape the life and death of cities? Using newly constructed data that identify and track English and Welsh cities from the early nineteenth century to the present, we estimate the causal effects of industrial concentration and city size on urban dynamics. We show that greater industrial concentration reduces long-run productivity, conditional on industry-specific trends, consistent with the presence of cross-industry (Jacobs) externalities. We embed these dynamic city-level externalities in a quantitative multi-sector spatial model to evaluate their aggregate and distributional implications. Shutting down Jacobs externalities would reduce today’s North-South productivity divide by over 40%. The model also reveals a dynamic trade-off in the design of spatial clusters: patient policymakers favor diversification, whereas those prioritizing short-run gains favor concentration.
papers.zh_title: 伟大英国城市的死亡与生命
papers.zh_abstract: 产业集中度是否塑造了城市的生命与死亡？我们从英格兰和威尔士的历史地图（1790-1820年）中识别出定居点，分离出它们19世纪末规模和产业集中度的外生变异，并估计规模和集中度对后续动态的因果影响。产业集中度对长期生产率有负面影响——独立于行业趋势，且与跨行业的雅各布斯外部性一致。一个空间模型量化了基础条件、行业趋势和雅各布斯外部性在塑造行业-城市动态中的作用，并分离出地方政策设计中一个新的动态权衡。

papers.title: Digital Media Mergers: Theory and Application to Facebook-Instagram
papers.authors: Justin Katz, Hunt Allcott
papers.abstract: We present a new model of competition between digital media platforms with targeted advertising. The model provides new insights around how user heterogeneity and overlap, along with user and advertiser substitution patterns, determine equilibrium ad load. We apply the model to evaluate the proposed separation of Facebook and Instagram. We estimate structural parameters using evidence on diminishing returns to advertising from a new randomized experiment and information on user overlap, diversion ratios, and price elasticity from earlier experiments. In counterfactual simulations, a Facebook-Instagram separation increases ad loads, transferring surplus from platforms and users to advertisers, with limited total surplus effects.
papers.zh_title: 数字媒体并购：理论与Facebook-Instagram案例应用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个具有定向广告的数字媒体平台竞争的新模型。该模型围绕用户异质性和重叠性，以及用户和广告商的替代模式如何决定均衡广告负荷，提供了新的见解。我们将该模型应用于评估Facebook与Instagram的拟议拆分。我们利用来自一项新随机实验中广告收益递减的证据，以及来自早期实验中用户重叠、转移比率和价格弹性的信息，估计了结构参数。在反事实模拟中，Facebook-Instagram的拆分增加了广告负荷，将剩余从平台和用户转移到广告商，对总剩余的影响有限。

papers.title: Credit Scores and Inequality across the Life Cycle
papers.authors: Satyajit Chatterjee, Dean Corbae, Kyle P. Dempsey, José-Víctor Ríos-Rull
papers.abstract: Credit scores are a primary screening device for the allocation of credit, housing, and sometimes even employment. In the data, credit scores grow and fan out with age; at the same time, income and consumption inequality also increase with a cohort’s age. We postulate a simple model with hidden information to explore the joint determination of credit scores, income, and consumption over an individual’s lifetime which can replicate these empirical facts. We use the model to understand the role of technologies like big data or legal restrictions limiting information on certain adverse events like medical expenses intended to increase credit market access.
papers.zh_title: 生命周期中的信用评分与不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 信用评分是信贷、住房甚至有时是就业分配的主要筛选工具。数据显示，信用评分随年龄增长而上升并发散；同时，收入不平等和消费不平等也随队列年龄增长而加剧。我们假设一个具有隐藏信息的简单模型，以探索个体一生中信用评分、收入和消费的共同决定，该模型能够复制这些经验事实。我们利用该模型来理解大数据等技术或限制某些不良事件（如医疗费用）信息的法律限制（旨在增加信贷市场准入）的作用。

papers.title: How Do Certificate-of-Need Laws Affect Hospitals? A Review of the Evidence
papers.authors: Charles J. Courtemanche, Joseph Garuccio
papers.abstract:
Certificate-of-Need (CON) laws require the approval of states’ health planning agencies for health care providers to engage in regulated actions such as opening or expanding facilities or purchasing equipment. Such laws initially aimed to restrain health care costs and wasteful redundancies, but they are also now seen by advocates as helping to preserve the financial viability of struggling hospitals. Opponents of CON laws argue that they stifle competition, leading to inflated costs and limited options for accessing care.

This study reviews the literature on the impacts of CON laws. All else equal, economic theory suggests that hospitals should see fewer new competitors, charge higher prices, and earn higher net revenues as a result of CON laws. Reduced competition can also weaken incentives to operate efficiently and deliver high quality care. However, these predictions assume otherwise perfectly competitive markets, and health care markets are heavily distorted in ways that change meaningfully over time. The need for new entrants to obtain regulatory approval could conceivably improve their quality of care while also helping to ensure that safety-net hospitals do not need to shut down unprofitable departments or close completely. Further, CON laws restrain not only entry of new facilities but also expansion of existing facilities, limiting their ability to leverage potential regulatory advantages.

Viewed in its totality, the available evidence supports some of the predictions of conventional economic theory but not others. In at least some cases, CON laws restrict both entry of new competitors and expansion of existing hospitals. The reduction in competitors increases the number of procedures per hospital. However, there is little evidence that this translates to increased prices or higher hospital profitability, and hardly any research tests for reduced closure rates. Studies on hospital efficiency and quality of care for procedures performed exclusively at hospitals mostly point to null or negative effects, but evidence on quality is more favorable for services that can be provided outside of hospitals.

We conclude that, despite the fact that the literature on CON laws is already large, more research is needed. Future work should utilize the latest tools for identifying causal effects and better account for the wide variation in CON laws across states.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：I11, I18, L25, L51
papers.zh_title: 需求证明法如何影响医院？证据综述
papers.zh_abstract: 需求证明法要求医疗保健提供者在进行受监管的行动（如开设或扩建设施、购买设备）之前，必须获得州卫生规划机构的批准。此类法律最初旨在控制医疗成本和浪费性重复，但现在也被倡导者视为有助于维持陷入困境医院的财务生存能力。反对者则认为需求证明法抑制竞争，导致成本膨胀和就医选择受限。 本研究回顾了关于需求证明法影响的文献。在其他条件相同的情况下，经济理论表明，由于需求证明法，医院应面临更少的新竞争者、收取更高的价格并获得更高的净收入。竞争减少也会削弱高效运营和提供高质量护理的激励。然而，这些预测假设市场是完全竞争的，而医疗保健市场受到严重扭曲，且这些扭曲随时间显著变化。新进入者需要获得监管批准，理论上可以提高其护理质量，同时有助于确保安全网医院无需关闭亏损部门或完全关闭。此外，需求证明法不仅限制新设施的进入，也限制现有设施的扩张，从而限制了它们利用潜在监管优势的能力。 总体来看，现有证据支持传统经济理论的部分预测，但不支持其他预测。至少在某些情况下，需求证明法既限制了新竞争者的进入，也限制了现有医院的扩张。竞争者减少增加了每家医院的手术量。然而，几乎没有证据表明这转化为更高的价格或更高的医院盈利能力，而且几乎没有研究检验其是否降低了关闭率。关于仅在医院进行的程序的医院效率和护理质量的研究大多指向无效或负面影响，但对于可以在医院外提供的服务，关于质量的证据更为有利。 我们得出结论，尽管关于需求证明法的文献已经很多，但仍需更多研究。未来的工作应利用最新的工具来识别因果效应，并更好地考虑各州需求证明法的广泛差异。

papers.title: Designing Consent: Choice Architecture and Consumer Welfare in Data Sharing
papers.authors: Chiara Farronato, Andrey Fradkin, Tesary Lin
papers.abstract: We study the welfare consequences of choice architecture for online privacy using a field experiment that randomizes cookie consent banners. We study three ways in which firms or policymakers can influence choices: (1) nudging users through banner design to encourage acceptance of cookie tracking; (2) setting defaults when users dismiss banners; and (3) implementing consent decisions at the website versus browser level. Absent design manipulation, users accept all cookies more than half of the time. Placing cookie options behind extra clicks strongly influences choices, shifting users toward more easily accessible alternatives. Many users dismiss banners without making an explicit choice, underscoring the importance of default settings. Survey evidence further reveals substantial confusion about default settings. Using a structural model, we find that among consent policies requiring site-specific decisions, consumer surplus is maximized when consent interfaces clearly display all options and default to acceptance in the absence of an explicit choice. However, the welfare gains from optimizing banner design are much smaller than those from adopting browser-level consent, which eliminates the time costs of repeated decisions.
papers.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：C93, D18, D83, D91, K20, L51, L86
papers.zh_title: 设计同意：数据共享中的选择架构与消费者福利
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过一项随机化Cookie同意横幅的实地实验，研究了选择架构对在线隐私的福利影响。我们探讨了企业或政策制定者影响选择的三种方式：（1）通过横幅设计引导用户接受Cookie追踪；（2）在用户关闭横幅时设置默认选项；（3）在网站层面与浏览器层面实施同意决策。在没有设计操纵的情况下，用户超过一半的时间会接受所有Cookie。将Cookie选项置于额外点击之后会强烈影响选择，使用户转向更易访问的替代选项。许多用户在未做出明确选择的情况下关闭横幅，这凸显了默认设置的重要性。调查证据进一步显示，用户对默认设置存在严重困惑。通过结构模型，我们发现，在要求网站特定决策的同意政策中，当同意界面清晰显示所有选项并在无明确选择时默认接受时，消费者剩余最大化。然而，优化横幅设计带来的福利收益远小于采用浏览器层面同意（消除了重复决策的时间成本）所带来的收益。

papers.title: Strategic Patenting: Evidence from the Biopharmaceutical Industry
papers.authors: Michael D. Frakes, Melissa F. Wasserman
papers.abstract: Biological drugs account for just two percent of prescriptions filled in the U.S. but fifty percent of prescription-drug spending. To explore the role patents play in explaining high biologics prices, we build the first comprehensive database of patents associated with all FDA-approved biologics. We first establish that much of what drives biologic patenting is the desire to block entry by competing biosimilars. For these purposes, we estimate the response to a 2010 Act that created an abbreviated pathway for biosimilars to receive FDA approval. We then document robust evidence consistent with two patenting strategies that may block biosimilar competition: thicketing and evergreening, whereby firms supplement primary patents with a dense web of later-expiring patents on secondary drug features. We conduct various exercises to suggest that these behaviors are undertaken with exclusionary purposes that go beyond the traditional justifications of the patent system. We then set forth various descriptive statistics surrounding biosimilar entry to suggest that these patenting strategies are, in fact, effective at delaying biosimilar entry. Finally, we simulate the degree to which biologics patent portfolios are impacted by policy proposals currently under consideration to address thicketing and evergreening.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LE, PR；JEL：K0, L50, L65, O34
papers.zh_title: 战略性专利化：来自生物制药行业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 生物药品仅占美国处方药配药量的百分之二，却占处方药支出的百分之五十。为了探究专利在解释生物药高价中的作用，我们构建了首个与所有FDA批准生物药相关的专利综合数据库。我们首先确定，推动生物药专利化的主要动机是阻止竞争性生物类似药的进入。为此，我们估算了2010年法案（该法案创建了生物类似药获得FDA批准的简化路径）的响应。随后，我们记录了与两种可能阻碍生物类似药竞争的专利策略一致的稳健证据：专利丛林化和专利长青化，即企业用一系列到期较晚的次级药物特征专利来补充主要专利。我们进行了各种分析，以表明这些行为具有排他性目的，超出了专利制度的传统正当理由。接着，我们围绕生物类似药的进入提供了各种描述性统计，以表明这些专利策略实际上有效地延迟了生物类似药的进入。最后，我们模拟了当前正在考虑用于应对专利丛林化和长青化的政策提案对生物药专利组合的影响程度。

papers.title: Introducing a High-School Exit Exam in Science: Consequences in Massachusetts
papers.authors: Ann Mantil, John Papay, Preeya P. Mbekeani, Richard J. Murnane
papers.abstract: Preparing students for science, technology, and engineering careers is an urgent state policy challenge. We examine the design and roll-out of a science testing requirement for high-school graduation in Massachusetts. While science test performance has improved over time for all demographic subgroups, we observe rising inequality in failure rates and retest success. English learners, almost 8% of all test-takers, account for 53% of students who never pass. We find large differences by family income, even conditional on previous test scores, that raise equity implications. Using a regression-discontinuity design, we show that barely passing the exam increases high-school graduation and college outcomes of students near the score threshold, particularly for females and students from higher-income families.
papers.zh_title: 引入高中科学毕业考试：马萨诸塞州的后果
papers.zh_abstract: 为学生从事科学、技术和工程职业做好准备是一项紧迫的州政策挑战。我们研究了马萨诸塞州高中毕业科学测试要求的设计与推广。尽管所有人口亚组的科学测试成绩随时间推移有所提高，但我们观察到不及格率和重考成功率方面的不平等在加剧。英语学习者占所有考生的近8%，却占从未通过考试学生的53%。我们发现，即使控制了先前的考试成绩，家庭收入也带来了巨大差异，这引发了公平性问题。通过断点回归设计，我们表明，勉强通过考试会提高分数阈值附近学生的高中毕业率和大学成果，尤其是对女性和来自高收入家庭的学生而言。

papers.title: Jackpot for Good: Can Lottery Matches Increase Charitable Giving?
papers.authors: Amelia Ahles, Joanna Lahey, Marco A. Palma
papers.abstract: Can lottery matching gifts accruing to the charity (instead of raffles benefiting the donors) increase charitable donations? We recruit 1,402 online participants to donate to hunger-related charities from a 10-token endowment under different matching conditions. We confirm earlier results that a 1:1 match increases giving over no match, and a 2:1 match does not. But, a lottery match to the charity with a 1% chance of 100 tokens works equally well as a 1:1 match, and, importantly, a 0.5% chance of 100 tokens match also works equally well, allowing for matching funds to go twice as far.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PE；JEL：C90, D64, H41, L3, L30, L31
papers.zh_title: 为善而中奖：彩票配捐能否增加慈善捐赠？
papers.zh_abstract: 累积给慈善机构的彩票配捐（而非惠及捐赠者的抽奖）能否增加慈善捐赠？我们招募了1402名在线参与者，让他们从10个代币的初始禀赋中，在不同配捐条件下向与饥饿相关的慈善机构捐款。我们证实了早期结果：1:1配捐比无配捐更能增加捐赠，而2:1配捐则不然。但是，以1%概率获得100个代币的慈善机构彩票配捐效果与1:1配捐相当，重要的是，以0.5%概率获得100个代币的配捐效果也同样好，这使得配捐资金的使用效率提高了一倍。

papers.title: Sovereign Default and the Decline in Interest Rates
papers.authors: Max Miller, James D. Paron, Jessica Wachter
papers.abstract: Sovereign debt yields have declined dramatically over the last half-century. Standard explanations, including aging populations and increases in asset demand from abroad, encounter difficulties when confronted with the full range of evidence. We propose an explanation based on a decline in inflation and default risk. We show that a model with sovereign default captures the decline in interest rates, the stability of equity valuation ratios, and the reduction in investment and output growth. Calibrations of the model post-Covid suggest that sovereign default risk may have returned.
papers.zh_title: 主权违约与利率下降
papers.zh_abstract: 过去半个世纪，主权债务收益率大幅下降。包括人口老龄化和来自国外的资产需求增加在内的标准解释，在面对全部证据时遇到了困难。我们提出了一种基于通胀风险和违约风险下降的解释。我们表明，一个包含主权违约的模型能够捕捉利率的下降、股权估值比率的稳定性以及投资和产出增长的放缓。模型在新冠疫情后的校准表明，主权违约风险可能已经回归。

papers.title: Geoeconomic Pressure
papers.authors: Christopher Clayton, Antonio Coppola, Matteo Maggiori, Jesse Schreger
papers.abstract: Geoeconomic pressure—the use of existing economic relationships by governments to achieve geopolitical or economic goals—is a prominent feature of global power dynamics. This paper introduces a methodology using large language models (LLMs) to systematically identify the application of and response to geoeconomic pressure from large textual corpora. We classify which governments apply pressure to which foreign targets, using which instruments, firms, and products. We demonstrate that firms affected by tariffs respond primarily with price changes whereas firms affected by export controls respond disproportionately by investing in research and development. We document significant heterogeneity in how firms respond to pressure based on whether their home government is applying the pressure, whether their home country is the recipient of the pressure, or whether they are based in an affected third party country.
