papers.abstract: Intermediary asset pricing posits that financial institutions are important players in financial markets, and that their decisions shape asset prices beyond simply reflecting the preferences of the average household in the economy. We explain how the intermediary-asset pricing approach helps make sense of empirical patterns in the data: the excess volatility of asset prices, differences in price movements across asset classes, the cross section of expected returns within asset classes, and specific arbitrages and price dislocations. We also review how this view of price fluctuations has important implications for macroeconomic dynamics, international economics, and policy. In particular, the role of financial regulation and monetary policy in alleviating constraints or removing risk from intermediary balance sheets during periods of stress is central in this approach. We highlight both existing progress and gaps for future research.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG；JEL：E44, G0, G01, G1, G2
papers.zh_title: 中介与资产价格
papers.zh_abstract: 中介资产定价理论认为，金融机构是金融市场的重要参与者，它们的决策塑造了资产价格，而不仅仅是反映经济中普通家庭的偏好。我们解释了中介资产定价方法如何帮助理解数据中的经验模式：资产价格的过度波动、不同资产类别价格变动的差异、资产类别内部的预期收益率横截面，以及特定的套利和价格错位。我们还回顾了这种价格波动观点如何对宏观经济动态、国际经济学和政策产生重要影响。特别是，金融监管和货币政策在压力时期缓解约束或消除中介资产负债表风险的作用，是该方法的核心。我们既强调了现有进展，也指出了未来研究的空白。

papers.title: A Model of the Babbage Firm
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: This paper develops a unified model of the cognitive division of labour in a knowledge economy. Building on recent frameworks for knowledge creation and decision making under uncertainty, it distinguishes between specialists, who engage in costly “on the spot” reasoning to generate tacit knowledge around a focal point, and generalists, who search for and interpolate existing knowledge but deliver answers subject to error. The model characterises how these two types of workers should be allocated across a continuum of questions, given the location of codified knowledge points and the distribution of problems. It shows that optimal task assignment depends on the cognitive process through which information is processed rather than on skill endowments or task complexity. When specialists operate around both knowledge points, their allocation is shaped by their absolute advantage over generalists, leading to non‐contiguous specialist domains interspersed with generalist regions. When specialists cluster around a single point, a natural boundary emerges between specialist and generalist domains that shifts but persists despite changes in question distribution. Extending the analysis to a two‐period setting, the paper identifies when specialists should sacrifice static efficiency to codify their tacit discoveries, creating bridges that allow generalists to operate more effectively in the future. These results provide a formal microfoundation for Babbage’s insights into the division of cognitive labour and offer predictions about how knowledge work responds to changes in the knowledge environment, the distribution of questions, and the patience of capital.
papers.zh_title: 巴贝奇企业模型
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个知识经济中认知劳动分工的统一模型。基于近期关于不确定性下知识创造与决策制定的框架，本文区分了专家与通才：专家围绕一个焦点进行成本高昂的“现场”推理以生成隐性知识，而通才则搜索并插值现有知识，但提供的答案可能存在错误。该模型刻画了在给定编码知识点的位置和问题分布的情况下，这两类工人应如何在一系列连续的问题上进行分配。模型表明，最优任务分配取决于信息处理的认知过程，而非技能禀赋或任务复杂度。当专家围绕两个知识点运作时，他们的分配由其相对于通才的绝对优势决定，导致专家领域非连续，并与通才区域交错分布。当专家聚集于单个点时，专家与通才领域之间会出现一个自然边界，该边界会移动，但即使问题分布发生变化也依然存在。将分析扩展到两期设定后，本文识别出专家何时应牺牲静态效率来编码其隐性发现，从而创建桥梁，使通才在未来能够更有效地运作。这些结果为巴贝奇关于认知劳动分工的见解提供了正式微观基础，并预测了知识工作如何响应知识环境、问题分布以及资本耐心的变化。

papers.title: The Great Gatsby Curve: Upward Mobility, Persistence and Inequality
papers.authors: Laura Mayoral, Debraj Ray, Garance Genicot
papers.abstract: This paper revisits the Great Gatsby curve that connects inequality to mobility, using panel data spanning several countries and time periods. Existing literature observes that the intergenerational elasticity of earnings falls as inequality rises, implying that mobility (viewed as the negative of that elasticity) is negatively correlated with inequality. In sharp contrast, we show that measures of upward mobility, axiomatically aligned with progressivity in income growth rates, are robustly and positively associated with baseline inequality. While there is no contradiction here, our study highlights crucial differences between mobility measures based on (lower) persistence and those based on growth progressivity, and asks the reader to align their choice of measure with foundational criteria that they feel best describe “mobility". Our findings offer a re-interpretation of the Gatsby curve through the lens of shared prosperity, and have implications for the evolution of inequality within countries.
papers.zh_title: 盖茨比曲线：向上流动性、持续性与不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用涵盖多个国家和时间段的面板数据，重新审视了连接不平等与流动性的盖茨比曲线。现有文献观察到，代际收入弹性随不平等上升而下降，这意味着流动性（被视为该弹性的负值）与不平等负相关。与此形成鲜明对比的是，我们表明，与收入增长率累进性公理一致的向上流动性衡量指标，与基期不平等稳健且正相关。虽然这里并无矛盾，但我们的研究强调了基于（较低）持续性的流动性衡量指标与基于增长累进性的指标之间的关键差异，并请读者根据他们认为最能描述“流动性”的基础标准来选择衡量指标。我们的发现通过共享繁荣的视角重新诠释了盖茨比曲线，并对国家内部不平等的演变具有启示意义。

papers.title: Tariffs and State Capacity: A Specific Example
papers.authors: Erik Madsen, Martin Rotemberg, Sharon Traiberman, Shizhuo Wang
papers.abstract: Evasion is a key obstacle to raising customs revenue. We study how improved administrative capacity enables governments to combat evasion by redesigning tariff codes. Using newly compiled historical records from the Early American Republic, we show that as Customs administration matured, the tariff code became more complex and more reliant on specific (quantity-based) tariffs in preference to ad valorem (value-based) ones. We develop an equilibrium model of tariff administration with costly verification of declared values that explains these twin trends: Administrative capacity allows Customs officials to disaggregate goods and assess tailored specific tariffs, obviating misvaluation while minimizing price distortions. The model successfully predicts several additional empirical patterns: Specific tariffs tend to be assessed on goods that are homogeneous, cheap, or lightly taxed.
papers.zh_title: 关税与国家能力：一个具体例子
papers.zh_abstract: 逃税是提高海关收入的主要障碍。我们研究了行政能力的提升如何使政府能够通过重新设计关税税则来打击逃税。利用新整理的美国早期共和国历史记录，我们表明，随着海关行政管理日趋成熟，关税税则变得更加复杂，并且更倾向于依赖从量税（基于数量）而非从价税（基于价值）。我们构建了一个关税行政的均衡模型，其中对申报价值的核实成本高昂，该模型解释了这两个并行趋势：行政能力使海关官员能够细分商品并评估量身定制的从量税，从而避免错误估值并最小化价格扭曲。该模型成功预测了另外几个经验模式：从量税往往适用于同质、廉价或低税率商品。

papers.title: The Global Gender Distortions Index (GGDI)
papers.authors: Pinelopi K. Goldberg, Charles TL. Gottlieb, Somik Lall, Meet Mehta, Michael Peters, Aishwarya Lakshmi Ratan
papers.abstract: The extent to which women participate in the labor market varies greatly across the globe. If such differences reflect distortions that women face in accessing good jobs, they can reduce economic activity through a misallocation of talent. In this paper, we build on Hsieh et al. (2019) to provide a methodology to quantify these productivity consequences. The index we propose, the ”Global Gender Distortions Index (GGDI)”, measures the losses in aggregate productivity that gender-based misallocation imposes. Our index allows us to separately identify labor demand distortions (e.g., discrimination in hiring for formal jobs) from labor supply distortions (e.g., frictions that discourage women’s labor force participation) and can be computed using data on labor income and job types. Our methodology also highlights an important distinction between welfare-relevant misallocation and the consequences on aggregate GDP if misallocation arises between market work and non-market activities. To showcase the versatility of our index, we analyze gender misallocation within countries over time, across countries over the development spectrum, and across local labor markets within countries. We find that misallocation is substantial and that demand distortions account for most of the productivity losses.
papers.zh_title: 全球性别扭曲指数（GGDI）
papers.zh_abstract: 女性参与劳动力市场的程度在全球范围内差异巨大。如果这些差异反映了女性在获得好工作方面面临的扭曲，那么它们可能通过人才错配降低经济活动。在本文中，我们基于Hsieh等人（2019）的研究，提供了一种量化这些生产率后果的方法。我们提出的指数——“全球性别扭曲指数（GGDI）”——衡量了基于性别的错配所造成的总生产率损失。我们的指数使我们能够分别识别劳动力需求扭曲（例如，正式工作招聘中的歧视）和劳动力供给扭曲（例如，阻碍女性劳动参与率的摩擦），并且可以使用劳动收入和职业类型的数据进行计算。我们的方法还强调了福利相关的错配与错配发生在市场工作和非市场活动之间时对总GDP影响之间的一个重要区别。为了展示我们指数的多功能性，我们分析了国家内部随时间推移的性别错配、处于不同发展阶段的跨国性别错配，以及国家内部地方劳动力市场的性别错配。我们发现错配程度相当大，并且需求扭曲造成了大部分的生产率损失。

papers.title: Public Procurement vs. Regulated Competition in Selection Markets
papers.authors: José Ignacio Cuesta, Pietro Tebaldi
papers.abstract: A common approach to markets with adverse selection is to regulate competition to minimize inefficiencies, while preserving consumer choice among firms. We study the role of procurement auctions—leading to sole provision by the winning firm—as an alternative market design. Relative to regulated competition, auctions affect product variety, quality, markups, and remove cream-skimming incentives. We develop a framework to study this comparison and apply it to individual health insurance in the US. We find that procurement auctions would increase consumer welfare in most markets, mainly by limiting inefficiencies from adverse selection and market power, and by increasing quality.
papers.zh_title: 选择市场中的公共采购与受监管竞争
papers.zh_abstract: 应对逆向选择市场的一种常见方法是监管竞争以最小化低效率，同时保留消费者在企业间的选择权。我们研究了采购拍卖（导致中标企业独家供应）作为一种替代市场设计的作用。相对于受监管竞争，拍卖会影响产品多样性、质量、加成率，并消除撇脂动机。我们构建了一个框架来研究这种比较，并将其应用于美国的个人健康保险市场。我们发现，采购拍卖在大多数市场中会提高消费者福利，这主要通过限制逆向选择和市场势力带来的低效率以及提高质量来实现。

papers.title: Economic Incentives and Organ Procurement: Evidence from a U.S. Reform
papers.authors: Erkut Y. Ozbay, Ariel Rava, Sergio S. Urzúa, Emanuel Zur
papers.abstract: In 2019, the United States implemented new regulations for Organ Procurement Organizations (OPOs) aimed at increasing transparency and strengthening accountability. These rules introduced stronger performance incentives designed to improve organ procurement outcomes. This paper examines the impact of the reform on organ donations, transplant activity, and associated system costs, with a particular focus on kidneys, given their clinical characteristics and the structure of the reform’s organizational incentives. We estimate that the new policy led to an average increase of 7.13 kidneys procured per OPO per month, relative to a baseline mean of 24.78. The largest effects are observed among top-performing OPOs prior to the reform, with similar patterns for transplanted organs. Consistent with these findings, we document an overall rise in total OPO costs, with statistically significant increases concentrated among low-performing OPOs. Finally, we present a back-of-the-envelope calculation estimating the fiscal impact of the reform.
papers.zh_title: 经济激励与器官获取：来自美国改革的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 2019年，美国对器官获取组织（OPO）实施了旨在提高透明度和加强问责制的新规定。这些规则引入了更强的绩效激励，旨在改善器官获取结果。本文考察了该改革对器官捐赠、移植活动及相关系统成本的影响，特别关注肾脏，这是基于其临床特征以及改革组织激励的结构。我们估计，相对于改革前每月平均24.78个肾脏的基线水平，新政策导致每个OPO每月平均多获取7.13个肾脏。改革前表现最佳的OPO效果最大，移植器官也呈现类似模式。与这些发现一致，我们记录了OPO总成本的总体上升，其中统计上显著的增加集中在表现不佳的OPO。最后，我们通过一个粗略计算来估算改革的财政影响。

papers.title: What Do (Thousands of) Unions Do? Union-Specific Pay Premia and Inequality
papers.authors: Ellora Derenoncourt, François Gerard, Lorenzo Lagos, Claire Montialoux
papers.abstract: We study the role of union heterogeneity in shaping wages and inequality among unionized workers. Using linked employer-employee data from Brazil and job moves across multi-firm unions, we estimate over 4,800 union-specific pay premia. Unions explain 3–4% of earnings variation. While unions raise wages on average, the standard deviation in union effects is large (6–7%). Validating our approach, wages fall in markets with higher vs. lower union premia following a nationwide right-to-work law. Linking premia to detailed data on union attributes, we find that unions with strike activity, collective bargaining agreements, internal competition, and skilled leaders secure higher wages. High-premium unions compress wage gaps by education while the average union exacerbates them. Post right-to-work, however, worker support for high-premium unions falls when between-group bargaining differentials are large. Our findings show that unions are not a monolith—their structure and actions shape their wage effects and, consequently, worker support.
papers.zh_title: （数千个）工会做什么？工会特定工资溢价与不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了工会异质性在塑造工会工人工资和不平等中的作用。利用巴西的关联雇主-雇员数据以及跨多企业工会的工作流动，我们估计了超过4800个工会特定的工资溢价。工会解释了3-4%的收入差异。虽然工会平均提高了工资，但工会效应的标准差很大（6-7%）。验证我们的方法，在一项全国性的工作权法之后，工会溢价较高市场的工资相对于较低市场有所下降。将溢价与工会属性的详细数据联系起来，我们发现，有罢工活动、集体谈判协议、内部竞争以及有技能领导者的工会能获得更高的工资。高溢价工会压缩了按教育程度划分的工资差距，而普通工会则加剧了这一差距。然而，在工作权法之后，当组间谈判差异较大时，工人对高溢价工会的支持度下降。我们的发现表明，工会并非铁板一块——它们的结构和行动塑造了其工资效应，并进而影响了工人的支持。

papers.title: Partial Language Acquisition: The Impact of Conformity
papers.authors: William A. Brock, Bo Chen, Steven N. Durlauf, Shlomo Weber
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes patterns of majority language acquisition in an economy consisting of a majority group and multiple minority groups. We consider contexts in which allows individuals choose among three options: full learning, partial learning, or no learning of the majority language. The key innovation in our approach is the introduction of a conformity factor in language acquisition, where peer pressure and community status may outweigh communicative and economic incentives for some individuals. Notably, we identify a non-monotonic relationship between the level of conformity and the distribution of full learners, partial learners, and non-learners in equilibrium. This finding is significant for policy considerations, as small adjustments in language acquisition costs may unpredictably influence language acquisition patterns across minority groups.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS；JEL：C72, D61, J15, Z13
papers.zh_title: 部分语言习得：从众效应的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了一个由多数群体和多个少数群体组成的经济体中，多数语言习得的模式。我们考虑了个体可以在三种选项中进行选择的情境：完全学习、部分学习或不学习多数语言。我们方法的关键创新在于引入了语言习得中的从众因素，即同伴压力和社群地位可能对某些个体而言，超过沟通和经济激励。值得注意的是，我们识别出从众水平与均衡中完全学习者、部分学习者和非学习者的分布之间存在非单调关系。这一发现对政策考量具有重要意义，因为语言习得成本的小幅调整可能会不可预测地影响少数群体的语言习得模式。

papers.title: Social Defaults and Plan Choice: The Case of Spousal Following
papers.authors: Tal Gross, Timothy Layton, Daniel Prinz, Julia Yates
papers.abstract: We study how couples in the Medicare Part D program choose an insurance plan. Over 70 percent of enrollees choose the same plan as their spouse. Even among those with differing healthcare needs, well over half do so. Discrete-choice models suggest beneficiaries value being on the same plan as their spouse at over a thousand dollars per year. Using a regression-discontinuity design, we show that younger spouses disproportionately follow their older spouse’s plan choice. Joint plan choice contributes modestly to overall overspending, but increases costs substantially for the couples with different cost-minimizing plans.
papers.zh_title: 社会默认选项与计划选择：配偶跟随的案例
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了参加Medicare D部分计划的夫妇如何选择保险计划。超过70%的参保者选择了与其配偶相同的计划。即使在医疗需求不同的夫妇中，也有超过一半的人这样做。离散选择模型表明，受益人每年愿意支付超过一千美元来与配偶选择相同的计划。利用断点回归设计，我们显示较年轻的配偶不成比例地跟随其年长配偶的计划选择。联合计划选择对总体过度支出贡献不大，但对于那些成本最小化计划不同的夫妇，它显著增加了成本。

papers.title: Intermediaries in Decentralized Markets: Evidence from Used-Car Transactions
papers.authors: Fei Li, Charles Murry, Can Tian, Yiyi Zhou
papers.abstract: We develop and estimate a spatial search-and-bargaining model to study the role of intermediaries and spatial frictions using data from the used-car market. We find that dealers earn price premiums by leveraging three key advantages: selective acquisition of higher-quality cars, superior matching efficiency, and greater bargaining power. Counterfactual simulations reveal that selective intermediation and spatial segmentation significantly affect market efficiency and consumer welfare. While dealers extract more surplus per transaction than sellers, policies reducing dealers' advantages increase search frictions and lower overall welfare. Counterintuitively, reducing spatial frictions harms consumers by shifting trade to less efficient private-seller channels.
papers.zh_title: 分散市场中的中介：来自二手车交易的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用二手车市场的数据，开发并估计了一个空间搜索与讨价还价模型，以研究中介和空间摩擦的作用。我们发现，经销商通过利用三个关键优势来赚取价格溢价：选择性收购高质量汽车、优越的匹配效率以及更强的议价能力。反事实模拟显示，选择性中介和空间分割显著影响市场效率和消费者福利。虽然经销商每笔交易提取的剩余多于卖家，但减少经销商优势的政策会增加搜索摩擦并降低整体福利。与直觉相反，减少空间摩擦会通过将交易转向效率较低的私人卖家渠道而损害消费者。

papers.title: Vertical Integration and Consumer Choice: Evidence from a Field Experiment
papers.authors: Chiara Farronato, Andrey Fradkin, Alexander MacKay
papers.abstract: Digital platforms offer consumers vertically integrated products alongside third-party alternatives. Using a field experiment that hides Amazon brands, we quantify the impacts of vertical integration—through both the availability of private labels and their placement in search results. In their absence, consumers choose similar products with no increase in search effort or cross-platform substitution. Yet some consumers prefer Amazon brands, and removing these products reduces consumer welfare by 5.5 percent. Contrary to concerns about self-preferencing, demoting Amazon brands in search results does not increase welfare, as heterogeneous preferences make their prominent placement valuable to a meaningful share of consumers.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：C93, D12, K21, L13, L40, L81
papers.zh_title: 垂直整合与消费者选择：来自实地实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 数字平台向消费者提供垂直整合产品以及第三方替代品。通过一项隐藏亚马逊品牌的实地实验，我们量化了垂直整合的影响——既通过自有品牌的可用性，也通过其在搜索结果中的位置。在没有这些品牌的情况下，消费者会选择类似的产品，且搜索努力或跨平台替代没有增加。然而，一些消费者偏好亚马逊品牌，移除这些产品会使消费者福利降低5.5%。与对自我偏好的担忧相反，在搜索结果中降低亚马逊品牌的排名并不会增加福利，因为异质性偏好使得其突出位置对相当一部分消费者具有价值。

papers.title: Culture and Health
papers.authors: Marcella Alsan, Yousra Neberai
papers.abstract: This chapter explores the multifaceted relationship between culture and health from an economic perspective, integrating insights from anthropology, psychology, and political science. It begins by examining how culture provides meaning to illness and suffering and explores how culturally grounded “disease theory systems” influence beliefs about what causes illness, how and whether suffering should be remedied, and the appropriate role of the state in allocating health care resources. The importance of culture in defining the boundary between normal and abnormal pathology is highlighted via case studies. The chapter next reviews evidence on how health behaviors such as smoking, firearm ownership, dietary practices, and reproductive decisions are influenced by cultural norms of masculinity and religiosity. Lastly, it examines how firms, governments, and civil society leverage and advance cultural narratives to influence individual behavior and public policy. Thus, culture in relation to health both naturally evolves and is actively constructed, with implications for health inequality and health policy.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, POL；JEL：H10, I1, I11, I12, I13, I14, I18, P0, P50
papers.zh_title: 文化与健康
papers.zh_abstract: 本章从经济学视角探讨文化与健康之间的多方面关系，整合了人类学、心理学和政治学的见解。首先考察文化如何为疾病和痛苦赋予意义，并探讨基于文化的“疾病理论体系”如何影响关于疾病成因、痛苦应如何以及是否应被治愈的信念，以及国家在分配医疗资源中的适当角色。通过案例研究，强调了文化在界定正常与异常病理之间边界的重要性。本章接下来回顾了关于吸烟、枪支拥有、饮食习惯和生育决策等健康行为如何受到男性气质和宗教信仰等文化规范影响的证据。最后，考察了企业、政府和公民社会如何利用和推进文化叙事来影响个人行为和公共政策。因此，与健康相关的文化既自然演化也被积极构建，这对健康不平等和健康政策具有影响。

papers.title: Decomposing Trends in the Gender Gap for Highly Educated Workers
papers.authors: Joseph G. Altonji, John Eric Humphries, Yagmur Yuksel, Ling Zhong
papers.abstract: This paper examines the gender gap in log earnings among full-time, college-educated workers born between 1931 and 1984. Using data from the National Survey of College Graduates and other sources, we decompose the gender earnings gap across birth cohorts into three components: (i) gender differences in the relative returns to undergraduate and graduate fields, (ii) gender-specific trends in undergraduate field, graduate degree attainment, and graduate field, and (iii) a cohort-specific “residual component” that shifts the gender gap uniformly across all college graduates. We have three main findings. First, when holding the relative returns to fields constant, changes in fields of study contribute 0.128 to the decline in the gender gap. However, this decline is partially offset by cohort trends in the relative returns to specific fields that favored men over women, reducing the contribution of field-of-study changes to the decline to 0.055. Second, gender differences in the relative returns to undergraduate and graduate fields of study contribute to the earnings gap, but they play a limited role in explaining its decline over time. Third, much of the convergence in earnings between the 1931 and 1950 cohorts is due to a declining “residual component.” The residual component remains stable for cohorts born between 1951 and the late 1970s, after which it resumes its decline.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS；JEL：I24, I26, J16, J31, J7, N32
papers.zh_title: 高学历工人性别差距趋势的分解
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了出生于1931年至1984年间的全职大学毕业生中，对数收入的性别差距。利用全国大学毕业生调查及其他来源的数据，我们将不同出生队列的性别收入差距分解为三个组成部分：(i) 本科和研究生领域相对回报的性别差异，(ii) 本科领域、研究生学位获得和研究生领域的性别特定趋势，以及(iii) 一个队列特定的“残差成分”，它均匀地改变所有大学毕业生的性别差距。我们有三个主要发现。首先，当保持各领域的相对回报不变时，学习领域的变化对性别差距的缩小贡献了0.128。然而，这一下降被特定领域相对回报的队列趋势部分抵消，该趋势有利于男性而非女性，将学习领域变化对下降的贡献减少到0.055。其次，本科和研究生学习领域相对回报的性别差异对收入差距有贡献，但在解释其随时间下降方面作用有限。第三，1931年至1950年出生队列之间收入趋同的大部分原因是“残差成分”的下降。对于1951年至1970年代末出生的队列，残差成分保持稳定，之后它再次开始下降。

papers.title: Control Without Ownership: Governance of Nonprofit Hospitals
papers.authors: Katharina Lewellen, Gordon M. Phillips, Giorgo Sertsios
papers.abstract: We analyze the governance of nonprofit hospitals, focusing on the external mechanism through the market for corporate control. Relative to for-profits, nonprofit boards are larger, have more employee directors, less industry expertise, and weaker incentives; CEO pay and turnover are less responsive to performance. Nonprofit takeovers are followed by insiders’ departures. However, nonprofits with poor financial performance are half as likely as for-profits to be acquired, and nonfinancial performance is unrelated to acquisitions. Oversight strength explains a substantial share of the takeover gap. While nonprofits may deliver stakeholder benefits, our evidence points to limits to governance as an associated cost.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IO；JEL：G3, G30, G31, G34, G38
papers.zh_title: 无所有权的控制：非营利医院的治理
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了非营利医院的治理，重点关注通过公司控制权市场的外部机制。相对于营利性医院，非营利医院的董事会规模更大，拥有更多员工董事，行业专业知识更少，激励更弱；CEO薪酬和更替对业绩的敏感性较低。非营利医院的收购伴随着内部人员的离职。然而，财务业绩不佳的非营利医院被收购的可能性仅为营利性医院的一半，而非财务业绩与收购无关。监管力度解释了收购差距的很大一部分。虽然非营利医院可能带来利益相关者福利，但我们的证据指出了治理作为相关成本的局限性。

papers.title: The Extraordinary Rise in the Wealth of Older American Households
papers.authors: Edward N. Wolff
papers.abstract: There has been a seismic shift in age-wealth profiles in the U.S. over years 1983 to 2022. The most notable is the sharp rise in the relative household wealth of age group 75 and over. Correspondingly, the relative wealth holdings of all other age groups dropped over these years. Using the Survey of Consumer Finances, the paper focuses on the youngest age group, 35 and under, and the oldest age group, 75 and over, and analyzes the factors behind these relative shifts in wealth. I find that the three principal factors are the homeownership rate, total stocks directly and indirectly owned, and home mortgage debt. The homeownership rate is the same in the two years for the youngest group but falls relative to the overall rate, whereas it shoots up for the oldest group both in actual level and relative to the overall average. The value of stock holdings rises for both age groups but vastly more for the oldest households compared to the youngest ones and accounts for a substantial portion of the elderly’s relative wealth gains. Mortgage debt rises in dollar terms for both groups but considerably more in relative terms for the youngest group.
papers.zh_title: 美国老年家庭财富的异常增长
papers.zh_abstract: 从1983年到2022年，美国的年龄-财富曲线发生了巨大变化。最显著的是75岁及以上年龄组家庭相对财富的急剧上升。相应地，所有其他年龄组的相对财富持有量在这些年间下降了。利用消费者金融调查数据，本文聚焦于最年轻的年龄组（35岁及以下）和最年长的年龄组（75岁及以上），并分析了这些相对财富变化背后的因素。我发现三个主要因素是：住房拥有率、直接和间接持有的股票总额，以及住房抵押贷款债务。对于最年轻组，住房拥有率在两年间相同，但相对于总体比率有所下降；而对于最年长组，无论是实际水平还是相对于总体平均水平，住房拥有率都大幅上升。两个年龄组的股票持有价值都有所上升，但最年长家庭的增长远大于最年轻家庭，这构成了老年人相对财富增长的很大一部分。两个年龄组的抵押贷款债务以美元计都有所上升，但最年轻组的相对增长要大得多。

papers.title: Financial Advisors and Investors' Bias
papers.authors: Marianne Andries, Maxime Bonelli, David Sraer
papers.abstract: We study an intervention by a brokerage firm providing advisory services to high-net-worth investors. In 2018, the firm changed the information displayed on its internal platform, so that financial advisors could no longer observe which clients’ holdings were in paper gain or loss. Using data on portfolio stock transactions between 2016 and 2021, we show that, while all investors exhibit a significant disposition effect before 2018, i.e., a greater propensity to realize gains than losses, highly-advised investors see their bias significantly reduced afterward. Our paper shows that by appropriately manipulating advisors’ information, financial firms can successfully reduce their clients’ biases.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G0, G02, G2, G20, G4, G41, G5
papers.zh_title: 财务顾问与投资者偏差
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一家为高净值投资者提供咨询服务的经纪公司所实施的一项干预措施。2018年，该公司更改了其内部平台显示的信息，使得财务顾问无法再观察到哪些客户的持仓处于账面盈利或亏损状态。利用2016年至2021年间的投资组合股票交易数据，我们表明，尽管所有投资者在2018年之前都表现出显著的处置效应，即更倾向于实现盈利而非亏损，但接受高度咨询的投资者在此之后其偏差显著减少。我们的论文表明，通过适当操控顾问的信息，金融公司能够成功减少客户的偏差。

papers.title: Understanding Gaps in College Outcomes by First-Generation Status
papers.authors: Esteban M. Aucejo, Jacob French, Paola Ugalde Araya, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: Information frictions significantly shape students' academic trajectories, but their differential impact across student backgrounds remains understudied. Using a novel panel survey capturing incoming students' subjective expectations and anonymized transcript data from Arizona State University, we first show that parental education strongly predicts educational success, even after controlling for demographics and measurable college preparation. First-generation students enter college less informed and with more uncertain beliefs, facing substantial challenges stemming from limited understanding and uncertainty about the higher education setting. A Bayesian expected utility maximization model demonstrates that higher uncertainty alone can sustain persistent achievement gaps. Empirically, students update their beliefs and make academic decisions consistent with the model’s predictions. Finally, leveraging a natural experiment involving a targeted first-year experience program for academically marginal students, we demonstrate that cost-effective interventions can successfully reduce knowledge frictions, improve retention, and encourage beneficial early major switching.
papers.zh_title: 理解第一代大学生身份导致的大学成果差距
papers.zh_abstract: 信息摩擦显著塑造了学生的学业轨迹，但其在不同学生背景下的差异化影响仍未得到充分研究。利用一项新颖的面板调查（该调查捕捉了亚利桑那州立大学新生的主观预期）以及匿名化的成绩单数据，我们首先表明，即使在控制了人口统计学特征和可测量的大学准备程度之后，父母的教育程度仍然强烈预测着教育成功。第一代大学生入学时信息更少，信念更不确定，面临着因对高等教育环境理解有限和不确定性而产生的重大挑战。一个贝叶斯期望效用最大化模型表明，仅凭更高的不确定性就能维持持久的成就差距。实证上，学生的信念更新和学术决策与模型的预测一致。最后，利用一项针对学业边缘学生的定向第一年体验项目的自然实验，我们证明了成本效益高的干预措施能够成功减少知识摩擦、提高保留率并鼓励有益的早期专业转换。

papers.title: The Dynamics of Deposit Flightiness and its Impact on Financial Stability
papers.authors: Kristian Blickle, Jian Li, Xu Lu, Yiming Ma
papers.abstract: We document that deposit flightiness varies significantly over time, peaking after Covid-19. Elevated deposit flightiness coincides with QE and low interest rates. We rationalize these trends based on heterogeneity in investors’ convenience value. Investors in the banking system value the convenience benefits of deposits more than outside investors. Following deposit inflows, e.g., due to QE's reserve expansions, the marginal depositor in the banking system becomes less convenience seeking and the risk of panic runs increases. As a result, policy rate hikes are more destabilizing when preceded by QE. Our findings reveal a novel linkage between conventional and unconventional monetary policy.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：E5, E50, G2, G21, G23
papers.zh_title: 存款流动性的动态及其对金融稳定的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了存款流动性随时间显著变化，在新冠疫情后达到峰值。存款流动性升高与量化宽松和低利率时期相吻合。我们基于投资者便利价值的异质性来解释这些趋势。银行系统中的投资者比外部投资者更看重存款的便利性收益。在存款流入（例如，由于量化宽松导致的准备金扩张）之后，银行系统中的边际储户变得不那么追求便利性，恐慌性挤兑的风险增加。因此，当利率上调之前经历了量化宽松时，其破坏稳定的作用更大。我们的发现揭示了常规与非常规货币政策之间的一种新联系。

papers.title: Database, Methodological Tools, and Research Opportunities: Creative Destruction Lab and Early-Stage Technology Ventures
papers.authors: Amir Sariri, Evgenia Gatov, Geneva Neal, Kyle Robinson, Sonia Sennik, Wei Yang Tham, Michael Vertolli, Avi Goldfarb
papers.abstract: We introduce a new dataset built from a global non-profit startup program for early-stage high-technology startups called Creative Destruction Lab (CDL). The early stages of startup formation remain one of the least understood aspects of firm growth. The nature of this program and the data collected from its operations are well suited to investigate open questions in entrepreneurial strategy, entrepreneurial finance, advice, and technology transfer. This dataset combines three critical features for rigorous empirical research. First, the large, multi-year sample includes roughly 15,000 applicants, 9,000 founders in admitted startups, and nearly 2,000 mentors. Second, CDL recognized the academic value from the outset and built enterprise IT linking venture-level characteristics, structured longitudinal records of firm development and operations, and unstructured verbatim transcripts of mentor–founder discussions. Third, the data cover 27 technological domains such as therapeutics and quantum computing. This paper provides an overview of the setting from which data is collected, a high-level description of available data, and information on how to access these data for research.
papers.zh_title: 数据库、方法论工具与研究机会：创意破坏实验室与早期技术创业公司
papers.zh_abstract: 我们介绍了一个基于全球非营利性初创企业项目“创意破坏实验室”（CDL）构建的新数据集，该项目面向早期高科技初创企业。初创企业形成的早期阶段仍然是企业成长中最不为人知的方面之一。该项目的性质及其运营中收集的数据非常适合研究创业战略、创业金融、咨询和技术转让中的未解问题。该数据集结合了进行严谨实证研究的三个关键特征。首先，这个多年期的大样本包括大约15,000名申请者、9,000名被录取初创企业的创始人以及近2,000名导师。其次，CDL从一开始就认识到其学术价值，并构建了企业级信息技术系统，将创业层面的特征、公司发展和运营的结构化纵向记录以及导师与创始人讨论的非结构化逐字记录联系起来。第三，数据涵盖27个技术领域，例如治疗药物和量子计算。本文概述了数据收集的背景，对可用数据进行了高层次描述，并提供了如何获取这些数据用于研究的信息。

papers.title: Navigating the College Affordability Crisis: Insights from College Savings Accounts
papers.authors: Guglielmo Briscese, John A. List, Sabrina Liu
papers.abstract: With higher education costs consistently outpacing inflation and public funding declining, college affordability has become a critical barrier to economic mobility for middle- and low-income families. While College Savings Accounts (CSAs), or 529 plans, offer tax-advantaged vehicles for college savings, their adoption patterns and educational impacts remain poorly understood. Using comprehensive administrative data from over 900,000 Illinois 529 accounts (2000-2023) linked to educational outcomes, plus complementary surveys of account owners and parents, we provide the first large-scale analysis of CSA participation and effectiveness. We find that while CSA adoption has expanded to every ZIP code in Illinois, participation remains concentrated among higher-income, more educated families. Financial literacy emerges as a key barrier: 61% of parents who could save enough to cover half of future college costs still perceive their potential savings as meaningless. Among participants, higher savings are strongly correlated with better educational outcomes, including four-year college enrollment, attendance at selective institutions, and the pursuit of post-graduate degrees. These findings suggest that targeted interventions addressing financial literacy gaps and misperceptions about modest savings could significantly expand CSA effectiveness as a tool for educational equity. Beyond state-level 529 program optimization, our findings suggest several promising avenues for federal policy coordination and institutional innovation.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, PE；JEL：D14, G53, H31, I22, I24
papers.zh_title: 应对大学可负担性危机：来自大学储蓄账户的见解
papers.zh_abstract: 随着高等教育成本持续超过通货膨胀率且公共资金减少，大学可负担性已成为中低收入家庭实现经济流动性的关键障碍。尽管大学储蓄账户（CSA）或529计划提供了用于大学储蓄的税收优惠工具，但其采用模式和教育影响仍然知之甚少。利用来自伊利诺伊州超过90万个529账户（2000-2023年）的全面行政数据（这些数据与教育成果相关联），再加上对账户持有人和家长的补充调查，我们首次对CSA的参与度和有效性进行了大规模分析。我们发现，虽然CSA的采用已扩展到伊利诺伊州的每个邮政编码区，但参与仍然集中在收入更高、受教育程度更高的家庭中。金融素养成为一个关键障碍：61%能够储蓄足够支付未来一半大学费用的家长仍然认为他们潜在的储蓄毫无意义。在参与者中，更高的储蓄与更好的教育成果密切相关，包括四年制大学入学率、进入选择性大学以及攻读研究生学位。这些发现表明，针对金融素养差距和对小额储蓄误解的定向干预措施，可以显著扩大CSA作为教育公平工具的有效性。除了州级529计划优化之外，我们的发现还为联邦政策协调和制度创新提出了几个有前景的方向。

papers.title: Carbon Pricing and Inequality: A Normative Perspective
papers.authors: Saki Bigio, Diego R. Känzig, Pablo Sánchez, Conor Walsh
papers.abstract: Despite broad acceptance among economists, carbon taxes face persistent public resistance. We measure the sources and distribution of welfare losses from unexpected European carbon price changes by estimating their impact on consumer prices, labor income, financial wealth, and government transfers. A 1% carbon-policy-induced increase in energy prices leads to an average welfare loss of about 0.5% of a household’s three-year consumption, primarily driven by indirect labor-income effects. Younger, poorer, and less educated households, especially in Southern and Eastern Europe, bear a disproportionate burden. These findings suggest public opposition to carbon taxes could stem from legitimate distributional concerns.
papers.zh_title: 碳定价与不平等：一个规范性的视角
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管经济学家普遍接受，但碳税仍面临持续的公众阻力。我们通过估算意外欧洲碳价格变化对消费价格、劳动收入、金融财富和政府转移支付的影响，来衡量福利损失的来源和分布。由碳政策导致的能源价格每上涨1%，会导致家庭三年期消费的福利损失平均约为0.5%，这主要由间接的劳动收入效应驱动。较年轻、较贫穷和受教育程度较低的家庭，尤其是在南欧和东欧，承受了不成比例的负担。这些发现表明，公众对碳税的反对可能源于合理的分配关切。

papers.title: A Tale of Two Transitions: Mobility Dynamics in China and Russia after Central Planning
papers.authors: Kristina Butaeva, Lian Chen, Steven N. Durlauf, Albert Park
papers.abstract: This paper examines intergenerational mobility in China and Russia during their transitions from central planning to market systems. We consider mobility as movement captured by changes in status between parents and children. We provide estimates of overall mobility, which involves mobility during transition to a system's steady state, as well as steady state mobility, which captures long-run mobility independent of transitional dynamics or shifts in the marginal distribution of outcomes across generations. We further decompose overall mobility into structural and exchange components. We find that China exhibits more overall educational mobility than Russia mostly due to greater structural mobility, while Russia exhibits greater steady state educational mobility. In contrast, both the overall and steady state occupational mobility is similar in China and Russia. Comparing these results to the US, we find that steady state mobility in education is substantially higher in the US and Russia compared to China, but occupational steady state mobility is comparable in all three countries.
papers.zh_title: 两种转型的故事：中央计划后中国和俄罗斯的流动性动态
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了中国和俄罗斯在从中央计划经济向市场体系转型过程中的代际流动性。我们将流动性视为由父母与子女之间地位变化所捕捉的移动。我们提供了总体流动性的估计，这涉及向系统稳态转型过程中的流动性，以及稳态流动性，它捕捉了独立于转型动态或代际结果边际分布变化的长期流动性。我们进一步将总体流动性分解为结构性和交换性组成部分。我们发现，中国表现出比俄罗斯更高的总体教育流动性，这主要归因于更大的结构性流动性，而俄罗斯则表现出更高的稳态教育流动性。相比之下，中国和俄罗斯的总体和稳态职业流动性相似。将这些结果与美国进行比较，我们发现美国和俄罗斯的教育稳态流动性显著高于中国，但三个国家的职业稳态流动性相当。

papers.title: Military Spending and War
papers.authors: Efraim Benmelech, Joao Monteiro
papers.abstract: We revisit the theory of critical deterrence—the idea that military spending may reduce the risk of conflict by increasing its expected costs. To test this theory, we assemble a new cross-national dataset combining information on armed conflicts and defense spending over a 75-year period. We find that increases in military spending have no effect on short-run conflict risk—contrary to concerns that buildups may provoke escalation—but that they do lead to a small and persistent decline in conflict over the long run. Although the effect of spending on conflict is modest, its effect on the cost of war is large: higher military spending raises the scale of battlefield casualties. The effect of military spending on conflict is more pronounced for democracies, which are less likely to use force offensively, and is concentrated in internal conflicts involving nonstate actors. The deterrent power of military spending is strongest in ethnically polarized societies—precisely where the threat of civil war is most acute. Last, using dyadic data, we find that higher military spending causes a decrease in bilateral interstate conflict, and that this effect may be larger than the one we document for intrastate conflict using panel data. Taken together, our results point to a low pass-through from the cost of war to its incidence: even sharp increases in military spending yield only modest gains in deterrence.
papers.zh_title: 军费开支与战争
papers.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了关键威慑理论——即军费开支可能通过增加冲突的预期成本来降低冲突风险的观点。为了检验这一理论，我们整理了一个新的跨国数据集，该数据集结合了75年期间关于武装冲突和国防开支的信息。我们发现，军费开支的增加对短期冲突风险没有影响——这与军备建设可能引发升级的担忧相反——但确实会导致长期冲突小幅且持续地下降。尽管军费开支对冲突的影响不大，但它对战争成本的影响却很大：更高的军费开支提高了战场伤亡的规模。军费开支对冲突的影响在民主国家更为显著，这些国家不太可能进攻性地使用武力，并且主要集中在涉及非国家行为体的内部冲突中。军费开支的威慑力在种族两极分化的社会中最为强大——而这正是内战威胁最为严峻的地方。最后，利用二元数据，我们发现更高的军费开支导致双边国家间冲突减少，并且这种影响可能大于我们使用面板数据记录的国内冲突的影响。综合来看，我们的结果指向战争成本向其发生率的低传导：即使军费开支大幅增加，也只能带来适度的威慑收益。

papers.title: Is This Really Kneaded? Identifying and Eliminating Potentially Harmful Forms of Workplace Control
papers.authors: Guido Friebel, Matthias Heinz, Mitchell Hoffman, Tobias Kretschmer, Nick Zubanov
papers.abstract: In a large German bakery chain, many workers report negative perceptions of monitoring via checklists. We survey workers and managers about the value and time costs to all in-store checklists, leading the firm to randomly remove two of the most perceivedly time-consuming and low-value checklists in half of stores. Sales increase and store manager attrition substantially decreases, and this occurs without a rise in measurable workplace problems. Before random assignment, regional managers predict whether the treatment would be effective for each store they oversee. Ex post, beneficial effects of checklist removal are fully concentrated in stores where regional managers predict the treatment will be effective, reflecting substantial heterogeneity in returns that is well-understood by these upper managers. Effects of checklist removal do not appear to come from workers having more time for production, but rather coincide with improvements in employee trust and commitment. Following the RCT, the firm implemented firmwide reductions in monitoring, eliminating a checklist regarded as demeaning, but keeping a checklist that helps coordinate production.
papers.zh_title: 这真的需要揉捏吗？识别并消除潜在有害的工作场所控制形式
papers.zh_abstract: 在一家大型德国面包连锁店中，许多员工对通过检查表进行监控持负面看法。我们调查了员工和管理层对所有店内检查表的价值和时间成本，促使该公司随机移除一半门店中两个被认为最耗时且价值最低的检查表。销售额增加，门店经理流失率大幅下降，且未出现可衡量的工作场所问题上升。在随机分配之前，区域经理预测了处理措施对其所辖每家门店是否有效。事后发现，移除检查表的有益效果完全集中在区域经理预测处理措施有效的门店，这反映了这些高层管理者充分理解的回报异质性。移除检查表的效果似乎并非源于员工有更多时间用于生产，而是与员工信任和承诺的改善相吻合。在随机对照试验之后，该公司在全公司范围内减少了监控，取消了一个被认为有辱人格的检查表，但保留了一个有助于协调生产的检查表。

papers.title: Unbalanced Financial Globalization
papers.authors: Damien Capelle, Bruno Pellegrino
papers.abstract: We use a dynamic spatial general equilibrium model of international investment and production to investigate the real implications of the last five decades of financial globalization. We introduce a wedge accounting framework to estimate country- and time-varying measures of outward and inward Revealed Financial Openness (RFO). These wedges are meant to capture all impediments to cross-border investment, rather than explicit policy measures alone. We show how to identify these wedges for a large panel of countries using limited publicly available data on national accounts and external asset and liability positions since the 1970s. Our analysis reveals striking cross-country differences in the pace and direction of financial opening: wealthier countries have become relatively more open to foreign capital inflows, while poorer countries have become relatively more open to capital outflows, a phenomenon we call “Unbalanced Financial Globalization.” Counterfactual simulations show that this unbalanced financial globalization has worsened capital allocation, resulting in a 5.9% decrease inworld GDP, a 3.4% rise in cross-country income inequality, lower wages in poorer countries, and a decline in rates of return on capital in richer countries. In contrast, if financial integration had been uniform, the improved allocation of capital would have reduced income inequality, and increased global GDP. These findings underscore the crucial role of spatial heterogeneity in shaping the real impact of international capital markets integration.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：F2, F3, F4, F6
papers.zh_title: 不平衡的金融全球化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个国际投资与生产的动态空间一般均衡模型，来研究过去五十年金融全球化的实际影响。我们引入了一个楔子核算框架，以估计各国随时间变化的对外和对内“显性金融开放度”指标。这些楔子旨在捕捉跨境投资的所有障碍，而不仅仅是明确的政策措施。我们展示了如何利用自1970年代以来有限的公开国民账户和外部资产与负债头寸数据，为大量国家识别这些楔子。我们的分析揭示了各国在金融开放速度和方向上的显著差异：较富裕国家对外资流入相对更加开放，而较贫穷国家则对资本流出相对更加开放，我们将这一现象称为“不平衡的金融全球化”。反事实模拟表明，这种不平衡的金融全球化恶化了资本配置，导致全球GDP下降5.9%，跨国收入不平等加剧3.4%，较贫穷国家工资降低，以及较富裕国家资本回报率下降。相比之下，如果金融一体化是均匀的，资本配置的改善将减少收入不平等并增加全球GDP。这些发现强调了空间异质性在塑造国际资本市场一体化实际影响中的关键作用。

papers.title: Climate Politics in the United States
papers.authors: Matilde Bombardini, Frederico Finan, Nicolas Longuet-Marx, Suresh Naidu, Francesco Trebbi
papers.abstract: We study the effects of climate change and mitigation-related employment changes on U.S. politics. We combine 2000-2020 precinct-level voting information and congressional candidate positions on environmental policy with high-resolution temperature, precipitation, and census block-group level measures of “green” and “brown” employment shares. Holding politician positions fixed within a district, we find that Democratic vote shares increase with exogenous changes in local climate and green transition employment. We embed these estimates into a model of political competition, including both direct and demand-driven effects of shocks on candidate supply of climate policy positions. Incorporating these estimates into 2022-2050 projections of climate change and green employment transition, we find that voting for the Democratic Party increases, while both parties move slightly to the right on climate policy. Under worst-case climate projections and current mitigation trajectories, our estimates indicate that the probability the House passes a carbon-pricing bill is 9 percentage points higher in 2050 than in 2020.
papers.zh_title: 美国的气候政治
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了气候变化和与减排相关的就业变化对美国政治的影响。我们将2000-2020年选区级投票信息以及国会候选人在环境政策上的立场，与高分辨率的气温、降水数据以及人口普查区块组层面的“绿色”和“棕色”就业份额相结合。在保持选区内的政治家立场不变的情况下，我们发现，当地气候和绿色转型就业的外生变化会增加民主党得票率。我们将这些估计嵌入一个政治竞争模型，该模型同时考虑了冲击对候选人提供气候政策立场的直接效应和需求驱动效应。将这些估计纳入2022-2050年气候变化和绿色就业转型的预测中，我们发现对民主党的投票增加，而两党在气候政策上均略微右移。在最坏的气候预测和当前减排轨迹下，我们的估计表明，众议院通过碳定价法案的概率在2050年比2020年高出9个百分点。

papers.title: Why Does Value-Added Work? Implications of a Dynamic Model of Student Achievement
papers.authors: Douglas O. Staiger, Thomas J. Kane, Brian D. Johnson
papers.abstract: Non-experimental value-added models have been shown to yield forecast-unbiased estimates of teacher and school effects. To investigate, we propose a dynamic state-space model of knowledge accumulation, in which test scores are imperfect measures of knowledge, and students receive temporary and persistent shocks to their stock of knowledge each period. The model identifies two primary sources of bias: transient factors in baseline scores (measurement error or transitory effects of prior teachers) and heterogeneous student growth rates. We propose diagnostic tests and corrections for each. Using eleven years of data from North Carolina, we find little evidence of heterogeneous student growth. Rather, the primary source of bias is attenuation of the baseline coefficient, which opens the door to selection on correlates of true baseline knowledge. Although conventional value-added estimates are biased for individual teachers due to attenuation, we find they are forecast unbiased when applied across a sample of teachers, due to the offsetting relationship between bias and teachers’ true effectiveness. When achievement follows the state-space model and there is no heterogeneity in growth rates, the attenuation-corrected value-added model (ACVAM) should yield unbiased estimates of a wide range educational interventions, not just teachers and schools.
papers.zh_title: 为什么增值法有效？学生成绩动态模型的含义
papers.zh_abstract: 非实验性的增值模型已被证明能产生对教师和学校效应的预测无偏估计。为了探究其原因，我们提出了一个知识积累的动态状态空间模型，其中考试成绩是知识的不完美度量，学生每期都会受到对其知识存量的暂时性和持续性冲击。该模型识别出两个主要的偏差来源：基线分数中的暂时性因素（测量误差或先前教师的暂时性影响）以及异质性的学生成长率。我们针对每个来源提出了诊断性检验和修正方法。使用北卡罗来纳州十一年的数据，我们几乎没有发现异质性学生成长率的证据。相反，偏差的主要来源是基线系数的衰减，这为基于真实基线知识相关特征的选择打开了大门。尽管由于衰减，传统的增值估计对个别教师存在偏差，但我们发现，当应用于一个教师样本时，由于偏差与教师真实有效性之间的抵消关系，这些估计是预测无偏的。当成绩遵循状态空间模型且不存在成长率异质性时，衰减修正的增值模型应对广泛的教育干预措施（不仅仅是教师和学校）产生无偏估计。

papers.title: Creative Financing and Public Moral Hazard: Evidence from Medicaid and the Nursing Home Industry
papers.authors: Martin B. Hackmann, Juan S. Rojas, Nicolas R. Ziebarth
papers.abstract: This paper studies the misallocation of Medicaid funds, its consequences for reimbursement rates, the quantity, and the quality of care provided. Combining two decades of administrative, audit, and survey data on U.S. nursing homes, we show that states employ creative financing schemes to divert federal matching funds from their intended purposes. Our theoretical and empirical analysis demonstrates that, to increase federal matching funds, such schemes distort the quality-quantity tradeoff. In Indiana, exploiting plausibly exogenous variation in the rollout of a creative financing scheme, we find a disproportionate expansion of Medicaid-funded care for dementia patients in the lowest-quality nursing facilities.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE, POL；JEL：H51, H75, I11, I13, I18, J14
papers.zh_title: 创造性融资与公共道德风险：来自医疗补助和养老院行业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了医疗补助资金的错配及其对报销率、护理数量和质量的影响。结合美国养老院二十年的行政、审计和调查数据，我们表明各州采用创造性融资方案，将联邦配套资金从其预期用途中转移。我们的理论和实证分析表明，为了增加联邦配套资金，此类方案扭曲了质量与数量之间的权衡。在印第安纳州，利用一个创造性融资方案推广过程中看似外生的变化，我们发现，在质量最低的养老机构中，针对痴呆症患者的医疗补助资助护理出现了不成比例的扩张。

papers.title: Engineering Ukraine's Wirtschaftswunder
papers.authors: Ufuk Akcigit, Furkan Kilic, Somik Lall, Solomiya Shpak
papers.abstract: As Ukraine emerges from the devastation of war, it faces a historic opportunity to engineer its own Wirtschaftswunder—a productivity-driven economic transformation akin to post-war West Germany. While investment-led growth may offer quick wins, it is efficiency, innovation, and institutional reform that will determine Ukraine’s long-term economic trajectory. Drawing on rich micro-level firm data spanning 25 years, this paper uncovers deep structural distortions that have suppressed creative destruction and productivity in Ukraine. It finds that business dynamism is on the decline, alongside rising market concentration among incumbent businesses, including low productivity state owned enterprises. To inform priorities for reviving business dynamism, this study develops a model of creative destruction drawing on Acemoglu et al. (2018) and Akcigit et al. (2021). The quantitative assessment highlights that policies that discipline entrenched incumbents are the bedrock for reviving business dynamism and engineer Ukraine’s Wirtschaftswunder. Policies targeting specific types of firms have limited efficacy when incumbents run wild.
papers.zh_title: 规划乌克兰的经济奇迹
papers.zh_abstract: 随着乌克兰从战争的破坏中复苏，它面临着一个历史性的机遇来规划自己的经济奇迹——一场类似于战后西德的生产力驱动的经济转型。虽然投资驱动的增长可能带来快速成效，但效率、创新和制度改革将决定乌克兰的长期经济轨迹。本文利用跨越25年的丰富微观企业数据，揭示了乌克兰内部抑制创造性破坏和生产力的深层结构性扭曲。研究发现，商业活力正在下降，同时现有企业（包括低生产率国有企业）的市场集中度在上升。为了为恢复商业活力的优先事项提供信息，本研究基于Acemoglu等人（2018）和Akcigit等人（2021）的模型，构建了一个创造性破坏模型。定量评估强调，约束根深蒂固的现有企业的政策是恢复商业活力和规划乌克兰经济奇迹的基石。当现有企业不受约束时，针对特定类型企业的政策效果有限。

papers.title: Reserves, Sanctions and Tariffs in a Time of Uncertainty
papers.authors: Menzie D. Chinn, Jeffrey A. Frankel, Hiro Ito
papers.abstract: We analyze the determinants of individual central bank holdings of international reserves, as shares of gold, dollar, euro, pound, yen and yuan, over the 1999-2022 period. We augment standard economic determinants of size, exchange rate volatility, currency pegs and bilateral trade with bilateral political/economic variables such as disagreement in UN voting, military alliances, and financial and trade sanctions. These variables augment uncertainty measures such as global Economic Policy Uncertainty, US monetary and trade policy uncertainty, and the VIX. In addition, we investigate whether the US imposition of tariffs in 2018 had any measurable impact on dollar and other holdings. We conclude that financial sanctions and trade policy uncertainty have a statistically and economically significant effect on holdings of the US dollar. US tariffs had an economically – but not statistically – significant impact on shares of foreign exchange reserves: dollar shares fell by 2.1% and other shares rose by 0.8%. These findings can inform the debate regarding some of the benefits and costs of using such geo-economic policies.
papers.zh_title: 不确定性时期的储备、制裁与关税
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了1999年至2022年期间各央行国际储备持有量（以黄金、美元、欧元、英镑、日元和人民币的份额计）的决定因素。我们在规模、汇率波动、货币挂钩和双边贸易等标准经济决定因素之外，增加了双边政治/经济变量，如联合国投票分歧、军事联盟以及金融和贸易制裁。这些变量增强了不确定性指标，如全球经济政策不确定性、美国货币和贸易政策不确定性以及VIX指数。此外，我们研究了美国2018年加征关税是否对美元及其他货币的持有量产生了可衡量的影响。我们得出结论：金融制裁和贸易政策不确定性对美元持有量具有统计上和经济上显著的影响。美国关税对外汇储备份额产生了经济上显著（但统计上不显著）的影响：美元份额下降了2.1%，其他货币份额上升了0.8%。这些发现可以为关于使用此类地缘经济政策的一些收益和成本的辩论提供信息。

papers.title: Aggregate Productivity with Heterogeneous Agents
papers.authors: David Baqaee, Ariel Burstein
papers.abstract: We develop a TFP-equivalent measure of aggregate welfare gains and losses for economies with heterogeneous agents. Our measure is the largest scalar by which total factor productivity can be contracted while keeping every household at least indifferent to the status quo. This construction maps arbitrary shocks to the economy into an equivalent aggregate productivity change. Aggregate productivity rises when the post-shock economy can make every household whole and still have resources left over, and falls when doing so requires additional resources. Hence, this measure provides a general-equilibrium analogue of total surplus in cost-benefit analysis. Under standard representative-agent assumptions, it coincides with familiar measures such as real GDP, the sum of compensating variations, and consumption-equivalent welfare. We show how to extend results that hold for welfare in representative-agent settings, including Hulten’s theorem, gains from trade formulas, and deadweight-loss triangles to heterogeneous-agent economies. We characterize this measure in terms of observables, including expenditures and price elasticities, and apply it to study productivity shocks, misallocation from wedges, and trade shocks, both with and without costly redistribution.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, PR；JEL：A10, C0, D0, D3, D50, D60, E0, F0, H0

papers.title: Selection Bias and Racial Disparities in Police Use of Force
papers.authors: Felipe M. Gonçalves, Steven Mello, Emily K. Weisburst
papers.abstract: We study racial disparities in police use of force. A pervasive issue in studies of policing is that the available data are selected by the police. As a result, disparities computed in the observed sample may be biased if selection into the data differs by race. We develop a framework and econometric strategy for correcting this bias, using variation across officers in enforcement intensity to identify the racial composition of the unobserved population at risk of selection. Using detailed administrative data on arrests and force incidents from Chicago and Seattle, we find that Black civilians comprise 56 percent of arrestees but about 49 percent of potential arrestees. Correcting for sample selection doubles our measure of the racial disparity in force rates. Decompositions of the corrected force disparity reveal that about 70 percent is unexplained by other demographic and incident characteristics, suggesting an important role for officer discrimination. Our selection bias estimates meaningfully impact the conclusions drawn in the existing literature.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：C10, J15, K42
papers.zh_title: 选择偏差与警察使用武力中的种族差异
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究警察使用武力中的种族差异。警务研究中的一个普遍问题是，可用数据是由警察选择的。因此，如果数据选择因种族而异，那么在观测样本中计算的差异可能存在偏差。我们开发了一个框架和计量经济学策略来纠正这种偏差，利用不同警官执法强度的差异来识别处于选择风险中的未观测人群的种族构成。利用来自芝加哥和西雅图的逮捕和武力事件的详细行政数据，我们发现黑人平民占逮捕人数的56%，但约占潜在逮捕人数的49%。纠正样本选择后，我们对武力使用率中种族差异的衡量指标翻了一番。对纠正后的武力差异的分解显示，约70%无法由其他人口统计特征和事件特征解释，这表明警官歧视起着重要作用。我们的选择偏差估计对现有文献中得出的结论产生了显著影响。

papers.title: How Retrainable are AI-Exposed Workers?
papers.authors: Benjamin G. Hyman, Benjamin Lahey, Karen Ni, Laura Pilossoph
papers.abstract: As artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities advance, will workers best adapt by reskilling into AI-complementary work or by sorting into occupations less exposed to AI? To answer this question, we assemble a new dataset of 1.9 million occupational training spells funded by the U.S. Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act from 2012–2024. We link pre- and post-training occupations to task-level AI exposure measures and estimate returns to training by comparing trainees to matched workers who sought workforce services but received only job search assistance. While trainees from low AI-exposure occupations earned high quarterly returns throughout the sample period, returns for workers from high-exposure occupations rose sharply—from about $900 quarterly before 2020 to $2,900 by 2022–2024. We attribute these gains primarily to transitions into less AI-exposed occupations and, to a lesser extent, to the expansion of training programs that build AI-complementary skills. To quantify when training into higher AI exposure work pays off, we construct a new AI Retrainability Index (AIR) and find that a large share of occupations are “AI-retrainable,” pointing to broad potential for adaptation.
papers.zh_title: 受人工智能影响的工人再培训能力有多强？
papers.zh_abstract: 随着人工智能能力的提升，工人最佳适应方式是重新学习技能进入与人工智能互补的工作，还是转向受人工智能影响较小的职业？为回答这个问题，我们整理了一个新的数据集，包含2012年至2024年间由美国《劳动力创新与机会法案》资助的190万次职业培训记录。我们将培训前后的职业与任务层面的人工智能暴露指标联系起来，并通过将受训者与寻求劳动力服务但仅获得求职帮助的匹配工人进行比较，来估计培训的回报。虽然来自低人工智能暴露职业的受训者在整个样本期间获得了高额的季度回报，但来自高暴露职业的工人的回报急剧上升——从2020年前的约900美元季度回报增至2022-2024年的2900美元。我们将这些收益主要归因于向人工智能暴露较低职业的转型，以及在较小程度上归因于培养人工智能互补技能的培训项目的扩展。为了量化何时培训进入更高人工智能暴露的工作是有回报的，我们构建了一个新的人工智能再培训指数，并发现很大一部分职业是“可人工智能再培训的”，这表明了广泛的适应潜力。

papers.title: Streaks to Success? The Effects of Highlighting Streaks on Student Effort and Learning
papers.authors: Raphaëlle Aulagnon, Julian Cristia, Santiago Cueto, Ofer Malamud
papers.abstract: We examine whether highlighting streaks—instances of repeated and consecutive behavior when completing learning tasks—encourages 4th to 6th grade students in Peru to increase their use of an online math platform and improve learning. 60,000 students were randomly assigned to receive messages that (i) highlighted streaks, (ii) provided personalized reminders with positive reinforcement, (iii) provided generic reminders, or (iv) to a control group. Highlighting streaks and providing personalized reminders significantly increased platform use compared to generic reminders and the control group, with streaks more effective on the intensive margin and personalized reminders more effective on the extensive margin. Highlighting streaks also significantly improved math achievement compared to the control group among the 1,500 students who took an endline test, although differences with other treatment arms were not significant.
papers.zh_title: 连胜通向成功？突出连胜对学生努力和学习的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在完成学习任务时突出连胜（重复和连续行为的实例）是否会鼓励秘鲁4至6年级学生增加对在线数学平台的使用并改善学习。60,000名学生被随机分配接收以下信息：(i) 突出连胜，(ii) 提供带有积极强化的个性化提醒，(iii) 提供通用提醒，或 (iv) 作为对照组。与通用提醒和对照组相比，突出连胜和提供个性化提醒显著增加了平台使用，其中连胜在集约边际上更有效，而个性化提醒在广延边际上更有效。在参加期末测试的1,500名学生中，与对照组相比，突出连胜也显著提高了数学成绩，尽管与其他处理组之间的差异不显著。

papers.title: Outsourcing, Labor Market Frictions, and Employment
papers.authors: Mayara Felix, Michael B. Wong
papers.abstract: We estimate the labor market impacts of Brazil’s 1993 outsourcing legalization using North-South variation in pre-legalization court permissiveness, and comparing security guards to less-affected occupations. We find that outsourcing legalization persistently reallocated jobs from older incumbent guards to younger entrants. Total employment of guards and their entry from informality persistently increased, while average demographic-adjusted wages remained constant. Meanwhile, a wave of occupational layoffs displaced some incumbent guards from high-wage firms. The evidence suggests that the rise of non-core activity outsourcing reduced labor market frictions, facilitated by firm-level economies of scale in human resources and spillovers to non-adopting firms.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, LS；JEL：J52, J58, L24, O17
papers.zh_title: 外包、劳动力市场摩擦与就业
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用巴西1993年外包合法化前后法院在南北地区宽容度的差异，并通过将保安与受影响较小的职业进行比较，来估计外包合法化对劳动力市场的影响。我们发现，外包合法化持续地将工作岗位从年长的在职保安重新分配给年轻的进入者。保安的总就业人数及其从非正规部门的进入人数持续增加，而经人口统计调整后的平均工资保持不变。与此同时，一波职业裁员使一些在职保安从高工资企业流失。证据表明，非核心活动外包的兴起减少了劳动力市场摩擦，这得益于企业层面人力资源的规模经济以及对未采用外包企业的溢出效应。

papers.title: General Laws and the Emergence of Durable Political Parties: The Case of Pennsylvania
papers.authors: Naomi R. Lamoreaux, John Joseph Wallis
papers.abstract: In previous work we have highlighted the importance of revisions to state constitutions that mandated that laws be general and uniform throughout the state. Indiana (in 1851) was the first state to adopt a general-law mandate, but most other states followed suit by the end of the century—most of them in the 1870s. This paper focuses on Pennsylvania, one of the states that made the change in the 1870s. We show that the movement to revise the state constitution was led by Republican party bosses seeking to suppress factional strife they thought was threatening their party’s dominance and perhaps even its existence. Their effort succeeded. We argue that it was the shift to general laws in Pennsylvania and other states that led to the emergence of a party system in the United States dominated by two durable political organizations.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, POL；JEL：N0, N4, N42, P0, P10
papers.zh_title: 一般法律与持久性政党的出现：宾夕法尼亚州的案例
papers.zh_abstract: 在之前的工作中，我们强调了州宪法修订的重要性，这些修订要求法律在全州范围内具有普遍性和统一性。印第安纳州（1851年）是第一个采用一般法律授权的州，但大多数其他州在世纪末之前也纷纷效仿——其中大部分是在1870年代。本文聚焦于宾夕法尼亚州，这是1870年代做出改变的州之一。我们表明，修订州宪法的运动是由共和党党魁领导的，他们试图压制他们认为威胁到其政党主导地位甚至生存的派系斗争。他们的努力成功了。我们认为，正是宾夕法尼亚州和其他州向一般法律的转变，导致了美国由两个持久的政治组织主导的政党体系的出现。

papers.title: How Much Tax Do US Billionaires Pay? Evidence from Administrative Data
papers.authors: Akcan S. Balkir, Emmanuel Saez, Danny Yagan, Gabriel Zucman
papers.abstract: We estimate income and taxes for the wealthiest group of US households by matching Forbes 400 data to the individual, business, estate, and gift tax returns of the corresponding group in 2010–2020. In our benchmark estimate, the total effective tax rate—all taxes paid relative to economic income—of the top 0.0002% (approximately the “top 400”) averaged 24% in 2018–2020 compared with 30% for the full population and 45% for top labor income earners. This lower total effective tax rate on the wealthiest is substantially driven by low taxable individual income relative to economic income. First, the C-corporations owned by the wealthiest distributed relatively little in dividends, limiting their individual income tax unless they sell their stocks. Second, top-owned passthrough businesses reported negative taxable income on average in spite of positive book income, further limiting their individual income tax. The top-400 effective tax rate fell from 30% in 2010–2017 to 24% in 2018–2020, explained both by a smaller share of business income being taxed and by that income being subject to lower tax rates. Estate and gift taxes contributed relatively little to their effective tax rate. Top-400 decedents paid 0.8% of their wealth in estate tax when married and 7% when single. Annual charitable contributions equalled 0.6% of wealth and 11% of economic income in 2018–20.
papers.zh_title: 美国亿万富翁缴纳多少税？来自行政数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过将福布斯400强数据与2010-2020年相应群体的个人、企业、遗产和赠与税申报表进行匹配，估算了美国最富裕家庭的收入和税收。在我们的基准估计中，最富有的0.0002%（大约“前400名”）的总有效税率——所有税收相对于经济收入的比率——在2018-2020年平均为24%，而全体人口为30%，最高劳动收入者为45%。最富裕群体较低的总有效税率主要源于其应税个人收入相对于经济收入较低。首先，最富裕群体拥有的C类公司分配的股息相对较少，除非他们出售股票，否则这限制了他们缴纳的个人所得税。其次，最富裕群体拥有的穿透型企业平均报告负的应税收入，尽管账面收入为正，这进一步限制了他们缴纳的个人所得税。前400名群体的有效税率从2010-2017年的30%下降到2018-2020年的24%，这既是因为被征税的企业收入份额变小，也是因为这些收入适用的税率更低。遗产税和赠与税对其有效税率的贡献相对较小。前400名群体中的已婚逝者缴纳的遗产税占其财富的0.8%，单身逝者则占7%。2018-2020年，年度慈善捐赠相当于财富的0.6%和经济收入的11%。

papers.title: Hopping on an Earlier Flight: Optimal Waiting with Multiple Flights
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: When should travellers leave for the airport? This paper develops a model for optimal airport arrival timing when travellers face uncertain travel times and can potentially board earlier flights. We show that access to earlier flights creates a ``recourse option" that fundamentally changes optimal behaviour. While earlier flights always reduce the probability of missing one's scheduled departure, they may paradoxically increase expected waiting time when travellers adjust their arrival strategies. Using renewal theory, we establish that with frequent service, the expected waiting time converges to half the headway between flights—a fundamental limit that cannot be improved through better planning. We connect the problem to newsvendor theory, showing how the fixed penalty for missing flights (rather than linear costs) leads to distinct optimality conditions. Our results explain why rational travellers should occasionally miss flights and provide practical guidelines for airlines designing standby policies and for travellers making departure decisions.
papers.zh_title: 跳上更早的航班：多航班情况下的最优等待
papers.zh_abstract: 旅行者应该在什么时候出发去机场？本文构建了一个模型，用于在旅行者面临不确定的旅行时间且有可能登上更早航班时，确定最优的机场到达时间。我们表明，能够乘坐更早航班创造了一个“追索期权”，从根本上改变了最优行为。虽然更早的航班总是会降低错过预定航班的概率，但当旅行者调整其到达策略时，这可能会矛盾地增加预期等待时间。利用更新理论，我们证明，在航班服务频繁的情况下，预期等待时间收敛到航班间隔时间的一半——这是一个无法通过更好规划来改善的基本极限。我们将该问题与报童理论联系起来，展示了错过航班的固定惩罚（而非线性成本）如何导致不同的最优条件。我们的结果解释了为什么理性的旅行者有时应该错过航班，并为航空公司设计候补政策以及旅行者做出出发决策提供了实用指南。

papers.title: Clinician Behavior When Skin-Tone Affects Test Results
papers.authors: Marcella Alsan, Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Jonathan Zhang
papers.abstract: We compare care for Black versus white patients following pulse oximetry, a widely-used device for measuring blood oxygen levels which over-estimates oxygen saturation in darker-skinned patients. Black patients are therefore medically more appropriate for follow-up care than white patients with the same pulse oximetry reading. Yet, using data from the Veterans Health Administration on 3.5 million emergency department visits between 2014 and 2018, we find that Black patients systematically receive lower rates of follow-up care than white patients with the same reading. Our findings illustrate how bias in a medical screening device can be propagated and potentially amplified in downstream care.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I11, I14, J14, J15
papers.zh_title: 肤色影响检测结果时的临床医生行为
papers.zh_abstract: 我们比较了脉搏血氧测定法后黑人与白人患者的护理情况。脉搏血氧测定法是一种广泛使用的测量血氧水平的设备，它会高估深肤色患者的血氧饱和度。因此，在脉搏血氧测定读数相同的情况下，黑人患者在医学上比白人患者更适合接受后续护理。然而，利用退伍军人健康管理局2014年至2018年间350万次急诊就诊的数据，我们发现，在读数相同的情况下，黑人患者接受后续护理的比例系统性低于白人患者。我们的研究结果说明了医疗筛查设备中的偏差如何在下游护理中被传播并可能被放大。

papers.title: Religion in Emerging and Developing Regions
papers.authors: Sara Lowes, Benjamin Marx, Eduardo Montero
papers.abstract: This paper examines the evolving relationship between religion and economic development in emerging and developing countries (EDCs). Building on large-scale survey data and recent scholarship, we document persistent and, in many regions, increasing levels of religiosity. First, we present global trends in religious beliefs and practices, highlighting a religious divergence between EDCs and high-income countries, as well as the continued prevalence of traditional belief systems alongside major world religions. Second, we analyze the determinants and consequences of religious behavior, showing how income volatility, financial insecurity, and cultural transitions sustain demand for religion. Third, we explore the institutional and political dimensions of religion in EDCs, emphasizing the role of religious institutions as public goods providers and as politically influential actors. This discussion offers a framework for understanding religious organizations as adaptive, competing platforms in pluralistic religious marketplaces. Overall, our findings suggest that religious adaptation, rather than decline, is central to understanding the future of religion and its economic implications in the developing world.
papers.zh_title: 新兴及发展中地区的宗教
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了新兴及发展中国家（EDCs）中宗教与经济发展之间不断演变的关系。基于大规模调查数据和近期学术研究，我们记录了这些地区持续且在许多情况下日益增长的宗教虔诚度。首先，我们展示了宗教信仰和实践的全球趋势，强调了新兴及发展中国家与高收入国家之间的宗教分化，以及传统信仰体系与主要世界宗教并存的持续现象。其次，我们分析了宗教行为的决定因素和后果，展示了收入波动、金融不安全和文化转型如何维持对宗教的需求。第三，我们探讨了新兴及发展中国家中宗教的制度与政治维度，强调了宗教机构作为公共物品提供者和具有政治影响力的行为者的角色。这一讨论为理解宗教组织在多元宗教市场中作为适应性、竞争性平台提供了一个框架。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，宗教的适应而非衰落，是理解发展中世界宗教未来及其经济影响的核心。

papers.title: Practical Finance: An Approximate Solution to Lifecycle Portfolio Choice
papers.authors: James J. Choi, Canyao Liu, Pengcheng Liu
papers.abstract: Research on normative household financial choices almost always gives quantitative guidance in one of two forms: a simple formula for an unrealistic setting, or numerical solutions for only a few parameter sets in a realistic setting. We propose a middle-ground approach we call practical finance: analytic approximations to optimal solutions as a function of relevant parameters in realistic settings that are easily computed in a spreadsheet. We provide such an approximation for lifecycle portfolio choice with labor income. Across 5,103 parameter sets, our approximation results in welfare that is on average only 0.06% lower than that of the optimal solution.
papers.zh_title: 实用金融学：生命周期投资组合选择的近似解
papers.zh_abstract: 关于规范性家庭财务选择的研究几乎总是以两种形式之一给出定量指导：针对不现实情境的简单公式，或针对现实情境中仅少数参数集的数值解。我们提出了一种中间方法，称之为实用金融学：在现实情境中，作为相关参数函数的解析近似最优解，且易于在电子表格中计算。我们为具有劳动收入的生命周期投资组合选择提供了这样一个近似解。在5103个参数集中，我们的近似解产生的福利平均仅比最优解低0.06%。

papers.title: Robinson Meets Roy: Monopsony Power and Comparative Advantage
papers.authors: Mark Bils, Bariş Kaymak, Kai-Jie Wu
papers.abstract: We provide a number of insights into the nature and consequences of monopsony power through the lens of comparative advantage, where employers’ power in wage setting stems from match-specific rents. Chief among them is that employers will apply larger wage markdowns to workers with greater comparative advantage at their firm. This leads to stronger monopsony power over more productive workers, provided the workers’ comparative advantage aligns with their absolute advantage. Using Brazilian administrative data, we confirm this prediction: monopsony disproportionately affects high-wage workers within firms and workers at high-paying firms. The model, calibrated to our estimates for Brazil, predicts that minimum wages increase both wages and formal employment for more productive workers while pushing less productive workers out of formal employment.
papers.zh_title: 罗宾逊遇见罗伊：买方垄断势力与比较优势
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过比较优势的视角，对买方垄断势力的性质和后果提供了一系列见解，其中雇主在工资设定中的权力源于匹配特定的租金。其中最主要的见解是，雇主将对在其公司具有更大比较优势的工人施加更大的工资折扣。这导致对生产率更高工人的买方垄断势力更强，前提是工人的比较优势与其绝对优势一致。利用巴西行政数据，我们证实了这一预测：买方垄断不成比例地影响公司内的高工资工人以及高工资公司的工人。该模型根据我们对巴西的估计进行了校准，预测最低工资会提高生产率更高工人的工资和正规就业，同时将生产率较低的工人挤出正规就业。

papers.title: College Application Mistakes and the Design of Information Policies at Scale
papers.authors: Tomás Larroucau, Ignacio A. Rios, Anaïs Fabre, Christopher Neilson
papers.abstract: We examine whether large-scale information interventions can improve college application outcomes in a centralized admissions system. Using nationwide surveys from Chile, we document widespread information frictions and frequent application mistakes, such as omitting attainable preferred programs or failing to include safety options. To address these frictions, we partnered with the Ministry of Education to implement a large-scale field experiment that provided applicants with personalized information on admission probabilities and program characteristics through customized online platforms. The intervention increased the probability that previously unmatched students received an assignment by 44% and improved placement into higher-ranked programs by 20%. Building on these results, the policy was scaled nationwide, reaching all applicants. The scaled-up version, evaluated via an encouragement design, confirmed substantial gains, including higher admission rates for initially unmatched students and persistent enrollment improvements. Our findings show that low-cost, personalized information policies, when integrated into centralized admissions platforms, can substantially reduce application mistakes and improve student outcomes at scale. The results also highlight how leveraging existing market design infrastructure can enable scalable, cost-effective interventions that enhance efficiency and equity in higher education access.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, IO, LS, PE；JEL：C93, D47, D83, I0, I23, I28
papers.zh_title: 大学申请错误与大规模信息政策的设计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了大规模信息干预是否能在集中招生系统中改善大学申请结果。利用智利的全国性调查，我们记录了广泛的信息摩擦和频繁的申请错误，例如遗漏可达到的偏好项目或未能包含保底选项。为了解决这些摩擦，我们与教育部合作实施了一项大规模实地实验，通过定制的在线平台向申请者提供关于录取概率和项目特征的个性化信息。该干预措施使之前未被录取的学生获得录取分配的概率提高了44%，并使他们进入排名更高项目的比例提高了20%。基于这些结果，该政策被推广至全国，覆盖所有申请者。通过鼓励设计评估的扩大版本证实了显著的收益，包括最初未被录取学生的更高录取率和持续的入学改善。我们的研究结果表明，当与集中招生平台整合时，低成本的个性化信息政策可以大规模地大幅减少申请错误并改善学生结果。结果还强调了利用现有市场设计基础设施如何能够实现可扩展、成本效益高的干预措施，从而提高高等教育机会的效率和公平性。

papers.title: Model Uncertainty and Measures of Inequality of Opportunity
papers.authors: Giovanni Bernardo, Steven N. Durlauf, Andros Kourtellos, Chih Ming Tan
papers.abstract: Inequality of opportunity has great normative importance. This has led to a literature on measuring the part of overall inequality that is due to circumstances outside of a person’s control. We contribute to such studies by evaluating the implications of uncertainty about circumstance variables and linear versus nonlinear transmission of circumstances on inequality of opportunity estimates. Applying linear Bayesian model averaging methods and three ensemble tree-based machine learning approaches to data from 31 European Union countries, we find that ignoring model uncertainty can lead to substantial overstatement of levels of inequality of opportunity.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：C10, C51, D30
papers.zh_title: 模型不确定性与机会不平等度量
papers.zh_abstract: 机会不平等具有巨大的规范性重要性。这催生了一类文献，旨在衡量总体不平等中由个人无法控制的环境因素所导致的部分。我们通过评估环境变量的不确定性以及环境因素线性与非线性传递对机会不平等估计的影响，为这类研究做出了贡献。将线性贝叶斯模型平均方法和三种基于集成树的机器学习方法应用于31个欧盟国家的数据，我们发现忽略模型不确定性可能导致对机会不平等水平的显著高估。

papers.title: Corporate Hierarchy
papers.authors: Michael Ewens, Xavier Giroud
papers.abstract: We introduce a novel measure of corporate hierarchies for over 3,100 U.S. public firms. This measure is obtained from online resumes of 7 million employees and a network estimation technique that allows us to identify hierarchical layers. Equipped with this measure, we document several facts about corporate hierarchies. Firms have on average ten hierarchical layers and a pyramidal organizational structure. More hierarchical firms have a more educated workforce, higher internal promotion rates, and longer employee tenure. Their operating performance is higher, but they face higher administrative costs. They are more active acquirers and produce more patents, but not higher-quality patents. They exhibit lower stock return volatility and operating asset volatility. We also examine how companies adjust their hierarchies in response to demand and knowledge shocks. We find that pharmaceutical companies increased their number of layers following the Covid-19 pandemic, while companies flattened their hierarchies following the adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies. These findings are consistent with the theoretical predictions of existing models of corporate hierarchies.
papers.meta: Programs：CF；JEL：D21, D23, G3, J24, L22, M12, M51
papers.zh_title: 企业层级结构
papers.zh_abstract: 我们为超过3100家美国上市公司引入了一种新的企业层级结构度量方法。该度量基于700万员工的在线简历以及一种网络估计技术，使我们能够识别出层级结构。借助这一度量，我们记录了关于企业层级结构的若干事实。企业平均拥有十个层级，并呈现金字塔型组织结构。层级越多的企业，其员工受教育程度越高、内部晋升率越高、员工任职时间越长。这些企业的运营绩效更高，但行政成本也更高。它们更积极地收购其他公司，并产出更多专利，但专利质量并未更高。它们的股票回报波动率和运营资产波动率更低。我们还研究了企业如何根据需求冲击和知识冲击调整其层级结构。我们发现，制药公司在新冠疫情后增加了层级数量，而企业在采用人工智能技术后则减少了层级。这些发现与现有企业层级结构模型的理论预测一致。

papers.title: Misinformation and Mistrust: The Equilibrium Effects of Fake Reviews on Amazon.com
papers.authors: Ashvin Gandhi, Brett Hollenbeck, Zhijian Li
papers.abstract: Fake product reviews—and the manipulation of reputation systems by sellers more broadly—are a widespread issue for two-sided platforms. We study two primary channels through which such manipulation can affect market outcomes: (i) creating misinformation about the reviewed product, and (ii) breeding mistrust in ratings system overall. To examine these in the Amazon.com marketplace, we measure misinformation by observing products purchasing fake reviews and measure mistrust by eliciting shoppers’ beliefs about the prevalence of fake reviews on Amazon through an incentivized survey experiment. We incorporate these into a structural model of demand in which consumers form beliefs about product quality based on observed reviews and perceptions about their trustworthiness. Counterfactual policy simulations indicate that fake reviews reduce consumer welfare, shift sales from honest to dishonest sellers, and ultimately harm the platform. Welfare losses arise primarily from misinformation that leads to worse purchases. While mistrust also leads to purchasing mistakes, the consumer harms of mistrust are largely offset by increased price competition under a weakened ratings system. Finally, we identify key limitations in platforms’ incentives to police manipulation and evaluate enforcement alternatives.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LE；JEL：L00, L1, L10, L11, L15, M3, M31, M38
papers.zh_title: 虚假信息与不信任：虚假评论在亚马逊上的均衡效应
papers.zh_abstract: 虚假产品评论——以及更广泛地，卖家对声誉系统的操纵——是双边平台面临的一个普遍问题。我们研究了这种操纵影响市场结果的两个主要渠道：(i) 制造关于被评论产品的虚假信息，以及 (ii) 在整体上滋生对评级系统的不信任。为了在亚马逊市场中考察这些渠道，我们通过观察购买虚假评论的产品来衡量虚假信息，并通过一项激励性调查实验来获取购物者对亚马逊上虚假评论普遍程度的信念，从而衡量不信任。我们将这些因素纳入一个结构性需求模型，在该模型中，消费者基于观察到的评论及其对评论可信度的感知来形成对产品质量的信念。反事实政策模拟表明，虚假评论降低了消费者福利，将销售从诚实卖家转移到不诚实卖家，并最终损害了平台。福利损失主要源于导致更差购买决策的虚假信息。虽然不信任也会导致购买错误，但在评级系统被削弱的情况下，不信任对消费者的损害在很大程度上被加剧的价格竞争所抵消。最后，我们指出了平台在监管操纵行为方面激励措施的关键局限性，并评估了替代执法方案。

papers.title: Scalable Expertise: How Standardization Drives Scale and Scope
papers.authors: David Argente, Sara Moreira, Ezra Oberfield, Venky Venkateswaran
papers.abstract: We develop and test a theory of firm size and scope centered on standardization: the extent to which a firm’s products are similar. Heterogeneous firms choose the number, quality and standardization of their products. Standardizing makes expanding scope less costly, which then increases the return to standardization. Standardized firms have endogenously higher marginal returns to scale—their marginal costs rise less sharply with scale—implying greater responsiveness to demand shifts. We construct a novel measure of standardization using detailed product characteristics and show support for the theory’s main predictions. We show that new product features from standardized firms diffuse more quickly.
papers.zh_title: 可扩展的专业知识：标准化如何驱动规模与范围
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出并检验了一个以标准化为核心的企业规模与范围理论：标准化指的是企业产品之间的相似程度。异质性企业选择其产品的数量、质量和标准化程度。标准化使得扩大范围成本更低，进而提高了标准化的回报。标准化企业内在地具有更高的规模边际回报——其边际成本随规模扩大而上升得更慢——这意味着它们对需求变化的反应更灵敏。我们利用详细的产品特征构建了一个新颖的标准化度量，并验证了该理论的主要预测。我们发现，来自标准化企业的新产品特征传播得更快。

papers.title: Expecting Harm? The Impact of Rural Hospital Acquisitions on Maternal Health Care
papers.authors: David Dranove, Martin Gaynor, Eilidh Geddes
papers.abstract: While numerous papers document the effects of mergers on cost and quality, the effects of hospital mergers on access to care are less certain. Merging hospitals may limit access by closing one of the affected hospitals or eliminating individual service lines. However, hospital systems may have more resources to improve care delivery. We study the impact of hospital mergers on obstetric care in rural markets, where there may be heightened concern about the availability of local care options. Using a differences-in-differences approach, we find that when rural hospitals are acquired, there are substantial increases in the probability of obstetric unit closures, with resulting large reductions in the number of births at the hospital. We find mixed effects on health outcomes: there are small increases in maternal morbidity, but no changes in newborn outcomes on average. However, there are improvements of newborns with Medicaid coverage. Additionally, we find decreases in maternal transfers and increases in procedures consistent with women delivering in more resourced hospitals.
papers.zh_title: 预期伤害？农村医院收购对孕产妇医疗的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管大量文献记录了并购对成本和质量的影响，但医院并购对医疗服务可及性的影响尚不确定。合并后的医院可能会通过关闭其中一家受影响医院或取消个别服务线来限制服务可及性。然而，医院系统可能拥有更多资源来改善医疗服务提供。我们研究了医院并购对农村市场产科护理的影响，在这些市场中，人们对当地护理选择的可用性可能更为担忧。使用双重差分方法，我们发现当农村医院被收购时，产科病房关闭的概率显著增加，导致医院分娩数量大幅减少。我们发现对健康结果的影响好坏参半：产妇发病率略有增加，但新生儿结局平均没有变化。然而，享受医疗补助计划的新生儿结局有所改善。此外，我们发现产妇转院减少，而与女性在资源更丰富的医院分娩相符的医疗程序有所增加。

papers.title: Which Individuals Create Jobs? Managerial Talent and Occupational Skills
papers.authors: Marc-Andreas Muendler, James E. Rauch, Sergio Mikio Koyama
papers.abstract: We consider founders of limited liability firms who previously held jobs in the formal sector of Brazil. Managers are five percent of former job holders but their startups account for 27 percent of new firm employment. Relatively little of their overrepresentation as founders or the larger size of their startups is explained by their previous wages or other standard human capital variables. Among non-managerial former occupations we examined those clearly connected to demand (sales) and to supply (technology, purchasing). Only purchasing was comparable to managerial occupations in entrepreneurship and new firm size. Further examination suggests that a key to greater entrepreneurship and larger initial firm size is that workers’ former jobs entailed building relationships with other businesses: in demand-side occupations, they sold to other businesses; in supply-side occupations, they bought from other businesses.
papers.zh_title: 哪些人创造了就业？管理才能与职业技能
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了有限责任公司的创始人，他们此前曾在巴西正规部门工作。管理人员仅占前职人员的5%，但他们的初创企业却贡献了27%的新企业就业。他们在创始人中的过度代表以及其初创企业规模较大，相对较少地由其之前的工资或其他标准人力资本变量所解释。在非管理类的前职业中，我们考察了那些明显与需求（销售）和供给（技术、采购）相关的职业。只有采购职业在创业率和初创企业规模方面与管理类职业相当。进一步的研究表明，工人之前的工作涉及与其他企业建立关系是促进更高创业率和更大初始企业规模的关键：在需求侧职业中，他们向其他企业销售；在供给侧职业中，他们从其他企业采购。

papers.title: Composition Beats Collapse: Insights from the Bisin–Verdier Model on Endogenous Fertility Reversal
papers.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Raul A. Sosa
papers.abstract: Fertility rates have fallen below replacement in most countries, fueling predictions of demographic collapse. We show these forecasts overlook a crucial fact: societies are not homogeneous. Using the Bisin–Verdier model of cultural transmission with endogenous fertility and direct socialization, calibrated to U.S. and global data, we find that high-fertility, high-retention groups persist, gain share, and lead the total population to grow. Even if fertility remains below replacement in every country, extinction is unlikely. Simulations imply continued growth with pronounced compositional change, driven especially by religious communities with high fertility. In our ten-generation world calibration, Muslims become the largest tradition.
papers.zh_title: 构成战胜崩溃：来自Bisin-Verdier模型关于内生生育率逆转的洞见
