First, the optimal AI strategy stochastically replaces workers rather than fixating on a single position. Second, the principal replaces workers at the beginning and at the end of the workflow, but does not replace the middle worker, since this worker is crucial for sustaining the flow of information obtained by peer monitoring. Third, the principal may optimally underutilize available AI capacity. Fourth, the optimal AI adoption increases average wages and reduces intra-team wage inequality.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：D20, L0, M0, M12, M2, M21, M5, M52
papers.zh_title: 团队动态中的人工智能：谁被取代以及为什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究调查了组织中采用人工智能（AI）的影响。我们提出以下问题：（1）委托人应如何最优地部署有限的AI资源来取代团队中的工人？（2）在顺序工作流程中，哪些工人面临最高的AI替代风险？（3）用AI替代如何影响被替代和未被替代工人的工资？我们开发了一个顺序团队生产模型，其中委托人可以利用同伴监督——即每个工人观察其前任的努力——来约束团队成员。委托人可以用AI代理取代一些工人，AI代理的行为不受道德风险影响。我们的分析得出四个关键结果。首先，最优AI策略是随机地取代工人，而不是固定于某个单一职位。其次，委托人取代工作流程开始和结束时的工人，但不取代中间工人，因为该工人对于维持通过同伴监督获得的信息流至关重要。第三，委托人可能最优地未充分利用可用的AI能力。第四，最优AI采用提高了平均工资并降低了团队内部的工资不平等。

papers.title: Scale Economies, Input-Output Loops, and Trade
papers.authors: Dominick G. Bartelme, Yuyang Jiang, Konstantin Kucheryavyy, Andrés Rodríguez-Clare
papers.abstract: This paper studies the equilibrium and welfare implications of quantitative trade models with sector-level external economies of scale (EES). While empirical evidence highlights the importance of EES, prior work has examined their effects only in models without input-output linkages. Focusing on a small open economy, we derive an intuitive condition for equilibrium uniqueness that links trade elasticities, scale elasticities, and input-output coefficients. We further show that this same condition guarantees positive gains from trade, regardless of a country’s pattern of specialization.
papers.zh_title: 规模经济、投入产出循环与贸易
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了具有部门层面外部规模经济（EES）的定量贸易模型的均衡和福利含义。虽然经验证据强调了EES的重要性，但先前的研究仅在缺乏投入产出关联的模型中考察了其影响。聚焦于一个小型开放经济体，我们推导出一个直观的均衡唯一性条件，该条件将贸易弹性、规模弹性和投入产出系数联系起来。我们进一步表明，无论一个国家的专业化模式如何，同样的条件保证了贸易的正收益。

papers.title: Monetary-Fiscal Interactions
papers.authors: John H. Cochrane
papers.abstract: Inflation surged in 2021-2023 from a classic fiscal shock: money and debt that financed huge spending, without a plan for repayment. Neither money nor supply shocks offer a coherent alternative explanation. Inflation eased, with no recession, once the fiscal shock was over. Higher interest rates could have brought inflation down earlier, but could not have stopped it. Going forward, higher interest rates will raise debt service costs, and thus perversely raise inflation unless fiscal policy can tighten. High debt and structural deficits also mean that the US may lose the fiscal space to borrow in the next crisis.
papers.zh_title: 货币-财政互动
papers.zh_abstract: 2021-2023年的通胀飙升源于一个典型的财政冲击：为巨额支出融资的货币和债务，却没有偿还计划。无论是货币冲击还是供给冲击，都无法提供连贯的替代解释。一旦财政冲击结束，通胀便得以缓解，且未伴随经济衰退。更高的利率本可以更早地降低通胀，但无法阻止其发生。展望未来，更高的利率将增加偿债成本，从而反常地推高通胀，除非财政政策能够收紧。高债务和结构性赤字也意味着美国可能在下一次危机中失去借贷的财政空间。

papers.title: A Research Agenda for the Economics of Transformative AI
papers.authors: Erik Brynjolfsson, Anton Korinek, Ajay K. Agrawal
papers.abstract: As we approach Transformative Artificial Intelligence (TAI), there is an urgent need to advance our understanding of how it could reshape our economic models, institutions and policies. We propose a research agenda for the economics of TAI by identifying nine Grand Challenges: economic growth, innovation, income distribution, decision-making power, geoeconomics, information flows, safety risks, human well-being, and transition dynamics. By accelerating work in these areas, researchers can develop insights and tools to help fulfill the economic potential of TAI.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, LS, PR；JEL：A11, O33, O40
papers.zh_title: 变革性人工智能经济学的未来研究议程
papers.zh_abstract: 随着我们接近变革性人工智能（TAI），迫切需要加深对其如何重塑经济模型、制度和政策的理解。我们通过识别九大挑战来提出TAI经济学的研究议程：经济增长、创新、收入分配、决策权、地缘经济学、信息流、安全风险、人类福祉和转型动态。通过加速这些领域的研究，研究人员可以开发见解和工具，以帮助实现TAI的经济潜力。

papers.title: The Impact of Carcinogenic Risk Exposure on Housing Values: Estimates From Chemical Reclassifications
papers.authors: Jules H. van Binsbergen, João F. Cocco, Marco Grotteria, S. Lakshmi Naaraayanan
papers.abstract: We quantify the impact of perceived cancer risk on housing values using widely advertised national reclassifications of chemical carcinogenicity in the United States. Combining these information events with an empirical design that compares changes in house values closer to affected toxic plants against those farther away isolates the effect of cancer risk news from other local factors. Focusing on plants previously emitting reclassified carcinogenic chemicals, we estimate a 1-2% decline in housing values within a 3-mile radius compared to those located farther away. The effects are stronger in areas with higher media presence underscoring the role of salience as a mechanism.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE, EH；JEL：G11, G50, Q51, Q53
papers.zh_title: 致癌风险暴露对住房价值的影响：基于化学物质重新分类的估计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国全国范围内广泛宣传的化学致癌性重新分类事件，量化了感知癌症风险对住房价值的影响。将这些信息事件与一种实证设计相结合，该设计比较了靠近受影响有毒工厂的房屋价值变化与远离这些工厂的房屋价值变化，从而将癌症风险新闻的影响与其他地方性因素分离开来。聚焦于之前排放过被重新分类的致癌化学物质的工厂，我们估计，与位于更远距离的房屋相比，3英里半径内的住房价值下降了1-2%。在媒体曝光度更高的地区，这种影响更强，这凸显了显著性作为一种机制的作用。

papers.title: Maternity Leave Extensions and Gender Gaps: Evidence from an Online Job Platform
papers.authors: Hanming Fang, Jiayin Hu, Miao Yu
papers.abstract: We investigate the unintended consequences of maternity leave extension on gender gaps in the labor market. Using millions of job applications on an online job platform and the staggered extension of maternity leave across Chinese provinces, we find that an average increase (22%) in the length of paid maternity leave led to a 3.7 percentage point decrease in positive callbacks to female applicants relative to their male counterparts. In response, female job seekers submitted 4.4 more job applications, shifted toward jobs with 5.4% lower wages, and experienced 0.9 weeks longer job search duration than male applicants. We also find that government subsidies that partially cover firms' wage costs of extended maternity leave help alleviate its adverse impact on gender disparities in hiring.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：J16, J18, J23, J64, J71
papers.zh_title: 产假延长与性别差距：来自在线求职平台的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了产假延长对劳动力市场中性别差距的意外后果。利用在线求职平台上数百万份求职申请以及中国各省份产假的分阶段延长，我们发现，带薪产假时长平均增加22%导致女性求职者相对于男性求职者的积极回电率下降了3.7个百分点。作为回应，女性求职者比男性求职者多提交了4.4份求职申请，转向了工资低5.4%的工作，并且求职持续时间比男性求职者长了0.9周。我们还发现，部分覆盖企业延长产假工资成本的政府补贴有助于缓解其对招聘中性别差异的不利影响。

papers.title: Price and Volume Divergence in China’s Real Estate Markets: The Role of Local Governments
papers.authors: Jeffery (Jinfan) Chang, Yuheng Wang, Wei Xiong
papers.abstract: During the Covid-19 pandemic (2020-2022), Chinese cities witnessed a paradox: residential land and new house prices surged while transaction volumes plummeted. We attribute this to local governments’ active price management through supply controls, land acquisitions by Local Government Financing Vehicles (LGFVs), and limits on new home sales permits. Cities more dependent on land sales and land-backed debt before the pandemic experienced greater price increases and price-volume divergence, with LGFVs buying more land at higher prices than other buyers. These interventions helped sustain fiscal financing but deepened developers’ financial distress, revealing unintended consequences of local governments’ fiscal strategies during downturns.
papers.zh_title: 中国房地产市场的价量背离：地方政府的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 在新冠疫情期间（2020-2022年），中国城市出现了一个悖论：住宅用地和新房价格飙升，而交易量却暴跌。我们将此归因于地方政府通过供应控制、地方政府融资平台购地以及限制新房销售许可等方式进行的积极价格管理。在疫情前更依赖土地出让和土地抵押债务的城市，经历了更大的价格上涨和价量背离，地方政府融资平台以高于其他买家的价格购买了更多土地。这些干预措施有助于维持财政融资，但加深了开发商的财务困境，揭示了地方政府在衰退期间财政策略的意外后果。

papers.title: Playing with Blocs: Quantifying Decoupling
papers.authors: Barthélémy Bonadio, Zhen Huo, Elliot Kang, Andrei A. Levchenko, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar, Hiroshi Toma, Petia Topalova
papers.abstract: We adopt a data-driven approach to measure trade fragmentation over the period 2015-2023. Countries are classified into three groups according to changes in their trade costs with the US and China: those shifting toward the US bloc, those shifting toward the China bloc, and those with no change in alignment. Roughly one-quarter of countries moved toward each bloc, while about half showed no realignment. We document that while cross-bloc trade costs rose, they were accompanied by falling within-bloc trade costs. We use a quantitative model to compute the real income effects of this reconfiguration of the global trade costs. The median country in the world, and the median country within each bloc, has 0.4-0.6% higher real income as a result of the observed decoupling, contrary to the widespread belief that fragmentation has been welfare-reducing. Finally, we find a modest amount of bloc misalignment: the median country moving to the US bloc would actually be better off moving to the China bloc, and vice versa. These results suggest that trade decoupling does not always follow trade-driven economic interests.
papers.zh_title: 与集团博弈：量化脱钩
papers.zh_abstract: 我们采用数据驱动的方法来衡量2015-2023年期间的贸易碎片化程度。根据各国与美国和中国贸易成本的变化，将其分为三组：向美国集团靠拢的国家、向中国集团靠拢的国家以及结盟关系没有变化的国家。大约四分之一的国家向每个集团靠拢，而约一半的国家没有表现出重新结盟。我们记录到，虽然跨集团的贸易成本上升，但集团内部的贸易成本却在下降。我们使用一个量化模型来计算这种全球贸易成本重构的实际收入效应。由于观察到的脱钩，世界上的中位国家以及每个集团内部的中位国家的实际收入提高了0.4-0.6%，这与普遍认为碎片化降低了福利的观点相反。最后，我们发现了一定程度的集团错配：向美国集团靠拢的中位国家实际上如果转向中国集团会过得更好，反之亦然。这些结果表明，贸易脱钩并不总是遵循贸易驱动的经济利益。

papers.title: Equity Frictions and Firm Ownership
papers.authors: Alessandra Peter
papers.abstract: In this paper, I document systematic heterogeneity in ownership and financing of firms across Eurozone countries. To rationalize these differences, I build a quantitative general equilibrium model of workers and entrepreneurs who choose debt and equity financing of their firms, subject to rich country-specific financial frictions. The novel data on firm ownership and financing, combined with the structure of the model, allows me to quantify the level of debt and equity frictions in each country. Quantitatively, I find much larger output effects from equity frictions: harmonizing them across countries would lead to nearly four times larger output effects compared to debt frictions, and removing them would increase aggregate output by 75\\% more. The larger impact on output is due not only to the estimated levels and dispersion of equity frictions, but also to the fact that equity provides greater risk sharing, which further incentivizes entrepreneurs to expand their firms. Through their effect on risk sharing, equity frictions also rationalize the observed negative relationship between equity financing and wealth inequality. Quantitatively, they are responsible for over 70\\% of the explained variation in top wealth shares across countries.
papers.zh_title: 股权摩擦与企业所有权
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我记录了欧元区各国企业在所有权和融资方面的系统性异质性。为了解释这些差异，我构建了一个包含工人和企业家的量化一般均衡模型，这些企业家在面临丰富的国家特定金融摩擦的情况下，为其企业选择债务和股权融资。关于企业所有权和融资的新数据，结合模型结构，使我能够量化每个国家的债务和股权摩擦水平。在量化上，我发现股权摩擦对产出的影响要大得多：在各国间协调统一股权摩擦对产出的影响几乎是协调统一债务摩擦的四倍，而消除股权摩擦将使总产出额外增加75%。对产出的更大影响不仅源于股权摩擦的估计水平和离散程度，还源于股权提供了更大的风险分担，这进一步激励企业家扩张其企业。通过其对风险分担的影响，股权摩擦也解释了观察到的股权融资与财富不平等之间的负相关关系。在量化上，它们解释了各国顶层财富份额中超过70%的已解释变异。

papers.title: How Credible is Hong Kong's Currency Peg?
papers.authors: Urban Jermann, Bin Wei, Vivian Yue
papers.abstract: This paper develops an asset-pricing model to evaluate the credibility of Hong Kong’s Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS). Allowing for imperfect peg credibility, we derive closed-form solutions for exchange rates and option prices under potential regime shifts. Using HKD option data, we estimate market-implied probabilities of peg survival and the fundamental value of the HKD. Our results show that credibility fluctuates with U.S. interest rate hikes, local liquidity conditions, and Chinese currency dynamics. Compared with more standard Black-Scholes-based models, our approach provides more realistic assessments of peg sustainability.
papers.zh_title: 香港联系汇率制度的可信度有多高？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一个资产定价模型来评估香港联系汇率制度的可信度。考虑到盯住汇率制度并非完全可信，我们推导出在潜在制度转换下汇率和期权价格的闭式解。利用港元期权数据，我们估计了市场隐含的盯住汇率存续概率以及港元的基本价值。我们的结果表明，可信度随着美国利率上调、本地流动性状况以及人民币汇率动态而波动。与更基于标准布莱克-斯科尔斯模型的模型相比，我们的方法提供了对盯住汇率可持续性更现实的评估。

papers.title: Who’s Afraid of Tariffs? The Geographic Distribution of Fear and Loss
papers.authors: Huijun Yan, Randall Morck
papers.abstract: On April 2nd 2025, after markets closed, the United States announced steep “Liberation Day” tariffs against most of its trading partners, many of which announced retaliatory tariffs. Market uncertainty spiked, consistent with the magnitudes and scope of the tariffs being unexpected. The prospect of a global trade war sent US stock markets down over ten percent until the US “paused” its tariffs on April 9th 2025, whereupon markets recovered. Portfolios of the stocks of firms headquartered in “redder” (more Republicans per Democrat) counties lost more value during this window.
papers.zh_title: 谁害怕关税？恐惧与损失的地理分布
papers.zh_abstract: 2025年4月2日，在股市收盘后，美国宣布对其大多数贸易伙伴征收高额的“解放日”关税，其中许多贸易伙伴宣布了报复性关税。市场不确定性飙升，这与关税的规模和范围出乎意料是一致的。全球贸易战的前景导致美国股市下跌超过10%，直到美国于2025年4月9日“暂停”其关税，此后市场回升。在此期间，总部位于“更红”（即每个民主党人对应的共和党人更多）县的公司的股票投资组合损失更大。

papers.title: The Traffic Noise Externality: Costs, Incidence and Policy Implications
papers.authors: Enrico Moretti, Harrison Wheeler
papers.abstract: More than 42 million Americans are exposed to medium or high levels of traffic noise. Despite its potentially large toll and unequal distribution, the economic costs, incidence, and policy implications of traffic noise have received limited attention in economics. We quantify the aggregate economic burden of this externality and its distribution across demographic groups by estimating homebuyers' willingness to pay for quieter environments. Using quasi-experimental variation from the construction of noise barriers, we find that reduced traffic noise exposure leads to significant increases in house prices, implying that buyers are willing to pay a substantial premium for each decibel of noise reduction. In the five years before construction, we detect no differential pre-trends in prices between treated and control properties. Following construction, we observe an immediate and largely permanent 6.8% increase in prices within 100 meters, with smaller gains at greater distances. Information on each barrier's noise attenuation allows us to recover the willingness to pay per decibel of traffic noise. We calculate the aggregate economic cost of traffic noise at $110 billion nationwide. The economic burden is disproportionately borne by lower income and minority households, suggesting that the externality is regressive. The cost varies widely across cities, reflecting differences in noise levels, property values and population density. Based on our estimates, the socially efficient Pigouvian tax amounts to $974 per vehicle. A broad shift to electric vehicles -- which are quieter than traditional vehicles -- could yield noise reduction benefits of $77.3 billion, concentrated among low-income families in dense urban areas.
papers.zh_title: 交通噪音外部性：成本、负担与政策含义
papers.zh_abstract: 超过4200万美国人暴露在中度或高度的交通噪音中。尽管其潜在代价巨大且分布不均，但交通噪音的经济成本、负担和政策含义在经济学中受到的关注有限。我们通过估计购房者为更安静环境支付的意愿，量化了这种外部性的总经济负担及其在不同人口群体间的分布。利用隔音屏障建设的准实验性变化，我们发现交通噪音暴露的减少导致房价显著上涨，这意味着购房者愿意为每分贝的噪音降低支付可观的溢价。在建设前的五年中，我们检测到处理组和对照组房产之间没有差异性的价格前置趋势。建设后，我们观察到100米内的房价立即且基本永久性地增长了6.8%，在更远距离上收益较小。每个屏障的噪音衰减信息使我们能够推算出每分贝交通噪音的支付意愿。我们计算出全国交通噪音的总经济成本为1100亿美元。经济负担不成比例地由低收入和少数族裔家庭承担，表明这种外部性是累退的。成本在不同城市间差异很大，反映了噪音水平、房产价值和人口密度的差异。根据我们的估计，社会最优的庇古税为每辆车974美元。全面转向电动汽车——其比传统车辆更安静——可以带来773亿美元的降噪收益，这些收益集中在密集城市地区的低收入家庭中。

papers.title: Identity as Self-Image
papers.authors: Roland Bénabou, Luca Henkel
papers.abstract: We review the economic literature on self-image, which conceptualizes identity as a set of beliefs about one’s core traits, values, goals, and social ties. Self-image concerns lead individuals to process information and make choices in non-standard ways that help affirm and protect certain valued identities. We first present the main cognitive mechanisms involved within a simple unifying framework. We then survey the extensive laboratory, online, and field experimental literature on the nature and behavioral implications of self-image concerns. We discuss in particular how they give rise to information and decision avoidance, motivated memory and beliefs, excuse-driven behavior, preferences for truth-telling, hypothetical bias, moral cleansing and moral licensing, collective identities, political preferences, and other forms of self-signaling or self-deception. We subsequently discuss common empirical strategies used to identify self-image concerns, as well as the threats to their validity and how to alleviate them. We conclude by outlining open questions and directions for future research on the belief-based approach to identity.
papers.zh_title: 身份作为自我形象
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了关于自我形象的经济学文献，该文献将身份概念化为关于个人核心特质、价值观、目标和社会联系的一套信念。自我形象关切导致个体以非标准的方式处理信息和做出选择，这些方式有助于确认和保护某些有价值的身份。我们首先在一个简单的统一框架内介绍所涉及的主要认知机制。然后，我们调查了关于自我形象关切的性质和行为含义的大量实验室、在线和现场实验文献。我们特别讨论了这些关切如何导致信息和决策回避、动机性记忆和信念、借口驱动行为、对说实话的偏好、假设偏差、道德净化与道德许可、集体身份、政治偏好以及其他形式的自我信号或自我欺骗。随后，我们讨论了用于识别自我形象关切的常见实证策略，以及这些策略有效性的威胁和如何减轻这些威胁。最后，我们概述了关于基于信念的身份研究方法的开放性问题及未来研究方向。

papers.title: Social Learning among Urban Manufacturing Firms: Energy-Efficient Motors in Bangladesh
papers.authors: Ritam Chaurey, Gaurav Nayyar, Siddharth Sharma, Eric Verhoogen
papers.abstract: Knowledge spillovers among firms are widely viewed as a key driver of agglomeration and growth, but are difficult to estimate cleanly. We randomly allocated an energy-efficient motor --- a “servo'” motor --- among leather-goods firms in Dhaka, Bangladesh, and tracked adoption, information flows, beliefs about energy savings, and other variables. We use the difference between actual exposure and expected exposure (from simulated randomization draws) to identify the effect of exposure. We find a robust positive effect of exposure to treated neighbors within a small geographic area (500 meters in our baseline specification) on information flows and adoption. A marginal value of public funds (MVPF) calculation taking learning spillovers into account yields a significantly larger value than one considering only treated firms and suggests that adoption subsidies would be a cost-effective policy intervention.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, PR；JEL：L23, L67, O12, O14, R11
papers.zh_title: 城市制造业企业间的社会学习：孟加拉国的节能电机
papers.zh_abstract: 企业间的知识溢出被广泛视为集聚和增长的关键驱动力，但很难进行干净的估计。我们在孟加拉国达卡的皮革制品企业中随机分配了一种节能电机——一种“伺服”电机，并追踪了采用情况、信息流动、关于节能的信念以及其他变量。我们利用实际暴露与预期暴露（来自模拟随机化抽取）之间的差异来识别暴露效应。我们发现，在一个小地理区域（我们的基准设定中为500米）内，接触处理过的邻居对信息流动和采用具有稳健的正向效应。考虑学习溢出效应的公共资金边际价值（MVPF）计算得出的数值显著大于仅考虑处理企业的计算值，这表明采用补贴将是一种具有成本效益的政策干预。

papers.title: AI and Task Efficiency
papers.authors: Boyan Jovanovic, Peter L. Rousseau
papers.abstract: We model several ways in which AI may improve decisions, raise the productivity of firms, and raise human capital growth. Each focuses on activities that involve problem solving, with solutions being guided by signals. If AI raises the accuracy of the signals, humans will then make better decisions — individually and in groups.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能与任务效率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们建模了人工智能可能改善决策、提高企业生产率以及促进人力资本增长的几种方式。每种方式都侧重于涉及问题解决的活动，其中解决方案由信号引导。如果人工智能提高了信号的准确性，那么人类将做出更好的决策——无论是个人决策还是群体决策。

papers.title: A Study of the Microdynamics of Early Childhood Learning
papers.authors: James J. Heckman, Jin Zhou
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the weekly evolution of child skills as measured by unique data from a widely-emulated early childhood home-visiting program developed in Jamaica, adapted to rural China, and applied in different versions worldwide. The design of the study avoids problems of endogeneity of inputs and lack of truly comparable measures of skills across children that plague previous econometric studies of child development. Skills that are nominally classified as the same, in fact, do not appear to share a common unit scale across levels. They are produced by skill-specific, lifecycle-stage-specific technologies. We formulate and estimate a new dynamic stochastic skill production model for multiple skills that is consistent with the evidence. We quantify the dynamics of early life learning. The model explains the “fadeout” of measures of learning by the emergence of new skills not properly measured. We investigate the role of ability in learning. We find important differences in learning patterns between boys and girls.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED；JEL：C5, C9, D2, I30, J1, O12
papers.zh_title: 幼儿学习微观动态研究
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用来自一个广泛效仿的幼儿家访项目的独特数据，调查了儿童技能的每周演变。该项目最初在牙买加开发，后适应中国农村，并在全球以不同版本应用。研究设计避免了投入内生性问题以及儿童间技能缺乏真正可比衡量标准的问题，这些问题困扰着以往的儿童发展计量经济学研究。名义上归类为相同的技能，实际上在不同水平上似乎并不共享共同的单位尺度。它们是由特定技能、特定生命周期阶段的技术所生产的。我们构建并估计了一个新的、与证据一致的、针对多种技能的动态随机技能生产模型。我们量化了早期学习的动态。该模型通过新技能的出现（这些技能未被恰当衡量）来解释学习衡量指标的“消退”。我们研究了能力在学习中的作用。我们发现男孩和女孩在学习模式上存在重要差异。

papers.title: Improving Judicial Protection in Intimate Partner Violence Cases: The Role of Specialized Courts and Judges
papers.authors: Carolina Arteaga, Gustavo J. Bobonis, Paola Salardi, Dario Toman
papers.abstract: We study the large-scale implementation of a system of specialized domestic violence courts (SDVCs), an innovation in access to justice programs for potential victims of intimate partner violence (IPV) and offenders. Using individual-level administrative data from the universe of civil domestic violence cases in Puerto Rico during the period 2014-2020, we leverage the staggered opening of SDVCs across judicial regions to examine the consequences for victims’ judicial protection and offender recidivism. Access to SDVCs leads to a considerable 8 percentage points increase in the probability that judges issue a protection order and a 1.7 percentage point (15 percent) decrease in victim and offender reappearance rates within one year of the start of the case. Effects are more pronounced for cases in which parties have children in common and in which access to SDVCs is more limited. Linking the case data to administrative and survey data on judges, we show that the priorities of judges assigned to SDVCs play a prominent role in explaining these outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 改善亲密伴侣暴力案件中的司法保护：专门法庭和法官的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个专门家庭暴力法庭（SDVC）系统的大规模实施，这是为亲密伴侣暴力（IPV）潜在受害者和施暴者提供司法救助项目的一项创新。利用2014-2020年期间波多黎各所有民事家庭暴力案件的个体层面行政数据，我们利用SDVC在各司法区域交错开设的情况，来考察其对受害者司法保护和施暴者再犯的影响。获得SDVC服务使得法官签发保护令的概率显著提高了8个百分点，并在案件开始后一年内使受害者和施暴者再次出庭率下降了1.7个百分点（15%）。对于双方有共同子女的案件以及获得SDVC服务更受限的案件，影响更为显著。通过将案件数据与法官的行政和调查数据相关联，我们表明，被分配到SDVC的法官的优先事项在解释这些结果方面起着突出作用。

papers.title: Assessing Career Attainment via a Non-Wage Measure
papers.authors: Natee Amornsiripanitch, Paul Gompers, George Hu, Will Levinson, Vladimir Mukharlyamov, Sachin Srivastava
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a non-pecuniary measure of career achievement, seniority. Based on a database of over 150 million resumes, this metric exploits the variation in how long it takes workers to attain job titles. A person’s seniority is defined as the number of years it takes the median individual—within the same industry and firm size category—to achieve that person’s job title. Seniority aligns with standard markers of success—it is positively correlated with both wages and educational attainment. To demonstrate its value as a measure of career progression, we show that individuals with higher seniority levels in the public sector are more likely to transition to higher-paying positions in the private sector. When non-monetary factors influence career choice, evaluating labor market outcomes using non-wage measures, such as seniority, offers significant advantages.
papers.zh_title: 通过非工资指标评估职业成就
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种非金钱的职业成就衡量指标：资历。基于一个包含超过1.5亿份简历的数据库，该指标利用了工人获得职位头衔所需时间的差异。一个人的资历被定义为，在同一行业和相同企业规模类别中，中位个体达到该人职位头衔所需的年数。资历与成功的标准指标一致——它与工资和教育程度均呈正相关。为了证明其作为职业发展衡量指标的价值，我们表明，公共部门中资历水平较高的个体更有可能转向私营部门中薪酬更高的职位。当非金钱因素影响职业选择时，使用诸如资历之类的非工资指标来评估劳动力市场结果具有显著优势。

papers.title: A Nascent International Financial Channel of China’s Monetary Policy Transmission
papers.authors: Chang Ma, Alessandro Rebucci, Sili Zhou
papers.abstract: Chinese private portfolio equity outflows, though small compared to other Chinese outflows, are growing rapidly because of capital account liberalization and capital flight. Using granular stock-holding data on Qualified Domestic Institutional Investor (QDII) mutual funds, we identify a nascent financial channel of international transmission of Chinese monetary policy to world stocks. Event study analysis around monetary policy announcement days reveals that monetary policy tightening depresses returns of country equity indexes and individual U.S. stocks with QDII fund exposure relative to non-exposed stocks. The results are robust to controlling for the real transmission channel of Chinese monetary policy and other confounders. The effect is driven by smaller and less liquid firms, but not by China-concept stocks or those highly exposed to China's macroeconomic shocks. We also find that the results are driven by household portfolio rebalancing from more to less risky assets following the announcement.
papers.zh_title: 中国货币政策传导的新兴国际金融渠道
papers.zh_abstract: 中国私人投资组合的股权流出，尽管与其他中国流出相比规模较小，但由于资本账户自由化和资本外逃而快速增长。利用合格境内机构投资者（QDII）共同基金的细粒度持股数据，我们识别出一个新兴的金融渠道，通过该渠道中国货币政策向全球股票进行国际传导。围绕货币政策公告日的事件研究分析表明，货币政策紧缩会压低有QDII基金敞口的国家股指和个股（相对于无敞口股票）的回报率。该结果在控制中国货币政策的实际传导渠道和其他混杂因素后依然稳健。这种效应由规模较小、流动性较差的公司驱动，而非中国概念股或高度暴露于中国宏观经济冲击的股票。我们还发现，这些结果是由公告后家庭投资组合从较高风险资产向较低风险资产再平衡所驱动的。

papers.title: Optimal Dynamic Spatial Policy
papers.authors: Eric Donald, Masao Fukui, Yuhei Miyauchi
papers.abstract: We study the optimal allocation of population and consumption in a dynamic spatial general equilibrium model with frictional migration, where households' idiosyncratic location preference shocks are private information. We derive a recursive formula for the constrained-efficient allocation, capturing the trade-off between consumption smoothing and efficient migration. In a quantitative model calibrated to the US economy featuring both cross-state migration and risk-free savings, we find that the constrained-efficient allocation features lower population but higher average consumption in less productive states than the status quo, achieving efficiency and spatial redistribution simultaneously through dynamic incentives. In response to local negative productivity shocks, the constrained-efficient allocation features more front-loaded consumption than the status quo, with systematic heterogeneity linked to the location’s pre-shock fundamentals.
papers.zh_title: 最优动态空间政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在存在摩擦性迁移的动态空间一般均衡模型中，人口和消费的最优配置，其中家庭异质性的区位偏好冲击是私人信息。我们推导出约束有效配置的递归公式，捕捉了消费平滑与有效迁移之间的权衡。在一个以美国经济为校准的定量模型中，该模型同时包含跨州迁移和无风险储蓄，我们发现，与现状相比，约束有效配置的特征是生产率较低州的人口更少但平均消费更高，通过动态激励同时实现了效率和空间再分配。为应对当地负向生产率冲击，约束有效配置的特征是消费比现状更前置，且存在与区位冲击前基本面相关的系统性异质性。

papers.title: Beliefs and Realities of Work and Childcare After Childbirth
papers.authors: Andrew Caplin, Søren Leth-Petersen, Christopher Tonetti
papers.abstract: When women plan for life after childbirth, they form beliefs about work, childcare, and how their careers will unfold. These expectations shape key decisions but are formed under deep uncertainty. We use a 2019 state-contingent survey of 11,000 Danish women linked to administrative data to compare pre-birth beliefs to realized outcomes. Mothers accurately anticipate their eventual return to work but underestimate the duration of the career interruption. This miscalibration stems from two belief errors—about partner leave and own labor supply—which interact and persist even among second-time mothers, with implications for labor supply, planning, and policy design.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D84, E24, J13, J22
papers.zh_title: 产后工作与育儿：信念与现实
papers.zh_abstract: 当女性规划产后生活时，她们会形成关于工作、育儿以及职业生涯如何展开的信念。这些预期塑造了关键决策，但都是在深度不确定性下形成的。我们利用一项针对11000名丹麦女性的2019年状态依存调查，并将其与行政数据相关联，以比较产前信念与实现结果。母亲们准确预测了她们最终重返工作的时间，但低估了职业中断的持续时间。这种校准错误源于两种信念误差——关于伴侣休假和自身劳动供给的误差——这两种误差相互影响，甚至在二胎母亲中依然存在，并对劳动供给、规划和政策设计具有启示意义。

papers.title: Permanent Capital Losses after Banking Crises
papers.authors: Matthew Baron, Luc Laeven, Julien Pénasse, Yevhenii Usenko
papers.abstract: We study the mechanisms driving bank losses across historical banking crises in 46 economies and the effectiveness of policy interventions in restoring bank capitalization. We find that bank stocks experience large, permanent declines at the onset of crises. These losses predict commensurate long-term declines in banks’ earnings and dividends, rather than elevated future equity returns. Bank losses are primarily driven by write-downs of nonperforming assets, not asset sales during panics. Forceful liquidity-based interventions during crises predict only small, temporary increases in bank market value. Overall, these results suggest that bank losses during crises are not primarily due to temporary price dislocations. Early liquidity interventions can avert banking crises, but only under specific conditions. Once large bank equity declines have occurred, policy responses have historically failed to prevent persistent undercapitalization in the banking sector.
papers.zh_title: 银行业危机后的永久性资本损失
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了46个经济体历史上银行业危机中驱动银行损失的机制，以及旨在恢复银行资本充足率的政策干预的有效性。我们发现，银行股票在危机爆发时会出现大规模、永久性的下跌。这些损失预示着银行盈利和股息的相应长期下降，而非未来股票回报率的上升。银行损失主要由不良资产减记驱动，而非恐慌期间的资产抛售。危机期间强有力的流动性干预仅能预测银行市场价值的小幅、暂时性增长。总体而言，这些结果表明，危机期间的银行损失并非主要源于暂时的价格错位。早期的流动性干预可以避免银行业危机，但仅在特定条件下有效。一旦发生大规模的银行股权下跌，历史上的政策应对未能阻止银行业持续性的资本不足。

papers.title: Türkiye's Homemade Crises
papers.authors: A. Hakan Kara, Alp Simsek
papers.abstract: Türkiye's response to post-pandemic inflation is a cautionary tale of how political pressure for low interest rates can create macroeconomic instabilities. While central banks worldwide raised interest rates to combat inflation in 2021-2023, Turkish authorities pursued the opposite strategy: cutting real rates to deeply negative levels while implementing financial engineering tools, FX interventions, and financial repression to stabilize markets. The centerpiece was a novel FX-protected deposit scheme (KKM) that guaranteed depositors against currency depreciation, shifting exchange rate risk to the government balance sheet. We provide a detailed account of this policy experiment and develop a theoretical model focusing on how KKM functions and creates vulnerabilities. Our model reveals that pressure to keep interest rates below inflation-targeting levels can lead to an interconnected destabilizing sequence. Low rates generate inflation, current account deficits, and exchange rate depreciation. KKM provides partial stabilization by effectively raising rates for savers while maintaining low rates for borrowers. However, this creates growing contingent fiscal burdens and vulnerability to self-fulfilling currency and sovereign debt crises. This explains additional policies adopted including capital flow management, financial repression, and return to orthodox monetary policy. As central banks worldwide face renewed pressure to set lower policy rates, Türkiye's experience illustrates the consequences.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E43, E52, E58, F31, F32, F41
papers.zh_title: 土耳其的内生危机
papers.zh_abstract: 土耳其对疫情后通胀的应对是一个警示故事，说明了低利率的政治压力如何造成宏观经济不稳定。当全球央行在2021-2023年加息以对抗通胀时，土耳其当局采取了相反策略：将实际利率大幅降至负值，同时实施金融工程工具、外汇干预和金融抑制以稳定市场。其核心是一项新颖的外汇保护存款计划（KKM），该计划为储户提供免受货币贬值的保障，将汇率风险转移至政府资产负债表。我们详细描述了这一政策实验，并开发了一个理论模型，聚焦于KKM如何运作并制造脆弱性。我们的模型揭示，将利率维持在低于通胀目标水平的压力可能导致一系列相互关联的不稳定连锁反应。低利率引发通胀、经常账户赤字和汇率贬值。KKM通过有效提高储户利率同时维持借款人低利率，提供了部分稳定。然而，这造成了不断增长的或有财政负担，以及对自我实现的货币和主权债务危机的脆弱性。这解释了随后采取的其他政策，包括资本流动管理、金融抑制以及回归正统货币政策。随着全球央行面临再次设定较低政策利率的压力，土耳其的经验说明了其后果。

papers.title: Nature and Biodiversity Loss: A Research Agenda for Financial Economics
papers.authors: Stefano Giglio, Theresa Kuchler, Johannes Stroebel, Olivier Wang
papers.abstract: We outline a research agenda to better understand the economic and financial consequences of nature and biodiversity loss. Our starting point is a simple model in which ecosystem services—such as pollination, water filtration, and carbon sequestration—enter economic production, and where nature degradation and climate change reinforce one another through a “Twin-Crises Multiplier.” We then extend this framework to allow for heterogeneity across firms, industries, and geographies in how they depend on, and in turn affect, nature. This broader perspective provides a foundation for empirical analyses of how biodiversity loss influences aggregate output, firm productivity, and financial risk. We conclude by identifying opportunities for asset pricing and corporate finance research to systematically incorporate nature and biodiversity into financial economics.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE, EFG, PE；JEL：G0, G12, Q30, Q50
papers.zh_title: 自然与生物多样性丧失：金融经济学的研究议程
papers.zh_abstract: 我们概述了一个研究议程，以更好地理解自然和生物多样性丧失的经济与金融后果。我们的起点是一个简单模型，其中生态系统服务——如授粉、水过滤和碳封存——进入经济生产，并且自然退化与气候变化通过一个“双重危机乘数”相互强化。然后，我们扩展这一框架，以考虑企业、行业和地区在如何依赖自然以及如何影响自然方面的异质性。这一更广阔的视角为实证分析奠定了基础，以研究生物多样性丧失如何影响总产出、企业生产率和金融风险。最后，我们识别出资产定价和公司金融研究的机会，以系统地将自然和生物多样性纳入金融经济学。

papers.title: Monotone Ecological Inference
papers.authors: Hadi Elzayn, Jacob Goldin, Cameron Guage, Daniel E. Ho, Claire Morton
papers.abstract: We study monotone ecological inference, a partial identification approach to ecological inference. The approach exploits information about one or both of the following conditional associations: (1) outcome differences between groups within the same neighborhood, and (2) outcomes differences within the same group across neighborhoods with different group compositions. We show how assumptions about the sign of these conditional associations, whether individually or in relation to one another, can yield informative sharp bounds in ecological inference settings. We illustrate our proposed approach using county-level data to study differences in Covid-19 vaccination rates among Republicans and Democrats in the United States.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, POL, TWP；JEL：C1, C10, C13, C18, C21
papers.zh_title: 单调生态推断
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究单调生态推断，这是一种生态推断的部分识别方法。该方法利用了关于以下一种或两种条件关联的信息：（1）同一社区内不同群体之间的结果差异，以及（2）同一群体在不同群体构成社区之间的结果差异。我们展示了关于这些条件关联符号的假设——无论是单独考虑还是相互关联——如何在生态推断设定中产生信息丰富的锐界。我们使用县级数据来说明我们提出的方法，以研究美国共和党人和民主党人之间新冠疫苗接种率的差异。

papers.title: The Past and Future of U.S. Structural Change: Compositional Accounting and Forecasting
papers.authors: Andrew Foerster, Andreas Hornstein, Pierre-Daniel Sarte, Mark W. Watson
papers.abstract: We explore the evolving significance of different production sectors within the U.S. economy since World War II and provide methods for estimating and forecasting these shifts. Using a compositional accounting approach, we find that the well-documented transition from goods to services is primarily driven by two compositional changes: 1) the rise of Intellectual Property Products (IPP) as an input producer, replacing Durable Goods almost one-for-one in terms of input shares in virtually all sectors; and 2) a shift in consumer spending from Nondurable Goods to Services. A structural model replicating these shifts reveals that the rise of IPP at the expense of Durable Goods is largely explained by increases in the efficiency of IPP inputs used in production: input-biased technical change. Trend variations in sectoral total factor productivity, and their attendant effects on relative prices and income, are the main driver of evolving consumption patterns. Both reduced-form and structural forecasts project these trends to continue over the next two decades, albeit at lower rates, indicating a slower pace of structural change.
papers.zh_title: 美国结构性变化的过去与未来：构成核算与预测
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了自二战以来美国经济中不同生产部门不断演变的重要性，并提供了估计和预测这些变化的方法。使用构成核算方法，我们发现，从商品到服务的广为人知的转变主要由两个构成变化驱动：1）知识产权产品作为投入生产者的崛起，几乎在所有部门中一对一地取代了耐用品在投入份额中的位置；2）消费者支出从非耐用品转向服务。一个复制这些变化的结构模型显示，知识产权产品以牺牲耐用品为代价的崛起，很大程度上可以通过知识产权产品投入在生产中使用效率的提高来解释：即投入偏向型技术变革。部门全要素生产率的趋势变化，及其对相对价格和收入的伴随影响，是消费模式演变的主要驱动力。简化形式和结构预测都表明，这些趋势将在未来二十年内持续，尽管速度会放缓，这表明结构性变化的速度正在减慢。

papers.title: Intimate Partner Violence in Low- and Middle-Income Countries: Insights from Economic Research
papers.authors: Manisha Shah, Lydia Barski
papers.abstract: Intimate partner violence (IPV) is a pervasive global issue, with approximately one in three women experiencing IPV over their lifetime. IPV prevalence is higher in low- and middle-income countries (LMICs), and costs of IPV are also considerably larger as a percentage of GDP in LMICs. We present the economic theory behind IPV and highlight some important determinants such as poverty and societal norms. We then synthesize the causal evidence on the impact of a range of policies and interventions, highlighting approaches which have been effective in reducing IPV. We identify key insights from the existing literature and outline areas where further theoretical and empirical research is needed.
papers.zh_title: 低收入和中等收入国家的亲密伴侣暴力：来自经济学研究的见解
papers.zh_abstract: 亲密伴侣暴力是一个普遍的全球性问题，大约三分之一的女性一生中会经历亲密伴侣暴力。在低收入和中等收入国家，亲密伴侣暴力的发生率更高，其成本占国内生产总值的比例也显著更大。我们介绍了亲密伴侣暴力背后的经济理论，并强调了一些重要的决定因素，如贫困和社会规范。然后，我们综合了一系列政策和干预措施影响的因果证据，重点介绍了在减少亲密伴侣暴力方面行之有效的方法。我们从现有文献中识别出关键见解，并概述了需要进一步开展理论和实证研究的领域。

papers.title: Fractional Ownership and Copyright Licensing: Evidence from the Music Industry
papers.authors: Alberto Galasso, El Hadi Caoui
papers.abstract: Creative content is often the product of collaboration, which may lead to fractional ownership of intellectual property. We study the effect of fractional ownership on the licensing of copyrighted material and its reuse. To do so, we compile new data on the copyright ownership structure of songs and their licensing for use in movies. We document that fractional song ownership has increased substantially: the mean number of songwriters and publishers per song has tripled between 1958 and 2021. We show that, conditional on a rich set of controls, greater fractionalization is associated with lower likelihood of licensing. We leverage the Sony-led acquisition of EMI Music Publishing in 2012 to obtain within-song variation in ownership and find that consolidating ownership rights significantly increases licensing, beyond any standalone effects of the merger.
papers.zh_title: 分权所有权与版权许可：来自音乐产业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 创意内容通常是合作的产物，这可能导致知识产权的分权所有权。我们研究了分权所有权对版权材料许可及其再利用的影响。为此，我们编制了关于歌曲版权所有权结构及其在电影中使用许可的新数据。我们记录到，歌曲分权所有权大幅增加：每首歌曲的词曲作者和出版商的平均数量在1958年至2021年间增长了两倍。我们表明，在控制一系列丰富变量的条件下，更大的分权化与更低的许可可能性相关。我们利用2012年索尼主导收购百代音乐出版的事件来获取歌曲内部所有权变化，并发现整合所有权权利显著增加了许可，这超出了合并本身的任何独立效应。

papers.title: Housing Betas
papers.authors: Monika Piazzesi
papers.abstract: This paper documents new stylized facts about returns and cashflow growth rates on stocks and housing over decade-long holding periods. While cashflow growth rates on the two assets comove positively, their returns comove negatively until the Global Financial Crisis and positively thereafter. These facts present a puzzle for representative-agent models that imply positive return comovement for assets with similar cashflows. I consider a heterogeneous-agent model with segmented stock and housing markets connected through credit. News about the aggregate economy generates negative return comovement. Recent shifts such as wealthier homebuyers and institutional housing purchases reduce the importance of credit and segmentation.
papers.zh_title: 住房贝塔
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了关于股票和住房在十年持有期内的回报率和现金流增长率的新典型事实。虽然两种资产的现金流增长率呈正相关，但它们的回报率在全球金融危机前呈负相关，之后呈正相关。这些事实对代表性代理人模型构成了一个难题，因为该模型暗示具有相似现金流的资产应具有正回报相关性。我们考虑了一个异质性代理人模型，该模型通过信贷连接分割的股票和住房市场。关于总体经济的新闻会产生负回报相关性。最近的转变，如更富裕的购房者和机构购房，降低了信贷和市场分割的重要性。

papers.title: Child Maltreatment Investigations and Family Well-being
papers.authors: Katherine Rittenhouse, David Simon, Lindsey Lacey
papers.abstract: Over one third of children in the U.S. are investigated by the child protection system (CPS) by age 18, but the effects of this interaction on families and children are largely unknown. Investigations aim to protect children from harm and direct services to families in need. However, they also bring the implicit threat of child removal, which can generate both stress and institutional distrust among affected families. Using a regression discontinuity design, we study the impacts of this interaction on child health. Children who are just above the threshold for being “defaulted” into an investigation see a reduction in injuries and an increase in preventative care in the two months following the referral. Effects are consistent across child gender, race and age. Finally, investigations increase the likelihood that a parent is jailed, suggesting that investigations also detect criminal activity within the home. An exploration of mechanisms suggests that it is the investigation, rather than home removal or parental criminal justice system involvement, which improves child health.
papers.zh_title: 儿童虐待调查与家庭福祉
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国，超过三分之一的儿童在18岁前会接受儿童保护系统的调查，但这种互动对家庭和儿童的影响在很大程度上是未知的。调查旨在保护儿童免受伤害，并向有需要的家庭提供服务。然而，调查也带来了儿童被带离家庭的隐性威胁，这可能在受影响家庭中引发压力和制度不信任。我们使用断点回归设计来研究这种互动对儿童健康的影响。那些刚好高于“默认”进入调查阈值的儿童，在转介后的两个月内，受伤情况减少，预防性护理增加。这种效应在儿童性别、种族和年龄上是一致的。最后，调查增加了父母被监禁的可能性，这表明调查也能发现家庭内的犯罪活动。对机制的探索表明，是调查本身，而非家庭带离或父母刑事司法系统的介入，改善了儿童健康。

papers.title: Trade and Development in a Fracturing World
papers.authors: Amit Khandelwal
papers.abstract: In a fracturing world, how can low- and middle-income countries (LMICs) continue to leverage trade for economic development? Drawing on recent research at this intersection, this review argues that countries should look inward toward domestic reforms in key factor markets. I review evidence on how trade in LMICs is shaped by frictions in labor, capital, material, land, and information markets, and highlight areas where the evidence base remains thin. I concluded with a discussion of vertical policies relevant for LMICs—particularly the role of services—and suggest areas where further research is needed to assess whether development can be service-led.
papers.zh_title: 分裂世界中的贸易与发展
papers.zh_abstract: 在一个分裂的世界中，低收入和中等收入国家如何继续利用贸易促进经济发展？基于这一交叉领域的最新研究，本综述认为，各国应向内看，关注关键要素市场的国内改革。我回顾了关于低收入和中等收入国家中贸易如何受到劳动力、资本、材料、土地和信息市场摩擦影响的证据，并强调了证据基础仍然薄弱的领域。最后，我讨论了与低收入和中等收入国家相关的垂直政策——特别是服务业的作用——并建议需要进一步研究的领域，以评估发展是否能够由服务业引领。

papers.title: Trade War and the Dollar Anchor
papers.authors: Tarek Alexander Hassan, Thomas M. Mertens, Jingye Wang, Tony Zhang
papers.abstract: We develop a general-equilibrium model in which the safety of a country's currency and the choice of its exchange-rate regime arise endogenously. Calibrated to pre-2025 data, the model replicates the U.S. dollar’s safety premium, low Treasury yields, and its status as the world's anchor currency. Introducing a trade war that isolates U.S. goods markets from the world erodes the U.S. dollar's safety premium, raises U.S. interest rates, and lowers the world market value of U.S. firms. For sufficiently high tariffs, small economies optimally re-peg to the euro, precipitating a phase shift to a euro-centric international monetary system and a global welfare loss. The analysis implies that persistent trade wars may threaten the financial privileges the United States derives from the dollar’s international role.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM；JEL：E22, E4, F1, F3, G12
papers.zh_title: 贸易战与美元锚
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个一般均衡模型，在该模型中，一国货币的安全性和其汇率制度的选择是内生的。该模型以2025年前的数据进行校准，复制了美元的安全溢价、低国债收益率以及其作为世界锚定货币的地位。引入一场将美国商品市场与世界隔离的贸易战，会侵蚀美元的安全溢价，提高美国利率，并降低美国企业的全球市场价值。对于足够高的关税，小国最优地重新盯住欧元，从而引发向以欧元为中心的国际货币体系的阶段转变，并导致全球福利损失。该分析表明，持续的贸易战可能威胁到美国从美元国际角色中获得的金融特权。

papers.title: Aggregating Average Treatment Effects on the Treated in Difference-in-Differences Models
papers.authors: Partha Deb, Edward C. Norton, Jeffrey M. Wooldridge, Jeffrey E. Zabel
papers.abstract: For difference-in-differences methods, there has been great attention to obtaining consistent estimates of treatment effects, especially when the treatment effects are heterogeneous. However, there has been little discussion of the importance of weights in aggregating those treatment effects into an overall average treatment effect on the treated. There are many possible ways to aggregate estimated cohort-time treatment effects. We show that the standard software used to estimate Callaway and Sant’Anna’s method uses weights that are not just the number of treated observations in treated years. Instead, the software uses weights that include the number of observations in the reference pre-period instead of only the number of observations in the treated periods. We discuss why the aggregation weights matter and under what circumstances the weights make the most difference.
papers.zh_title: 双重差分模型中处理组平均处理效应的加总
papers.zh_abstract: 对于双重差分方法，人们非常关注获得处理效应的一致估计，尤其是在处理效应存在异质性的情况下。然而，关于将这些处理效应加总为总体处理组平均处理效应时权重的重要性，讨论甚少。有许多可能的方法来加总估计的队列-时间处理效应。我们表明，用于估计Callaway和Sant'Anna方法的标准软件使用的权重不仅仅是处理年份中处理观测值的数量。相反，该软件使用的权重包括参考前期中的观测值数量，而不仅仅是处理期中的观测值数量。我们讨论了加总权重为何重要，以及在何种情况下权重的影响最大。

papers.title: Making AI Count: The Next Measurement Frontier
papers.authors: Diane Coyle, John Lourenze S. Poquiz
papers.abstract: Generative AI is transforming production, consumption, and work, yet current statistical frameworks would likely struggle to capture its economic full economic impact. While the 2025 System of National Accounts introduces AI as a distinct asset, challenges remain in valuing AI-related investments, inputs, and outputs. Moreover, as a general-purpose technology, AI alters business processes, service quality, and labor organization in ways poorly reflected in official data. This paper outlines key measurement gaps from transformative AI, including the tracking cross-border inputs, quality change, and process changes. We argue that economic statistics should adopt more granular, task-based, and outcome-focused approaches to ensure relevance in an increasingly AI-driven economy.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：C80, E01, E22, O3, O47
papers.zh_title: 让人工智能可衡量：下一个统计前沿
papers.zh_abstract: 生成式人工智能正在改变生产、消费和工作方式，但当前的统计框架可能难以捕捉其全部经济影响。虽然2025年国民账户体系将人工智能作为一种独特的资产引入，但在评估人工智能相关投资、投入和产出的价值方面仍然存在挑战。此外，作为一种通用目的技术，人工智能改变了业务流程、服务质量和劳动组织，而这些在官方数据中反映不足。本文概述了变革性人工智能带来的关键统计缺口，包括追踪跨境投入、质量变化和流程变化。我们认为，经济统计应采用更细化、基于任务和以结果为导向的方法，以确保在日益由人工智能驱动的经济中保持相关性。

papers.title: Financial Value of Nature: Coastal Housing Markets, Mangroves, and Climate Resilience
papers.authors: Teng Liu, Brook Constantz, Galina Hale, Michael Beck
papers.abstract: Measuring the financial value of nature is difficult, often resulting in insufficient funding directed to nature conservation and restoration. As coastal risks increase from development and climate change, a tangible benefit of nature is the protection it offers against storm damages. Many studies from the risk industry and others assess the direct effects of wetlands for reducing damage during storms. However, the value of wetlands for coastal protection could extend to many other benefits, including home prices in areas where storms are common. We use property-level housing transaction data from Zillow and show that proximity to mangroves in Florida moderates home price decline and dispersion following major hurricanes. The effects are substantial in magnitude, reducing the probability of losing a quarter or more of housing value by 2-7 percentage points, which corresponds to 20-40-thousand-dollar value for a million-dollar property, conditional on a hurricane.
papers.zh_title: 自然的金融价值：沿海住房市场、红树林与气候韧性
papers.zh_abstract: 衡量自然的金融价值十分困难，这往往导致用于自然保护和恢复的资金不足。随着沿海地区因发展和气候变化而面临的风险增加，自然的一个切实益处是其对风暴损害的防护作用。风险行业及其他领域的许多研究评估了湿地在风暴期间减少损害的直接效应。然而，湿地对沿海保护的价値可能延伸至许多其他益处，包括在风暴频发地区的房价。我们利用Zillow的房产级住房交易数据，并表明在佛罗里达州，靠近红树林能够缓和重大飓风后房价的下跌和离散程度。这种效应在规模上相当显著，将损失四分之一或更多住房价值的概率降低了2到7个百分点，这对应于在飓风条件下，价值百万美元的房产价值损失减少2万至4万美元。

papers.title: “No One Can Borrow” – Reassessing the “Junior Can’t Borrow” Equity-Premium Puzzle Resolution
papers.authors: Jasmina Hasanhodzic, Laurence J. Kotlikoff
papers.abstract: “Junior Can’t Borrow,” Constantinides, Donaldson, and Mehra’s (CDM) three-period exchange model, eliminates borrowing by the young, and, consequently, all generations to resolve the equity premium puzzle. This paper examines CDM’s resolution in an 80-period, OLG model with capital, fiscal policy, macro shocks and steeply rising borrowing costs. Imposing such costs on all generations and, thereby, eliminating the bond market produces, as in CDM, a large premium. But permitting even one generation to sell bonds without transactions costs dramatically raises the safe rate, restoring the puzzle. Hence, “No One Can Borrow” not “Junior Can’t Borrow” is CDM’s real message. Since zero or low marginal-cost borrowing is commonplace – be it via secured borrowing or friends and family loans, CDM’s “solution” isn’t plausible. As in representative-agent RBCs, macro risk is low in OLG-RBCs – not because aggregate shocks are small, but because they can be hedged via self-insurance (saving) and largely average out over agents’ lifetimes. Indeed, absent high marginal borrowing costs, agents, even older ones, are close to indifferent between holding shares and holding bonds, rendering their net bond demand (supply) curves highly elastic. This explains why even a single generation is willing to supply significant amounts of bonds at a low price (high yield).
papers.zh_title: “无人能借贷”——重新评估“年轻人不能借贷”的股权溢价之谜解法
papers.zh_abstract: Constantinides、Donaldson和Mehra（CDM）的三期交换模型通过消除年轻人的借贷行为，进而消除所有世代的借贷，以解决股权溢价之谜。本文在一个包含资本、财政政策、宏观冲击和陡峭上升的借贷成本的80期世代交叠（OLG）模型中检验了CDM的解法。将此类成本强加于所有世代，从而消除债券市场，会产生如CDM模型中的高溢价。但是，即使允许一个世代在没有交易成本的情况下出售债券，也会显著提高无风险利率，从而恢复该谜题。因此，CDM的真正信息是“无人能借贷”，而非“年轻人不能借贷”。由于零或低边际成本的借贷——无论是通过有担保借贷还是亲友借贷——十分普遍，CDM的“解法”并不合理。如同在代表性代理人实际商业周期（RBC）模型中一样，OLG-RBC模型中的宏观风险较低——并非因为总体冲击较小，而是因为这些冲击可以通过自我保险（储蓄）进行对冲，并且在代理人的生命周期中很大程度上被平均化。实际上，在没有高边际借贷成本的情况下，代理人（即使是年长者）对持有股票和持有债券几乎无差异，这使得他们的净债券需求（供给）曲线高度富有弹性。这解释了为什么即使是一个世代也愿意以低价（高收益率）提供大量债券。

papers.title: How Immigration is Changing the Black-White Earnings Gap
papers.authors: Rong Fu, Neeraj Kaushal, Felix Muchomba
papers.abstract: We provide new evidence on earnings gaps between non-Hispanic White and three generations of Black workers in the United States during 1995-2024, using nationally representative data. Results reveal remarkable earnings advances among 2nd-generation Black immigrants, opposite to the well-documented widening in overall Black-White earnings gap. Among women, 2nd-generation Black workers have earnings higher than or equal to White women; among men, they earn 10% less at the median, but the gap vanishes at the top decile. The gap for 1st-generation Black men is shrinking, halving at the top decile; for 1st-generation Black women it shows initial widening then shrinking at the median. The native Black-White gap remains stubbornly high. Educational attainment largely drives 2nd-generation success, while residential patterns play a protective role for the 1st and 2nd generations. These findings provide critical data to set the record straight on the accomplishments of the highly successful and rising demography of Black immigrants and their US-born children.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LS, PE；JEL：J0, J15, J3, J31
papers.zh_title: 移民如何改变黑人与白人的收入差距
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用具有全国代表性的数据，提供了1995年至2024年间美国非西班牙裔白人与三代黑人劳动者之间收入差距的新证据。结果显示，第二代黑人移民的收入取得了显著进步，这与整体黑人与白人收入差距的扩大趋势相反。在女性中，第二代黑人劳动者的收入高于或等于白人女性；在男性中，他们在中位数上收入低10%，但在收入最高十分位数上差距消失。第一代黑人男性的收入差距正在缩小，在最高十分位数上减半；第一代黑人女性的收入差距则呈现先扩大后在中位数上缩小的趋势。本土黑人与白人的收入差距仍然顽固地居高不下。教育程度在很大程度上推动了第二代移民的成功，而居住模式对第一代和第二代移民起到了保护作用。这些发现提供了关键数据，以准确记录高度成功且人口不断增长的非洲裔移民及其在美国出生的子女所取得的成就。

papers.title: Policy Options to Achieve US Sustainable Aviation Fuel Targets
papers.authors: Mengying Wu, Kristen McCormack, William A. Scott, Aaron Smith, Jingran Zhang, James H. Stock
papers.abstract: Decarbonizing aviation in the short term will likely entail replacing large quantities of petroleum jet fuel with sustainable aviation fuels (SAFs), which are predominantly biofuels. In the United States, biofuels are currently used as substitutes for gasoline and diesel in road transportation and are supported by a complex set of federal and state policies including the Renewable Fuel Standard (RFS), state low carbon fuel standards, and state and federal tax credits. Policies promoting SAF therefore interact with surface transport biofuel policies. In this paper, we use a new detailed partial equilibrium model of road and air transportation fuel markets to compare various policy options designed to achieve a target of 3 billion gallons of SAF by 2030. Our results suggest that the target is attainable with current technology but not with current policy. Several potential federal policies, including modifications to the existing RFS, a federal SAF tax credit, or a clean aviation standard could meet the 3 billion gallon target with similar emissions reductions and costs but different incidence. The lowest cost policy we study entails replacing all current biofuels policies with a modest carbon tax on fossil transportation fuels paired with a SAF tax credit.
papers.zh_title: 实现美国可持续航空燃料目标的政策选择
papers.zh_abstract: 短期内航空业的脱碳很可能需要大量用可持续航空燃料（SAF）替代石油基航空燃料，而SAF主要是生物燃料。在美国，生物燃料目前被用作道路运输中汽油和柴油的替代品，并受到包括可再生燃料标准（RFS）、州级低碳燃料标准以及州和联邦税收抵免在内的一套复杂政策的支持。因此，促进SAF的政策与地面运输生物燃料政策相互影响。在本文中，我们使用一个全新的、详细的公路和航空运输燃料市场局部均衡模型，来比较旨在到2030年实现30亿加仑SAF目标的各种政策选项。我们的结果表明，该目标在现有技术下是可以实现的，但在现有政策下则无法实现。几项潜在的联邦政策，包括对现有RFS的修改、联邦SAF税收抵免或清洁航空标准，都可以在实现类似的减排效果和成本的情况下达到30亿加仑的目标，但影响分布不同。我们研究的最低成本政策是，用对化石运输燃料征收适度碳税并辅以SAF税收抵免的方式，取代所有现有的生物燃料政策。

papers.title: FCI-plot: Central Bank Communication Through Financial Conditions
papers.authors: Ricardo J. Caballero, Alp Simsek
papers.abstract: We develop a model of central bank communication where market participants' uncertainty about desired financial conditions creates misunderstandings ("tantrums") and amplifies the impact of financial noise on asset prices and economic activity. We show that directly communicating the expected financial conditions path (FCI-plot) eliminates tantrums and recruits arbitrageurs to insulate conditions from noise, while communicating expected interest rates alone fails to achieve these benefits. We demonstrate that scenario-based FCI-plot communication enhances recruitment when participants disagree with the central bank regarding scenario probabilities. This enables an "agree-to-disagree" equilibrium where markets help implement central bank objectives despite differing views.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E12, E32, E44, E52, E58, G10
papers.zh_title: FCI图：通过金融状况进行央行沟通
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个央行沟通模型，其中市场参与者对理想金融状况的不确定性会引发误解（“市场动荡”），并放大金融噪音对资产价格和经济活动的影响。我们表明，直接沟通预期的金融状况路径（FCI图）可以消除市场动荡，并招募套利者来隔离金融状况免受噪音影响，而仅沟通预期利率则无法实现这些益处。我们证明，当参与者与央行在情景概率上存在分歧时，基于情景的FCI图沟通能够增强招募效果。这使得一种“求同存异”的均衡成为可能，在这种均衡中，尽管存在不同观点，市场仍有助于实现央行的目标。

papers.title: Racial Differences in Nursing Home Value Added
papers.authors: Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Neale Mahoney, James C. Okun
papers.abstract: We use detailed data on the evolution of health for about 0.8 million Black and 5.4 million white nursing home patients covered by Medicare between 2011 and 2019 to estimate race-specific value-added measures for more than 8,000 nursing homes in the United States. We estimate that the average nursing home value-added experienced by Black patients is about 30% lower than that received by white patients. Most of this gap reflects differences in value-added experienced by similar Black and white patients within the same nursing home, rather than differences in value-added across the nursing homes they go to.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, LS；JEL：H44, I1, I14, L0
papers.zh_title: 养老院增值中的种族差异
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用2011年至2019年间约80万黑人患者和540万白人患者（均为医疗保险覆盖的养老院居民）健康状况演变的详细数据，估算了美国8000多家养老院的种族特异性增值指标。我们估计，黑人患者所经历的平均养老院增值比白人患者低约30%。这一差距的大部分反映了在同一家养老院内，相似的黑人和白人患者所经历的增值差异，而非他们入住的不同养老院之间的增值差异。

papers.title: Bond-Stock Comovements
papers.authors: John Y. Campbell, Carolin Pflueger, Luis M. Viceira
papers.abstract: This paper documents that during the late 20th Century, nominal government bonds and stocks tended to comove positively, whereas during the first quarter of the 21st Century they have tended to comove negatively. A similar sign switch is observable for real government bonds and breakeven inflation rates. Recent macroeconomic events have caused short-lived changes in these comovements, and periods with high risk premia tend to be periods in which bond-stock comovements are large in absolute value. The paper surveys theoretical models of these phenomena.
papers.zh_title: 债券与股票的同向波动
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了在20世纪末，名义政府债券与股票倾向于同向波动，而在21世纪的前二十五年，它们则倾向于反向波动。实际政府债券和盈亏平衡通胀率也观察到了类似的符号转换。近期的宏观经济事件导致了这些同向波动的短期变化，而风险溢价较高的时期往往是债券与股票同向波动绝对值较大的时期。本文对这些现象的理论模型进行了综述。

papers.title: The Impact of a Genetic Predisposition to a Higher BMI on Education Outcomes
papers.authors: Jane Greve, Mette T. Jensen, Esben Agerbo, John Cawley
papers.abstract: This paper contributes to the literature on the impact of early-life health on education by estimating the effect of genetic predisposition to a higher body mass index (BMI) on educational attainment and related outcomes. The identification strategy exploits the randomness in which genes one inherits from one's parents by estimating sibling fixed effects models of the polygenic score for a higher BMI. These models are estimated using rich administrative data from Denmark for over 14,000 full siblings. We find that a one-standard-deviation increase in the genetic predisposition to a higher BMI is associated with a 1.4 percentage point (4.4%) lower probability of earning a high school diploma, a 1.7 percentage point (12.3%) lower probability of a college degree, and a 1.7 percentage point (3.7%) higher probability of vocational training. An investigation into mechanisms suggests that youth with a greater genetic predisposition to a higher BMI are more likely to report being bullied, have greater school absences, and lower test scores.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH；JEL：I1, I14, I2, I23, I24, J13
papers.zh_title: 较高BMI的遗传倾向对教育成果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过估计较高身体质量指数（BMI）的遗传倾向对教育成就及相关结果的影响，为早期健康对教育影响的文献做出了贡献。识别策略利用了从父母那里继承哪些基因的随机性，通过估计较高BMI多基因评分的兄弟姐妹固定效应模型。这些模型利用丹麦超过14,000名全同胞的丰富行政数据进行估计。我们发现，较高BMI的遗传倾向每增加一个标准差，获得高中文凭的概率降低1.4个百分点（4.4%），获得大学学位的概率降低1.7个百分点（12.3%），而接受职业培训的概率则提高1.7个百分点（3.7%）。对机制的研究表明，具有较高BMI遗传倾向的青少年更有可能报告遭受欺凌、有更多的缺课次数以及更低的考试成绩。

papers.title: Not Flourishing
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: We examine evidence on the well-being and ill-being of the young for 22 countries in the Global Flourishing Study (GFS) 2022-2024 with the commonly used 12-component “flourishing” index and a new 4-component “not flourishing” index. Although flourishing is U-shaped in age in the pooled data it rises in age in 13 countries and declines in 7. By contrast, not-flourishing declines in age overall, and in each of its four components, and it declines in age in 15 of the 22 countries. We explore sensitivity of results to survey mode in countries using both computer-assisted telephone interviews (CATI) and computer-assisted web-based interviews (CAWI). When CATI is used, the young are happier than other age groups, but the opposite is the case when data are collected via CAWI. We validate the findings with analyses from two other data sets. First, we construct flourishing and not flourishing indices using different variables for the four European countries in the GFS - Germany, Spain, Sweden and UK - from the interviewer based European Social Survey (ESS) of 2023-2024. As with the GFS, the not-flourishing data shows ill-being declines in age while the flourishing data is more mixed. Second, we examine the internet-based Global Minds (GM) surveys, 2020-2025, on the same group of countries, and find well-being rises in age for all in both flourishing and not-flourishing variables. We argue that trends in youth suicide, self-harm and mental health hospitalizations are consistent with the age patterns in the not-flourishing index and with the internet-based survey evidence from both the flourishing and not-flourishing indexes.
papers.zh_title: 不繁荣
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用全球繁荣研究（GFS）2022-2024年22个国家的数据，通过常用的12项“繁荣”指数和一个新的4项“不繁荣”指数，考察了年轻人的福祉与不良状况。尽管在合并数据中，繁荣程度随年龄呈U型分布，但在13个国家中随年龄上升，在7个国家中随年龄下降。相比之下，不繁荣程度总体上随年龄下降，其四个组成部分也各自随年龄下降，并且在22个国家中的15个国家中随年龄下降。我们探讨了结果对调查模式的敏感性，这些国家同时使用计算机辅助电话访谈（CATI）和计算机辅助网络访谈（CAWI）。当使用CATI时，年轻人比其他年龄组更幸福，但当通过CAWI收集数据时，情况则相反。我们利用另外两个数据集的分析验证了这些发现。首先，我们利用2023-2024年基于访谈的欧洲社会调查（ESS）数据，为GFS中的四个欧洲国家（德国、西班牙、瑞典和英国）构建了繁荣和不繁荣指数，使用了不同的变量。与GFS一样，不繁荣数据显示不良状况随年龄下降，而繁荣数据则更为混杂。其次，我们考察了2020-2025年基于互联网的全球心智（GM）调查，针对同一组国家，发现无论是繁荣还是不繁荣变量，福祉都随年龄上升。我们认为，青年自杀、自残和心理健康住院的趋势与不繁荣指数的年龄模式以及基于互联网调查的繁荣和不繁荣指数证据是一致的。

papers.title: Climate Change, Conflict, and the Risk of Economic Collapse in Africa
papers.authors: Joel Ferguson, Marshall Burke, Edward Miguel, Solomon M. Hsiang
papers.abstract: Is human-caused climate change likely to trigger enduring economic decline in modern societies? We study whether changes in violent conflict and economic growth caused by warming could interact to degrade economic opportunities and trap African countries in poverty. We provide evidence of an emerging high-conflict and low-growth "poverty trap" equilibrium in Africa and describe theoretically how such an equilibrium could result from warming. We then combine historical data on temperature, growth, and conflict with projections from a large ensemble of global climate models to evaluate the risk that warming and subsequent conflict could push African economies into a regime of sustained negative economic growth. We find that the risk of such "economic collapse" is material in a moderate-to-high emissions scenario. We estimate that in Africa, a current "high" emissions trajectory (RCP 7.0) may increase the incidence of conflict 5.1 percentage points (95% CI 0.2-13.0) and increase the share of countries with net negative GDP growth this century by 12.2 percentage points (95% CI 2.0-27.5). We calculate that roughly 82% of this additional conflict risk and 14% of projected GDP losses are due to the interacting effects between these two outcomes, underscoring the importance of accounting for their indirect effects and feedbacks. Our findings suggest an unprecedented scale of emissions mitigation, economic policy innovation or institutional investment that would be required to contain the risk of catastrophic human impacts from climate change in many African countries.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EFG, IFM, PE, POL；JEL：E0, F0, I3, O1, O44, Q54
papers.zh_title: 气候变化、冲突与非洲经济崩溃的风险
papers.zh_abstract: 人为气候变化是否可能引发现代社会的持续经济衰退？我们研究了由变暖导致的暴力冲突和经济增长变化是否可能相互作用，从而削弱经济机会并使非洲国家陷入贫困陷阱。我们提供了非洲出现高冲突、低增长的“贫困陷阱”均衡的证据，并从理论上描述了这种均衡如何由变暖导致。然后，我们将温度、增长和冲突的历史数据与大量全球气候模型的预测相结合，评估变暖及随后的冲突可能将非洲经济体推入持续负经济增长状态的风险。我们发现，在中高排放情景下，这种“经济崩溃”的风险是实质性的。我们估计，在非洲，当前“高”排放轨迹（RCP 7.0）可能使冲突发生率增加5.1个百分点（95%置信区间：0.2-13.0），并使本世纪GDP净负增长的国家比例增加12.2个百分点（95%置信区间：2.0-27.5）。我们计算出，大约82%的额外冲突风险和14%的预计GDP损失是由于这两个结果之间的相互作用效应，这凸显了考虑其间接效应和反馈的重要性。我们的研究结果表明，需要前所未有的减排规模、经济政策创新或制度投资，才能控制许多非洲国家气候变化带来的灾难性人类影响风险。

papers.title: Capital Reallocation and Private Firm Dynamics
papers.authors: Anmol Bhandari, Paolo Martellini, Ellen McGrattan
papers.abstract: We develop a theory of firm dynamics and capital reallocation in private firms and use it to study the taxation of business income, capital, and capital gains. Intangible assets—such as customer bases and trade names—are created using owners' time and are infrequently traded in bilateral meetings. We discipline the model with U.S. administrative data, which report purchase prices and counterparties in asset transfers, allowing us to calibrate the investment technology and output elasticity for otherwise unobservable intangible capital. The equilibrium features dispersion in marginal product of capital, transferable share of firm value, and return on business wealth. Introducing taxation, we find that capital gains taxes are most distortionary, primarily by discouraging entry and reallocation of capital, whereas income taxes are least distortionary.
papers.zh_title: 资本再配置与私营企业动态
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发展了一个关于私营企业动态和资本再配置的理论，并用它来研究对营业收入、资本和资本利得的税收。无形资产——如客户群和商号——是利用所有者的时间创造的，并且在双边会面中不经常交易。我们利用美国行政数据对模型进行校准，这些数据报告了资产转移中的购买价格和交易对手，使我们能够校准原本不可观察的无形资本的投资技术和产出弹性。均衡的特征是资本边际产品、企业价值可转让份额和商业财富回报率的分散。引入税收后，我们发现资本利得税最具扭曲性，主要通过抑制企业进入和资本再配置，而所得税的扭曲性最小。

papers.title: The Impact of AI and Digital Platforms on the Information Ecosystem
papers.authors: Joseph E. Stiglitz, Maxim Ventura-Bolet
papers.abstract: We develop a tractable model to study how AI and digital platforms impact the information ecosystem. News producers — who create truthful or untruthful content that becomes a public good or bad — earn revenue from consumer visits. Consumers search for information and differ in their ability to distinguish truthful from untruthful information. AI and digital platforms influence the ecosystem by: improving the efficiency of processing and transmission of information, endangering the producer business model, changing the relative cost of producing misinformation and altering the ability of consumers to screen quality. We find that in the absence of adequate regulation (accountability, content moderation, and intellectual property protection) the quality of the information ecosystem may decline, both because the equilibrium quantity of truthful information declines and the share of misinformation increases; and polarization may intensify. While some of these problems are already evident with digital platforms, AI may have different, and overall more adverse, impacts.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能与数字平台对信息生态系统的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个易于处理的模型，研究人工智能和数字平台如何影响信息生态系统。新闻生产者——创造真实或不真实的内容，这些内容成为公共物品或公害——通过消费者访问获得收入。消费者搜索信息，并且他们在区分真实与不真实信息的能力上存在差异。人工智能和数字平台通过以下方式影响生态系统：提高信息处理和传输的效率，危及生产者商业模式，改变生产错误信息的相对成本，以及改变消费者筛选质量的能力。我们发现，在缺乏适当监管（问责制、内容审核和知识产权保护）的情况下，信息生态系统的质量可能会下降，这既是因为真实信息的均衡数量下降，也是因为错误信息的份额增加；同时，极化可能会加剧。虽然其中一些问题在数字平台上已经显而易见，但人工智能可能产生不同且总体上更不利的影响。

papers.title: The Impact of Immunotherapy on Reductions in Cancer Mortality: Evidence from Medicare
papers.authors: Danea Horn, Abby E. Alpert, Mark Duggan, Mireille Jacobson
papers.abstract: Immunotherapy is a breakthrough innovation in cancer care but is also among the most expensive treatments, with costs exceeding $150,000 per patient. We study the introduction of immune checkpoint inhibitors (ICIs), the most widely used class of immunotherapy drugs. In 2022, ICIs accounted for 44% of the $17.5 billion Medicare Part B cancer drug spending. We focus on metastatic melanoma, the first approved indication for ICIs. While overall cancer mortality rates declined since the 1990s, melanoma mortality rates increased through the early 2010s. Following the first ICI approvals in 2011 and 2014, melanoma mortality declined sharply. Using traditional Medicare claims, we estimate the impact of the introduction of ICIs on healthcare utilization, costs, and 1-year survival for patients with metastatic melanoma, relative to metastatic colorectal cancer (CRC), where ICIs were not approved until 2017. Variation in approval timing allows us to isolate the effect of ICIs from broader cancer care trends. We find that ICIs reduced 1-year mortality by 6.2%. Since about 1 in 5 metastatic melanoma patients received ICIs, this implies a 27.5% reduction among treated patients. The introduction of ICIs also reduced chemotherapy and radiation use, but increased Medicare spending by 59.3% or about 260% among ICI-treated patients. Accounting for life expectancy gains beyond one year, the benefits of ICIs for melanoma patients appear comparable, or potentially even greater, than the substantial added Medicare costs. Nonetheless, ICI use remains relatively low given large survival benefits and few alternative treatments, suggesting that costs and other barriers limit patient access.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE, PR；JEL：H51, I13, I18, O38
papers.zh_title: 免疫疗法对癌症死亡率降低的影响：来自医疗保险的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 免疫疗法是癌症治疗中的一项突破性创新，但也是最昂贵的治疗方法之一，每位患者的费用超过15万美元。我们研究了免疫检查点抑制剂（ICIs）的引入，这是最广泛使用的一类免疫治疗药物。2022年，ICIs占175亿美元医疗保险B部分癌症药物支出的44%。我们重点关注转移性黑色素瘤，这是ICIs首个获批的适应症。尽管自1990年代以来总体癌症死亡率有所下降，但黑色素瘤死亡率在2010年代初期之前一直上升。在2011年和2014年首次批准ICIs后，黑色素瘤死亡率急剧下降。利用传统医疗保险索赔数据，我们估计了ICIs引入对转移性黑色素瘤患者医疗利用、成本和一年生存率的影响，并与转移性结直肠癌（CRC）患者进行比较，后者直到2017年才获批ICIs。批准时间的差异使我们能够将ICIs的影响与更广泛的癌症治疗趋势区分开来。我们发现，ICIs使一年死亡率降低了6.2%。由于大约五分之一的转移性黑色素瘤患者接受了ICIs治疗，这意味着接受治疗的患者死亡率降低了27.5%。ICIs的引入也减少了化疗和放疗的使用，但使医疗保险支出增加了59.3%，在接受ICIs治疗的患者中增加了约260%。考虑到一年以上的预期寿命增长，ICIs对黑色素瘤患者的益处似乎与大幅增加的医疗保险成本相当，甚至可能更大。尽管如此，鉴于巨大的生存获益和极少的替代治疗方案，ICIs的使用率仍然相对较低，这表明成本和其他障碍限制了患者的可及性。

papers.title: Genius on Demand: The Value of Transformative Artificial Intelligence
papers.authors: Ajay K. Agrawal, Joshua S. Gans, Avi Goldfarb
papers.abstract: This paper examines how the emergence of transformative AI systems providing ``genius on demand" would affect knowledge worker allocation and labour market outcomes. We develop a simple model distinguishing between routine knowledge workers, who can only apply existing knowledge with some uncertainty, and genius workers, who create new knowledge at a cost increasing with distance from a known point. When genius capacity is scarce, we find it should be allocated primarily to questions at domain boundaries rather than at midpoints between known answers. The introduction of AI geniuses fundamentally transforms this allocation. In the short run, human geniuses specialise in questions that are furthest from existing knowledge, where their comparative advantage over AI is greatest. In the long run, routine workers may be completely displaced if AI efficiency approaches human genius efficiency.
papers.zh_title: 按需天才：变革性人工智能的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了提供“按需天才”的变革性人工智能系统的出现将如何影响知识工作者的配置和劳动力市场结果。我们开发了一个简单模型，区分了常规知识工作者（只能以一定不确定性应用现有知识）和天才工作者（以与已知点距离增加的成本创造新知识）。当天才能力稀缺时，我们发现它应主要分配给领域边界上的问题，而不是已知答案之间的中点问题。人工智能天才的引入从根本上改变了这种配置。在短期内，人类天才专门研究离现有知识最远的问题，在那里他们相对于人工智能的比较优势最大。在长期内，如果人工智能效率接近人类天才效率，常规工作者可能被完全取代。

papers.title: What Can Satellite Imagery and Machine Learning Measure?
papers.authors: Jonathan Proctor, Tamma Carleton, Trinetta Chong, Taryn Fransen, Simon Greenhill, Jessica Katz, Hikari Murayama, Luke Sherman, Jeanette Tseng, Hannah Druckenmiller, Solomon Hsiang
papers.abstract: Satellite imagery and machine learning (SIML) are increasingly being combined to remotely measure social and environmental outcomes, yet use of this technology has been limited by insufficient understanding of its strengths and weaknesses. Here, we undertake the most extensive effort yet to characterize the potential and limits of using a SIML technology to measure ground conditions. We conduct 115 standardized large-scale experiments using a composite high-resolution optical image of Earth and a generalizable SIML technology to evaluate what can be accurately measured and where this technology struggles. We find that SIML alone predicts roughly half the variation in ground measurements on average, and that variables describing human society (e.g. female literacy, R²=0.55) are generally as easily measured as natural variables (e.g. bird diversity, R²=0.55). Patterns of performance across measured variable type, space, income and population density indicate that SIML can likely support many new applications and decision-making use cases, although within quantifiable limits.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EH, LS, PE；JEL：C80, Q5
papers.zh_title: 卫星图像和机器学习能测量什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 卫星图像和机器学习（SIML）越来越多地被结合起来远程测量社会和环境结果，然而，由于对其优势和局限性了解不足，这项技术的使用受到限制。在此，我们进行了迄今为止最广泛的努力，以描述使用SIML技术测量地面状况的潜力和限制。我们利用地球的复合高分辨率光学图像和一种可推广的SIML技术，进行了115项标准化的大规模实验，以评估哪些可以准确测量以及该技术在哪些方面存在困难。我们发现，仅SIML平均能预测地面测量值大约一半的变异，并且描述人类社会的变量（例如女性识字率，R²=0.55）通常与自然变量（例如鸟类多样性，R²=0.55）一样容易测量。跨测量变量类型、空间、收入和人口密度的表现模式表明，SIML很可能支持许多新的应用和决策用例，尽管在可量化的限制范围内。

papers.title: Incorporating Non-Unitary Income Elasticities, Choke Prices and Choke Incomes into Applied General-Equilibrium Models
papers.authors: James R. Markusen
papers.abstract: Traditional applied general-equilibrium (AGE) models have always faced trade-offs between analytical and computational tractability and counter-empirical restrictions. One is the assumption of homothetic preferences implying unitary income elasticities of demand, significantly inconsistent with data. Similarly, there is no “choke” income level, below which a certain good is not purchased and there is no choke price above which a good is not purchased, implying no changes in the extensive margin of trade. Here I exploit what I will label a Stone-Geary Modified (SGM) formulation. This produces a model in which there are non-unitary income elasticities, choke income levels for some/all goods, and choke prices. The second approach modifies CRIE (constant relative income elasticity) preferences which are preferred for modeling income elasticities, but don’t by themselves permit choke income and prices. While other authors have explored these properties in alternative ways, both my approaches have considerable advantages for high-dimension simulation models in that they retain CES structures and functional forms so that they can slot right into existing modeling formats. They require only small modifications to off-the-shelf cost and expenditure functions, and therefore goods and factor demand functions via Shepard’s lemma. Unobserved parameters can be calibrated from observed data and econometric estimates.
papers.zh_title: 将非单位收入弹性、窒息价格和窒息收入纳入应用一般均衡模型
papers.zh_abstract: 传统的应用一般均衡（AGE）模型一直在分析性和计算易处理性与反经验限制之间面临权衡。其中之一是同质偏好的假设，意味着需求的单位收入弹性，这与数据显著不一致。同样，不存在“窒息”收入水平（低于该水平不购买某种商品）和不存在窒息价格（高于该价格不购买某种商品），这意味着贸易的广延边际没有变化。在这里，我利用我将称之为Stone-Geary修正（SGM）的公式。这产生了一个模型，其中存在非单位收入弹性、某些/所有商品的窒息收入水平和窒息价格。第二种方法修改了CRIE（恒定相对收入弹性）偏好，这种偏好更适合于对收入弹性建模，但本身不允许窒息收入和价格。虽然其他作者以其他方式探索了这些性质，但我的两种方法对于高维模拟模型都具有相当大的优势，因为它们保留了CES结构和函数形式，从而可以直接嵌入现有的建模格式。它们只需要对现成的成本和支出函数进行微小修改，进而通过谢泼德引理修改商品和要素需求函数。未观察到的参数可以从观测数据和计量经济学估计中校准。

papers.title: Understanding and Addressing Temperature Impacts on Mortality
papers.authors: Marshall Burke, Andrew J. Wilson, Tumenkhusel Avirmed, Jonas Wallstein, Mariana C. M. Martins, Patrick Behrer, Christopher W. Callahan, Marissa Childs, June Choi, Karina French, Carlos F. Gould, Sam Heft-Neal, Renzhi Jing, Minghao Qiu, Lisa Rennels, Emma Krasovich Southworth
papers.abstract: A large literature documents how ambient temperature affects human mortality. Using decades of detailed data from 30 countries, we revisit and synthesize key findings from this literature. We confirm that ambient temperature is among the largest external threats to human health, and is responsible for a remarkable 5-12% of total deaths across countries in our sample, or hundreds of thousands of deaths per year in both the U.S. and EU. In all contexts we consider, cold kills more than heat, though the temperature of minimum risk rises with age, making younger individuals more vulnerable to heat and older individuals more vulnerable to cold. We find evidence for adaptation to the local climate, with hotter places experiencing somewhat lower risk at higher temperatures, but still more overall mortality from heat due to more frequent exposure. Within countries, higher income is not associated with uniformly lower vulnerability to ambient temperature, and the overall burden of mortality from ambient temperature is not falling over time. Finally, we systematically summarize the limited set of studies that rigorously evaluate interventions that can reduce the impact of heat and cold on health. We find that many proposed and implemented policy interventions lack empirical support and do not target temperature exposures that generate the highest health burden, and that some of the most beneficial interventions for reducing the health impacts of cold or heat have little explicit to do with climate.
papers.zh_title: 理解并应对温度对死亡率的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 大量文献记录了环境温度如何影响人类死亡率。利用来自30个国家数十年的详细数据，我们重新审视并综合了该文献的关键发现。我们证实，环境温度是人类健康面临的最大外部威胁之一，在我们的样本国家中，它导致了惊人的5%至12%的总死亡人数，相当于美国和欧盟每年数十万人的死亡。在我们考虑的所有情境中，寒冷导致的死亡人数多于炎热，尽管最低风险温度随年龄增长而上升，这使得年轻人更容易受到炎热的影响，而老年人更容易受到寒冷的影响。我们发现了适应本地气候的证据，即较热地区在高温下的风险略低，但由于更频繁的高温暴露，总体死亡率仍然更高。在国家内部，较高的收入并不与对环境温度的普遍较低脆弱性相关联，并且环境温度造成的总体死亡负担并未随时间下降。最后，我们系统地总结了那些严格评估可减少热和冷对健康影响的干预措施的有限研究。我们发现，许多提议和实施的政策干预措施缺乏实证支持，并未针对造成最高健康负担的温度暴露，并且一些对减少寒冷或炎热健康影响最有益的干预措施与气候几乎没有直接关系。

papers.title: Artificial Intelligence in Research and Development
papers.authors: Benjamin Jones
papers.abstract: How much can AI accelerate progress in different research fields? This paper shows that three features—the share of research tasks AI performs, the productivity of AI at those tasks, and the strength of bottlenecks—are key determinants of AI’s implications in any area, from cancer therapeutics to software design. The model maps changes in AI capabilities to research outcomes, quantifies the “marginal returns to intelligence,” and shows how AI can shift returns to R&D investment. Concepts like superintelligence, Powerful AI, and Transformative AI are further engaged and disciplined. Finally, the framework sets a measurement agenda linking AI benchmarks to field-specific opportunities for accelerating progress.
papers.zh_title: 研发中的人工智能
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能能在多大程度上加速不同研究领域的进展？本文表明，三个特征——人工智能在研究任务中所占的份额、人工智能在这些任务上的生产力以及瓶颈的强度——是决定人工智能在任何领域（从癌症治疗到软件设计）影响的关键因素。该模型将人工智能能力的变化映射到研究成果上，量化了“智能的边际回报”，并展示了人工智能如何改变研发投资的回报。超级智能、强大人工智能和变革性人工智能等概念得到了进一步的探讨和约束。最后，该框架设定了一个衡量议程，将人工智能基准与特定领域加速进展的机会联系起来。

papers.title: What Does It Take? Quantifying Cross-Country Transfers in the Eurozone
papers.authors: Yi-Li Chien, Zhengyang Jiang, Matteo Leombroni, Hanno Lustig
papers.abstract: We compute the cross-country transfers that result from unconventional monetary policy in the Eurozone. The ECB funds the expansion of its aggregate balance sheet mostly by issuing bank reserves and cash in core countries. The national central banks (NCBs) in periphery countries then borrow from the core NCBs at below-market rates to fund the asset purchases and bank lending. In addition, NCBs in the periphery lend more to their own banks at below-market rates. To compute the cross-country transfers, we compare the resulting cross-country distribution of NCB income to a counterfactual scenario without the ECB and without non-marketable intra-Eurozone debt. We document significant and persistent transfers from the core to the periphery.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E42, E52, F33, G15
papers.zh_title: 需要什么？量化欧元区的跨国转移支付
papers.zh_abstract: 我们计算了欧元区非常规货币政策导致的跨国转移支付。欧洲央行主要通过发行核心国家的银行准备金和现金来为其总资产负债表的扩张提供资金。然后，外围国家的国家中央银行以低于市场的利率从核心国家的国家中央银行借款，为资产购买和银行贷款提供资金。此外，外围国家的国家中央银行以低于市场的利率向其本国银行提供更多贷款。为了计算跨国转移支付，我们将由此产生的国家中央银行收入跨国分配与一个没有欧洲央行且没有不可交易的欧元区内债务的反事实情景进行了比较。我们记录了从核心国家到外围国家的显著且持续的转移支付。

papers.title: Human Capital Accumulation Across Space
papers.authors: Klaus Desmet, Dávid Krisztián Nagy, Esteban Rossi-Hansberg
papers.abstract: This paper studies how human capital shapes the economic geography of development. We develop a model in which the cost of acquiring human capital varies across space, and regions with higher human capital innovate more. Locations are spatially connected through migration and trade. There are localized agglomeration economies, and human-capital-augmenting technology diffuses across space. Using high-resolution data on income and schooling, we quantify and simulate the model at the 1° x 1° resolution for the entire globe. Over the span of two centuries, the model predicts strong persistence in the spatial distribution of development — unlike spatial dynamic models without human capital, which predict convergence. Proportionally lowering the cost of education in sub-Saharan Africa or Central and South Asia raises local outcomes but reduces global welfare, whereas the same policy in Latin America improves global outcomes. An alternative policy equalizing educational costs across sub-Saharan Africa generates relatively worse outcomes, as population reallocates within the region toward less productive areas.
