papers.zh_abstract: 我们探究劳动力市场势力的量化在多大程度上依赖于对长期工人-企业雇佣关系的建模。我们构建了一个包含动态工资合同的寡头垄断模型。工人在提供不同福利的企业之间进行选择，决定是否工作以及在哪里工作，并解决一个包含企业特定人力资本的动态离散选择劳动力供给问题。因此，企业最优地选择工资-任期合同来吸引和留住工人。我们发现，与标准的静态工资设定模型相比，此类合同削弱了企业施加巨大瞬时工资压低的动机，从而减少了社会低效的工人-企业分离的份额。因此，我们表明，基于“充分统计量”的实证方法往往会高估劳动力市场势力的程度：低水平的企业特定劳动力供给弹性并不一定表明租金提取，而是反映了企业通过提供人力资本积累带来的长期价值来留住工人的能力。

papers.title: Environmental Catastrophe and the Direction of Invention: Evidence from the American Dust Bowl
papers.authors: Jacob Moscona
papers.abstract: This paper investigates how innovation responded to and shaped the economic impact of the American Dust Bowl, an environmental catastrophe that led to widespread soil erosion on the US Plains during the 1930s. Combining data on county-level erosion, the historical geography of crop production, and crop-specific innovation, I document that in the wake of the environmental crisis, agricultural technology development was strongly and persistently re-directed toward more Dust Bowl-exposed crops and, within crops, toward bio-chemical and planting technologies that could directly mitigate economic losses from environmental distress. County-level exposure to Dust Bowl-induced innovation significantly dampened the effect of land erosion on agricultural land values and revenue. These results highlight the role of crises in spurring innovation and the importance of endogenous technological progress as an adaptive force in the face of disasters.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EEE, PR；JEL：O3, O31, O33, Q1, Q16, Q54
papers.zh_title: 环境灾难与发明方向：来自美国沙尘暴的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了创新如何响应并塑造了美国沙尘暴的经济影响，沙尘暴是20世纪30年代导致美国大平原地区大面积土壤侵蚀的一场环境灾难。结合县级侵蚀数据、作物生产的历史地理数据以及作物特定创新数据，我记录了在环境危机之后，农业技术发展被强烈且持续地重新导向更易受沙尘暴影响的作物，并且在作物内部，转向能够直接减轻环境困境造成的经济损失的生物化学和种植技术。县级层面暴露于沙尘暴引发的创新显著抑制了土地侵蚀对农业土地价值和收入的影响。这些结果凸显了危机在激发创新中的作用，以及内生技术进步作为面对灾难时的适应力量的重要性。

papers.title: The (In)effectiveness of Targeted Payroll Tax Reductions
papers.authors: Alessandra Fenizia, Nicholas Y. Li, Luca Citino
papers.abstract: This paper studies the cost-effectiveness of targeted payroll taxes for stimulating labor demand. It uses rich administrative data to study the effects of an Italian reform that raised social security contributions for apprenticeship contracts but granted a substantial discount for firms with 9 employees or less. The discount does not increase demand for apprenticeship contracts. Instead, it subsidizes inframarginal hiring. This reform is not cost-effective. Point estimates imply that each million euros of foregone social security contributions supports the employment of 29 apprentices for one year and no permanent contracts (these estimates are not statistically different from zero).
papers.zh_title: 定向工资税减免的（无）效性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了定向工资税在刺激劳动力需求方面的成本效益。它利用丰富的行政数据来研究意大利一项改革的影响，该改革提高了学徒合同的社会保障缴款，但为拥有9名或更少员工的企业提供了大幅折扣。该折扣并未增加对学徒合同的需求。相反，它补贴了边际内雇佣。这项改革不具有成本效益。点估计表明，每减少一百万欧元的社会保障缴款，可以支持29名学徒一年的就业，并且没有永久合同（这些估计在统计上不显著异于零）。

papers.title: Monetary Policy without an Anchor
papers.authors: Luigi Bocola, Alessandro Dovis, Kasper Jørgensen, Rishabh Kirpalani
papers.abstract: Policymakers often cite the risk that inflation expectations might “de-anchor” as a key reason for responding forcefully to inflationary shocks. We develop a model to analyze this trade-off and to quantify the benefits of stable long-run inflation expectations. In our framework, households and firms are imperfectly informed about the central bank’s objective and learn from its policy choices. Recognizing this interaction, the central bank raises interest rates more aggressively after adverse supply shocks and accepts short-run output costs to secure more stable inflation expectations. The strength of this reputation channel depends on how sensitive long-run inflation expectations are to surprises in interest rates. Using high-frequency identification, we estimate these elasticities for emerging and advanced economies and find large negative values for Brazil. We fit our model to these findings and use it to quantify how reputation building motives affect monetary policy decisions, and the role of central bank's credibility in promoting macroeconomic stability.
papers.zh_title: 无锚的货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 政策制定者经常引用通胀预期可能“脱锚”的风险，作为对通胀冲击做出有力反应的关键原因。我们开发了一个模型来分析这种权衡，并量化稳定的长期通胀预期的好处。在我们的框架中，家庭和企业对央行的目标信息不完全，并从其政策选择中学习。认识到这种互动，央行在面临不利供给冲击后会更积极地提高利率，并接受短期产出成本，以确保更稳定的通胀预期。这种声誉渠道的强度取决于长期通胀预期对利率意外的敏感程度。利用高频识别，我们估计了新兴经济体和发达经济体的这些弹性，并发现巴西的数值很大且为负。我们将模型拟合到这些发现中，并用它来量化声誉建设动机如何影响货币政策决策，以及央行可信度在促进宏观经济稳定中的作用。

papers.title: Cannabis and Respiratory Health
papers.authors: Jayani Jayawardhana, Jialin Hou, Johanna Catherine Maclean
papers.abstract: Cannabis legalization has increased substantially in the past two decades with state-level policies that permit possession this product. A potential concern with cannabis legalization and the corresponding increase in consumption is that – because smoking is the most common consumption mode – respiratory health could worsen. In this study, we offer new evidence on the impact of recreational cannabis laws on asthma outcomes. To do so, we combine commercial health insurance claims and survey data over the period 2008 to 2022 with difference-in-differences and event-study methods. Our findings suggest that asthma diagnoses do not change following legalization of recreational cannabis, while asthma-related dispensed prescription medications decline, and asthma-related outpatient visits and inpatient hospitalizations are stable. An analysis of changes in use of smoked and non-smoked cannabis post-law suggests that, on net, the increase in overall cannabis use attributable to legalization is driven by use of non-smoked cannabis, which may explain why we find limited evidence that asthma outcomes worsen post-law. Collectively, these results suggest that expanded access to legal cannabis has not worsened respiratory health overall, and hint that some patients may use cannabis to manage asthma symptoms.
papers.zh_title: 大麻与呼吸系统健康
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，随着允许持有该产品的州级政策出台，大麻合法化显著增加。大麻合法化及相应消费增长的一个潜在担忧是——由于吸食是最常见的消费方式——呼吸系统健康可能会恶化。在这项研究中，我们提供了关于娱乐性大麻法律对哮喘结果影响的新证据。为此，我们将2008年至2022年期间的商业健康保险索赔数据和调查数据与双重差分法和事件研究法相结合。我们的研究结果表明，在娱乐性大麻合法化后，哮喘诊断没有变化，而哮喘相关的处方药配药量下降，哮喘相关的门诊就诊和住院治疗保持稳定。对法律实施后吸食和非吸食大麻使用变化的分析表明，净而言，合法化导致的大麻总体使用量增加是由非吸食大麻的使用驱动的，这或许可以解释为什么我们发现法律实施后哮喘结果恶化的证据有限。总的来说，这些结果表明，扩大合法大麻的获取并未总体上恶化呼吸系统健康，并暗示一些患者可能使用大麻来控制哮喘症状。

papers.title: The Financial Consequences of Being Denied Benefit Access
papers.authors: Tatiana Homonoff, Min S. Lee, Katherine Meckel
papers.abstract: We examine the causal impact of being denied benefit access on the financial well-being of marginally-excluded households. Using experimental and quasi-random variation in the flexibility of mandatory intake interviews and a unique linkage between administrative Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) and credit report data, we find that households screened out of SNAP due to administrative barriers suffer tangible downstream economic consequences. Specifically, we find that process-related denials increase debt and delinquencies, and decrease credit scores. These results highlight the economic importance of implementation design and its role in strengthening (or undermining) the financial protection provided by social insurance programs.
papers.zh_title: 被拒绝福利准入的财务后果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了被拒绝福利准入对边际被排斥家庭财务福祉的因果影响。利用强制性入职面试灵活性的实验性和准随机变化，以及行政补充营养援助计划（SNAP）与信用报告数据之间的独特关联，我们发现，因行政障碍而被筛选出SNAP的家庭会遭受切实的下游经济后果。具体来说，我们发现与流程相关的拒绝增加了债务和拖欠，并降低了信用评分。这些结果凸显了实施设计的经济重要性，及其在加强（或削弱）社会保险计划提供的财务保护方面的作用。

papers.title: Pushing Back Against Private Practice: The Unintended Effects of Paying Public Doctors More
papers.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Núria Mas, Judit Vall Castelló, Jaume Vives-i-Bastida
papers.abstract: Most nations in the world have side-by-side private and public health care systems. Policymakers worry that “dual practice” across sectors might reduce care to the public sector. This concern led regions in Spain to offer “exclusivity bonuses” to physicians who practice exclusively in the public sector. We show theoretically that the impact of these bonuses on the public sector is ambiguous. We demonstrate empirically that the bonuses backfired: they did increase exclusive participation in the public sector, but significantly reduced hours of work. When regions added offsetting bonuses for dual practice, they were largely ineffective.
papers.zh_title: 抵制私人执业：提高公立医生薪酬的意外后果
papers.zh_abstract: 世界上大多数国家都有并行的私人和公共医疗保健系统。政策制定者担心跨部门的“双重执业”可能会减少对公共部门的医疗服务。这种担忧导致西班牙各地区向仅在公共部门执业的医生提供“排他性奖金”。我们从理论上表明，这些奖金对公共部门的影响是不确定的。我们通过实证证明，这些奖金适得其反：它们确实增加了在公共部门的排他性参与，但显著减少了工作时间。当各地区增加针对双重执业的补偿性奖金时，这些奖金基本上无效。

papers.title: Voting with Their Feet: Democratic Backsliding and Market-Minded Migration - Evidence from Israel and Europe
papers.authors: Assaf Razin
papers.abstract:
Using a comparative framework, the study examines how variations in political regimes across Israel and Europe shape patterns of international migration. In both contexts, episodes of democratic backsliding serve as quasi-exogenous shocks that reveal the causal link between institutional erosion and outward mobility.
In Israel, the origin of democratic backsliding lies in a corruption shock—the criminal indictment of the prime minister—which escalated into an executive–judicial shock as the government launched an anti-democratic judicial overhaul. This confrontation between the executive and judiciary provides a natural experiment for identifying how institutional breakdowns shape migration decisions.
In Europe, the origin of democratic backsliding stems from a “Syrian shock”—a massive refugee inflow that strained administrative capacity, polarized politics, and weakened liberal institutions. The resulting governance erosion triggered emigration responses structurally like those observed in Israel.
Using a difference-in-differences (DiD) estimation, the study identifies causal effects of democratic erosion on migration flows. Across both settings, out-migration emerges as a market-minded response to illiberal regime change—a behavioral signal of sensitivity to policies that features nationalizing industries, restrict free speech, and undermine the rule of law. Together, the Israeli and European experiences demonstrate that illiberal governance functions as a systemic push factor for emigration, beyond standard economic explanations.
papers.zh_title: 用脚投票：民主倒退与市场导向的移民——来自以色列和欧洲的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究采用比较框架，考察了以色列和欧洲政治体制的差异如何塑造国际移民模式。在这两种背景下，民主倒退事件作为准外生冲击，揭示了制度侵蚀与向外流动之间的因果关系。在以色列，民主倒退的根源在于一场腐败冲击——总理的刑事起诉——这升级为一场行政-司法冲击，因为政府发起了一场反民主的司法改革。行政与司法之间的这场对抗为识别制度崩溃如何塑造移民决策提供了一个自然实验。在欧洲，民主倒退的根源在于一场“叙利亚冲击”——大规模难民涌入，这给行政能力带来压力，使政治两极分化，并削弱了自由制度。由此产生的治理侵蚀引发了与在以色列观察到的结构相似的移民反应。使用双重差分法估计，本研究识别了民主侵蚀对移民流动的因果效应。在这两种背景下，向外移民表现为对非自由体制变革的市场导向反应——这是一种行为信号，表明对以国有化产业、限制言论自由和破坏法治为特征的政策敏感。总之，以色列和欧洲的经验表明，非自由治理是移民的体制性推动因素，超越了标准的经济解释。

papers.title: Planes Overhead: How Airplane Noise Impacts Home Values
papers.authors: Florian Allroggen, R. John Hansman, Christopher R. Knittel, Jing Li, Xibo Wan, Juju Wang
papers.abstract: Air transportation supports economic growth and global connectivity but imposes localized environmental costs, particularly through aircraft noise. We estimate the causal effect of aviation noise on housing prices using quasi-experimental variation from the Federal Aviation Administration's rollout of performance-based navigation (PBN) procedures and runway reconfigurations at three major U.S. airports. Combining high-resolution flight trajectory data with geocoded housing transactions, we apply a difference-in-differences hedonic framework to identify changes in exposure unanticipated by residents. A one-decibel increase in annual day-night average sound level reduces house prices by 0.6 to 1.0 percent. Among alternative noise metrics, average exposure explains property value impacts most strongly. Willingness to pay for quieter conditions varies systematically with income and race, indicating that aircraft noise externalities have meaningful distributional consequences. Our results highlight the need to incorporate localized environmental costs into aviation and urban land-use policy.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PE；JEL：L51, L62, L85, Q53
papers.zh_title: 头顶飞机：航空噪音如何影响房价
papers.zh_abstract: 航空运输支撑经济增长和全球连通性，但会带来局部环境成本，尤其是通过飞机噪音。我们利用美国联邦航空管理局在三个主要机场推行基于性能的导航程序和跑道重新配置的准实验变化，估计了航空噪音对房价的因果效应。结合高分辨率飞行轨迹数据与地理编码的住房交易数据，我们应用双重差分特征模型来识别居民未预料到的噪音暴露变化。年昼夜平均声级每增加一分贝，房价下降0.6%至1.0%。在替代噪音指标中，平均暴露量对房产价值的影响解释力最强。为更安静环境付费的意愿随收入和种族系统性地变化，表明飞机噪音外部性具有显著分配后果。我们的结果凸显了将局部环境成本纳入航空和城市土地利用政策的必要性。

papers.title: Political Information and Network Effects
papers.authors: Georgy Egorov, Sergei Guriev, Maxim Mironov, Ekaterina Zhuravskaya
papers.abstract: Why do political campaigns so often yield unexpected results? We address this question by separately estimating the direct effect of a campaign on targeted voters and the indirect effect on others in the same social environment. Partnering with a local NGO during Argentina’s 2023 presidential election, we randomized the distribution of leaflets providing an expert assessment of the likely consequences of certain proposals by the outsider candidate Javier Milei. Exploiting Argentina’s unique sub-precinct election reporting system, we show that the campaign reduced Milei’s support among directly treated voters, as expected, but increased his support among untreated voters in treated precincts, producing a backfiring, net-positive effect for Milei. A pre-registered replication confirmed these opposite-signed effects. Using theory and a survey experiment, we show that the minority of voters who disbelieved the campaign were more motivated to discuss it with peers, convincing them to support Milei. This mobilization effect appears especially likely when campaigns criticize outsider candidates. Our results highlight how campaigns aimed at anti-elite candidates can unintentionally mobilize support for them.
papers.zh_title: 政治信息与网络效应
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么政治竞选常常产生出乎意料的结果？我们通过分别估计竞选对目标选民的直接影响和对同一社会环境中其他人的间接效应来探讨这一问题。在阿根廷2023年总统选举期间，我们与一家当地非政府组织合作，随机分发传单，提供专家对局外人候选人哈维尔·米莱某些提案可能后果的评估。利用阿根廷独特的子选区选举报告系统，我们显示，该竞选按预期减少了直接受处理选民对米莱的支持，但在受处理选区的未处理选民中增加了对他的支持，产生了适得其反的净正面效应。一项预先注册的复制实验证实了这些符号相反的效应。通过理论和调查实验，我们表明，少数不相信该竞选的选民更有动力与同伴讨论，从而说服他们支持米莱。当竞选批评局外人候选人时，这种动员效应似乎尤其可能发生。我们的结果凸显了针对反精英候选人的竞选如何可能无意中动员对他们的支持。

papers.title: AVE Tariffs are a Misleading Measure of Tariff Policy
papers.authors: Andrew Greenland, James Lake, John Lopresti
papers.abstract: We show that changes in ad valorem equivalent (AVE) tariffs are insufficient to sign the effect of tariffs on economic outcomes. Using a novel database of 1972-1988 US tariffs, we decompose aggregate AVEs into statutory and endogenous components. Pre-1979, inflation creates an “accidental liberalization” by eroding specific tariffs, while import composition changes mask 1980s Tokyo Round tariff cuts. Overall, as much as 70% of the variation in aggregate AVE changes is driven by mechanisms other than statutory tariff changes. Embedding specific tariffs in a hat algebra framework, we show that the accidental liberalization accounts for half of 1972-1988 AVE changes. The resulting impact on imports and price indices depends on whether price movements were driven by import demand or export supply shocks. If driven by export supply shocks, the accidental liberalization is associated with falling imports and rising import price indices.
papers.zh_title: 从价关税等值是关税政策的误导性衡量指标
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，从价关税等值的变化不足以确定关税对经济结果的影响。利用1972-1988年美国关税的新数据库，我们将总从价关税等值分解为法定成分和内生成分。1979年之前，通货膨胀通过侵蚀从量关税造成了“意外自由化”，而进口构成变化掩盖了1980年代东京回合的关税削减。总体而言，总从价关税等值变化中多达70%是由法定关税变化以外的机制驱动的。将从量关税嵌入帽子代数框架，我们显示意外自由化解释了1972-1988年从价关税等值变化的一半。其对进口和价格指数的最终影响取决于价格变动是由进口需求还是出口供给冲击驱动的。如果由出口供给冲击驱动，意外自由化与进口下降和进口价格指数上升相关。

papers.title: Vulnerability of the Public Safety System: Evidence from Micro-Shocks
papers.authors: Shooshan Danagoulian, Monica Deza, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Alberto Ortega
papers.abstract: The 911 system, a vital component of public safety, responds to over 210 million emergency calls each year. We examine the effect of small exogenous public health stressors – pollen emissions – on the operation of the 911 call system in Seattle, Washington. Leveraging daily variation in pollen levels, we evaluate pollen’s impact on the volume of 911 calls. We find that a 100% increase in pollen levels – the modal day-over-day variation we observe in our data – results in six additional 911 calls per day. We further show that elevated pollen levels influence the quality of emergency and non-emergency response. The 911 system responds to increased strain by prioritizing more urgent calls – and as a result, increasing response time to non-urgent calls. Though all calls are connected to a dispatcher, there are increased missed connections – canceled emergency response, missing records of response, and false reports. Despite the prioritization of urgent calls, these additional daily calls lead to reallocation of resources in ways that potentially impede service quality. Thus, our findings suggest that common and small shocks may lead to under-provision of valuable services to communities across the U.S.
papers.zh_title: 公共安全系统的脆弱性：来自微观冲击的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 911系统是公共安全的重要组成部分，每年响应超过2.1亿个紧急电话。我们研究了微小的外生公共卫生压力因素——花粉排放——对华盛顿州西雅图市911呼叫系统运行的影响。利用花粉水平的日度变化，我们评估了花粉对911呼叫量的影响。我们发现，花粉水平增加100%（我们在数据中观察到的典型日环比变化）会导致每天额外增加六个911呼叫。我们进一步表明，花粉水平升高会影响紧急和非紧急响应的质量。911系统通过优先处理更紧急的呼叫来应对增加的压力，结果导致非紧急呼叫的响应时间增加。尽管所有呼叫都接通了调度员，但错失连接（取消的紧急响应、缺失的响应记录和虚假报告）有所增加。尽管优先处理了紧急呼叫，这些额外的每日呼叫导致资源重新分配，可能阻碍服务质量。因此，我们的发现表明，常见的小冲击可能导致美国各地社区有价值服务的供给不足。

papers.title: Modeling and Measuring the Genetic Determinants of Child Development
papers.authors: Francesco Agostinelli, Zach Weingarten
papers.abstract: The longstanding debate over whether human capabilities and skills are shaped more by “nature” or “nurture” has been revitalized by recent advances in genetics, particularly in the use of polygenic scores (PGSs) to proxy for genetic endowments. Yet, we argue that PGSs embed not only direct genetic effects but also indirect environmental influences, raising questions about their validity for causal analysis. We show that these conflated measures can mislead studies of gene–environment interactions, especially when parental behavior responds to children’s genetic risk. To address this issue, we construct a new latent measure of genetic risk that integrates individual genotypes with diagnostic symptoms, using data from the National Longitudinal Study of Adolescent to Adult Health linked to restricted individual SNP-level genotypes from dbGaP. Exploiting multiple sources of variation—including the Mendelian within-family genetic randomization among siblings—we find consistent evidence that parents compensate by investing more in children with higher genetic risk for ADHD. Strikingly, these compensatory responses disappear when genetic risk is proxied by the conventional ADHD PGS, which also yields weaker—and in some cases reversed—predictions for long-run outcomes. Finally, we embed our latent measure of genetic endowments into a standard dynamic structural model of child development. The model shows that both parental investments and latent genetic risk jointly shape children’s cognitive and mental health development, underscoring the importance of modeling the dynamic interplay between genes and environments in the formation of human capital.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：D10, H0, I1, I2, I20, J01, J1
papers.zh_title: 儿童发展遗传决定因素的建模与测量
papers.zh_abstract: 关于人类能力和技能更多由“先天”还是“后天”塑造的长期争论，因遗传学的最新进展（尤其是使用多基因评分作为遗传禀赋代理变量）而重新活跃。然而，我们认为多基因评分不仅嵌入直接遗传效应，还嵌入间接环境影响，这引发了对其因果分析有效性的质疑。我们表明，这些混淆的衡量指标可能误导基因-环境相互作用的研究，尤其是当父母行为对儿童的遗传风险做出反应时。为解决这一问题，我们利用全国青少年至成人健康纵向研究的数据，结合dbGaP中受限的个人单核苷酸多态性基因型，构建了一个新的遗传风险潜在衡量指标，该指标整合了个人基因型与诊断症状。利用多种变异来源（包括兄弟姐妹间的孟德尔家族内遗传随机化），我们发现一致证据表明，父母通过向遗传风险较高的儿童投入更多来补偿其注意力缺陷多动障碍风险。引人注目的是，当遗传风险由传统的注意力缺陷多动障碍多基因评分代理时，这些补偿性反应消失，该评分对长期结果的预测也更弱，在某些情况下甚至相反。最后，我们将遗传禀赋的潜在衡量指标嵌入标准的儿童发展动态结构模型。该模型显示，父母投资和潜在遗传风险共同塑造儿童的认知和心理健康发展，强调了在人力资本形成中对基因与环境动态相互作用进行建模的重要性。

papers.title: The Role of Private Debt in the Financial Ecosystem
papers.authors: Victoria Ivashina
papers.abstract: This paper provides a comprehensive introduction to private debt, examines the key drivers behind its expansion, and frames the discussion around potential risk accumulation in the broader economy. Overall, the development of private debt can be viewed as the emergence of a new technology that facilitated the expansion of the high-yield corporate debt market into the middle market. Throughout its history, the evolution of the high-yield debt and the rise of private debt have been closely intertwined with the growth of private equity. Historically, banks have not had significant exposure to financing buyouts or other highly leveraged transactions, whether in the large-cap or mid-cap segments.
papers.zh_title: 私人债务在金融生态系统中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 本文对私人债务进行了全面介绍，考察了其扩张背后的关键驱动因素，并围绕更广泛经济中潜在风险积累的框架展开讨论。总体而言，私人债务的发展可被视为一种新技术的出现，该技术促进了高收益公司债务市场向中端市场的扩张。纵观其历史，高收益债务的演变和私人债务的兴起一直与私募股权的增长紧密交织。从历史上看，无论是在大盘股还是中盘股领域，银行对收购融资或其他高杠杆交易的敞口并不显著。

papers.title: Same Crime, Different Time: Disparities in Judicial Outcomes for DWI Offenders
papers.authors: Jeffrey T. Denning, Benjamin Hansen, Lars Lefgren, Emily C. Leslie, Cody Tuttle
papers.abstract: We examine disparities in judicial outcomes among people charged with Driving While Intoxicated (DWI), a setting in which legal guilt is objectively determined by breath alcohol content (BrAC). Focusing on first-time offenders with no aggravating circumstances and BrAC above the legal threshold, we find that race, gender, and financial resources strongly predict the likelihood of incarceration and case dismissal. Defendants with greater socioeconomic advantage are more likely to access rehabilitative alternatives and avoid criminal records. We discuss how these outcome differences may reflect not only disparities in options offered by the court, but also in defendants’ choices among them.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE；JEL：D63, J15, J78, K14, K42
papers.zh_title: 相同罪行，不同判决：酒驾罪犯司法结果中的差异
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了被控酒驾者司法结果中的差异，在此情境中，法律上的有罪性由呼气酒精浓度客观确定。聚焦于无加重情节且呼气酒精浓度超过法定阈值的初犯者，我们发现种族、性别和财务资源强烈预测监禁和案件撤销的可能性。社会经济优势较大的被告更有可能获得康复替代方案并避免犯罪记录。我们讨论了这些结果差异如何不仅反映法院提供选项的差异，也反映被告在这些选项中选择的差异。

papers.title: The Price of Intelligence: How Should Socially-minded Firms Price and Deploy AI?
papers.authors: Nils H. Lehr, Pascual Restrepo
papers.abstract: Leading AI firms claim to prioritize social welfare. How should firms with a social mandate price and deploy AI? We derive pricing formulas that depart from profit maximization by incorporating incentives to improve welfare and reduce labor disruptions. Using US data, we evaluate several scenarios. A welfarist firm that values both profit and welfare should price closer to marginal cost, as efficiency gains outweigh distributional concerns. A conservative firm focused on labor-market stability should price above the profit-maximizing level in the short run, especially when its AI may displace low-income workers. Overall, socially minded firms face a trade-off between expanding access to AI and the resulting loss in profits and labor market risks.
papers.zh_title: 智能的代价：社会导向型企业应如何定价和部署人工智能？
papers.zh_abstract: 领先的人工智能公司声称优先考虑社会福利。具有社会使命的企业应如何定价和部署人工智能？我们推导了定价公式，这些公式偏离利润最大化，纳入了改善福利和减少劳动力中断的激励。利用美国数据，我们评估了几种情景。一个同时重视利润和福利的福利主义企业应将价格定得更接近边际成本，因为效率收益超过分配关切。一个专注于劳动力市场稳定的保守型企业应在短期内将价格定得高于利润最大化水平，尤其是当其人工智能可能取代低收入工人时。总体而言，社会导向型企业面临扩大人工智能可及性与由此导致的利润损失和劳动力市场风险之间的权衡。

papers.title: We Won't be Missed: Work and Growth in the AGI World
papers.authors: Pascual Restrepo
papers.abstract: This chapter explores the long-run implications of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) for economic growth and labor markets. AGI makes it feasible to perform all economically valuable work using compute. I distinguish between bottleneck and supplementary work—tasks that are essential versus non-essential for unhindered growth. As computational resources expand: (i) the economy automates all bottleneck work, (ii) some supplementary work may be left exclusively to humans, (iii) output becomes linear in compute and labor and its growth is driven by the expansion of compute, (iv) wages converge to the opportunity cost of computational resources required to reproduce human work, and (v) the share of labor income in GDP converges to zero.
papers.zh_title: 我们不会被怀念：通用人工智能世界中的工作与增长
papers.zh_abstract: 本章探讨了通用人工智能（AGI）对经济增长和劳动力市场的长期影响。AGI使得利用计算资源执行所有具有经济价值的工作成为可能。我将工作区分为瓶颈性工作和补充性工作——即对无阻碍增长而言至关重要与非至关重要的任务。随着计算资源的扩张：（i）经济将自动化所有瓶颈性工作，（ii）部分补充性工作可能完全留给人类完成，（iii）产出与计算和劳动力呈线性关系，其增长由计算资源的扩张驱动，（iv）工资趋近于复制人类工作所需计算资源的机会成本，以及（v）劳动收入占GDP的份额趋近于零。

papers.title: The Value of Banking Relationships
papers.authors: Howard Bodenhorn, Youwei Xing
papers.abstract: Commercial banking is an industry in which long-term, nonexclusive relationships between bankers and their borrowers are governed by short-term contracts. This paper documents the nature of bank-borrower relationships in a historical setting. We use a new dataset of 55,000 loans to 10,000 unique borrowers over 35 years in the mid-nineteenth century. Two-way fixed effects models reveal that a one standard deviation increase in the number of previous loans leads to an increase in loan size by 4.72%. A one-year increase in the duration of a relationship leads to an increase in loan size of 5.6%. Relationships have small effects on loan rates, but substantial effects on collateral. Borrowers with relationships with competing banks receive substantially smaller loans. Propensity score matching reveals that banks learn about borrowers early in the relationship. Finally, the bank severed relationships with about half of the borrowers who defaulted on a loan. A surviving relationship becomes more valuable after default.
papers.zh_title: 银行关系的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 商业银行是一个由短期合同约束银行家与借款人之间长期、非排他性关系的行业。本文在一个历史背景下记录了银行-借款人关系的本质。我们使用了一个包含19世纪中期35年间10000个独特借款人的55000笔贷款的新数据集。双向固定效应模型显示，先前贷款数量每增加一个标准差，贷款规模增加4.72%。关系持续时间每增加一年，贷款规模增加5.6%。关系对贷款利率影响较小，但对抵押品影响显著。与竞争银行有关系的借款人获得的贷款规模显著更小。倾向得分匹配显示，银行在关系早期就了解借款人。最后，银行与大约一半违约借款人断绝了关系。违约后幸存的关系变得更有价值。

papers.title: Political Power and Mortality: Heterogeneous Effects of the U.S. Voting Rights Act
papers.authors: Atheendar Venkataramani, Rourke O'Brien, Elizabeth F. Bair, Christopher A. Lowenstein
papers.abstract: We study the health consequences of redistributing political power through the 1975 extension of the Voting Rights Act, which eliminated barriers to voting for previously disenfranchised nonwhite populations. The intervention led to broad declines in under-five mortality but sharply contrasting effects in other age groups: mortality fell among non-white children, younger adults, and older women, yet rose among whites and older non-white men. These differences cannot be reconciled by changes in population composition or material conditions. Instead, we present evidence suggesting psychosocial stress and retaliatory responses arising from perceived status threat as key mechanisms.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE, POL；JEL：D72, I10, I14, I18, K38, P00
papers.zh_title: 政治权力与死亡率：美国投票权法案的异质性效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了通过1975年《投票权法案》扩展重新分配政治权力对健康的影响，该法案消除了先前被剥夺选举权的非白人人口的投票障碍。这一干预措施导致五岁以下儿童死亡率普遍下降，但在其他年龄组中产生了截然相反的效应：非白人儿童、年轻成年人和老年女性的死亡率下降，而白人和老年非白人男性的死亡率上升。这些差异无法通过人口构成或物质条件的变化来解释。相反，我们提出的证据表明，源于感知地位威胁的心理社会压力和报复性反应是关键机制。

papers.title: The Prestakes of Stock Market Investing
papers.authors: Francesco Bianchi, Do Q. Lee, Sydney C. Ludvigson, Sai Ma
papers.abstract: How rational is the stock market and how efficiently does it process information? We use machine learning to establish a practical measure of rational and efficient expectation formation while identifying distortions and inefficiencies in the subjective beliefs of market participants. The algorithm independently learns, stays attentive to fundamentals, credit risk, and sentiment, and makes abrupt course-corrections at critical junctures. By contrast, the subjective beliefs of investors, professionals, and equity analysts do little of this and instead contain predictable mistakes–prestakes–that are especially prevalent in times of market turbulence. Trading schemes that bet against prestakes deliver defensive strategies with large CAPM and Fama-French 5-factor alphas.
papers.zh_title: 股票市场投资的预赌
papers.zh_abstract: 股票市场有多理性？它处理信息的效率有多高？我们使用机器学习建立了一个衡量理性与有效预期形成的实用指标，同时识别市场参与者主观信念中的扭曲和低效。该算法独立学习，持续关注基本面、信用风险和情绪，并在关键时刻进行突然的路线修正。相比之下，投资者、专业人士和股票分析师的主观信念很少做到这一点，反而包含可预测的错误——预赌——这些错误在市场动荡时期尤为普遍。针对预赌进行反向交易的策略提供了具有较大CAPM和Fama-French五因子阿尔法的防御性策略。

papers.title: An Inverse-Ramsey Tax Rule
papers.authors: Luca Micheletto, Dylan T. Moore, Daniel Reck, Joel Slemrod
papers.abstract: Traditional optimal commodity tax analysis, dating back to Ramsey (1927), prescribes that to maximize welfare one should impose higher taxes on goods with lower demand elasticities. Yet policy makers do not stress minimizing efficiency costs as a desideratum. In this note we revisit the commodity tax problem, and show that the attractiveness of the Ramsey inverse-elasticity prescription can itself be inverted if the tax system is chosen – or at least strongly influenced – by taxpayers who are overly confident of their ability, relative to others, to substitute away from taxed goods.
papers.zh_title: 逆拉姆齐税收规则
papers.zh_abstract: 传统的商品税最优分析，可追溯到拉姆齐（1927），规定为了最大化福利，应对需求弹性较低的商品征收更高的税收。然而，政策制定者并未将最小化效率成本作为首要目标。在本注释中，我们重新审视商品税问题，并表明如果税收体系是由那些对自己（相对于他人）替代应税商品的能力过度自信的纳税人选择——或至少受到强烈影响——那么拉姆齐逆弹性规则本身的吸引力可能会被逆转。

papers.title: Optimal Dual-Regime Business Tax Systems
papers.authors: Rishi R. Sharma, Joel Slemrod, Michael Stimmelmayr, John D. Wilson, Peter Choi
papers.abstract: Dual-regime business tax systems typically subject smaller firms to an output (turnover) tax and larger firms to a profit (corporate) tax. Despite their prevalence, there is little formal analysis of their optimal design. This paper addresses this gap by developing a theoretical framework to analyze the optimal tax parameters and the relative performance of two types of dual-regime systems: threshold and minimum tax systems. We show that either type of dual regime system can yield lower social costs than a single regime system. Using parameter values from recent empirical studies, we also show that a generalized minimum tax system we propose would outperform other dual regime systems under most parameter values. These findings carry important policy implications, particularly as many countries currently employ either threshold or minimum tax systems, but none have yet implemented a generalized minimum tax.
papers.zh_title: 最优双轨制企业税制
papers.zh_abstract: 双轨制企业税制通常对较小企业征收产出（营业额）税，对较大企业征收利润（公司）税。尽管这种制度普遍存在，但对其最优设计的正式分析却很少。本文通过构建一个理论框架来弥补这一空白，分析最优税收参数以及两种双轨制系统——阈值税制和最低税制——的相对表现。我们表明，任何一种双轨制系统都能比单一税制系统产生更低的社会成本。利用近期实证研究的参数值，我们还表明，我们提出的一般化最低税制在大多数参数值下将优于其他双轨制系统。这些发现具有重要的政策含义，特别是考虑到许多国家目前采用阈值税制或最低税制，但尚未有国家实施一般化最低税制。

papers.title: Fraud at a Distance? How Remote Work Shapes Financial Misconduct
papers.authors: John M. Barrios, Jessie Jianwen Guo, Yanping Zhu
papers.abstract: Financial misconduct is often a team activity, facilitated by face-to-face interactions, shared norms, and trust. We exploit the sudden shift to remote work during COVID-19 to examine how workplace organization shapes collusion and financial misconduct. Using a novel firm-level measure of work-from-home feasibility, we find that firms that are more able to operate remotely experienced large post-2020 declines in misconduct. This decline is found across multiple misreporting proxies and is robust to various alternative measures of remote work. Cross-sectional tests indicate stronger declines in teamwork-intensive firms, firms with effective internal controls, and firms with weaker pre-COVID employee perceptions of culture and leadership. Overall, our findings reflect that financial misconduct is a team activity, sensitive to the organizational structure of the firm, with important implications for governance and organizational design.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LE, LS, PR；JEL：D23, G30, G38, G39, J24, K22, M2, M4, M40, M41
papers.zh_title: 远程欺诈？远程工作如何影响金融不当行为
papers.zh_abstract: 金融不当行为通常是一种团队活动，由面对面互动、共享规范和信任所促成。我们利用COVID-19期间突然转向远程工作的变化，来考察工作场所组织如何影响合谋和金融不当行为。使用一种新颖的公司层面远程工作可行性衡量指标，我们发现，更能够远程运营的公司在2020年后经历了不当行为的显著下降。这种下降在多个虚假报告代理变量中均存在，并且对于远程工作的各种替代衡量指标都是稳健的。横截面检验表明，在团队合作密集型公司、内部控制有效的公司以及COVID前员工对文化和领导力感知较弱的公司中，下降更为显著。总体而言，我们的发现反映了金融不当行为是一种团队活动，对公司的组织结构敏感，对治理和组织设计具有重要影响。

papers.title: The International Monetary System in the Last and Next 20 Years Redux
papers.authors: Barry Eichengreen, Raul Razo-Garcia
papers.abstract: In a paper 20 years ago, we analyzed the evolution of the international monetary system over the preceding 20 years and projected its evolution 20 years into the future, on the assumption of unchanged transition probabilities. Here we compare those projections with outcomes and provide new projections, again 20 years into the future. Although the world as a whole has seen financial opening and movement away from intermediate exchange rate regimes, as projected, movement has been slower than projected on the basis of observed transition probabilities in the 20 years preceding our forecast. New projections again based on unchanged transition probabilities but allowing countries to shift between advanced, emerging and developing country groupings and reclassifying exchange rate regimes to accord with current practice again suggest that policy regimes will be modestly different in 2045 than today. There will be a continued decline in intermediate exchange rate arrangements, and gains for hard pegs, as emerging markets move in this direction, and for more freely floating rates, driven by developing countries. There will be a further increase in the share of countries with open capital accounts, driven by emerging markets and developing countries.
papers.zh_title: 过去与未来20年的国际货币体系再探
papers.zh_abstract: 在20年前的一篇论文中，我们分析了此前20年国际货币体系的演变，并在假设转移概率不变的情况下，预测了其未来20年的演变。在此，我们将这些预测与结果进行比较，并再次提供未来20年的新预测。尽管整个世界如预测般经历了金融开放和远离中间汇率制度，但基于我们预测前20年观察到的转移概率，实际变化速度慢于预测。基于不变转移概率但允许国家在发达、新兴和发展中国家组别之间移动，并根据当前实践重新分类汇率制度的新预测再次表明，2045年的政策制度将与今天略有不同。中间汇率安排将继续减少，硬盯住汇率将增加（由新兴市场推动），更自由浮动的汇率也将增加（由发展中国家推动）。由新兴市场和发展中国家推动，资本账户开放国家的比例将进一步上升。

papers.title: Ideology in Government: Evidence from the Office of Indian Affairs and the Assimilation Era
papers.authors: Eric Chyn, Kareem Haggag, Christian Maruthiah
papers.abstract: This paper studies the ideology of government officials and coercive policymaking by examining the Office of Indian Affairs, an institution that held broad authority over the land, education, and legal governance of Indigenous populations in the United States. We digitize the detailed reports of the agency's bureaucrats and use computational tools to measure the strength of their support for assimilationist policies during the 19th and early 20th centuries. We document major shifts in ideological commitments that coincide with the entry—and eventual exit—of social reformers nominated for high-level agency positions by religious organizations. We find that ideology within the bureaucracy appears to moderate around the turn of the century despite the organization's overall continued pursuit of major assimilation policies, such as the promotion of farming and enrollment in off-reservation Indian boarding schools. To examine performance implications of ideology within the bureaucracy, we conclude with an analysis of policy implementation after the passage of the Dawes Act, a landmark law that aimed to dismantle collective land holdings. We provide evidence showing that the agencies with local staff who express greater past commitment to assimilationist goals carried out more land redistribution immediately after Dawes became law.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D73, J15, M5, N41
papers.zh_title: 政府中的意识形态：来自印第安事务局与同化时代的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过研究印第安事务局（一个对美国原住民的土地、教育和法律治理拥有广泛权力的机构）来考察政府官员的意识形态与强制性政策制定。我们将该机构官僚的详细报告数字化，并使用计算工具来衡量他们在19世纪和20世纪初对同化主义政策的支持强度。我们记录了意识形态承诺的重大转变，这些转变与宗教组织提名担任高级机构职位的社会改革者的进入——以及最终退出——相吻合。我们发现，尽管该组织总体上继续推行主要的同化政策，例如推广农业和招收原住民进入保留地外的印第安寄宿学校，但官僚机构内部的意识形态似乎在世纪之交趋于温和。为了考察官僚机构内部意识形态对绩效的影响，我们最后分析了《道斯法案》（一项旨在瓦解集体土地所有权的里程碑式法律）通过后的政策实施情况。我们提供的证据表明，在《道斯法案》成为法律后，那些当地工作人员对同化主义目标表现出更强过往承诺的机构，执行了更多的土地重新分配。

papers.title: Fast Action for Floods: RCT Evidence on Forecast-based Cash Transfers from Bangladesh and Nepal
papers.authors: Paul J. Christian, Felipe A. Dunsch, Jonas Heirman, Erin M. Kelley, Florence Kondylis, Gregory Lane, Jennifer Waidler, Nidhila Adusumalli, Odbayar Batmunkh, Kriti Malhotra
papers.abstract: As increasingly frequent extreme weather events disrupt lives, institutions are turning to early-warning systems and advance preparation to accelerate aid delivery. We present evidence from a randomized controlled trial in Bangladesh and Nepal testing whether providing cash within days of a flood leads to greater benefits than delivering the same assistance months later—or if it simply shifts the timing of benefits without improving overall welfare. Results suggest that timely cash assistance leads to overall gains in food security and psychosocial well-being. This evidence supports efforts to forecast crises and release disaster relief quickly.
papers.zh_title: 洪水快速行动：来自孟加拉国和尼泊尔基于预报的现金转移的随机对照试验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 随着日益频繁的极端天气事件扰乱人们的生活，各机构正转向早期预警系统和预先准备以加速援助交付。我们提供了来自孟加拉国和尼泊尔的一项随机对照试验的证据，该试验测试了在洪水发生数天内提供现金是否比数月后提供相同援助带来更大的益处——或者仅仅是改变了受益的时间而不改善整体福利。结果表明，及时的现金援助在粮食安全和心理健康方面带来了整体改善。这一证据支持了预测危机并迅速发放救灾物资的努力。

papers.title: The Coasean Singularity? Demand, Supply, and Market Design with AI Agents
papers.authors: Peyman Shahidi, Gili Rusak, Benjamin S. Manning, Andrey Fradkin, John J. Horton
papers.abstract: AI agents—autonomous systems that perceive, reason, and act on behalf of human principals—are poised to transform digital markets by dramatically reducing transaction costs. This chapter evaluates the economic implications of this transition, adopting a consumer-oriented view of agents as market participants that can search, negotiate, and transact directly. From the demand side, agent adoption reflects derived demand: users trade off decision quality against effort reduction, with outcomes mediated by agent capability and task context. On the supply side, firms will design, integrate, and monetize agents, with outcomes hinging on whether agents operate within or across platforms. At the market level, agents create efficiency gains from lower search, communication, and contracting costs, but also introduce frictions such as congestion and price obfuscation. By lowering the costs of preference elicitation, contract enforcement, and identity verification, agents expand the feasible set of market designs but also raise novel regulatory challenges. While the net welfare effects remain an empirical question, the rapid onset of AI-mediated transactions presents a unique opportunity for economic research to inform real-world policy and market design.
papers.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：D47, D83, J44, K20, L15, L86, O33
papers.zh_title: 科斯奇点？人工智能代理的需求、供给与市场设计
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能代理——代表人类委托人进行感知、推理和行动的自主系统——有望通过大幅降低交易成本来改变数字市场。本章评估了这一转变的经济影响，采用以消费者为导向的视角，将代理视为能够直接搜索、谈判和交易的市场参与者。从需求侧看，代理的采用反映了派生需求：用户在决策质量与减少努力之间进行权衡，结果由代理能力和任务背景调节。在供给侧，企业将设计、整合代理并从中获利，结果取决于代理是在平台内还是跨平台运作。在市场层面，代理通过降低搜索、沟通和签约成本带来效率提升，但也引入了拥堵和价格混淆等摩擦。通过降低偏好揭示、合同执行和身份验证的成本，代理扩展了市场设计的可行集，但也引发了新的监管挑战。虽然净福利效应仍是一个实证问题，但人工智能中介交易的迅速兴起为经济研究提供了独特机会，以指导现实世界的政策和市场设计。

papers.title: Welfare Implications of Increased Retailer Participation in SNAP
papers.authors: Anne T. Byrne, Xiao Dong, Jessie Handbury, Erik James, Katherine Meckel, Andrés C. Rovira
papers.abstract: Governments often rely on private vendors to deliver in-kind benefits, yet little is known about how vendor participation affects markets and welfare. We study a sharp rise in retailer participation in the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) during the Great Recession, driven largely by non-grocer formats. Linking administrative, retail, and household data, we find that sales increased 6% and variety 4% at adopting stores, with no price effects and only modest spillovers to local competitors. A revealed-preference framework shows that, while consumers value adoption at some chains, overall welfare gains for SNAP households were modest-equivalent to a 1.8% reduction in travel costs-with little effect on non-SNAP households.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, IO, PE；JEL：D12, H53, I38, L81
papers.zh_title: 增加零售商参与补充营养援助计划的福利影响
papers.zh_abstract: 政府通常依赖私营供应商提供实物福利，但关于供应商参与如何影响市场和福利，人们知之甚少。我们研究了在大衰退期间，补充营养援助计划（SNAP）中零售商参与率的急剧上升，这主要由非杂货店业态推动。通过关联行政、零售和家庭数据，我们发现，采用该计划的商店销售额增长了6%，品种增加了4%，没有价格效应，对当地竞争对手的溢出效应也较小。一个显示性偏好框架表明，虽然消费者重视某些连锁店的参与，但SNAP家庭的总体福利收益适中——相当于旅行成本降低1.8%——对非SNAP家庭几乎没有影响。

papers.title: Is Video Watching Bad for Kids? The Effect of Video Watching on Children's Skills
papers.authors: Carolina Caetano, Gregorio S. Caetano, Débora Mazetto, Meghan Skira
papers.abstract: This paper documents video consumption among school-aged children in the U.S. and explores its impact on human capital development. Video watching is common across all segments of society, yet surprisingly little is known about its developmental consequences. With a bunching identification strategy, we find that an additional hour of daily video consumption has a negative impact on children’s noncognitive skills, with harmful effects on both internalizing behaviors (e.g., depression) and externalizing behaviors (e.g., social difficulties). We find a positive effect on math skills, though the effect on an aggregate measure of cognitive skills is smaller and not statistically significant. These findings are robust and largely stable across most demographics and different ways of measuring skills and video watching. We find evidence that for Hispanic children, video watching has positive effects on both cognitive and noncognitive skills—potentially reflecting its role in supporting cultural assimilation. Interestingly, the marginal effects of video watching remain relatively stable regardless of how much time children spend on the activity, with similar incremental impacts observed among those who watch very little and those who watch for many hours.
papers.zh_title: 看视频对孩子有害吗？视频观看对儿童技能的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了美国学龄儿童的视频消费情况，并探讨了其对人力资本发展的影响。视频观看在社会各阶层都很普遍，但令人惊讶的是，对其发展后果知之甚少。通过一个聚集识别策略，我们发现，每天额外一小时的视频消费对儿童的非认知技能有负面影响，对内化行为（如抑郁）和外化行为（如社交困难）均有不利影响。我们发现对数学技能有积极影响，但对认知技能综合指标的影响较小且统计上不显著。这些发现是稳健的，并且在大多数人口统计特征以及衡量技能和视频观看的不同方式上基本稳定。我们发现，对于西班牙裔儿童，视频观看对认知和非认知技能都有积极影响——这可能反映了其在支持文化同化中的作用。有趣的是，无论儿童花多少时间在视频观看上，其边际效应都保持相对稳定，在观看时间很少和观看时间很长的儿童中观察到的增量影响相似。

papers.title: Does Public Health Insurance Cause Crowding Into Public Facilities and Informality? The Case of Seguro Popular
papers.authors: Janet Currie, Lucy G. Hackett, Fernanda Marquez-Padilla
papers.abstract: Many low and middle-income countries are working to expand health insurance to previously uncovered people by creating health insurance programs intended for low-income people who would otherwise lack insurance coverage. Two concerns have been raised about these programs. First, people may be “crowded out” of private facilities and into public ones, increasing public expense and possibly degrading care through crowding. Second, public insurance could encourage informality by reducing the gap in compensation between formal sector and informal sector workers. We examine these questions in the context of Mexico’s Seguro Popular (SP) using longitudinal administrative data on childbirth. We focus on women with more than one observed birth and ask how SP affects the choice of provider for those whose first observed birth was in a public hospital, a private hospital, or a separate system of hospitals serving formal sector workers. We also look at how SP affects the utilization of care and newborn health. Because SP enrollment is endogenous, we instrument it using the rollout of a second program, SMSXXI, that provided health care for young children and enrolled other family members in SP. We find that the expansion of SMSXXI increased SP coverage of pregnant women. This in turn led to a higher probability of delivering in a public hospital, especially among those who had previously delivered in a private hospital. We find little impact of SP enrollment on the utilization of care or newborn health, with the notable exception that women who previously delivered in a private hospital were more likely to start prenatal care in the first trimester when they switched to SP, indicating a greater willingness to seek preventive care when it is free.
papers.zh_title: 公共医疗保险是否导致向公共设施拥挤和非正规就业？以大众保险为例
papers.zh_abstract: 许多中低收入国家正致力于通过创建针对低收入人群的医疗保险计划来扩大医疗保险覆盖范围，这些人群原本没有保险。对这些计划提出了两个担忧。首先，人们可能被“挤出”私人设施而进入公共设施，增加公共支出并可能因拥挤而降低护理质量。其次，公共保险可能通过缩小正规部门与非正规部门工人之间的薪酬差距来鼓励非正规就业。我们在墨西哥大众保险（SP）的背景下，利用关于分娩的纵向行政数据来研究这些问题。我们重点关注有多次分娩记录的妇女，并询问SP如何影响那些首次分娩在公立医院、私立医院或为正规部门工人服务的独立医院系统的妇女的提供者选择。我们还考察了SP如何影响护理利用和新生儿健康。由于SP注册是内生的，我们使用第二个计划SMSXXI的推广作为工具变量，该计划为幼儿提供医疗保健并将其他家庭成员注册到SP。我们发现，SMSXXI的扩张增加了孕妇的SP覆盖率。这反过来又导致在公立医院分娩的可能性更高，尤其是在那些以前在私立医院分娩的妇女中。我们发现SP注册对护理利用或新生儿健康几乎没有影响，但有一个显著的例外：以前在私立医院分娩的妇女在转向SP后，更有可能在妊娠早期开始产前护理，这表明当预防性护理免费时，她们更愿意寻求。

papers.title: Affordable Housing During Childhood Improves Long-term Outcomes of Women and their Children
papers.authors: Janet Currie, Jessica Van Parys
papers.abstract: The Low Income Housing Tax Credit (LIHTC) Program is the largest federal affordable housing program in the U.S. Yet, little is known about its impacts on children and families. This paper shows how LIHTC exposure during childhood affects women’s health outcomes in early-adulthood, as well as the health of their infants. Using geocoded Florida Natality data for 1980-2024 and addresses for LIHTC units we study women born to mothers without any college education between 1980-1999. We use a matching model to compare women born into Census tracts that receive LIHTC during their childhoods to women born into Census tracts without LIHTC during their childhoods. These women and their infants are then observed in adulthood when they first give birth in Florida. We find that a standard deviation increase in childhood LIHTC exposure improves the maternal health index and the infant health index by a small but statistically significant 0.007 standard deviations, and improves an index of maternal SES by 0.005 standard deviations. Given that the average treated tract in our sample has only 0.023 LIHTC units per resident, there is considerable room for increasing exposure. LIHTC exposure during childhood improves outcomes the most for Black women, consistent with Black women being more likely to live in LIHTC units, and also more likely to live in Census tracts that receive LIHTC.
papers.zh_title: 童年时期的经济适用房改善女性和其子女的长期结果
papers.zh_abstract: 低收入住房税收抵免（LIHTC）计划是美国最大的联邦经济适用房计划。然而，对其对儿童和家庭的影响知之甚少。本文展示了童年时期接触LIHTC如何影响女性成年早期的健康结果，以及其婴儿的健康状况。利用1980-2024年佛罗里达州的地理编码出生数据和LIHTC单元的地址，我们研究了1980-1999年间由未接受过大学教育的母亲所生的女性。我们使用匹配模型，将童年时期出生在接收LIHTC的人口普查区的女性与童年时期出生在未接收LIHTC的人口普查区的女性进行比较。这些女性和她们的婴儿随后在成年后首次在佛罗里达州分娩时被观察。我们发现，童年时期LIHTC接触量每增加一个标准差，孕产妇健康指数和婴儿健康指数会小幅但统计上显著地提高0.007个标准差，并使孕产妇社会经济地位指数提高0.005个标准差。鉴于我们样本中平均处理过的人口普查区每名居民仅有0.023个LIHTC单元，增加接触量的空间相当大。童年时期接触LIHTC对黑人女性的结果改善最大，这与黑人女性更有可能居住在LIHTC单元中，也更有可能居住在接收LIHTC的人口普查区中的情况一致。

papers.title: Path Dependence in the Labor Market: The Long-run Effects of Early Career Occupational Experience
papers.authors: Jesse Bruhn, Jacob Fabian, Luke Gallagher, Matthew Gudgeon, Adam Isen, Aaron R. Phipps
papers.abstract: We study the causal effect of different early career occupational experiences on labor market outcomes. To do so, we pair over two decades of administrative tax data with internal personnel records from one of the largest employers of young adults in the United States: the US Army. Enlistees work in a diverse and varied set of occupations, including non-combat roles like mechanics, legal services, financial specialists, cooks, dental hygienists, police officers, and network/computer specialists. Occupational eligibility is determined by test score cutoffs which we leverage in a series of 35 regression discontinuity designs. We find that a typical early career occupational experience generates a substantial amount of path dependence, with point estimates that suggest a 19p.p. increase in the likelihood of being observed in an identical or closely related occupation as much as 20 years later. The corresponding impact of different occupations on earnings are highly heterogeneous, yet predictable: long-run changes in the average earnings of the occupations applicants are pushed into, and pulled out-of, can explain over 60% of the causal variation across cutoffs, with point estimates that suggest improvements in occupational earnings premia translate dollar-for-dollar into economic success. Taken together, our results highlight the importance of early career occupational experience as a key channel for promoting long-run well-being among young adults who are not college bound.
papers.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：J20, J24, J3, J38, J4, J45
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场的路径依赖：早期职业生涯职业经历的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了不同早期职业生涯职业经历对劳动力市场结果的因果效应。为此，我们将超过二十年的行政税收数据与美国最大的年轻成年人雇主之一——美国陆军——的内部人事记录配对。入伍者在多样且不同的职业中工作，包括非战斗角色，如机械师、法律服务、财务专家、厨师、牙科保健员、警察以及网络/计算机专家。职业资格由测试分数截止点决定，我们在35个断点回归设计中利用这一点。我们发现，典型的早期职业生涯职业经历会产生大量的路径依赖，点估计表明，在长达20年后，被观察到从事相同或密切相关职业的可能性增加了19个百分点。不同职业对收入的相应影响高度异质，但可预测：申请人被推入和拉出的职业的平均收入的长期变化可以解释跨截止点因果变异的60%以上，点估计表明职业收入溢价的改善会一对一地转化为经济成功。总之，我们的结果强调了早期职业生涯职业经历作为促进非大学背景年轻成年人长期福祉的关键渠道的重要性。

papers.title: The Implications of Sorting for Immigrant Wage Assimilation and Changing Cohort Quality in Canada
papers.authors: Steven F. Lehrer, Luke Rawling
papers.abstract: Immigrant integration is a central issue in policy debates, with wage assimilation serving as a key indicator of immigrants’ economic success. Using matched employer–employee data from Canada, we study how access to higher-paying firms affects the economic assimilation of immigrants. Immigrants are disproportionately concentrated in lower-paying firms, accounting for much of the observed inequality. Nearly half of this sorting occurs across industries, and both firm- and industry-level wage gaps stagnate after eight years, suggesting that further assimilation reflects human capital accumulation rather than improved firm access. Importantly, these disparities persist after controlling for estimates of worker skill, indicating barriers to high-paying firms rather than differences in human capital. The analysis further shows that Canada’s post-2015 immigration policy reforms significantly improved immigrant outcomes: the initial wage gap narrowed by 25–35%, with roughly half of the improvement attributable to better allocation into higher-paying firms. Taken together, the findings highlight the critical role of firm sorting and its interaction with immigration policy in shaping the economic integration of immigrants.
papers.zh_title: 分类对加拿大移民工资同化与队列质量变化的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 移民融合是政策辩论中的核心问题，工资同化是衡量移民经济成功的关键指标。利用加拿大匹配的雇主-雇员数据，我们研究了进入高薪企业如何影响移民的经济同化。移民不成比例地集中在低薪企业，这解释了观察到的很大一部分不平等。这种分类近一半发生在行业间，企业和行业层面的工资差距在八年后停滞不前，表明进一步的同化反映了人力资本积累，而非企业准入的改善。重要的是，在控制工人技能估计值后，这些差距仍然存在，表明存在进入高薪企业的障碍，而非人力资本差异。分析进一步表明，加拿大2015年后的移民政策改革显著改善了移民结果：初始工资差距缩小了25-35%，其中约一半的改善归因于更好地分配到高薪企业。总之，研究结果强调了企业分类及其与移民政策的相互作用在塑造移民经济融合中的关键作用。

papers.title: The Mortgage Debt Channel of Monetary Policy when Mortgages are Liquid
papers.authors: Matthew Elias, Christian Gillitzer, Greg Kaplan, Gianni La Cava, Nalini V. Prasad
papers.abstract: We examine what is widely considered to be one of the strongest channels of monetary policy transmission into household spending – the effect of changes in mortgage payments when mortgage rates are linked to the short-term policy rate. Using bank transactions data from Australia, we analyze a cumulative 425 basis point increase in the central bank policy rate, which caused mortgage repayments for homeowners with adjustable-rate mortgages to increase by $13,800. We find little change in the spending of adjustable-rate mortgagors relative to fixed rate mortgagors. This is because adjustable-rate mortgages come with redraw facilities that make mortgages liquid, and households had large excess buffers due to pandemic-era transfer programs and restrictions on spending. Our findings demonstrate that the direct effects of a monetary policy tightening on household spending need not be large.
papers.zh_title: 抵押贷款流动性条件下的货币政策抵押贷款债务渠道
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了被广泛认为是货币政策传导至家庭支出最强渠道之一——当抵押贷款利率与短期政策利率挂钩时，抵押贷款还款变化的影响。利用澳大利亚的银行交易数据，我们分析了央行政策利率累计上调425个基点的情况，这导致浮动利率抵押贷款持有者的抵押贷款还款额增加了13,800美元。我们发现，与固定利率抵押贷款持有者相比，浮动利率抵押贷款持有者的支出变化很小。这是因为浮动利率抵押贷款附带再提取功能，使抵押贷款具有流动性，并且由于疫情时期的转移支付计划和支出限制，家庭拥有大量超额缓冲。我们的研究结果表明，货币政策紧缩对家庭支出的直接影响不一定很大。

papers.title: Optimizing Retirement Financial Strategies: Integrating Annuities, Defined Contribution Plans, and Long-Term Care Costs
papers.authors: Vanya Horneff, Raimond Maurer, Olivia S. Mitchell, Julius Odenbreit
papers.abstract: Nursing home costs in the United States now exceed $100,000 per year, and government assistance programs such as Medicaid help out only when retirees are largely destitute. Moreover, health shocks driving the need for such care can arise suddenly in old age, are frequently permanent in nature, and can be associated with declining mental and physical abilities. These facts raise the important question of how households can best prepare to finance this final phase of life. Building on past research, we determine how retirees should manage payouts from defined contribution plans to balance trade-offs between consumption and health care cost shocks, using both retirement plan assets and annuitization. Our analysis explicitly integrates the role of taxes, required minimum distributions, bequest motives, and the possibility of retiree insolvency. We conclude that payout annuities, especially deferred and variable annuities, can be quite valuable for retirees, even when they face health shocks in later life.
papers.zh_title: 优化退休财务策略：整合年金、固定缴款计划与长期护理成本
papers.zh_abstract: 美国养老院护理成本现已超过每年10万美元，而医疗补助等政府援助计划仅在退休人员几乎身无分文时提供帮助。此外，导致此类护理需求的健康冲击可能在老年时突然出现，通常具有永久性，并可能与身心能力下降相关。这些事实提出了一个重要问题：家庭如何最好地准备为生命的最后阶段提供资金。在以往研究的基础上，我们确定了退休人员应如何管理固定缴款计划的支出，以平衡消费与医疗成本冲击之间的权衡，同时利用退休计划资产和年金化。我们的分析明确整合了税收、最低分配要求、遗赠动机以及退休人员破产可能性的作用。我们得出结论，即使退休人员在晚年面临健康冲击，支付年金，尤其是递延年金和可变年金，对他们来说也相当有价值。

papers.title: The Economic Impact of Brexit
papers.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Philip Bunn, Paul Mizen, Pawel Smietanka, Gregory Thwaites, Sasha Abrahams
papers.abstract: This paper examines the impact of the UK's decision to leave the European Union (Brexit) in 2016. Using a decade of data since the referendum, we combine estimates using macro data with estimates using micro data collected through our Decision Maker Panel survey. These suggest that by the end of 2025 Brexit had reduced UK GDP by 6% to 8%, with the impact accumulating steadily over time. We estimate that investment was reduced by 12% to 13%, employment by 3% to 4% and productivity by 3% to 4%. These negative impacts reflect a combination of elevated uncertainty, reduced demand, diverted management time, and increased misallocation of resources from a protracted Brexit process. Comparing these with contemporary forecasts shows that these forecasts were relatively accurate in the short to medium term, but they underestimated the impact over a decade.
papers.zh_title: 英国脱欧的经济影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了英国2016年决定脱离欧盟（英国脱欧）的影响。利用公投后近十年的数据，我们将基于宏观数据的模拟与通过我们的决策者小组调查收集的微观数据估计相结合。这些估计表明，到2025年，英国脱欧使英国GDP减少了6%至8%，其影响随时间逐渐累积。我们估计，投资减少了12%至18%，就业减少了3%至4%，生产率下降了3%至4%。这些巨大的负面影响反映了不确定性上升、需求减少、管理层时间被占用以及长期脱欧过程导致资源错配加剧的综合作用。将这些结果与当时的预测进行比较——这提供了一个罕见的宏观案例，以补充新兴的社会科学预测微观文献——表明这些预测在五年期内是准确的，但它们低估了十年期的影响。

papers.title: Restrictive Marriage Migration Policies and Family Outcomes
papers.authors: So Yoon Ahn, Darren Lubotsky
papers.abstract: As cross-border marriages rise, many governments have tightened rules on who can marry across borders, often in the name of promoting integration. Cross-border couples tend to have high divorce rates, which hinders successful assimilation. This paper provides the first evidence on how restrictive marriage migration policies affect family outcomes of migrants. We exploit a 2014 reform in South Korea that introduced pre-entry requirements for marriage visas, with language proficiency as the key component. Using rich administrative and survey data, we show that the reform led to a sharp temporary decline in cross-border marriages, improved migrants’ language skills, and increased educational attainment among both migrants and their Korean spouses. Comparing marriage cohorts immediately before and after the reform cutoff date, we find that cumulative divorce rates fell by 37% in the first 12 months and by 12% in the first 48 months, primarily due to language-based selection rather than demographic factors. Our evidence indicates that improved communication enhanced marital surplus and highlights the potential positive impact of selective admission policies that target civil and cultural assimilation.
papers.zh_title: 限制性婚姻移民政策与家庭结果
papers.zh_abstract: 随着跨境婚姻的增加，许多政府收紧了跨境婚姻的规定，通常以促进融合为名。跨境夫妇的离婚率往往较高，这阻碍了成功的同化。本文首次提供了限制性婚姻移民政策如何影响移民家庭结果的证据。我们利用了韩国2014年的一项改革，该改革引入了婚姻签证的入境前要求，语言能力是其中的关键组成部分。利用丰富的行政和调查数据，我们表明该改革导致跨境婚姻急剧暂时下降，提高了移民的语言技能，并增加了移民及其韩国配偶双方的教育程度。比较改革截止日期前后立即结婚的群体，我们发现累计离婚率在头12个月内下降了37%，在头48个月内下降了12%，这主要是由于基于语言的选择而非人口因素。我们的证据表明，改善的沟通增加了婚姻剩余，并突显了针对公民和文化融合的选择性准入政策的潜在积极影响。

papers.title: Branching Out: Capital Mobility and Long-Run Growth
papers.authors: Sarah Quincy, Chenzi Xu
papers.abstract: We study the long-run effects of the first wave of U.S. banking market integration on capital mobility and manufacturing productivity. Using newly digitized bank and branch balance sheet data matched to state and county panels, we provide direct evidence that branching produced lasting productivity gains without aggregate capital deepening by leveraging internal capital markets to improve the geographic allocation of capital. Our novel ``deposit market access'' measure shows that bank funding grew most in capital-constrained counties within branching states. Both market access and border discontinuity designs indicate that branching’s organizational structure reduced capital allocation frictions to generate persistent growth.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, EFG；JEL：G21, G28, N12, N22
papers.zh_title: 向外拓展：资本流动性与长期增长
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国银行业市场整合第一波浪潮对资本流动性和制造业生产率的长期影响。利用新数字化的银行和分行资产负债表数据，并与州和县面板数据匹配，我们提供了直接证据，表明分行制通过利用内部资本市场改善资本的地理配置，在不导致总体资本深化的前提下产生了持久的生产率提升。我们新颖的“存款市场准入”指标显示，在实行分行制的州内，资本受限县的银行资金增长最多。市场准入和边界不连续性设计均表明，分行制的组织结构减少了资本配置摩擦，从而产生了持续增长。

papers.title: The Consequences of Faculty Sexual Misconduct
papers.authors: Sarah R. Cohodes, Katherine B. Leu
papers.abstract: Faculty sexual misconduct targeted at students is a widespread problem. The consequences of such incidents include direct harm to victims and may also entail a loss to science if students who encounter misconduct become discouraged from continuing their studies in their chosen field. We link publicly available information on degree completion by institution, academic field, and gender to a database of faculty sexual misconduct incidents verified in the media or court cases covering the years from 1983 to 2023. Then, we employ a stacked event study approach to document the extent to which publicly reported faculty sexual misconduct decreases in-field degree completion. Exposure to a field-specific faculty sexual misconduct public report decreases degree completion in that field by 4.7 percent four years after the incident. This decline is driven by reports occurring in 2015 and after, among which we observe a 7.9 percent decline in in-field degree completion. Students exit majors dominated by men, but this shift has little effect on predicted earnings because students shift away from both high- and low-earning majors.
papers.zh_title: 教师性行为不端的后果
papers.zh_abstract: 针对学生的教师性行为不端是一个普遍存在的问题。此类事件的后果包括对受害者的直接伤害，也可能导致科学损失，如果遭遇不端行为的学生因气馁而不再继续在其所选领域学习。我们将按机构、学术领域和性别划分的学位完成公开信息与1983年至2023年间经媒体或法庭案件核实的教师性行为不端事件数据库相关联。然后，我们采用堆叠事件研究方法，记录公开报道的教师性行为不端在多大程度上减少了领域内的学位完成。接触特定领域的教师性行为不端公开报告，会使该领域四年后的学位完成率下降4.7%。这种下降是由2015年及之后发生的报告驱动的，在这些报告中，我们观察到领域内学位完成率下降了7.9%。学生退出男性主导的专业，但这种转变对预测收入影响甚微，因为学生从高收入和低收入专业中都有转移。

papers.title: Then and Now: A Look Back and Ahead at the Federal Budget
papers.authors: Alan J. Auerbach, William Gale
papers.abstract: It is well-understood that the U.S. faces an unsustainable fiscal future. We review historical budget trends and basic fiscal processes. We provide new estimates of the budget outlook, incorporating the recently enacted One Big Beautiful Bill Act (OBBBA), and finding that the debt-GDP ratio will rise to 183% in 2054 under the OBBBA as legislated and to 199% if the temporary tax and spending provisions are made permanent. These figures compare to a current debt-GDP ratio of about 100% and a pre-OBBBA CBO analysis earlier this year that projected the 2054 debt-GDP ratio to be 154%. We estimate a fiscal gap – the permanent tax or spending changes needed to keep the 2054 debt-GDP ratio at its current level – to be about 3.4% of GDP if OBBBA is extended. We discuss the economic and political ramifications of debt and different ways to address the fiscal situation.
papers.zh_title: 今昔对比：回顾与展望联邦预算
papers.zh_abstract: 众所周知，美国面临着不可持续的财政未来。我们回顾了历史预算趋势和基本财政过程。我们提供了预算前景的新估计，纳入了最近颁布的《一项大而美丽的法案》（OBBBA），发现根据立法通过的OBBBA，债务-GDP比率将在2054年升至183%，如果临时税收和支出条款永久化，则升至199%。这些数字与当前约100%的债务-GDP比率以及今年早些时候国会预算办公室（CBO）预测2054年债务-GDP比率为154%的分析形成对比。我们估计，如果OBBBA延期，将债务-GDP比率维持在2054年当前水平所需的永久性税收或支出变化（即财政缺口）约为GDP的3.4%。我们讨论了债务的经济和政治影响，以及解决财政状况的不同方式。

papers.title: Does Regulation Distort Exit Decisions? Evidence from U.S. Power Plants
papers.authors: Lucas W. Davis, Paige E. Weber
papers.abstract: Hundreds of power plants have closed in the United States since 2010, including 130+ gigawatts of coal and 50+ gigawatts of natural gas. In this paper, we highlight the potential for regulation to distort this type of exit decision. Using generator-level data from 2010–2023, we show that regulated units have been 45% less likely to exit than unregulated units. For unregulated units, exit decisions are made based on wholesale electricity prices, ongoing capital costs, and other traditional economic factors. In contrast, owners of regulated units are largely insulated from these factors and, in some cases, have a strong incentive to continue operating capital-intensive equipment. Previous work documents how this regulatory distortion affects investment decisions. Our paper emphasizes that these same incentives affect exit decisions as well.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO；JEL：D24, L94, Q41, Q48, Q54
papers.zh_title: 监管会扭曲退出决策吗？来自美国发电厂的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 自2010年以来，美国已有数百座发电厂关闭，包括超过130吉瓦的燃煤电厂和超过50吉瓦的天然气电厂。在本文中，我们强调了监管可能扭曲此类退出决策的可能性。利用2010年至2023年的发电机级数据，我们表明受监管机组的退出可能性比未受监管机组低45%。对于未受监管机组，退出决策基于批发电价、持续资本成本和其他传统经济因素。相比之下，受监管机组的业主在很大程度上不受这些因素的影响，并且在某些情况下，有强烈的动机继续运营资本密集型设备。先前的研究记录了这种监管扭曲如何影响投资决策。我们的论文强调，这些相同的激励措施也影响退出决策。

papers.title: Present Bias and Discount Rate Risk
papers.authors: Lars A. Lochstoer, Stig R. H. Lundeby, Zhaneta K. Tancheva
papers.abstract: Recent evidence in the psychology literature suggests that individuals' degree of present bias varies with the state of nature and increases under stress. Consistent with this notion, we document, using survey data on individuals’ expected and realized consumption growth, that agents indeed tend to overconsume relative to their expectations and that the degree of such overconsumption is higher in bad times. We analyze the asset pricing implications of this bias and show that even if they control a small fraction of wealth, investors with time-varying degree of present bias cause substantial, priced discount rate risks that have first-order impact on the level and time-variation of asset risk premiums. The mechanism is distinct from that of models with time-varying preference parameters and that of models with biased expectations about aggregate outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 现时偏向与贴现率风险
papers.zh_abstract: 心理学文献的最新证据表明，个体的现时偏向程度会随自然状态的变化而变化，并在压力下加剧。与此观点一致，我们利用关于个体预期和实际消费增长的调查数据记录到，代理人确实倾向于过度消费（相对于其预期），且这种过度消费的程度在经济不景气时更高。我们分析了这种偏误对资产定价的影响，并表明，即使只控制一小部分财富，具有时变现时偏向程度的投资者也会导致显著的、被定价的贴现率风险，这些风险对资产风险溢价水平及其时变性具有一阶影响。该机制不同于具有时变偏好参数的模型，也不同于对总体结果存在偏误预期的模型。

papers.title: The Effects of Immigration Enforcement on Student Outcomes in a New Era of Immigration Policy in the United States
papers.authors: David N. Figlio, Umut Özek
papers.abstract: This study presents the first evidence, to our knowledge, of the effects of the surge in interior immigration apprehensions in 2025 in the United States on student academic performance using detailed student-level administrative records from Florida. We find evidence that immigration enforcement reduced test scores for both U.S.-born and foreign-born Spanish-speaking students while also reducing the likelihood that these students are involved in disciplinary incidents in schools. Both of these effects are more pronounced for students in middle and high schools.
papers.zh_title: 美国移民执法新时代对学生学业成果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究利用佛罗里达州详细的学生层面行政记录，首次提供了关于2025年美国境内移民逮捕激增对学生学业成绩影响的证据。我们发现，移民执法降低了美国出生和外国出生的西班牙语学生的考试成绩，同时也降低了这些学生卷入学校纪律事件的可能性。这两种效应在初中和高中学生中更为显著。

papers.title: People versus Places: Elite Persistence after the Fall of the Ming
papers.authors: Carol H. Shiue, Wolfgang Keller
papers.abstract: We study how elite power persisted through the Ming–Qing transition in Central China. Using genealogical microdata on married couples and their descendants, linked to measures of local elite influence, we estimate the effects of the Ming collapse (1368–1644) on families (people) and on regions (places). A family line-level treatment and control approach shows that elites experienced an immediate loss of influence, but their descendants recovered and consolidated elite status under the Qing (1644–1911). In contrast, a region-level design indicates that areas more heavily exposed to Ming-collapse destruction suffered persistent adverse outcomes. Evidence on career choice is consistent with a trauma-induced shift toward civil service examination careers, with stronger intergenerational transmission of exam-oriented norms in families more exposed to destruction. The results document adaptive persistence of elite families despite regime change, alongside lasting regional scarring, and highlight the role of cultural transmission in the persistence of elite status.
papers.zh_title: 人还是地：明朝覆灭后的精英持续性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了精英权力如何在中国中部的明清更替中持续存在。利用关于已婚夫妇及其后代的族谱微观数据，并结合地方精英影响力的衡量指标，我们估算了明朝覆灭（1368-1644）对家族（人）和区域（地）的影响。一个家族谱系层面的处理与对照方法表明，精英们经历了影响力的即时丧失，但其后代在清朝（1644-1911）下恢复并巩固了精英地位。相比之下，一个区域层面的设计表明，受明朝覆灭破坏更严重的地区遭受了持续的不利后果。关于职业选择的证据与一种创伤引发的向科举职业转变相一致，并且在遭受破坏更多的家族中，以考试为导向的规范存在更强的代际传递。结果记录了尽管政权更迭，精英家族仍具有适应性的持续性，同时伴随着持久的区域创伤，并强调了文化传递在精英地位持续性中的作用。

papers.title: Demand Elasticity in Dynamic Asset Pricing
papers.authors: Zhiguo He, Péter Kondor, Jessica S. Li
papers.abstract: Standard demand elasticity estimation treats investors' demand slopes as stable objects that can be traced out by exogenous residual supply shifts. We show this identification strategy fails in dynamic settings: supply shocks cause demand curves to tilt and shift through general equilibrium effects. The mechanism is intuitive—investors' demand depends on the entire distribution of current and future returns, including volatility, covariances, and correlations with investment opportunities. Supply shocks that change today's prices inevitably reshape future return distributions, moving the demand curve itself. We develop and calibrate a dynamic model to quantify this mismeasurement. The measured slope is approximately 40% of its conceptual counterpart, implying that demand curves are substantially steeper than estimated. This distortion operates through two channels: endogenous risk (altered volatility and covariances) and amplified intertemporal hedging (changed correlation with investment opportunities). The distortion remains sizable even for infinitesimal or purely transitory shocks.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IO, ME；JEL：D50, E10, G10, G11
papers.zh_title: 动态资产定价中的需求弹性
papers.zh_abstract: 标准的需求弹性估计将投资者的需求斜率视为稳定的对象，可以通过外生的剩余供给变动来刻画。我们表明这种识别策略在动态设定中失效：供给冲击通过一般均衡效应导致需求曲线倾斜和移动。该机制是直观的——投资者的需求取决于当前和未来回报的整个分布，包括波动率、协方差以及与投资机会的相关性。改变当前价格的供给冲击不可避免地重塑了未来的回报分布，从而移动了需求曲线本身。我们开发并校准了一个动态模型来量化这种测量误差。测得的斜率大约是其概念对应物的40%，这意味着需求曲线比估计的要陡峭得多。这种扭曲通过两个渠道运作：内生风险（改变的波动率和协方差）和放大的跨期对冲（改变与投资机会的相关性）。即使对于无穷小或纯粹暂时的冲击，这种扭曲仍然显著。

papers.title: From Asia, With Skills
papers.authors: Gaurav Khanna
papers.abstract: This paper examines the rise of high-skill migration from Asia to the United States over the past three decades and its consequences for both sending and receiving economies. Between 1990 and 2019, migrants from five Asian countries—India, China, South Korea, Japan, and the Philippines—accounted for over one-third of the growth in US software developers and a quarter of the increase in scientists, engineers, and physicians. Drawing on census microdata, visa records, and administrative sources, I show how US demand for talent in information technology, higher education, and healthcare interacted with Asia’s demographic and educational transformations to generate this migration boom. Policy reforms (notably the H-1B, F-1, and J-1 visa programs) and sectoral shifts—such as the internet revolution, declining public support for universities, and aging-related healthcare demand—created persistent needs for foreign students and workers. Asian economies were uniquely positioned to meet this demand through rapid tertiary expansion, strong STEM institutions, English proficiency, and diaspora networks. These inflows boosted US innovation, entrepreneurship, and service-sector productivity while fostering “brain gain” and “brain circulation” in Asia. Together, these trends reveal how talent flows from Asia have become central to the structure and growth of the modern US economy.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS, PR；JEL：J24, J60, O34
papers.zh_title: 来自亚洲，带着技能
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了过去三十年间从亚洲到美国的高技能移民的兴起及其对输出和接收经济体的影响。在1990年至2019年间，来自五个亚洲国家——印度、中国、韩国、日本和菲律宾——的移民占美国软件开发人员增长的三分之一以上，以及科学家、工程师和医生增长的四分之一。利用人口普查微观数据、签证记录和行政来源，我展示了美国对信息技术、高等教育和医疗保健领域人才的需求如何与亚洲的人口和教育变革相互作用，从而引发了这场移民热潮。政策改革（特别是H-1B、F-1和J-1签证项目）以及部门性转变——例如互联网革命、对大学公共支持的减少以及与老龄化相关的医疗保健需求——创造了对外国学生和工人的持续需求。亚洲经济体通过快速的高等教育扩张、强大的STEM机构、英语熟练度和侨民网络，处于满足这一需求的独特位置。这些流入促进了美国的创新、创业和服务业生产率，同时在亚洲催生了“人才流入”和“人才循环”。这些趋势共同揭示了来自亚洲的人才流动如何成为现代美国经济结构和增长的核心。

papers.title: Probability Pricing
papers.authors: Eduardo Dávila, Cecilia Parlatore, Ansgar Walther
papers.abstract: This paper develops probability pricing, extending cash flow pricing to quantify the willingness-to-pay for changes in probabilities. We show that the value of any marginal change in probabilities can be expressed as a standard asset-pricing formula with hypothetical cash flows derived from changes in the survival function. This equivalence between probability and cash flow valuation allows us to construct hedging strategies and systematically decompose individual and aggregate willingness-to-pay. Four applications examine the valuation of changes in the distribution of aggregate consumption, the efficiency effects of varying performance precision in principal-agent problems, and the welfare implications of public and private information.
papers.zh_title: 概率定价
papers.zh_abstract: 本文发展了概率定价，将现金流定价扩展为量化对概率变化的支付意愿。我们表明，任何边际概率变化的价值都可以表示为一个标准的资产定价公式，其中包含从生存函数变化中推导出的假设性现金流。这种概率估值与现金流估值之间的等价性使我们能够构建对冲策略，并系统地分解个体和总体的支付意愿。四个应用分别考察了总消费分布变化的价值评估、委托代理问题中绩效精度变化的效率效应，以及公共和私人信息的福利含义。

papers.title: The Roots of the Modern American Presidential Campaign
papers.authors: Francisco Pino, Laura Salisbury
papers.abstract: Campaign tours have become an essential component of U.S. presidential elections. How and when did they begin? We explore the early history of in-person political campaigning in the United States by reconstructing the first presidential campaign tours from historical newspaper clippings. We analyze the decision to campaign, the determinants of where candidates campaigned, and the outcomes of early in-person campaigns. We document an evolving norm of campaigning. This norm evolved well after the expansion of the railroad network. While a national railroad network was a necessary precondition for campaigning to evolve, our findings point to other factors – such as growing urbanization and the decline of federal patronage machines – playing a more important role in the growth of campaigning. We find evidence that being visited on a campaign tour increased voter turnout in a county. However, we do not find a clear effect of campaign visits of a given candidate on his electoral performance.
papers.zh_title: 现代美国总统竞选活动的根源
papers.zh_abstract: 竞选巡回演讲已成为美国总统选举的重要组成部分。它们是如何以及何时开始的？我们通过从历史报纸剪报中重建首次总统竞选巡回演讲，探讨了美国面对面政治竞选的早期历史。我们分析了竞选决策、候选人选择竞选地点的决定因素，以及早期面对面竞选的结果。我们记录了一种不断演变的竞选规范。这种规范是在铁路网络扩张之后很久才演变的。虽然全国性的铁路网络是竞选活动演变的必要前提，但我们的发现指向其他因素——例如日益增长的城市化和联邦赞助机器的衰落——在竞选活动的增长中发挥了更重要的作用。我们发现，一个县被竞选巡回演讲访问会增加选民投票率。然而，我们没有发现特定候选人的竞选访问对其选举表现有明确的影响。

papers.title: Investor Beliefs and Expectation Formation
papers.authors: Stefano Giglio, Matteo Maggiori, Joachim Rillo, Johannes Stroebel, Stephen P. Utkus, Xiao Xu
papers.abstract: This article reviews the literature that uses survey data to study expectation formation among investors. We begin by outlining methods for eliciting investor beliefs and summarizing key empirical patterns documented in recent work. Highlighting the persistent cross-sectional heterogeneity in expectations, we then review evidence on the determinants of beliefs, including a new analysis of belief reactions to the tariff announcement in April 2025. Next, we examine how expectations shape financial decision-making, emphasizing the systematic but muted sensitivity of outcomes to belief changes. We conclude by pointing to promising directions for future research on belief measurement, the determinants of expectations, and their implications for policymakers.
papers.zh_title: 投资者信念与预期形成
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了利用调查数据研究投资者预期形成的文献。我们首先概述了引出投资者信念的方法，并总结了近期工作中记录的关键实证模式。在强调预期中持续的横截面异质性后，我们接着回顾了关于信念决定因素的证据，包括对2025年4月关税公告后信念反应的新分析。接下来，我们考察了预期如何塑造金融决策，强调了结果对信念变化的系统性但微弱的敏感性。最后，我们指出了关于信念测量、预期决定因素及其对政策制定者含义的未来研究的有前景方向。

papers.title: Minimum Wages and Informality
papers.authors: Ellora Derenoncourt, François Gerard, Lorenzo Lagos, Claire Montialoux
papers.abstract: How do minimum wages affect informality? We study the near-doubling of the real minimum wage from 2000 to 2009 in Brazil, where 46% of the workforce is informal. Using labor force surveys covering the informal sector, we show the minimum wage exhibits near full passthrough to informal employees working in formal firms, about half of all informal employees. The formal-to-informal reallocation elasticity with respect to the formal-wage is small: -0.28. Our findings illustrate how minimum wages can positively affect living standards for workers thought beyond the reach of labor law, a sizable share of the workforce in developing economies.
papers.zh_title: 最低工资与非正规就业
papers.zh_abstract: 最低工资如何影响非正规就业？我们研究了巴西2000年至2009年实际最低工资近乎翻倍的情况，当时该国46%的劳动力处于非正规就业状态。利用覆盖非正规部门的劳动力调查数据，我们发现最低工资几乎完全传导至在正规企业工作的非正规雇员——这类雇员约占所有非正规雇员的一半。正规就业向非正规就业的再分配弹性相对于正规工资而言较小，为-0.28。我们的研究结果说明了最低工资如何能够积极改善那些被认为超出劳动法覆盖范围的工人的生活水平，这些工人在发展中经济体的劳动力中占有相当大的比例。

papers.title: Artificial Intelligence, Competition, and Welfare
papers.authors: Susan Athey, Fiona Scott Morton
papers.abstract: We propose a policy-relevant research agenda examining how market power in up-stream artificial intelligence (AI) affects downstream prices, industry structure, factor returns, and welfare—especially whether labor-displacing AI leaves workers worse off. In our open-economy general equilibrium model, AI is a priced, imported input. Our main model features two nontraded sectors and firms making discrete adoption decisions about technology. Adoption reduces unit costs, displaces some types of workers, and depresses wages for those workers via diminishing returns elsewhere, while leaking AI fees abroad. We identify conditions under which market power in AI leads to a “double harm” for displaced workers, who may experience real wages cuts when AI becomes available at low prices, and then experience further harm from increases in AI prices. Strategic AI pricing reduces welfare by raising downstream marginal costs (via usage fees) and limiting entry and variety (via access fees). We derive an adoption frontier linking feasible usage fees to displaced workers’ outside options, showing that a monopolist typically makes use of both types of fees and prices on the frontier; capping one fee shifts rents to the other. Regulating both fees, alongside policies that absorb displaced labor, can raise national welfare.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能、竞争与福利
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一项具有政策相关性的研究议程，考察上游人工智能（AI）市场势力如何影响下游价格、产业结构、要素回报和福利——特别是劳动力替代型AI是否会使工人境况恶化。在我们的开放经济一般均衡模型中，AI是一种有定价的进口投入品。我们的主要模型包含两个非贸易部门，企业就技术采用做出离散决策。采用技术会降低单位成本，替代某些类型的工人，并通过其他部门的边际收益递减压低这些工人的工资，同时将AI费用转移至国外。我们识别出AI市场势力导致被替代工人遭受“双重损害”的条件：当AI以低价可得时，这些工人可能经历实际工资削减，随后AI价格上涨又会带来进一步损害。战略性AI定价通过提高下游边际成本（通过使用费）和限制进入与品种（通过接入费）来降低福利。我们推导出一个采用前沿，将可行的使用费与被替代工人的外部选择联系起来，表明垄断者通常会在前沿上同时使用两种费用并定价；限制一种费用会将租金转移到另一种费用上。对两种费用进行监管，同时配合吸收被替代劳动力的政策，可以提高国民福利。

papers.title: Breaking Parity: Equilibrium Exchange Rates and Currency Premia
papers.authors: Mai C. Dao, Pierre-Olivier Gourinchas, Oleg Itskhoki
papers.abstract: We offer a unifying empirical model of covered and uncovered currency premia, interest rates and spot and forward exchange rates, both in the cross section and time series of currencies. We find that the rich empirical patterns are in line with a partial equilibrium model of the currency market, where hedged and unhedged currency is supplied by intermediary banks subject to value-at-risk balance-sheet constraints, emphasizing the frictional nature of equilibrium currency premia and exchange rate dynamics. In the cross section, the excess supply of local-currency savings is the key determinant of low relative interest rates, negative covered and uncovered currency premia, cheap forward dollars; and vice versa. In the time series, covered currency premia change infrequently and in concert across currencies, driven by aggregate financial market conditions. In contrast, uncovered currency premia move frequently in response to currency-specific demand shocks, which we capture with the dynamics of net currency futures positions of dealer banks. Exchange rate depreciations in response to negative shifts in currency demand are followed by small persistent appreciations that generate predictable expected returns necessary to ensure intermediation of currency demand shocks, irrespective of their financial or macroeconomic origin. Changes in net futures positions of dealer banks account for most of the variation in the spot exchange rate for every currency.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E4, F3, G12
papers.zh_title: 打破平价：均衡汇率与货币溢价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了一个统一的实证模型，涵盖套期保值和非套期保值的货币溢价、利率以及即期和远期汇率，既包括货币的横截面维度也包括时间序列维度。我们发现，丰富的实证模式与货币市场的局部均衡模型一致，在该模型中，套期保值和未套期保值的货币由面临风险价值资产负债表约束的中介银行提供，这强调了均衡货币溢价和汇率动态的摩擦性质。在横截面上，本币储蓄的超额供给是低相对利率、负的套期保值和非套期保值货币溢价以及廉价远期美元的关键决定因素；反之亦然。在时间序列上，套期保值货币溢价变化不频繁且跨货币协同变化，由总体金融市场状况驱动。相比之下，非套期保值货币溢价频繁变动，以响应特定货币的需求冲击，我们通过交易商银行净货币期货头寸的动态来捕捉这一点。汇率因货币需求负面冲击而贬值后，会跟随小幅的持续性升值，从而产生可预测的预期回报，这对于确保货币需求冲击的中介化是必要的，无论其源于金融还是宏观经济因素。交易商银行净期货头寸的变化解释了每种货币即期汇率的大部分变动。

papers.title: Motives and Constraints in the Implementation of Argentina’s 2017 Tax Reform
papers.authors: Santiago Afonso, Sebastian Galiani
papers.abstract: This paper examines the motives, constraints, and sequencing behind Argentina’s 2017 tax reform, drawing on the authors’ direct involvement in its design and implementation.
