We find that investors actively acquire information about suspended stocks held by mutual funds, driving flows into underpriced funds. This information is subsequently incorporated into stock prices when trading resumes. Our findings suggest that mutual fund liquidity creation stimulates information acquisition about illiquid, information-sensitive assets.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G11, G12, G14, G15, G23
papers.zh_title: 共同基金投资者的信息获取：来自股票交易暂停的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 共同基金通过发行可随时赎回的权益份额同时持有非流动性证券，为投资者创造流动性。我们通过考察中国频繁的交易暂停来研究这种流动性创造的影响，交易暂停暂时消除了受影响股票的市场流动性。这些暂停由于对其非流动性持仓估值不准确而导致共同基金显著错误定价。我们发现，投资者积极获取关于共同基金持有的暂停股票的信息，推动资金流入被低估的基金。当交易恢复时，这些信息随后被纳入股票价格。我们的发现表明，共同基金的流动性创造刺激了对非流动性、信息敏感资产的信息获取。

papers.title: Marijuana Legalization and Suicides Among Older Adults
papers.authors: Sara Markowitz, Katie E. Leinenbach
papers.abstract: Suicide rates among older adults have been rising over time in the United States. At the same time, more individuals have been suffering with chronic pain and illness, which are often underlying risk factors for suicide. As self-medication with marijuana has become common, we ask whether access to legal marijuana for medical and recreational purposes reduces suicides rates among older individuals. We find that suicide rates among older age groups decline following the opening of recreational marijuana dispensaries, especially among older Whites, and middle-aged White males and females with low levels of education.
papers.zh_title: 大麻合法化与老年人自杀
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国，老年人的自杀率随着时间的推移一直在上升。与此同时，越来越多的人遭受慢性疼痛和疾病的困扰，这通常是自杀的潜在风险因素。随着使用大麻自我治疗变得普遍，我们探究为医疗和娱乐目的获得合法大麻是否能降低老年人的自杀率。我们发现，在娱乐性大麻药房开业后，老年人群的自杀率下降，尤其是在老年白人、以及教育水平较低的中年白人男性和女性中。

papers.title: Unanticipated Effects of Electronic Benefits Transfer on WIC Stores and Redemptions: Evidence from Administrative Data on Vendors
papers.authors: Charlotte E. Ambrozek, Timothy K. Beatty, Marianne P. Bitler, Xinzhe H. Cheng, Matthew P. Rabbitt
papers.abstract: We evaluate the effects of the nationwide transition in the Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children (WIC) from paper vouchers to Electronic Benefit Transfer (EBT) cards on store decisions to seek authorization to accept WIC benefits. We combine novel administrative data from “The Integrity Profile” (USDA administrative data on stores participating in WIC and their WIC reimbursements) with new nationwide policy data on WIC EBT implementation. Using a staggered adoption difference-in-differences approach, we find that the transition had heterogeneous and occasionally unanticipated effects across states. The number of WIC authorized independent vendors declined 10% following WIC EBT implementation. We find no significant effect of WIC EBT implementation on WIC redemptions in a subset of ZIP Codes with sufficient vendors for data sharing. Vendors in states that were early adopters of WIC EBT have more negative effects on the probability of WIC authorization, which may be due to learning effects or improvements in technology over time. Past experience with EBT implementation by financial services providers hired by states to help them implement WIC EBT processing (processors) reduces the magnitude of these negative effects of EBT implementation on store participation in WIC.
papers.zh_title: 电子福利转账对WIC商店和兑换的意外影响：来自供应商行政数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了妇女、婴儿和儿童特殊补充营养计划（WIC）从纸质凭证向电子福利转账（EBT）卡的全国性转型，对商店寻求授权接受WIC福利决策的影响。我们将来自“诚信档案”（美国农业部关于参与WIC的商店及其WIC报销的行政数据）的新颖行政数据与关于WIC EBT实施的全国性新政策数据相结合。采用交错采用的双重差分方法，我们发现这种转型在各州产生了异质性且偶尔是意外的影响。在WIC EBT实施后，获得WIC授权的独立供应商数量下降了10%。在供应商数量足以共享数据的部分邮政编码区域，我们发现WIC EBT实施对WIC兑换没有显著影响。早期采用WIC EBT的州的供应商，其WIC授权概率受到的负面影响更大，这可能是由于学习效应或技术随时间改进所致。各州为帮助实施WIC EBT处理而聘请的金融服务提供商（处理商）过去的EBT实施经验，降低了EBT实施对商店参与WIC的这些负面影响的程度。

papers.title: A Sufficient Statistics Approach to Optimal Corporate Taxes
papers.authors: Dustin L. Swonder, Damián Vergara
papers.abstract: This paper characterizes the equity–efficiency tradeoff of corporate taxation using a stylized model that draws on the corporate investment and tax incidence literatures. We derive benchmark optimal corporate tax formulas in terms of estimable reduced-form elasticities and welfare weights on workers and firm owners. The elasticity of taxable profits is a sufficient statistic for the efficiency costs of the corporate tax. Higher corporate tax rates are desirable when firm owners have low welfare weights, and less desirable when taxing profits reduces wages. These empirical objects remain central across model extensions, including worker- and firm-level heterogeneity, endogenous occupations, shared firm ownership, tax sheltering, international capital mobility, productivity externalities, monopsony, and linear labor income taxes. We survey the empirical literature and find that existing estimates can support a wide range of optimal tax rates. A quantitative analysis identifies combinations of welfare weights that rationalize the current US 21% corporate tax rate as optimal and provides alternative numerical benchmarks for optimal corporate tax rates.
papers.zh_title: 最优企业税的充分统计量方法
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用一个借鉴企业投资和税收归宿文献的简化模型，刻画了企业税在公平与效率之间的权衡。我们根据可估计的简化形式弹性以及工人和企业所有者的福利权重，推导出最优企业税公式。尽管大量实证研究强调投资反应，但这些弹性并不出现在最优税公式中。应税利润的弹性是企业税效率成本的充分统计量。当企业所有者的福利权重较低时，较高的企业税率是可取的；而当对利润征税降低工资时，较高的企业税率则不那么可取。这些实证对象在扩展情形中仍然至关重要，包括异质性生产技术、税收庇护、国际资本流动、买方垄断以及线性劳动所得税。我们梳理了实证文献，发现现有估计可以支持一个广泛的最优税率区间。一项逆最优分析提供了工人和企业所有者福利权重的组合，这些组合能够将2017年后美国企业税削减合理化视为最优。

papers.title: Ambiguity vs. Risk in Investment Decisions: An Illustration from Green Finance
papers.authors: Caroline Flammer, Thomas Giroux, Geoffrey Heal, Marcella Lucchetta
papers.abstract: Does ambiguity (Knightian uncertainty) or risk provide a greater discouragement to investment? There is general agreement in the financial press that uncertainty discourages investment, with uncertainty here meaning any situation where important future policy variables (such as tariffs or tax rates) are not known. And it seems intuitively plausible that situations of ambiguity are “more uncertain” than those of risk: under risk, although the outcome is not known, its expected value is, whereas under ambiguity we have a distribution of possible expected values. In this paper we show that under quite general circumstances ambiguity deters investment more than an equivalent risk. We show that there will always be investments opportunities that are rejected when characterized by ambiguity but are accepted when characterized by risk with an equivalent compound lottery, and that the converse is not true: there are no investments that would be made under ambiguity that would not be made under equivalent risk. We develop the analysis in the context of the emerging field of green finance.
papers.zh_title: 投资决策中的模糊性与风险：来自绿色金融的例证
papers.zh_abstract: 模糊性（奈特不确定性）与风险，哪一个对投资的抑制作用更大？金融媒体普遍认为不确定性会抑制投资，这里的不确定性指的是重要未来政策变量（如关税或税率）未知的任何情形。直观上，模糊性情境似乎比风险情境“更不确定”：在风险下，尽管结果未知，但其期望值是已知的；而在模糊性下，我们面对的是一系列可能的期望值分布。本文表明，在相当普遍的情况下，模糊性比等价的更抑制投资。我们证明，总存在一些投资机会，在模糊性特征下被拒绝，但在具有等价复合彩票的风险特征下被接受；反之则不成立：不存在任何在模糊性下会被进行、而在等价风险下却不会被进行的投资。我们在新兴的绿色金融领域背景下展开分析。

papers.title: Moving to Fluidity: Regional Growth and Labor Market Churn
papers.authors: Eran B. Hoffmann, Monika Piazzesi, Martin Schneider
papers.abstract: This paper studies the connection between regional growth trends and labor market dynamics. New data on manufacturing worker flows for U.S. cities 1969-1981 show more new hires and more voluntary quits in growing cities, but more forced layoffs in shrinking cities. Recessions are special in growing cities in that hires and quits drop, whereas in shrinking cities layoffs rise. A quantitative business cycle model with migration and on-the-job search accounts for a large share of variation in growth and worker flows both over time and across space. Growing cities in the South and West had low job creation costs and only gradual in-migration, so tight labor markets encouraged more on-the-job search. In those cities, aggregate job destruction shocks generated recessions with lower labor market churn. In the shrinking cities of the Rust Belt, in contrast, churn was always low and responded little in recessions.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：E30, E32, J62, J63, J64, R11, R12, R13
papers.zh_title: 迈向流动性：区域增长与劳动力市场流动
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究区域增长趋势与劳动力市场动态之间的联系。1969-1981年美国城市制造业工人流动的新数据显示，增长中的城市有更多的新招聘和自愿离职，而萎缩中的城市则有更多的强制裁员。在增长中的城市，经济衰退的特殊之处在于招聘和离职减少，而在萎缩中的城市，裁员增加。一个包含迁移和在职搜寻的定量商业周期模型，解释了增长和工人流动在时间上和空间上的大部分变异。南部和西部增长中的城市具有较低的就业创造成本和仅逐步的迁入，因此紧张的劳动力市场鼓励更多的在职搜寻。在这些城市，总就业破坏冲击导致衰退时劳动力市场流动降低。相比之下，在铁锈地带的萎缩城市，流动始终较低，并且在衰退中反应甚微。

papers.title: Good Data and Bad Data: The Welfare Effects of Price Discrimination
papers.authors: Maryam Farboodi, Nima Haghpanah, Ali Shourideh
papers.abstract: We study how a monopolist’s use of consumer data for price discrimination affects welfare. To answer this question, we develop a model of market segmentation subject to residual uncertainty. We fully characterize when data usage monotonically increases or decreases welfare or when the effect is non-monotone. The characterization reduces the problem to one with only two demand curves, and gives a condition for the two-demand-curves case that highlights that information affects welfare in three distinct ways. In the non-monotone case, we provide tight bounds on the welfare effects of information and identify the best local direction for providing additional information.
papers.zh_title: 好数据与坏数据：价格歧视的福利效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究垄断者利用消费者数据进行价格歧视如何影响福利。为回答这个问题，我们构建了一个面临剩余不确定性的市场细分模型。我们完整刻画了数据使用何时单调地增加或减少福利，或者何时效应是非单调的。该刻画将问题简化为仅涉及两条需求曲线的情形，并为两条需求曲线情形给出了一个条件，该条件凸显了信息以三种不同方式影响福利。在非单调情形下，我们给出了信息福利效应的紧界，并识别了提供额外信息的最佳局部方向。

papers.title: The Impacts of Guaranteed Basic Income on Crime Perpetration and Victimization
papers.authors: Mikko Aaltonen, Martti Kaila, Emily E. Nix
papers.abstract: This paper provides the first experimental evidence on the impact of providing a guaranteed basic income on criminal perpetration and victimization. We analyze a nationwide randomized controlled trial that provided 2,000 unemployed individuals in Finland with an unconditional monthly payment of 560 Euros for two years (2017-2018), while 173,222 comparable individuals remained under the existing social safety net. Using comprehensive administrative data on police reports and district court trials, we estimate precise zero effects on criminal perpetration and victimization. Point estimates are small and statistically insignificant across all crime categories. Our confidence intervals rule out reductions in perpetration of 5 percent or more for crime reports and 10 percent or more for criminal charges.
papers.zh_title: 保障基本收入对犯罪实施与受害的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于提供保障基本收入对犯罪实施和受害影响的首次实验证据。我们分析了一项全国性随机对照试验，该试验向芬兰2000名失业者提供了为期两年（2017-2018年）每月560欧元的无条件支付，而173,222名可比个体仍处于现有社会安全网之下。利用关于警方报告和地区法院审判的全面行政数据，我们估计出对犯罪实施和受害的精确零效应。所有犯罪类别的点估计值都很小且统计上不显著。我们的置信区间排除了犯罪报告减少5%或更多以及刑事指控减少10%或更多的可能性。

papers.title: Africa as a Success Story: Political Organization in Pre-Colonial Africa
papers.authors: Soeren J. Henn, James A. Robinson
papers.abstract: We provide an overview of the explanations for the relative lack of state formation historically in Africa. In doing so we systematically document for the first time the extent to which Africa was politically decentralized, calculating that in 1880 there were probably 45,000 independent polities which were rarely organized on ethnic lines. At most 2% of these could be classified as states. We advance a new argument for this extreme political decentralization positing that African societies were deliberately organized to stop centralization emerging. In this they were successful. We point out some key aspects of African societies that helped them to manage this equilibrium. We also emphasize how the organization of the economy was subservient to these political goals.
papers.zh_title: 非洲作为成功案例：前殖民时期非洲的政治组织
papers.zh_abstract: 我们概述了历史上非洲国家形成相对缺乏的解释。在此过程中，我们首次系统地记录了非洲政治分权的程度，计算出在1880年大约有45000个独立政体，这些政体很少按族群界限组织。其中最多只有2%可以被归类为国家。我们为这种极端的政治分权提出了一个新论点，认为非洲社会是有意组织起来以防止中央集权出现的。在这方面，它们是成功的。我们指出了非洲社会的一些关键特征，这些特征帮助它们维持了这种均衡。我们还强调了经济组织是如何服从于这些政治目标的。

papers.title: Delivering Higher Pay? The Impacts of a Task-Level Pay Standard in the Gig Economy
papers.authors: Yuan An, Andrew Garin, Brian K. Kovak
papers.abstract: How does a task-level minimum pay requirement for gig workers affect their earnings and employment? We study this question in the context of a January 2024 law in Seattle that establishes a per-task minimum pay standard for app-based delivery workers. Drawing on novel cross-platform, trip-level gig activity data, we compare earnings and employment trajectories around the implementation of the law for workers who were doing delivery work in Seattle before the reform against workers who had been active in other regions of Washington State. We find that the minimum pay law raised delivery pay per task, though the increases in base pay per task were partially offset by a substantial reduction in average tips, a major component of delivery pay. At the same time, the policy led to a reduction in the number of tasks completed by highly attached incumbent drivers (but not an increase in exit from delivery work), completely offsetting increased pay per task and leading to zero effect on monthly earnings. We find evidence that drivers experienced more unpaid idle time and longer distances driven between tasks, but find no evidence that drivers reduced their total time working on delivery apps and only limited evidence of switching from delivery to ride-hailing work. Using a simple model of the labor market for platform delivery drivers, we show that our evidence is consistent with free entry of drivers into the delivery market driving down the task-finding rate until expected earnings return to their pre-reform level. These findings highlight the challenges of raising pay in spot markets for tasks where there is free entry of workers.
papers.zh_title: 实现更高薪酬？零工经济中任务级薪酬标准的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 针对零工工人的任务级最低薪酬要求如何影响他们的收入和就业？我们在2024年1月西雅图一项法律的背景下研究这个问题，该法律为基于应用程序的配送工人设定了每项任务的最低薪酬标准。利用新颖的跨平台、行程级零工活动数据，我们将改革实施前后在西雅图从事配送工作的工人的收入与就业轨迹，与在华盛顿州其他地区活跃的工人进行了比较。我们发现，最低薪酬法提高了每项任务的配送报酬，尽管每项任务基本报酬的增加被平均小费（配送报酬的主要组成部分）的大幅减少部分抵消。同时，该政策导致高粘性在职司机完成的任务数量减少（但并未增加退出配送工作的比例），完全抵消了每项任务报酬的增加，并对月收入产生了零影响。我们发现证据表明，司机经历了更多无薪空闲时间和任务之间更长的行驶距离，但没有发现司机减少在配送应用上总工作时间的证据，只有有限的证据表明他们从配送工作转向网约车工作。利用一个平台配送司机劳动力市场的简单模型，我们表明我们的证据与司机自由进入配送市场导致任务发现率下降，直到预期收入回到改革前水平的情况一致。这些发现凸显了在工人自由进入的任务现货市场中提高薪酬所面临的挑战。

papers.title: Are E-Cigarette Taxes Losing their Bite?
papers.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Tessie Krishna, Yang Liang, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: The rise in nicotine vaping among U.S. teenagers in the late 2010s prompted tobacco control advocates to press for higher electronic nicotine delivery system (ENDS) taxes to curb their use. This study is the first to explore how the effectiveness of e-cigarette taxation as an anti-vaping policy tool has evolved over time. Using data from several nationally representative data sources and a generalized difference-in-differences approach, we find that since 2020, the effectiveness of a one dollar increase in ENDS taxes in curbing youth nicotine vaping has declined by over 50 percent. This finding is consistent with the marginal youth vaper becoming more tax inelastic over time. Descriptive evidence shows that the composition of youth ENDS users appears to have shifted toward those with a higher addictive stock and a greater taste for risk, which could make youths less tax responsive. For adults, where nicotine vaping rates are stable or slightly rising and compositional shifts are somewhat less pronounced, we find much less evidence that ENDS tax effectiveness has changed over time.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：H71, I12, I18
papers.zh_title: 电子烟税是否正在失去效力？
papers.zh_abstract: 2010年代末美国青少年尼古丁电子烟使用率的上升，促使烟草控制倡导者推动提高电子尼古丁输送系统（ENDS）税以遏制其使用。本研究首次探讨了电子烟税作为反电子烟政策工具的有效性如何随时间演变。利用多个全国代表性数据源的数据和广义双重差分方法，我们发现自2020年以来，每增加一美元ENDS税在遏制青少年尼古丁电子烟使用方面的有效性下降了超过50%。这一发现与边际青少年电子烟用户随时间推移变得对税收更缺乏弹性是一致的。描述性证据表明，青少年ENDS用户的构成似乎已转向那些成瘾存量更高、风险偏好更强的人群，这可能使青少年对税收的反应更不敏感。对于成年人而言，其尼古丁电子烟使用率稳定或略有上升，且构成变化不那么明显，我们发现ENDS税有效性随时间变化的证据要少得多。

papers.title: Waiting for the Right Offer: Laboratory Evidence on How News Affects Bargaining
papers.authors: Tingting Ding, Steven F. Lehrer
papers.abstract: We conduct a series of laboratory experiments that implement the Daley and Green (2020) model to examine whether the gradual, exogenous revelation of sellers’ private information influences the occurrence of trades in a bilateral bargaining setting with a static lemon condition. We find that while information does not increase efficiency, it reduces the likelihood that buyers incur losses when trading with low-quality sellers. Anticipating that additional signals will arrive, buyers hesitate to finalize deals immediately and exhibit a “waiting for news” effect, making sizable offer adjustments only when sufficient positive signals have accumulated. In contrast, informed sellers are less sensitive to news but appear to wait for the offer that they deem acceptable.
papers.zh_title: 等待合适的报价：关于信息如何影响谈判的实验室证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一系列实验室实验，实施了Daley和Green（2020）的模型，以检验在具有静态柠檬问题的双边谈判环境中，卖方私人信息的逐步、外生揭示是否会影响交易的发生。我们发现，虽然信息没有提高效率，但它降低了买方在与低质量卖方交易时遭受损失的可能性。由于预期会有额外信号到达，买方会犹豫是否立即达成交易，并表现出一种“等待消息”效应，只有在积累了足够多的正面信号后才会做出大幅度的报价调整。相比之下，知情的卖方对消息不太敏感，但似乎会等待他们认为可接受的报价。

papers.title: The Effect of Paid Sick Leave Mandates on Individuals with Disabilities: Evidence from Social Security Disability Claims
papers.authors: Anwar Assamidanov, Dhaval M. Dave, Jooyoung Kim, Brandy Lipton, Xuechao Qian, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: Paid sick leave mandates (PSLs), which have been adopted by 18 states and the District of Columbia, require employers to provide regular wages when workers take short-term leave for their own or a family member’s medical needs. This study is the first to explore the effects of PSL adoption on participation in the Supplemental Security Income (SSI) and Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) programs, as well as the health of persons with disabilities. We find that statewide PSLs are associated with a 6-9 percent increase in initial claims for SSI and joint SSI/SSDI benefits. These applications translate to an increase in beneficiaries, strongest among children under age 18. An exploration of the primary mechanisms likely underlying this result reveals PSL-induced (1) increases in time spent offering informal caregiving of those with disabilities, which may reduce the costs of applying to SS(D)I programs, and (2) increases in health care utilization among children with disabilities. Evidence for negative work hours effects of PSLs is weaker, concentrated among spouses of persons with disabilities. Finally, we find that PSL mandates lead to modest improvements in health among both children and adults with disabilities.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：J14, J18
papers.zh_title: 带薪病假强制令对残疾人的影响：来自社会保障残疾索赔的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 带薪病假强制令（PSLs）已被18个州和哥伦比亚特区采纳，要求雇主在工人因自身或家庭成员医疗需求而短期休假时提供正常工资。本研究首次探讨了PSL的采纳对补充保障收入（SSI）和社会保障残疾保险（SSDI）项目参与率以及残疾人健康的影响。我们发现，全州范围的PSLs与SSI及SSI/SSDI联合初始索赔增加6-9%相关。这些申请转化为受益人的增加，在18岁以下儿童中最为显著。对可能构成这一结果主要机制的探索揭示，PSL导致了（1）用于提供非正式残疾人照护的时间增加，这可能降低了申请SS(D)I项目的成本，以及（2）残疾儿童医疗保健利用的增加。PSL对工作小时数产生负面影响的证据较弱，且集中在残疾人的配偶身上。最后，我们发现PSL强制令导致残疾儿童和成人的健康状况均有适度改善。

papers.title: Medicaid Coverage and Postpartum Opioid Use Disorder Treatment
papers.authors: Sumedha Gupta, Yimin Ge, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Matthew D. Eisenberg
papers.abstract: Opioid use disorder (OUD) among pregnant women in the United States has risen more than fourfold since 1999, making substance use a leading cause of maternal mortality. Medicaid finances the majority of births and substance use disorder treatment in the U.S., yet until recently, coverage typically ends 60 days postpartum, potentially disrupting care continuity. The American Rescue Plan of 2021 extends postpartum Medicaid coverage from two months to 12 months, creating a natural experiment to evaluate the impact of coverage on access to medications for OUD (MOUD), the gold-standard treatment. We use linked nationwide all-payer medical and retail pharmacy claims from IQVIA in a difference-in-differences framework comparing postpartum MOUD continuity between Medicaid- and commercially-insured parents with a prenatal history of MOUD use. Extended Medicaid postpartum coverage increases Medicaid-financed MOUD months by 8.55%, the likelihood of continuing MOUD beyond 60 days by 5.12%, and total MOUD supply days by 7.99%. These gains are slightly offset by other payer reductions, yet result in a net 5.10% increase in overall MOUD months and 4.64% rise in treatment adherence. Findings highlight the importance of coverage duration as a practical lever to sustain MOUD treatment in the crucial first year after delivery period.
papers.zh_title: 医疗补助覆盖与产后阿片类药物使用障碍治疗
papers.zh_abstract: 自1999年以来，美国孕妇中阿片类药物使用障碍（OUD）的患病率增长了四倍多，使药物使用成为孕产妇死亡的主要原因。医疗补助资助了美国大多数分娩和物质使用障碍治疗，但直到最近，覆盖范围通常在产后60天结束，这可能会中断护理的连续性。2021年的《美国救援计划》将产后医疗补助覆盖从两个月延长至12个月，创造了一个自然实验来评估覆盖范围对获取OUD药物（MOUD，金标准治疗）的影响。我们利用IQVIA关联的全国性全付款人医疗和零售药房索赔数据，采用双重差分框架，比较了有产前MOUD使用史的医疗补助参保者和商业保险参保者在产后的MOUD连续性。延长产后医疗补助覆盖使医疗补助资助的MOUD月份增加了8.55%，在60天后继续使用MOUD的可能性提高了5.12%，总MOUD供应天数增加了7.99%。这些收益被其他付款人的减少略微抵消，但仍导致总体MOUD月份净增加5.10%，治疗依从性提高4.64%。研究结果强调了覆盖期限作为在产后关键第一年维持MOUD治疗的实用杠杆的重要性。

papers.title: How to Build a Diverse Nation: Lessons from the Indonesian Experience
papers.authors: Samuel Bazzi
papers.abstract: Building a cohesive nation-state amid deep ethnic, linguistic, and religious diversity is a central challenge for many governments. This paper examines the process of nation building, drawing lessons from the remarkable experience of Indonesia over the past century. I discuss conceptual perspectives on nation building and review Indonesia's historical nation-building trajectory. I then synthesize insights from four studies exploring distinct policy interventions in Indonesia---population resettlement, administrative unit proliferation, land reform, and mass schooling---to understand their effects on social cohesion and national integration. Together, these cases underscore the promise and pitfalls of nation-building efforts in diverse societies, offering guidance for future research and policymaking to support these endeavors in Indonesia and beyond.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, PE, POL；JEL：D74, H77, N35, O15, O43, P00, Z13
papers.zh_title: 如何建设一个多元化的国家：来自印度尼西亚经验教训
papers.zh_abstract: 在深刻的种族、语言和宗教多样性中建设一个具有凝聚力的民族国家是许多政府面临的核心挑战。本文考察了国家建设的过程，从印度尼西亚过去一个世纪的非凡经历中汲取教训。我讨论了国家建设的概念视角，并回顾了印度尼西亚的历史国家建设轨迹。然后，我综合了四项研究的见解，这些研究探讨了印度尼西亚不同的政策干预措施——人口迁移、行政单位扩张、土地改革和大众教育——以理解它们对社会凝聚力和国家整合的影响。总之，这些案例强调了在多元社会中国家建设努力的前景与陷阱，为未来支持印度尼西亚及其他地区此类努力的研究和政策制定提供了指导。

papers.title: Moral Regulation and Cultural Production: Evidence from Hollywood
papers.authors: Ruixue Jia, David Strömberg
papers.abstract: Moral regulation is widespread across societies, yet its consequences have seldom been examined empirically. We study the Hays Code (July 1934–1960s), which imposed systematic moral guidelines on American cinema. Using a regression-discontinuity design, with non-U.S. films providing a comparison group, we find that the moral compliance of U.S. films rose sharply after 1935 and remained high for two decades. The Code also reshaped protagonists and political tone: protagonists became less likely to be women or working class, and political tones grew more conservative. Filmmakers adapted both by increasing compliance within genres and by shifting across them: less-compliant Drama declined while more-compliant Western and Action rose. Companies with a larger market size and immigrant film directors exhibited stronger responses. These findings reveal how moral constraint, market, and identity jointly shape cultural production and how well-intentioned moral regulation can generate broad and often unintended spillovers.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LE, POL；JEL：L51, L82, N72, P16, Z11
papers.zh_title: 道德监管与文化生产：来自好莱坞的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 道德监管在社会中普遍存在，但其后果却很少得到实证检验。我们研究了《海斯法典》（1934年7月–1960年代），该法典对美国电影施加了系统的道德准则。利用断点回归设计，并以非美国电影作为对照组，我们发现美国电影的道德合规性在1935年后急剧上升，并持续了二十年高企。《海斯法典》还重塑了主角和政治基调：主角为女性或工人阶级的可能性降低，政治基调变得更加保守。电影制作人通过两种方式适应：在类型片内部提高合规性，以及在类型片之间进行转换——合规性较低的剧情片减少，而合规性较高的西部片和动作片增加。市场份额较大的公司和移民电影导演表现出更强的反应。这些发现揭示了道德约束、市场和身份如何共同塑造文化生产，以及出于善意的道德监管如何产生广泛且往往意想不到的溢出效应。

papers.title: Patient Peer Effects: Evidence from Nursing Home Room Assignments
papers.authors: Alden Cheng, Martin B. Hackmann
papers.abstract: We provide causal evidence that patient peer effects generate mortality impacts comparable to provider quality differences. Drawing on administrative records covering 2.6 million stays (2000–2010) across 7,200 U.S. nursing homes, we exploit plausibly exogenous roommate assignments identified through unique room identifiers. We estimate that assignment to a roommate diagnosed with Alzheimer’s disease (AD) or Alzheimer’s disease related dementias (ADRD), relative to placement in a private room, increases 90-day mortality by 2.1 percentage points (14% of baseline)—equivalent to receiving care at a nursing home one full standard deviation worse in quality. Effects differ sharply by patient type: patients with AD/ADRD benefit substantially from cognitively healthy roommates but not from private rooms, suggesting important peer monitoring and support roles. In contrast, mortality of patients without AD/ADRD does not depend on roommate cognitive health but is reduced in private rooms. A simple assignment rule exploiting this heterogeneity could reduce overall mortality by 0.8 percentage points without additional resources.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, ED, EH, PE；JEL：D62, I11, I12, I18, J14
papers.zh_title: 患者同伴效应：来自养老院房间安排的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了因果证据，表明患者同伴效应产生的死亡率影响可与提供者质量差异相媲美。利用涵盖2000年至2010年间美国7200家养老院260万次住院记录的行政数据，我们通过独特的房间标识符识别出看似外生的室友分配。我们估计，与入住私人房间相比，被分配与诊断为阿尔茨海默病或阿尔茨海默病相关痴呆症的室友同住，会使90天死亡率增加2.1个百分点（占基线的14%），这相当于在质量差整整一个标准差的养老院接受护理。不同患者类型的影响差异显著：患有阿尔茨海默病或阿尔茨海默病相关痴呆症的患者从认知健康的室友中获益颇多，但私人房间并未带来类似益处，这表明了重要的同伴监督和支持作用。相比之下，未患阿尔茨海默病或阿尔茨海默病相关痴呆症的患者的死亡率不依赖于室友的认知健康状况，但在私人房间中有所降低。利用这种异质性的简单分配规则可以在不增加额外资源的情况下将总体死亡率降低0.8个百分点。

papers.title: Financial Returns to Equity Investments in Infrastructure in Emerging-Market and Developing Economies
papers.authors: Anusha Chari, Peter Blair Henry, Yanru Lee, Paolo Mauro
papers.abstract: Despite the scarcity of infrastructure in emerging-market and developing economies (EMDEs), in the absence of readily accessible data on the historical performance of EMDE infrastructure as an asset class, private investors are reluctant to finance infrastructure projects in these countries. We begin to fill this information gap by computing the financial returns from equity investments in primarily unlisted firms in EMDEs made by the International Finance Corporation, the private-sector arm of the World Bank Group. The public market equivalent of 266 equity investments in core infrastructure by the IFC, with starting dates from 1961 to March 2020, was 1.17 using the S&P 500 as a benchmark, and 1.26 using the MSCI Emerging Markets Index. On average, over the past six decades, equity stakes in emerging-market infrastructure backed by the IFC thus delivered higher returns than investments in portfolios of publicly listed equities. Data from the full sample of IFC equity investments reveal that, on average, a diversified portfolio of investments in infrastructure-related sectors, and indeed, in all sectors more generally, generated significant positive financial returns, albeit with variation across decades.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, EFG, IFM, PE；JEL：F21, G11, G24, H54, O16, O19
papers.zh_title: 新兴市场和发展中经济体基础设施股权投资财务回报
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管新兴市场和发展中经济体基础设施匮乏，但由于缺乏关于新兴市场和发展中经济体基础设施作为资产类别历史表现的可轻易获取数据，私人投资者不愿为这些国家的基础设施项目提供融资。我们通过计算世界银行集团私营部门——国际金融公司在新兴市场和发展中经济体中主要对非上市公司的股权投资财务回报，开始填补这一信息空白。以标准普尔500指数为基准，国际金融公司从1961年至2020年3月期间对核心基础设施的266笔股权投资的公开市场等价值为1.17；以摩根士丹利资本国际新兴市场指数为基准，该值为1.26。因此，在过去六十年间，平均而言，由国际金融公司支持的新兴市场基础设施股权投资的回报高于公开上市股票组合的投资。来自国际金融公司全部股权投资样本的数据显示，平均而言，对基础设施相关行业（实际上更广泛地涵盖所有行业）的多元化投资组合产生了显著的正财务回报，尽管各十年间存在差异。

papers.title: Measurement Matters: Financial Reporting and Productivity
papers.authors: John M. Barrios, Brian C. Fujiy, Petro Lisowsky, Michael Minnis
papers.abstract: We examine how differences in financial reporting practices shape firm productivity. Leveraging new audit questions in the U.S. Census Bureau's 2021 Management and Organizational Practices Survey (MOPS), and complementary tax return data from the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) and detailed financial records from Sageworks, we find that (i) variation in reporting quality explains 10--20 percent of intra-industry total factor productivity dispersion, and (ii) evidence of complementarity between the effects of financial audits and management practices driving firm productivity. We then examine the underlying mechanisms. First, audits function as a managerial technology, improving the precision of internal information and raising efficiency, with stronger effects in competitive, low-margin industries and among younger firms. Second, exploiting cross-state variation in tax incentives, we show that audits constrain underreporting and mitigate the downward bias in measured productivity. Together, these results highlight the underrated importance of financial reporting quality driving firm productivity.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PR；JEL：D15, D24, G3, L2, M20, M4, M41, O33
papers.zh_title: 计量至关重要：财务报告与生产率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了财务报告实践的差异如何影响企业生产率。利用美国人口普查局2021年管理与组织实践调查中新增的审计问题，以及美国国税局的纳税申报数据和Sageworks的详细财务记录，我们发现：（i）报告质量的差异解释了行业内全要素生产率离散程度的10%至20%；（ii）有证据表明，财务审计与管理实践对驱动企业生产率的影响存在互补性。接着，我们考察了潜在机制。首先，审计作为一种管理技术，提高了内部信息的精确度并提升了效率，在竞争激烈、低利润率的行业以及较年轻的企业中效果更强。其次，利用各州税收激励的差异，我们表明审计约束了低报行为，并减轻了测量生产率的下行偏差。这些结果共同凸显了财务报告质量在驱动企业生产率方面被低估的重要性。

papers.title: Imputation-Powered Inference for Missing Covariates
papers.authors: Junting Duan, Markus Pelger
papers.abstract: Missing covariate data is a prevalent problem in empirical research. We provide a novel framework for handling missing covariate data for estimation and inference in downstream tasks. Our general framework provides an automatic and easy-to-use pipeline for empirical researchers: First, missing values are imputed using virtually any imputation method under general observation patterns. Second, we automatically correct for the imputation bias and adaptively weight the imputed values according to their quality. Third, we use all available data, including imputed observations, to obtain more precise point estimates for the downstream task with valid confidence intervals. Our approach ensures valid inference while improving statistical efficiency by leveraging all available data. We establish the asymptotic normality of the proposed estimator under general missing data patterns and a broad class of imputation methods. Through simulations, we demonstrate the superior performance of our approach over natural benchmarks, as it achieves both lower bias and variance while being robust to imputation quality. In a comprehensive empirical study of the dependence of equity markets on carbon emissions, we show that properly accounting for missing emissions data yields no evidence of correlation between stock returns and emissions directly produced by companies, but a negative correlation with value chain emissions.
papers.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C01, C1, C10, C12, C14, C19, C5, C53, C55, C58
papers.zh_title: 基于插补的缺失协变量推断
papers.zh_abstract: 缺失协变量数据是实证研究中普遍存在的问题。我们为下游任务中的估计和推断提供了一种处理缺失协变量数据的新框架。我们的通用框架为实证研究人员提供了一条自动且易于使用的流程：首先，在一般观测模式下，使用几乎任何插补方法对缺失值进行插补。其次，我们自动校正插补偏差，并根据插补值的质量对其进行自适应加权。第三，我们利用所有可用数据（包括插补后的观测值），为下游任务获得更精确的点估计和有效的置信区间。我们的方法通过利用所有可用数据来提高统计效率，同时确保有效推断。我们在一般缺失数据模式和广泛的插补方法类别下，建立了所提出估计量的渐近正态性。通过模拟，我们展示了该方法相对于自然基准的优越性能，因为它同时实现了更低的偏差和方差，同时对插补质量具有稳健性。在一项关于股票市场对碳排放依赖性的全面实证研究中，我们表明，恰当处理缺失的排放数据后，没有证据表明股票回报与公司直接产生的排放之间存在相关性，但与价值链排放存在负相关。

papers.title: Trials Avoid High Risk Patients and Underestimate Drug Harms
papers.authors: Jason Abaluck, Leila Agha, Sachin Shah
papers.abstract: The FDA does not formally regulate representativeness, but if trials under-enroll vulnerable patients, the resulting evidence may understate harm from drugs. We study the relationship between trial participation and the risk of drug-induced adverse events for cancer medications using data from the Surveillance, Epidemiology, and End Results Program linked to Medicare claims. Initiating treatment with a cancer drug increases the risk of hospitalization due to serious adverse events (SAEs) by 2 percentage points per month (a 250% increase). Heterogeneity in SAE treatment effects can be predicted by patient’s comorbidities, frailty, and demographic characteristics. Patients at the 90th percentile of the risk distribution experience a 2.5 times greater increase in SAEs after treatment initiation compared to patients at the 10th percentile of the risk distribution yet are 4 times less likely to enroll in trials. The predicted SAE treatment effects for the drug’s target population are 14% larger than the predicted SAE treatment effects for trial enrollees, corresponding to 1 additional induced SAE hospitalization for every 21 patients per year of treatment. We formalize conditions under which regulating representativeness of SAE risk will lead to more externally valid trials, and we discuss how our results could inform regulatory requirements.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE, PR；JEL：C93, I1, O38

papers.title: A Model of the Model: Unpacking CGE Results on Carbon Leakage
papers.authors: Daniel H. Karney, Don Fullerton, Kathy Baylis
papers.abstract: Computational general equilibrium (CGE) models can evaluate detailed tax reforms, trade restrictions, or environmental policy. These models can capture many complexities, but these complexities can make results difficult to interpret. Analytical general equilibrium (AGE) models provide better intuition and interpretation but cannot capture relevant complexities. We propose a method that employs AGE models to understand CGE models – a “model of the model”. We apply this idea to climate policy and carbon leakage – the increase in emissions elsewhere. Our AGE models identify seven key economic determinants of leakage within any one outcome. We then unpack results from three existing CGE models.
papers.zh_title: 模型的模型：解析碳泄漏的可计算一般均衡结果
papers.zh_abstract: 可计算一般均衡模型可以评估详细的税收改革、贸易限制或环境政策。这些模型能够捕捉许多复杂性，但这些复杂性可能使结果难以解释。分析性一般均衡模型提供了更好的直觉和解释，但无法捕捉相关的复杂性。我们提出了一种使用分析性一般均衡模型来理解可计算一般均衡模型的方法——即“模型的模型”。我们将这一想法应用于气候政策和碳泄漏（即其他地方的排放增加）。我们的分析性一般均衡模型识别了任何单一结果中泄漏的七个关键经济决定因素。然后，我们解析了三个现有可计算一般均衡模型的结果。

papers.title: The Innovation Race: Experimental Evidence on Advanced Technologies
papers.authors: Zoë B. Cullen, Ester Faia, Elisa Guglielminetti, Ricardo Perez-Truglia, Concetta Rondinelli
papers.abstract: We present a large-scale field experiment test of strategic complementarities in firms’ technology adoption. Our experiment was embedded in a Bank of Italy survey covering around 3,000 firms. We elicited firms’ beliefs about competitors’ adoption of two advanced technologies: Artificial Intelligence (AI) and robotics. We randomly provided half of the sample with accurate information about adoption rates. Most firms substantially underestimated competitors’ current adoption, and when provided with information, they updated their expectations about competitors’ future adoption. The information increased firms’ own intended future adoption of robotics: a 1 pp increase in the share of competitors expected to adopt advanced technologies causes an increase of 0.735 pp in the firm’s own robotics adoption. We do not observe a significant effect on AI adoption, but we cannot rule out modest effects either. Our findings provide causal evidence on coordination in innovation and illustrate how information frictions shape technology diffusion.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, IO, LS, PE, PR；JEL：C93, D22, L21, O33
papers.zh_title: 创新竞赛：关于先进技术的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们展示了一项关于企业技术采纳中战略互补性的大规模实地实验测试。我们的实验嵌入意大利银行一项涵盖约3000家企业的调查中。我们引出了企业对竞争对手采纳两种先进技术（人工智能和机器人技术）的信念。我们随机向一半样本提供了关于采纳率的准确信息。大多数企业严重低估了竞争对手当前的采纳情况，而在获得信息后，它们更新了对竞争对手未来采纳的预期。该信息增加了企业自身未来采纳机器人技术的意愿：预期采纳先进技术的竞争对手份额每增加1个百分点，企业自身机器人技术采纳率增加0.735个百分点。我们没有观察到对人工智能采纳的显著影响，但也不能排除适度影响的可能性。我们的研究结果为创新中的协调提供了因果证据，并说明了信息摩擦如何塑造技术扩散。

papers.title: Tariffs on Medical Goods: Pass-through, Geography, and Aggregate Costs to the US Healthcare System
papers.authors: Manho Kang, Xiangtao Meng, Katheryn N. Russ, James Waters
papers.abstract: Have recent tariffs resulted in increased costs for the US healthcare system? We examine US trade data and compile a database of statutory tariff changes. Tariffs on medical goods narrowly defined resulted in $3.4 Billion in duties assessed between February and July 2025—more than 10 times the same period in 2024, with a 55.8 percent rate of pass-through at the US border. We estimate that had medical goods imports observed in 2024 been subject to the statutory tariff levels prevailing in August 2025, assessed duties would have been $15.8 Billion, almost 30 times higher than those observed in real-time. Our aggregates understate imports of medical goods and other imports used in healthcare settings, as data limitations compel us to omit purchases of imported goods for construction, maintenance, and operations of facilities, as well as imports under certain HS10 and HS6 tariff codes that are used when identifying medical goods in many contexts but contain a mixture of imports for medical and non-medical purposes.
papers.zh_title: 医疗产品关税：传导、地理分布与美国医疗体系的总体成本
papers.zh_abstract: 近期的关税是否导致美国医疗体系成本增加？我们考察了美国贸易数据，并编制了一个法定关税变动数据库。狭义定义的医疗产品关税在2025年2月至7月期间产生了34亿美元的关税评估——是2024年同期的10倍以上，美国边境的传导率为55.8%。我们估计，如果2024年观察到的医疗产品进口适用2025年8月生效的法定关税水平，评估的关税将达到158亿美元，几乎是实时观察到的关税的30倍。我们的汇总数据低估了医疗产品进口以及医疗环境中使用的其他进口品，因为数据限制迫使我们省略了用于设施建设、维护和运营的进口商品，以及在某些HS10和HS6关税编码下的进口品——这些编码在许多情况下用于识别医疗产品，但包含医疗和非医疗用途的混合进口。

papers.title: Accommodating Emerging Giants in the Global Economy
papers.authors: Zhuokai Huang, Benny Kleinman, Ernest Liu, Stephen J. Redding
papers.abstract: How has aggregate income and welfare in the United States been affected by globalization and rapid productivity growth in emerging economies? We use the class of constant elasticity trade models to provide quantitative evidence on these questions. We find that reductions in worldwide trade frictions over the period from 1960-2020 reduced the share of the United States in global GDP but raised its aggregate welfare. Similarly, productivity growth in Japan and China led to a decline in the relative income of the United States, but brought aggregate welfare gains from the resulting expansion in global production possibilities. Trade integration and foreign productivity growth have relatively modest effects on domestic income and welfare compared to domestic productivity growth.
papers.zh_title: 容纳全球经济中的新兴巨头
papers.zh_abstract: 全球化以及新兴经济体的快速生产率增长如何影响了美国的总体收入和福利？我们利用恒定弹性贸易模型类别，为这些问题提供定量证据。我们发现，1960年至2020年间全球贸易摩擦的减少降低了美国在全球GDP中的份额，但提高了其总体福利。同样，日本和中国的生产率增长导致美国相对收入下降，但由此带来的全球生产可能性扩张带来了总体福利收益。与国内生产率增长相比，贸易一体化和外国生产率增长对国内收入和福利的影响相对较小。

papers.title: The Intersection of Place and Need: How Lack of Enrollment Offices Deters Participation in the Safety Net
papers.authors: Marianne Bitler, Jason B. Cook, Chloe N. East, Sonya R. Porter, Laura Tiehen
papers.abstract: Take-up of means-tested transfer programs in the United States remains incomplete despite their substantial value to eligible households. We contribute to the literature on determinants of program participation by providing the first causal estimates of how proximity to Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) offices affects program participation. Using administrative data on SNAP receipt in a single state linked to geocoded office locations, we exploit quasi-experimental variation from frequent office openings and closings. Event study estimates show that SNAP participation in a census tract decreases following the closure of an office by 7–9 percent over two years, with suggestive evidence of increases in participation following office openings. These effects are concentrated in urban areas and are robust to alternative specifications and tests of endogeneity in changes in office placement.
papers.zh_title: 地点与需求的交汇：缺乏注册办公室如何阻碍安全网的参与
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国，尽管经济状况调查型转移支付项目对符合条件的家庭具有实质性价值，但其参与率仍然不完整。我们通过提供关于补充营养援助计划（SNAP）办公室距离如何影响项目参与的首个因果估计，为项目参与决定因素的文献做出贡献。利用一个州内与地理编码办公室位置相关联的SNAP领取行政数据，我们利用频繁的办公室开设和关闭所产生的准实验变异。事件研究估计显示，在办公室关闭后的两年内，人口普查区的SNAP参与率下降7%至9%，并有提示性证据表明办公室开设后参与率有所上升。这些效应集中在城市地区，并且对于替代性设定以及办公室位置变化内生性的检验是稳健的。

papers.title: How (Not) to Identify Demand Elasticities in Dynamic Asset Markets
papers.authors: Jules H. van Binsbergen, Benjamin David, Christian C. Opp
papers.abstract: We evaluate approaches to estimating demand elasticities in dynamic asset markets, both theoretically and empirically. We establish strict necessary conditions that instrumented asset-price variation must satisfy for valid identification. Commonly used instruments violate these conditions, yielding estimates that are largely unrelated to true price elasticities and may even have the wrong sign. We derive transparent formulas for the biases that arise when instrumented price shifts persist or build up and propose an approximate bias-correction factor. Our dynamic general-equilibrium analysis characterizes the mapping from supply shock processes to price-shift processes, revealing severe shortcomings of standard multiplier calculations in multi-period settings.
papers.zh_title: 如何在动态资产市场中（不）识别需求弹性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们从理论和实证两方面评估了在动态资产市场中估计需求弹性的方法。我们建立了工具化资产价格变动的动态必须满足的严格必要条件，以实现有效识别。我们在一个动态贸易的一般均衡模型中阐释了这些见解，并推导出当这些条件被违反时所产生的偏差大小。当工具化价格变动具有持续性或可预测性时，基于静态产业组织模型的估计会出现严重偏差。实证上，我们表明常用的工具变量得出的弹性估计值数量级错误，甚至符号错误。与标准乘数计算相反，我们的理论描述了维持给定价格路径支持过程所需的动态资产市场干预，这对量化宽松等政策具有直接意义。

papers.title: California’s Firearm Excise Tax is Almost Fully Passed on to Consumers
papers.authors: Sara Drango, Sarah Moshary, Bradley Shapiro
papers.abstract: We evaluate the effect of California's 11 percent excise tax on firearms, introduced in July 2024, on retail prices. Using price quotes for 48 popular firearms from over 2,200 licensed dealers, we compare California prices to those in other states and to pre-tax trends. We find that prices in California increase by about 10% in response to the 11% tax. Results are consistent across gun types and show no evidence of border spillovers. These findings indicate that firearm excise taxes can effectively raise consumer prices.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LE, PE；JEL：H21, H22, H23, I18, K34, L11, L68
papers.zh_title: 加利福尼亚州的枪支消费税几乎完全转嫁给消费者
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了加利福尼亚州于2024年7月实施的11%枪支消费税对零售价格的影响。利用来自超过2200家持牌经销商的48种流行枪支的报价，我们将加州价格与其他州的价格以及税前趋势进行比较。我们发现，加州价格因11%的税收而上涨约10%。结果在不同枪支类型中一致，并且没有边境溢出效应的证据。这些发现表明，枪支消费税可以有效提高消费者价格。

papers.title: Avoiding Prejudice: Islamophobia and the Labor Supply of Arabs and Muslims in the U.S.
papers.authors: Kerwin Kofi Charles, Konstantin Kunze, Hani Mansour, Daniel I. Rees, Bryson Rintala
papers.abstract: This paper provides direct evidence that members of a disfavored group adjust their economic behavior in response to prejudice. We exploit plausibly exogenous, localized increases in anti-Arab and anti-Muslim sentiment generated by combat fatalities of U.S. service members from a given state during the wars in Iraq and Afghanistan between 2001 and 2014. Linking detailed records on military fatalities with survey data, we estimate the causal effect of these shocks on the labor supply of Arab and Muslim men residing in the affected states. Following a home-state fatality, Arab and Muslim men reduce their weekly hours of work by approximately one percent relative to the baseline sample mean. The reduction is twice as large among the self-employed and concentrated in occupations requiring frequent customer or co-worker interaction. These patterns are consistent with avoidance-based sorting predicted by prejudice-based models of discrimination. The timing of the response coincides with short-lived increases in anti-Muslim hate crimes, confirming that the estimated effects reflect shifts in prejudice rather than broader economic conditions. Our findings provide direct evidence that prejudice can distort market outcomes by inducing targeted individuals to withdraw from interactions with prejudiced market participants.
papers.zh_title: 避免偏见：伊斯兰恐惧症与美国阿拉伯人和穆斯林的劳动力供给
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了直接证据，表明受歧视群体的成员会因偏见而调整其经济行为。我们利用2001年至2014年伊拉克和阿富汗战争期间，来自某个州的美国军人战斗死亡所引发的、看似外生的、局部性的反阿拉伯和反穆斯林情绪上升。将军事死亡的详细记录与调查数据相关联，我们估计了这些冲击对受影响州居住的阿拉伯和穆斯林男性劳动力供给的因果效应。在发生本州军人死亡事件后，阿拉伯和穆斯林男性每周工作时间相对于基线样本均值减少约1%。这一减少在自雇者中幅度加倍，并集中在需要频繁与顾客或同事互动的职业中。这些模式与基于偏见的歧视模型所预测的回避型分类一致。反应的时间点与反穆斯林仇恨犯罪的短期增加相吻合，证实了估计效应反映了偏见的变化，而非更广泛的经济状况。我们的发现提供了直接证据，表明偏见可以通过诱导目标个体退出与有偏见的市场参与者的互动来扭曲市场结果。

papers.title: Social Security and Inequality in Belgium
papers.authors: Giulia Klinges, Alain Jousten, Mathieu Lefebvre
papers.abstract: Over the years, the Belgian social security system has undergone substantial reform with a prime focus on increasing older worker labor force participation. The paper explores the effect of past reforms on inequality in old age. We distinguish two separate effects: The mechanical effect considers the change in inequality and expected benefit levels due to the reforms for a fixed retirement age distribution. The behavioral effect accounts for the endogenous change caused by changes in the incentives to work. Our results show that mechanically, reforms have led to losses in expected benefits for all but the lowest income quintile. Behavioral changes had a positive but orders of magnitude smaller effect. Overall, inequality decreased as a result of reforms.
papers.zh_title: 比利时社会保障与不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 多年来，比利时社会保障体系经历了重大改革，主要目标是提高老年工人的劳动力参与率。本文探讨了过去改革对老年时期不平等的影响。我们区分了两种不同的效应：机械效应考虑了在固定退休年龄分布下，改革导致的不平等和预期福利水平的变化。行为效应则考虑了由工作激励变化引起的内生性变化。我们的结果表明，从机械效应看，改革导致除最低收入五分之一群体外的所有群体的预期福利损失。行为变化产生了正向但数量级小得多的影响。总体而言，改革导致不平等程度下降。

papers.title: Medium-Term Impacts of Integrated Social Safety Nets: Cash Transfers, Information Meetings, and Home Visits for Child Development
papers.authors: Richard Akresh, Damien de Walque, Harounan Kazianga, Abigail Stocker
papers.abstract: Cash transfers are a critical part of social safety nets. However, integrated programs combining cash and parenting interventions through either group-based information meetings or home visits are recently being adopted to improve child development. Working with the Burkina Faso government, we conduct a randomized experiment in 225 rural villages to assess the impact of an integrated social safety net over the child’s life cycle. Villages were randomized to a control group or one of the following treatments: cash transfers; cash transfers plus government-run group-based information meetings focused on children’s health and psychosocial development; or cash transfers, information, and home visits reinforcing the information meetings. Fifteen months after treatment ended, households receiving cash, information, and home visits have fewer pregnancies, more medically assisted childbirths, enhanced health behaviors, and better educational outcomes. Adding home visits is essential for improving childhood development, while cash, with or without information, produces no lasting impacts.
papers.zh_title: 综合社会安全网的中期影响：现金转移、信息会议与家访对儿童发展的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 现金转移是社会安全网的关键组成部分。然而，近年来，各国开始采用将现金转移与育儿干预相结合的综合项目，这些干预通过基于小组的信息会议或家访进行，以促进儿童发展。我们与布基纳法索政府合作，在225个农村村庄开展了一项随机实验，以评估综合社会安全网在儿童生命周期中的影响。村庄被随机分配到对照组或以下干预组之一：仅现金转移；现金转移加上由政府组织的、侧重于儿童健康和心理社会发展的基于小组的信息会议；或者现金转移、信息会议以及强化信息会议效果的家访。在干预结束15个月后，接受现金、信息会议和家访的家庭怀孕次数更少，医疗辅助分娩更多，健康行为得到改善，教育成果也更好。增加家访对于改善儿童发展至关重要，而仅提供现金（无论是否附带信息）则没有产生持久影响。

papers.title: Social Security Reforms and Inequality among Older Workers in Spain
papers.authors: Cristina Bellés-Obrero, Manuel Flores Mallo, Pilar García-Gómez, Sergi Jimenez-Martin, Judit Vall Castelló
papers.abstract: This chapter studies social security reforms and trends in inequalities among older workers over the last decades in Spain. Its main goal is to analyze the redistributive impact of the various pension reforms on older income inequality. Compared to the rules in 1985, recent pension reforms have led to an average increase on Social Security Wealth of approximately 18,000€ for men and 15,000€ for women. This represents a ten and eight percent increase, respectively. This effect is mostly driven by the mechanical or direct effect (e.g. via benefit adjustments), while changes in retirement probability (secondary or behavioral effect) are close to zero. Furthermore, we find striking differences across income quartiles, for both men and women. In both cases, there is a clear income gradient, where the richest quartile has benefitted the most with an increase close to twenty percent, or over €50,000, for both men and women. Conversely, the change for the poorest income quartile for men and the two poorest income quartiles for women is close to zero or even slightly negative. This is likely due to the effect of minimum benefits (that mark the generosity of the system, see Boldrin et al, 1999) that automatically absorb any other effect for low-income individuals.
papers.zh_title: 西班牙社会保障改革与老年劳动者不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 本章研究了西班牙过去几十年间社会保障改革与老年劳动者不平等趋势。其主要目标是分析各项养老金改革对老年收入不平等的再分配影响。与1985年的规则相比，近期的养老金改革导致男性社会保障财富平均增加约18,000欧元，女性增加约15,000欧元。这分别代表了10%和8%的增长。这一效应主要由机械效应或直接效应（例如通过待遇调整）驱动，而退休概率的变化（次级效应或行为效应）接近于零。此外，我们发现男性和女性在不同收入四分位数之间存在显著差异。在这两种情况下，都存在明显的收入梯度，最富有的四分位数群体受益最多，男性和女性的增幅均接近20%，或超过50,000欧元。相反，对于男性中最贫困的四分位数群体以及女性中最贫困的两个四分位数群体，其变化接近于零，甚至略微为负。这很可能是由于最低待遇（它标志着该体系的慷慨程度，参见Boldrin等人，1999年）的影响，该待遇自动吸收了低收入个体的任何其他效应。

papers.title: Pension Reforms and Inequalities in France
papers.authors: Antoine Bozio, Maxime Tô, Julie Tréguier
papers.abstract: This study analyzes the distributional effects of French pension reforms from 1993 to 2014 across different socioeconomic groups. Using administrative data for individuals born between 1934 and 1950, we examine the impact on social security wealth (SSW) across lifetime earnings deciles and genders. Our methodology incorporates differential life expectancy and exploits the PENSIPP model for counterfactual scenarios. Results show that reforms generally decreased SSW across all income groups, with regressive tendencies. The 1993 reform had the most significant impact, reducing SSW by over 15% for men in the lowest earnings decile compared to 5% for the highest. Subsequent reforms had milder effects. These findings contribute to understanding the long-term consequences of pension reforms on inequality and inform future policy decisions in countries facing similar demographic challenges.
papers.zh_title: 法国养老金改革与不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究分析了1993年至2014年间法国养老金改革对不同社会经济群体的分配效应。利用1934年至1950年间出生个体的行政数据，我们考察了这些改革对不同终身收入十分位数组和性别的社会保障财富的影响。我们的方法纳入了差异化的预期寿命，并利用PENSIPP模型进行反事实情景分析。结果显示，改革普遍降低了所有收入群体的社会保障财富，并呈现出累退趋势。1993年的改革影响最为显著，对于最低收入十分位数组的男性，社会保障财富减少了超过15%，而最高收入组仅减少了5%。后续改革的影响较为温和。这些发现有助于理解养老金改革对不平等的长期后果，并为面临类似人口挑战的国家未来的政策决策提供信息。

papers.title: Financializing the Professions: The Rise of Private Equity in Accounting
papers.authors: Inna Abramova, John M. Barrios
papers.abstract: Private equity (PE) has moved rapidly into professional services, yet its impact on accounting, where licensing regimes, reputational capital, and partnership governance traditionally limit external ownership, remains poorly understood. We examine how PE ownership alters the organization and market structure of accounting firms using data from 1999-2024 that link more than 3,600 PE transactions to detailed information on mergers and acquisitions (M&A), labor markets, and audit pricing. PE investment increases sharply after 2020 and extends to both CPA-licensed audit firms and non-CPA advisory practices, with most activity in large mid-tier PCAOB-registered firms. After PE entry, firms grow faster: non-audit revenues rise, employment expands, and cross-state M&A accelerates, consistent with platform-building and consolidation. These adjustments have market-level implications. PE investment raises labor-market concentration in key accounting occupations and drives up ERISA audit fees in a standardized setting, as confirmed by a synthetic difference-in-differences design. Our results reveal a key tension at the core of professions: preserving independence and competition in a market increasingly driven by financial capital.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LE, LS, PR；JEL：G23, G34, J44, L2, L4, L84, M4, M41, M42
papers.zh_title: 职业的金融化：私募股权在会计行业的崛起
papers.zh_abstract: 私募股权已迅速进入专业服务领域，然而，在会计行业，由于执业许可制度、声誉资本和合伙制治理传统上限制外部所有权，其影响仍鲜为人知。我们利用1999年至2024年的数据，将超过3,600笔私募股权交易与并购、劳动力市场和审计定价的详细信息联系起来，考察了私募股权所有权如何改变会计师事务所的组织和市场结构。私募股权投资在2020年后急剧增加，并扩展到持有注册会计师执照的审计事务所和非注册会计师咨询业务，其中大部分活动发生在大型中型市场PCAOB注册事务所。在私募股权进入后，事务所增长更快：非审计收入增加，就业扩大，跨州并购加速，这与平台建设和整合的趋势一致。这些调整具有市场层面的影响。正如合成双重差分设计所证实的，私募股权投资提高了关键会计职业的劳动力市场集中度，并在标准化环境中推高了ERISA审计费用。我们的结果揭示了职业核心的一个关键张力：在一个日益由金融资本驱动的市场中，如何维护独立性和竞争性。

papers.title: Social Security Reforms and Inequality in Japan
papers.authors: Takashi Oshio, Satoshi Shimizutani, Akiko S. Oishi
papers.abstract: We examined the heterogeneous impacts of social security reforms in Japan over the past 40 years. We utilize a nationwide large-scale micro-dataset to compute individual-level social security wealth (SSW) and mortality rates by lifetime earning groups. We found that SSW declined for all groups after the social security reforms, which aimed to reduce generosity; however, the size of the negative impact was larger for richer individuals. These results indicate that a series of recent social security reforms have reduced inequality in SSW.
papers.zh_title: 日本社会保障改革与不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了过去40年间日本社会保障改革的异质性影响。我们利用全国性大规模微观数据集，按终身收入群体计算了个人层面的社会保障财富和死亡率。我们发现，在旨在降低慷慨程度的社会保障改革之后，所有群体的社会保障财富均有所下降；然而，对较富裕个体的负面冲击幅度更大。这些结果表明，近期的一系列社会保障改革降低了社会保障财富的不平等。

papers.title: On Productivity and Distortions across Countries
papers.authors: Diego Restuccia
papers.abstract: I examine the empirical properties of firm-level productivity and distortions across countries using the newly released World Bank Enterprise Surveys (WBES). Using a standard framework of production heterogeneity, I show that the gap in productivity and distortions between high and low productivity firms is larger in developing countries, generating large aggregate productivity losses from misallocation. A key empirical property of distortions in developing countries is that they systematically weaken the relationship between firm size and firm productivity. I exploit a unique feature of the WBES data to document which specific aspects of the economic environment faced by firms, such as financial constraints, regulation, corruption, and weak infrastructure, are consistent with the empirical pattern of distortions across countries.
papers.zh_title: 跨国生产率与扭曲研究
papers.zh_abstract: 我利用新发布的世界银行企业调查数据，考察了跨国企业层面生产率和扭曲的实证特征。使用一个标准的生产异质性框架，我表明，在发展中国家，高生产率企业与低生产率企业之间的生产率和扭曲差距更大，这导致了由资源错配引起的巨大总体生产率损失。发展中国家扭曲的一个关键实证特征是，它们系统地削弱了企业规模与企业生产率之间的关系。我利用世界银行企业调查数据的一个独特特征，记录了企业所面临经济环境的哪些具体方面（例如金融约束、监管、腐败和薄弱的基础设施）与跨国扭曲的实证模式相一致。

papers.title: Antitrust Enforcement in Labor Markets
papers.authors: Elena Prager
papers.abstract: Until recently, antitrust laws were rarely enforced in labor markets. Although the existence of labor market power has long been recognized, evidence only recently emerged that such market power regularly arises from sources that are actionable under antitrust law. Since 2010, antitrust agencies have substantially increased labor market enforcement actions. However, many questions relevant to enforcement remain unanswered, such as how to conduct market definition for labor markets, and how best to incorporate concentration into models of the labor market. This article reviews how antitrust is beginning to be used in labor markets, the evidence for and against its use, and the remaining evidence gaps standing in the way of more effective use.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场的反垄断执法
papers.zh_abstract: 直到最近，反垄断法在劳动力市场中很少得到执行。尽管劳动力市场势力的存在早已被认识到，但直到最近才有证据表明，这种市场势力通常源于反垄断法可予追诉的源头。自2010年以来，反垄断机构大幅增加了劳动力市场的执法行动。然而，许多与执法相关的问题仍未得到解答，例如如何对劳动力市场进行市场界定，以及如何最好地将集中度纳入劳动力市场模型。本文回顾了反垄断如何开始在劳动力市场中被运用、支持及反对其运用的证据，以及阻碍其更有效运用的剩余证据缺口。

papers.title: Joint Child Custody and Interstate Migration
papers.authors: Abi Adams, Oğuz Bayraktar, Thomas H. Jørgensen, Hamish Low, Alessandra Voena
papers.abstract: Joint custody following divorce is widespread, but implementation is costly when individuals live in different states and so affects interstate mobility. Migration of separated fathers has fallen significantly more than that of married fathers. We show the causal effect of joint custody using two strategies. First, we survey separated parents to elicit beliefs about the likelihood of interstate moves. Second, we use the staggered adoption of joint custody laws across US states, and show a reduction in actual migration of 11 percentage points for fathers. For mothers, there is no impact on mobility but suggestive evidence of beneficial labor market outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 共同子女监护权与州际迁移
papers.zh_abstract: 离婚后的共同监护权很普遍，但当个人居住在不同州时，其执行成本高昂，因此会影响州际流动性。分居父亲的迁移率下降幅度显著大于已婚父亲。我们通过两种策略展示了共同监护权的因果效应。首先，我们调查了分居父母，以了解他们对州际迁移可能性的看法。其次，我们利用美国各州交错采用共同监护权法律的情况，并表明这导致父亲的实际迁移率下降了11个百分点。对于母亲而言，对流动性没有影响，但有提示性证据表明劳动力市场结果有所改善。

papers.title: Worker Preparedness Across the Marshallian Runs Survey Instruments and Early Evidence from the Copenhagen Life Panel
papers.authors: Andrew Caplin, Søren Leth-Petersen, Victoria Gregory, Ida Maria Hartmann, Eungik Lee, Johan Sæverud
papers.abstract: Worker preparedness is a missing transmission channel in macroeconomics. Alfred Marshall’s taxonomy of short-, medium-, and long-run adjustment was developed to analyse how firms respond to shocks when different inputs can or cannot adjust. We extend this logic to workers by adding an element Marshall’s framework leaves implicit: anticipation. Preparedness refers to the buffers, search strategies, fallback plans, and retraining intentions individuals form before disruption occurs. These forward-looking margins shape both microeconomic outcomes and the effectiveness of macroeconomic policy. \nThe registry-linked Copenhagen Life Panel (CLP) provides a data architecture for making preparedness observable. By embedding belief and strategy elicitation within administrative records, the CLP makes it possible to test whether workers’ expectations and contingency plans are calibrated to the risks they face. Early evidence shows that short-run preparedness—liquidity, earnings-risk beliefs, and separation expectations—is measurable and predictive, and that miscalibration is a key source of vulnerability. \nThe broader agenda is to measure preparedness across Marshallian runs and across the worker life cycle. In the medium run, adjustment depends on search strategies and fallback planning; in the long run, retraining and occupational reorientation determine whether technological disruption becomes renewal or decline. We outline survey instruments for each run that can be integrated with registry data, transforming preparedness from conjecture into measurable and model-ready constructs.
papers.zh_title: 马歇尔时期中的工人准备度：调查工具与哥本哈根生活面板的初步证据
papers.zh_abstract: 工人准备度是宏观经济学中一个缺失的传导渠道。阿尔弗雷德·马歇尔关于短期、中期和长期调整的分类法，最初是为了分析企业在不同投入要素能否调整时如何应对冲击而提出的。我们通过增加马歇尔框架中隐含的一个要素——预期——将这一逻辑扩展到工人身上。准备度指的是个体在冲击发生之前形成的缓冲、搜索策略、备用计划和再培训意图。这些前瞻性边际既影响微观经济结果，也影响宏观经济政策的有效性。与登记数据关联的哥本哈根生活面板（CLP）提供了一种使准备度可观测的数据架构。通过在行政记录中嵌入信念和策略的引出，CLP使得检验工人的预期和应急计划是否与其面临的风险相匹配成为可能。初步证据表明，短期准备度——流动性、收入风险信念和离职预期——是可测量且具有预测性的，并且校准失误是脆弱性的一个关键来源。更广泛的议程是测量马歇尔时期以及工人整个生命周期中的准备度。在中期，调整取决于搜索策略和备用计划；在长期，再培训和职业重新定位决定了技术冲击是带来复兴还是衰退。我们为每个时期概述了可与登记数据整合的调查工具，将准备度从推测转变为可测量且可建模的构念。

papers.title: The State Pension Age and Inequality in Old-age Social Security Wealth in the Netherlands
papers.authors: Adriaan Kalwij, Arie Kapteyn
papers.abstract: Since the early 2010s, the state pension age (SPA) is one of the main public policy instruments in the Netherlands for inducing people to postpone retirement. The SPA has gradually increased from 65 years in 2012 to 66 years and 4 months in 2021. In the context of the Dutch old-age social security system, an increase in the SPA is hypothesized to decrease the retirement probability and to increase inequality in pension benefits entitlements. Empirical support for the two hypotheses is found with data on individuals aged 55–69 over the period 2011-2021. Inequality in old-age social security wealth has increased after 2015 for non-retirees. However, the findings do not support that this increase is because of the SPA increase.
papers.zh_title: 荷兰的国家养老金领取年龄与老年社会保障财富不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 自2010年代初以来，国家养老金领取年龄（SPA）是荷兰诱导人们推迟退休的主要公共政策工具之一。SPA已从2012年的65岁逐步提高到2021年的66岁零4个月。在荷兰老年社会保障体系的背景下，SPA的提高被假设会降低退休概率并增加养老金福利权利的不平等。利用2011-2021年期间55-69岁个体的数据，我们找到了支持这两个假设的经验证据。对于非退休人员，老年社会保障财富的不平等在2015年之后有所增加。然而，研究结果并不支持这种增加是由于SPA提高所致。

papers.title: Lenin's Shadow on the Istanbul Convention: The Legacy of Communism on Attitudes Toward Violence Against Women in Europe
papers.authors: Naci H. Mocan, Nur Orak
papers.abstract: The Istanbul Convention is an international treaty aimed at protecting women against violence. We employ survey datasets and investigate its effect on attitudes toward violence against women in Europe. Using difference-in-differences models we compare individuals in countries that signed and ratified the Convention with those in countries that signed but either never ratified or did so after the surveys were fielded. Entry into the Convention significantly reduced the likelihood that lower-educated individuals view violence against women as acceptable, but only in countries outside the former Eastern Bloc. In former Eastern Bloc countries, the Convention affected attitudes only among younger less-educated individuals who had limited exposure to communism—those who were no older than teenagers when the Soviet Union collapsed in 1990. We show that younger cohorts in these countries tend to hold more individualistic and less pro-government attitudes and express greater trust in the courts and the justice system than older individuals. Finally, we find no effect of the Convention on attitudes toward other forms of norm-violating behavior, such as tax evasion, bribery, fare evasion, or drug use. These results indicate that the Convention had a targeted impact, and that its influence on shaping preferences depends on the broader cultural context which is itself shaped by institutions.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：K40, K42, P0, Z18
papers.zh_title: 列宁在《伊斯坦布尔公约》上的阴影：共产主义遗产对欧洲针对妇女暴力态度的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 《伊斯坦布尔公约》是一项旨在保护妇女免受暴力侵害的国际条约。我们利用调查数据集，研究其对欧洲针对妇女暴力态度的影响。使用双重差分模型，我们比较了签署并批准该公约国家的个体与签署但从未批准或在调查实施后才批准国家的个体。公约的生效显著降低了受教育程度较低的个体认为针对妇女暴力可接受的可能性，但这仅在前东欧集团以外的国家成立。在前东欧集团国家，公约仅影响了那些接触共产主义有限的年轻低学历个体——即1990年苏联解体时年龄不超过青少年的群体。我们表明，这些国家的年轻一代比年长个体持有更个人主义、更少亲政府的态度，并对法院和司法系统表现出更大的信任。最后，我们发现公约对其他形式的违规行为（如逃税、贿赂、逃票或吸毒）的态度没有影响。这些结果表明，公约产生了有针对性的影响，并且其对偏好塑造的作用取决于更广泛的文化背景，而文化背景本身又由制度塑造。

papers.title: Examining the Effect of Cannabis Legalization on Youth Cannabis Use: Evidence on the Importance of Enforcing Retailer Compliance
papers.authors: Rahi Abouk, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Rosalie Liccardo Pacula
papers.abstract: Studies show that U.S. state cannabis legalization has increased adult cannabis use, but the effects on youth use are mixed. This study considers whether omission of enforcement of the minimum legal sales age (MLSA) might help explain prior mixed findings. We combine biennial survey data for 6th, 8th, 10th, and 12th grade students from the 2010-2023 Washington Healthy Youth Survey with administrative data on premise and compliance checks from the Washington State Liquor and Cannabis Board (WSLCB). Premise checks educate retailers on any potential violations but do not involve penalties or fines. Compliance checks, on the other hand, involve increasing penalties imposed on retailers if they are found to be noncompliant with sales to minors. We use difference-in-differences (DID) methods that are robust to a staggered policy rollout with dynamic and heterogeneous treatment effects and assess impacts of both types of inspections on past month cannabis use. We conduct a series of sensitivity and robustness checks of the impact of both types of inspections based on student’s grade, length of time since inspection, inclusion of alcohol/tobacco retail compliance checks, and alternative measures of cannabis use. Our research suggests that the implementation of regular random compliance checks with stiff penalties on retailers for noncompliance may help reduce the influence of legal markets on youth use. Unobserved heterogeneity within and across states in the enforcement of MLSAs may contribute to mixed findings of the impact of legalization on youth cannabis use.
papers.zh_title: 检验大麻合法化对青少年大麻使用的影响：执行零售商合规重要性的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 研究表明，美国各州的大麻合法化增加了成年人的大麻使用，但对青少年使用的影响结果不一。本研究考虑，对最低法定销售年龄（MLSA）执行的遗漏是否有助于解释先前不一致的发现。我们将2010-2023年华盛顿健康青年调查中六年级、八年级、十年级和十二年级学生的两年一次调查数据，与华盛顿州酒类与大麻委员会（WSLCB）关于场所检查和合规检查的行政数据相结合。场所检查旨在教育零售商注意任何潜在违规行为，但不涉及处罚或罚款。相比之下，合规检查则涉及对被发现向未成年人销售不合规的零售商施加递增的处罚。我们使用对交错政策推行具有稳健性、能处理动态和异质性处理效应的双重差分（DID）方法，评估两种检查类型对过去一个月大麻使用的影响。我们基于学生年级、检查后时间长度、是否包含酒精/烟草零售合规检查以及大麻使用的替代测量指标，对两种检查的影响进行了一系列敏感性和稳健性检验。我们的研究表明，实施定期随机合规检查并对不合规零售商处以严厉处罚，可能有助于减少合法市场对青少年使用的影响。各州内部和之间在MLSA执行上的未观测异质性，可能导致关于合法化对青少年大麻使用影响的研究结果不一。

papers.title: Electoral Margins and Political Competition
papers.authors: Clemence Tricaud, Romain Wacziarg
papers.abstract: In this paper, we argue that recent trends in party seat margins and election vote margins result from structural changes in the nature of US political competition. We assemble a comprehensive database of electoral results for the House, Senate and presidential contests, from the 19th century until today. Seat margins declined in the recent period, so the margins of control of the House, Senate, and Electoral College by either party have become smaller. However, this was not accompanied by a decline in the margins of victory at the constituency level. We propose a model of electoral competition with multiple districts that can rationalize these trends. We show theoretically that an increase in politicians’ information about voter preferences, together with the growing nationalization of politics, can account for the decrease in seat margins and the concurrent stability in vote margins. As implied by the model, we document that campaign contributions received by House and Senate candidates are increasingly concentrated in a dwindling set of swing constituencies.
papers.zh_title: 选举优势与政治竞争
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们认为近期政党席位优势率和选举投票优势率的趋势源于美国政治竞争性质的结构性变化。我们汇编了一个从19世纪至今的众议院、参议院和总统选举结果的综合数据库。近期席位优势率有所下降，因此任一政党控制众议院、参议院和选举人团的优势幅度变得更小。然而，这并未伴随着选区层面胜利优势率的下降。我们提出了一个包含多个选区的选举竞争模型，可以解释这些趋势。我们从理论上证明，政治家关于选民偏好信息的增加，加上政治日益全国化，可以解释席位优势率的下降以及投票优势率的同时稳定。正如模型所暗示的，我们记录到，众议院和参议院候选人获得的竞选捐款日益集中在数量不断减少的摇摆选区。

papers.title: The Effect of Online Sales Bans on E-Cigarette Use
papers.authors: Ege Aksu, Charles J. Courtemanche, Dhaval M. Dave, Daniel L. Dench, Michael Grossman, Jooyoung Kim, Selen Ozdogan, Shubhsri Rajendra, Joseph J. Sabia, Henry Saffer
papers.abstract: Policymakers at the state and federal levels have argued that restricting online sales of e-cigarettes is a crucial policy tool to curb youth vaping. This study is the first to explore the effectiveness of statewide restrictions on online sales of electronic nicotine delivery systems (ENDS) on teen and young adult ENDS use. Using data from four national datasets (Monitoring the Future, State and Combined Youth Risk Behavior Surveillance System surveys, Population Assessment of Tobacco and Health, and Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System survey) and a generalized difference-in-differences approach, we find no evidence that such laws are effective at curbing youth ENDS use. With 95 percent confidence, we can rule out that online sales restrictions reduced prior-month ENDS use by more than 3.6 percent of the pre-treatment mean vaping rate. An exploration of mechanisms suggests that (1) while restrictions on online sales may have a small negative effect on online purchases, youths are able to substitute to other sources for ENDS products to compensate for reduced online access, and (2) online sources are a very rare source of e-cigarettes for youths. Finally, we also find no evidence that online sales restrictions reduce adult ENDS use.
papers.zh_title: 在线销售禁令对电子烟使用的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 州和联邦层面的政策制定者认为，限制电子烟在线销售是遏制青少年吸电子烟的关键政策工具。本研究首次探讨全州范围内限制电子尼古丁传送系统（ENDS）在线销售对青少年和年轻人ENDS使用的影响。利用四个全国性数据集（《监测未来》、州和综合青少年风险行为监测系统调查、烟草与健康人口评估以及行为风险因素监测系统调查）的数据，并采用广义双重差分方法，我们没有发现此类法律能有效遏制青少年ENDS使用的证据。在95%的置信水平下，我们可以排除在线销售限制将过去一个月ENDS使用率降低超过预处理均值吸烟率3.6%的可能性。对机制的探索表明：（1）虽然在线销售限制可能对在线购买产生微小的负面影响，但青少年能够转向其他ENDS产品来源以补偿在线渠道的减少；（2）在线来源是青少年获取电子烟极为罕见的渠道。最后，我们也没有发现在线销售限制能减少成年人ENDS使用的证据。

papers.title: Round Bidding in Auctions
papers.authors: Mark van Oldeniel, Christopher M. Snyder, Adriaan R. Soetevent
papers.abstract: Our analysis of novel data from hundreds of thousands of online auctions on a large platform operating in the Netherlands uncovers a tendency to bid round numbers. Round winning bids are higher than average for a given item and are eschewed by bidders as they gain experience. These findings lead us to hypothesize that, rather than delivering a strategic benefit (say, adding salience to a jump bid), round bidding is a symptom of a behavioral bias. We construct a structural model of behavioral bidding in auctions, estimated for each of a subsample of the most frequently auctioned items. Our median estimate is that 21% of bidders are prone to round-number bias, reducing their expected surplus by nearly 10%.
papers.zh_title: 拍卖中的整数报价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对来自荷兰一个大型平台上数十万场在线拍卖的新数据进行分析，发现了一种倾向于报出整数价格的趋势。对于给定物品，整数获胜出价高于平均水平，并且随着竞拍者获得经验，他们会避免使用整数出价。这些发现使我们假设，整数报价并非带来战略利益（例如，增加跳跃出价的显著性），而是行为偏差的症状。我们构建了一个拍卖中行为出价的结构模型，并对最常拍卖物品子样本中的每一个进行了估计。我们的中位数估计是，21%的竞拍者容易受到整数偏差的影响，这使他们的预期剩余减少了近10%。

papers.title: Monthly Earnings Volatility and Household Pooling
papers.authors: Martin E. Andresen, Andreas R. Kostøl, Ross T. Milton, Corina Mommaerts, Luisa Wallossek
papers.abstract: This paper examines monthly earnings volatility and its transmission to household earnings volatility using Norwegian data on the universe of monthly pay histories. We document substantial month-to-month earnings changes: within a job, while over one-quarter of months have no earnings changes, another quarter have at least a 23% change. Accounting for multiple jobs and non-employment increases volatility, while aggregating to households reduces volatility by 12-35%. Event studies around job loss and couple formation, along with decomposition and bounding exercises, show that most of this decline reflects pooling effects rather than sorting or responses to shocks.
papers.zh_title: 月度收入波动与家庭收入汇集
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用挪威涵盖所有月度工资历史的月度数据，考察了月度收入波动及其向家庭收入波动的传导。我们记录了显著的月度收入变化：在一份工作内部，虽然超过四分之一的月份没有收入变化，但另有四分之一的月份变化至少达到23%。考虑多份工作和非就业状态会增加波动性，而汇总到家庭层面则使波动性降低12-35%。围绕失业和伴侣形成的事件研究，以及分解和边界分析表明，这种下降大部分反映了汇集效应，而非分类或对冲击的反应。

papers.title: Learning to Work Towards Goals: A Sequential Evaluation of the Effect of a Goal-Setting Course on Academic and Soft Skills
papers.authors: Anaya Dam, Guthrie Gray-Lobe, Michael Kremer, Joost de Laat, Karlijn Morsink
papers.abstract: This study sequentially evaluates a soft-skills course implemented in Ugandan and Kenyan primary schools that replaced academic review time with lessons on goal-setting and related skills as students prepared for high-stakes primary school-leaving exams. An exploratory evaluation in Uganda provided evidence of positive impacts on girls’ test scores. A confirmatory evaluation in Kenya found that the course led to improvements in self-reported soft skills, especially among girls, although no gains in test scores. The study illustrates the utility of sequential evaluation, with exploratory analysis to identify promising hypotheses, followed by out-of-sample testing, as a tool to uncover heterogeneous effects.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED；JEL：C18, C93, D91, I20, I21, I24, I25
papers.zh_title: 学会为目标而工作：目标设定课程对学业与非认知技能影响的序贯评估
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究对乌干达和肯尼亚小学实施的一门软技能课程进行了序贯评估。该课程在学生备考高利害的小学毕业考试期间，用目标设定及相关技能的教学取代了学业复习时间。在乌干达进行的探索性评估提供了该课程对女生考试成绩产生积极影响的证据。在肯尼亚进行的验证性评估发现，该课程改善了学生自我报告的软技能，尤其是女生，但考试成绩未见提升。本研究展示了序贯评估的效用：先通过探索性分析识别有前景的假设，再进行样本外检验，以此作为揭示异质性效应的工具。

papers.title: The Role of Insurers in Health Care Spending and Production: Evidence from Utah
papers.authors: Benjamin R. Handel, Jonathan A. Holmes, Jonathan T. Kolstad, Kurt J. Lavetti
papers.abstract: Private health insurers play a central role in determining the cost and quantity of health care in the United States. Despite this centrality, there has been limited empirical work studying how insurers differentially affect spending and consumption, especially for expensive and pervasive chronic conditions. We use hundreds of natural experiments involving employers switching their primary health insurer, together with a movers design, to estimate these causal effects. We find meaningful differences in total cost and prices for medical and pharmaceutical spending. Within-person changes in spending caused by forced reassignment across pairs of insurers, holding fixed plan generosity, are as large as 30% of total medical spending and 37% of drug spending. We also find substantial dispersion in insurer causal effects on health care spending and quantities for patients with diabetes, hypertension, and other chronic conditions. We find strong evidence for drug offsets as insurers who causally increase drug utilization also reduce medical costs and quantities overall and by condition. Finally, we find that employers do not select plans that reduce costs for their employees based on the match between employee conditions and estimated plan treatment effects, leaving significant cost savings on the table.
papers.zh_title: 保险公司在医疗支出与生产中的作用：来自犹他州的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 私人健康保险公司在美国决定医疗成本与数量方面扮演核心角色。尽管如此，关于保险公司如何差异化影响医疗支出与消费的实证研究仍然有限，尤其是针对昂贵且普遍的慢性病。我们利用涉及雇主更换其主要健康保险公司的数百个自然实验，结合迁移者设计，来估计这些因果效应。我们发现，在医疗和药品支出的总成本与价格上存在显著差异。在保持计划慷慨度不变的情况下，因被迫在保险公司对之间重新分配而导致的个人支出变化，高达总医疗支出的30%和药品支出的37%。我们还发现，对于糖尿病、高血压及其他慢性病患者，保险公司对医疗支出和数量的因果效应存在显著离散性。我们找到了强有力的药物抵消效应证据：那些因果性地增加药物使用的保险公司，同时也降低了总体及按病种划分的医疗成本和数量。最后，我们发现雇主并未根据员工病情与估计的计划处理效应之间的匹配度来选择降低员工成本的计划，从而错失了显著的成本节约机会。

papers.title: In-situ Upgrading or Population Relocation? Direct Impacts and Spatial Spillovers of Slum Renewal Policies
papers.authors: Paul Gertler, Marco Gonzalez-Navarro, Raimundo Undurraga, Joaquin A. Urrego
papers.abstract: Slums are widely viewed as disadvantaged areas characterized by substandard housing and negative neighborhood spillovers that constrain local economic development. Governments typically respond with one of two place-based interventions: (a) in-situ upgrading that improves infrastructure and housing conditions within existing settlements, or (b) relocation of slum households to formal housing elsewhere in the city, freeing valuable urban land for alternative uses. We compare the direct effects and local spatial spillovers of these two approaches in Chile. We construct a 20-year national panel of slum polygons that integrates satellite imagery, census microdata, construction permits, administrative records, crime reports, and property-tax data. Using this dataset, we estimate how each policy affects the physical characteristics of slums and adjacent areas, and whether either intervention shifts the socioeconomic composition of residents. Our empirical strategy relies on Synthetic Difference-in-Differences for causal identification. We find that both policies reduce the share of land devoted to housing within the original slum perimeter — in-situ upgrading by reallocating land toward neighborhood infrastructure, and population relocation by reducing the number of slum households and housing structures. However, only in-situ upgrading generates durable improvements in housing quality and the socioeconomic status of residents. In addition, upgrading produces substantial positive spillovers in nearby neighborhoods, increasing formal housing investment and reducing crime. Moreover, administrative cost data show that in-situ upgrading is roughly one-third less expensive per household than population relocation, underscoring its greater cost-effectiveness.
papers.zh_title: 就地升级还是人口迁移？贫民窟更新政策的直接影响与空间溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 贫民窟通常被视为条件不利的区域，其特点是住房不达标以及负面的邻里溢出效应，制约了地方经济发展。政府通常采取两种基于地点的干预措施之一：（a）就地升级，即改善现有定居点内的基础设施和住房条件；或（b）将贫民窟家庭迁移至城市其他地区的正规住房，从而释放宝贵的城市土地用于其他用途。我们比较了智利这两种方法的直接效应和局部空间溢出效应。我们构建了一个覆盖20年的全国贫民窟多边形面板数据，整合了卫星图像、人口普查微观数据、建筑许可证、行政记录、犯罪报告和房产税数据。利用这一数据集，我们估计了每项政策如何影响贫民窟及其周边地区的物理特征，以及任一干预措施是否改变了居民的社会经济构成。我们的实证策略采用合成双重差分法进行因果识别。我们发现，两种政策都减少了原始贫民窟边界内用于住房的土地比例——就地升级通过将土地重新分配给邻里基础设施，而人口迁移则通过减少贫民窟家庭数量和住房结构。然而，只有就地升级带来了居民住房质量和社会经济状况的持久改善。此外，升级在邻近社区产生了显著的正向溢出效应，增加了正规住房投资并减少了犯罪。而且，行政成本数据显示，就地升级每户的成本大约比人口迁移低三分之一，凸显了其更高的成本效益。

papers.title: Experiencing Carbon Pricing
papers.authors: Stefano Carattini, Ian Fletcher, Chad W. Kendall, Michael K. Price, Arthur Vu
papers.abstract: Many socially desirable policies are not implemented because of their ex-ante unpopularity, but this unpopularity may be overcome through experience with the policy. In this paper, we examine how opposition to carbon pricing in the state of Washington turned into support after voters experienced a cap-and-trade policy with revenues earmarked for environmental purposes – "cap-and-invest." Analyzing voting behavior at the census block group level, we observe that support varies by political affiliation as expected, but experience consistently increases support across the board. Using a proprietary survey, we further show that the increase in support among voters in Washington state is specific to the cap-and invest policy they experienced; support for carbon pricing or climate policies more generally remained unchanged.
papers.zh_title: 体验碳定价
papers.zh_abstract: 许多社会期望的政策因其事前不受欢迎而未能实施，但这种不受欢迎可能通过政策体验得以克服。在本文中，我们研究了华盛顿州的选民在体验了将收入专项用于环境目的的限额与交易政策（即“限额与投资”）后，对碳定价的反对如何转变为支持。通过分析人口普查区块组层面的投票行为，我们观察到支持度按预期因政治派别而异，但体验一致地全面提高了支持度。利用一项专有调查，我们进一步表明，华盛顿州选民支持度的增加是专门针对他们所体验的限额与投资政策的；对碳定价或气候政策的总体支持度保持不变。

papers.title: Anatomy of US Inequality
papers.authors: Oded Galor, Daniel C. Wainstock
papers.abstract: Is income inequality in the United States primarily driven by disparities between ethnic groups or within them? The evidence reveals a striking pattern: 96% of U.S. income inequality arises from variation within groups sharing common ancestral origins, far overshadowing the comparatively small share attributable to differences between these groups. This pattern remains remarkably stable across time and regions.
papers.zh_title: 美国不平等剖析
papers.zh_abstract: 美国的收入不平等主要是由族群之间的差异还是族群内部的差异驱动的？证据揭示了一个显著的模式：美国收入不平等的96%源于具有共同祖先起源的群体内部的差异，这远远超过了可归因于这些群体之间差异的较小份额。这一模式在时间和地区上保持惊人的稳定。

papers.title: Impacts of Contemporaneous Air Pollution Exposure on Cognitive Performance in Kenya
papers.authors: Xuqian Ma, Michelle N. Layvant, Edward Miguel, Eric Ochieng, Ajay Pillarisetti, Michael W. Walker
papers.abstract: We estimate the short-term cognitive effects of fine particulate matter (PM2.5) exposure using highly time-resolved, individual-level data collected during cognitive testing in Kenya. By linking real-time portable monitor readings to Harmonized Cognitive Assessment Protocol (HCAP) scores, we identify acute impacts of pollution on general and domain-specific cognition. Higher PM2.5 exposure during testing is associated with lower cognitive performance, particularly in memory, executive function, and visuospatial tasks. Nonlinear models suggest threshold effects, with larger declines at higher exposure levels.
